1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E01 - Map Bitch
1.plot: A hidden sex map rocks Hartley High as the students' sexcapades are publicly exposed. Caught as the culprit, Amerie becomes an instant social pariah.

1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E02 - Renaissance Titties
1.plot: Amerie, the new outcast, receives a party invitation that gives her butterflies. But when she manages to show up, a bitter surprise awaits.

1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E03 - Eetsway
1.plot: Still gutted by her friend's betrayal, Amerie finds comfort in a new boy, Malakai. A surprise visit sends Darren on an intimate adventure.

1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E04 - Rack Off
1.plot: A piece of locker room gossip tests Amerie's new romance. At the drug-fueled Mardi Gras Slay Ball, things escalate when Malakai faces off with a cop.

1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E06 - Angeline
1.plot: Quinni and Sasha begin to notice the cracks in their relationship. Meanwhile, Harper crashes a party to rescue her ex-friend from a sticky situation.

1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E07 - The Sheriff
1.plot: A rumor about Ms. Obah grows rampant on campus. To clear her name, Amerie stages a provocative protest and stumbles upon a shocking revelation.

1.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S01E08 - Three of Swords
1.plot: Harper finally opens up to Amerie about her trauma whilst Darren faces a tearful confession. A street encounter suddenly takes a violent turn.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E01 - Bird Psycho
2.plot: It's the first day of the new term, but Amerie has already found herself at the center of drama. A PE teacher returns to campus with provocative ideas.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E02 - SLTs vs C**LORDs
2.plot: A hateful thread on the school message board leaves Amerie wondering who's behind it. The feud between two classes escalates into a football match.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E03 - The Feelings Pit
2.plot: While some newfound feelings continue to haunt Malakai, Hartley High's school captain candidates get competitive at a fundraising event.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E04 - Legs Open Hearts Broken
2.plot: As a new wave of notoriety follows Amerie on a camping trip, her efforts to track down a mysterious saboteur only make things worse.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E05 - The Demon King
2.plot: Amerie's group bands together to lift Quinni's spirits after a frightening incident. Missy uncovers a different side of Spider at his home.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E06 - Just Kid $h*t
2.plot: A video gains momentum for Amerie's school captain campaign. Darren grows worried when Ca$h doesn't show up to their housewarming party.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E07 - The Grapes of Voss
2.plot: For all three candidates, Hartley High's long-awaited school captain election turns out like nothing they ever expected.

2.title: FR - Hartley, cœurs à vif - S02E08 - Boys Don't Cry
2.plot: With a begrudged Timothy Voss returning to campus bearing a fiery message of revenge, Hartley's school formal descends into a whirlwind of chaos.

meta.plot: A fresh look at Hartley High over 20 years on. With her new friends - outsiders Quinni and Darren - Amerie must repair her reputation, while navigating love, sex, and heartbreak.

1.title: FR - Deliver Me - S01E01 - What Have You Done?
1.plot: When a boy escaping a local gang is shot, detective Farid sets his sights on small-time boss Mehdi, who is known to recruit minors.

1.title: FR - Deliver Me - S01E02 - Why Is My Son Dead?
1.plot: Mehdi threatens Billy's brother. Dogge discovers a target on his back when he runs into a familiar face at the youth detention center.

1.title: FR - Deliver Me - S01E03 - You Haven't Helped Anyone Here
1.plot: Farid struggles to keep Mehdi off the streets. Dogge turns to drugs to ease his guilt, which results in a violent encounter.

1.title: FR - Deliver Me - S01E04 - In This Life You're a Grown-up
1.plot: Tusse confesses to his role in his brother's death. Farid crosses a line as he chases after the gun used in the killing.

1.title: FR - Deliver Me - S01E05 - You Can't Protect Me
1.plot: When the truth comes to light, Leila makes a decision for her family that transforms Mehdi's fate.

meta.plot: When teenagers Billy and Dogge are recruited by a local gang, the friends face a violent world they are too young to protect themselves from.

meta.plot: La Commune est un quartier difficile qui détient tous les records en matière de chômage, trafic de stupéfiants et criminalité. Après 20 ans passés en prison, le charismatique chef musulman Isham Amadi décide de réintégrer son quartier d'origine où il retrouve son ami d'enfance, devenu le caïd local, Housmane Daoud. Les habitants de la Commune viennent d'apprendre que les immeubles vétustes dans lesquels ils résident seront rasés pour faire place à de nouveaux logements. Soupçonnant là une manœuvre des autorités pour nettoyer la cité de ses éléments les plus « nocifs », certains habitants, rassemblés autour d'Amadi, organisent la résistance. Mais derrière cet affrontement politico-médiatique se profile une guerre de territoire larvée et meurtrière : celle que se livrent les deux frères ennemis Daoud et Amadi, liés par un crime vieux de vingt ans...
Leonardo Cagliostro, a policeman, dies and decides to stay on Earth in order to find out more about the circumstances of his death and to save his wife, Anna, who's in danger.

meta.plot: Kepler is a cop who suffers from a multiple personality disorder. Posted in Calais, he tries to put his life back together with his wife and daughter. When the body of a young student is found in a migrant camp, Kepler pairs up with a young local cop named Alice, who is both his guide and a witness to his downfall.

meta.plot: A group of librarians set off on adventures in an effort to save mysterious, ancient artifacts. Based on the series of "The Librarian" movies.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E01 - And the Crown of King Arthur (1)
1.plot: Someone is killing off potential Librarians and it's up to Flynn Carsen and his new Guardian, Colonel Eve Baird, to save the three that are left.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E02 - And the Sword in the Stone (2)
1.plot: The Serpent Brotherhood is trying to return magic to our world. Flynn, Colonel Baird, and the potential Librarians must stop them before it's too late.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E03 - And the Horns of a Dilemma
1.plot: The Librarians' first solo mission hits a snag when Baird loses the others in a mysterious Labyrinth that magically exists below the skyscraper of a modern corporation.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E04 - And Santa's Midnight Run
1.plot: When the Serpent Brotherhood wants to kill Santa, the Librarians must rescue him and help him accomplish the true, secret purpose of Christmas.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E05 - And the Apple of Discord
1.plot: When the dragons sleeping beneath the earth threaten to awaken and wreak havoc around the world, Flynn returns to help find their hidden treasure.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E06 - And the Fables of Doom
1.plot: The Librarians travel to a town where fairy tales are coming to life - and attacking.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E07 - And the Rule of Three
1.plot: When a group of competitive high-school students start undercutting each other with witchcraft, the Librarians have to intercede before disaster destroys them all.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E08 - And the Heart of Darkness
1.plot: The Librarians encounter the House behind the legend of ALL haunted houses and set out to destroy it.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E09 - And the City of Light
1.plot: An investigation into a missing person uncovers what appears to be an alien invasion.

1.title: FR - The Librarians - S01E10 - And the Loom of Fate
1.plot: Baird begins moving through alternate timelines that reveal the destinies of the librarians.

meta.plot: Framed for murder, Detective Reno Raines becomes a fugitive bounty hunter who fights crime while trying to clear his name. His troubles began after he testified about police corruption, leading Lt. Donald Dixon to set him up.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E01 - Pilot / Renegade
1.plot: Det. Reno Raines becomes a fugitive from justice when his investigation of illicit police activity leads a corrupt lieutenant to frame him for murder.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E02 - Hunting Accident
1.plot: Reno runs a bully (Pete Koch) out of a small town, but the man spots Reno's picture on a wanted poster and informs the police of his whereabouts.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E03 - Final Judgement
1.plot: Reno races the police to capture a hired killer in order to determine if the man has information on Reno's case--and to stop him from murdering a judge.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E04 - La Mala Sombra
1.plot: Reno takes on a group of Salvadorian assassins.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E05 - Mother Courage
1.plot: Reno is sent out to find the man who killed Jimmy, a motorcycle mechanic and finds himself in a small desert town. The town is run by a rich businessman who even has the local lawn under his control. Reno finds a biker club and infiltrates to find his killer.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E06 - Second Chance
1.plot: Lou Delgado, a real estate con man, is arrested then bailed out by her girlfriend, Jeanette. Lou decides to cut his losses and leave town, only to end up being a witness to a shooting.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E07 - Eye of the Storm
1.plot: In the middle of a huge storm, Reno stops at a seemingly deserted diner in a small town, but the place is taken hostage by escaped prisoners with a grudge to settle with the diner owner, who sold them out in prison.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E08 - Payback
1.plot: Two bloodthirsty killers shoot an informant friend of Reno's and give Reno himself a savage beating that leaves him hospitalized. Reno goes undercover at the ranch where one of the duo's ex-wife works, to try and get a lead on the pair, determined to get even.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E09 - The Talisman
1.plot: Reno is close to capturing a vicious killer, when he encounters a feisty teenage girl, who is after the man herself after he murdered her FBI agent father. Reno reluctantly joins forces with the girl, but her hot-headedness jeopardizes the whole case.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E10 - Partners
1.plot: After reading in the Newspaper about the trgic death of his ex-mentor/partner Reno seeks information as to what had caused his ex-partners death.He is informed by one policeman that an infamous drug dealer was responsible.The drug dealer one Jesus Ortega had escaped to Mexico.Reno accompanied by Bobby heads for Mexico for two purposes: Justice,and Revenge.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E11 - Lyons' Roar
1.plot: Reno sets out to bring in Earl Lyons, a former comrade from Reno's Army Ranger days, who now is addicted to morphine and has gone insane, living in the wilderness. Reno must stop Lyons before either the trigger-happy authorities, or drug runners whom Lyons double-crossed, get to him first.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E12 - Val's Song
1.plot: A bullet that was meant for Reno critically injured his girlfriend Valerie instead. After spending months in coma, she is finally released from her suffering. The criminal lieutenant Donald "Dutch" Dixon places a trap for Reno: He lets spreads the news that Valerie is healed.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E13 - Give and Take
1.plot: Reno helps a woman with a flat tire in the desert. Soon after that the woman is found dead in her home.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E14 - Samurai
1.plot: Reno Raines is about to arrest the gangster franc sand when he becomes a witness, as a small Japanese girl is kidnapped.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E15 - The Two Renos
1.plot: Lieutenant Dixon and Frank Bickford think of a plan to finally capture Reno: They release a criminal Tommy, who looks just like Reno.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E16 - Billy
1.plot: Reno is to snatch in a the gangster Dad Meecham and his three sons. While a brawl in the Saloon the sons become arrested, Meecham however can escape.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E17 - Headcase
1.plot: Joe Cortez had sworn revenge with his arrest. He breaks out of prison and procures himself weapons and money.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E18 - The Hot Tip
1.plot: Reno is to bring Amber Dane, a Hollywood Starlet, before court. Reason: Amber allegedly killed her friend five years before .

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E19 - Moody River
1.plot: Reno helps out a man being attacked in the middle of the road. The man takes Reno home with him to Second Chance Farms: a place where ex-criminals who want to begin a new life are able to work.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E20 - Vanished
1.plot: The daughter of Reno's loyal long-time friend Assistant D. A. Wells begins going on a downhill spiral, entering a life of drug addiction. Upon further investigation, Reno and Cheyenne discover there is much more to this family tragedy than originally thought. They soon uncover a rather elaborate scheme involving black market drugs, a touring rock band, and a corrupt band manager who plans to use the girl to leverage Wells into dropping the impending case against her brother, a notorious drug dealer.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E21 - Fighting Cage (1)
1.plot: Reno receives a video tape as proof that his estranged brother Mitch is still alive, despite being declared dead in Vietnam by the military many years prior. The video tape depicts Mitch competing in a rather sketchy underground cage fighting tournament. Reno decides to enter this strange underground world and investigate his brother's disappearance by posing as one of the fighters. He soon discovers that his brother has been brainwashed, and rescuing him from this dangerous and barbaric lifestyle will not be quite as easy as he once thought.

1.title: FR - Le Rebelle - S01E22 - Fighting Cage (2)
1.plot: After having some success in the preliminary rounds of the tournament, Reno begins to make some progress with helping his brother Mitch regain his memory. This becomes easier once he slowly starts having flashbacks of childhood memories of the two. Eventually Mitch joins Reno's side. The two bring down the entire cage fighting circus and those who conduct it, with the help of Bobby Sixkiller and a special task force.

meta.plot: Once rivals in school, two brilliant doctors reunite by chance — each facing life’s worst slump and unexpectedly finding solace in each other.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After a successful career as a plastic surgeon, Yeo Jeong-woo faces a swift downfall. Nam Ha-neul collapses amid a brutal career as an anesthesiologist.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Jeong-woo moves into a new home and runs into his old rival Ha-neul, who is his neighbor. As her well-being takes a toll, Ha-neul makes a stand at work.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When Jeong-woo's home gets broken into, Ha-neul asks him to stay at her place. After the two share a night of fun, she decides to help him in his trial.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After a trip together, Jeong-woo wonders if he was Ha-neul's first love — until she goes on a blind date. Ha-neul goes on an interview for a faraway job.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Jeong-woo travels far to show up for Ha-neul after her interview — and several heart-to-heart moments force her to ask him how he truly feels.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A run-in with an old classmate leaves Ha-neul feeling jealous. Regardless, she gives Jeong-woo much-needed emotional support, which opens him up.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: While Jeong-woo faces a mysterious attack, Ha-neul finds a crucial clue at his home. Jeong-woo encounters someone who may turn the tides of his trial.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: After holding hands with Jeong-woo, Ha-neul tries to decipher their relationship status — but her mental health begins to take a toll amid sudden news.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Jeong-woo and Ha-neul navigate life without each other after she pushes him away. Jeong-woo panics as he operates for the first time since his trial.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: As Jeong-woo struggles with his trauma, Ha-neul shows up to support him. But after he rejects her help, he discovers what made her break up with him.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: As their love blossoms, Ha-neul and Jeong-woo struggle to keep their relationship a secret. Lee Hong-ran bonds with Bin Dae-yeong during his time of need.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: While on a nostalgic getaway, Ha-neul and Jeong-woo are joined by Hong-ran and Dae-yeong. Ha-neul confronts Min Kyung-min about a potential foul play.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: Jeong-woo, alongside Ha-neul's family, awaits the outcome of her surgery. Later, he learns the full depth of Kyung-min's complicated motives.

1.title: FR - Docteur Slump [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: Needing an escape, Jeong-woo takes a special trip to Busan with Ha-neul and her family. He later laments as Ha-neul's new job takes her away from him.

meta.plot: Villains from some of television's most popular reality shows will be put in competition, where each week one will be eliminated until only one winner remains.

1.title: FR - House of Villains - S01E01 - Welcome to the House of Villains
1.plot: The villains move into their new lair and start sizing up their competition. Omarosa proves to be the HBIC as she immediately targets who she believes to be the weakest link. Alliances form as each villain strategizes their way to the $200,000 cash prize. After a battle royale and some manipulation, one villain becomes the supervillain of the week and chooses the fate of three castmates by putting them up for elimination.

1.title: FR - House of Villains - S01E02 - The Lesser of Three Evils
1.plot: Corinne, Jax and Shake compete in the first redemption challenge; one villain questions whether or not they've been sabotaged by a supposed ally; one of the hit list nominees becomes the first villain voted out of the house.

1.title: FR - House of Villains - S01E03 - Secret Identities
1.plot: After the first contestant is eliminated, a surprise guest visits; the remaining villains must compete in a masquerade ball challenge where limited clues and extreme costumes help them guess their castmates' identities.

1.title: FR - House of Villains - S01E04 - Dance With the Devil
1.plot: The Villains are visited by another surprise guest; the hit list nominees must convince the others to unknowingly participate in their redemption challenge; Bobby is insulted after being put up on the hit list; New York continues to spiral.

1.title: FR - Feu de camp - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Feu de camp - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Misérables - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In war-torn France, convict Jean Valjean and seamstress Fantine must decide their futures. Valjean's past continues to haunt him. Fantine meets the love of her life.

1.title: FR - Les Misérables - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Fantine leaves Paris to find work and must make a heartbreaking decision. Jean Valjean has forged a new identity, and Javert is determined to catch him out.

1.title: FR - Les Misérables - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Manipulated by Javert, Jean Valjean is ready to turn himself in, but he makes a promise to Fantine that changes everything.

1.title: FR - Les Misérables - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Jean Valjean worries when Cosette meets a young man. The Thenardiers plot their revenge.

1.title: FR - Les Misérables - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Paris is on the brink of revolt. Javert remains obsessed by the pursuit of Jean Valjean. Anxious Valjean makes a plan. Marius makes a promise to Cosette.

1.title: FR - Les Misérables - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The revolutionaries fight on. Jean Valjean is conflicted over Marius and Cosette's love and seeks Marius at the barricade. Javert confronts Valjean.

meta.plot: France, 1815. Jean Valjean, a common thief, is released from prison after having lived a hell in life for 19 years, but a small mistake puts the law again on his trail. Ruthless Inspector Javert pursues him thorough years, driven by a twisted sense of justice, while Valjean reforms himself, thrives and dedicates his life to good deeds. In 1832, while the revolution ravages the streets of Paris, Valjean and Javert cross their paths for the last time.

En 1993. Clara Garnier, 5 ans, est enlevée. Ses ravisseurs demandent contre sa libération une énorme somme d’argent. L’échange de la rançon se termine en bain de sang : la mère de Clara est tuée et l’enfant ne réapparaitra jamais. Vivante ou morte, le mystère s’installe, provoquant un traumatisme dans la région et dans sa famille, l’une des plus fortunées de la Côte d’Azur.  25 ans plus tard, Aurore Garnier, la sœur aînée de Clara est devenue officier de police. À l’occasion d’une enquête, elle découvre que Clara est toujours vivante mais vit sous une autre identité sans connaître ses origines. Aurore va tout mettre en œuvre pour que Clara retrouve sa famille. Mais ce retour inespéré va déclencher une série d’événements violents et faire remonter à la surface des secrets de famille que chacun pensait enfouis à jamais…

FR - Parfum - S01E01 - Ambergris
1.plot: As police investigate the bizarre and brutal murder of alluring singer Katharina Läufer, five of her former classmates reunite at her funeral.

1.title: FR - Parfum - S01E02 - Skatole
1.plot: A missing persons case linked to the boarding school is reopened. When the friends play a strange game, tensions between Butsche and Roman boil over.

1.title: FR - Parfum - S01E03 - Synthesis
1.plot: The detectives make a gruesome discovery. At the brothel, Butsche bonds with Pearl's daughter, Elsie. Nadja learns about the group's shared obsession.

1.title: FR - Parfum - S01E04 - The Third Substance
1.plot: Butsche visits Elena for help with Elsie, angering Roman once again. Nadja drops a bomb on Grünberg and tests a provocative hypothesis about Katharina.

1.title: FR - Parfum - S01E05 - The Heart Notes
1.plot: Elena seeks safety in an unlikely place, Roman exacts revenge, and secrets from the past surface as Nadja interviews Merten Brodmann's mother.

1.title: FR - Parfum - S01E06 - Captivation
1.plot: When another victim turns up, the police zero in on a suspect. Nadja's lingering doubts -- and a tip from Köhler -- lead to a shocking confrontation.

meta.plot: When a singer is found murdered, with her scent glands excised from her body, detectives probe a group of friends who attended boarding school with her.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Young Adso of Melk leaves the ranks of his father, a powerful warlord, and joins William of Baskerville, a Franciscan monk who heads to an abbey in northern Italy to participate in a theological debate.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After another outrageous event occurs, William's investigation leads him and his apprentice Adso to the doors of the mysterious library, where everyone but the librarians are forbidden to enter. Meanwhile, the inquisitor Bernardo Gui, Pope John's ambassador, brings the wrath of his fanaticism to anyone who cross his path.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: While William asks for a magnifying glass to be able to proceed with his investigation, Adso meets the mysterious Occitan girl and huntress Anna pursues Bernardo Gui's entourage to avenge her family.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After a new tragic event occurs, William and Adso increase their efforts to decipher the mysterious structure of the labyrinthine library, although Adso is more interested in spending time with the Occitan girl.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Anna is saved at the last minute. Bernardo Gui's armed entourage arrives at the abbey. After a copious feast, an insidious monk poisons his ears by reporting the presence inside the sacred walls of some former Dolcinian heretics.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Anna gets better. The Occitan girl gets into trouble. Meanwhile, the debate continues, but is interrupted by another tragic event.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Gui uses Salvatore to get to Remigio and put him on trial. William gives his thoughts on both the show trial and the poverty debate between the Franciscans and the Church. Anna tries to rescue her friends, and another mysterious death occurs.

1.title: FR - Le Nom de la rose - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: With the debate over, Gui condemns Remigio and the girl to be burnt at the stake. William and Adso try to solve the library's puzzle and catch the killer before it's too late, and Anna makes a final desperate move.

meta.plot: Northern Italy, 1327. The Franciscan monk William of Baskerville and his young apprentice Adso of Melk reach an isolated Benedictine abbey on the Alps to aid in a dispute between the Franciscan Order and the Avignon papacy. Upon arrival at the abbey, the two find themselves involved in a chain of mysterious deaths.

A veteran beat cop and teenage girl fall to their deaths from a tower block in south-east London, leaving a five-year-old boy and rookie police officer Lizzie Griffiths on the roof, only for them to go missing. Detective Sergeant Sarah Collins is drafted in to investigate, working to find Lizzie before she comes to serious harm, but also to uncover the truth behind the grisly tower block deaths.

1.title: FR - The Tower - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: DS Sarah Collins and her colleague, DC Steve Bradshaw, officers in the Directorate of Special Investigations (DSI), are called to an incident at Portland Tower in south east London. They find at the bottom of the tower the dead bodies of long-serving police officer, PC Hadley Matthews, and a 15-year-old Libyan refugee, Farah Mehenni.

1.title: FR - The Tower - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With Lizzie still on the run, Sarah finally persuades her boss, DCI Tim Bailie, to go public about Lizzie's disappearance. Later, she makes a series of discoveries about the events that led up to the Portland Tower fall which further complicate the case.

1.title: FR - The Tower - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Lizzie decides to turn herself in, but first she meets Kieran Shaw in secret, who tries to persuade her not to implicate herself. When Sarah finally interviews Lizzie, the explosive truth about what really happened on top of the tower emerges

2.title: FR - The Tower - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Sarah searches for a vanished teenager; Lizzie investigates a case of domestic violence.

2.title: FR - The Tower - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Sarah and Lizzie find themselves working on the same murder case.

2.title: FR - The Tower - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: As the manhunt closes in on Brannon, Sarah realizes where Tania's body might be buried.

2.title: FR - The Tower - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: The Brannon manhunt reaches its climax, and Sarah faces Tania's killer.

meta.plot: An overgrown field and a stretch of highway connect a series of grisly murders spanning several decades as grieving families search for answers.

1.title: FR - Scène de crime : Les champs macabres du Texas - S01E01 - Nobody Sees Anything
1.plot: Skeletons are found in a field — an area where women have disappeared since the 1970s — and a Texas community fears there's a serial killer at work.

1.title: FR - Scène de crime : Les champs macabres du Texas - S01E02 - Culture of Suspicion
1.plot: The case of a missing 12-year-old gets media attention, while more bodies turn up. Investigators have a profile of the killer and suspects emerge.

1.title: FR - Scène de crime : Les champs macabres du Texas - S01E03 - The Reckoning
1.plot: Pieces of the puzzle come together when an abducted woman jumps from a moving vehicle and new evidence from an old case points to a suspect.

meta.plot: Marnie has a life-threatening condition. The doctors believe it is in her best interests to be allowed to die, but her loving family disagree. And so begins a fight that will take them through every stage of a legal process, as they struggle to contemplate this huge decision. Who decides? And in whose best interests will it be?

1.title: FR - Pour Marnie - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: As Marnie's health deteriorates, doctors say it's in her best interests to stop care. Defiant, her parents prepare to fight their decision. But doubt soon grows — what is right?

1.title: FR - Pour Marnie - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Andrew wavers, finding himself at odds with Nicci. With their relationship under pressure, Nicci turns to a surprising place for help. Meanwhile, Katie is torn between her parents.

1.title: FR - Pour Marnie - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Nicci's campaign becomes national news, causing trouble for Katie. Andrew doubts his choice to leave. With court looming, Nicci’s team need evidence. How far will she go to win?

1.title: FR - Pour Marnie - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: In court, hope for Nicci’s case, and a surprising victory, grows. Andrew is confronted about his past behavior. As the verdict nears, who will get to decide Marnie’s future?

meta.plot: Marthe Laverdière partage convivialement avec ses invités conseils et astuces horticoles. En platebandes ou sur le balcon, en ville ou à la campagne, le but est d’apprivoiser notre nature dans la simplicité et les fous rires, sans dépenser une fortune.

1.title: FR - Planter avec Marthe - S01E01 -
FR - Planter avec Marthe - S01E02 -

meta.plot: Due to a rare phenomenon, a woman finds herself pregnant with twins by two men. Over time, she strives to keep her family united — and her secrets hidden.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E01 - More Than I Ever Wanted
1.plot: After uncovering Tomás' betrayal, Liana attends a party with her best friend Débora, but the night ends with a sinister — and life-changing — twist.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E02 - Eyes Wide Open
1.plot: While Tomás celebrates Liana's pregnancy, her crisis deepens amid tangled family secrets. Sílvia receives life-altering news about Inácio's health.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E03 - A Love Divided
1.plot: When Tomás learns the truth about the twins, Liana faces a tough decision about their future while keeping the secret from their family.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E04 - In Pieces
1.plot: After the twins' birth, Tomás visits Betina's house. Oscar's bar activities are disrupted by an anonymous complaint that has serious repercussions.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E05 - Tough Choices
1.plot: After a tumultuous period, Oscar decides to leave Brazil. Norma moves in with Liana and Tomás, and the boys develop a passion for futsal.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E06 - The Writing on the Wall
1.plot: Tomás apologizes for his harshness to Marcos and Mateus. Vicente proposes to Sílvia, and Liana faces her past as Oscar makes a shocking decision.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E07 - Secrets and Shadows
1.plot: After Oscar hires Inácio to DJ at his bar, Liana feels cornered as he grows dangerously close to her family, prompting Tomás to intervene.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E08 - Uncomfortable Truths
1.plot: Tomás confronts Oscar, who sets conditions to leave the family alone. The twins' birthday spirals into chaos when an unexpected visitor crashes the party.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E09 - Never Again
1.plot: Tensions peak as Oscar, with Cláudia's help, seeks the truth through a DNA test. The results culminate in a dramatic showdown at Liana's home.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E10 - Picking Up the Pieces
1.plot: Tomás faces the consequences of his confrontation with Oscar. As life moves on, Liana and the boys navigate new beginnings and old pains.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E11 - The Truth Will Set You Free
1.plot: Tomás gains respect preaching in prison, while Marcos and Mateus face bullying over their father's past. The tension escalates into a fight at school.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E12 - Love and Fear
1.plot: Tomás exits prison, showing startling indifference to his family. Meanwhile, a visit to Júlia's house by the boys takes an unforeseen turn.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E13 - Settling Scores
1.plot: Family secrets unravel as Marcos questions his paternity, leading to an escape. A meeting at Débora's bar ends in confusion.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E14 - The Truth Hurts
1.plot: Family tensions escalate as Tomás publicly reveals long-held secrets. Meanwhile, Marcos grapples with his identity, leading to a risky decision.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E15 - Can Lies Heal?
1.plot: Marcos awakens from a coma with fragmented memories, sparking family dilemmas as he struggles to reconnect with his past.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E16 - Cause and Effect
1.plot: As Marcos fully recovers his past, tensions rise, prompting Liana to have a difficult conversation. Meanwhile, Inácio and Bia share happy news.

1.title: FR - Les Morceaux de notre vie - S01E17 - My Other Half
1.plot: Liana reveals a painful truth to Marcos, sparking emotional healing. As new chapters begin for some, Tomás' unresolved conflicts dangerously resurface.

meta.plot: Lolo is an actress and works hard to get there. She has just landed the leading role in a feature film. The apotheosis. When his father learns that he has cancer, and reacts to it like a child, the machine jams and everything goes wrong. His quest for serenity will transform into a quest for identity.

meta.plot: Six "agents of mystery" with excellent chemistry probe into bizarre incidents that cannot be explained by science in creative and unique ways.

1.title: FR - Agents du mystère - S01E01 - The Followers of the Evil One (1)
1.plot: Six celeb agents tackle their first mission: to investigate an abandoned factory possibly linked to three missing women, rescue them and avoid capture.

1.title: FR - Agents du mystère - S01E02 - The Followers of the Evil One (2)
1.plot: The group finds an imprisoned journalist whose notes reveal clues about the satanic church. But they must crack a code to get access to a hidden video.

1.title: FR - Agents du mystère - S01E03 - The Followers of the Evil One (3)
1.plot: A spirit warns the agents of a catastrophic ritual ahead. As they face capture, will they be able to stop the zealots in time and save the women?

1.title: FR - Agents du mystère - S01E04 - The Deep Sea Mystery (1)
1.plot: The agents must search a submarine where five crew members' bio-signals have disappeared – except for one erratic signal – and secure the memory drives.

1.title: FR - Agents du mystère - S01E05 - The Deep Sea Mystery (2)
1.plot: As the submarine starts to run out of oxygen, the solution requires a password. Meanwhile, a surprising truth about the crew members' deaths is revealed.

1.title: FR - Agents du mystère - S01E06 - The Deep Sea Mystery (3)
1.plot: While the agents search for the memory drives, an anomaly inches closer. As time runs out, will they be able to escape the danger unscathed?

meta.plot: Liv vit son premier semestre à la fac, l'occasion rêvée pour elle de se réinventer et d'expérimenter de nouvelles choses. Dès les premiers jours, elle se lie d'amitié avec Jane, sa colocataire et trouve même l'amour dans les bras de Taylor, super star de cinéma qui se trouve dans la même université.  Un début très prometteur pour cette jeune promo, enfin jusqu'à cette soirée où tout a basculé... Qui croire ? Qui est innocent ? Derrière les secrets de chacun, les soupçons montent.

FR - In The Vault - S01E02 -

FR - Indian Summers - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Ralph Whelan and the rest of the Indian Civil Service begin the annual move to Simla where the doyenne of British society Cynthia Coffin prepares the exclusive white British Club for the summer season.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Sarah becomes suspicious of Alice's past and begins some detective work to uncover the real reasons behind her move to India.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: It's the Sipi Fair in Simla, the only time in the year that the Indian community are allowed onto the grounds of the British Club.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: There's much excitement in Simla as the Viceroy arrives. Ralph is troubled when he discovers that the only evidence that linked Chandru Mohan to the Congress Party is missing.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Ralph tries to take advantage of divisions among the Indian communities. Cynthia is shocked by Eugene's revelation about his finances. Sarah places Alice in a very difficult position.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The pressure continues to mount on Ralph as Jaya reveals the real reason for her visit to Simla. A mountaineer saves Alice, Madeleine and Ronnie from a perilous situation.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Simla is buzzing as it prepares for the annual amateur dramatic production, but the play is overshadowed by the news that a murder victim has been found in the river.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The British community turn out in force for the murder trial. Ian is wracked with guilt about his part in Ramu's arrest and Leena is torn apart in the witness box.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Madeleine is dealt some devastating news, and Alice is terrified when Sarah threatens to tell everyone that Alice's husband is alive. Tensions between Ralph and Cynthia escalate.

1.title: FR - Indian Summers - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: In the final episode, Ramu Sood's fate is left in Ralph's hands, a vote takes place at the club to lift the colour bar, and Alice and Aafrin prepare to go public with their relationship.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E01 - Indian Man, British Suit
2.plot: The epic drama picks up in 1935. A terrorist attack against the British Viceroy of India puts Aafrin in the frame, while Cynthia urges Ralph to make a play for the top job.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E02 - Black Kite
2.plot: Aafrin's wounded comrade Naresh is convinced someone has betrayed him. As Aafrin struggles to contain him, he discovers the truth is darker and more dangerous than he knew.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E03 - White Gods
2.plot: Aafrin's troubles deepen as his personal and political worlds collide, while Ralph needs to befriend the slippery but powerful Mahrajah of Patiala and his mistress Sirene.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E04 - The Empty Chair
2.plot: A fashion show at the club ends with a horrifying attack on one of the guests. Ralph plays detective to find the culpit, but the truth is worse than he could have imagined.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E05 - Hide and Seek
2.plot: Lord Hawthorne orders the police to arrest Adam and Ralph uncovers a shocking family secret. Alice decides to take a stand against her husband, and an earthquake hits Simla.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E06 - A Gift for the King
2.plot: As Simla gathers to celebrate King George's Silver Jubilee, Aafrin is trapped in a nightmare - the terrorist Naresh Banerjee is plotting a bomb strike at the picnic.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E07 - The Proposal
2.plot: The Whelan's marriage faces its darkest hour as the Maharajah and Sirene return to Simla. Knowing Ralph needs his support, the Maharajah makes him an indecent proposal.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E08 - The Birthday Party
2.plot: Alice and Aafrin decide to flee Simla with Cynthia's help, but Charlie comes close to unveiling the truth, while Ian discovers some devastating information about Ramu Sood.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E09 - Winner Takes All
2.plot: Ralph's life spirals out of control. The announcement of the new Viceroy leaves his ambitions in tatters, and he realises those closest have been conspiring behind his back.

2.title: FR - Indian Summers - S02E10 - Leaving Home
2.plot: Alice and Charlie prepare to leave India for good. Ralph and Aafri make momentous decisions about their careers. Cynthia is in a bidding war as Chotipool goes under the hammer.

meta.plot:
Epic drama set in the summer of 1932 where India dreams of independence, but the British are clinging to power. 

Set against the sweeping grandeur of the Himalayas and tea plantations of Northern India, the drama tells the rich and explosive story of the decline of the British Empire and the birth of modern India, from both sides of the experience. At the heart of the story lie the implications and ramifications of the tangled web of passions, rivalries and clashes that define the lives of those brought together in this summer which will change everything.

1.title: FR - Infidèle - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Emma lives a happy life with her family, until she suspect her husband of cheating.

1.title: FR - Infidèle - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Shocked by new evidence, Emma goes to her party organised by Matteo. But doubt gnaws at her.

1.title: FR - Infidèle - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Distracted by her personal life, Emma misdiagnoses a patient and he ends up in hospital, fighting for his life.

1.title: FR - Infidèle - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Destabilized by the tension between his parents, Luigi has a violent panic attack in front of his father.

1.title: FR - Infidèle - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Giulia, Matteo's mother, dies of sleeping pill abuse. Matteo suspects Emma of giving them to her, which she denies.

1.title: FR - Infidèle - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In the presence of Matteo, Candice and her parents, Emma reveals everything: adultery, lies and abortion.

2.title: FR - Infidèle - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Emma is learning to have her own love life while balancing her teenage son, after finding out her husband had been cheating on her for two years.

2.title: FR - Infidèle - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Luigi takes his new job too far and ends up in hospital. Emma persuades Gabriel to keep their relationship with no strings attached.

2.title: FR - Infidèle - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Candice decides to leave Matteo and Juliette and Emma realises the extent of her stalker.

2.title: FR - Infidèle - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Matteo is forced to quit his job after being left alone with Juliette and Emma discovers Gabriel's secret to making money.

2.title: FR - Infidèle - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Candice is depressed and resorts to drugs to make her feel better, while Emma gets confused after playing house with Matteo and Luigi.

2.title: FR - Infidèle - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: While dealing with the passing of Candice, Luigi must fess up to being her dealer and Emma and Matteo are finally able to move on from the past.

meta.plot: The story of Emma Sandrelli, a doctor who is close to her patients and caring mother, whose life is about to explode when she learns that her husband has had an affair with a young woman for several months. Then begins for her a real descent into hell that will lead her very, very far...  Adaptation of the British series "Doctor Foster."

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After his family was brutally attacked by a gang of masked assailants, Joe Logan is approached by FBI agents Mike and Emma to help investigate the murder of his wife and son.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Higan learns that a string of recent murder victims were all former ninjas who had their covers blown. Higan goes after the boss ninja and swears to take revenge for his dead wife and son by crushing the organization.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Yamaji addresses questions from one of his lieutenants regarding Higan's survival. Meanwhile, Mike joins forces with Higan and Emma to launch their own independent investigation into AUZA.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A mysterious benefactor warns Higan that it's impossible for him to infiltrate AUZA City without any help. Meanwhile, Mike and Emma walk away from the accident with light injuries and relaunch their investigation into AUZA and the ninjas.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Mike uses information from Emma to track down Jason, a former AUZA employee. Elsewhere, after having his first attempt to infiltrate AUZA City stopped by Zai, Higan learns of an alternate route from the mysterious benefactor.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Aska rescues Higan from certain doom and her true identity is unveiled. Meanwhile, Mike learns that he is now wanted by his own agency, the FBI.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: As Higan and Lil engage in combat, Higan achieves complete synchronization with his Gusoku Gear, known as "Kamui." Afterward, Yamaji finally orders Zai to eliminate Higan.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The CEO of AUZA dreams of taking total control of the country's energy infrastructure using Yamaji's ninja organization. Emma makes it her personal goal to stop them with Higan's help. Meanwhile, Jason and Mike are still on the run.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Emma and Jason combine their efforts to launch a hacking attack on AUZA which results in them obtaining top-secret information. Meanwhile, Mike and Higan fend off a squadron of mercenaries sent by AUZA to stop them.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Higan mourns Emma's death when a letter challenging him to a duel arrives from Zai. Mike and Jason want to leak the data they hacked from AUZA to the public but discover they can't due to Emma's external memory drive being encrypted.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Higan wins his duel against Zai, but stops short of killing him. Joseph sends his mercenaries to attack the ninja hideout after cutting his ties with Yamaji. Meanwhile, Mike figures out the key to decrypting the data Emma left behind.

1.title: FR - Ninja Kamui [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: Dilly adheres to her original orders and protects Joseph by choosing to fight Yamaji. Higan has a surprise visitor who begs him to put an end to the contradictions of the ninja clan. Meanwhile, Mike has been captured at the FBI offices.

meta.plot: A team of assassins exacts a bloody retribution on Joe Logan – a former ninja who escaped his clan – and his family for betraying their ancient code. Rising from his seeming "death," Joe will re-emerge as his former self – Ninja Kamui – to avenge his family and friends and bring down the very clan that made him.

After a traffic accident, Kazuma Sato’s  disappointingly brief life was supposed to be over, but he wakes up to  see a beautiful girl before him. She claims to be a goddess, Aqua, and  asks if he would like to go to another world and bring only one thing  with him. Kazuma decides to bring the goddess herself, and they are  transported to a fantasy world filled with adventure, ruled by a demon  king. Now Kazuma only wants to live in peace, but Aqua wants to solve  many of this world’s problems, and the demon king will only turn a blind  eye for so long…

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E01 - This Self-Proclaimed Goddess and Reincarnation in Another World!
1.plot: Gamer Kazuma dies in a freak accident, and is met in the afterlife by a crass goddess, Aqua.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E02 - An Explosion for This Chunibyo!
1.plot: It's great for Kazuma that he brought Aqua along with  him, but unlike in a game world, much is missing from his adventurer's  lifestyle. No money, no equipment, and even fighting the lowest ranking  monsters is a hard-fought battle. That's when they decide to recruit new  party members.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E03 - A Panty Treasure in This Right Hand!
1.plot: A low-grade goddess turned arch priest who works hard to acquire party trick skills, a disappointing arch wizard who can only unleash explosion magic once per day, and Kazuma himself, whose only redeeming quality is his good luck. Kazuma despairs over the completely useless party that's been formed.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E04 - Explosion Magic for This Formidable Enemy!
1.plot: All of the weak monsters have gone into hiding since a leader of the devil king's army has settled in near town. Kazuma, who had been focusing on improving his skills, is stuck at a standstill. With nothing else to do, Kazuma tags along with Megumin's training, which consists of unleashing explosion magic into an abandoned castle.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E05 - A Price for This Cursed Sword!
1.plot: With debt looming over her, Aqua convinces Kazuma to  accept a high difficulty quest to purify a lake, which doesn't require  killing any monsters.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E06 - A Conclusion to This Worthless Fight!
1.plot: Dullahan, a top leader in the Devil King's army, yet again appears at the city in a frenzied rage.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E07 - A Second Death in This Freezing Season!
1.plot: "I want money." After paying back the debt Aqua has racked up, Kazuma and Aqua's monetary situation grows even more dire. The party accepts a quest to kill helpless Snow Sprites and heads for the snowy mountains in order to escape from the stables during this winter so cold it freezes Kazuma's eyelashes solid.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E08 - A Loving Hand for Our Party When We Can't Make It Through Winter!
1.plot: Kazuma and Aqua can't properly accept rewards from quests due to their mediocre party lineup, and are so destitute that even keeping wood on the fire is difficult. Kazuma comes up with a plan and visits a magical accessories shop run by a woman called Wiz.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E09 - God's Blessing on This Wonderful Shop!
1.plot: Kazuma runs into some adventurers he knows while out for a walk and decides to go with them to a shop run by succubi said to show its customers enticing dreams.

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E10 - Final Flame for this Over-the-top Fortress!
1.plot: The rampaging ancient weapon: the mobile fortress, Destroyer, is headed straight for Kazuma and party's city!

1.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S01E11 -

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E01 - Give Me Deliverance from This Judicial Injustice!
2.plot: Darkness, Aqua, and Megumin are back to continue their quest against the Devil King. Kazuma is back too, but the only adventures he has waiting for him exist within the criminal justice system.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E02 - A Friend for This Crimson Demon Girl!
2.plot: Kazuma and Aqua meet Yunyun, a Crimson Demon girl who claims to be Megumin's rival. The feuding magic users then square off in a competition that could have ruinous repercussions for both of them.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E03 - Peace for the Master of This Labyrinth!
2.plot: A new discovery in a previously mapped out dungeon might be the first step toward Kazuma repaying his massive debt. Unfortunately for him, Aqua is determined to help.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E04 - A Betrothed for This Noble Daughter!
2.plot: Darkness is back, but not to stay, if Kazuma and her father have anything to say about it.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E05 - Servitude for This Masked Knight!
2.plot: As a result of a magic circle that Aqua had drawn in Keele's dungeon, strange explosive doll monsters have started to appear, putting the town at risk.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E06 - Goodbye to This Irritating Living World!
2.plot: Kazuma is surprised to discover that Vanir had an extra life and has since quit his position as a commander to work at Wiz's shop, striking up a business partnership to sell products from Kazuma's world.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E07 - An Invitation for This Knucklehead!
2.plot: Vanir gives Kazuma the choice of either selling the intellectual rights for his real world products for a one-off payment of 300 million eris, or maintaining a profit-sharing contract of 1 million eris a month.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E08 - Sightseeing in This Pitiful City!
2.plot: Kazuma and the others manage to lure the kite hawks into a cave and deal with them all at once, only to cause more trouble for the other travelers later when Aqua attracts some zombies.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E09 - A Goddess for This Corrupt Hot Springs Town!
2.plot: The party makes their way to Arcanretia, a city known for it's recuperative hot springs! But what they don't know about the city might spell doom for their vacation.

2.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S02E10 - God's Blessing on This Wonderful Party!
2.plot: Evading the angry mob, the gang discover that the source of the town's water is being poisoned by the man from earlier, who is revealed to be one of the Devil King's army leaders, Hans the Deadly Poison Slime.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E01 - God's Blessings on This Bright Future!
3.plot: After defeating Sylvia at the Crimson Demon Village, Kazuma and his party look forward to receiving a reward that could mean freedom from the grind of having to fulfill quests. Kazuma himself, however, seems to be having nightmares and bouts of paranoia.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E02 - A Smile for This Dour Girl!
3.plot: Kazuma and the gang receive a letter from Princess Iris. She wants to share a meal with them while hearing about their adventures. While Kazuma is giddy with wonderment of her beauty, Darkness is terrified of heads rolling in the event of any rudeness.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E03 - A Re-education for This Bright Little Girl!
3.plot: What started as dinner at Darkness's mansion with Princess Iris has turned into Kazuma being dragged back to the castle! Rain explains the situation, and Kazuma agrees to keep Iris company. His wild stories leave the princess with stars in her eyes.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E04 - Divine Punishment for This Handsome Gentleman Thief!
3.plot: Kazuma thinks of a way to stay in the capital for Iris's sake, and declares that he will capture the thief who's causing a stir in the streets! Since the thief targets nobles with bad behavior, Kazuma and his friends decide to stay at Alderp's mansion.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E05 - Nefarious Friends for This Sheltered Princess!
3.plot: The Devil King's army attack alarm rings in the royal capital! The adventurer's guild calls on high-level adventurers to join the battle. Having failed to capture the thief at Alderp's mansion, Kazuma joins the fight in order to redeem his reputation.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E06 - A Farewell to This Lavish Lifestyle!
3.plot: Chris tells Kazuma that the necklace he and Iris swapped bodies with is a sacred treasure, and it is dangerous and can threaten lives depending on its use. Princess Iris is in danger! Two robbers dressed in black sneak into the royal castle at night!

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E07 - Rest for This Up-and-Coming Adventurer!
3.plot: Kazuma and his friends return to Axel and receive 300 million eris as a reward for subjugating Sylvia, an executive of the Devil King's army. Kazuma and Aqua go to high-end restaurants, and Aqua enjoys her long-awaited life as a celebrity.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E08 - An Eternal Rest for the Master of This Lake!
3.plot: Kazuma and the gang fail to defeat the hydra in the lake near Axel. The gang hopes to rely on knights from the capital, but they've been delayed due to a bandit disturbance for which a bounty has been issued. Darkness, however, is obsessed with the hydra.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E09 - A Talking-To for This Runaway!
3.plot: Darkness departs the mansion leaving behind a note. Not satisfied by a single note, Kazuma, Aqua, and Megumin protest in front of the Dustiness manor but are rudely turned away. Kazuma, frustrated with everything, is approached by Dust who needs his help.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E10 - Blessings for This Selfish Bride!
3.plot: Darkness's wedding to Aldarp is imminent. Despite Aqua's and Megumin's pleas, Kazuma has no intention of intervening. Vanir then visits the mansion and reveals a shocking secret to Kazuma.

3.title: FR - KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! - S03E11 - God's Blessing for These Unchanging Days!
3.plot: Kazuma has crashed Darkness's wedding to Aldarp and pays him the two billion eris he says he's owed. Aqua and Kazuma try to make off with Darkness but Aldarp won't relinquish her so easily and orders his guards to stop their escape.

meta.plot: Set in the heart of the Spanish Romani community, the fiction follows police inspector Elena Blanco and her team, as they try to crack the crime case pertaining to the murders of sisters Lara and Susana Macaya, separated by a 7-year gap.

1.title: FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - The Gypsy Bride - S01E07 - Episode 7

FR - Smiling Friends - S01E01 - Desmond's Big Day Out
1.plot: A small company dedicated to bringing happiness to the world receives a simple request to help a woman's unhappy son smile again, but the job turns out to be more complicated than it seems.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E02 - Mr. Frog
1.plot: After beloved frog celebrity Mr. Frog gets into hot frog water, Pim and Charlie are tasked with helping the frog get things back on frog track. Meanwhile, Glep has a crazy side adventure that has the critics going wild.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E03 - Shrimp's Odyssey
1.plot: When a truly pathetic shrimp calls the Smiling Friends hotline after being dumped by his true love, Shrimpina, Pim and Charlie have very different ideas about how to handle the situation.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E04 - A Silly Halloween Special
1.plot: Pim ventures into the forest across the road to fetch firewood for the office Halloween party.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E05 - Who Violently Murdered Simon S. Salty?
1.plot: Who is famous food tycoon Simon S. Salty? Why was he brutally murdered in his own restaurant? Who done did do that there murder? Huh?

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E06 - Enchanted Forest
1.plot: Pim and Charlie are beckoned into the mysterious Enchanted Forest by a princess and encounter all sorts of insane toon characters along their journey.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E07 - Frowning Friends
1.plot: A rival business moves across the street, much to the boss's dismay. Nuff said.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E08 - Charlie Dies and Doesn't Come Back
1.plot: Charlie actually dies for real.

1.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S01E09 - The Smiling Friends Go to Brazil!
1.plot: The Smiling Friends finally get to relax in a beautiful Brazilian beach town. Pim works on his novel, Charlie binges a load of torrent shows on his portable hard drive. Allan and Glep enjoy some long-awaited "chill out" time at the beach.

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E01 - Gwimbly: Definitive Remastered Enhanced Extended Edition DX 4k (Anniversary Director's Cut)
2.plot: The classic gang help a disgusting, vile loser they found on the streets. However, Allan sprays him with the hose.

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E02 - Mr. President
2.plot: Yes, You Do Need to Watch This Important Episode of Smiling Friends Where They Help the President Smile. Here's Why That's a Good Thing.

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E03 - A Allan Adventure
2.plot: Allan is tasked with finding more paper clips for the office. *Spits on you*

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E04 - Erm, the Boss Finds Love?
2.plot: DISCLAIMER: Just a heads up, this is the scariest episode of any cartoon that's ever been created.

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E05 - Brother's Egg
2.plot: After some of the Boss's usual tomfoolery, Pim and Charlie are tasked with helping a mad scientist with an "egg dilemma".

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E06 - Charlie, Pim, and Bill vs the Alien
2.plot: This episode tells the story of a thirty-four year-old boy named Pim who sets out to save his mother on Mars after she is abducted by Martians.

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E07 - The Magical Red Jewel (aka Tyler Gets Fired)
2.plot: The Boss and Pim fight for their lives in a mysterious world called Spamtopia. Meanwhile, Charlie confronts Allan over something serious.

2.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S02E08 - Pim Finally Turns Green
2.plot: After eating a mysterious artefact found at an ancient burial ground, Pim suddenly and mysteriously turns bright green to everyone's dismay.

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E01 - Silly Samuel
3.plot: Pim and Charlie are tasked with helping a stupid ugly freak no one likes. Meanwhile, the Boss and Allan...read more.

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E02 - Le Voyage Incroyable de Monsieur Grenouille
3.plot: In this highly acclaimed award-winning episode of "Smiling Friends," a walking talking frog will change your life and rewire your brain.

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E03 - Mole Man
3.plot: So apparently there's a character called "mole man" or something like that...okaayyy then. Allan and Glep team up to go on their own quest.

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E04 - Curse of the Green Halloween Witch
3.plot: AHHHHHHHH!!!!

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E05 - Pim and Charlie Save Mother Nature
3.plot: It's in the friggin title brother, read that and you'll get an idea of what happens...peace.

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E06 - Squim Returns
3.plot: After buying a magic mirror, Pim meets Squim. Charlie starts "digging deep" and gets into some really bad internet stuff…like REALLY bad stuff.

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E07 - Shmaloogles
3.plot: Pim, Charlie, and Flint discover a new realm full of wacky characters. Although, something happens, and Pim now has his own adventure...huh?

3.title: FR - Smiling Friends - S03E08 - The Glep Ep
3.plot: Finally we learn about Glep, the green character who sits on the bean bag and spits on the ground and stuff like that. *Growls at you*

meta.plot: Smiling Friends Inc. is a small company whose main purpose is to bring happiness and make people smile. The series follows the day-to-day lives and misadventures of its representatives, the lazy, cynical Charlie, and the cheerful, optimistic Pim, as they try to cheer up and comfort the troubled people who call their company's hotline. They receive seemingly simple requests but the jobs turn out to be more complicated than they seem, making it difficult to bring happiness to the world.

1.title: FR - Le grand chantier RONA - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le grand chantier RONA - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le grand chantier RONA - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le grand chantier RONA - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Brighton based Detective Superintendent Roy Grace is a hard-working police officer who has given his life to the job, but his career is currently at rock bottom. He’s fixated by the disappearance of his beloved wife, Sandy, and running enquiries into long forgotten cold cases with little prospect of success. Following another reprimand for his unorthodox police methods, Grace is walking a career tightrope and risks being moved from the job he loves most.

1.title: FR - Grace - S01E01 - Dead Simple
1.plot: Detective Superintendent Roy Grace is approached by colleague Detective Sergeant Branson to help investigate the disappearance of a Brighton property developer.

2.title: FR - Grace - S02E01 - Looking Good Dead
2.plot: Grace senses a connection between a single death and the discovery of human remains in a field. But his superior is not convinced.

2.title: FR - Grace - S02E02 - Not Dead Enough
2.plot: Months on from his last investigation, and with Grace's team still reeling from the fallout, Roy must prove that a wealthy Brighton businessman has brutally murdered his wife.

2.title: FR - Grace - S02E03 - Dead Man’s Footsteps
2.plot: A sinister inquiry into skeletal remains found in a forgotten Brighton storm drain takes Grace down a labyrinthine trail through the past.

2.title: FR - Grace - S02E04 - Dead Tomorrow
2.plot: When a body is dredged up from the seabed of the English Channel, it sets in motion a truly disturbing investigation which forces Grace to ask himself just how far anyone might go to save the ones they love.

3.title: FR - Grace - S03E01 - Dead Like You
3.plot: A chilling event at the Royal Edward hotel on the night of Assistant Chief Constable, Alison Vosper’s leaving do forces Grace and Branson into a difficult position when they must investigate all hotel guests, including high ranking East Sussex police attendees. Something about the incident is causing a deep unease in Grace- he knows he’s seen this before. Has a sinister offender from Grace’s past dubbed the Brighton Prowler resurfaced or is this a copycat? As the attacks continue, Grace is convinced it’s the same man- and delving into the past may be the key to saving the next victim.

3.title: FR - Grace - S03E02 - Dead Man's Grip
3.plot: Grace and his team are called to the site of a tragic road traffic collision involving three vehicles: an articulated lorry, a car and a blue pickup truck. An unexpected discovery at the scene, found on the victim, soon suggests there could be far more to this particular accident than meets the eye, sparking an unsettling chain of events which leads Grace and Branson on a tense, desperate game of cat and mouse through the city of Brighton to save an innocent life before time runs out.

3.title: FR - Grace - S03E03 - Not Dead Yet
3.plot: A rising music star, Gaia Lafayette, receives the opportunity of a lifetime, and the same night that she excitedly announces to her devoted fans that she and her band are headed to LA, a shocking turn of events leads Grace and Branson to believe someone may be trying to harm her. With a perpetrator on the loose, Roy must deduce who of Gaia’s fanbase may be concealing sinister intentions. Meanwhile, a grisly discovery on a remote Sussex pig farm puts Roy under serious pressure, forcing him to split his team in order to investigate two impossible lines of enquiry.
