meta.plot: A poor, black immigrant woman is shot and killed in Madrid. The crime triggers an unprecedented social reaction. Who killed Lucrecia? Why? The first clues point to far-right groups. Three decades after the crime, Lucrecia's story stands as a journey to the roots of hatred. With previously unpublished footage, this moving narrative brings to light a crime that goes down in Spanish history as its first racist murder.

1.title: FR - Lucrecia: A Murder in Madrid - S01E01 - Lucrecia
1.plot: Lucrecia's murder, a month after her immigration to Spain, begins a chronicle of a death foretold.

1.title: FR - Lucrecia: A Murder in Madrid - S01E02 - Three Bullets
1.plot: Far-right fury or score-settling? The Civil Guard starts an internal investigation.

1.title: FR - Lucrecia: A Murder in Madrid - S01E03 - Arrested
1.plot: The  accused give their accounts of events that occurred on the night of the crime.

1.title: FR - Lucrecia: A Murder in Madrid - S01E04 - The Sentence
1.plot: The country see the four accused for the first time in a trial that will set a precedent.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams - S01E01 - Part One: Let's Get Wrecked
1.plot: After achieving fame with Take That at just age 16, Robbie struggles with addiction as he records the solo album that transforms him into a superstar.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams - S01E02 - Part Two: Nobody Someday
1.plot: Stardom and success wreak havoc on Robbie's personal life. As the paparazzi track his every move, his relationships and mental health suffer.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams - S01E03 - Part Three: Close Encounters
1.plot: At the peak of his career, Robbie sets out on a massive European tour — but back home, the British tabloids continue to wage war against him.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams - S01E04 - Part Four: Cut The Circuit
1.plot: Having hit rock bottom, Robbie finds redemption where he least expects it. An emotional reunion with old friends reignites his passion for performing.

meta.plot: After 25 years of his record-breaking solo career, Robbie looks back on his younger self and reflects on a lifetime spent in the spotlight.
A detective works to solve a string of cases involving missing girls.

1.title: FR - Les Oubliées - S01E01 - Anne, disparue le 4 mai 2004
1.plot: When a young woman goes missing, Lieutenant Christian Janvier is convinced the disappearance is linked to the unsolved cases of six other missing girls who have vanished without a trace over the course of the past fifteen years.

1.title: FR - Les Oubliées - S01E02 - Isabelle, disparue le 22 mars 1996
1.plot: A search of Guerrand's property proves inconclusive, but Janvier is convinced that the reclusive taxi driver knows more than he is letting on...

1.title: FR - Les Oubliées - S01E03 - Alice, disparue le 20 juin 2000
1.plot: A series of mistakes made my Janvier threaten the case and unwittingly put his prime suspect in danger.

1.title: FR - Les Oubliées - S01E04 - Nathalie, disparue le 2 mai 1991
1.plot: Disparaged by the recent grim turn of events, Janvier is persuaded to take a holiday by his daughter in an effort to forget about the case. But suddenly a clue reveals itself, a clue that could hold the key to solving the entire case...

1.title: FR - Les Oubliées - S01E05 - Elsa, disparue le 24 mai 2005
1.plot: Janvier visits the mother of the newly discovered victim, a young musician named Emily, and suddenly realizes the connection that has gone unnoticed for so long. As Janvier is getting closer to the truth, another girl goes missing - a girl who eerily resembles his own daughter.

1.title: FR - Les Oubliées - S01E06 - Catherine, disparue le 21 mars 2003
1.plot: A relieved Janvier finds his own daughter, Caroline, with her boyfriend. However, he soon discovers that the girl now missing is Caroline's best friend, Clara...

meta.plot: The heartwarming and humorous adventures of a young country vet in the Yorkshire Dales in the 1930s. A remake of the 1978 series.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E01 - You've Got to Dream
1.plot: Fresh out of veterinary college in 1937, James Herriot struggles to find work in his Depression-struck home town of Glasgow. Seeking new opportunities, he pursues a position in the remote village of Darrowby working for eccentric local vet Siegfried Farnon, who is less than impressed by his early efforts. However, a difficult calving gives James a chance to prove his worth.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E02 - Another Farnon?
1.plot: Skeldale House descends into chaos with the arrival of Siegfried's wayward brother Tristan. Helen provides James with a reason to stay in the Dales.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E03 - Andante
1.plot: Tristan sets about collecting debts owed to the surgery and takes a shine to Maggie, the new barmaid at The Drovers. Siegfried hopes to bag the job of Attending Vet at Darrowby Racecourse, by buttering up the head of the race course, General Ransom. When the favourite to win on the race day is diagnosed with a inoperable condition, James has his first painful experience.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E04 - A Tricki Case
1.plot: James is forced to take in Mrs Pumphrey's pampered Pekingese. Tristan prepares to return to university, but needs Siegfried's help to pay for his accommodation, but Siegfried insists he must first prove he is serious about being a vet. James treats the Aldersons' prize bull, and Helen rewards his efforts with some unusual home baking.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E05 - All's Fair
1.plot: It's the Darrowby Show and James is pleased as punch that he has been given the honour of Attending Vet. But Siegfried and Tristan know the job is a poisoned chalice and reckon James won't last the day without throwing in the towel.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E06 - A Cure for All Ills
1.plot: James' workload doubles when Siegfried takes ill during a harsh winter. Mrs Hall discovers it is James' birthday, and Tristan tries his best to cheer him up by arranging a double date. Season finale.

1.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S01E07 - The Night Before Christmas
1.plot: James is trying to bury his pain over Helen and has invited his new girlfriend Connie to the annual Skeldale Christmas party. As the house fills with locals, James receives a call from a man who wants help with his dog who is giving birth.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E01 - Where the Heart Is
2.plot: It’s spring in 1938, and a trip back home to Glasgow presents James Herriot with a dilemma that will mean choosing between the people he loves when he is offered a position at his old mentor's forward-thinking practice.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E02 - Semper Progrediens
2.plot: With Tristan's encouragement, James asks Helen if she'd like to go to the local spring dance. But village resident Gerald's arrival with his injured dog, Rock, puts a spanner in the works. Meanwhile, Tristan worries that Siegfried is in danger of losing his edge.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E03 - We Can But Hope
2.plot: The fate of a struggling young widow causes difficulties for James and Helen's burgeoning romance. Meanwhile, Siegfried has another scheme to whip Tristan into shape, and a visit from Tricki Woo causes chaos in Skeldale House.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E04 - Many Happy Returns
2.plot: It's an important day for Tristan in more ways than one, as he celebrates his birthday and Siegfried gives him new responsibilities as a vet. Tristan has to withstand the pressure and succeed in the challenge set by his older brother before returning to Skeldale for his birthday festivities. Meanwhile, Mrs Hall reminds James that he needs to tell Helen some home truths.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E05 - The Last Man In
2.plot: When a familiar face from Helen's past returns to Darrowby, James worries that he has to vie for her attention and steps up to compete against them at Mrs Pumphrey's annual cricket match. The rest of Skeldale House are apprehensive as the game can be brutal. Siegfried tries his best to train James and get a reluctant Tristan to step in, but it's not looking good for their Darrowby Eleven team.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E06 - Home Truths
2.plot: As Chamberlain heads to meet with Hitler in Munich, James prepares to face his parents and give them some difficult news. Meanwhile, James's agenda is derailed by an emergency with the Alderson's pregnant mare, Candy.

2.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S02E07 - The Perfect Christmas
2.plot: James and Helen spend their first Christmas together, but must agree on where to spend it. Despite all seeming idyllic, the vets are troubled as Tricki Woo is sick.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E01 - Second Time Lucky
3.plot: It is now spring 1939 and a potential world war looms. Tristan is now a qualified vet, while James enters a new stage of his life with Helen and at the practice. After being made joint business partner by Siegfried, James pushes to take on more responsibility via the Ministry of Agriculture's new bovine TB testing scheme, but its unexpected challenges risk pushing him to breaking point.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E02 - Honeymoon's Over
3.plot: Everyone is trying to get along as best they can in the face of changes at Skeldale House. Helen has moved into the bedsit upstairs with James. James struggles to get Siegfried to let him take the reins now that he is a junior partner, and the pair clash when he learns how much money Skeldale could make from the Ministry of Agriculture’s lucrative bovine TB testing scheme.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E03 - Surviving Siegfried
3.plot: Siegfried receives some difficult news and becomes even more irascible than usual. The perfect distraction comes along in the form of Major Sebright Saunders, who asks Siegfried to look at a difficult young racehorse called River.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E04 - What a Balls Up!
3.plot: James is finally succeeding with the farmers’ uptake of the Ministry of Agriculture’s TB testing scheme, but is struggling with the complicated paperwork - a fact that he is keen to keep from Siegfried. Tristan decides that he is outgrowing running the small animal surgery and buys a car to help with errands at the practice, which also provides him with transport for taking Florence, the daughter of Siegfried’s rival, George Pandhi, out on a date.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E05 - Edward
3.plot: Siegfried and Tristan are left in charge of Skeldale House, when Mrs Hall takes time off to meet up with an important person from her past. Siegfried immediately puts Tristan in charge of housekeeping duties and focuses on running the practice and educating a visiting work experience boy named Andrew Simmonds.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E06 - For Whom the Bell Tolls
3.plot: The Skeldale House regulars think about what matters to them most when the radio reports that Britain is standing on the brink of war. As everyone processes the news, James discovers a case of TB at Heston Grange. Richard begs him not to report it or the farm will be shut down and he could lose his livelihood.

3.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S03E07 - Merry Bloody Christmas
3.plot: It’s Christmas in Darrowby and everyone is trying to make the most of things while the world is at war. A young guest brings some wonder, mischief and cheer to Skeldale House while everyone waits for important news. When Mrs Pumphrey heralds the arrival of a kitten in need of extra care. Siegfried is asked to pay a visit to an injured River just before a big race.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E01 - Broodiness
4.plot: It’s Easter 1940 and, with Tristan away, Skeldale House is busier than ever. Everyone looks to the future, and James tries to save a dog from its owner.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E02 - Carpe Diem
4.plot: Siegfried hires an experienced bookkeeper, but her efficient approach doesn’t suit everyone. James and Helen arrive at a big decision, and a ferret presents a challenge for the practice.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E03 - Right Hand Man
4.plot: When new vet Richard Carmody joins the practice, James feels his place by Siegfried’s side is threatened. Conflicts come to the surface at Mrs Pumphrey’s community tea party.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E04 - By the Book
4.plot: James and Helen are keeping a secret, and following a visit to the Crabtree’s Farm, Carmody is challenged with learning how to be a vet outside of his books. The new farmers have a worrying illness amongst their herd and James wants to help them in any way he can.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E05 - Papers
4.plot: The war is getting closer, James is about to embark on a new journey. He desperately wants things in order and Carmody trained up to support Siegfried. But James is frustrated at Carmody’s inability to drive and he keeps missing opportunities to spend precious time with Helen.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E06 - The Home Front
4.plot: Helen feels redundant at Skeldale, and buried family secrets threaten to tear their relationship apart as Richard refuses to let her muck in on the farm. Helen notices that calf Smokey seems unwell and tries to help him, but it only makes things worse with her dad.

4.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S04E07 - On a Wing and a Prayer
4.plot: An emotional phone call with a very pregnant Helen makes James determined to get back to her, but he doesn't have many options, and RAF mascot Georgie needs his help. Meanwhile, Mrs Hall prepares a community Christmas celebration in Darrowby, while Siegfried and Carmody argue over who will be Father Christmas.

5.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S05E01 - To All Our Boys
5.plot: With World War II underway, Siegfried takes up the slack at the surgery. James faces an uncertain future when he is grounded at the RAF. Mrs Hall and Helen consider their contribution within the community, and Carmody is eager to step up.

5.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S05E02 - Holding the Baby
5.plot: James needs a crash course for fatherhood. Mrs Hall referees between Siegfried and her new boss, Mr Bosworth, as they fall out over some of Mr Bosworth's safety tactics. Helen is concerned about the influence of Jenny's new friend Doris.

5.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S05E03 - Homecoming
5.plot: Everyone is determined to make Jimmy’s christening day special, while Siegfried is unimpressed when called up to Biggins’ farm.

5.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S05E04 - Uninvited Guests
5.plot: Tristan and Carmody can't see eye to eye, but a quest to Pumphrey Manor might just bring them together. Helen tries to support James when unresolved feelings resurface.

5.title: FR - James Herriot, chroniques d'un jeune vétérinaire - S05E05 - Pair Bond
5.plot: After receiving outstanding exam results, Carmody is offered a position in a research program in London, but he wants to stay at Skeldale. An exhilarated Mr Bosworth summons Mrs Hall to examine a piece of debris that has dropped from a plane into a remote field.

meta.plot: Ten years ago, he lost two loved ones. When his fiancée disappears, he must uncover buried secrets — or lose everything. Based on Harlan Coben's novel.

1.title: FR - Gone for good [multi-SUb-Audio] - S01E01 - Guillaume
1.plot: A decade after tragedy upended his family's life, Guillaume is ready to embark on a new chapter — until his girlfriend suddenly disappears

1.title: FR - Gone for good [multi-SUb-Audio] - S01E02 - Inès
1.plot: Guillaume digs into his mother's mysterious spending and uncovers a clue to Judith's past. In 2010, Sonia's sister hides a key piece of evidence.

1.title: FR - Gone for good [multi-SUb-Audio] - S01E03 - Daco
1.plot: Judith's mother visits Guillaume with more startling news. A trip to Ivry forces Daco to reckon with a secret from his own past.

1.title: FR - Gone for good [multi-SUb-Audio] - S01E04 - Nora
1.plot: Desperate for answers, Guillaume confronts Fred's closest confidant. In Italy in 2015, a budding friendship leads to a life-changing encounter.

1.title: FR - Gone for good [multi-SUb-Audio] - S01E05 - Fred
1.plot: As flashbacks reveal young Fred's transformation, Guillaume finally learns the truth about his brother — and that fateful night 10 years ago.

meta.plot: When their 4-year-old son is murdered, a young couple fights a twisting and arduous battle trying to identify a frustratingly elusive killer.

1.title: FR - Who killed Little Gregory [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Who killed Little Gregory [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Who killed Little Gregory [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Who killed Little Gregory [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Who killed Little Gregory [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Vortex [MULTI-SUB] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Brest, in 2025 police captain Ludovic Béguin is investigating the death of a woman found drowned on the beach at Corsen. In a virtual reality room to re-study the crime scene captured by drones, Ludovic discovers that he can get in touch with his wife Mélanie, who died on this same beach in 1998. Ludovic then decides to do the impossible, to save the deceased , but altering the past could have serious consequences for the present. For 27 years, Ludovic has rebuilt his life. He has a new wife, Parvana, and a son, Sam...

1.title: FR - Vortex [MULTI-SUB] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After discovering that Zoé Levy and Mélanie were wearing the same ring when they died, Ludovic is now certain that they were murdered by the same person. Are there other victims that no one has linked to this case so far? At the same time, Mélanie's changed actions in 1998 have devastating consequences for the future: colleagues and friends do not meet. Their current family simply does not exist. These changes cause Ludovic to panic. What happens if Melanie survives... what will happen to Parvana and Sam then?

1.title: FR - Vortex [MULTI-SUB] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Ludovic and Nathan discover that the abusive boyfriend of Nolwenn, the third victim, is the son of a goldsmith from Brest. Could he be the mysterious killer with the ring? Mélanie provokes a meeting with Parvana in 1998, and thus the future changes for Ludovic.

1.title: FR - Vortex [MULTI-SUB] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The effects of Mélanie's actions seem to have been reversed. Ludovic is now convinced that Mélanie knew her attacker, but is he still on the wrong track or could the killer be closer than he thinks...

1.title: FR - Vortex [MULTI-SUB] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Mélanie is upset when she learns who is most likely the killer. She makes one last request: to meet her daughter, whom she has not seen growing up. In 2025, Ludovic is removed from the investigation. Will he be able, with the help of Mélanie, to prevent the inevitable?...

1.title: FR - Vortex [MULTI-SUB] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In 1998, a panicked Mélanie is on the run from both Ludovic and Nathan. She seeks refuge in a place she thinks she is safe, but soon realizes what a mistake she has made, and in a last burst of energy and hope, flees and runs to the beach. Will she be able to escape her terrible fate?...

meta.plot: Two mysterious deaths. A rift in time. Sci-fi thriller about policeman Ludovic who risks everything when he tries to change the past.

1.title: FR - Criminal France [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E01 - Émilie
1.plot: As a woman recounts her memories of the attack at the Bataclan, which killed her boyfriend, detectives become convinced that she's hiding something.

1.title: FR - Criminal France [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E02 - Caroline
1.plot: After a casualty at a building site, the team interrogates a construction executive who seems to know more about the victim than she's letting on.

1.title: FR - Criminal France [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E03 - Jérôme
1.plot: Summoned to work before dawn, the team questions a sales manager suspected of a violent hate crime. Audrey makes a bid to win the trust of her colleagues.

meta.plot: Secrets emerge and entire cases unravel inside a police interview room in Paris, where suspects and investigators face off in an intricate dance.
Three women's lives are changed forever when a prolific stalker infiltrates their social media accounts. And they're only a fraction of his many victims.

1.title: FR - Je peux te dire un secret ? - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: Three women start getting mocking messages from strangers on social media. No matter how much they block, report and ignore, the DMs keep on coming.

1.title: FR - Je peux te dire un secret ? - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: The women's voices are finally heard, and a suspect is called in for questioning — but with so little evidence, will he ever be brought to justice?

meta.plot: After spending graduation night together, Emma and Dexter go their separate ways — but their lives remain intertwined.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: 1988. On the night of their graduation, Emma and Dexter meet for the first time. It's an evening of almost-romance, and a morning of missed opportunity.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: 1989. The year has taken Dex and Em in very different directions. From a villa in Rome and a minibus in the Midlands, they both ponder what comes next.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: 1990. Life in London isn't what Em was expecting. In a creative drought, she's working in a shabby restaurant, where she gets a visit from Dex.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: 1991. On holiday together in Greece, Emma has plans for how to keep things platonic. Dexter would rather reminisce about the night they met.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: 1992. After a heavy night out, a hungover Dexter goes home to visit his family. Shocked at the terrible state he's in, his mother takes him to task.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: 1994. The friends go for a glamorous but disastrous dinner together. Dexter's keen to show off his lavish new lifestyle, but Emma isn't impressed.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: 1995. On the last day of the school term, Emma gets into a compromising position at work. When she gets home, things become even more uncomfortable.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: 1996. Dexter wants to impress his new girlfriend's parents, but the visit doesn't go according to plan. Over dinner, he gets a call from his agent.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: 1997. The two bump into each other at a university friend's wedding. After an awkward reunion, they get lost in conversation together.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: 1998. Dexter's still adjusting to domestic life. On an evening in, he finds an old mixtape from Emma and calls her to chat about times gone by.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: 1999. A troubled Dexter visits Emma, who's thriving in Paris. As they wander the streets, the memory of their encounter months before hangs in the air.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: 2000. 2001. 2002. Em and Dex's bond grows tighter as the years pass. Her writing's going well, and he starts his own business.

1.title: FR - Un jour - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: 2003. 2004. 2007. Unable to contemplate the future, Dexter looks back on his and Emma's intertwined past — and gets a visit from some familiar faces.

meta.plot: When unidentified parasites violently take over human hosts and gain power, humanity must rise to combat the growing threat.

1.title: FR - Parasyte : The Grey - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After a brutal attack, Jeong Su-in learns she may not be the same person as before. Choi Jun-kyung discovers the monsters are forming an organization.

1.title: FR - Parasyte : The Grey - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Looking for his sister, Seol Kang-woo investigates Saejin Church, where he finds Su-in. But he soon encounters trouble — and the two fight to escape.

1.title: FR - Parasyte : The Grey - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After raiding Saejin Church, Jun-kyung begins suspecting Kim Chul-min is hiding something — later tracking him down meeting with Su-in and Kang-woo.

1.title: FR - Parasyte : The Grey - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After revealing everything he knows to Chul-min, Kang-woo agrees to help save Su-in. But when the plan goes awry, lives are put at risk.

1.title: FR - Parasyte : The Grey - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Despite being on the run, Su-in tries to warn Jun-kyung. But as Team Grey's raid plays out, Su-in and Kang-woo realize it's all part of a bigger plan.

1.title: FR - Parasyte : The Grey - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Su-in meets with Seol Kyung-hee, who requests an alliance. But the parasites' ploy for power goes into full effect — and it's up to Heidi to stop them.

meta.plot: Eerie encounters, bizarre disappearances, haunting events and more perplexing phenomena are explored in this chilling investigative docuseries.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E01 - File: Pascagoula Alien Abduction
1.plot: In 1973, a fishing trip in Pascagoula led to an unbelievable encounter that drew attention from the media and changed two men's lives forever.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E02 - File: Ghosts of Myrtles Plantation
1.plot: Visitors and tour guides share their chilling accounts about the Myrtles Plantation, a hot spot for hauntings and a place with a dark, complicated past.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E03 - File: Missing Yuba County Five
1.plot: In 1978, five men vanished in Yuba County. Disturbing evidence fueled a series of questions: Did they get lost — or was something more sinister at play?

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E04 - File: Government's UFO Conspiracy
1.plot: Since the '70s, US military personnel have reported strange sightings and dealt with mysterious health issues but were forced to stay silent — until now.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E05 - File: Haunting of Lake Lanier
1.plot: With multiple deaths reported each year, Lake Lanier has sparked spooky folklore, leading locals and others to question what lies beneath the surface.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E06 - File: Mysteries of Mt. Shasta
1.plot: Steeped in legend, Mount Shasta and its rich Indigenous history have attracted spiritual seekers, cult leaders and secret societies for decades.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E07 - File: Bizarre Blobs of Washington
1.plot: When unknown substances fell from the sky in Oakville in 1994 and caused unexplained illnesses among residents, theories about their origins emerged.

1.title: FR - Les Dossiers de l'inexplicable - S01E08 - File: Floating Feet of Salish Sea
1.plot: In recent history, a bizarre mystery has rattled beachcombers and investigators alike: Why are severed feet being found on the shores of the Salish Sea?

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Part One: Let's Get Wrecked
1.plot: After achieving fame with Take That at just age 16, Robbie struggles with addiction as he records the solo album that transforms him into a superstar.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Part Two: Nobody Someday
1.plot: Stardom and success wreak havoc on Robbie's personal life. As the paparazzi track his every move, his relationships and mental health suffer.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Part Three: Close Encounters
1.plot: At the peak of his career, Robbie sets out on a massive European tour — but back home, the British tabloids continue to wage war against him.

1.title: FR - Robbie Williams [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Part Four: Cut The Circuit
1.plot: Having hit rock bottom, Robbie finds redemption where he least expects it. An emotional reunion with old friends reignites his passion for performing.

meta.plot: After 25 years of his record-breaking solo career, Robbie looks back on his younger self and reflects on a lifetime spent in the spotlight.

1.title: FR - The Forest [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A newly-arrived police chief, Gaspard Decker, in the small village of Montfaucon begins investigating the disappearance of a 16-year old girl, Jennifer Lenoir.

1.title: FR - The Forest [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Captain Decker questions Maya, stoking tensions at the station. A grim discovery in the woods and two more disappearances put the town on edge.

1.title: FR - The Forest [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The police follow a tip to an Internet cafe frequented by the three girls. After uncovering a clue to her past, Eve seeks out Manoa for information.

1.title: FR - The Forest [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Virginie is emotionally wrecked as police investigation uncovers sordid secrets about her family. Eve searches the forest for more clues about her obscure past.

1.title: FR - The Forest [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Revelations about her past drag Eve even deeper onto the case. A witness excites Capitaine Decker's suspicion. The school falls victim to vandalism.

1.title: FR - The Forest [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The announcement of the identity of the murderer causes a feverish search. The families have to fight with the effects of the traumatic events.

meta.plot: In a small quiet village in the Ardennes, a sixteen-year-old girl disappears into the forest after calling her teacher in the middle of the night. Captain Gaspard Deker, a former soldier and newly arrived single father is conducting the investigation with Virginie Musso, the local cop. Also helping is the teacher, Eve Mendel, a solitary young woman with a mysterious past: she was found as a child by the villiage doctor wandering silently in the same forest.

1.title: FR - Crime Scene Berlin: Nightlife Killer [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E01 - A Mysterious Death
1.plot: A body in the darkroom of a gay bar puts Berlin police on the trail of a killer who poisons and robs his targets — but is he only in it for the money?

1.title: FR - Crime Scene Berlin: Nightlife Killer [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E02 - A Serial Killer in Berlin
1.plot: With Berlin's gay nightclub scene reeling from the murder, the investigation into the killer's identity reopens a previously closed case.

1.title: FR - Crime Scene Berlin: Nightlife Killer [MULTI-SUB-AUDIO] - S01E03 - The Lust to Kill
1.plot: As the body count rises, a break in the investigation brings the killer's dark past into focus as the police close in on him.

meta.plot: In 2012, a string of grisly murders sent shock waves through the Berlin party scene. The killer remained at large — until one of his targets survived.

When Lorna Brady, a survivor of one of Ireland's Magdalene Laundries, wakes to find a corpse in her house, she has no idea who the dead woman is or if she's responsible for the apparent murder, because she has long suffered from extreme bouts of sleepwalking.

1.title: FR - The Woman in the Wall - S01E01 - Back to Life
1.plot: Ireland, 2015. When Lorna Brady wakes to find a corpse in her house, she has no idea who the dead woman is or if she's responsible for the apparent murder.

1.title: FR - The Woman in the Wall - S01E02 - Show Thyself
1.plot: Lorna has no intention of sleeping until she finds out what Aoife Cassidy knew. The town's laundry survivors are campaigning for justice. Past betrayals emerge to the surface and end in tragedy.

1.title: FR - The Woman in the Wall - S01E03 - Knock Knock
1.plot: A new lead means Lorna might finally discover the fate of her daughter, but Colman is closing in. The case takes an unexpected turn.

1.title: FR - The Woman in the Wall - S01E04 - The Cruelty Man
1.plot: Lorna uncovers more horrors at the convent. In Dublin, Colman delves into his own past and discovers the source of his nightmares. A new lead cracks open the case.

1.title: FR - The Woman in the Wall - S01E05 - Ex Gratia
1.plot: Lorna and Colman become unusual allies when in pursuit of the truth. The survivors receive life-changing news. A fresh suspect emerges in the murder case.

1.title: FR - The Woman in the Wall - S01E06 - A Little Resurrection
1.plot: Aoife Cassidy's past reveals answers in the present. Colman closes in on his suspects. But will Lorna find peace at last?

meta.plot: Three guy friends in a retirement community are the top dogs until they’re blown out of the water by the newest member of the community, a female rebel who’s ready to challenge their place – it’s high school with 70 somethings.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: A group of three retirement home friends are determined to prove that there is still much for them to accomplish in life despite their age.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E02 - Margaret Turns 65
1.plot: On her 65th birthday, Margaret doesn't feel like celebrating. However, Hank, Sid and Charlie insist on taking her out for a "good old-fashioned young person's night" at the local club, which leaves them all feeling older - and more hungover - than ever.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E03 - A Date with Destiny
1.plot: Charlie and Hank create online dating profiles, and to boost their egos, Sid pretends to be an interested woman. Of course, the plan goes awry.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E04 - Sid Comes Out
1.plot: Margaret tries to convince Sid to come out to his visiting son; Hank stubbornly refuses to admit he needs glasses; Charlie tries to help him cheat on an eye test.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E05 - The Cool Kids Rig an Election
1.plot: Tired of "Gorgeous George" and his reign as activities coordinator, Hank backs Charlie and Margaret backs Sid for the position in the upcoming election, and it instantly turns dirty.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E06 - TV Heist
1.plot: Hank and Margaret lose a cornhole competition to some resident cheaters and, as a result, miss out on the coveted prize—a new 65″ flat-screen TV. So, the gang attempts to steal the TV, which means breaking in to Allison’s office after locking her and Sid in the sauna.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E07 - Thanksgiving at Murray’s
1.plot: Margaret scores an invite to an exclusive foodie potluck for Thanksgiving and takes Sid as her plus one, leaving Hank and Charlie to find a backup plan.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E08 - Hank the Cradle Robber
1.plot: When Hank starts dating a much younger woman, the gang suspects she may be a gold-digger taking advantage of him because of his age. But after rifling through her things, they fear this relationship could be something much worse - a pregnancy trap

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E09 - Margaret Dates the Zodiac Killer
1.plot: Margaret begins dating Karl, a fellow Shady Meadows resident who may or may not be the Zodiac Killer. Meanwhile, the guys are hunting for a different kind of criminal: a serial non-flusher.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E10 - Funeral Crashers
1.plot: When Hank finds out his ex-wife will be at a mutual friend's funeral, Margaret volunteers to lie about his success to impress her; Charlie and Sid crash the funeral against Hank's orders.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E11 - Charlie's Angel
1.plot: Hank signs up to host a Shady Meadows closed-circuit TV show but is quickly replaced by Sid, who dishes out hot retirement home gossip on-air; Margaret helps Charlie woo a widow at her bereavement support group.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E12 - Margaret Jr.
1.plot: Margaret's daughter, MJ, turns up at Shady Meadows jobless, homeless and looking to be rescued. Meanwhile, Sid attempts to find his wok in Charlie's "hoarder paradise" of an apartment.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E13 - Sid's First Relationship
1.plot: The gang rallies around Sid to help him through his commitment issues to new beau John. Meanwhile, Margaret attempts to conquer her fear of flying by volunteering at the airport.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E14 - The Cool Kids Plus One
1.plot: Margaret neglects the guys when her best friend, Joanie, comes to visit. When Joanie decides to move in to Shady Meadows, the guys devise a plan to convince her not to, but Hank gets distracted.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E15 - Mentors
1.plot: As Hank and Margaret mentor an awkward high school student and help him decide on whether or not to go to the prom, Hank is forced to face a traumatic event that happened to him in high school. Meanwhile, Sid's boyfriend invites him to tour the wine country on bicycles, but Sid is mortified because he doesn't know how to ride a bike.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E16 - The Cool Kids Un-Retire
1.plot: While Sid is housesitting a fellow resident's gorgeous high-rise apartment, the Cool Kids get a taste of the good life - and a taste of Charlie's incredible cookies. But when Margaret decides to turn Charlie's creative cookie-making into a new business venture, everyone gets a bit carried away.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E17 - Margaret Ups Her Game
1.plot: Margaret attempts to date the hottest guy in Shady Meadows, but can't seem to rid herself of clingy Leonard. Meanwhile, Hank tries to sell his erotic vampire novel, with the help of Sid's cousin.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E19 - Kip Samgood's Biggest Fan
1.plot: Margaret helps Sid finally meet his teen idol, Kip Samgood. Meanwhile, Charlie ditches Hank to hang out with his girlfriend, Kathleen, so Hank goes to great lengths to get Charlie's attention.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E20 - Indecent Proposal
1.plot: In an attempt to date a guy way out of her league, Margaret pretends to be someone she's not. When Hank doesn't hear back from his doctor about a questionable mole, he's convinced his days are numbered, so Charlie helps him get his test results. Meanwhile, Sid avoids John, who has a very important question to ask him.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E21 - Vegas, Baby!
1.plot: Hank is excited to give his son the perfect wedding gift in Las Vegas, until he finds out Lorraine's boyfriend, Reggie, is paying for everything. Meanwhile, Margaret and Sid's luck at the blackjack table quickly takes a turn, and Charlie hopes his old Vegas connections will come through for him.

1.title: FR - The Cool Kids - S01E22 - The Friend-aversary
1.plot: Hank, Charlie and Sid prepare their Friend-iversary party, and don't include Margaret. Noticing the tension between Hank and Sid, Margaret encourages Sid to speak up for himself. Meanwhile, Sid has his sights set on the patio for their party and attempts to convince the cat ladies to release it to them.

meta.plot: The brilliant and eclectic team of U.S. NCIS Agents and the Australian Federal Police (AFP) are grafted into a multi-national taskforce to keep naval crimes in check in the most contested patch of ocean on the planet.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E01 - Gone Fission
1.plot: The death of an American seaman on a U.S. nuclear submarine during an AUKUS ceremony on Sydney Harbour is investigated in a joint effort between America's NCIS agents afloat and the Australian Federal Police.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E02 - Snakes in the Grass
1.plot: When a Navy compliance officer is found dead in a waterhole from a snakebite, the team works to uncover the origin of the rare deadly taipan that is uncommon to the area where the officer was discovered.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E03 - Brothers in Arms
1.plot: When a shark spits out an arm wearing U.S. Navy equipment, the team's investigation tests the loyalty of a band of former Navy divers.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E04 - Ghosted
1.plot: When a U.S. petty officer's body is found in Sydney's historic and haunted Rocks area, a decades-old Navy Cross medal holds the clue to solving the murder, leading the team on a wild ghost chase to catch a killer.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E05 - Doggiecino Day Afternoon
1.plot: The team races to save one of their own when Doc Roy and his dog are involved in a hostage situation at their local dog cafe.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E06 - Extraction
1.plot: When the suspicious death of an old Drug Squad colleague pulls Evie back into a secret undercover operation, DeShawn is torn between loyalty to his friend and loyalty to his team.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E07 - Bunker Down
1.plot: A glitzy tech launch turns into a disaster, leaving half of NCIS: Sydney trapped underground, and the others scrambling to save the day before the clock and the oxygen runs out.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S01E08 - Blonde Ambition
1.plot: When JD's son is kidnapped by an international assassin in exchange for a wanted criminal in NCIS custody, the team frantically tries to get his son back safely without trading in a criminal.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E01 - Heart Starter
2.plot: NCIS: Sydney will do whatever it takes to crack the case of a rogue assassin on the run during NCIS Special Agent DeShawn Jackson's chaotic first day as boss.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E02 - Fire in the Hole
2.plot: When a young girl finds the body of a former U.S. Navy officer floating in the harbor, the team is led to an 18th-century sailing ship hosting a pirate-themed wedding, where DeShawn and Evie go undercover to investigate. Meanwhile, Mackey and JD are pulled in to prevent a potential tragedy on the harbor that could rip the U.S.-Australia alliance apart.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E03 - Back in the USSR
2.plot: When the body of a long-missing U.S. Naval engineer is discovered buried in concrete, the team enlists Doc Roy's old friend to assist in the investigation.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E04 - Truth Sabre
2.plot: The team is thrown into the murky world of online conspiracies after a car owned by a U.S. Navy cyber engineer explodes just as her teenage daughter was about to take a driving lesson.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E05 - Shucked
2.plot: When a petty officer is found murdered and frozen, it leads the team into a twisted underworld of seafood and sex trafficking.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E06 - Hell Weak
2.plot: The suspected suicide of a former U.S. Navy SEAL leads NCIS: Sydney to a wellness retreat to investigate a group of his fellow former SEAL buddies.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E07 - Breathless
2.plot: The suspicious death of a US Navy chorister draws NCIS: Sydney into the world of obsessive fans, pop stars, and earworms, as they learn how deadly the music business can be.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E08 - Blood Is Thicker Than Vodka
2.plot: The discovery of an exsanguinated sailor takes NCIS: Sydney into the world of modern-day vampires, family feuds, bespoke vodka and a nocturnal matriarch with a penchant for blood.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E09 - Mango Madness
2.plot: The team battles searing temperatures to investigate the death of a U.S. Marine corporal killed during a joint training exercise between U.S. and Australian troops.

2.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S02E10 - Sting in the Tail
2.plot: With a Stinger missile and murderer in the wind, and Darwin's World War II Commemoration ceremony fast approaching, NCIS: Sydney races to prevent a deadly attack.

3.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E01 - Gut Instinct
3.plot: The discovery of two missing U.S. Navy aviators adrift in the Coral Sea leads the team to expose a sinister terrorist plot.

3.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E02 - True Blue
3.plot: Growing increasingly worried about Blue’s strange behavior, Doc takes matters into his own hands and breaks into her apartment. Inside, DeShawn and Evie stumble onto a startling revelation that forces the team to question just how well they really know one of their own.

3.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E03 - Lost in Translation
3.plot: The team’s hunt for a high-value U.S. target accused of murdering an Australian soldier takes an unexpected turn when the suspect claims to have evidence of a war crime.

3.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E04 - The Truth is Outback
FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E05 - Black and White
FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E06 - Ironed Out
3.plot: Confronted with Australia’s first case of Ebola, the team races to uncover how patient zero, a U.S. Navy scientist, contracted the deadly virus, only to have their search for answers complicated by a top-secret military research agency as two of their own fight for their lives.

3.title: FR - NCIS: Sydney - S03E07 - Gold Digger
3.plot: When a U.S. naval officer is arrested for murder while trying to destroy a treasure map, the team must navigate jurisdictional politics to uncover the truth while racing to find the fabled “Yamashita’s Gold".

1.title: FR - Les soeurs Spencer - S01E01 - The Scholar's Snafu
1.plot: After her life in the city falls apart, former cop Darby is forced to return to her childhood home and her estranged, novelist mother. When Darby's friend Kaia is wrongfully accused of plagiarism, Darby and Victoria must put aside their differences and investigate, uncovering a wide-ranging scandal.

1.title: FR - Les soeurs Spencer - S01E02 - The Executive's Elegy
1.plot: When pharmaceutical CEO Marlina comes home to find her fiancé drowned, Victoria and Darby investigate whether he was a victim of corporate espionage or Marlina’s own progeny.

1.title: FR - Les soeurs Spencer - S01E03 - The Coder's Calamity
1.plot: Darby and Victoria investigate stolen intellectual property for a trio of Silicon Valley-style tech developers.

1.title: FR - Les soeurs Spencer - S01E04 - The Restauranteur's Ruin
1.plot: When local bistro owner Antonio's professional reputation is targeted, he seeks out Darby and Victoria's investigative services.

1.title: FR - Les soeurs Spencer - S01E05 - The Decorator's Debacle
1.plot: Darby and Victoria team up with Victoria's excitable friend Rory to investigate what he is sure was an attempt on his life.

1.title: FR - Les soeurs Spencer - S01E06 - The Winemaker's Woe
1.plot: Darby and Victoria are hired by a former schoolmate of Darby's to investigate acts of vandalism at his winery.

meta.plot: Former police officer Darby Spencer and her mystery novelist mother Victoria Spencer have opposite personalities but still embark on the unlikeliest of ventures: becoming partners in a private detective agency. They are mistaken as sisters as they tackle puzzling cases in Alder Bluffs.

1.title: FR - Huset - S01E01 -
FR - Huset - S01E02 -
FR - Huset - S01E03 -
FR - Huset - S01E04 -
FR - Huset - S01E05 -
FR - Huset - S01E06 -

meta.plot: Quatre agents pénitentiaires sont contraints d'apporter des changements majeurs dans la prison où ils travaillent pour sauver leur emploi.

In the heart of London, an anonymous phone call draws two brilliant detectives—a young woman in the early stages of her career and a well-connected man determined to protect his legacy—into a fight to correct an old miscarriage of justice.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E01 - Emergency Caller
1.plot: An anonymous call puts Detective Sergeant June Lenker in the path of the formidable Daniel Hegarty.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E02 - Two Calls
1.plot: Convinced there's a link between the emergency calls, June sets out to prove a theory—but Hegarty stays one step ahead.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E03 - Kid in the Park
1.plot: A horrific incident lands June on Hegarty's team, giving her a way to win his trust while secretly digging into the Errol Mathis case.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E04 - Protected
1.plot: Pressure mounts on June from all sides as she makes a breakthrough in Errol's case.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E05 - Possession with Intent
1.plot: June's personal life suffers collateral damage when her son is targeted.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E06 - Beehive
1.plot: A shocking revelation compels Hegarty to find his daughter. June uncovers a game-changing piece of evidence.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E07 - The Sixty-Twos
1.plot: The events leading up to Errol's 2011 arrest reveal a hidden history.

1.title: FR - Criminal Record - S01E08 - Carla
1.plot: A wave of public outrage pushes Hegarty and June to work together before it's too late.

2.title: FR - Criminal Record - S02E01 - Is It Him?
2.plot: The search for a killer lands June back in Hegarty’s orbit, who has a proposition for her: Join his intelligence operation to find her man.

1.title: FR - Abraham Lincoln - S01E01 - The Railsplitter
1.plot: Through a poverty-ridden childhood on the American frontier, Abraham Lincoln is determined to leave his mark on the world. He rises to become President of a nation on the verge of tearing itself apart.

1.title: FR - Abraham Lincoln - S01E02 - A President at War
1.plot: With the Civil War fully underway, Abraham Lincoln is forced to quickly learn how to manage a military as Commander in Chief. He comes to see only one path through the war: Emancipation.

1.title: FR - Abraham Lincoln - S01E03 - Saving the Union
1.plot: As casualties mount in the raging Civil War, Abraham Lincoln seeks a general who can end it once and for all. When the end draws near, he begins to think about what comes next for the nation and its former slaves.

meta.plot: The true story of America's iconic 16th president as told by weaving together both scripted dramatizations of important moments in his life and commentary by authoritative historians and public figures.

Yoji Minamimaru, surnommé Nanmaru, est un étudiant avec la capacité surnaturelle de créer de petits trous dans tout et n'importe quoi. Un jour, Yoji découvre que le professeur d'études folkloriques a disparu. Avec ses camarades de classe, il décide de retrouver le professeur.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E01 - The Telekinetic
1.plot: Nanmaru, a student with a unique power, finds out that his professor has gone missing.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E02 - Marukami Village
1.plot: Nanmaru and the other students head to Marukami Village to search for the missing professor.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E03 - Within Reach
1.plot: Emi keeps searching for the missing professor, while Nanmaru and the others return to Tokyo.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E04 - New Skills Development Seminar
1.plot: Nanmaru debuts as a lecturer, while Emi edges closer to the truth of the Tanabata Festival.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E05 - The Gouger
1.plot: Nanmaru starts a new business venture and Sachiko, now in Tokyo, tries to stop Takashi.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E06 - Fundamentally Secret
1.plot: While Sachiko tells Nanmaru about her past, trucks and airplanes vanish in Tokyo causing a frenzy.

1.title: FR - Le pays de Tanabata - S01E07 - Marching Forward
1.plot: Tokyo plunges into chaos as Nanmaru tries to rescue the kidnapped Aki, facing his own power.

meta.plot: Un enfant de 12 ans, Ben, pris dans les affres des années collège (avec la panoplie du harcèlement, des premiers sentiments amoureux et des bals de fin d’année) tandis qu’il s’adapte à une nouvelle famille recomposée ET à la découverte de pouvoirs surnaturels. Tout au long des 10 épisodes de la saison, Ben part à la découverte de lui-même et apprend ce que signifie réellement le fait d’avoir des super-pouvoirs. Il trouve une alliée en sa sœur par alliance, Max, qui l’aide à exploiter ces pouvoirs et à révéler les secrets qui se cachent derrière les mystères et les tragédies de sa communauté... Le tout alors qu’il essaie de comprendre qui il est.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Ben struggles to navigate major life changes when an encounter with a bully leads to a mysterious transformation.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E02 - Lines in the Sand
1.plot: Max and Ben start their search for answers. Darren embarks on his own investigation as secrets from his past begin to surface.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E03 - Facing Up
1.plot: In trying to trigger his own abilities, Ben lands Max in a tricky spot and gives Carter reason to question Ben's choices.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E04 - Opportunity Costs
1.plot: Ben sets out to expose Jason while Darren's determination sparks concern. Phil reveals a thoughtful surprise.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E05 - Under Pressure
1.plot: A covert mission takes shape on Max's birthday. Meanwhile, the pressure to please her parents becomes a burden.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E06 - The Lighthouse
1.plot: Hoping to better understand the past, Ben and Max visit Darren at home—and connect with a familiar stranger.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E07 - Turning Point
1.plot: An enemy's return brings danger to the town of Boatright. Ben's bold move threatens to destroy his relationship with Max.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E08 - Letting Go
1.plot: While a rift challenges the family, Carter's past proves critical to understanding Yates' reign of terror.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E09 - Head in the Sand
1.plot: Faced with a desperate plea, Ben decides how to use his powers and digs deep to define who he wants to be.

1.title: FR - Moi, Ben - S01E10 - The End of the Beginning
1.plot: The spring dance turns into the ultimate showdown as Yates seeks revenge and Ben and his allies attempt to end the chaos.

meta.plot: Après avoir tué toute l'humanité, des aliments tentent de créer leur propre utopie.

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E01 - First Course
1.plot: The great Food Fight has ended. Food reigns victorious over humanity. They’re free to create their own Foodtopia. But not everything is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E02 - Second Course
1.plot: Frank, Brenda and Barry embark on a mission to save food hostages before they ALL DIE!! Sammy fills his hole with a new art form: Stand up comedy. But not all is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E03 - Third Course
1.plot: Food pride is high. They decide to throw a Burning Man Festival. Frank and Brenda have to hide a secret from Barry. Unfortunately, nothing is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E04 - Fourth Course
1.plot: A new currency forms a class system in Foodtopia. Frank and Brenda set out to fix it. Though, not everything is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E05 - Fifth Course
1.plot: A Machiavellian orange, Julius, gains popularity in Foodtopia. Frank and Brenda struggle to maintain control. But not all is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E06 - Sixth Course
1.plot: Election day is upon Foodtopia: Julius versus Frank and Brenda. But relationship trouble threatens their chances. And not all is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E07 - Seventh Course
1.plot: Brenda sets out to find the good in the dictator orange, Julius. Frank ties up some loose ends. And nothing is as it seems…

1.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S01E08 - Eight Course
1.plot: Barry and Sammy have to clear Frank's name and save Foodtopia! Julius must be stopped! But not all is as it seems to be...

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E01 - Ninth Course
2.plot: Frank copes with Brenda's death by forcing happiness and sharing in Food-topia; Sammy and Barry have to pick up the pieces; Jack hopes to finally be accepted by food.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E02 - Tenth Course
2.plot: After their exile, Frank, Jack, Sammy, and Barry look for a new food society, but tensions rise among the friends.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E03 - Eleventh Course
2.plot: Leaving Jack behind, Frank, Barry and Sammy secretly explore the advanced and suspiciously perfect town of Newfoodland.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E04 - Twelfth Course
2.plot: Frank, Barry, Sammy, and Jack find their special place in Newfoodland. Everything seems perfect, until Barry and Jack discover the secret that this utopian city hides.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E05 - Thirteenth Course
2.plot: The gang grapples with the new information about Newfoodland; Frank discovers the location of Newfoodland's next fuel mission.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E06 - Fourteenth Course
2.plot: When Frank discovers that Foodtopia is the next town that Newfoodland wants to invade, he enlists Barry to return and warn them. Meanwhile, Sammy's film premieres, and Jack relapses into an old `habit'.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E07 - Fifteenth Course
2.plot: Frank and Barry are surprised to find a now thriving Food-topia; Jack, Sammy and all of Newfoodland are fast approaching, ready to invade.

2.title: FR - Saucisse Party : Bouff'land - S02E08 - Sixteenth Course
2.plot: The final battle begins between Food-topia and Newfoodland; Frank tries to make things right with Jack.

meta.plot: Details the fascinating, and often funny, inside story of the technology-driven disruption that changed music during the late-90s and early-2000s. File sharing technology, combined with the insatiable demand for new music, created both the means and the motive for millions of young people to participate in outright theft – and be celebrated for it.

1.title: FR - How Music Got Free : La révolution de la musique gratuite - S01E01 - The Crime We All Committed
1.plot: A small town CD-factory worker, Dell Glover, joins forces with teen hackers to pioneer internet piracy with MP3s, shaking the music industry’s early-2000s profits and reshaping the business forever; featuring Eminem, 50 Cent, Method Man and more.

1.title: FR - How Music Got Free : La révolution de la musique gratuite - S01E02 - Internet Killed the Radio Star
1.plot: As album sales drop, the music industry takes legal action against fans causing a PR nightmare; the FBI launches a major investigation against internet pirates and begins cracking down.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Montreal, 1945; back in civilian life, Jean, aka IXE-13, faces a new threat.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: At Victor's request and to protect a loved one, Jean must return to service.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Jean and his team have to get to the uranium before the Russians do.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Jean and his team have to get to the uranium before the Russians do.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: It's a serious time for Jean, Elisabeth has escaped and Gallaher is planning a major coup.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Weakened, Jean causes concern when he delivers terrible news to his team.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: With the election just 24 hours away, Jean must find the uranium and neutralize Gallaher.

1.title: FR - IXE-13 et La Course à L'uranium - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: It's the breaking point, Gisèle has disappeared and Gallaher is finalizing his Machiavellian plan.

meta.plot: In Montreal in 1945, a few months after the end of the Second World War, Jean Thibault, aka IXE-13, Canada's top secret service agent, is now the respected owner of the Crystal Club in Red Light and a former hotel above the club that once belonged to the Mafia.

Each week, the host receives guest artists from different generations and from multiple backgrounds, in order to share together their music with traditional and folk influences, in an atmosphere designed for staying up late!

1.title: FR - Dans cette vie ou une autre - S01E01 - Baby
1.plot: Baby meets Emilio, who gives him dope to sell so that he can earn some money.

1.title: FR - Dans cette vie ou une autre - S01E02 - Sagitario
1.plot: Baby sells hashish that comes from Emilio's dealings with the Jihadis.

1.title: FR - Dans cette vie ou une autre - S01E03 - The Line
1.plot: Emilio, with unpaid debts on hash, sends three kids to Madrid with dynamite for the Jihadis.

1.title: FR - Dans cette vie ou une autre - S01E04 - The Runner
1.plot: Baby drives the Jihadis through the storm to Mina Conchita to collect 600 kg of dynamite.

1.title: FR - Dans cette vie ou une autre - S01E05 - The Silence
1.plot: Victims provide evidence in court. Baby and Emilio follow news of the attack from Avilés.

1.title: FR - Dans cette vie ou une autre - S01E06 - La Maruca
1.plot: Baby is summoned to testify in the mega-trial. Emilio's conviction will depend on his testimony.

meta.plot: This series is adapted from the book by Manuel Jabois' "Nos vemos en esta vida o en la otra" (We'll Meet in This Life or the Next). Based on the interview he conducted with Gabriel Montoya Vidal ("Baby") in 2014, it tells of his involvement in the worst Jihadi terrorist attack on European soil in March of 2004.
A woman moves to live with her new husband in 17th century Amsterdam, but soon discovers that not everything is what it seems. Based on the adaptation by Jessie Burton.

1.title: FR - Miniaturist - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Amsterdam, 1686. Nella Oortman marries a rich merchant, but life in her new home is unfulfilled. Even her cabinet house brings a mystery to the secretive world she has entered.

1.title: FR - Miniaturist - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Nella faces danger and turmoil as Johannes is accused by the Amsterdam authorities. Meanwhile, her relationship with the Miniaturist becomes ever more mysterious and disturbing.

1.title: FR - Miniaturist - S01E03 -
FR - Miguel - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Miguel - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Miguel - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Miguel - S01E04 - Episode 4
