FR - Miguel - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: L’inspecteur Runarsson est envoyé de Reykjavík sur la péninsule de Snaefellsnes pour enquêter sur ce qui apparaît comme le suicide d’un banquier. Pourtant, certains indices sèment le doute. Pour résoudre ce crime, le policier va devoir faire face à de nombreux obstacles dans cette petite communauté.

1.title: FR - Meurtre au pied du volcan - S01E01 -
FR - Meurtre au pied du volcan - S01E02 -
FR - Meurtre au pied du volcan - S01E03 -
FR - Meurtre au pied du volcan - S01E04 -

meta.plot: A local Indigenous politician is recruited to the senate by the Australian Prime Minister after a contentious video goes viral.

1.title: FR - Total Control - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A fearless Indigenous senator, barely weeks into her political career in Canberra, and betrayed at the highest level, must seek redemption and settle a score against the party, and the Prime Minister of Australia.

1.title: FR - Total Control - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Alex proves her worth to the government, brokering a difficult deal between native title holder and the government. Meanwhile JC hitch-hikes across the country in an effort to meet Alex.

1.title: FR - Total Control - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Alex works around the clock to get the community's deal before the Senate, there is opposition within the party and the PM barely holds onto her leadership. With JC almost in reach, Alex is faced with a tragedy at home.

1.title: FR - Total Control - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Alex is struck low by grief and the betrayal of her and the community. When she discovers the extent of the PM's deception, she resolves to return to Canberra. But this time she won't be playing by the rules.

1.title: FR - Total Control - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Back in Canberra, Alex and the PM embark on a game of political cat and mouse. Alex knows the only person who can help her now is JC, but when they finally arrange to meet, JC gets spooked and runs.

1.title: FR - Total Control - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In pursuit of justice for JC, Alex declares war on her party. Faced with the PM's double dealing, she engineers a plan that could have catastrophic consequences for the government.

1.title: FR - Davos 1917 - S01E01 - Johanna
1.plot: After a mission with the Red Cross on the Western Front, nurse Johanna Gabathuler returns to Davos pregnant. While she is still in the delivery room, her father takes her newborn daughter away from her. To get her back, she will have to make a deal with German secret services.

1.title: FR - Davos 1917 - S01E02 - Control
1.plot: During the traditional New Year's Eve ball, when the drama of war takes a break, Johanna must carry out a risky assignment as a spy. However, the situation becomes critical, putting the nurse and her family in grave danger.

1.title: FR - Davos 1917 - S01E03 - Battlefields
1.plot: Johanna and Ilse discover the meaning of “Mission H”. The nurse must then prevent a mysterious Swiss Army encryption device from falling into the wrong hands, but her sister becomes suspicious when she finds weapons and money in her room.

1.title: FR - Davos 1917 - S01E04 - Women of war
1.plot: General Taylor's hasty departure makes Johanna useless as an informant for German intelligence. Ilse is then given the task of eliminating her, without realizing that she is always one step behind.

1.title: FR - Davos 1917 - S01E05 - Diabolical alliances
1.plot: While the hunt for the traitor responsible for the explosion begins, Johanna does everything to ensure the implementation of the "Lenin Plan", which involves a revolt against the Tsar in order to get Russia out of the war.

1.title: FR - Davos 1917 - S01E06 - Queens of the night
1.plot: Johanna and Mangold would like to get out of the espionage ring, but the doctor is captured during the preparations for the escape. Accused of treason, Johanna is therefore forced to prove her innocence by collaborating in the delivery of money to Lenin.

meta.plot: More determined than ever to live her life in accordance with her deepest desires, nurse Johanna Gabathuler finds herself embroiled in a spy conspiracy with international implications. There’s a high price to pay and it’s risky to say the least, but she will do anything it takes to find her daughter and, ultimately, secure her freedom.

1.title: FR - Professeur T - S01E01 - The Anatomy of a Memory
1.plot: Diana Tyson was violently attacked on the university campus where Professor T has tenure. DI Lisa Donckers suspects that the assault is very similar to one that occurred years beforehand, and, having been a previous student of Professor T's, she thinks he can help.

1.title: FR - Professeur T - S01E02 - A Fish Called Walter
1.plot: There is a poisoning at a reception. The police start to think that the real target is a civil servant who forged an environmental report who also was present at the reception. Due to the forged report, the daughter of a young family is very sick in hospital. The child's father might have something to do with the death.

1.title: FR - Professeur T - S01E03 - Tiger Tiger
1.plot: A jeweller is run down in the street when he crosses in a hurry. In his bag he has a collection of very valuable diamonds. The police suspect there is more to it and visit his family.

1.title: FR - Professeur T - S01E04 - Mother Love
1.plot: An au pair comes home after an evening off to find her employer unconscious in the living room. His daughter has vanished. The investigation leads the police to his business partner.

1.title: FR - Professeur T - S01E05 - Sophie Knows
1.plot: A girl with Downs Syndrome claims she knows who murdered her mother, but she doesn't want to say who it is. She only trusts the professor. Lisa is worried about her father and Dan has a surprise when he turns up for their date.

1.title: FR - Professeur T - S01E06 - The Dutiful Child
1.plot: There is a hit on prominent businessman during an official function. The shooter fails but the intended victim is found dead a few days later. A family feud reminds Jasper of his past

2.title: FR - Professeur T - S02E01 - Ring of Fire
2.plot: When a student is left badly burnt and in a coma after a house fire, the CID team call in Professor T after it emerges the victim was drugged.

2.title: FR - Professeur T - S02E02 - The Mask Murders
2.plot: A prominent barrister and his wife are found shot dead in a crime that has uncanny similarities to a double murder that the barrister successfully prosecuted 15 years earlier.

2.title: FR - Professeur T - S02E03 - The Family
2.plot: The Professor is asked to decipher a macabre puzzle when a doctor and her family are found dead in a grisly tableau on their living room sofa, each having died by different means. But in which order and by whom?

2.title: FR - Professeur T - S02E04 - DNA of a Murderer
2.plot: When an artisan baker is found dead after receiving death threats, the police appear to have an open and shut case against the son of a convicted murderer who was sent to prison thanks to the baker's testimony.

2.title: FR - Professeur T - S02E05 - The Trial
2.plot: Professor T conducts a series of lectures for his students detailing a high-profile court case in which a caretaker is accused of murdering his employer; the accused was found standing over the victim's body and his fingerprints on the murder weapon, but Professor T is convinced of his innocence, bringing him into conflict with the CID team and DI Paul Rabbits as the investigating officer.

2.title: FR - Professeur T - S02E06 - Swansong
2.plot: After discovering the body of an undercover police officer, the CID team blunder into a Drugs Squad operation against a major trafficker that appears to implicate one of their closest colleagues.

meta.plot: Professor Jasper Tempest, a genius Cambridge University criminologist with OCD and an overbearing mother, advises the police. British version of the Belgian crime drama of the same name.
Explores the relationship which develops between a grieving mother and the man she believes murdered her daughter.

1.title: FR - Without Sin - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When we meet Stella Tomlinson, it’s been three years since the murder of her teenage daughter Maisy, but the wound is as a fresh as if it were yesterday.

1.title: FR - Without Sin - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Stella wrestles with whether to trust Charles and follow up Cleo’s disappearance. At the same time, she tries to unearth who Charles really is, approaching those who knew him best.

1.title: FR - Without Sin - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Stella dives headfirst into finding out who really killed her daughter, after a video shows a connection between Maisy, Cleo, the McKellers and Jessie’s boyfriend Kelvin.

1.title: FR - Without Sin - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Stella comes to Charles, convinced they’re now on the right track. But Charles tells a stunned Stella to stop pushing – Teddy’s life is now at risk. Yet Stella won’t give up.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue au monastère - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Bienvenue au monastère - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Furia - S01E01 - Lose Yourself and All is Lost
1.plot: Asgeir, police officer with the special unit, wants to start a new life with his daughter Michelle in placid Vestvik in Norway. Instead he is confronted with a radical right-wing terror cell.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E02 - The Rabbit Hole
1.plot: After Bjørn dies by a lethal shot, Asgeir's wish of a new and safe life for him and his daughter ends quickly. The internal investigation against him is his smallest problem.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E03 - No Nihilist But...
1.plot: Ragna reveals how far she is willing to go to become part of the group and continue her mission; when Asgeir's identity is leaked, neither he nor his daughter are safe anymore.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E04 - White Picket Fences
1.plot: Ragna travels to Germany with Ole and Brehme, where the parliamentary election is imminent. The radical right-wing terror cell is planning to change Europe forever.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E05 - Biting the Bullet
1.plot: Brehme knows that the cell was infiltrated and does everything to find the traitor. Ragna is suspected, as well. Meanwhile, ordered by Inger, Asgeir is coming to Berlin as a back-up for Ragna.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E06 - The Red Pill
1.plot: After Jan has been identified as an informer, Ragna has no time to catch a breath. She does everything to find out what the radical right-wing terror cell is planning next.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E07 - The Teutonic Shift
1.plot: Following the presumably Islamist attack on the right-wing populist candidate, Germany is upside down. However, the cell is planning something much bigger to finalize the swing on the right.

1.title: FR - Furia - S01E08 - Fire and Fury
1.plot: Now it is clear what the cell is willing to sacrifice to change the political and social state in Gernany and Europe radically: the life of more than 1000 children.

2.title: FR - Furia - S02E01 - When the Past Becomes Present
2.plot: Asgeir is in Lofoten, where he follows a money trail to get a hold of Ziminov; Ellen is on leave, but she is restless and eager to return to work; the growing number of online threats against Jonas worries the Ministry of Justice.

2.title: FR - Furia - S02E02 - Polarize and Mobilize. A Symphony for the Devil
2.plot: New clues lead Ellen and Asgeir to Budapest, where they are to arrest Ziminov with the CIA's help; Chief and Ellen are concerned about Asgeir's behaviour when he will face Zimino; Jonas must meet with PST with regard to his own safety.

2.title: FR - Furia - S02E03 - Enemies of the States
2.plot: When Ellen and Asgeir learn that they have fallen into a trap, they must make an unlikely ally to escape; the Minister of Justice and the PST face the repercussions of Budapest's events; Tarje gets new information that completely changes his life.

2.title: FR - Furia - S02E04 - The Medium Is the Message
2.plot: Ellen goes undercover again to track down the infamous Mateusz Krajewski; Ziminov and Asgeir run into difficulties at the border; in Norway, Tarje is in a tough spot where he has to choose between being loyal to his sister and his best mate.

2.title: FR - Furia - S02E05 - Everything You Love Must Die
2.plot: Ellen has taken Krajewski and his wife hostages; Tereza and Asgeir must infiltrate a highly guarded warehouse in order to find proof; the NATO summit put the Norwegian government under extreme pressure; the Minister of Justice has bad news for Jonas.

2.title: FR - Furia - S02E06 - The Past Is Never Dead. It's Not Even Past
2.plot: Poland is in revolt and the European democracy is in jeopardy; Ellen attempts to stop the attack; Asgeir asks Chief to help him; the NATO summit is about to begin as the Minister of Justice makes a crucial decision.

meta.plot: Policeman Asgeir moves to an idyllic town in the west part of Norway. After a local conflict, he meets a mysterious woman named Ragna, and soon they are both trapped in a network of right-wing radical forces that threaten Europe.

1.title: FR - Après le verdict : les jurés mènent l'enquête - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After their verdict of 'not guilty', four jurors on a murder trial wonder if they made a terrible mistake. Have they let a killer walk free?

1.title: FR - Après le verdict : les jurés mènent l'enquête - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Clara sees accused killer Heidi in a new light when they are both targeted by a dangerous stalker. Daniel's secretive behaviour takes a deadly twist.

1.title: FR - Après le verdict : les jurés mènent l'enquête - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Après le verdict : les jurés mènent l'enquête - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Après le verdict : les jurés mènent l'enquête - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Après le verdict : les jurés mènent l'enquête - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: As they return to normal life, four very different Australians who have just finished jury duty on a high-profile murder trial begin to question their verdict and take matters into their own hands, investigating the murder themselves as they juggle the pressures and impacts on their personal lives.

Karl Lagerfeld was an enigmatic figure who spent his life reinventing himself. He ruled the fashion world for decades, making history with his achievements at Chanel, Fendi and his own brand. An extraordinary personality, a fashion Stakhanovite, a tireless worker who created day and night until his last breath. A flamboyant man too, in his appearance and in his words, known for his outbursts mixing perfidy, provocation and self-deprecation. He was also an illusionist, a provocateur, a controversial icon, who used the truth - particularly about his past - to embellish his legend. But where does this determination come from? What were his inspirations and motivations? And behind his enigmatic façade - with his tight suit, ponytail and dark glasses - who really was Karl Lagerfeld?

1.title: FR - Karl Lagerfeld : Révélation - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Reflections on Karl Lagerfeld's childhood, born in Hamburg in 1933, on his childhood memories, his passion for drawing. A narrative of his arrival in Paris, his first steps in the world of fashion, initially at Balmain then at Patou, of his great friendship but also of his rivalry with Yves Saint Laurent.

1.title: FR - Karl Lagerfeld : Révélation - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Karl Lagerfeld : Révélation - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Karl Lagerfeld : Révélation - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E01 - You're Wonderful
1.plot: In 1950’s Washington, Hawkins Fuller is a war hero moving up the ladder at the State Department, flirting with women while enjoying clandestine sex with men and avoiding emotional entanglements. Everything changes when Hawk meets religious Tim Laughlin: they begin an affair that puts them in jeopardy. In 1986, married Hawk receives a mysterious package and decides he must see Tim.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E02 - Bulletproof
1.plot: When the State Department begins investigations into suspected homosexuals, Hawk distances himself from Tim, who questions his faith. Hawk’s colleague Mary comes under suspicion. Journalist Marcus loses his job after a dispute with Roy Cohn but is comforted by drag performer Frankie. Needing cover, Hawk draws closer to Lucy Smith. In 1980s San Francisco, Hawk observes gay life in the AIDS crisis when Tim’s sister forbids him to see Tim.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E03 - Hit Me
1.plot: Hawk and Tim go on a road trip that turns sour when Tim realizes Hawk is using the trip to dig up dirt on Senator Smith’s enemies. Marcus and Frankie’s encounter with a racist bouncer nearly tears them apart. Roy is desperate to keep David from being drafted and Jean Kerr questions McCarthy’s masculinity. In 1980s San Francisco, Tim withholds forgiveness until a medical emergency gives Hawk a chance to prove he’s worthy of it.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E04 - Your Nuts Roasting on an Open Fire
1.plot: As the government’s purge of homosexuals continues, Hawk faces a polygraph test about his sex life and publicly courts Lucy while involving Tim in a desperate plot to destroy McCarthy and Cohn. Marcus makes peace with his attraction to Frankie’s feminine persona. David has been drafted and Roy threatens to destroy the Army. In 1980s San Francisco, Hawk meets Marcus and Frankie’s adopted son and Tim recruits Hawk to help his AIDS activist group.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E05 - Promise You Won't Write
1.plot: Roy Cohn’s obsession with David Schine leads to the televised Army-McCarthy hearings and national scandal as McCarthy’s allies attack Senator Smith, threatening to expose family secrets. Hawk tries to protect Smith while hiding his secret life from Lucy, although a tragedy brings them closer. Marcus must decide between his love for Frankie and his new job at the Post. Exposed to McCarthy’s – and Hawk’s – true natures, Tim makes a life-changing decision about his future.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E06 - Beyond Measure
1.plot: It’s 1968 and Tim’s an anti-war protester sought by the FBI. Hawk and Lucy have a settled life, two children and a country house – the perfect spot for Tim to hide. Out of touch for years, Hawk wants Tim back in his life and Tim – on his way to becoming a priest – can’t resist Hawk’s charms. Marcus puts aside his career to care for his aged father while denying himself romance. Frankie becomes a counselor for “girls” left behind by society.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E07 - White Nights
1.plot: It’s 1979 and Tim, now a social worker in San Francisco, travels to Fire Island where he suspects Hawk is drinking himself to death after a family tragedy. Hawk takes Tim on a tour of “gay paradise,” indulging in dancing, drugs and unbridled sex until things take a dark turn. In San Francisco, Marcus and Frankie are drawn into the explosion of gay rage prompted by the verdict in Dan White’s murder trial. Hawk’s adult daughter, Kimberly, challenges Lucy to share the truth about her marriage.

1.title: FR - Fellow Travelers - S01E08 - Make It Easy
1.plot: In 1957, Hawk and Tim reunite at Senator McCarthy’s funeral and try, one last time, to find a way to be together, but the pressures of impending fatherhood may force Hawk to commit an act of betrayal. In San Francisco, in 1986, Hawk seeks redemption, seeing Tim through a medical crisis and facing Lucy, who arrives with an ultimatum. Marcus and Frankie are stunned by news concerning their adopted son, Jerome. Tim makes a wrenching decision that will change Hawk’s life forever.

meta.plot: Decades-long chronicle of the risky, volatile and steamy relationship between the charismatic and ambitious Hawk and the pious and idealistic Tim, two political staffers who fall in love at the height of the 1950s Lavender Scare. Through the Vietnam War protests of the 1960s, the drug-fueled disco culture of the 1970s and the AIDS crisis of the 1980s, the two men’s fiery affair only intensifies despite the constant threat of being exposed and losing everything.

Song Yeo-wool, a widow who has been falsely accused of her husband’s murder, goes on a dangerous path to discover the truth about her husband’s death, while facing great judgement from the society. With this charge and allegation on her, she gets near about losing everything and becomes devastated. Meanwhile, the parents of students of international school where Yeo-wool’s son studies, starts to spread rumors about Yeo-wool.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E01 - Welcome To Paradise
1.plot: On a wedding anniversary night, Yeo Wool loses her husband. After one year, Yeo Wool puts everything behind and moves to an island to get her only son Yi Chan accepted in a prestigious school. She tries to settle in and get along with other parents there, but she encounters someone who she never wants to meet again on the school reception day.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E02 - An Unfamiliar Place, a New Friend
1.plot: Yi Chan’s classmates and their mothers completely isolate Yeo Wool and Yi Chan from their gatherings after what happened to him at school. Thankfully, Jae In and her mother reach out to them and spend time together. Meanwhile, Yeo Wool receives a suspicious parcel and a message from an unknown sender.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E03 - Secrets & Lies
1.plot: It’s time for the kids to decide on the school club they wish to join. Yeo Wool chooses to let Yi Chan join a hockey club. On the registration day, she encounters Ji Sun, Do Young, and the other moms. Meanwhile, Yeo Wool continues trying to find out the relationship between her dead husband and Do Young. She hires a private detective to dig into Do Young. Yeo Wool soon receives surprising news from the private detective.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E04 - Sleeping With The Enemy
1.plot: Do Young tells Yeo Wool that she had no choice but to turn a blind eye to Yi Chan's incident because she was afraid to get caught having an affair. However, she’s not the one who locked the locker. Meanwhile, Yeo Wool volunteers to prepare snacks for Camp Day, and Ji Sun throws them away.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E05 - A Dangerous Deal
1.plot: Jae In looks into Yi Chan's dad's cell phone and gets confused as she sees the photos of her family in there. While Yeo Wool is sleeping, Na Yoon finally reveals her true colors and tries to get rid of her. Meanwhile, Ji Sun plans to kick Yi Chan out of the school with other parents, but Yeo Wool finds out her weakness.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E06 - Irreversible
1.plot: Yeo Wool and Na Yoon slowly drift apart after Yeo Wool notices that Na Yoon was stabbing her in the back. And Chef Jung tells Yeo Wool that Ji Yong was with another woman right before he went on a yacht with Yeo Wool on the night he died. Meanwhile, Jae In tells Yi Chan and their whole class that they are related.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E07 - The Prelude to the Storm Arises
1.plot: Na Yoon sues Yeo Wool for trespassing and damaging her painting, and Yeo Wool meets the detective who was in charge of Ji Yong’s case at the police station. Soon Sang feels bad for Yeo Wool and decides to quit his job and leave. Meanwhile, Ji Sun is not happy with the rumor about Yi Chan and Jae In.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E08 - A Trap
1.plot: Yeo Wool receives a text message from Ms. Doh and goes down to her office. But when she gets there, she finds Ms. Doh lying down on the floor, unconscious. Yeo Wool quickly calls 911, but everyone suspects her because she was the first one to find Ms. Doh. Meanwhile, Na Yoon gives her statement to the police and takes Yi Chan with her.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E09 - The Final Request
1.plot: Yeo Wool is arrested and questioned by the police as a suspect of murder. Yeo Wool quickly calls Soon Sang for help before they search her house. Then Yeo Wool warns Na Yoon for reporting a false statement. Meanwhile, the police find out who has turned off the circuit breaker at the school on the recital night.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E10 - Someone Is Here
1.plot: On a rainy day, someone throws a rock and breaks the window of Yeo Wool’s house, and Danny comes to save Yeo Wool and Yi Chan. Meanwhile, Ae Soon is arrested for vandalism as she gets caught watching Yeo Wool in front of her house that night. Therefore, Yeo Wool sets up surveillance cameras at every corner of her house and notices something strange.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E11 - What I Left For You
1.plot: Soon Sang and Yeo Wool find a tunnel that leads to a secret room in her place. She gets shocked and furious to find out someone has been watching her home from the beginning. Soon Sang takes both Yeo Wool and Yi Chan to his place for the time being. Meanwhile, Na Yoon becomes the new foundation chairman and fires Yeo Wool.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E12 - The Ominous Feeling is Never Wrong
1.plot: Ji Yong is alive. Yeo Wool figures out he has been conspiring with Alex all along, and therefore, she suspects Na Yoon as well. Even though they hate each other, Yeo Wool tries to help her and warns her, but she does not believe in Yeo Wool. Meanwhile, Ji Sun is about to leave for vacation with her children but, she gets an urgent call.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E13 - Goodbye, My Friend
1.plot: Na Yoon is unconscious from the car accident, and Yeo Wool comes running to the hospital and meets Ae Soon. Yeo Wool starts to investigate this accident thoroughly as she suspects Ji Yong is the one who is responsible for it. Meanwhile, Ji Sun secretly goes into the woods in the middle of the night to hide something.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E14 - When The Devil Calls
1.plot: Even after Na Yoon’s death, Detective Gu still suspects Yeo Wool as she is Ji Yong’s wife. However, Detective Gu and Soon Sang work together to arrest Ji Yong through Yeo Wool. Meanwhile, when Yeo Wool voids the contract with Wan Chai Group on behalf of Na Yoon, Ji Yong finally calls her to meet her in person.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E15 - I Will Not Forgive
1.plot: Ji Yong threatens Yeo Wool to replace the money on Na Yoon’s account, and he tries to kill her on the yacht. Now that the truth comes out about Ji Yong being alive all along, Detective Gu apologizes to Yeo Wool for suspecting her. Meanwhile, Ji Sun manages to get Jung Woo out of the police station in Seoul, but another trouble is waiting for her in Jeju.

1.title: FR - Cruelle Perfection - S01E16 - Until We Meet Again
1.plot: Ji Sun is under arrest for murder as Jun Mo reported her, and Do Young decides to get a divorce from her husband and leave Jeju to start fresh. Meanwhile, Ji Yong kidnaps his own son, Yi Chan, to threaten Yeo Wool. He calls her and tells her to come to the theme park they went to as a family.

1.title: FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S01E06 - Episode 6

2.title: FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Lycée Toulouse-Lautrec - S02E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: This psychological thriller follows two Navajo police officers, Leaphorn and Chee, in the 1970s Southwest as their search for clues in a grisly double murder case forces them to challenge their own spiritual beliefs and come to terms with the trauma of their pasts.

1.title: FR - Dark Winds - S01E01 - Monster Slayer
1.plot: Navajo Tribal Policeman Joe Leaphorn must solve a series of crimes. He partners with new deputy, Jim Chee, who is back on the reservation for the first time since he was a child, and together they face down evil forces both earthly and supernatural.

1.title: FR - Dark Winds - S01E02 - The Male Rain Approaches
1.plot: Leaphorn and Chee interview the surviving witness to the Big Rock Motel murders. Chee meets with the coroner but the cause of death remains a mystery. Sgt. Manuelito makes a chilling discovery of her own.

1.title: FR - Dark Winds - S01E03 - K'e
1.plot: Leaphorn’s niece celebrates her Kinaaldá as Leaphorn retrieves the bodies of the murder victims. Manuelito and Chee investigate the whereabouts of the missing Mormon family.

1.title: FR - Dark Winds - S01E04 - Hooghandi
1.plot: Leaphorn suspects all of the crimes on the reservation are related. There is a big break in the case. Leaphorn invites Chee over for dinner. Manuelito makes a discovery of her own.

1.title: FR - Dark Winds - S01E05 - Ha'íínlni
1.plot: With a major suspect in custody, Leaphorn discovers that there is more to this crime than he would have ever imagined. Manuelito faces her worst fears. Chee must make a choice between his career and his people.

1.title: FR - Dark Winds - S01E06 - HózhóoNaasháa
1.plot: Leaphorn, Chee and Manuelito descend on the hiding place of the Buffalo Society, only to be confronted with hard decisions that could change the outcome of the rest of their lives.

2.title: FR - Dark Winds - S02E01 - Na'niłkaadii
2.plot: Navajo Tribal Policeman Joe Leaphorn investigates the death of a man involved in a mysterious cult, while Jim Chee, moonlighting as a PI, works a case of his own. When their investigations collide, Leaphorn and Chee find themselves in grave danger.

2.title: FR - Dark Winds - S02E02 - Wonders of the Unknown
2.plot: Leaphorn explores personal ties to an increasingly mysterious case. Chee is questioned by a reluctant Sgt. Manuelito. The discovery of a body sends Leaphorn and Manuelito in pursuit of a child in danger.

2.title: FR - Dark Winds - S02E03 - Antigonish
2.plot: After facing off with a dangerous man, Chee strikes out on his own. Leaphorn and Manuelito partner with the sheriff’s department, leading Leaphorn to identify a vital clue.

2.title: FR - Dark Winds - S02E04 - The March
2.plot: Leaphorn risks his life in pursuit of a suspect. Manuelito stands up to the sheriff in a bid to rescue her boss. Seeking answers on a case, Chee considers a dangerous proposition.

2.title: FR - Dark Winds - S02E05 - Black Hole Sun
2.plot: With his suspect in custody, Leaphorn races against the clock to get a confession, while Chee goes under cover at the cult that ties their investigations together. Manuelito counsels a teenager nervous about the draft.

2.title: FR - Dark Winds - S02E06 - Hózhó náhásdlįį
2.plot: Leaphorn and Chee discover evidence that connects their cases, only for Leaphorn to realize justice won’t be easily served. Manuelito prepares for a big life change.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E01 - Ye'iitsoh (Big Monster)
3.plot: Lt. Joe Leaphorn and Sgt. Jim Chee investigate the disappearance of a Navajo boy. Manuelito makes a sinister discovery while adjusting to life on the border patrol. An FBI agent comes to solve a case linked to Leaphorn's recent past.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E02 - Náá'tsoh (Big Eyes)
3.plot: Leaphorn and Chee find themselves on a manhunt after making a shocking discovery. Special Agent Washington questions Leaphorn about a person of interest. Manuelito puts her job on the line when she searches for answers at a local ranch.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E03 - Ch'į́į́dii (Ghosts)
3.plot: After a close call, Leaphorn and Chee follow the trail of a new suspect. The discovery of a body sends Special Agent Washington in a different direction. Manuelito puts a target on her back as she digs deeper into the mystery.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E04 - Chahałheeł (Darkness Falls)
3.plot: Chee pays Manuelito a visit after discovering a link between their cases. Leaphorn pursues a fugitive suspect. Special Agent Washington interviews an eyewitness to the crime she's investigating.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E05 - Tsékǫ̨' Hasą́ní (Coal Mine Canyon)
3.plot: Following a grisly murder, Leaphorn and Chee strike out on their own when the FBI take over their case. Special Agent Washington pays the Leaphorns an unexpected visit. Manuelito searches for evidence south of the border.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E06 - Ábidoo'niidę́ę́ (What We Had Been Told)
3.plot: Leaphorn is forced to confront his worst fears and darkest memories when he puts his life on the line to prevent another murder.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E07 - T'áá Áłts'íísígo (Just a Small Piece)
3.plot: Leaphorn and Chee retrace their steps after uncovering a vital clue; Special Agent Washington presses for more information; Manuelito moves quickly to execute a search warrant.

3.title: FR - Dark Winds - S03E08 - Béésh Łį́į (Iron Horse)
3.plot: Leaphorn and Chee call upon all their resources to solve the case and serve justice after learning the identity of the killer. Bernadette fights for her life after coming face-to-face with the truth.

1.title: FR - L'âge de la colère - S01E01 - Sandra
1.plot: Open-minded, idealistic, funny and self-confident, Sandra is the one who makes the first move with Marcos, the classmate she has a crush on. She, along with Raúl, a new guy who is a bit of a freak, form a group of very different friends who are eager to find their place. Suddenly, his illusions are shattered by a terrible incident: Marcos's father is found murdered and everything points to his son, an apparently normal boy, being responsible.

1.title: FR - L'âge de la colère - S01E02 - Ignacio
1.plot: Nacho is Marcos' older brother, with whom he has a complicated relationship. Studious and responsible, he is unable to rebel against the oppressive environment that exists at home. But deep down he also wants to fly away. For now, his priority is to go to university, while he continues to abide by the dictates of his father. The death of his mother in a traffic accident increases the rivalry between Nacho and Marcos, since both blame each other for the tragedy.

1.title: FR - L'âge de la colère - S01E03 - Raúl
1.plot: Raúl has just arrived at the institute. Overprotected by his mother, he tries to hatch and find his place. He seems like the typical geek, but Sandra and Marcos see in him an enthusiastic and fun boy, with peculiar musical tastes. He soon falls in love with Sandra, but knows that she likes Marcos. Raúl is also attracted to him and doesn't understand why the three of them can't love each other. He will suffer a severe blow with the arrest of Marcos for the murder of his father.

1.title: FR - L'âge de la colère - S01E04 - Marcos
1.plot: Marcos is accused of the death of his father, beaten to death with the typewriter with which he forced him to do his homework. He is a boy with no apparent problems, almost a leader, and nobody can explain what happened. Only Álvaro, his Literature teacher, will help him to accept himself and start on the road to improvement. Days before the terrible event, Marcos enjoys with his friends, Sandra and Raúl, the best moments of his life.

meta.plot: A man is found brutally murdered, presumably by his son Marcos, a teenager with no apparent problems. The tragedy hits the school, with students and teachers wondering what went wrong.

1.title: FR - 5 gars pour moi - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - 5 gars pour moi - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - 5 gars pour moi - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - 5 gars pour moi - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - 5 gars pour moi - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: Et si on pouvait trouver le vrai amour chez soi en une semaine? Une célibataire accueillera chez elle cinq hommes dans le but de trouver l’amour. Chaque matin, elle devra faire ses adieux à l’un d’entre eux, pour finalement se retrouver seul à seul avec celui qui fait le plus battre son coeur.

1.title: FR - Réseau pédophile - la traque internationale - S01E01 - He Was My Age
1.plot: The police in Bergen receive a call about an unpleasant incident in Torget. The investigation takes Norwegian police around the world in search of evidence.

1.title: FR - Réseau pédophile - la traque internationale - S01E02 - Fragments
1.plot: The investigation into the Norwegian policeman who is suspected of gross abuse is progressing slowly. A breakthrough points to an address in Milan. Italian police must be persuaded to take action.

1.title: FR - Réseau pédophile - la traque internationale - S01E03 - The Blue Room
1.plot: Evidence takes the police to Romania, where several victims are identified.

1.title: FR - Réseau pédophile - la traque internationale - S01E04 - Wolf In Sheep's Clothing
1.plot: The investigations in Italy and Romania provide many answers.

1.title: FR - Réseau pédophile - la traque internationale - S01E05 - Hollywood
1.plot: The police and FBI plan a raid against a house in Hollywood.

meta.plot: 15-year-old Martin calls the police in Bergen, Norway. That phone call leads to an international investigation that exposes a large network of child predators. Explore the shocking details of this disturbing case.

Every episode explores two chilling stories of real-life paranormal encounters that intersect with revenge. Each story unfolds from the perspective of a main storyteller – a victim – who has been targeted by a mysterious paranormal entity or entities. What follows is a truly original and compelling approach: a mash-up of the true-crime procedural and terrifying ghost stories.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E01 - Love You To Death/Photo Negative
1.plot: When a mom and her daughter finally escape the clutches of an abusive husband and father, he dies suddenly and comes back as a ghost.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E02 - Eye On The Sky/The Creeper
1.plot: A California family man is horrified to discover that the threatening messages on his phone are coming from the other side.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E03 - Dark Pond/The Smile
1.plot: When a 7 year old girl mysteriously disappears by a remote pond in North Carolina, the life of one of her classmates is forever altered.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E04 - Bad Blood/You're Alive
1.plot: When a 7 year old boy in upstate New York is going to bed one night he is attacked by a violent ghost that has been seeking revenge on.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E05 - Dark Arts/Death Curse
1.plot: When a young Puerto Rican boy disturbs some bones buried under his house, the spirit of a headless woman starts a campaign of terror.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E06 - Pulpit Master/Scared Sick
1.plot: When a gay photography professor moves into a small North Carolina town, he encounters a ghost in his new home hell bent on torturing him.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E08 - Mystic Manor/Fire Fight
1.plot: When a history-loving Connecticut man and his husband buy a 200-year-old house and convert it to a B&B, they encounter a raft of spirits.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E09 - She Follows/Mind Stalker
1.plot: When a young couple with a newborn baby move into a suburb in Las Vegas, an uninvited female spirit also moves in seeking revenge for something Jonathan did years ago.

1.title: FR - Paranormal Revenge - S01E10 - Lady Of The House/All Hallows
1.plot: When a woman and her husband buy a famous historical mansion in New Hampshire, they inherit a spirit along with it, and she has it out for the lady of the house.

1.title: FR - How to Create a Sex Scandal - S01E01 - When the Swingers Came to Town
1.plot: In 2005, the sleepy community of Mineola, Texas, is thrown into turmoil when local children reveal shocking stories about a pedophile sex ring that took place at a local swingers club.

1.title: FR - How to Create a Sex Scandal - S01E02 - Smoke and Mirrors
1.plot: The trial of the fourth person accused of operating a pedophile ring at the Mineola Swingers Club is dramatically thrown off course when one of the children whose testimony has proved vital to the investigation and previous trials reveals a shocking truth.

meta.plot: In 2005, the sleepy community of Mineola, Texas, is thrown into turmoil when local children reveal shocking stories about a pedophile sex ring that took place at a local swingers club. As arrests are made, life sentences handed down, and lives ruined, it soon becomes apparent that there is a lot more to the story than meets the eye. Now, the startling long-term repercussions of the scandal are revealed.

meta.plot: Returning to Paris after exile from Hollywood, Judith is intent of making a comeback with a new movie. However, her 16-year-old daughter falls in love with her much older dance teacher and Judith is forced to deal with personal ambition, maternal anxiety and the demons of her past with humor and disillusion.

meta.plot: A busy executive hires a rancher to care for her kids in a moment of panic. Little does she know he'll challenge her views of gender roles — and of love.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E01 - Yes, You Can Change the World
1.plot: In a single day, Gabriel leaves a lasting impression on Jimena’s kids — and they, in turn, leave a lasting impression on a group of executives.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E02 - The Tooth Fairy
1.plot: The race for the company's presidency is on. As Gabriel continues to pull tricks up his sleeve, Jimena works up the courage to stand up for herself.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E03 - The Value of a Like
1.plot: An accidental swipe leads to a surprising twist in Jimena's evening, bringing about a serendipitous encounter with the right person.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E04 - Cockfight
1.plot: Just as Jimena ponders her next move, someone from her past shakes everything up, adding smiles — and tension — to her household.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E05 - Wolves, Sheep, Pigs and Magicians
1.plot: Jimena and her appointed accomplices set out to hunt information with the help of magic. But too much magic proves dismal for Gabriel's chances.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E06 - Stolen Triumphs
1.plot: A day at the country club becomes an opportunity for the kids to go after their true wishes and opens Jimena’s eyes to what she no longer wants.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E07 - Twisted Arm
1.plot: Ernesto and Sofía concoct a plan to bring a couple together while Jimena plots to bring them apart. Rogelio’s intentions come to light.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E08 - What's Meant for You Won't Pass You By
1.plot: The story around the ranches' payments becomes murkier. The kids ramp up the mischief as they vow to stop what they believe could be a dire outcome.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E09 - Wrangled
1.plot: Gabriel joins Leo on his school trip to the cattle show, where he realizes he risks revealing his identity — and, to Jimena’s dismay, his new romance.

1.title: FR - Gabriel et ses petits démons - S01E10 - Changing the World
1.plot: Jimena heads for Tepatitlán to gather more information, but just as things begin to look up, her hopes of getting what she wants are derailed.

meta.plot: David and Siri are a young couple living in London. During a night out, they meet Camille and a flirtatious game arises where the boundaries are gradually dissolved. In an act of drunken curiosity, they have a threesome.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S01E01 - Love in Amsterdam
1.plot: Set against the backdrop of impending elections, Piet Van der Valk investigates the mysterious deaths of two innocents with no connection to each other. its a puzzle that leads him into the world of art and politics.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S01E02 - Only in Amsterdam
1.plot: Van der Valk is contacted following the death of a young woman. The investigation brings him into contact with a nun interested in erotica, a Christian sect and a drug facility with a controversial approach to addiction.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S01E03 - Death in Amsterdam
1.plot: In this final episode, when the brutal killing of a fashion vlogger is broadcast live, Piet van der Valk and his team find themselves drawn into investigating the contemporary fashion world.

2.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S02E01 - Plague on Amsterdam
2.plot: Dutch detective Van der Valk is called in to investigate the grisly and theatrical murder of a solicitor. As a cryptic note discovered within her jacket alludes to further murders, the race is on to undercover the truth.

2.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S02E02 - Blood In Amsterdam
2.plot: When an employee of the Cuypers Diamonds is killed and his body delivered in pieces to the wealthy siblings and heirs to the company, Van der Valk must consider a tale of revenge against the family.

2.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S02E03 - Payback In Amsterdam
2.plot: When a promising cellist from a prestigious orchestra dies following an acid attack, Van der Valk has to delve into the city's vibrant but eclectic classical music scene in the search for her killer.

3.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S03E01 - Freedom in Amsterdam
3.plot: It's a new day and a new dawn as Van der Valk welcomes two new Sergeants to the team - impulsive hotshot Eddie Suleman and technical whizz Citra Li.

3.title: FR - Les enquêtes du commissaire Van der Valk - S03E02 - Redemption in Amsterdam
3.plot: The use of an Indonesian ceremonial sword as a murder weapon takes Van der Valk and the team deep into the world of colonial museum artefacts and the thorny issue of restitution - with an unlikely link to the cold case.

meta.plot: Set against the backdrop of the city of Amsterdam, Piet Van der Valk and his team investigate a series of high-profile cases immersed in the worlds of art, politics, addiction, mysticism and the fashion industry.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: During an inauguration party, an employee, Marilou Côté, seems upset and leaves the party in a hurry.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The day after the fundraiser, Manuela receives the news that one of the waitresses has been raped. Upset, Manuela looks for the perpetrator.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As a big blow, Christian is accused of sexual assault. For Christian’s family and friends, this denunciation is a lie.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Without any news from the investigators, Marilou decides to take her destiny in hand and to denounce Christian on the social networks.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Christian's entourage is increasingly convinced of his guilt when his past catches up with him and reveals his true face.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Manuela has had enough of Christian's reign of terror. She wants to move on, but will she be able to confront him?

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: For the first time, Christian, who has always managed to clean up the mess, seems to lose control.

1.title: FR - L'Empereur - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Christian finds himself in hot water and begins to gather evidence against his victims to protect himself.

meta.plot: A charismatic, benevolent young man grows into a tyrannical, ruthless aggressor as his victims come and go.

An adrenalized drama with darkly comedic undertones that explores a notorious outlaw motorcycle club’s (MC) desire to protect its livelihood while ensuring that their simple, sheltered town of Charming, California remains exactly that, charming. The MC must confront threats from drug dealers, corporate developers, and overzealous law officers. Behind the MC’s familial lifestyle and legally thriving automotive shop is a ruthless and illegal arms business driven by the seduction of money, power, and blood.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When a rival club cleans out and then destroys their illegal arms warehouse, SAMCRO (Sons of Anarchy Motorcycle Club, Redwood Original) executes their own sense of justice in retrieving their guns. Meanwhile, family issues take center stage with a medical emergency involving Jax Teller's newborn son.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E02 - Seeds
1.plot: As the club deals with the aftermath of its illegal arms warehouse attack, the deputy chief of police poses a new threat to SAMCRO's reign over Charming; Jax continues to worry about his newborn son's fate; Opie faces a difficult decision.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E03 - Fun Town
1.plot: When a prominent Charming family's young daughter is assaulted at a carnival, SAMCRO races against the authorities to capture the assailant; a new shipment of guns arrives from the group's IRA connection; Tara's ex-boyfriend arrives in Charming.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E04 - Patch Over
1.plot: The club travels to Nevada to store arms with a brother club; when the Mayans pose a threat, Clay decides to "patch-over" the tribe, making them an official charter; Tara's ex, an ATF agent, investigates SAMCRO.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E05 - Giving Back
1.plot: Gemma hosts a town fundraiser, bringing the former club member responsible for Opie's arrest back to town; Clay deals with protecting a perverse parolee who can lead to a big payoff.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E06 - AK-51
1.plot: A small favor for Piney's old war buddy turns into a big problem for SAMCRO; Gemma deals with the effects of aging.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E07 - Old Bones
1.plot: When old bones are discovered on the outskirts of Charming, Clay must deal with long-buried secrets; the club sets its sights on prize money in a bare-knuckle brawl; Kohn's investigation becomes personal when his true intentions are revealed.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E08 - The Pull
1.plot: With the IRA gun payment looming, Samcro scrambles to come up with the cash; the Mayans and Nords take a drastic step toward strengthening their alliance; Jax finds himself in a dangerous position with Tara.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E09 - Hell Followed
1.plot: SAMCRO plans retaliation on a rival biker club while dealing with wounded Cameron Hayes in the clubhouse; Jax, Bobby and Opie try to end the gun debt for good.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E10 - Better Half
1.plot: With Stahl pressing the women of SAMCRO, Jax sees Unser as the key to salvation; Cherry reveals interesting information about her past.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E11 - Capybara
1.plot: Jax's loyalty to SAMCRO is tested when one member is arrested and another disappears. Meanwhile, Abel's improving condition could spur his release from the NICU, but his homecoming may not be the only one.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E12 - The Sleep of Babies
1.plot: Clay's solution to getting cash for Bobby's defense leaves SAMCRO in a vulnerable position; Abel's happy homecoming ends in turmoil for the club.

1.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S01E13 - The Revelator
1.plot: In the wake of a tragedy, the club must re-evaluate its bonds of brotherhood.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E01 - Albification
2.plot: Donna's death has the club divided, with Clay setting up a new gun deal with the IRA. Charming and SAMCRO 's hold on the city is threatened after Ethan Zobelle a sophisticated separatist opens a tobacco shop. Zobelle and his less-sophisticated associate are determined to take SAMCRO down due to their black and Latino bikers.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E02 - Small Tears
2.plot: After Gemma experiences something horrible she can't tell Jax and Clay. A rival porn producer comes to try and put Luanne out of business and Clay doesn't like Jax's decision making.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E03 - Fix
2.plot: Zobelle comes up with a problem that Hale can solve to frustrate SAMCRO. Meanwhile, Gemma being raped is really affecting her relationship with Clay and the fact that Jax is involved with Luanne's porn business is bothering Tara. Clay decides to give Bobby the responsibility of running the business side of Luanne's.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E04 - Eureka
2.plot: Tensions between Jax and Clay escalate when they disagree over strategy for rescuing Tig after he's captured by bounty hunters on a gun-running mission. Back in Charming, Gemma is rattled by a graphic reminder of her attack, and she sets out to do something about it.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E05 - Smite
2.plot: While Jax and Clay lock horns (and line up support) over how to deal with Zobelle, Tara finds herself ensnared in Gemma's emotional struggle in the aftermath of her attack. Meanwhile, SAMCRO gets help from an unlikely source.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E06 - Falx Cerebri
2.plot: Zoebelle incites Clay, who plans a course of retaliation, causing Jax to look to an unlikely source to keep the club from being destroyed. Tara learns from Gemma how an old lady handles anger.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E07 - Gilead
2.plot: Since The League has SAMCRO members behind bars, the club must make new alliances in prison to survive. Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms Agent Stahl uses this imprisonment to test Jax and Clay's relationship.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E08 - Potlatch
2.plot: Extreme measures are taken by SAMCRO to get a hold of weapons for a customer. A theft at Caracara Studios means revenge after one diva is put at risk. Tara's professional and personal lives begin to collide.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E09 - Fa Guan
2.plot: When SAMCRO's adult-film business becomes a hindrance to the club, Clay seizes the opportunity to revive the gun-running cartel. As Jax and Clay continue to clash over club activities, their relationship reaches a new level of antagonism.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E10 - Balm
2.plot: Agent Stahl (Ally Walker) takes notice at the handsome profits SAMCRO is reaping from the repo business. Meanwhile, the Jax- Clay standoff forces Gemma to make a difficult decision.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E11 - Service
2.plot: While Opie seeks both revenge and reconciliation, Chibs makes a secret deal with Agent Stahl (Ally Walker) to protect his wife and daughter.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E12 - The Culling
2.plot: Jax and Clay keep SAMCRO focused on their impending showdown with Zobelle's group; thanks to Gemma, Tara improves her job security at the hospital; Weston finally discovers his boss's intentions in Charming.

2.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S02E13 - Na Trioblóidí
2.plot: The second season ends with SAMCRO trying to get rid of Ethan Zobelle (Adam Arkin) and his cohorts once and for all.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E01 - SO
3.plot: The aftermath of Abel’s kidnapping has the Sons reeling - especially Jax, whose grief sends him into deeper turmoil over his future with the MC. Framed for murder, Gemma remains on the lam, and is hit with some unexpected news from her past.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E02 - Oiled
3.plot: To get intel on Abel’s whereabouts, Jax and the club help a bounty hunter track down a skip. They also press a source for answers about the attack at Half-Sack’s wake - the MC way. Meanwhile, Gemma deals with her father’s dementia.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E03 - Caregiver
3.plot: To secure weapons and raise money for Abel’s search, the club exploits its porn connections to entertain Henry Lin’s clients, which doesn’t sit well with Opie (Ryan Hurst). Jax’s decision to search for Abel in Canada gets derailed. When Gemma’s dad goes MIA, her prisoner makes plans to do the same.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E04 - Home
3.plot: Jax and Clay head towards Canada after Jimmy provides misleading intel on Abel’s whereabouts. The rest of the club splits off to help Happy with a pharmaceutical favor in redneck territory. Gemma tries to put old family matters to rest.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E05 - Turning and Turning
3.plot: To help Gemma, SAMCRO and Abel, Jax conspires with an unlikely source. Meanwhile, the MC puts Chucky undercover.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E06 - The Push
3.plot: To protect their territory, SAMCRO must handle a rat at St. Thomas.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E07 - Widening Gyre
3.plot: The Grim Bastards have a problem that could jeopardize Samcro's new business arrangements.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E08 - Lochan Mor
3.plot: When SAMCRO pays a visit to another charter, not everyone’s happy to see the mother chapter.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E09 - Turas
3.plot: The club embarks on a protection run, the likes of which they’ve never seen before.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E10 - Firinne
3.plot: The IRA wants proof that one of their own has flipped and Samcro intends to give it to them.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E11 - Bainne
3.plot: While the club's on a man hunt, Jax faces the toughest decision of his life.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E12 - June Wedding
3.plot: With a SAMCRO family member held hostage, Jax must choose between revenge and the good of Charming.

3.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S03E13 - NS
3.plot: Both the ATF and the Russians prove obstacles as the club looks to heal old wounds.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E01 - Out
4.plot: 14 months after going to prison on federal weapons charges Jax, Clay and the other SAMCRO members are released and return to Charming where they encounter new enemies in the form of a no nonsense sheriff and an Assistant U.S. Attorney out to nail the club for their dealings with Russian gunrunner Putlova. Also Jax makes a promise to Tara and Opie and Lyla get married.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E02 - Booster
4.plot: After exacting their revenge, SAMCRO is forced to make a decision that could cause a huge shift in the club.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E03 - Dorylus
4.plot: SAMCRO encounters an unlikely foe when a piece of their business goes missing.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E04 - Una Venta
4.plot: SAMCRO makes a run to set up a new business venture with their Tucson charter, SAMTAZ while Gemma makes a new ally in town with Police Chief Roosevelt's wife, Rita.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E05 - Brick
4.plot: SAMCRO enlists a former foe to help stop the advancement of Charming Heights, while the Sheriff presses Juice for more information.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E06 - With an X
4.plot: SAMCRO’s relationship with the Cartel is in jeopardy when an important package is compromised.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E07 - Fruit for the Crows
4.plot: As Jax searches for who threatened Tara, she becomes aware of what's been going on with the club and warns Jax that Clay can't be trusted.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E08 - Family Recipe
4.plot: SAMCRO must put off an important vote to deal with an external threat.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E09 - Kiss
4.plot: SAMCRO gets word that the Niners have made a new alliance that directly impacts their own agenda.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E10 - Hands
4.plot: Jax and Tara get a glimpse of life without SAMCRO but discover that their reality is hard to escape.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E11 - Call of Duty
4.plot: SAMCRO faces a powerful adversary that threatens their business with the Cartel.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E12 - Burnt and Purged Away
4.plot: SAMCRO negotiates with the Irish Kings to secure the club's future.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E13 - To Be, Act 1
4.plot: Jax faces a new challenge that threatens his family and SAMCRO.

4.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S04E14 - To Be, Act 2
4.plot: Jax must overcome great obstacles as he attempts to finalize the gun deal between the Irish and the cartel.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E01 - Sovereign
5.plot: Jax presides over SAMCRO as a series of events begin to unravel Charming.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E02 - Authority Vested
5.plot: Set up by Damon Pope and being sought by police, Jax rallies the MC's resources to plan their next moves. Knowing Pope's endgame, Jax seeks Romeo's protection before he, Chibs and Tig end up behind bars as sheep-to-the-slaughter. As Opie struggles to decide his future with the Sons, an unexpected visit from a brother forces the issue.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E03 - Laying Pipe
5.plot: A desperate situation tests familial and club bonds.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E04 - Stolen Huffy
5.plot: Complications arise as the Sons band together to face a new adversary.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E05 - Orca Shrugged
5.plot: Jax attempts to pull Samcro into a new business venture.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E06 - Small World
5.plot: Jax brings a new proposal to the club with serious consequences.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E07 - Toad's Wild Ride
5.plot: Jax takes matters into his own hands as things go sideways.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E08 - Ablation
5.plot: Alliances are tested, while bonds are broken.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E09 - Andare Pescare
5.plot: Jax gets closer to the truth but there are still obstacles in his way.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E10 - Crucifixed
5.plot: Anticipating backlash, Jax goes into high gear with his own agenda.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E11 - To Thine Own Self
5.plot: Jax scrambles to put his affairs in order, while Nero handles business with his old crew.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E12 - Darthy
5.plot: Jax makes arrangements to take the club in a different direction.

5.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S05E13 - J'ai Obtenu Cette
5.plot: Season finale:

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E01 - Straw
6.plot: As Jax continues to push the club into more legitimate businesses he can’t escape the sins of SAMCRO’s past.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E02 - One One Six
6.plot: Jax deals with collateral damage as external pressure continue to stack up against SAMCRO.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E03 - Poenitentia
6.plot: Jax secures a new alliance for the club while Clay makes moves inside for protection.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E04 - Wolfsangel
6.plot: An attack at the compound leads SOA to seek revenge.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E05 - The Mad King
6.plot: The club is forced to make an uneasy alliance with unforeseen consequences.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E06 - Salvage
6.plot: Jax and the MC must confront their past and choose their future.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E07 - Sweet and Vaded
6.plot: Triggers are pulled that strengthen the MC, but also threaten to destroy it.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E08 - Los Fantasmas
6.plot: Pressure mounts on Jax as the sins of his club and family pull him in different directions.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E09 - John 8:32
6.plot: Jax learns new secrets that turn his world sideways.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E10 - Huang Wu
6.plot: Jax looks to push the club forward, but the Irish put another obstacle in his way.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E11 - Aon Rud Persanta
6.plot: Tension mounts as the club makes a bold move to finally get out of guns.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E12 - You Are My Sunshine
6.plot: As the dust beings to settle Jax’s world is suddenly turned upside down.

6.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S06E13 - A Mother’s Work
6.plot: The ramifications of Jax’s choices put his club and family in jeopardy.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E01 - Black Widower
7.plot: In the wake of Tara’s death, Jax makes vengeance a club priority.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E02 - Toil and Till
7.plot: SAMCRO solicits help from another Charter to get a messy job done.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E03 - Playing with Monsters
7.plot: SAMCRO exploits an opportunity to secure an important alliance.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E04 - Poor Little Lambs
7.plot: A past effort to help one ally leads to trouble with another.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E05 - Some Strange Eruption
7.plot: Looking for the source of a betrayal leads to violence at the Stockton Ports.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E06 - Smoke 'em if You Got 'em
7.plot: Jax settles a score by taking advantage of shifting alliances.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E07 - Greensleeves
7.plot: SAMCRO forges an unlikely partnership in order to undermine a powerful enemy.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E08 - The Separation of Crows
7.plot: With the search for a missing member at a standstill, focus shifts to flushing out an internal rat.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E09 - What a Piece of Work Is Man
7.plot: The club deals with heartache internally and conflict with the organization at large.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E10 - Faith and Despondency
7.plot: SAMCRO members fall in love, but death is in the air.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E11 - Suits of Woe
7.plot: The SOA organization bears down on SAMCRO and Jax comes face to face with an ugly truth.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E12 - Red Rose
7.plot: With tensions mounting and truths finally revealed, Jax must make the ultimate decision.

7.title: FR - Sons of Anarchy - S07E13 - Papa's Goods
7.plot: Ghosts loom large as Jax makes the final moves to fulfill his father's legacy.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E01 - Flowers for Your Grave
1.plot: Author Richard Castle joins NYC Detective Kate Beckett to help solve the case of a serial killer who is reenacting murders from Castle's novels; Castle becomes very intrigued with the murders and continues to shadow Beckett, much to her chagrin.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E02 - Nanny McDead
1.plot: When a body of a young woman is found inside the dryer at a laundry room, Castle and Beckett uncover that the young woman worked as a nanny in the upscale building. Meanwhile, as Castle works on his "Nikki Heat" novel series he watches Beckett's actions as she works the murder case.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E03 - Hedge Fund Homeboys
1.plot: When a teenaged boy whose family has recently fallen on hard times is found dead in a boat in Central Park, Castle and Beckett must piece together the mystery behind the boy's final moments. Meanwhile, Castle mulls over leaving Martha home while he chaperones Alexis' trip to Washington, D.C.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E04 - Hell Hath No Fury
1.plot: The investigation behind a body found wrapped in a rug on the sidewalk leads Castle and Beckett deep inside the world of New York City politics. The partners discover a world of expensive escorts, arrogant tycoons, corrupt investigators, and the effects of betrayal.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E05 - A Chill Goes Through Her Veins
1.plot: Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of a women found frozen and tangled in steel bars at a construction site. The case leads them to look into an old case and also has Beckett thinking about some memories of her past.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E06 - Always Buy Retail
1.plot: A man is killing people and posing them in Vodun (Voodoo)  tradition. Castle's ex-wife announces her plans to move back to New York.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E07 - Home Is Where the Heart Stops
1.plot: After discovering a young woman's body stuffed awkwardly into a jewelry safe, Beckett and Castle investigate numerous cases involving murders and home invasion jewel heists.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E08 - Ghosts
1.plot: Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of a woman found drowned in motor oil in a motel bathtub. They seek the help of a true crime journalist who might have a connection to the victim.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E09 - Little Girl Lost
1.plot: When a two-year-old girl is discovered missing from her home, Beckett is called in to assist with the investigation only to discover that the FBI agent in charge is, in fact, her ex-boyfriend. The two of them try to put aside their unresolved feelings as they race to find the girl, but when Castle inserts himself into the investigation, competition quickly heats up for Beckett’s attention.

1.title: FR - Castle - S01E10 - A Death in the Family
1.plot: Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of a missing plastic surgeon who is found dead in the front seat of his car after a week of being parked curbside. As they delve into the twisted world of surgery obsessed patients and secret operations, Castle experiences a fatherly rite of passage as Alexis attends her first prom. And while looking into Beckett’s past, he unearths information that could end his relationship with her forever.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E01 - Deep in Death
2.plot: When the new season begins, Castle is wrestling with how to repair his relationship with Beckett, while struggling to finish his soon-to-be-published bestseller, Heat Wave. But circumstances force the pair back together to investigate the mysterious murder of a man found dead, tangled in the limbs of a tree.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E02 - The Double Down
2.plot: When two separate murders are committed on the same night, Castle wagers Ryan and Esposito that he and Beckett will solve theirs first. The frenzied race to catch their respective killers and win the bet leads each investigative duo to a likely suspect, only to find that they both have airtight alibis. But bizarre twists in both cases force the two teams to work together to unravel the mind-bending mystery behind each murder.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E03 - Inventing the Girl
2.plot: Castle and Beckett get an inside look at the cutthroat world of the New York fashion industry when they investigate the brutal murder of a young model during Fashion Week.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E04 - Fool Me Once
2.plot: When an Arctic explorer is killed during a polar expedition, the mysterious circumstances of his death take Castle and Beckett from the penthouses of Park Avenue to the halls of the CIA. But Castle's delight at the case's many twists and turns soon turns to frustration as he realizes that their elusive killer might just be fooling them all.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E05 - When the Bough Breaks
2.plot: Castle has a new book agent, Paula Haas, but she talks with him when he has gotten an opportunity that may change his career. The downside is that taking the opportunity would mean the end of his relationship with Beckett. Meanwhile, an unidentified woman is found dead in a manhole.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E06 - Vampire Weekend
2.plot: As Halloween approaches, Castle and Beckett are called to a graveyard where the body of a young man sporting vampire fangs has been discovered with a wooden stake driven through his heart. Their investigation takes them deep into the heart of New York's underground vampire fetish community, where they learn that the motive for the victim's murder may be hiding within the pages of the graphic novel he was writing before his death.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E07 - Famous Last Words
2.plot: An up-and-coming rock star's body is found in a scene that appears staged from her recent music video.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E08 - Kill the Messenger
2.plot: After a bike messenger, carrying a package with content that is able to free a wrongly convicted man from prison, is brutally murdered, Castle and Beckett need to investigate the case. But they are surprised to find out that the tragic death is linked to another murder case previously investigated by Captain Montgomery. Now, in order to solve the new murder, Castle and Beckett must dig deep and discover all the secrets of a prominent New York family.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E09 - Love Me Dead
2.plot: Castle and Beckett are thrust into the world of ex-cons and escorts. Meanwhile, Alexis has a private chat with Beckett about something that she's keeping from her father.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E10 - One Man's Treasure
2.plot: When a murdered man is found stuffed in the garbage chute of an apartment building and two women arrive to ID his body — one his wife and the other his fiancee — Castle and Beckett have their hands full keeping the women from killing each other as they work to peel back the layers of the victim's double life. Was it a jilted woman, corporate espionage, or a much darker secret that led to his demise?

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E11 - The Fifth Bullet
2.plot: Castle and Beckett uncover that a bullet is missing from the crime scene while investigating what happened when an art dealer was gunned down in his own gallery. However, when it turns out there was a witness to the murder, they need to refresh the man's memory, only to find out that he suffers from amnesia and can't even remember who he is.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E12 - A Rose for Everafter
2.plot: When Castle and Beckett are called to a wedding to investigate the death of a bridesmaid, Castle is stunned to discover that the soon-to-be bride is his old flame, Kyra, "the one that got away". Complications ensue as Kyra, caught off-guard by Castle's reappearance in her life, wonders if she's marrying the right guy. With the nuptials forestalled and the entire wedding party under suspicion, Beckett questions Castle's ability to be objective about the case. But when it looks to Beckett like Castle and Kyra might rekindle their romance, her judgment may be compromised as well.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E13 - Sucker Punch
2.plot: While investigating the death of an Irish mobster, Beckett and Castle uncover a local turf war that may be connected to both a late-night infomercial guru and an international drug smuggling operation. But the case turns agonizingly personal when evidence emerges that the killer they're chasing may have had a hand in Beckett's mother's murder.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E14 - The Third Man
2.plot: Mysteries abound when a family returns from vacation to discover a dead man in their daughter's bed. Thinking they're investigating the murder of a squatter, Castle and Beckett soon find themselves unraveling a multi-million dollar heist. Meanwhile, Castle tries to keep Beckett from finding out that they've been romantically linked when he's featured as one of New York's 10 most eligible bachelors.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E15 - Suicide Squeeze
2.plot: A beloved former major league baseball player is found dead after a goodwill trip to Cuba. The investigation, which includes running into Joe Torre, leads the detectives into New York's Cuban community to solve the murder. Meanwhile, Alexis' genealogy project forces Castle to consider the identity of his unknown father.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E16 - The Mistress Always Spanks Twice
2.plot: When a half-naked woman is found covered in caramel sauce and hanging by bondage cuffs in a public park, Castle and Beckett's investigation takes them into New York's underground world of sexual domination. Naturally the case serves as sexy fodder for their already charged relationship banter.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E17 - Tick, Tick, Tick... (1)
2.plot: Federal Agent Jordan Shaw, an insightful and accomplished Federal investigator teams up with Castle & Beckett to hunt down a cunning and elusive serial killer.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E18 - Boom! (2)
2.plot: In the second part of the story begun in "Tick, Tick, Tick," the serial killer remains at large and is taunting Castle, Beckett and Jordan Shaw to catch him

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E19 - Wrapped Up in Death
2.plot: The investigation into the shocking death of a museum curator, crushed by a falling gargoyle, takes a bizarre turn when Castle and Beckett learn that he isn’t the first member of a recent archeological expedition to die. It turns out there was a legend inscribed over the burial chamber the team unearthed warning that “all who gaze upon the face of the mummy are doomed.” Was the curator just the latest victim of “The Mummy’s Curse”? And if so, what does that mean for Castle, who snuck a peek at the mummy when no one was looking?

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E20 - The Late Shaft
2.plot: When Castle appears on a late-night talk show to promote his book, Heat Wave, legendary host Bobby Mann leans in during a commercial break and whispers, "They want me dead." When Mann dies later that night, seemingly of natural causes, Castle has to convince Beckett that there was foul play. During the investigation, Castle is seduced by a Hollywood hottie, who was the other guest on Bobby Mann's show the night he died.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E21 - Den of Thieves
2.plot: Investigating the murder of a thief, Castle and Beckett are surprised to learn that Esposito has a personal connection to the suspected killer. Another surprise is in line for Castle when Beckett hits it off with the handsome Robbery detective assigned to the case, Tom Demming. Now this romantic triangle must work together to solve the case

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E22 - Food to Die For
2.plot: A high profile chef is found frozen to death in the kitchen of a hot New York restaurant. Complications ensue when Castle and the restaurant owner, an old high school girlfriend of Beckett's, share an attraction. Meanwhile, Beckett's relationship with Det. Demming continues to grow.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E23 - Overkill
2.plot: A robbery-homicide prompts Beckett to invite Demming to assist on a case, giving Castle a ringside seat to their budding romance. When it becomes clear that the two men have very different ideas about how to proceed, the investigation becomes an unspoken competition for Beckett's attention, one in which each man races to solve the case, as Beckett referees between her two admirers.

2.title: FR - Castle - S02E24 - A Deadly Game
2.plot: Nothing is as it seems when Castle and Beckett investigate what appears to be the assassination of an intelligence operative. Meanwhile, Beckett's romance with Demming threatens her relationship with Castle, forcing them to confront their feelings for each other.

3.title: FR - Castle - S03E01 - A Deadly Affair
3.plot: When Beckett and her team burst into an apartment on a murderer's trail, they see Castle standing over a dead woman's body holding a gun; Beckett arrests Castle as he asserts his innocence.

3.title: FR - Castle - S03E02 - He's Dead, She's Dead
3.plot: Beckett and Castle search for a psychic's killer while debating the existence of extrasensory abilities.

3.title: FR - Castle - S03E03 - Under the Gun
3.plot: When a coded document attracts Castle's attention, Beckett must steer the case back to the violent felons who populated their victim's world; when Beckett's ex-partner arrives, Castle must watch the relationship become romantic.

3.title: FR - Castle - S03E04 - Punked
3.plot: Castle and Beckett look into the murder of a young mathematician gunned down with a 200-year-old bullet, sparking some wild theories by Castle about a time-traveling killer. When their investigation uncovers a tricked-out DeLorean and a suspect in Victorian clothing, is it possible Castle's crazy idea has some validity? This winding tale twists through the towers of Wall Street and into the world of a secret steampunk society that embraces the romance and simplicity of the past, while coupling it with the hope and promise of the future.

3.title: FR - Castle - S03E05 - Anatomy of a Murder
3.plot: An unknown woman falls out of a casket along with the original deceased when pallbearers lose control of the casket at a funeral; the investigation takes Beckett and Castle into the world of amorous, bed-hopping physicians.

3.title: FR - Castle - S03E06 - 3XK
