1.plot: When the trial begins, Maja -- facing a possible 14 years in prison -- testifies to Claes's true nature, and how her 18th birthday took a dark turn.

1.title: FR - Quicksand - Rien de plus grand - S01E06 - The Witnesses
1.plot: A witness who survived the shooting testifies that the night before the tragedy, Sebastian threw a party that ended in a shocking confrontation.

meta.plot: Taekrok, un vieil inspecteur proche de la retraite, reçoit un appel menaçant d'un inconnu avant d'être accusé de meurtre, à tort. Le maître chanteur se présente comme un ami et propose un jeu. Il ordonne à Taekrok de passer en revue les affaires dont il a été chargé. Le vieil inspecteur fouille désespérément sa mémoire pour découvrir l'identité du maître chanteur ainsi que ses intentions. Taekrok parviendra-t-il au bout de ce jeu palpitant ?

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Detective Taek-rok gets a prank call. The unknown caller says something he cannot ignore.

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Taek-rok is framed for murder and gets interrogated. He delves into the past cases he undertook.

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Taekrok realises the mistake he made in the past. The caller gives orders that cause Taekrok to become suspicious of everyone around him.

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Taekrok entrusts the blackmailer's information to Jinhan then gets a clue about the blackmailer's identity.

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Seong-a and Gyeong-chan decide to help Taek-rok, who realizes the blackmailer's target is not him.

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Taek-rok chases a man who has a key to the truth. However, the man resists.

1.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Shadow Detective - S01E08 - Episode 8

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Taek-rok has conflicts with his team leader Yeon Ju-hyun. Seong-a struggles in a juvenile theft probe.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Seong-a gets injured, and Taek-rok tries to uncover the truth. Meanwhile, Gyeong-chan doubts Taek-rok.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Despite Taek-rok's caution, Seong-a pursues probing and ends up getting injured. Meanwhile, Taek-rok meets his old colleague Do-hyung.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Taek-rok reaches out to Lee Young-ho, who is jealous of Do-hyung. Taek-rok stops Seong-a from uncovering the arson case and discovering his secret.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Taek-rok manages to identify an unknown skilled armed force with the help of Team Leader Han's testimony and devises a plan to lure them out.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Despite feeling helpless in the face of his enemies, Taek-rok finds motivation in the determination of those around him and continues his pursuit.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Taek-rok faces his past that he has been shunning and delves into the root of the problem. He is determined to protect his loved ones at all costs.

2.title: FR - Shadow Detective - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: After successfully apprehending some members of the crime organisation, Taek-rok closes in on the rest of the group.

meta.plot: Gen Z amateur sleuth and tech-savvy hacker Darby Hart and eight other guests are invited by a reclusive billionaire to participate in a retreat at a remote location. When one of the other guests is found dead, Darby must use her skills to prove it was murder before the killer takes another life.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E01 - Homme Fatale
1.plot: An amateur sleuth receives a mysterious invitation to a reclusive tech billionaire's secret retreat.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E02 - The Silver Doe
1.plot: Darby believes the death she witnessed may, in fact, be murder, but no one believes her. The grief and shock of the events thrust her into remembering her own buried past.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E03 - Survivors
1.plot: Darby plays the role of the perfect guest in order to covertly investigate the crime. She finds she may be getting closer to the truth when another life is taken.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E04 - Family Secrets
1.plot: There's a killer on the loose and nowhere to run with a storm closing in. Darby breaks out of lockdown and discovers the retreat may not be what she thought it was.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E05 - Crypt
1.plot: Darby confronts her prime suspect only to find the tables turned and an unexpected alliance formed...Until someone else dies and her own life is threatened.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E06 - Crime Seen
1.plot: Darby uncovers the secret retreat within the retreat. In the past, she and Bill come face to face with the Silver Doe Killer.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre au bout du monde - S01E07 - Retreat
1.plot: The remaining guests gather and discover the killer among them.

meta.plot: Mardik, a Dutch detective of Afghan descent, receives word that his childhood friend Faysal has come to the Netherlands. When a terrorist attack occurs the next day, Mardik suspects Faysal and investigates, with drastic consequences.

1.title: FR - The Golden Hour - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - The Golden Hour - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - The Golden Hour - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - The Golden Hour - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - The Golden Hour - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - The Golden Hour - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - The Winter King - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: High King Uther banishes his son Arthur, who rescues a dying boy named Derfel. Arthur entrusts Derfel to Merlin and Nimue. Years later, Uther has a new heir, but Merlin has a dark vision for the future.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: An untimely death leads Merlin to locate Arthur and urge him to come back to Britain; chaos ensues when Gundleus assaults Avalon.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Arthur takes Gundleus prisoner. Nimue struggles with the trauma of her rape and plans to kill Gundleus. Arthur learns that Gundleus' uncle Gorfydd is preparing for war. Nimue tries to pull Derfel into her plans, but Derfel can't betray Arthur.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Nimue returns to Avalon, where she is found by Merlin. Derfel and Owain travel to collect taxes from King Cadwys. Gundleus returns to Caer Cadarn.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Derfel feels uncomfortable about the attack on the mine – which Owain is keeping a secret. Nimue is discovered by Merlin who helps heal her. Tristan arrives demanding retribution but Owain denies his guilt.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Arthur and the tribe kings enter peace talks. Arthur meets Guinevere, Ceinwyn's lady-in-waiting, while traveling.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Arthur and Guinevere meet secretly before Arthur and Ceinwyn are to be married.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Arthur believes that Bedwin will be able to negotiate peace with Gorfydd; however, when Morgan and Derfel arrive in Powys, they discover a horrific site.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Gorfydd allies with the Saxons and declares war; Arthur admits he exiled Nimue to the Isle of the Dead.

1.title: FR - The Winter King - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Derfel finds Nimue inside the Isle of the Dead; guilt ridden by the deal he's been forced to make with the Saxons, Arthur vows to fight to save Britain.

meta.plot: Bastard son Arthur returns to the land he's been banished from to find a kingdom in chaos. Seeking the aid of his oldest confidants, Arthur aims to right Britain's path as he faces the most unexpected of obstacles.

1.title: FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The series tells about the fate of the Russian intelligentsia on the eve, during and after the revolutionary events of 1917. In the center of the story is the life story of the two sisters of the Bulavins, Darya and Katerina, and their beloved: officer Vadim Roshchin and engineer of the Baltic Telegin factory.

1.title: FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E10 - Episode 10
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E11 - Episode 11
FR - The Road to Calvary - S01E12 - Episode 12

meta.plot: Swept up in political unrest during World War I, two sisters in St. Petersburg cope with turbulent romances as Russian history is made around them.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E01 - Method and Madness
1.plot: In the series premiere of this medical drama set in a 1900s New York City hospital, accomplished Dr. John W. Thackery is named chief surgeon and is pressured by a major benefactor to hire a black doctor as his top assistant.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E02 - Mr. Paris Shoes
1.plot: Already fuming over the hospital's faulty new electrical system, Thackery tasks Herman Barrow, the Knick's crooked superintendent, to deliver more cadavers so that he and his team can test out novel surgical procedures. With more patients dying, Edwards offers to share a procedure he learned in France, but is rebuffed by Thackery and Gallinger. Robertson addresses a typhoid-fever outbreak, Elkins is taken into Thackery's confidence and Sister Harriet breaks a taboo. Edwards finds an alternative way to perform his duties.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E03 - The Busy Flea
1.plot: Thackery weighs performing surgery on a former flame, and orders Gallinger and Chickering to experiment on pigs.  Barrow goes the extra yard to square a debt. After a bad day at work, Edwards takes out his frustrations at a local bar. Robertson is relieved when her pleas about treating a patient with typhoid fever are finally heard.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E04 - Where's the Dignity?
1.plot: During surgery, Thackery's hand is forced by Algernon, which irks Gallinger. A recovering Abigail regrets her involvement with Thackery and Sister Harriet and Cleary make a couple of deals. Meanwhile, Bertie receives a scolding from his physician father who is unhappy with his son's career path and Lucy becomes privy to Thackery's secrets.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E05 - They Capture the Heat
1.plot: Barrow can alleviate a debt if he treats one of Collier's wounded men and also urges Capt. Robertson to buy one of Thomas Edison's new inventions. Meanwhile, Algernon tries a new approach to hernia surgery, the health of Everett and Eleanor's baby worsens, and Sister Harriet and Cleary head to Chinatown.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E06 - Start Calling Me Dad
1.plot: After testing out a new procedure, Thackery and Bertie vow to reverse a series of failures in the operating theatre. Euphoric after helping Speight, Cornelia finds herself less than enthusiastic about her status as the future Mrs. Phillip Showalter. Thackery entertains a salesman’s pitch; Everett considers how to help Eleanor with her grief; Barrow haggles over used merchandise. Edwards finds his clinic, and his career, in jeopardy after a surprise encounter.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E07 - Get the Rope
1.plot: The stabbing of a cop by a black man stirs up racial tension on the street and in the Knick, forcing Thackery and Edwards to take action. Everett returns to work and a changed OR. Barrow fears for Junia’s safety. Cornelia is impressed with Edwards’ ingenuity and Lucy is escorted home.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E08 - Working Late a Lot
1.plot: Already on edge due to a city-wide run on cocaine, Thackery worries that Dr. Levi Zinberg, a Jewish surgeon and inventor, will steal his spotlight at the next New York Surgical Society presentation. Bertie continues his courtship of Lucy while staving off his father’s persistent demands that he leave the Knick. Cornelia, Speight and Bertie go to court in an attempt to keep “Typhoid Mary” Mallon quarantined. Gallinger tries to get Eleanor to move past her grief.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E09 - The Golden Lotus
1.plot: A late-night crime sheds unfavorable light on the Knick, forcing Robertson to come up with hush money. Lucy goes to extremes to get drugs for an increasingly desperate Thackery, whose plea for an advance from a seller of patent medicines falls on deaf ears. Gallinger despairs as Eleanor’s behavior becomes more erratic; Cornelia and Edwards proffer different solutions to a shared dilemma.

1.title: FR - The Knick - S01E10 - Crutchfield
1.plot: Refusing to collaborate with Dr. Zinberg on blood-transfusion research, an increasingly paranoid Thackery pushes himself to the limit, and beyond, in an effort to “solve the riddle” and beat his rival. Cornelia and Edwards arrive at a crossroads; Barrow trades one creditor for another; Lucy requests Bertie’s help. With the Knick in the midst of yet another crisis, Robertson calls for a vote.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E01 - Ten Knots
2.plot: The hospital readies for its move uptown, while Dr. Edwards makes a play to be named permanent chief of surgery and Dr. Gallinger heads over to Cromartie Hospital in hopes of getting Dr. Thackery to come back to work. Bertie rebuffs Lucy's attempt to make amends. Ping Wu demands his prostitutes be given regular medical checkups. Speight tracks a new plague. Cornelia ministers to a quarantined San Francisco neighborhood.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E02 - You're No Rose
2.plot: Dr. Thackery makes a move to return to The Knick, which the board frowns upon. Cornelia gets Cleary to do a dirty job, but it comes with a cost. Robertson makes a push for a new subway initiative. Barrow drives up construction costs. Lucy receives a surprise visitor from home.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E03 - The Best with the Best to Get the Best
2.plot: Thackery enlists Edwards to help him test a new hypothesis. After rejecting Robertson’s advances at The Knick, Lucy learns that confession isn’t always good for the soul. Young journalist Genevieve Everidge works on a story about one of Thackery’s rivals. Cornelia is dismayed by the limits of her husband’s sympathies. Barrow faces a new adversary at Tammany Hall. Gallinger is intrigued by a discussion of eugenics at a class reunion. Edwards deals with a surprise visitor.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E04 - Wonderful Surprises
2.plot: Abby’s worsening condition persuades Thackery to test out his novel syphilis treatment. Edwards comes clean to Opal, but does not get the response he expects. Cleary makes a last-ditch effort to raise funds for Harriet as her date in court arrives. Bertie undergoes physical training. Barrow loses a sponsor. Gallinger’s prejudices are reinforced. Cornelia probes a suspicious death. Lucy laments her lot in life.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E05 - Whiplash
2.plot: A subway explosion leads to an influx of patients at The Knick, but little margin for profit. Pursued by Henry, Lucy takes to heart advice from one of Ping Wu’s girls. An addict’s misfortune gives Thackery an ideal test case for his latest theory on addiction. Bertie submits his adrenalin research to Zinberg. Cornelia gets a new clue in Speight’s death. Barrow repays a debt but gets no credit. Genevieve charms the Chickerings. Harriet finds herself a boarding-house pariah.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E06 - There Are Rules
2.plot: Faced with a quandary, Bertie decides to take matters into his own hands at Mt. Sinai, enlisting Algernon to help. Thackery investigates the efficacy of hypnosis, and takes an interest in a pair of conjoined twins. Lucy lobbies Henry for a gala invitation. Cornelia visits the brother of a deceased immigrant with ties to Speight. Gallinger dines with an unwelcome guest. Barrow previews a new home for Junia. Harriet agrees to make a change.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E07 - Williams and Walker
2.plot: Fighting his nerves, Thackery readies himself to attempt to separate Zoya and Nika in front of a packed audience. After getting a surprise gift from her father-in-law, Cornelia attends a gala charity ball for the new Knick with other familiar guests. Barrow gets rid of a threat. Opal spoils the Robertsons’ good mood. Algernon gets a long-overdue spotlight in the surgical theater, but complications ensue.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E08 - Not Well At All
2.plot: Thackery attempts a new cure in the inebriation ward; Brockhurst demands his "girls" be returned; Gallinger and his wife's relationship and Bertie's relationship with Genevieve go off in surprising directions. Later, Cornelia shows evidence of the company's wrongdoing to Henry; Barrow's marriage troubles come to a head; and Thackery performs plastic surgery on Abby.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E09 - Do You Remember Moon Flower?
2.plot: Thackery and Capt. Robertson's connection and how the doctor arrived at the Knick, are revealed; the problems between Edwards and Gallinger come to a head after a medical-board hearing about Gallinger's vasectomies. Later, Cleary and Harriet engage in a joint business venture; Lucy shares memories with her father; Barrow realizes the rising costs of living well; and Cornelia and Henry face a family crisis.

2.title: FR - The Knick - S02E10 - This Is All We Are
2.plot: Thackery ignores Zinberg's advice at Mt. Sinai and undertakes a risky, alternative course of action; Cornelia confronts Henry about the family business; Barrow's actions at the hospital construction site are called into question; Gallinger ponders a job opportunity; and Cleary steadfastly refuses to give up on Harriet.

meta.plot: Set in downtown New York in 1900, 'The Knick' is centered on the Knickerbocker Hospital and its staff, notably Dr. John Thackery, the hospital's brilliant chief surgeon who pushes medicine's boundaries, pioneering new procedures despite a severe drug addiction.
Set during the final days of slavery in 19th century Jamaica, we follow the trials, tribulations and survival of plantation slave July and her odious mistress Caroline.

1.title: FR - The Long Song - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Born a slave, July is taken from her mother to a plantation house and forced to work for the odious Caroline. But she slowly learns how to handle her new mistress.

1.title: FR - The Long Song - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Caroline and July compete for Robert's attention. Robert announces he is marrying Caroline, but on the wedding night he goes to July's bed.

1.title: FR - The Long Song - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Angry and frustrated by the workers' refusal to work to his orders, Robert takes violent revenge, hoping to scare them into working - to the shock and horror of July.

meta.plot: Brilliant young actress Charlie strikes up an acquaintance with an intriguing stranger while on holiday in Greece, but it rapidly becomes apparent that his intentions are far from romantic.

1.title: FR - The Little Drummer Girl - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Charlie, a fiery and brilliant young actress, meets a mysterious stranger on the beach in Greece, and he draws her into an international espionage operation.

1.title: FR - The Little Drummer Girl - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Charlie is recruited with the promise of the role of a lifetime to infiltrate a dangerous revolutionary cell. As a cover story, she and Becker must pose as lovers.

1.title: FR - The Little Drummer Girl - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Charlie drives a car laden with explosives to a drop-off in Austria, while Kurtz and Becker race to save her from a fatal mistake.

1.title: FR - The Little Drummer Girl - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: In London, Kurtz's team prepare for the next stage of the operation as Charlie waits and wonders if Michel's people will make contact.

1.title: FR - The Little Drummer Girl - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Charlie joins a group of revolutionaries in Lebanon, with no one to save her if she is exposed as a spy. She works to earn the trust of Khalil and Michel's sister, Fatmeh.

1.title: FR - The Little Drummer Girl - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Charlie prepares for her part in Khalil's next strike. But is she still playing a role, or has she switched to the other side?

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: L.A. district attorney Maya Travis suffers a devastating defeat after prosecuting an A-list movie star for double murder. With her high-profile career derailed, she flees for a quieter life in rural Washington. Eight years later, when this same star is under suspicion for another murder, Maya is lured back to the DA’s office for another chance at justice.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E02 - Revenge
1.plot: Maya and Matthew search Sevvy's house for anything that might lead to an arrest as they face mounting pressure from Wiest to build a case quickly; Ezra tries to clean up Sevvy's image.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E03 - The Wire
1.plot: Maya convinces an asset to wear a wire during a rendezvous with Sevvy; Ezra works to create an alibi for Sevvy and he sends his henchman, Buck, to pay a visit to Riv at his ranch.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E04 - Scandal
1.plot: Maya obtains surveillance footage of Jessica and Julianne the night before Jessica's death. Elsewhere, Maya finds out that there's a mole leaking information to Ezra.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E05 - Lie to Me
1.plot: With the discovery of a mole in the office, the entire building is put on lockdown. Elsewhere, Ezra works to cover up Sevvy's injuries and keep the information contained.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E06 - The Fugitive
1.plot: Maya and Sevvy face off in court once again. Meanwhile, Wiest believes that there is information about the mole hunt that Matthew isn't telling him.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E07 - Ghost Whisperer
1.plot: Demoted to second chair, Ezra plots to bring down Angela but when Loni plants the seed about a past case being investigated, Ezra focuses his attention to Maya.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E08 - Queen for a Day
1.plot: Maya and the team are determined to keep evidence from imploding their case. Elsewhere, Ezra and Angela are thrown when Sevvy goes off-book, offering up a massive reward for information about Jessica's murder.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E09 - Jeopardy
1.plot: CJ has a plan to capture Maya's stalker. Elsewhere, Ezra and Sevvy follow a tip to Vegas and uncover Jessica's secret trip to a gun range.

1.title: FR - The Fix - S01E10 - Making a Murderer
1.plot: Maya and Ezra work together as Sevvy's case comes to a head. Sevvy makes a rash decision after he receives a mysterious letter from a law firm.

meta.plot: High-profile district attorney Maya Travis fled L.A. after devastating defeat when prosecuting an A-list actor for double murder. Eight years later, the same celebrity is under suspicion for another murder, and Maya is lured back to the DA’s office for another chance at justice.
Three fiercely talented female homicide investigators work tirelessly to solve crimes while navigating the complicated demands of their personal lives.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E01 - Wake Up Call
1.plot: Reeling from a shocking revelation in her personal life, Detective Jack Cooper throws herself into the investigation of an apparent suicide with her partner Detective Stevie Hall.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E02 - The Past Is Never Dead
1.plot: After a young computer programmer is found brutally murdered, Homicide Detectives Stevie Hall and Jack Cooper find themselves on a twisting road through his fatal last days, while still managing their own spiralling personal lives.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E03 - The Devil and the Deep Blue Sea
1.plot: Det. Jack Cooper joins Staff Inspector Fiona Currie on an assignment where they advise on a murder case that resembles an infamous crime Fiona solved years ago. Detectives Stevie Hall and Kyle Price track a lead in the redhead case.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E04 - Secret Liars
1.plot: After a young girl is found dead in the trunk of a car, Detectives Stevie Hall and Jack Cooper counsel the girl's shattered family through their grief while hunting down the killer before they can strike again.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E05 - The Long Walk
1.plot: A significant case for Det. Stevie Hall and Det. Jack Cooper of a man charged with multiple rapes and murder is undermined when his attorney turns out to be Jack's vindictive ex, Marc Savage.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E06 - When One Door Closes
1.plot: When the body of Brooke Dodson washes ashore, the hunt for her killer goes into overdrive, as the homicide detectives find themselves in a deadly cat and mouse game.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E07 - Bad Traffic
1.plot: Detectives Stevie Hall and Jack Cooper are called to the scene of a murder that's taken place overnight at a drug-filled party of bike couriers.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E08 - A Junkie's Broken Promise
1.plot: After a man is found burned beyond recognition with a dog collar around his neck, Staff Inspector Fiona Currie reaches out to the public for help identifying him, leading Detectives Stevie Hall and Jack Cooper down a path towards a trio of suspects.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E09 - It Takes a Village
1.plot: Hall, Cooper and Currie investigate a case after a woman wakes up with a gun in her hand and her husband shot-dead in front of her.

1.title: FR - The Detail - S01E10 - Off the Path
1.plot: After Detective Hall goes missing, the team race against the clock to save her life.

meta.plot: 1933. Hercule Poirot, older and greyer, receives letters threatening murder. The sender signs themselves only as “A.B.C.” When he takes the letters to the police looking for help, Hercule finds all his old friends have moved on. But soon there is a murder and the once-great detective must take matters into his own hands.

1.title: FR - ABC contre Poirot - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: It's 1933, and an older and greyer Hercule Poirot receives letters threatening murder. When no-one listens to his appeals, the once great detective must take matters into his own hands.

1.title: FR - ABC contre Poirot - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The ABC killer sends more letters promising to spill blood. Hercule's past, integrity and identity come into question while he fights a rising tide of xenophobia.

1.title: FR - ABC contre Poirot - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: With the ABC killer still on the loose, Hercule realises that only he holds the key to the murders. He faces a race against time to stop the bloodbath.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E01 - Day 1: Fade In
1.plot: Jane Sadler is an overworked television producer and single mother in the middle of a fractious separation. When her young daughter goes missing in the middle of the night, Jane’s world – and her controversial police TV show – implodes. Life imitates art: everything is a mystery, everyone has a secret and no one can be trusted.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E02 - Day 2: Cutting Room Floor
1.plot: After seeing the security-camera footage of PJ staking out her house the night that Lake went missing, Jane goes on a desperate search to find PJ and question him. Meanwhile, Bird learns the truth about Lake’s nanny; plus Pete, Ali and Tom canvas the neighborhood trying to find Lake.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E03 - Day 3: Day Out of Days
1.plot: A breakthrough in the investigation sends Detective Bird and Jane to the studio to question the production team on her hit show. Meanwhile, Pete goes on the attack in a rash display of anguish – or guilt.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E04 - Day 4: Below the Line
1.plot: Jane’s belief that Pete took Lake leads her down a dark path, putting both of them in danger. Meanwhile, Bird digs further into Lake’s disappearance and begins to unravel Jane’s lies.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E05 - Day 5: Back To Ones
1.plot: As the investigation continues and Jane’s suspicions grow, she’s more determined than ever to do anything to get her daughter back, including changing every detail of her show’s series finale. Meanwhile, a guilt-stricken Pete inadvertently pushes Tom toward writing a career-making story.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E06 - Day 6: Down Day
1.plot: Jane and Ali get a surprise phone call about who has Lake, but when the call is abruptly cut short, Jane has no way of tracing the call without going to the police.  However, the only cop she is willing to trust is Gus, so she needs to find him – fast.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E07 - Day 7: Breaking The Story
1.plot: Jane and Bird catch a break in the case when they revisit the scene of the Casita raid that started it all. Meanwhile, Ali learns some surprising news about Tom; and Jane discovers a shocking development about Gus.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E08 - Day 8: Against Type
1.plot: Jane’s search for Lake reaches a climax. Meanwhile, Ali finds herself in an unexpected situation with PJ, Jane’s drug dealer.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E09 - Day 9: Recast
1.plot: Jane flees town for her own protection while Bird continues to work the case. Meanwhile, Ali tries to keep the peace with Pete; and Red’s identity is revealed.

1.title: FR - Ten Days in the Valley - S01E10 - Day 10: Fade Out
1.plot: In the Season 1 finale, Jane finds herself in immediate danger when the kidnapper’s identity is discovered. Bird’s investigation connects him to new evidence that leads to a shocking confrontation. Meanwhile, Ali reveals a secret to Pete; and Tom has to make a choice between family and his career.

meta.plot: Single mother Jane Sadler's life is turned upside down when her young daughter goes missing in the middle of the night. And just like in the controversial police TV show she produces, everything is a mystery, everyone has a secret and no one can be trusted.

After Neurosurgeon Maggie Sullivan’s personal and professional life are thrown into turmoil she returns home to Sullivan’s Crossing. While there, Maggie is forced to navigate her complicated present while confronting the painful past she has chosen to ignore for years.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E01 - Coming Home
1.plot: When neurosurgeon Maggie Sullivan's seemingly perfect life in Boston is turned upside down, she leaves the city and her boyfriend, Andrew, to return to her childhood home of Sullivan's Crossing in Nova Scotia.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E02 - Homewrecker
1.plot: Maggie sees Cal in a new light after they help an injured resident and spend time together at karaoke.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E03 - Detours
1.plot: Sydney attempts to cheer up Maggie after she suffers a setback back at home. Frank and Edna help Sully, with the annual land blessing, but the festivities end early after a camper goes missing. Maggie and Cal work together with the search and rescue team unaware that another life hangs in the balance.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E04 - Rock and a Hard Place
1.plot: Maggie and Cal work against the clock in a daring medical rescue, and in the process discover a clue to the whereabouts of a missing camper. Maggie learns a little more about Cal’s past, while Sully receives disturbing news.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E05 - Pressure Drop
1.plot: Maggie makes a difficult decision after Sully lets his temper get the best of him.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E06 - Boiling Point
1.plot: Sully tries to hold things together at Sullivan's Crossing, while Maggie attempts to navigate complications back in Boston, Mass.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E07 - Second Chances
1.plot: Tensions escalate as Maggie returns to Sullivan's Crossing with Andrew.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E08 - Aftershock
1.plot: Maggie struggles to make sense of her personal life. Sully deals with some financial challenges.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E09 - Can't Help Falling
1.plot: Maggie's medical training is put to the test as she races against the clock to save the life of a friend.

1.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S01E10 - Sins of the Father
1.plot: Maggie returns to Boston prepared to face the consequences of her actions, while Cal searches for closure of his own.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E01 - Guilt Trip
2.plot: Maggie Sullivan returns to the Crossing to find Sully in the hospital, struggling with the feeling that he's forgotten something; Cal Jones is confused when Maggie gives him the cold shoulder, unaware that Lola pocketed his goodbye letter.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E02 - A Storm Is Brewing
2.plot: Maggie searches for clues regarding the cause of Sully's condition as she struggles to make a decision about her own future.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E03 - Confessions
2.plot: Maggie, Cal, Lola, and Sydney help Edna prepare the campground for a storm as Frank helps Sully to figure out what's been eating at him.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E04 - Eye of the Storm
2.plot: Things start to heat up between Maggie and Cal when they're forced to take shelter at Cal's cabin.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E05 - Secrets
2.plot: Uncertain about her own future as well as that of the Crossing, Maggie tries to find a way to help Sully.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E06 - Revelations
2.plot: Maggie's world is turned upside down after she learns some devastating news about her stepfather.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E07 - Reunions
2.plot: Reeling over the news of Maggie's pregnancy, Cal receives a visitor; Phoebe and Sully start to bond over the idea of being grandparents.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E08 - Truth and Consequences
2.plot: Maggie helps care for Cal's sister and in the process learns more about his past.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E09 - Remorse
2.plot: Maggie enlists Cal’s help when Sully becomes convinced he needs to take drastic measures to make amends with Lola.

2.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S02E10 - It's a Wonderful Life
2.plot: Cal works with Maggie as she fights to save the Crossing, while a careless mistake may cost someone their life.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E01 - New Beginnings
3.plot: Maggie tries to embrace her new life at the Crossing as she struggles to move past the loss she suffered the night of the diner fire.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E02 - Out of the Blue
3.plot: Maggie and Cal's relationship starts to heat up; Sully realizes he has some things in common with Helen.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E03 - The Ties That Bind
3.plot: Maggie accompanies Cal to visit his parents; Sully and Frank get to the bottom of who's behind the new development.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E04 - A Clear Perspective
3.plot: Maggie tries to help Cal deal with his conflicted feelings towards his father; Sully worries about how he will compete with the new development.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E05 - Misunderstandings
3.plot: Maggie grows concerned about Cal after he makes a series of rash decisions, while an unexpected visitor threatens Sully and Rob's plans for the diner.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E06 - Bad Timing
3.plot: Everyone at the Crossing pitches in to try and help Rob save his new restaurant while Maggie and Cal continue to drift apart.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E07 - Twists and Turns
3.plot: Everyone at the Crossing bands together to look for Lola and Jacob when it comes to light that the two never made it home from the woods.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E08 - Blindsided
3.plot: As Glenn's condition deteriorates, Maggie thinks there may be a connection to a firefighter who collapsed during renovations at the lodge.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E09 - First Cut is the Deepest
3.plot: Maggie faces a difficult decision after a loved one becomes ill.

3.title: FR - Sullivan's Crossing - S03E10 - Head to the Heart
3.plot: Cal believes that Maggie's missing her career, while relationships come to a head at the opening of Rob's restaurant.

meta.plot: 4400 overlooked, undervalued, or otherwise marginalized people who vanished without a trace over the last hundred years are all returned in an instant, having not aged a day and with no memory of what happened to them. As the government races to analyze the potential threat and contain the story, the 4400 themselves must grapple with the fact that they've been returned with a few "upgrades", and the increasing likelihood that they were all brought back now for a specific reason.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E01 - Past Is Prologue
1.plot: Over the last century at least four thousand four hundred people who were overlooked, undervalued, or otherwise marginalized vanished without a trace off the face of the planet. Last night, inexplicably, they were all returned in an instant to Detroit having not aged a day and with no memory of what happened to them.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E02 - All Things Are Possible
1.plot: As the 4400 become even more disenchanted with their accommodations, new rules have everyone on edge. Andre and LaDonna help Claudette push her newfound ability to new limits. Shanice gets an unexpected visitor.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E03 - That LaDonna Life
1.plot: LaDonna signs up for 15 more minutes of fame but quickly realizes she doesn't have the clout she once had. Jharrell picks an inopportune time to speak his truth, and it may cost him dearly. Andre is eager to get back to medicine.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E04 - Harlem's Renaissance Man
1.plot: Finally there is some good news for a few of the 4400. Andre looks to study some of his new friends but mistakes from his past begin to affect him in present day. Rev finds some information about his son.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E05 - The Way We Were
1.plot: Keisha hears the truth about the day she lost her sister, moving her to take a chance. Shanice and Andre enjoy a day out. Hayden and Mariah grow closer.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E06 - If You Love Something
1.plot: Jharrel and Keisha must earn the trust of the 4400 if they want to help keep them safe. Hayden convinces LaDonna and Andre to visit Ypsi Med and Rev continues to grow his flock.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E07 - Empowered Women Empower Women
1.plot: Claudette begins to assert her independence. Rev keeps his flock close, further raising Jharrel's suspicions. LaDonna considers her next move. Keisha has a date with Jessica. Andre is concerned by his latest discovery.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E08 - The Kaminski Experiment
1.plot: Logan's adjustment to Shanice's return has been harder than he let on, meanwhile, Rev is beginning to see the light. Mildred lets her emotions get the better of her, possibly endangering the rest of the 4400.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E09 - Great Expectations
1.plot: The scene is chaotic, and everyone is still reeling after Mildred's on camera performance, meanwhile the government tries to figure out their next move. Rev is confused by his new ability, Jharrel get some unexpected news, and no one seems to know Ladonna's whereabouts.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E10 - Give Up the Ghost
1.plot: With everyone at the Bois Blanc still on edge, the government deals another blow to the 4400. Meanwhile, Jharrel gets some shocking information about his brother, Shanice and Andre continue to grow closer, and Mildred resurfaces.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E11 - You Only Meant Well
1.plot: While Shanice helps to prepare the Bois Blanc for a celebration, others are preparing for war. LaDonna returns to the hotel and we learn what she has experienced out in the real world and what she knows about the 44orum. After a disturbing incident, Hayden realizes the comfort of Kaminsky home may not be what is safest for everyone. Jharrell reunites with his brother but is Manny to be trusted and what is his connection to Claudette? Meanwhile, an unfortunate misunderstanding might prove fatal for one of the 4400.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E12 - Group Efforts
1.plot: Logan is the only witness to a savage crime, that, to all others does not seem to exist, meanwhile Claudette stands up to a group of anti-4400's. Mildred rallies the troops when she fears Milicent might be in trouble and we get a glimpse into the sisters' lives growing up and the mysterious Caleb.

1.title: FR - 4400 - S01E13 - Present is Prologue
1.plot: Tensions rise as an attack is made on the Bois Blanc, putting everyone’s life in danger. Shanice and Logan do their best to keep Hayden safe, while Claudette and Jharrell try to reason with Manny. Meanwhile, Mildred still believes her sister can be saved and LaDonna takes to the streets in an effort to end the threat against the 4400.

meta.plot: Akira Fudo learns from his best friend Ryo Asuka that demons will revive and reclaim the world from humans. With humans hopeless against this threat, Ryo suggests combining with a demon. With this, Akira becomes Devilman, a being with the power of demon but with a human heart.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E01 - I Need You
1.plot: Ryo, a young professor returning from research abroad, takes his pure-hearted, crybaby friend Akira to a decadent party, where things turn demonic.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E02 - One Hand Is Enough
1.plot: Akira has become a completely different man -- he's stronger and hungrier than ever before. He seeks out Ryo for answers.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E03 - Believe Me!
1.plot: After getting shut down by his editor, paparazzo Nagasaki gets desperate. Silene and Kaim learn what happened to their missing fellow demon, Amon.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E04 - Come, Akira
1.plot: Akira's mother calls and says she'll be home soon. Everyone is looking forward to seeing her, but Ryo warns Akira not to trust any human.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E05 - Beautiful Silene
1.plot: Silene tracks down Amon, hoping to reawaken his demonic side. But in the ensuing battle, the human soul of Akira remains powerful.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E06 - Neither Demon nor Human
1.plot: At a widely broadcast track meet, Ryo plans to expose high school athlete Koda as a demon, thereby spreading fear and distrust throughout society.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E07 - Weak Humans, Wise Demons
1.plot: With the fear of demons gripping the world, humanity devolves into paranoia and violence. Akira tries to save other demon-human hybrids like himself.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E08 - I Must Know Myself
1.plot: Ryo's actions and motives remain a mystery to himself, so he revisits his past for answers. Miki's father searches for his missing wife and son.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E09 - Go to Hell, You Mortals
1.plot: Betrayed and exposed, Akira becomes a target. After Miki takes to social media to defend his human soul, she and Miko find themselves under attack.

1.title: FR - Devilman Crybaby - S01E10 - Crybaby
1.plot: Confronted by Akira, Ryo reveals the truth about demonkind and himself. Humans, demons and devilmen gather for an ultimate battle for the world.

1.title: FR - Fais-moi peur ! - S01E01 - Part One: Submitted for Approval
1.plot: Tormented by a series of scary nightmares, the new girl in school feels isolated and out of place until a mysterious group invites her to join their ranks. All she has to do is tell a truly terrifying story.

1.title: FR - Fais-moi peur ! - S01E02 - Part Two: Opening Night
1.plot: When a friend’s disappearance seems to be linked to Rachel’s story, the Midnight Society decides to attend the Carnival of Doom. Is it the same carnival from her nightmares? And if so... how could that be possible?

1.title: FR - Fais-moi peur ! - S01E03 - Part Three: Destroy All Tophats
1.plot: With her friends’ lives at stake, Rachel decides to take charge and end Mr. Tophat’s reign of terror. Will this story have a happy ending... or is the Midnight Society doomed?

2.title: FR - Fais-moi peur ! - S02E01 - The Tale of the Haunted Woods
2.plot: Five kids investigate the disappearance of their friend, the leader of The Midnight Society whose fate may be tied to a mysterious curse that haunts their seaside town.

meta.plot: Each season of this horror anthology series follows a different group of kids, members of the Midnight Society, as they discover terrifying curses and creatures.

1.title: FR - Zac & Mia - S01E01 - X Factor
1.plot: In the midst of a monotonous period of protective isolation, Zac is pleasantly surprised when Mia, his new neighbor on the oncology floor, turns out to be nothing like he'd expected.

1.title: FR - Zac & Mia - S01E02 - Treat Yo Self
1.plot: Mia delays her first chemotherapy treatment to accommodate an important visitor on Valentine's Day, and later, in the dark of a long day's night, Zac does what he can to bring a smile to her face.

1.title: FR - Zac & Mia - S01E03 - Friend Quest
1.plot: A surprise visit from Zac's best friend Cam serves as the reality check that Zac doesn't need, and on the other side of the wall, Mia inquires about the voice behind her late night lullaby.

1.title: FR - Zac & Mia - S01E04 - Make-Over & Out
1.plot: As things are looking up, an unexpected guest arriving at just the wrong time leaves Zac feeling hopeless.

1.title: FR - Zac & Mia - S01E05 - Starboy
1.plot: Zac lets Mia in on his private hobby, and ultimately brightens up her otherwise lonesome night in the hospital.

1.title: FR - Zac & Mia - S01E06 - Rocky Road
1.plot: Make A Wish officially grants Zac a wish, and an ensuing late night video chat with Mia takes an unexpected twist.

meta.plot: "Zac and Mia", based on the novel by A.J. Betts, about 2 teens battling cancer in the same hospital. In the real world, Zac and Mia would have pretty much nothing in common, but in the hospital, where they're the only 2 teens on the ward, they develop an unbreakable bond. If cancer is the variable that changed everything, the only constant is their ever-deepening need for one another.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E01 - Alphonse
1.plot: The Vasseur family prepares for a bone marrow transplant for Rose, age nine, who has leukemia.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E02 - The Deer
1.plot: It's transplant day. Marion retreats into denial, and Claire tries to draw her back to reality.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E03 - Lockdown
1.plot: After several weeks in the transplant room, Rose's health shows no signs of improvement.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E04 - No Dancing for You My Sweet
1.plot: Relief aside, Marion discovers their new life at home with Rose, whose illness turns into a tyrant.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E05 - Lone Palm
1.plot: Claire and Marion are on vacation with Léonie and Lou, but misery is no less painful under the sun.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E06 - The Blessed Child
1.plot: The doctors grant Rose a discharge for Christmas. Claire realizes it's most likely her last.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E07 - Romy and the Ocean
1.plot: Rose is in intensive care. The doctors tell her parents that she only has a few days to live.

1.title: FR - Tout va bien - S01E08 - Anomaly
1.plot: Three weeks have passed, and the doctors don't understand: Rose is still alive and improving.

meta.plot: An ordinary family faces a catastrophe: the serious illness of one of its children. Each member of the family sees their personal life impacted by this ordeal. Disasters make people more human, though not necessarily better.

1.title: FR - Temps de chien - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Temps de chien - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Temps de chien - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Temps de chien - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Temps de chien - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Temps de chien - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Temps de chien - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Temps de chien - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Temps de chien - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Temps de chien - S01E10 - Episode 10
FR - Temps de chien - S01E11 - Episode 11
FR - Temps de chien - S01E12 - Episode 12

meta.plot: Antoine Meilleur is a veterinarian and star host of successful TV shows. He also owns a veterinary hospital and a veritable empire of animal products. But his whole world suddenly changes the day he is plunged into a scandal, despite himself.

One day at work, Jodie momentarily glances out of the window and in a split second her life descends into freefall. What she notices seems innocuous – two men walking on the opposite side of the road – but she’s actually witnessed a killer and his victim moments before a murder.

1.title: FR - Témoin numéro 3 - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Jodie finds herself as the lead witness in a murder enquiry which could change her life.

1.title: FR - Témoin numéro 3 - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As her paranoia mounts Jodie becomes a target, but can the police protect her?

1.title: FR - Témoin numéro 3 - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Jodie goes on the run, fearing for her life as both a corrupt cop and the gang are after her. Detective Whelan agrees to take Jodie to a remote cabin, a temporary safe house.

1.title: FR - Témoin numéro 3 - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: In the middle of the night, Po enters Jodie's home, under orders from the gang. After a violent struggle, she locks herself in the panic room as a last line of defence.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E01 - Cages
1.plot: While citizens protest on the streets, authorities feel that a war is in the air. The Anacletis are now in charge, but some voices demand a big change.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E02 - Anabasis
1.plot: The Lucianis need to build strong alliances, while Spadino has to choose whether to get involved in his family business again.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E03 - Shoreline Inferno
1.plot: Cinaglia tries to find middle ground with Spadino and leverages his connections at the Vatican to sweep away a rival. Angelica meets someone secretly.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E04 - Under Siege
1.plot: The Lucianis recover from a hard blow, and Angelica suggests a strategy. Ercole is on the verge of losing everything, so he asks Tronto for urgent help.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E05 - Underground
1.plot: Ercole's hidden supporters push him to return their favors. Cinaglia and Spadino dig deeper into Tronto's secret, until something shocking comes up.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E06 - Hoo-ha
1.plot: Ercole throws a party to celebrate his political success, but a few obnoxious guests show up. Damiano and Nadia finally confront each other.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E07 - Knives
1.plot: While the Lucianis seek revenge, funds are questioned in the Vatican. Tronto and Fiorenzo have a shocking confrontation. Cinaglia plays a desperate move.

1.title: FR - Suburræterna - S01E08 - Ablaze
1.plot: While Ercole is caught by a dangerous trap, Damiano and Angelica's relationship reaches a turning point. Spadino makes a firm decision about his future.

meta.plot: While chaos rules over Rome, established alliances are at risk as tensions rise with emerging criminal clans. The world of "Suburra" takes a new turn.

1.title: FR - Sambre - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Sambre - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Sambre - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Sambre - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Sambre - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Sambre - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Late 80’s in Northern France, women are being sexually assaulted along the same road by the Samber river – with attacks taking place early mornings and in a similar style. The police fail to get to grips with the extent of these assaults or make a connection between the cases. The justice system is overwhelmed by the accumulating cases. It will take 30 years to catch a man, who never stopped attacking women and is responsible for at least 54 cases of rape or sexual assault.

Aboard the mega cruise ship Sacramentum, 20-year-old new recruit, Jamie, infiltrates the 3000-strong crew in a desperate race to find his missing sister. She was working aboard the same vessel on a previous tour and vanished mid-charter.

1.title: FR - Wreck: croisière sanglante - S01E01 - Ship of Dreams
1.plot: Welcome aboard The Sacramentum. New recruit Jamie Walsh gets a crash course on ship life while trying to keep a low profile as he investigates what happened to his missing sister.

1.title: FR - Wreck: croisière sanglante - S01E02 - Catch of the Day
1.plot: After shocking news concerning a chief suspect, Jamie and new friend Vivian work together to discover the identity of an officer onboard who was connected to his sister.

1.title: FR - Wreck: croisière sanglante - S01E03 - Showtime!
1.plot: Jamie becomes embroiled with an illicit operation on board in exchange for new information on his sister. Meanwhile, Vivian is charmed by a guest as another crew member vanishes.

1.title: FR - Wreck: croisière sanglante - S01E04 - The Sacramentum Slasher
1.plot: After an unlikely ally reveals new information on Pippa's last days on board, Jamie and Vivian make a shocking discovery that leads to a dangerous confrontation.

1.title: FR - Wreck: croisière sanglante - S01E05 - Needle in a Gaystack
1.plot: Jamie becomes a fugitive onboard, forcing his friends to hatch a daring plan, one that leads to Jamie discovering the truth about what is really happening onboard.

1.title: FR - Wreck: croisière sanglante - S01E06 - Water Off a Duck's Back
1.plot: Jamie finds himself in a lethal dead end with seemingly no way out. But after a surprise intervention brings some momentary respite, he learns that others are in peril.

meta.plot: A blind French girl and a young German soldier's paths collide during WWII.

1.title: FR - Toute la lumière que nous ne pouvons voir - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: August 1944. In Nazi-occupied Saint-Malo, Marie broadcasts through an air raid — an act punishable by death. Werner, a young German soldier, listens in.

1.title: FR - Toute la lumière que nous ne pouvons voir - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: During an intense interrogation, Marie recalls the Nazi invasion of Paris as Werner remembers a fateful visit from an SS officer to his orphanage.

1.title: FR - Toute la lumière que nous ne pouvons voir - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After earning Etienne's trust, Werner opens up about his haunting past and his ties to shortwave 13.10. Daniel goes to great lengths to trick the Gestapo.

1.title: FR - Toute la lumière que nous ne pouvons voir - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A hellbent von Rumpel makes his final bid to find the Sea of Flames. As artillery falls and American forces breach the city, Werner races to save Marie.

meta.plot: Jordán and Cornelia are two young kids who, in the dead of night, are trying to escape the angry mob accusing them of murder. Fearing for their lives, they flee from the law, from the supernatural and even from themselves.

1.title: FR - Romancero - S01E01 - One
1.plot: Terrified, covered in blood and not daring to look back, Jordán and Cornelia flee in the middle of the night through a desert landscape. Despite being just children, they are relentlessly pursued by a group of people, thirsty for revenge. Luckily, they find a hiding place in the dark, but not for long.

1.title: FR - Romancero - S01E02 - Two
1.plot: A huge bus has pulled up in the town square. In front of it, Caterina Izara, an enlightened woman imbued with an atrocious conservatism, holds a rally for the locals who acclaim her as a deity. Not far from there, agents Teodoro and Sorroche , put aside their unhappy lives to start the night shift. But the calm won’t last long.

1.title: FR - Romancero - S01E03 - Three
1.plot: A few hours before fleeing with Jordán, Cornelia is forced to escape from the shantytown where she lives. Tábata, the woman who takes care of her as if she were her own daughter, warns her of a serious danger: they are coming for them. That same afternoon, Jordán is dealing in the mall with his friends, back home, this event will have tragic consequences.

1.title: FR - Romancero - S01E04 - Four
1.plot: After their intense escape, Jordán and Cornelia take shelter in the shopping mall, thinking the danger has passed. However, agents Teodoro and Sorroche are close on their heels.

1.title: FR - Romancero - S01E05 - Five
1.plot: Weeks before Josué's murder, Cornelia's life in the shantytown is a living hell. Her only escape is Tábata, with whom she enjoys immersing herself in stories full of magic and mystery. Back to the present, Teodoro and Sorroche deal with the murder of Jordán and secrets are revealed.

1.title: FR - Romancero - S01E06 - Six
1.plot: The police station becomes a place where chaos and confusion reign and where past and revenge collide.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Aristocrat-turned-pirate-captain Stede Bonnet is put to the test when his crew encounters a British naval vessel.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E02 - A Damned Man
1.plot: Stede battles feelings of guilt while hunting for missing hostages. Lucius makes a surprising discovery.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E03 - A Gentleman Pirate
1.plot: Stede (a.k.a. “The Gentleman Pirate”) conducts business in the Republic of Pirates. Oluwande and Jim face their past.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E04 - Discomfort in a Married State
1.plot: As the threat of attack looms, Blackbeard and Stede finally meet. Jim fields questions from an overly curious crew.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E05 - The Best Revenge Is Dressing Well
1.plot: Blackbeard and Stede attend a fancy party. Oluwande and Frenchie embrace false identities. Izzy and Lucius go head-to-head.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E06 - The Art of F**kery
1.plot: Stede and crew stage a spectacle. Blackbeard struggles to carry out his plan.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E07 - This Is Happening
1.plot: A trip to St. Augustine reveals more about Jim’s past. Stede leads Blackbeard on an adventure.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E08 - We Gull Way Back
1.plot: The arrival of Blackbeard’s old buddy leaves Stede feeling like the odd man out. As Oluwande mourns a loss, Jim seeks answers from Spanish Jackie.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E09 - Act of Grace
1.plot: Captured and facing trial, Stede and Blackbeard face tough choices and an uncertain future.

1.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S01E10 - Wherever You Go, There You Are
1.plot: While Stede attempts to reenter his old life, Blackbeard tends to a wounded heart.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E01 - Impossible Birds
2.plot: While Stede adjusts to his new normal, a heartbroken Blackbeard fills the void with daily raids – sparking concern amongst Izzy and the crew.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E02 - Red Flags
2.plot: Aboard Zheng's ship, Stede, Olu, and Black Pete have surprising revelations while Blackbeard's crew plots their revenge.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E03 - The Innkeeper
2.plot: While the Revenge crew gleefully reunites under Zheng's reign, Stede attempts to bring back Blackbeard, who must face his own difficult truths.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E04 - Fun and Games
2.plot: After he's banished from the Revenge, Blackbeard unwittingly receives relationship advice from some dysfunctional old friends.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E05 - The Curse of the Seafaring Life
2.plot: As Blackbeard remains plagued by the distrust of his crew, Izzy schools Stede on how to be an effective captain.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E06 - Calypso's Birthday
2.plot: While the crew celebrates Calypso's birthday, Blackbeard faces a violent party-crasher seeking revenge.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E07 - Man on Fire
2.plot: As Blackbeard reevaluates his life, Stede revels in his newfound infamy. With some help from Jim, Oluwande reunites with a hesitant Zheng.

2.title: FR - Our Flag Means Death - S02E08 - Mermen
2.plot: After watching the Republic of Pirates crumble, Stede and Zheng pursue Prince Ricky Barnes, the Revenge crew schemes to escape imprisonment, and Blackbeard plots a return to piracy… leading to triumph and a devastating loss.

meta.plot: After trading in the seemingly charmed life of a gentleman for one of a swashbuckling buccaneer, Stede Bonnet becomes captain of the pirate ship Revenge. Struggling to earn the respect of his potentially mutinous crew, Stede’s fortunes change after a fateful run-in with the infamous Captain Blackbeard. Stede and crew attempt to get their ship together and survive life on the high seas.
When business consultant Michi Wyss inherits his late father's troubled farm he must confront his rural past -- and his family's future.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E01 - Crash
1.plot: After his father passes away, Michi returns to his family’s farm to help his siblings — while his mother hides the real cause behind her husband's death.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E02 - Investment
1.plot: When details about a lucrative offer emerge — along with a letter from his dead father — Michi and the family struggle to agree on the farm’s future.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E03 - Equity
1.plot: Michi wants to save the family’s farm but his broke sister tries to sabotage his plans. When the bank denies him a loan, Michi makes a risky decision.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E04 - Cash Cow
1.plot: Michi and Lorenz purchase high-performance cows to try to save the farm from bankruptcy. Later, Michi manages a Chinese dairy delegation.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E06 - Deficit
1.plot: Michi loses his job, his family and his boyfriend while the village boycotts the family’s farm. Later, Angelina disappears after finding out a secret.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E07 - Profit
1.plot: Lorenz steps up, Katharina spends the night with Martin and Michi’s ex-boss wants him back at the firm — but first, he must overcome his drug problem.

1.title: FR - Neumatt - S01E08 - Turnaround
1.plot: While Michi and Katharina get ready to start their new lives, Sarah makes a horrible discovery. Later, Michi realizes how important the farm is to him.

2.title: FR - Neumatt - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Neumatt - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Neumatt - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - Neumatt - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - Neumatt - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Neumatt - S02E06 - Episode 6
FR - Neumatt - S02E07 - Episode 7
FR - Neumatt - S02E08 - Episode 8

1.title: FR - Cannes police criminelle - S01E01 - Death of a Jester
1.plot: Investigating the murder of a street artist, Cannes detective Camille Delmasse keeps running into the suave but shady Harry King. Meanwhile, Camille's father, the former chief of police, is set to be cleared of corruption until secrets upend events.

1.title: FR - Cannes police criminelle - S01E02 - Creatures of Habit
1.plot: When a casino owner's wife is poisoned, suspicions fall on blacklisted gambler Roxie Roland. Camille turns to Harry for help, for who better to bring down a con woman than a con man. Harry discovers the name of the man threatening Camille's father.

1.title: FR - Cannes police criminelle - S01E03 - A Clear Conscience
1.plot: A monk is found murdered below an island fort. Camille and her partner, Lea, delve into the victim's dark past for answers, with input from Harry's old friend, who was the monk's mentor. A ruthless fixer named Julien Boire threatens Camille's sister.

1.title: FR - Cannes police criminelle - S01E04 - The Deadlier Species
1.plot: Camille goes to see her father in prison despite efforts to intimidate her. Ordered to protect a visiting billionaire who has had death threats made against him, she and Lea turn to Harry for intel about a legendary assassin known as the Nightshade.

1.title: FR - Cannes police criminelle - S01E05 - Southern Gothic
1.plot: When Pascal Fontaine is found hanged after a séance, it seems he's the victim of a curse related to the family matriarch's death in a mental asylum. The team deal with shady mediums and scorned lovers, while Harry and Camille set a trap for Boire.

1.title: FR - Cannes police criminelle - S01E06 - Love and Let Die
1.plot: The death of an actress's assistant during the Cannes Film Festival could be an accident or murder, and the case affects Lea deeply. With his daughter at risk, Harry decides to stop Boire once and for all, but what he learns will devastate Camille.

meta.plot: Gutsy French detective Camille Delmasse loves her job and her family fiercely. After her father, the former police chief, is accused of corruption, Camille is determined to clear his name. She coerces help from suave con man Harry King, who's in Cannes on a secret quest of his own. Can the sparring duo work together to uncover a conspiracy?

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Twelve contestants begin their 7-day journey. The first match is nothing like what they've expected — it's time to get those brain cells working!

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The results of the first match have everyone shocked. Someone from the losing team must go to jail. When the next match begins, conflict starts brewing.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: It's day 2, and people are eager to form deeper alliances. This time, the match will result in the very first elimination. Who will be sent home?

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The group grows emotional over the result of the first elimination. Meanwhile, a contestant happens upon a secret hidden by the Devil.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The ORBIT alliance or a new alliance? While the contestants rethink their loyalties, someone commits an act of betrayal during the main match.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A betrayal leads to an unforeseen elimination. Emotions flare among the remaining players, but in this prize match, they must work as a team.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: It's day 4, and a group commits a fatal mistake. As their allegiances waver, other contestants come closer to unlocking the Devil's secret.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The contestants struggle to solve the Devil's secret. During the fifth main match, Lee See-won attempts to face off against ORBIT.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: The competition takes a new turn due to one player's surprising move. Shortly afterward, the truth surrounding the move is revealed.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: The secrets of the prison result in a painful night for some. The last main match of the competition commences. Who will move on to the next round?

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Contestants give it their all in the main match, but only three emerge triumphant. The last prize match begins.

1.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: The 7-day journey is nearing the end, and it's time for the final match. Who among the remaining two will be crowned winner?

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Fourteen diverse contestants gather as shocking house rules are unveiled, setting the stage for a thrilling first game of alliances and deception.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: The first match delivers unexpected twists, sending seven to prison. There, a high-stakes prison match determines who will face the first elimination.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: An elimination warns the inmates of what’s at stake — but can they win the next match? Meanwhile, secrets brew between the prison and living areas.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: The arrival of a new inmate sparks talk about forming alliances or marking the inmate as the next target. Elsewhere, someone steps into the Devil's test.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: In a match where alliances and strategy are crucial, a contestant disrupts the existing alliance, shaking the game's foundation and heightening tension.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: New alliances form, yet some conceal their true intentions. As the game shifts, an unexpected elimination occurs, altering the dynamics.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: A brutal prison match determines the fifth elimination. Between living areas and prison, no allies remain — only hierarchy persists.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: On day four, a creative player is eliminated in the main match. A prisoner's fate hangs in the balance as the inmate loses mental stamina.

2.title: FR - À l'épreuve du diable - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: The remaining prisoners galvanize when an inmate is eliminated. One player's efforts are focused on taking down Jeong Hyun-gyu in the main match.

meta.plot: It's the ultimate showdown of wits, brains, strategy, and alliances for a chance to win 500 million won.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E01 - Are You The Mole?
1.plot: Twelve crafty competitors gather in Australia's ancient Daintree Rainforest to begin the game, with no idea which of them might be plotting sabotage.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E02 - Take No Prisoners
1.plot: A puzzling jailbreak challenge ends in a nail-biting finish. The next day, the players face a new mind game that pits them against each other.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E03 - Knowledge Is Power
1.plot: The players have an opportunity to get to know each other better on a trip to the Great Barrier Reef, where they set out for a treasure hunt at sea.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E04 - Bank Heist
1.plot: One person makes a decision that shocks the others before an elimination with a surprise twist. During an Outback bank heist, some players melt down.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E05 - Human Lie Detector
1.plot: If three teams can move fast, a mail delivery mission could boost the prize pot. Lunch puts one player in the hot seat.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E06 - Mountain Mole
1.plot: A high-stakes climb through the Blue Mountains pushes the players physically and mentally, and begins to shift suspicion onto some new targets.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E07 - Spot the Fake
1.plot: The six players remaining after another elimination head to Sydney, where they'll need to spot subtle differences between genuine and fake.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E08 - The Bird Cage
1.plot: One person points fingers, but is it all misdirection? The players piece together clues and watch each other like hawks during a mission in Sydney.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E09 - Cold Hard Cash
1.plot: With the end in sight and no one left to trust, the four remaining players in the game bundle up for a grueling trek across the Snowy Mountains.

1.title: FR - Qui est la taupe ? - S01E10 - Who Is The Mole?
1.plot: The final three players go into stealth mode for the last mission before a quiz that will reveal the truth: Who is the winner, and who is The Mole?

meta.plot: A high-stakes competition series where twelve players work together in challenges to add money to a pot that only one of them will win at the end. Among the players is one person who has secretly been designated "the Mole" and tasked with sabotaging the group's money-making efforts. In the end, one player will outlast their competition and expose the Mole to win the prize pot.

This stranger-than-fiction series explores the question of whether Natalia Barnett is an exploited Ukrainian child with dwarfism or a dangerous adult masquerading as a child. Featuring exclusive bombshell interviews with members of Natalia's adoptive family, relatives, friends, legal experts, and neighbors, this docuseries offers a never-before-seen glimpse into the Barnett family, Natalia's identity, Michael Barnett's October 2022 trial, as well as key insights into new theories and evidence.

1.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S01E01 - Meet the Barnetts
1.plot: The Barnett’s adoption of Natalia, an allegedly six-year-old Ukrainian Orphan, turns into a nightmare when they learn she may not be six or Ukrainian. With suspicions mounting, the Barnetts discover they may have an adult stranger in their home.

1.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S01E02 - Orphan or Imposter?
1.plot: Michael Barnett reveals Natalia tried to poison and harm them as the Barnett’s own lies surface. This information leads to the question -- is there more than one villain here?

1.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S01E03 - Nightmare Neighbor
1.plot: Now re-aged as an adult and living alone, Natalia wreaks havoc at her new apartment by sexually propositioning and stalking the residents. Meanwhile, the Barnett’s truly sinister side emerges as they face a social services investigation into Natalia.

1.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S01E04 - Victim or Villain?
1.plot: The Barnetts, now divorced, abandon Natalia in an apartment in Lafayette, Indiana. With no food, a/c, electricity or phone, the police get involved. Despite Michael’s efforts to blame Kristine solely, his shocking confessions lead to their arrests.

1.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S01E05 - Barnett vs. Barnett
1.plot: As Michael’s trial approaches, he shifts fault to Kristine and catches a break when the judge throws out any discussion of Natalia’s age during the trial.

1.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S01E06 - Punch Or Be Punched
1.plot: Michael Barnett must face the consequences of his actions, and Kristine is next.

2.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S02E01 - Age, Rage & the Big Lie
2.plot: In a jaw-dropping premiere, Natalia attempts to fill the missing pieces of her life by learning the truth about her age. Meanwhile, shocking new information reveals that the Barnetts knew more about Natalia when they adopted her than they ever let on.

2.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S02E02 - For the Love of Money
2.plot: In an explosive confrontation, Natalia demands answers from Michael about why they adopted her. Law enforcement officials involved in the case answer questions about the Barnetts' true motivations behind adopting Natalia.

2.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S02E03 - By Any Means Necessary
2.plot: Natalia describes the horrible multi-pronged plot by the Barnetts to get rid of her. The Barnetts would try anything to get rid of Natalia, from having her re-aged as an adult to attempting to institutionalize her.

2.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S02E04 - Houses of Horror
2.plot: Natalia returns to the Barnett's home of horrors to confront the neighbor who abandoned her. Kristine's evil plan to eliminate Natalia now includes eliminating Michael as well. Natalia is preparing to confront Michael once more.

2.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S02E05 - Trauma Bond
2.plot: Natalia and Michael square off once more in a no-holds-barred brawl. Natalia wants more than just answers from Michael. She wants evidence and admissions about the assault she endured at the hands of Michael and Kristine.

2.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S02E06 - One Door Closes
2.plot: Natalia and Michael's argument comes to an unexpected and emotional end. Natalia discovers her permanent family as terrible secrets about her past in Ukraine emerge.

3.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S03E01 - It’s a Manses World
3.plot: Trapped by her adoptive parents, Natalia desperately seeks a way out.

3.title: FR - L'énigme Natalia Grace - S03E02 - The Rescue
3.plot: Natalia flees with the DePauls, terrified of her parents' impending wrath.

meta.plot: Within the spectacular, complex and corrupt world of gladiatorial sports in Ancient Rome, follow an ensemble of diverse characters across the many layers of Roman society where sports, politics and business intersect and collide.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E01 - Rise or Die
1.plot: Ancient Rome's elite plot against the rioting citizens; a cunning Plebeian schemes to change his fate; Spanish brothers arrive to sell horses for the Roman Games; three African siblings are forcibly taken to Rome, followed by their vengeful mother.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E02 - Trust None
1.plot: Tenax and Domitian form a racing faction and recruit Scorpus; Antonia and Marsus undermine their efforts while Cala offers to help Tenax to protect her daughters; Emperor Vespasian ponders on his successor.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E03 - Death's Door
1.plot: Kwame and Viggo bond over their ill-fated futures; the Gold Faction puts on a lavish display at the inaugural chariot races; Queen Berenice tries to convince Titus of his brother's treacherous plans to claim the throne; Vespasian chooses his heir.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E04 - Fool's Bet
1.plot: Titus shuts down the Gold Faction to appease the Patricians while Scorpus, suspicious of Tenax's plan, joins the White Faction; Domitian orchestrates a grisly spectacle to show his strength; Tenax meets Ursus, a dangerous man from his past.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E05 - Betrayal
1.plot: To save his image and cement his authority, Titus sends Berenice away and marries his cousin, a Roman; Tenax's dark past is finally revealed, and his chase for Ursus leaves someone dead; Kwame prepares for his fight with Flamma.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E06 - Blood Relation
1.plot: A dark day looms over Rome with the eruption of Mount Vesuvius; Titus punishes Marsus and the Patricians involved in a planned coup; Domitian convinces Titus to reinstate the Gold Faction; Tenax is dangerously wounded in battle.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E07 - Death's Bed
1.plot: Tenax reveals his past to Cala as she tends to his wounds; Scorpus grows increasingly jealous as the elder Corsi brothers, Andria and Fonsoa, win races for the Gold Faction; Kwame faces Flamma in a rematch; Tenax and Cala face off with Ursus.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E08 - All or Nothing
1.plot: Following a devastating racetrack accident, Elia Corsi accuses Scorpus of causing the tragedy; Antonia allows Elia to join the Blue Faction to seek revenge.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E09 - The Die Is Cast
1.plot: Elia faces Scorpus in a head-to-head race for revenge; Tenax puts on a public execution for the Patricians; Cala finds evidence of Domitian's treachery and betrays Tenax to save Jula; Berenice and Antonia race to get proof to Titus in time.

1.title: FR - Those About to Die - S01E10 - Let the Games Begin
1.plot: Pitted against one another, Kwame and Viggo fight to the death to save their families; Tenax decides to spare Cala in exchange for her help; Domitian stops Titus from finding out the truth before it's too late.

meta.plot: The war is over, and Violet Evergarden needs a job. Scarred and emotionless, she takes a job as a letter writer to understand herself and her past.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E01 - Episode 1
