1.plot: Hodgins retrieves Violet from the hospital, as Major Gilbert asked him to look out for her. After they meet Gilbert's relatives, he offers her a job.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Violet tries to adjust to her new job: she needs to learn typing, and her coworkers question whether she has the right demeanor for letter writing.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Violet enrolls in a Doll training course. Her classmate Luculia befriends her, though she has her own problems with her war veteran brother.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Iris goes to her home village on an assignment, Violet accompanies her. Iris's birthday party sparks a disagreement with her family.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Princess Charlotte is to have a public correspondence with her betrothed, and Violet is entrusted with writing the letters on her highness’s behalf.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Violet travels to the country of Astrea to work with transcribers copying damaged manuscripts. Her partner Leon has a past not unlike hers.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A playwright with writer's block and a tragic past summons Violet to the country of Genetrix to help him finish a script. They both learn about grief.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Violet learns that Major Gilbert is listed as missing in action, but his family members think he is dead. Unable to cope, she remembers the war.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Heartbroken, Violet withdraws from her job and questions whether she even has the right to be an Auto Memory Doll. Then, she receives a letter.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Violet travels to a countryside mansion to write a letter for a gravely ill war widow, but her young daughter Ann resents Violet's presence.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Against Hodgins' wishes, Violet takes a job from a soldier at a military base in Ctrigall, a former enemy nation now engulfed in civil war.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: The Major's older brother is ordered to defend the signing ceremony from former Gardarik forces opposed to peace. Violet intercepts his train.

1.title: FR - Violet Evergarden - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: The signing ceremony concludes, officially bringing an end to the war. While writing letters for an air show, Violet composes a letter to the Major.

meta.plot: Follow the story of these beach boys who learned to love the ultimate sport of surfing!

1.title: FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E01 - Let's Go Surfing!!
1.plot: Masaki is a middle school student in Oarai. When he takes his pet corgi for an early morning walk on the beach, he sees Sho surfing. He's so enthralled by the sight of Sho that when he's asked if he wants surf, he immediately agrees to start. That's the moment when surfing becomes his life.

1.title: FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E02 - The Ocean Will Tell You
1.plot: Since the moment he took it up, Masaki's life has become all about surfing. Sleeping or waking, it's all he thinks about, and he goes out to the beach to ride the waves rain or shine. One day, with a typhoon approaching, Masaki ignores Sho's attempt to stop him.

1.title: FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E03 - First Competition
1.plot: It's almost time for the curtain to rise on Masaki's first competition - the Forest Cup in Oarai. Many surfers the same age as Masaki will be in the competition, and they will prove to be worthy, life-long rivals. It's been a year since Masaki first met Sho. A year since he started surfing. In order to prove that this last year of training hasn't been in vain, Masaki is determined to do everything he can with everything he's got. And so, he sets out to challenge the waves...

1.title: FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E04 - The Endless Summer
1.plot: The final round of the Forest Cup in Oarai comes down to Sho and Tanaka. Each of them challenge the waves with everything they've got, showing amazing runs, but there can only be one winner, and the winner is... Masaki is proud of both of them, and at the same time, he decides to work even harder to aim even higher. He and the others make a promise - to aim for the world stage together as friendly rivals...

1.title: FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E05 - Beyond That Wave
1.plot: Masaki is spending his days in a quiet, detached way, going to school, taking class, then going home. Since that day, he hasn't ridden the waves even once. But no matter how much he wants to resent surfing, wants to hate it, wants to quit it...he can't rid himself of the love he has for it. One night, under a full moon, Masaki laments alone on the Oarai shore. Tanaka quietly approaches. Moonlight. The sound of waves. And then, Masaki...

1.title: FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E06 - Shonan Magic!
FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E07 - A Heart Adrift Between the Waves
FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E08 - My Guardian Spirit
FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E09 - Forest Cup in Turigasaki
FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E10 - No rain, no rainbow
FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E11 - Show must go on!!
FR - Wave!! Surfing Yappe!! - S01E12 - Big WAVEs!!

meta.plot: Cris Miró's journey as Argentina's first trans vedette in 1995, shedding light on the trans community. Despite challenges, she embraced her true self until her untimely passing, leaving a legacy of inspiration and acceptance

1.title: FR - Cris Miró (Ella) [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episodio 1
FR - Cris Miró (Ella) [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR  - Fantasmas - S01E01 - Cookies and Spaghetti
1.plot: While ignoring his landlord's urgent letters, Julio obtains a gold oyster earring... then promptly loses it at the club. Later, Julio explains his sensitivity to shapes, colors, numbers, and the alphabet to his fellow rideshare passengers.

1.title: FR  - Fantasmas - S01E02 - Valued Customer
1.plot: While avoiding his housing debacle, Julio grows convinced that his lost oyster is the only way to prove his "mole" has grown.

1.title: FR  - Fantasmas - S01E03 - Toilets
1.plot: After learning of a program that would free his mind from his body, Julio gets a lead on the lost oyster from a bartender, who takes him to the former site of the first gay hamster club, and later, a middle school.

1.title: FR  - Fantasmas - S01E04 - Looking4Twinks2S**k
1.plot: After refusing to participate in a credit card commercial, Julio reluctantly accepts a new opportunity in a superhero franchise.

1.title: FR  - Fantasmas - S01E05 - The Little Ones
1.plot: Julio learns of a way to avoid getting proof of existence. Vanesja reflects on her life's purpose. Bibo pursues a new passion.

meta.plot: Julio Torres spins a fantastical tale of when he lost a gold oyster earring. In his search to find the precious object, Julio reflects on the offbeat characters he encounters in introspective, often eerie, and always comedic vignettes set in a dreamy, alternate version of New York City.

1.title: FR - Rebus [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A violent street attack is investigated by DS John Rebus and new detective Siobhan Clarke. However, it's John’s family that pose unexpected problems, along with an awkward affair.

1.title: FR - Rebus [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Hard-up Michael Rebus's rash act in Fife has bloody consequences for his brother John, who faces a fatal confrontation. Meanwhile, Siobhan finds out who stopped the street attack, and John confesses to contact with criminal Cafferty.

1.title: FR - Rebus [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: John's words come back to haunt him, while his brother abducts drug dealer Darryl Christie and recruits ex-army comrades for a risky raid. John hears his paralysed former partner's confession.

1.title: FR - Rebus [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: John is frustrated at family gatherings, unaware that the Cafferty and Christie rivalry is viciously escalating, with Michael at its heart.

1.title: FR - Rebus [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Lives are at stake, with John's loyalties torn and more revelations to come, while Rhona questions Chrissie, but home truths prove more dangerous.

meta.plot: Iconic character John Rebus is reimagined as a younger Detective Sergeant, drawn into a violent criminal conflict that turns personal when his brother Michael, a former soldier, crosses the line into criminality.

The story of Roman Compte, a Cuban exile and general manager of The Mutiny Hotel, the glamorous epicenter of the Miami cocaine scene of late '70s and early '80s. The Mutiny Hotel was Casablanca on cocaine.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Mutiny
1.plot: Roman Compte, general manager of Miami's wildly popular Mutiny Club, is forced by the DEA to spy on his estranged older brother Nestor Cabal, the city's biggest importer of cocaine.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Orishas
1.plot: Nestor rallies Roman to attempt a daring rescue of Chucho, Nestor's right-hand man, from a local hospital. But if Chucho wakes up from his coma, he'll reveal Roman's secrets.

meta.plot: In a present-day Spain, divided and on the brink of political chaos, inquisitive millennial investigative reporter Antonia stumbles on a decades-old conspiracy: the existence of a cryogenically frozen super-agent, García, created in a laboratory in the 1950s by General Franco’s fascist secret services. The old-world collides with the new as García and Antonia must learn to work together as they are drawn deeper and deeper into a political conspiracy that threatens to overthrow democracy and plunge Spain back into brutal dictatorship.

1.title: FR - ¡García! - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After receiving a mysterious package, aspiring journalist Antonia quickly finds herself embroiled in a deadly conflict tracing back to Franco’s dictatorship.

1.title: FR - ¡García! - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While Antonia fights to be taken seriously – and fend off her attackers – Garcia searches for any trace of his former life.

1.title: FR - ¡García! - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Garcia tackles his first mission in over 60 years as a frustrated Antonia learns the truth about her father’s profession. Later, Garcia reunites with an important figure from his past.

1.title: FR - ¡García! - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While mourning a devastating loss, Garcia is forced to flee – and reconsider everything he thought he knew about his former life. After learning more about her father’s past, a conflicted Antonia looks to set things right.

1.title: FR - ¡García! - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After Ortiz’s plan lands Garcia behind bars, Antonia assembles a ragtag crew of freedom fighters to save him at any cost.

1.title: FR - ¡García! - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Antonia’s friends and estranged father team up to save her from a shared enemy, while Garcia enters a final fight for the future of Spain.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E01 - Angel Attack
1.plot: Shinji Ikari is summoned to Tokyo-3 by his estranged father Gendo, commander of the special agency NERV, to defend the city from a giant Angel by piloting the only weapon capable of battling the monster: Evangelion Unit-01.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E02 - The Beast
1.plot: Shinji wakes up in the hospital, with no memory of defeating the Angel the night before. Rejected by his father, Misato decides to take Shinji with her to live in her apartment. Later that night, memories of the battle against the Angel come flooding back to Shinji.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E03 - A Transfer
1.plot: Shinji begins attending his new school in Tokyo-3, and has a difficult time dealing with the fame of being an Evangelion pilot. Touji Suzuhara, who's little sister was injured in Shinji's fight against the Angel, is angry at Shinji. A new Angel appears, and Shinji must once again pilot EVA-01 to defeat it.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E04 - Hedgehog's Dilemma
1.plot: Misato is upset with Shinji for ignoring her orders in the last Angel battle, and he is so overcome by the stress of being an EVA pilot that he runs away. After wandering around Tokyo-3 for several days, Shinji is faced with the choice of quitting or staying in his new home.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E05 - Rei I
1.plot: EVA-00 is finally repaired, and Shinji tries to get to know its enigmatic pilot, Rei Ayanami, better. However, he is confounded because she is extremely insular, has no friends at all, and the entire record of her past has been erased. In the midst of this, a very powerful Angel, the floating monolith Ramiel, attacks Tokyo-3.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E06 - Rei II
1.plot: Continuing from the previous episode, the Angel Ramiel is drilling down into the GeoFront to attack NERV HQ directly. After Shinji barely survived a direct confrontation with it, Misato devises a plan to have EVA-00 and EVA-01 defeat the Angel by sniping it from a distance using a positronic rifle which requires the total electric output of Japan to power up.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E07 - A Human Work
1.plot: Ritsuko briefs Shinji on the real nature of Second Impact, the Angels, and the Evangelions' mission to defeat them. Misato and Ritsuko attend the public demonstration of a new Angel-fighting robot, Jet Alone, built by a rival defense contractor to NERV. However, the nuclear-powered robot quickly runs out of control, and Shinji must use EVA Unit 01 to load Misato onto Jet Alone so she can she can enter in its automatic shutdown code, before it melts down in a nuclear explosion.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E08 - Asuka Strikes!
1.plot: Misato brings Shinji, along with Touji and Kensuke, to a massive UN naval convoy transporting Evangelion Unit-02 and its fiery German pilot, Asuka Langley Souryuu, to Japan. Escorting Asuka is Misato's old boyfriend, Ryouji Kaji. After some awkward introductions and reunions, the fleet is attacked by a massive aquatic Angel. Asuka powers up Eva-02, and decides that she will defeat the Angel by playing "hopscotch"...

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E09 - Both of You, Dance Like You Want to Win!
1.plot: Asuka joins Shinji’s class at school, and moves in with Misato and him in their apartment. As Asuka adjusts to Japan (or rather, everyone else adapts to her...), a new Angel attacks which is capable of splitting itself into two identical copies. EVA-01 and EVA-02 are defeated, and NERV is publicly humiliated. With the Angel in a week-long regeneration period after an N² Mine attack by the JSSDF, Asuka and Shinji must learn to "synchronize" with each others movements combat, in order to defeat it once and for all.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E10 - Magma Diver
1.plot: The EVA pilots are disappointed to find out that they are not allowed to go on their class trip to Okinawa, because they have to stay at Tokyo-3 to stay on-call in case of an Angel attack. Meanwhile, a new Angel is discovered in a chrysalis-like developmental stage deep within the magma of the volcano Mount Asama.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E11 - The Day Tokyo-3 Stood Still
1.plot: Tokyo-3 comes to a standstill when sabotage knocks out all power, and the personnel must scramble to launch the EVAs manually when an Angel appears in the middle of the blackout.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E12 - She said, 'Don't make others suffer for your personal hatred.'
1.plot: Misato has been promoted to Major, but the celebration does not last long. A monstrous Angel appears in Earth orbit right when Gendo and Fuyutsuki are away, leaving her and the children to deal with a colossal kamikaze threatening to drop itself right on top of Tokyo-3.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E13 - Lilliputian Hitcher
1.plot: A routine test involving the EVA pilots turns into a struggle for survival when a wholly new type of Angel appears and spreads inside NERV HQ. This new, computer-like angel threatens to set off the self-destruct for the entire facility, leaving Dr. Ritsuko Akagi in a race against time to save the GeoFront and destroy the Angel.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E14 - Weaving A Story (1)
1.plot: In the first half of the episode, a clip show is presented to the Human Instrumentality Committee of Seele, reviewing the attacks of all Angels up to this point. The second part includes a poem in which Rei contemplates her own existence, and a cross-compatibility test between Rei's and Shinji's EVAs.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E15 - Those Women Longed for the Touch of Others' Lips, and Thus Invited Their Kisses.
1.plot: It seems like it's an important day for nearly everyone at NERV. Misato and Ritsuko are going to a wedding; Shinji and Gendo are visiting Yui's grave; Asuka has a date. However, important things will spring from these seemingly mundane events.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E16 - Splitting of the Breast
1.plot: Shinji beats Asuka in a synch test, much to her annoyance. Not too long after, the EVAs are dispatched to deal with a mysterious apparition, and EVA-01 is sucked into a shadowlike blackness that materializes out of nothingness from under it. While an emergency operation to rescue the captured EVA is concocted, Shinji goes on a trip into the depths of his own consciousness...

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E17 - Fourth Children
1.plot: A NERV branch in Nevada is obliterated in a catastrophic accident, and NERV headquarters prepares to station a new Evangelion in Japan. The Fourth Child is selected, unbeknownst to Shinji.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E18 - Ambivalence
1.plot: Evangelion Unit-03 arrives from the United States. However, its activation experiment brings out NERV's worst nightmare when it turns out to have been infected by the Thirteenth Angel. The other EVAs are dispatched to battle the Angel-infected abomination... even at the risk of killing its helpless pilot.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E19 - Introjection
1.plot: Enraged over Touji's near-death at the hands of his own EVA, Shinji refuses to pilot an Evangelion again and prepares to leave Tokyo-3 for good. He is forced to reconsider that decision when an immensely destructive new Angel attacks just as he is about to leave...

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E20 - Weaving A Story (2): Oral Stage
1.plot: Shinji achieved an unprecedented 400% synchronization ratio with EVA-01 during the battle with Zeruel, to horrible effect. With the EVA having ascended to the status of a living God and Shinji absorbed inside it, Ritsuko unsuccessfully attempts to recover him.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E21 - He Was Aware that He Was Still a Child.
1.plot: Kouzou Fuyutsuki is kidnapped and interrogated by Seele, who are horrified over the results of the last encounter with an Angel. He recounts his past, providing flashbacks into the creation of Nerv. The pasts of Misato Katsuragi, Ritsuko Akagi, Rei Ayanami and Yui Ikari are also revealed. Ryouji Kaji, meanwhile, decides to find out the truth, no matter the cost.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E22 - Don't Be.
1.plot: Asuka's synch rate is on a downward spiral after her defeat at the hands of the Fourteenth Angel, Zeruel, and her frustration with Rei, Shinji, Misato and Ryouji is on the rise. Angrier and more disturbed than ever, she is forced to relive her dark, traumatic past during the encounter with the Fifteenth Angel, Arael.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E23 - Rei III
1.plot: Asuka sinks into deep depression after Arael's mental probing, and is unable to pilot when the new Angel Armisael arrives. Armisael begins physically fusing with EVA-00 and threatens to do the same to EVA-01, prompting Rei to sacrifice herself to save Shinji, only to appear alive soon afterwards.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E24 - The Beginning and the End, or 'Knockin' on Heaven's Door'
1.plot: Too frightened to face Misato or Rei, Shinji runs away yet again, only to meet and strike a friendship with Kaworu Nagisa, the replacement pilot for EVA-02. Kaworu's openness and friendliness provide much-needed comfort for the disturbed Shinji. However, suspicions abound over Kaworu's incredible synchronization abilities.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E25 - Do You Love Me?
1.plot: Instrumentality has begun, and now its inner process, the joining of all souls into one, will be depicted. The episode is primarily driven by dialogue, the background usually complete darkness. White text often appears on a black screen, an omniscient voice questioning the characters.

1.title: FR - Neon Genesis Evangelion - S01E26 - Take Care of Yourself.
1.plot: Instrumentality continues. The focus is primarily on Shinji now, as he learns to accept the individual’s ability to shape their world, and how the self cannot exist without others to define it.

meta.plot: At the turn of the century, the Angels returned to Earth, seeking to wipe out humanity in an apocalyptic fury. Devastated, mankind's last remnants moved underground to wait for the day when the Angels would come back to finish the job. Fifteen years later, that day has come... but this time, humanity is ready to fight back with terrifying bio-mechanical weapons known as the Evangelions. Watch as Shinji, Rei, Asuka and the rest of the mysterious shadow agency Nerv battle to save earth from total annihilation.

In an alternate version of the present, Tokyo has been decimated by a shocking terrorist attack, and the only hint to the identity of the culprit is a bizarre video uploaded to the internet. The police, baffled by this cryptic clue, are powerless to stop the paranoia spreading across the population. While the world searches for a criminal mastermind to blame for this tragedy, two mysterious children - children who shouldn't even exist - masterfully carry out their heinous plan. Cursed to walk through this world with the names Nine and Twelve, the two combine to form "Sphinx," a clandestine entity determine to wake the people from their slumber - and pull the trigger on this world.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E01 - Falling
1.plot: Lisa Mishima is having problems at school and at home when two mysterious boys transfer to her school, and she is caught up in a terrorist attack.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E02 - Call & Response
1.plot: While the police work hard to analyze Sphinx's first attack, Sphinx uploads a new video. Will they solve the new riddle in time?

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E03 - Search & Destroy
1.plot: Shibazaki joins the team working on the Sphinx Case while Sphinx tries to confirm suspicions of their own with their next riddle.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E04 - Break Through
1.plot: In response to earlier provocation, Shibazaki is challenged with a riddle this time only he can solve in order to stop the bomb from blasting but at one condition, no one can cheat.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E05 - Hide & Seek
1.plot: As Lisa recuperates at Nine and Twelve's place, Sphinx sets another bomb and posts another riddle, but things don't go as planned this time.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E06 - Ready or Not
1.plot: Five takes over the battle of wits against Nine and Twelve as Lisa tries to find her place in their group, but Shibazaki isn't happy sitting by idly.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E07 - Deuce
1.plot: The game is on at the airport and lives are at stake as Shibazaki and his team stumble into the middle of Nine and Five's dangerous game of chess.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E08 - My Fair Lady
1.plot: After the incident at the airport, Nine and Twelve are forced to abandon their hideout, and Shibazaki is suspended but keeps searching for the truth.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E09 - Highs & Lows
1.plot: Twelve goes off to save Lisa while Shibazaki and Hamura learn more about the Athena Plan and the Rising Peace Academy.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E10 - Helter Skelter
1.plot: Things come to a head as Nine and Twelve go their separate ways and Shibazaki talks to Mamiya, the man behind the Athena Plan.

1.title: FR - Terror in Resonance - S01E11 - VON
1.plot: Tokyo is in a state of emergency as the country readies itself for the atomic bomb explosion. Will the mystery of Sphinx finally be solved?

meta.plot: In his funky California beach enclave, Chip's the go-to guy for personal insights. But he isn't quite as enlightened when it comes to his own baggage.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E01 - Westminster
1.plot: Venice, California resident and recovering alcoholic Chip styles himself a self-help guru but struggles to keep track of his own lies and half-truths.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E02 - Horizon
1.plot: Finally confronting his landlord, Chip gets some clarity on his store situation, then inadvertently helps Dennis and London's first date go smoothly.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E03 - Rose
1.plot: Chip visits his TV-star ex-wife Tilly in an effort to save his store. Dennis and London have a dinner date. Chip disappoints Kara one time too many.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E04 - Palms
1.plot: A trip to Palm Springs for a visit with his mother Jackie turns into an emotional rollercoaster ride for Dennis and fellow travelers Chip and London.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E05 - Electric
1.plot: Chip sponsors Topher, a new support group member who makes a surprising offer. Dennis helps Kara with a legal problem. London and Chip have a moment.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E06 - Shell
1.plot: After a fight with Dennis, Chip crashes with Cooler. Dennis and Kara grow closer. A secret is revealed about London.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E07 - 7th
1.plot: Still reeling from a revelation about London, Chip takes a hard line in negotiations with Tilly to save Venice. Dennis harbors feelings for Kara.

1.title: FR - Flaked - S01E08 - Sunset
1.plot: Topher makes a vengeful move that will impact all of Venice. Dennis learns the truth about two of Chip's more significant and long-running deceptions.

2.title: FR - Flaked - S02E01 - Day One
2.plot: Thanks to his advocacy for Topher's hotel, Chip is now an outcast. Dennis conceals his recovery from Rosa, a new lover interest. Cooler gets evicted.

2.title: FR - Flaked - S02E02 - Day Two
2.plot: Chip takes London out on an unconventional "first date" and meets her spiritual guru, Karel. Dennis discovers a link between Rosa and George.

2.title: FR - Flaked - S02E03 - Day Three
2.plot: His housing issues unresolved, Chip crashes with a recent acquaintance. George asks Dennis to help him reconnect with Rosa. Cooler has a revelation.

2.title: FR - Flaked - S02E04 - Day Four
2.plot: Making amends to Dennis and Jerry pays off in unexpected ways for Chip. Cooler throws himself a birthday party. Rosa learns the truth about Dennis.

2.title: FR - Flaked - S02E05 - Day Five
2.plot: London vanishes, sending Chip on a desperate search to replace her. Dennis panics when a fall off the wagon derails his sobriety and his business.

2.title: FR - Flaked - S02E06 - Day Six
2.plot: Chip and Cooler rescue Dennis from an alcoholic spiral, then head north to stop London's wedding -- a quest that ends with a startling revelation.

meta.plot: It's 1996 in a town called Boring, Oregon, where high school misfits in the AV and drama clubs brave the ups and downs of teenage emotions in the VHS era.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E01 - Plutonium
1.plot: As a new year begins at Boring High School, Oregon, freshman Luke impresses his friends by inviting sophomore Kate, the principal's daughter, to his house.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E02 - Maybe You're Gonna Be the One That Saves Me
1.plot: Luke plans his next move with Kate, who's having a rough day at school, and discovers VHS tapes that bring back emotional memories.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E03 - All That and a Bag of Chips
1.plot: A pulled fire alarm lands Luke in detention and his mother in Principal Ken's office. The irate drama club plots revenge on the AV kids.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E04 - Romeo & Juliet in Space
1.plot: Luke presents a proposal to the drama club in an effort to make peace. Sherry and Ken engage in some impromptu immature behavior.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E05 - What the Hell's a Zarginda?
1.plot: Luke tries to help Kate work through her feelings. Oliver and Luke hold film auditions. Emaline takes Kate shopping. Ken invites Luke over for dinner.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E06 - Sometimes I Hear My Voice
1.plot: Luke and Kate attempt to get to Portland for a concert. Ken and Sherry partake in contraband that was confiscated from a student.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E07 - Cheesecake to a Fat Man
1.plot: Luke wallows in anger, while Ken and Kate bask in liberation. Tyler's proficiency with dial-up internet leads to unusual drug experimentation.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E08 - I Just Wanna Be Anybody
1.plot: The Boring High crew takes an emotionally exhausting trip to California to shoot a scene for the movie - minus one important member.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E09 - My Friends Have Been Eaten by Spiders
1.plot: An exasperated Luke scrambles to finish the movie. Kate has important conversations with Emaline and Luke. McQuaid gets a sudden boost of confidence.

1.title: FR - Everything Sucks! - S01E10 - We Were Merely Freshmen
1.plot: The Boring community comes together for the movie premiere, where angst simmers even as wounds heal and relationships blossom.

1.title: FR - L’arme du crime - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - L’arme du crime - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - L’arme du crime - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - L’arme du crime - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: The documentary takes viewers through Janet Jackson's life and career, contain never-before-seen footage, and feature home videos from the legendary artist. Jackson discusses her controversial 2004 Super Bowl halftime show performance with Justin Timberlake, her father Joe Jackson, the death of her brother Michael Jackson, and more.

1.title: FR - JANET JACKSON. - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: At the age of seven, Janet’s father, tough talking Joe Jackson, puts her to work in the family show. Her father never asked if she wanted to be a performer, so it’s down to Janet to find her own path.

1.title: FR - JANET JACKSON. - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: After two unsuccessful albums and a failed marriage, Janet decides that if she’s going to have a musical career, it will be on her own terms; she has to take control of her life.

1.title: FR - JANET JACKSON. - S01E03 - Part 3
1.plot: Janet signs multi-million dollar sponsorship contracts, lands leading roles in feature films, and becomes a sex-icon. But with news of Michael’s accusations, her world comes crashing down.

1.title: FR - JANET JACKSON. - S01E04 - Part 4
1.plot: Following the nipplegate controversy, Janet finds herself blacklisted. Refusing to accept defeat, friends and fans fight for her right to be recognised as a true performing legend.

meta.plot: Barrister Ingrid Lewis defends John Webster against stalking charges, only for Webster to turn on her.

1.title: FR - The Killing Kind - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Following a trauma, Defence Barrister Ingrid Lewis is rebuilding her life when tragedy strikes and her friend and mentor dies. Ingrid believes she is a target and questions if John Webster, her former client turned stalker, is back in her life.

1.title: FR - The Killing Kind - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Ingrid sets out to prove Belinda's death wasn't an accident. Detective Nash dismisses Ingrid's theories, but Webster says he believes her and can help. Ingrid receives an unsettling gift and finds herself in a dangerous situation.

1.title: FR - The Killing Kind - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Ingrid hides away, determined to work out what is happening, but when her ex-fiancé turns up she wonders if she can trust him. Ingrid visits a former colleague, to help her investigation, but events take an unexpected turn.

1.title: FR - The Killing Kind - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Ingrid believes a past case may provide the answer. Detective Nash warns Ingrid off pursuing her own investigation. Webster tells her to trust him, helping take Ingrid another step closer to identifying the killer, but then events turn dangerous.

1.title: FR - The Killing Kind - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Ingrid challenges Webster for concealing information and visits a lonely place, and when Detective Nash arrives his conduct seems suspicious.

1.title: FR - The Killing Kind - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Ingrid is forced to re-examine the original Webster legal case she worked on. In an explosive final twist, Ingrid must fight to right the wrongs to ensure that justice is done.

meta.plot: When there is a mysterious disappearance on an outback cattle station, Detective Jay Swan is assigned to investigate. Working with local cop Emma James, Jay’s investigation uncovers a past injustice that threatens the fabric of the whole community.

1.title: FR - Mystery Road - S01E01 - Gone
1.plot: Detective Jay Swan clashes with local cop Emma James when he arrives to investigate the mysterious disappearance of two young men from an outback cattle station.

1.title: FR - Mystery Road - S01E03 - Chasing Ghosts
1.plot: As time runs out to find the missing boys, pressure mounts on Shevorne to reveal what she knows.

1.title: FR - Mystery Road - S01E04 - Silence
1.plot: Marley's safe return has brought relief and elation to the town and his family – but where is Reese? And what is Marley hiding?

1.title: FR - Mystery Road - S01E05 - The Waterhole
1.plot: Reese's murder sends Jay on a desperate journey to clear Marley's name before it's too late, which leads Emma to uncover a far greater crime.

1.title: FR - Mystery Road - S01E06 - The Truth
1.plot: In a race against time, Jay and Emma have to prove who really murdered Reese... or Marley will be gaoled for the crime.

2.title: FR - Mystery Road - S02E01 - The Road
2.plot: A decapitated body washes up in the mangroves, drawing Jay Swan to the furtive township of Gideon. It seems drug-related but is it also familiar? Partnered with local cop, Fran, Jay must unlock what the community knows.

2.title: FR - Mystery Road - S02E02 - The Flare
2.plot: Jay and Fran have Dylan on the hook, until a local businessman steps in and bails him out. Jay takes matters into his own hands to rectify the situation. Fran's world comes crashing down as a long-held fear suddenly surfaces.

2.title: FR - Mystery Road - S02E03 - Artefacts
2.plot: Struggling with Mary's new relationship, Jay reluctantly uses Simon's help to narrow in on the drugs and murder investigation. With the discovery of the bones, Fran is determined to reopen Zoe's case on her own.

2.title: FR - Mystery Road - S02E04 - Broken
2.plot: With the case apparently solved Jay is being encouraged to leave town, but something isn't adding up. Jay begins to question the motives of all those around him. Fran is dealt another blow in the search for justice for Zoe.

2.title: FR - Mystery Road - S02E05 - To Live with the Living
2.plot: Now in danger, Mary must lean into Jay for help. Jay struggles to keep Mary safe as the threat closes in on both of them. Fran feels betrayed as she digs deeper into Zoe's disappearance.

2.title: FR - Mystery Road - S02E06 - What You Do Now
2.plot: Jay is lured into a trap to rescue Mary and an epic gun battle erupts. Will Jay be able to survive this and serve justice? Fran finally gets answers about Zoe and some closure, but it won't be in the form she expects.

3.title: FR - Mystery Road - S03E01 -
FR - Mystery Road - S03E02 -
FR - Mystery Road - S03E03 -
FR - Mystery Road - S03E04 -
FR - Mystery Road - S03E05 -
FR - Mystery Road - S03E06 -

meta.plot: The Hitter, the Hacker, the Grifter and the Thief are together again, this time with help from a new tech genius and corporate fixer, to take on a new kind of villain. From the man who created an opioid crisis from the comfort of his boardroom to the shadowy security firm that helps hide dangerous secrets for a price - when someone needs help, they provide... Leverage.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E01 - The Too Many Rembrandts Job
1.plot: When the team comes together to help Sophie, they intercept guilt-ridden corporate fixer Harry and decide to help him take down an evil billionaire making money on the back of an opioid crisis.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E02 - The Panamanian Monkey Job
1.plot: With a new team member on board plus the arrival of Hardison’s genius foster sister, the team heads to Panama to pull an elaborate heist before an evil billionaire can get his money and flee to a non-extradition country.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E03 - The Rollin' on the River Job
1.plot: The Leverage team takes on a greedy riverboat casino owner, before he can bulldoze the homes of longtime New Orleans natives for his planned expansion.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E04 - The Tower Job
1.plot: One member of the team seeks redemption and justice by convincing Leverage to con a developer out of an entire luxury apartment building.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E05 - The Paranormal Hacktivity Job
1.plot: When a woman believes she is being haunted and runs from her home in terror, Sophie leads Breanna and Parker through a con to convince the two real estate scammers responsible to target Leverage HQ.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E06 - The Card Game Job
1.plot: The Leverage team dives into the world of a high fantasy collectible card game with a devoted following to take down a pharmaceutical bad boy who is price-gouging drugs to fund his own house of cards.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E07 - The Double-Edged Sword Job
1.plot: The team takes on a brilliant software developer who is selling a groundbreaking facial recognition system that threatens everyone’s privacy except his own.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E08 - The Mastermind Job
1.plot: Sophie must keep her feelings in check when she discovers that someone has written a memoir of the team, casting himself as Nate – which leads an exiled criminal to kidnap Harry and “Fake Nate,” forcing the Leverage team to pull a heist.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E09 - The Bucket Job
1.plot: The Leverage team’s Holiday good deed goes awry when their attempt to give a small-town librarian the spy-thriller adventure of a lifetime is interrupted by a shadowy spy organization.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E10 - The Unwellness Job
1.plot: The Leverage team sets out to discredit a lifestyle and wellness guru targeting desperate people and peddling snake oil instead of actual medicine.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E11 - The Jackal Job
1.plot: The Leverage team explores the failing memory of a legendary grifter to try and find her greatest score before her abusive Elder Guardian gets his hands on it and takes over her life.

1.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S01E12 - The Golf Job
1.plot: An old friend visits, sparking a self-doubting Harry to uncover an unlikely client on the links at his exclusive golf club.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E01 - The Debutante Job
2.plot: The team pulls Harry back into the fold to help a journalist investigating the corrupt president of a small eastern European nation. But when the journalist is grabbed, our team has to infiltrate a London Ball to extract him.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E02 - The One Man's Trash Job
2.plot: The crew finds out that a shady plastics exporter whose dumping threatens local waters is smuggling black market antiquities on his barges, and plots to relieve him of his ill-gotten gains.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E03 - The Tournament Job
2.plot: The team has to infiltrate an e-sports tournament to stop a ruthless team owner from mentally and physically abusing his young players.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E04 - The Date Night Job
2.plot: While staging a date-night experience for Parker & Hardison at an ultra-secure freeport facility, the team comes across another heist in progress and must stop it to save the life of a 13-year-old boy.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E05 - The Walk in the Woods Job
2.plot: While investigating the mysterious death of Eliot's friend, the Leverage team infiltrate an infamous enclave of power to take down the corrupt head of a Private Security Company.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E06 - The Fractured Job
2.plot: Eliot returns to his hometown and discovers that the run-off from an oil fracking company is now poisoning the water and the crew plots to take down the powerful man behind it all.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E07 - The Big Rig Job
2.plot: The team infiltrates a trucking company to stop a pair of siblings from stealing their father's company and forcing his employees into indentured servitude.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E08 - The Turkish Prisoner Job
2.plot: The team uses the true story of a World War I P.O.W. escape to free an innocent man framed by a pair of dirty cops.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E09 - The Pyramid Job
2.plot: Prompted by and old friend of Sophie's, the team takes on a husband-wife couple who run a multi-level marketing pyramid scheme that preys on young mothers, emotionally and financially.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E10 - The Work Study Job
2.plot: After a college professor steals a discovery from his grad student, the Leverage team has to take him down, returning the credit and reputation to the brilliant young woman in the process.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E11 - The Belly of the Beast Job
2.plot: The team reluctantly enlists the help of a naïve but ambitious assistant to take down a predatory music producer, in an episode told entirely from the POV of a regular person.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E12 - The Museum Makeover Job (1)
2.plot: When a Leverage International team's museum heist goes awry, our crew goes in to finish the job, ultimately realizing they've been lured into a trap by a treacherous old friend.

2.title: FR - Leverage: Redemption - S02E13 - The Crowning Achievement Job (2)
2.plot: When a formidable enemy steals the Maharaja's Crown and traps the crew in the museum, the Leverage team must find a way out and the crown before they go down for the crime.

meta.plot: Police Captain César Wagner is a compulsive hypochondriac, obsessed with his work. His singular, distinctive style unsettles not only his suspects but also the members of his squad.

1.title: FR - César Wagner - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: On his first case, César investigates the apparently accidental death of a rising local football star with the help of the medical examiner, Dr. Beaumont.

1.title: FR - César Wagner - S01E02 - Blood and Waters
1.plot: César is called to a curious crime scene: a young woman has been found completely drained of blood. The victim is a Romanian delegate to the European Court of Human Rights. Did someone say vampire?

1.title: FR - César Wagner - S01E03 - Dark Designs
1.plot: Two people are found dead within hours of each other near the Museum of Modern Art. Evidence shows that they knew each other and were both linked to a celebrated local designer, Peter Breck — Dr. Beaumont’s husband.

1.title: FR - César Wagner - S01E04 - All the Rhine Gold
1.plot: A dead man in a Nazi costume leads investigators to Neo-Nazi circles at the heart of the University of Strasbourg — and to the legend of the Rhine gold.

1.title: FR - César Wagner - S01E05 - A Finger of Mystery
1.plot: Someone finds a human finger in a bottle of beer from a local brewery — owned by César's cousins. He is determined to solve the mystery before the local press gets wind of it.

1.title: FR - César Wagner - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - César Wagner - S01E07 - Episode 7

2.title: FR - César Wagner - S02E01 -
FR - César Wagner - S02E02 -
FR - César Wagner - S02E03 -

meta.plot: While fighting an intense inter-galactic war, a mecha pilot is accidentally warped into a space-time neither he nor his computer recognize. After waking up from a long-time hibernation, he finds himself trapped on a planet, with human residents talking in an unknown form of language, using inferior technologies, and - most shocking to him - naturally breathable air.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E01 - Castaway
1.plot: Humans have left Earth and have made a paradise in space, Avalon, as humanity's new home and created the Galactic Alliance of Humanity to expand their journey through it. A threat known as Hideauze appeared before the Alliance and a war rages between them. Second Lieutenant Ledo and his A.I. Robot Partner Chamber joins the latest attack against the Hideauze. The attack ultimately ends in failure and a retreat order is issued, but Ledo is unable to return and is cast out into space. 6 months later, the salvage ship Gargantia retrieves Chamber, but are unable to take it apart. After everyone leaves, Ledo decides to take a look around and gather intel on where he is, but is soon chased and kidnaps one of the crew, Amy. He is chased outside to find out he is on a habitable planet, which shocks him enough to release Amy. The crew pins him on a pylon, and he calls Chamber, which the entire crew is surprised to see moving and floating.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E02 - The Planet of Origin
1.plot: Deciding to try and open a dialogue with these people, Ledo stays pinned to the pylon. They ask to talk to the Alliance in charge, but the crew have no idea what he is talking about and they believe that Chamber, who is translating, has another person inside. As Ridget, the commander, and the crew try to decide what to do, Amy gives Red food and begins talking. She explains that this is Earth, and when it was frozen over, some humans escaped to the stars while others stayed. Eventually, the ice melted and became a vast ocean, in which many people form fleets to salvage old technology from below. Looking for other items advanced technology, Ridget sends Bellows to the point where Chamber and Ledo Were found, and her ship is attacked by pirates. Amy asks Ledo to help them, and he agrees with the intention of earning their trust. Ledo boards Chamber and efficiently eliminate all enemies with no harm to Bellows' ship and crew, as Amy and the others watch in awe at its destructive power.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E03 - The Villainous Empress
1.plot: After Chamber wiped out all of the pirates that were threatening Bellows and her people, Ledo is perceived as a menace and kept under guard by the crew of the Gargantia. And perhaps rightfully so, as the pirate armada that is Empress Lukkage's fleet is racing towards the Gargantia Fleet with bloody revenge in mind...

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E04 - The Flute of Recollection
1.plot: In order to compensate for the damage to the hangar they caused, Chamber is put to work hauling around heavy cargo, but that leaves Ledo on the sidelines with nothing to do. Amy takes him around the fleet and introduces Ledo to the knowledgeable Dr. Oldham as well as her sickly but wise younger brother, Bebel.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E05 - Calm Day
1.plot: Amy tries to help Ledo find a job and introduces him to a number of different industries aboard Gargantia, but he's just not able to land one. Then the wind dies down and the waves cease, making it a "Calm Day", during which time the fleet shuts down so a lot of repair work can be done. But for non-repair-related personnel, it's time to take a breather. Pinion invites Ledo, Amy and her friends to a BBQ party. Everything seems to be going smoothly...

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E06 - Festival
1.plot: Ledo decides to work as a fisherman, but he finds himself unable to pilot a regular Yunboro and sends Chamber to assist the other fishermen instead. Pinion then invites Ledo for lunch and offers him a position at his crew, but Bellows appears and also offers him a job at her salvage team. In the occasion, Amy and her friends dance to the crowd and Ledo mistakes a cooked octopus for a Hideauze and is about to shoot it until the others assure him that it is not an enemy, but food instead. Chamber, who finds himself causing a mess among the fishermen asks for Ledo's help and he uses his mecha to properly help the workers have a nice catch. Later in the night, Amy spends some time alone with Ledo, and a lighting puts him in state of alert and he arms himself to defend her, until she calms him down and dances to him upon his request.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E07 - A Soldier's Fate
1.plot: When Ledo has an encounter with a whalesquid undersea, he attacks and kills it because of its similar appearance to the Hideauze. Little did he know that whalesquid are considered sacred, so murdering one is taboo, and soon the whole ship is in an uproar over it. Ledo, however, believes that whalesquid are Hideauze and he's determined to carry out his mission by slaughtering more of them before they decide to target humans on Earth. Just as Amy tries to stop Ledo, a huge pod of whalesquid approaches the fleet...

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E08 - Separation
1.plot: On his deathbed, Fleet Commander Fairlock entrusts Ridget with Gargantia. Meanwhile, Chamber finally gets a fix on the location of the Galactic Alliance, but they're so far away that Ledo will never be able to get home. As preparations are underway for Fairlock's funeral, Shipmaster Flange announces that he's leaving Gargantia. Ridget struggles to keep other Shipmasters from following suit. Pinion has plans of pillaging the ocean floor, so he joins the like-minded Flange. Amy is sad when two people she cares about are leaving as well, Melty and Ledo...

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E09 - Deep Sea Secret
1.plot: Ledo and Chamber go deep sea-diving to exterminate Earth's Hideauze.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E10 - Island of Ambition
1.plot: With all the Hideauze in the area killed, Pinion and his crew manage to salvage ancient technology not seen anywhere, but instead of sharing it with the rest of mankind as originally planned, Pinion claims that they have the right to keep it to themselves, and sends a message to the other fleets warning them to keep out of their territory. As the message reaches the Gargantia, the fleet had just reorganized itself and there is the concern that other ships may leave to join Pinion's side as well. With the technology salvaged by them, Pinion's fleet defeats a hostile pirate crew who in return asks for a place among them, and he agrees. Ledo, still in shock upon learning the truth about the Hideauze hears from Chamber that the lightbugs that mankind use as power source were also created by the Hideauze as well which further proves their discovery.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E11 - Supreme Ruler of Terror
1.plot: Kugel contacts Ledo and instructs him to return to his side. Upon reuniting with him, Ledo learns that Kugel is struck with some disease that does not allow him to leave his cockpit. When Ledo tells him what he learned about the Hideauze, Kugel reveals that he always knew about it, just like the high command of the Gallactic Alliance, and despite that, he insists to fight them, and was all this time organizing a powerful fleet with a militaristic society with that purpose, whose intention is to rally all the humans on Earth under them. Pinion is summoned to Kugel's fleet, and much to his surprise, he is taken there by Lukkage, who is now working under him, and is approached by Kugel's Machine Caliber Striker, who offers him a post as an engineer to develop weapons for the fleet. The rest of his companions is also forced to join Kugel's fleet as well.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E12 - Moment of Decision
1.plot: Kugel's fleet prepares itself to attack the Gargantia. Ledo tries to dissuade Kugel with no success while Pinion is approached by Lukkage who plans a rebellion at the fleet. Confused about what he should do, Ledo witness the people of the fleet throwing their sick and weak on the water and fearing that the same will be done to Bebel, he decides to confront Kugel by himself. Agreeing with Ledo's decision, Pinion equips Chamber with some extra weapons, while Lukkage and Flange make preparations for the impending uprising. Melty is instructed by Ledo to deliver a message to the Gargantia, but she almost faints by traveling so far by herself and is rescued in the nick of time by Amy. Informed about Kugel's attack, the crew of the Gargantia consider to abandon the fleet as Ledo suggested, but Amy insists that they should do something to help Ledo as well, and Oldham instructs Ridget to make use of the special key Fairlock entrusted her.

1.title: FR - Suisei no Gargantia - S01E13 - Legend of the Verdurous Planet
1.plot: Striker claims that it was following Kugel's instructions after his death and eventually reached the conclusion that to ensure stability to the fleet, it was necessary for the humans to view it as their god. Both Ledo and Chamber reject Striker's offer to join its side and decide to destroy it. Unable to defeat Striker in their current condition, Ledo decides to merge his nerve system with Chamber's interface to increase its capabilites at the cost of his life, but Amy appears soon after to tell him that he does not need to fight alone. Meanwhile at the Gargantia, Ridget uses the key to activate the mass driver stored inside the main ship and uses it to bombard the enemy fleet while Pinion evacuates his crew and intends to take the enemies assaulting his ship with them, but is saved in the last moment by Lukkage. Striker then decides to attack the Gargantia but Ledo and Chamber pursue it.

FR - Break Point - S01E01 - The Maverick
1.plot: Nick Kyrgios, whose reputation as tennis's "bad boy" threatens to overshadow his talent, fights to find joy on the court at the 2022 Australian Open.

1.title: FR - Break Point - S01E02 - Take the Crown
1.plot: Novak Djokovic's ban from the Australian Open leaves an opportunity for a newcomer to rise to the top. Can Italy's Matteo Berrettini step up?

1.title: FR - Break Point - S01E03 - California Dreaming
1.plot: The Indian Wells tournament means big money, big names — and for California native Taylor Fritz, a potentially career-changing match against Rafael Nadal.

1.title: FR - Break Point - S01E04 - Great Expectations
1.plot: Spanish star Paula Badosa feels the pressure of entering the Madrid Open as a hometown favorite, while Tunisia's Ons Jabeur looks to make history.

1.title: FR - Break Point - S01E05 - King of Clay
1.plot: Two talented young players, Félix Auger-Aliassime of Montreal and Norway's Casper Ruud, face reigning "king of clay" Rafael Nadal at the French Open.

2.title: FR - Break Point - S02E01 - The Curse
2.plot: The 2023 Australian Open kicks off as Nick Kyrgios seeks payback, Aryna Sabalenka pursues a dream and players from last season exit the tournament early.

2.title: FR - Break Point - S02E02 - The Future is Yours
2.plot: Led by Carlos Alcaraz and Holger Rune, a new generation of young players looks to take down the old guard - starting with Novak Djokovic.

2.title: FR - Break Point - S02E03 - Friend or Foe
2.plot: At the 2023 Indian Wells tournament, Taylor Fritz tries to defend his No. 1 American title against friendly rivals Frances Tiafoe and Tommy Paul.

2.title: FR - Break Point - S02E04 - Unfinished Business
2.plot: After a horrific injury at the 2022 French Open, Alexander Zverev attempts a comeback and faces a formidable opponent in Daniil Medvedev.

2.title: FR - Break Point - S02E05 - Now or Never
2.plot: For perennial top 10 players Jessica Pegula and Maria Sakkari, it's time to put a W on the board. But nerves and bad weather make for brutal matches.

2.title: FR - Break Point - S02E06 - Becoming the One
2.plot: With pressure at an all-time high, Coco Gauff and Frances Tiafoe fight for greatness at the 2023 US Open. Who will serve a victory — or stumble in a loss?

meta.plot: Travel alongside some of the world's most talented tennis players as they swing for greatness and Grand Slams through an action-packed season.

Seth Davenport is masquerading as a small town Iowa preacher in the hopes of starting a full-blown insurrection against the status quo, unaware that an industrialist tycoon has hired a professional strikebreaker to stop the uprising by any means necessary. An epic saga of the secret history of the 1930’s American heartland, chronicling the mythic conflict and bloody struggle between big money and the downtrodden, God and greed, charlatans, and prophets.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E02 - Which Side Are You On?
1.plot: As Seth and the farmers ward off the treacherous Black Legion vigilante group, Creeley works to learn more about his brother’s new life and the woman he shares it with.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E03 - One Penny
1.plot: When the local farms face foreclosure, Seth and Amelia must find a way to win them back. Creeley and Bessie run afoul of the Black Legion.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E04 - The Emperor of Ice Cream
1.plot: Negotiations commence between the farmers and the bank. But things turn bloody when Creeley divides the farmers.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E05 - Den of Lost Souls
1.plot: When a traveling carnival comes to Holden, a collection of new faces put Seth and Creeley on their toes, but it’s a friend from the past that truly shakes things up.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E06 - In Wyoming Fashion
1.plot: With banker Calvin Rumple run out of town, the local bank presents an unexpected opportunity for Seth and Lew.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E07 - A Different Species
1.plot: Creeley meets his master on an exclusive hunting retreat, but finds there is more than one game at play here. Seth infiltrates a nearby factory.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E08 - The Goodness of Men
1.plot: When Bessie discovers the grand industrial plans for Holden, Seth and Amelia must decide whether to protect her from the Black Legion.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E09 - Dark Was the Night, Cold Was the Ground
1.plot: Seth and the farmers take on the Black Legion with help from unlikely allies.

1.title: FR - Damnation - S01E10 - God's Body
1.plot: Seth and Creeley must confront the truth about their past and figure out a way to survive the rapidly arriving future.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: In the premiere, FBI agent Peter Donnelly unearths an international mystery while investigating the murder of a young American in Jerusalem.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E02 - Catch You Later
1.plot: Peter searches for the murderer while also pursuing Yussef Khalid and forms an uneasy alliance with Det. Golan Cohen while dealing with an unexpected revelation. Avram begins his journey to Israel with the red heifer and Billingham and his disciplines prepare Josh for a life-changing event.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E03 - Meet the Rosenbergs
1.plot: Peter's pursuit of Khalid dead ends and he and Cohen follow clues found in Emma's journal. Debbie takes Josh for an unauthorized outing and Avram continues his journey to Jerusalem.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E04 - Prayer of David
1.plot: Peter's discovery of an ancient coded secret leads to a race to find the final stone. Debbie faces the consequences for her attempted kidnapping of Josh. Avram is shadowed by a deadly assassin.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E05 - Emma Wilson's Father
1.plot: Peter delves into Emma's past, which leads to the discovery of a long-hidden, ancient symbol; someone from Debbie's past attempts to rescue her; and Lynn's life is put in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E06 - The Well of Souls
1.plot: Cohen arrests Emma's suspected killer; Peter makes a startling discovery; Avram and the red heifer are kidnapped in Croatia; and Billingham tries to prevent Debbie and Josh from exposing his secrets.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E07 - Trust No One
1.plot: After a startling breakthrough on the case, Peter turns to Golan for new clues; Ridell pressures Lynn to get Peter out of the country; Debbie must trade with Tad Billingham; Rabbi Lev and a partner work in the underground tunnels.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E08 - Sisters of Dinah
1.plot: Lynn suspects that there may be a mole at the consulate; Margrove and Peter both head to a convent, but they have different goals; and Debbie returns to the compound seeking vengeance.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E09 - Jehoshaphat
1.plot: An ancient religious sect is ready to enact its plan; Peter partners with unlikely allies; Lynn realizes the depth of the conspiracy while investigating Ridell; Golan tries to crack more clues from the Donaldson case; and Avram moves to protect his valuable asset.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E10 - Armageddon Protocol
1.plot: Peter races to stop the Order of Moriah's plans of destroying the Temple Mount.

1.title: FR - Dig - S01E11 -

meta.plot: When FBI Agent Peter Connelly, recently stationed in Jerusalem, begins investigating the murder of a young American, he realizes that he’s uncovered an ancient international conspiracy that threatens to change the course of human history. Certain that the dangerous prophecy is nearing fruition, Peter must race against the clock to unravel its mystery. From a remote farm in Norway, to an enigmatic compound in New Mexico, to the serpentine tunnels of Jerusalem, he searches for the truth, the revelation of which will shake the world's beliefs to its very core.

Tightly clutching his Gibson guitar, Mafuyu Satou steps out of his dark apartment to begin another day of his high school life. While taking a nap in a quiet spot on the gymnasium staircase, he has a chance encounter with fellow student Ritsuka Uenoyama, who berates him for letting his guitar's strings rust and break. Noticing Uenoyama's knowledge of the instrument, Satou pleads for him to fix it and to teach him how to play. Uenoyama eventually agrees and invites him to sit in on a jam session with his two band mates: bassist Haruki Nakayama and drummer Akihiko Kaji.

1.title: FR - Given - S01E01 - Boys in the Band
1.plot: Ritsuka Uenoyama a high school student and guitarist wants to skip gym class to nap but to his surprise fellow and unknown to him student Mafuyu Satō is in his already sleeping in his usual hiding place. During this unexpected meeting Mafuyu asks Ritsuka to repair and to teach to play his Gibson ES-330 guitar. Ritsuka declines and sets off the story of this unlikely duo. We are also introduced to Yayoi Uenoyama (Ritsuka’s older sister), and band mates Haruki Nakayama (bassist), and Akihiko Kaji (drummer).

1.title: FR - Given - S01E02 - Like Someone In Love
1.plot: Ritsuka introduces Mafuyu to his other bandmates, Haruki and Akihiko. After some convincing from the other two, Ritsuka finally agrees to teach Mafuyu how to play guitar. Mafuyu is so excited about playing guitar for the first time that he can’t hide his excitement. One day, Haruki and Akihiko tell Mafuyu the most important thing about playing music...

1.title: FR - Given - S01E03 - Somebody Else
1.plot: Ritsuka is floored after hearing Mafuyu’s singing voice and invites him into the band, but Mafuyu declines. Ritsuka just can’t take no for an answer and keeps trying to invite Mafuyu into the band, but now, Mafuyu is avoiding him. Then during band practice, Haruki asks Ritsuka to actually think about if he ever thought about how Mafuyu felt...

1.title: FR - Given - S01E04 - Fluorescent Adolescent
1.plot: Mafuyu finally decides to join the band. In order to compose a song to go along with the little tidbit that Mafuyu sang for him, Ritsuka dives back into playing guitar nonstop. Haruki is at his part-time job one day when his friend Koji Yatake comes by and asks him if he and his band would like to appear in a live show he’s putting on. Ritsuka is teaching Mafuyu guitar at school as usual and then invites Mafuyu to go look at effect pedals with him.

1.title: FR - Given - S01E05 - The Reason
1.plot: It is decided that Ritsuka and the rest of his band are doing a live show. Haruki and Akihiko go out drinking and talk about Ritsuka and Mafuyu. Since Akihiko had ridden his motorcycle into town, he asks to spend the night at Haruki’s place and Haruki thinks back on the first time they met. That was right around the time Haruki’s old band had disbanded and he had first encountered Ritsuka, who had just entered his third year of middle school...

1.title: FR - Given - S01E06 - Creep
1.plot: Ritsuka hears a rumor that the person that Mafuyu used to date had died and is a bit shaken. Ritsuka couldn’t build up the courage to ask Mafuyu about it, but then, Akihiko visits his place. Akihiko then suggests that Mafuyu write the lyrics for the song Ritsuka had made. Ritsuka was thinking the same thing, and at the next band practice, asks Mafuyu if he’d do it.

1.title: FR - Given - S01E07 - Tumbling Dice
1.plot: Ritsuka realizes how he truly feels and ends up taking out his frustrations and confusion on Mafuyu. Ritsuka ends up talking to Akihiko, who tells him that what he’s feeling is completely normal, but Ritsuka still wonders if it’s okay to admit these feelings. As Akihiko watches over Ritsuka and Mafuyu, he remembers his past with Ugetsu.

1.title: FR - Given - S01E08 - Time Is Running Out
1.plot: As the day of the live show approaches, the season heads into the rainy season and the high school boys have finals. While Mafuyu has trouble coming up with lyrics, he gets visited by his childhood friend, Hiiragi Kashima, who was also Yuki’s childhood friend.

1.title: FR - Given - S01E09 - A Winter Story
1.plot: On the day of the concert Ritsuka and Mafuyu get into a little spat and one of the strings on Mafuyu’s guitar breaks. Haruki tells Ritsuka to run and buy new strings, and Ritsuka then realizes that Mafuyu’s been trying to do everything he had been asking him to do this whole time. As he replaces Mafuyu’s strings, he tells Mafuyu how he feels. Even though there are still no lyrics done, their time to perform finally arrives, and...

1.title: FR - Given - S01E10 - Wonderwall
1.plot: Ritsuka comes to the realization that he was so worked up at the concert that he kissed Mafuyu. Ritsuka hears that Mafuyu didn’t come to school because he had a fever, so he decides to go visit him. The next day, Mafuyu is feeling better and the band gets together to celebrate his recovery and to try to figure out their future as a band and figure out a name for their band.

1.title: FR - Given - S01E11 - Song2
1.plot: Mafuyu tells Ritsuka that he likes him and Ritsuka is ecstatic to find out that they both like each other but at the same time, he remembers himself saying that band members should never bring relationships into the band. However, they both decide to talk to Haruki and Akihiko about it. Haruki gives them a lecture and Akihiko congratulates them. Meanwhile, Haruki, who likes Akihiko...

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E01 - Who's Your Daddy?
1.plot: Eight celebrity offspring volunteer to help a struggling Colorado ranch get their tourism business back on its feet.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E02 - Having a Cow
1.plot: he new ranch hands impatiently await a new arrival to the ranch, while Ebie and Myles struggle to get in the saddle.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E03 - If the Horseshoe Fits
1.plot: Romance blooms while health scares loom, making some of the cast question if ranch life is for them.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E04 - Inconceivable
1.plot: The bunkmates grapple with the aftermath of Harry and Hana’s explosive night out. Breeding season on the ranch pushes everyone to their limits. Austin feels mounting pressure while dealing with issues at home. One of the cast hits a breaking point.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E05 - Hog-ties and Hot Springs
1.plot: After a tough setback, the ranchers must come together. Austin struggles with sharing the spotlight as Harry emerges as a leader. Tay supports Harry as he opens up about some personal problems. Austin and Hana go on a date to the hot springs.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E06 - Cattle Drive-rs Ed
1.plot: The ranchers embark on an overnight practice cattle drive. Jasmin has a medical scare. Austin’s rubs Ebie the wrong way. Tensions between Harry and Austin go from smack talk to smackdown as the ranchers are left to fend for themselves for the night.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E07 - Camp Hollywood
1.plot: Harry and Austin’s rivalry hits a breaking point. The ranchers bond over their secret struggles. Owners Jerad and Justin realize they have more in common with the ranchers that meets the eye. Austin and Hana take their relationship to the next level.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E08 - Two Stepping Into Trouble
1.plot: Austin and Hana struggle to navigate their emotions. With only days before the Grand Reopening, the ranchers are put to the test to determine which jobs they'll be in charge of. Austin two-steps his way out of line.

1.title: FR - Relatively Famous: Ranch Rules - S01E09 - The Grand Re-Opening
1.plot: The Saddleback Ranch Grand Re-Opening kicks off with the roommates reeling after Austin and Hana’s confrontation. Ebie takes guests on a harrowing wagon ride, Jasmin and Tay run the trail ride solo, and the ranchers welcome guests back on the ranch.

meta.plot: From Hollywood luxury to country chic, E! rounds up eight celebrity offspring for the ride of their lives on a working ranch in Steamboat Springs, Colorado.

1.title: FR - 39-45 : L'humanité en guerre - S01E01 - The Master Race
1.plot: 1939–1940. Germany has already invaded Austria and Czechoslovakia. But it's only when Hitler takes Poland that the Second World War begins in earnest.

1.title: FR - 39-45 : L'humanité en guerre - S01E02 - World Domination
1.plot: 1941. The war is intensifying, and the Axis powers seem unstoppable. Hitler sends troops to the Soviet border to launch Operation Barbarossa.

1.title: FR - 39-45 : L'humanité en guerre - S01E03 - Turning Point
1.plot: 1942. The war has engulfed the entire world, and the Germans are winning. Until slowly, after the Battle of Stalingrad, the tide starts to turn.

1.title: FR - 39-45 : L'humanité en guerre - S01E04 - Fortress Europe
1.plot: 1943. Changing tactics, the Allies venture into enemy territory. But despite heavy bombing, they struggle to gain a foothold in "Fortress Europe."

1.title: FR - 39-45 : L'humanité en guerre - S01E05 - Invasion
1.plot: 1944. The Allies decide that invading Nazi-occupied Europe is their only option. On D-Day, 100,000 soldiers cross the Channel to take back France.

1.title: FR - 39-45 : L'humanité en guerre - S01E06 - Last Stand
1.plot: 1945. Allied forces have reached Berlin, but Germany and Japan show no signs of giving up. The US unleash one last display of military might.

meta.plot: Through vividly enhanced archival footage and voices from all sides of the conflict, this docuseries brings WWII to life like never before.

1.title: FR - Poromafia - S01E01 - Funeral
1.plot: Sameli Nelihanka returns home for her mother's funeral. He has to face his father Rouku Nelihanga and his former lover, Sara Poikkipää, whose father's murder Sameli was in prison for.

1.title: FR - Poromafia - S01E02 - Distribution of inheritance
1.plot: Sara Poikkipää inherits her father's lands from Brita Nelihanga. Sara finds out that Pieti Nelihanka is her half-brother. Rouku tries to destroy the fulfillment of the will and Brita's will.

1.title: FR - Poromafia - S01E03 - Debt
1.plot: Samel and Aghmo's debts are growing and the only option is to borrow money from Stagge, the leader of the underworld of the ice sea port.

1.title: FR - Poromafia - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Poromafia - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Poromafia - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Poromafia - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Poromafia - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Poromafia is a crime saga tinged with black humor, centered on the internal power struggle of a family ruling the northern wilderness. The northern matriarch leaves behind an inheritance, which divides the family's lands among the family. However, the wills tear the family apart as buried secrets come to light.

A motor-mouthed outsider with no memory of his past is offered a chance at a better life, but only if he can successfully deliver a mysterious package across a post-apocalyptic wasteland. With the help of a badass axe-wielding car thief, he’ll face savage marauders driving vehicles of destruction and other dangers of the open road, including a deranged clown who drives an all too familiar ice cream truck.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E01 - WLUDRV
1.plot: A motormouthed outsider is offered a better life if he can deliver a package across a wasteland.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E02 - 3RNCRCS
1.plot: John finds his mission thwarted by two unpredictable adversaries; Agent Stone recruits new members.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E03 - NTHLAW1
1.plot: John and Quiet are caught in an unexpected trap; Agent Stone tests the loyalty of his new recruits.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E04 - WHZDARE
1.plot: John makes a dangerous deal to get desperately needed supplies; Quiet questions her future.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E05 - CRZSRDS
1.plot: Quiet closes in on her search for revenge; John gets incapacitated; Sweet Tooth wreaks havoc.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E06 - DRVTHRU
1.plot: John and Quiet seek shelter from a dangerous storm in a familiar place; Quiet reflects on her past.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E07 - NUTH0UZ
1.plot: John and Quiet make a pit stop; John reunites with a contact; Sweet Tooth bonds with a follower.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E08 - EV3L1N
1.plot: John and Quiet go undercover on a rescue mission; John faces an out-of-control opponent.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E09 - R04DK11
1.plot: Unexpected allegiances begin to form; Quiet gets to work; John makes amends.

1.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S01E10 - SHNGRLA
1.plot: Everything comes to a head as John and Quiet face a difficult choice; new players enter the fray.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E01 - PRSRPNT
2.plot: While John sets out to reunite with Quiet, she's devising her own plan with Dollface.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E02 - DOLF4C3
2.plot: John uncovers shocking new details about his past; Quiet forms an unexpected new friendship.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E03 - T3STDRV
2.plot: John attempts to rekindle an old friendship; Quiet lends a helping hand to her new ally.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E04 - LZGTBZY
2.plot: John and Quiet plan a heist for vital weaponry; Sweet Tooth and Stu are dragged into the operation.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E05 - ONURMRK
2.plot: As the tournament kicks off, John and Quiet battle through a grueling qualifying round.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E06 - MKAW1SH
2.plot: John and Quiet form unexpected alliances and fuel new rivalries, navigating a world where trust is as fleeting as danger; Sweet Tooth encounters a familiar foe, reigniting old tensions.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E07 - H1TNRVN
2.plot: John and Quiet face a series of setbacks on the worst possible day; when they think things can't get worse, another obstacle tests their patience and pushes them to their limits.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E08 - SDDNDTH
2.plot: John and Quiet forge an uneasy alliance with fellow contestants as they face their most dangerous challenge yet; with time running out and the odds stacked against them, they must put aside their differences and work together to survive.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E09 - VAVAVUM
2.plot: Calypso stuns the contestants with a game-changing twist; Sweet Tooth is cut loose; John and Quiet confront their feelings.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E10 - M4YH3M
2.plot: John and Quiet face an unexpected challenge; Calypso holds an investigation that uncovers secrets.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E11 - OHLYNTE
2.plot: John and Quiet prepare for the high-stakes final round of Calypso's tournament.

2.title: FR - Twisted Metal - S02E12 - NUY3ARZ
2.plot: Amid unexpected twists and turns, life-and-death choices are made as only one can emerge victorious.

meta.plot: In the desolate hinterlands of Tamil Nadu, a stranded urbanite enlists the help of three locals to find his missing family believed to have been abducted by nefarious beings of a cursed village. Meanwhile, a maniacal heir to a pharma empire sends a group of mercenaries to the same village to retrieve something long forgotten. Will they come out of this terror-stricken night alive?

1.title: FR - The Village - S01E01 - Detour
1.plot: It’s 2005. A van full of people traveling from Navamalai to a city nearby is forced to take a detour through the village of Kattiyal. The van goes missing in the forests, leaving Sakthivel and Karunagam bereft with grief at the loss of their children. In the present day, Gautham and his family set off on a road trip one fateful night when a detour down the same route changes their lives forever.

1.title: FR - The Village - S01E02 - Mission: Kattiyal
1.plot: When Gautham manages to find his way back along with a reluctant Shakthivel, Karunagam and Peter, his car is nowhere to be found nor his family with all signs of abduction leading them to the dreaded Kattiyal. Meanwhile, Exogenyx’s heir, Prakash’s mercenaries have landed on the coast of Kattiyal and set off into the forest on their mission.

1.title: FR - The Village - S01E03 - Deeper into the Abyss
1.plot: The mercenaries led by Farhan make their way through the forests as Farhan realizes that Jagan is holding back Prakash’s actual plans. Karunagam reveals the secrets behind Kattiyal and its devastated state, Shakthi's bigoted father, Sairaj, and his descent into madness. The four men venture deeper into Kattiyal only to be attacked by mutant-like creatures that lead them to fall into a cavern.

1.title: FR - The Village - S01E04 - Sins of the Fathers
1.plot: As Gautham and the gang realize they are in the old mining caverns of Kattiyal, they head deeper in and stumble into Sairaj’s new lair. The mercenaries enter the abandoned factory and find their way down to the underground lab, where they encounter a grotesque prayer altar made by the mutants.

1.title: FR - The Village - S01E05 - Closure
1.plot: Meanwhile, Gautham and his group barely escape the gruesome mutant giant Vettaiyan and stumble upon a horrific tribute in the caverns for the Mother-Goddess that causes Shakthivel to spiral. The group then manages to find Gautham’s family only to be on the run from the mutants.

1.title: FR - The Village - S01E06 - Red Alert
1.plot: With many lives lost, the mercenaries and Gautham’s gang finally get together and hatch an escape plan. But, the obstacle that stands in their way is the giant mutant monster, Vettaiyan, and his army.
