6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E04 - Compromising Positions
6.plot: The team searches for a serial killer who is preying on married couples; Hotchner looks to a team member to fill JJ's vacant role.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E05 - Safe Haven
6.plot: The team pursues a serial killer targeting families in the Midwest; Morgan receives a visit from Ellie after she runs away from her foster family.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E06 - Devil's Night
6.plot: The team searches for a killer who has struck the past three years during Detroit's raucous pre-Halloween celebrations.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E07 - Middle Man
6.plot: The BAU must catch a group of serial killers that is killing exotic dancers and leaving their bodies in the cornfields of Indiana.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E08 - Reflection of Desire
6.plot: The BAU becomes involved in the search for a kidnapped woman in the nation's capital after the body of a second kidnap victim is found in a Georgetown alley.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E09 - Into The Woods
6.plot: When an 8-year-old is found murdered on the Appalachian Trail, the BAU team goes deep into its forests in search of a man lurking in the wilderness who is targeting children.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E10 - What Happens at Home...
6.plot: The BAU searches inside a gated New Mexico community for a killer targeting women, and Hotchner looks to an FBI cadet with a unique past for help with the investigation.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E11 - 25 to Life
6.plot: Morgan suggests that a man has been rehabilitated and aids in his parole, but later regrets his decision when the man murders someone days after being released.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E12 - Corazon
6.plot: A series of bizarre, ritualistic murders brings the team to Miami; Reid experiences hallucinations and blinding headaches.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E13 - The Thirteenth Step
6.plot: The BAU hits the road to track down a pair of young lovers on an interstate murder spree. Also, Prentiss hears frightening news from her former boss at Interpol.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E14 - Sense Memory
6.plot: The team investigates unusual murders in Los Angeles, and more information about Prentiss' past arises.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E15 - Today I Do
6.plot: The BAU is called to upstate New York to investigate mysterious disappearances. Also, Prentiss gets some disturbing news about one of her former Interpol colleagues.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E16 - Coda
6.plot: Prentiss enlists two former friends from Interpol to track down an old enemy, as Reid discovers clues that could help the BAU locate the parents of an autistic boy.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E17 - Valhalla
6.plot: After a series of murders, Prentiss becomes suspicious of a former nemesis, and fears for the safety of her team.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E18 - Lauren
6.plot: As Prentiss faces off against Ian Doyle, JJ receives a call and returns to help them find Prentiss and capture Doyle before it's too late.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E19 - With Friends Like These...
6.plot: The BAU travels to Portland to investigate a suspected gang of murderers targeting a new victim each night.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E20 - Hanley Waters
6.plot: The BAU members investigate targeted killings in Tampa as they cope with their feelings about losing Emily Prentiss.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E21 - The Stranger
6.plot: The BAU hunts a stalker in San Diego who is targeting college students. Meanwhile, the team comes under Strauss' scrutiny in the wake of the loss of Prentiss.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E22 - Out of the Light
6.plot: The BAU is called to a North Carolina resort town after a woman is found badly injured and another woman is missing. On arrival, the team discovers these two women are not the only victims.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E23 - Big Sea
6.plot: When the BAU is called to Florida after bodies are discovered buried in the ocean floor off the Jacksonville coast, the case hits home for Morgan because his aunt fears her missing daughter could be one of the victims.

6.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S06E24 - Supply and Demand
6.plot: As the BAU searches for a suspected human trafficking ring when the bodies of two missing persons are found in the trunk of a car, Unit Chief Aaron Hotchner intimates there could be changes within the team due to budget cuts as Jennifer "JJ" Jareau returns to the FBI. The team is also assisted by SSA Andi Swan, the head of the Domestic Trafficking Task Force.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E01 - It Takes a Village
7.plot: The BAU team is at a crossroads as they are questioned by a Senate Committee for their retaliatory actions in the wake of Prentiss' loss, but an unexpected familiar face could help them win their case and keep the team together.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E02 - Proof
7.plot: The BAU team searches rural Oklahoma when women are being found murdered after being robbed of one of their five senses. Also, JJ and Prentiss get the cold shoulder from Reid as he deals with their deception about Prentiss' presumed death.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E03 - Dorado Falls
7.plot: The BAU team investigates a mass murder at an Internet security company in Charlottesville, Va., but clues reveal it is not a typical serial killer at work.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E04 - Painless
7.plot: Survivors of a Boise high school massacre return to remember the event 10 years later, but the BAU team is called in when a new killer with a similar style targets the survivors. Also, Hotch is worried that his son, Jack, may be a victim of school bullying.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E05 - From Childhood's Hour
7.plot: The BAU team investigates the abductions of young children with troubled mothers in St. Louis. Also, Rossi reconnects with his first wife who has shocking news for him.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E06 - Epilogue
7.plot: The BAU search Californias Angeles National Forest after a number of bodies mysteriously turn up in the mountain lakes there. Also, Rossi struggles with an agonizing decision regarding his ex-wife, Carolyn.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E07 - There's No Place Like Home
7.plot: When a series of tornadoes hits Kansas, the BAU is called in to investigate bodies of young boys that turn up in the aftermath of the storms. Also, work pressures cause tension on JJ's home front.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E08 - Hope
7.plot: It’s personal for Garcia when the BAU investigate the disappearance of a woman in her survivors’ support group whose daughter went missing seven years earlier.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E09 - Self-Fulfilling Prophecy
7.plot: The BAU team looks into the real reasons behind an apparent mass suicide of a small group of youths at a military academy. Also, Hotch and Morgan butt heads when a team member could be in jeopardy.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E10 - The Bittersweet Science
7.plot: The investigation of a series of bludgeonings in Philadelphia leads the team to the city's boxing scene; Hotch connects with a fellow runner while training for the triathlon.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E11 - True Genius
7.plot: A series of murders in San Francisco bearing the tell-tale signs of the infamous Zodiac Killer have the BAU wondering if the notorious serial killer has returned. Also, Reid ponders if he should be doing more with his genius abilities.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E12 - Unknown Subject
7.plot: The team is called to Texas to search for a serial rapist in Houston known as "The Piano Man" who has returned and is attacking his past victims. Meanwhile, Prentiss begins to deal with the traumatic experience caused by Ian Doyle after returning to the BAU.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E13 - Snake Eyes
7.plot: The BAU tries their luck in Atlantic City when the team is called in to investigate a series of ritualistic casino-related murders. Also, after a spat with her boyfriend, Kevin, Garcia thinks she and Morgan may have gotten a little too friendly with each other.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E14 - Closing Time
7.plot: The team hunts a killer when bodies are found hidden in lifeguard towers on Southern California beaches.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E15 - A Thin Line
7.plot: The BAU team investigates a series of brutal home invasions and murders in California's Inland Empire that appear to be gang-related, but their investigation may uncover a more sinister motivation.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E16 - A Family Affair
7.plot: When the BAU travels to Atlanta to investigate the murders of women, the clues lead them to look for an unsub who is not working alone.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E17 - I Love You, Tommy Brown
7.plot: When married couples fostering young children end up being killed in Seattle, the BAU team looks for an unsub with a maternal-yet-murderous instinct. Also, Garcia fears a possible proposition from Kevin.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E18 - Foundation
7.plot: The team hunts for a kidnapper when an emaciated boy is found in the desert and another goes missing.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E19 - Heathridge Manor
7.plot: The BAU team heads to Oregon to investigate a series of gothic, ritualistic murders.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E20 - The Company
7.plot: When Morgan's sister sees a woman who looks like their presumed-dead cousin, Cindi, it forces Morgan to confront a lie he told his family last year to provide closure and compels the BAU to reopen the case of her disappearance.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E21 - Divining Rod
7.plot: A serial killer is executed, in Oklahoma, a copycat shows up and the BAU are called to find him. Meanwhile, Prentiss gets nervous about a real estate purchase.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E22 - Profiling 101
7.plot: Rossi and the team teach college students the science of criminal profiling by taking the class through a serial-killer case that spanned 20 years.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E23 - Hit (1)
7.plot: When the BAU goes up against a gang of serial-killing bank robbers in Washington, D.C., the team tries to negotiate the situation unfolding inside the bank, but the stakes rise when one of their own becomes a hostage.

7.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S07E24 - Run (2)
7.plot: As the BAU team continues to pursue the bank-robbing serial killers, the team determines that the suspects have a bigger target in the Nation's capital, and with one of the team still a hostage, they must work quickly to diffuse an explosive situation. Also, wedding bells ring for one of the BAU, and Prentiss ponders her future.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E01 - The Silencer
8.plot: When a Texas prisoner escapes during a transfer, he leaves behind victims with his unique trademark, sewing their mouths shut, a signature the BAU remembers as unique to the UnSub "The Silencer." While they investigate who he was and who he's become, the BAU also gets to know the newest member of the team.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E02 - The Pact
8.plot: When the bodies of two seemingly unrelated victims are found just hours apart in San Diego and Los Angeles respectively, the BAU suspects that that not one, but two killers are working together to commit these murders.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E03 - Through the Looking Glass
8.plot: An UNSUB who kidnaps families with the intention of making them admit to and pay for their indiscretions.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E04 - God Complex
8.plot: When a legless body is found in the New Mexico desert and a second unwilling amputee shows up at the hospital, the BAU team searches for this amateur surgeon before he preys upon his next reluctant victim. Also, Reid's phone calls to a mystery woman have the team intrigued.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E05 - The Good Earth
8.plot: The team heads to Oregon as four men have gone missing.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E06 - The Apprenticeship
8.plot: When prostitutes in Miami are discovered murdered in a similar style to local animals found dead there, the BAU must work fast to find an unsub whose confidence is quickly escalating. Also, Morgan tries to increase Reid's athletic skills by convincing him to join the bureau's softball team.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E07 - The Fallen
8.plot: The BAU travels to Santa Monica when burned bodies of homeless people begin showing up by the famous pier. Also, Rossi reconnects with his former Marine sergeant from Vietnam.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E08 - The Wheels on the Bus...
8.plot: The BAU team goes in pursuit of a missing school bus full of children outside the Washington, D.C. area, and it becomes a race against time for them to bring them home safely.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E09 - Magnificent Light
8.plot: An attendee at a popular motivational-speaker's conference in Seattle is murdered and the speaker himself disappears soon afterward. Meanwhile, Garcia is puzzled when Morgan refuses to attend a dinner honoring an old family friend.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E10 - The Lesson
8.plot: A ritualistic killer is hunted after male bodies are found that have been physically altered. Meanwhile, Reid gets anxious at the prospect of meeting his mystery woman.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E11 - Perennials
8.plot: The BAU heads south to investigate a fast-moving UnSub whose signature matches that of a serial killer from 30 years ago. Also, the team learns that someone is tracking their cases and replicating crimes the BAU is solving.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E12 - Zugzwang
8.plot: When Reid discovers that his girlfriend has been kidnapped by her stalker, he and the BAU team band together to find her before it's too late.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E13 - Magnum Opus
8.plot: While Reid copes with a loss in his personal life, the rest of the BAU travels to San Francisco to investigate victims discovered in the Mission District.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E14 - All That Remains
8.plot: A writer's daughters vanish on the anniversary of their mother's disappearance, which leads the BAU to investigate the man as a possible suspect.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E15 - Broken
8.plot: The BAU heads to Austin to investigate victims found there with their watches set inaccurately, a clue which may connect the crimes. Meanwhile, the UnSub stalking the BAU inches closer in his pursuit of the team.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E16 - Carbon Copy
8.plot: When victims are found in Philadelphia in a similar style to victims of The Replicator, the stalker who has been tracking the BAU's every move, the team thinks this could be the break they need to try and apprehend him.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E17 - The Gathering
8.plot: The BAU investigates victims who were documenting their personal lives and inner desires on blog posts and social media. Also, Kevin gets jealous when he learns Garcia may have a new love interest.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E18 - Restoration
8.plot: The BAU goes to Morgan's old neighborhood in urban Chicago in search of an unsub targeting middle-aged men, and a clue leads Morgan to believe that they are after someone connected to the man who molested him as a child.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E19 - Pay It Forward
8.plot: When a time capsule in a small Colorado town is opened twenty-five years later and contains a gruesome discovery, the BAU investigates the crime and find a possible link to the death of a local police officer.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E20 - Alchemy
8.plot: The BAU travel to Rapid City after two male victims are discovered murdered in a ritualistic manner. Also, Reid continues to grieve over Maeve’s death.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E21 - Nanny Dearest
8.plot: The BAU travels to Los Angeles looking for an UnSub who is kidnapping nannies and the children they care for on the same day each year.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E22 - Number Six
8.plot: The BAU goes to Detroit to track an UnSub with a rapidly changing MO. Also, Blake's husband returns from overseas with a life-changing career proposition for her.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E23 - Brothers Hotchner (1)
8.plot: The Replicator zeroes in on the BAU when the killer targets one of the team as the next victim. Also, the BAU is called in to investigate a string of deaths in Manhattan tied to apparent ecstasy overdoses, and Hotch discovers that his estranged brother, Sean, is caught in the middle.

8.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S08E24 - The Replicator (2)
8.plot: The Replicator zeroes in on the BAU when the killer targets one of the team as the next victim. Also, the BAU is called in to investigate a string of deaths in Manhattan tied to apparent ecstasy overdoses, and Hotch discovers that his estranged brother, Sean, is caught in the middle.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E01 - The Inspiration (1)
9.plot: The hunt for a methodical killer takes the BAU to Arizona to search for an increasingly devolving unsub, and the team speculates that Hotch is in the running to be the new BAU Section Chief following the death of Erin Strauss.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E02 - The Inspired (2)
9.plot: As the BAU zeroes in on the suspect of the ritualistic killings they've been investigating in Arizona, a bizarre connection within the unsub's family could lead them to finally nab the suspect.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E03 - Final Shot
9.plot: When a sniper strikes Dallas, the BAU investigates whether the upcoming anniversary of the Kennedy assassination is a motivating factor or if something else is driving the unsub.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E04 - To Bear Witness
9.plot: The BAU meets their new section chief, Mateo Cruz, who, unbeknownst to them, shares a long work history with JJ. Cruz joins the team as they comb the streets of Baltimore for an unsub who leaves victims unable to communicate.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E05 - Route 66
9.plot: As Hotch fights for his life due to complications from his stabbing at the hands of George Foyet, a.k.a. "The Reaper," he experiences visions of his late wife, Haley, and his nemesis, Foyet. Meanwhile, the BAU searches for a missing teenager and investigate her estranged father as a suspect in her disappearance.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E06 - In The Blood
9.plot: The BAU are called to Utah to investigate the murder of a women who died by being buried under stones. All while Penelope plans a Day of the Dead party.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E07 - Gatekeeper
9.plot: Though Rossi is sad because his favorite bar is closing, the team goes to Boston to solve a series of strangulations.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E08 - The Return
9.plot: When teenagers who were reported missing are suspected of a series of mass murders in Chicago, the BAU investigates their whereabouts to find a motive for the crimes. Also, Morgan has conflicting feelings when his girlfriend takes her job at a hospital as seriously as he takes his.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E09 - Strange Fruit
9.plot: When skeletons are discovered in the backyard of a home in Virginia, family secrets and past racial divisions are brought to light.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E10 - The Caller
9.plot: When a young boy goes missing from his home in St. Louis, the BAU reinvestigates a similar cold case to search for the UnSub.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E11 - Bully
9.plot: When the BAU is called to Kansas City to investigate a series of murders, a tense reunion ensues between Blake and her father, a retired police captain, and her brother, a detective, who must work together to help solve the crime.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E12 - The Black Queen
9.plot: A murder investigation leads to Garcia delving into her hacker past -- and reconnecting with her former love.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E13 - The Road Home (1)
9.plot: As the team searches for a vigilante killer in Cleveland, Rossi's former Marine sergeant goes missing in Los Angeles; J.J.'s secret catches up with her.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E14 - 200 (2)
9.plot: When JJ is kidnapped, the BAU delves into her time at the State Department to find clues to her disappearance and uncover a secret mission that now puts her life in danger. To help with their search for JJ, the team calls upon Prentiss to help in the crisis

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E15 - Mr. & Mrs. Anderson
9.plot: The BAU travels to Pittsburgh on the hunt for a pair of suspects that appear to be working together as a team; Garcia and Morgan reveal their Valentine's Day plans for their respective significant others to each other.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E16 - Gabby
9.plot: When a 4-year-old girl goes missing while staying with a relative in Mississippi, the BAU uncovers some startling truths as the team races to find the child and bring her to safety.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E17 - Persuasion
9.plot: The BAU must determine the true cause and motive when several drowned people are discovered in the Las Vegas desert.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E18 - Rabid
9.plot: When three bodies are found with animal and human bite marks in a shallow grave near Milwaukee, the BAU has puzzling questions to answer. Meanwhile, Reid and Garcia work out for a company fitness test, but try to hide their preparation from Morgan.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E19 - The Edge of Winter
9.plot: Morgan's visit with a survivor of unusual stabbings in upstate New York leads to more questions about the case.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E20 - Blood Relations
9.plot: Two murder victims are found in a West Virginia backwoods community. The investigation reveals that the homicides may be linked to a long-simmering feud between two families.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E21 - What Happens in Mecklinburg...
9.plot: The team searches for a commonality when a series of target abductions take place; Savannah is frustrated with Morgan's traveling.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E22 - Fatal
9.plot: Victims of arsenic poisoning are found in Long Beach. The investigation reveals that the killer has a fascination with Greek mythology, based on handwritten death threats to the deceased and other mysterious clues. Meanwhile, Hotch becomes concerned about participating in Jack's third-grade career day.

9.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S09E23 - Angels (1)
9.plot: When prostitutes are murdered in Texas, their deaths seem to have religious overtones; members of the team are put at risk throughout the course of the investigation.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E01 - X
10.plot: The BAU team investigates a series of murders in Bakersfield, Ca, which have left the victims unidentifiable. New agent Kate Callahan joins the BAU fold, and assists in the effort to solve the cases.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E02 - Burn
10.plot: A series of abductions and murders in Seattle send the BAU seeking an UnSub who was abused in the past and is out for revenge. Garcia heads to Texas to confront the man she shot while defending Reid and herself, as he waits on death row.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E03 - A Thousand Suns
10.plot: When a passenger jet crashes in Colorado, the BAU team is called to build a profile around the suspicious circumstances. The case hits close to home for Kate, who is reminded of a family tragedy.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E04 - The Itch
10.plot: The investigation into a series of mysterious deaths in Atlanta reveals the murders were likely committed by an UnSub with an obsessive skin disorder.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E05 - Boxed In
10.plot: When a young boy who went missing in San Diego on Halloween suddenly reappears one year later, the BAU must work fast when another trick-or-treater disappears under similar circumstances.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E06 - If the Shoe Fits
10.plot: The BAU is stumped to find the common denominator among male victims in Montana, making in difficult to profile the UnSub. JJ confronts her feelings about her sister's tragic death.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E07 - Hashtag
10.plot: When victims with large social media followings are found dead in Maryland, the BAU searches for an UnSub taking on the persona of an Internet urban legend. Morgan and Savannah struggle to find quality time for each other with their busy careers.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E08 - The Boys of Sudworth Place
10.plot: When a prominent attorney goes missing in Boston, the BAU unearths secrets in his past which could point to the reasons for his disappearance.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E09 - Fate
10.plot: The BAU investigates random murders in northern Virginia and searches for a conflicted UnSub who has an uncontrollable urge to kill but is also filled with remorse. Rossi receives a visit from a woman who could hold a secret from his past.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E10 - Amelia Porter
10.plot: When the BAU is called to Salt Lake City Utah to investigate a triple homicide, the search for a connection among the victims could lead them to a fugitive who could have ties to the UnSub.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E11 - The Forever People
10.plot: When frozen bodies are found in Nevada floating in water, the BAU’s investigation leads them to suspect that the victims were part of a cult that could be behind the deaths. Also, JJ confronts old demons from her abduction and torture last year.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E12 - Anonymous
10.plot: The BAU searches Tallahassee for a serial killer who calls the authorities to report the crimes prior to committing murder. Also, as Rossi prepares for a weekend visit with his daughter, Joy, he receives startling news about the death of a comrade in Vietnam.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E13 - Nelson's Sparrow
10.plot: The BAU revisits its origins when they look at one of Rossi and Gideon’s old cases to track a killer that got away.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E14 - Hero Worship
10.plot: When an Indianapolis coffee shop is blown up and a hero emerges from the wreckage, the BAU tries to protect that person and his family while searching for the UnSub before more incidents occur.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E15 - Scream
10.plot: Victims in California have the BAU searching for an UnSub who may have witnessed abuse as a child. Meanwhile, Kate shows parental concern when her niece, Meg, makes a date with a friend to meet a boy they met online.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E16 - Lockdown
10.plot: When two guards at a privatized maximum security prison in Texas are murdered, the BAU suspects that more than one UnSub within the prison could be at work.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E17 - Breath Play
10.plot: The BAU is called to Wisconsin in search of a serial killer, and the team looks for a connection among the victims for clues to the UnSub. Also, Kate has trouble dealing with her niece, Meg, when she begins acting out.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E18 - Rock Creek Park
10.plot: When the wife of an up-and-coming congressman disappears, the BAU investigates his political enemies as possible suspects.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E19 - Beyond Borders
10.plot: When a family of four is abducted while on vacation in Barbados, the BAU is called to assist Unit Chief Jack Garrett and his International Unit on their investigation.  Garrett and his unit, the FBI's top division for handling cases involving Americans abroad, work jointly with Hotch and his team when they discover that this case matches one the BAU investigated last year in Florida.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E20 - A Place at the Table
10.plot: When a Maryland family is found murdered at their dining room table, the team tracks down other family members and friends to uncover secrets that may have led to it. Also, Hotch must try to make peace with his father-in-law, Roy, after discovering he’s been diagnosed with Alzheimer’s.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E21 - Mr. Scratch
10.plot: When three people implicated in murders claim they were attacked by a “clawed shadow monster” at the moment each crime occurred, the BAU searches for an UnSub who is controlling their minds. Also, the search for the culprit puts one of the team in jeopardy.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E22 - Protection
10.plot: When shooting victims are found in the Los Angeles area with possible links to criminal activity, the BAU searches for a vigilante UnSub.

10.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S10E23 - The Hunt
10.plot: When Kate's niece and her best friend Markayla are kidnapped, the BAU suspects an online predator engaged in sex trafficking who poses as a teenage boy.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E01 - The Job
11.plot: The BAU is interviewing different candidates to join their ranks in the wake of Kate’s departure, including a forensic psychologist, Dr. Tara Lewis, who is eager to assist their efforts. Also, the BAU hunts for a serial killer who leaves behind distinctive evidence that points to someone intent on revenge.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E02 - The Witness
11.plot: When a Los Angeles bus is attacked with sarin gas, the BAU must act quickly to find the suspect before a larger-scale incident occurs.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E03 - 'Til Death Do Us Part
11.plot: When brides-to-be in Savannah are killed on the eve of their nuptials, the BAU suspects a jilted UnSub is at work.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E04 - Outlaw
11.plot: When three restaurant workers are killed in a robbery/homicide in Las Vegas, N.M., the BAU looks at a cold case that happened in the town six years ago for leads.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E05 - The Night Watch
11.plot: When the BAU investigates incidents of bodies being incorporated into macabre graffiti art in Detroit, they suspect an elusive-yet-notorious street artist could be the UnSub.  Also, Dr. Lewis struggles to balance her relationship with her fiancé and her work.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E06 - Pariahville
11.plot: When a woman is murdered in a small town in Florida inhabited entirely by sex offenders, the BAU faces a community full of suspects. Also, Lewis receives a career opportunity that may take her away from the BAU.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E07 - Target Rich
11.plot: The BAU helps Rossi’s journalist daughter, Joy, investigate the disappearance of a college student. Also, the team is alarmed when Giuseppe Montolo dies in prison after he warns Morgan about the “Dirty Dozen,” an underground group of hitmen, and JJ returns from maternity leave.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E08 - Awake
11.plot: Victims are kidnapped in Phoenix and forced to endure sleep deprivation. Meanwhile, JJ copes with exhaustion from juggling work and caring for her newborn son; and Hotch and Garcia deal with threats from the "Dirty Dozen," an underground hit man group.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E09 - Internal Affairs
11.plot: After two undercover DEA agents are murdered and a third goes missing, the BAU joins the NSA to investigate whether an underground Internet drug syndicate is involved. Also, Hotch hopes the team’s work with the NSA brings them closer to finding the “Dirty Dozen” hitmen ring.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E10 - Future Perfect
11.plot: The BAU searches for an UnSub who may be fascinated with medical experimentation.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E11 - Entropy
11.plot: The BAU implements an elaborate strategy to try and take down the “Dirty Dozen” hitmen ring, with Reid playing a central role.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E12 - Drive
11.plot: When bodies are discovered in public places throughout Boston, the BAU investigates whether a taxi or ride-share service the victims used before their deaths could lead the team to the UnSub.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E13 - The Bond
11.plot: The BAU searches for a motive and an UnSub when victims are found in truck stop restrooms along highways throughout the South.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E14 - Hostage
11.plot: When an 18-year-old girl escapes from a suburban home where she was held captive for years with two other women, the BAU searches for the Unsub who kidnapped them.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E15 - A Badge and a Gun
11.plot: Women are found dead inside their own homes throughout L.A.  The BAU searches security footage for an UnSub who was invited into each victim's home.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E16 - Derek
11.plot: When Morgan is abducted, the BAU scrambles to find him and save his life.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E17 - The Sandman
11.plot: The BAU heads to Wichita in search of an UnSub abducting children while their parents sleep. Also, Morgan tries to find who was responsible for his attack.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E18 - A Beautiful Disaster
11.plot: When an UnSub targets the BAU, and the team goes into action to find out who is responsible.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E19 - Tribute
11.plot: When former team member Prentiss tracks an international serial killer, she enlists the help of the BAU when she believes the UnSub's next victim will be on American soil.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E20 - Inner Beauty
11.plot: The BAU searches for an UnSub who is purposely disfiguring victims. Also, Rossi has an awkward reunion with his ex-wife, Hayden Montgomery, who kept his daughter, Joy, a secret from him for nearly 30 years.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E21 - Devil's Backbone
11.plot: When guards at a Virginia prison intercept a package with evidence relating to the kidnapping of two boys several years ago, the BAU questions a notorious serial killer who may have information on the boys’ whereabouts.

11.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S11E22 - The Storm
11.plot: The BAU is shocked when Hotch is apprehended by a SWAT team and suspected of conspiracy, and as the team scrambles to prove his innocence, they suspect a larger plot is on the horizon.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E01 - The Crimson King
12.plot: Agent Luke Alvez (Adam Rodriguez) joins the BAU team, which is tasked with capturing a killer who escaped prison with 13 other convicts at the end of last season.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E02 - Sick Day
12.plot: When JJ arrives home shaken after a rough case, she breaks down and tells her husband about the abduction of two children.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E03 - Taboo
12.plot: The BAU welcomes back Emily Prentiss as they are called upon to investigate the disappearance of three women

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E04 - Keeper
12.plot: The BAU team searches for a serial killer along the Appalachian Trail in rural Virginia.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E05 - The Anti-Terrorism Squad
12.plot: The BAU investigates if bullying may be the link between two high school students who are the sole survivors after both of their families are killed.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E06 - Elliott's Pond
12.plot: When three children disappear while riding their bikes on the same path as a similar unsolved disappearance 30 years ago, the BAU team comes in to investigate.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E07 - Mirror Image
12.plot: The BAU team opens an investigation when a man who fully believes he’s Dr. Tara Lewis’  brother arrives in town, knowing everything about her and her family, and she is unable to make contact with her real sibling.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E08 - Scarecrow
12.plot: The team heads to Yakima, Washington when the remains of a dozen people are found along a creek bed.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E09 - Profiling 202
12.plot: While Rossi conducts a profiling course on his birthday, he receives a call from his nemesis Tommy Yates, who discloses the location of his latest victim.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E10 - Seek and Destroy
12.plot: BAU team investigates a series of home invasions in upscale neighborhoods in San Diego involving casualties.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E11 - Surface Tension
12.plot: Reid has returned from Houston, where he was visiting his mother who is in a new facility on an experimental drug program. He is called back home from the office while the rest of the team heads off on their next case. It isn't until the team is in the air that they learn that Diana is no longer in the Houston facility, but that she is now living with Reid, as the trial drug was not having the intended effect.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E12 - A Good Husband
12.plot: The BAU team is called in to investigate when male victims are found with no way to identify them.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E13 - Spencer
12.plot: When a BAU member gets in trouble in Mexico, the team enlists the services of the International Response Team for their help.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E14 - Collision Course
12.plot: The BAU investigates the cause of several fatal car crashes involving drivers and pedestrians. Also, Reid gets bad news.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E15 - Alpha Male
12.plot: The BAU investigates when several young men and women are victims of disfiguring acid attacks. Also, Dr. Reid begins to settle into his new surroundings.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E16 - Assistance Is Futile
12.plot: When three women in New York City are found dead with several bones broken, the BAU works with a single mother (Tatum O'Neal) who believes that her son is behind the heinous crimes. Meanwhile, Reid faces a difficult decision after a fellow inmate is threatened.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E17 - In the Dark
12.plot: When two drastically different murder sprees are committed in Burlington, Vermont, the BAU concludes that a serial killer suffering from sleepwalking is responsible for both crimes. Meanwhile, Alvez presents Shaw with a shocking ultimatum after Reid is assaulted in prison.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E18 - Hell's Kitchen
12.plot: The BAU investigates an urban vampire who kidnaps his victims at night and holds them underground in the sewer system; Reid makes a difficult decision in prison.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E19 - True North
12.plot: Three victims are found tied to stakes in the Arizona desert.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E20 - Unforgettable
12.plot: The BAU investigates when several federal government employees, including a close friend of Walker's, succumb to symptoms of a heart attack; Reid anxiously awaits his trial date.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E21 - Green Light
12.plot: When Reid fears his mother has been abducted, he asks the BAU to investigate while he's stuck in prison.

12.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S12E22 - Red Light
12.plot: Derek Morgan brings the BAU a lead in the case against serial killer and escaped convict Mr. Scratch.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E01 - Wheels Up
13.plot: In the wake of a devastating attack, the BAU works with former International Response Team member Matthew Simmons to save one of their own from escaped serial killer Peter Lewis.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E02 - To a Better Place
13.plot: The BAU investigates three similar crimes in which victims' remains are discovered in old suitcases.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E03 - Blue Angel
13.plot: When successful businessmen in Detroit are targeted by an anger-driven power-assertive Unsub, the BAU is called in to investigate.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E04 - Killer App
13.plot: The BAU investigates a workplace shooting committed by a state-of-the-art drone in Silicon Valley.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E05 - Lucky Strikes
13.plot: Morgan lends emotional support to Garcia when she experiences anxiety over a case that is personal to her from her past.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E06 - The Bunker
13.plot: Several women go missing in Virginia and the BAU must figure out what they all have in common in order to find them.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E07 - Dust and Bones
13.plot: The BAU searches for an unsub in Austin, Texas, who is targeting prominent members of the community.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E08 - Neon Terror
13.plot: When an UnSub in Miami sensationalizes his crimes by giving the local media exclusive footage, the BAU is called in to investigate.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E09 - False Flag
13.plot: When two members of a conspiracy group in Roswell, N.M., perish in quick succession, the BAU is called to investigate.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E10 - Submerged
13.plot: When a series of backyard pool homicides are reported in California, the BAU team searches for an UnSub with a puzzling past.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E11 - Full-Tilt Boogie
13.plot: The BAU team’s investigation into the home invasion and attempted homicide of a police chief’s wife uncovers a world of secrets in a small town in Virginia.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E12 - Bad Moon on the Rise
13.plot: The BAU is called to New York when several casualties of a brutal nature are reported in Central Park.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E13 - Cure
13.plot: The BAU is called to investigate a series of D.C. homicides where cryptic messages are found inside the mouths of each victim.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E14 - Miasma
13.plot: The BAU is called when the New Orleans P.D. discovers a mass grave inside a vandalized above-ground crypt in a local cemetery.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E15 - Annihilator
13.plot: The FBI's assistant director of national security, Linda Barnes, joins the BAU as they investigate a quadruple homicide of a group of roommates in St. Louis.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E16 - Last Gasp
13.plot: Away from the watchful eye of the FBI's assistant director of national security, Linda Barnes, the BAU meets in secret to investigate an UnSub who appears to be kidnapping and photographing young women.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E17 - The Capilanos
13.plot: The BAU is called to Oklahoma to investigate a murderous clown terrorizing the sleepy town of Guymon.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E18 - The Dance of Love
13.plot: The BAU travels to Chicago to investigate an unsub who leaves red roses on each victim. Also, Rossi gets an unexpected visit from his ex-wife, Krystall Richards.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E19 - Ex Parte
13.plot: The BAU takes charge of a hostage situation at a law firm in D.C., where Matt Simmons’ wife, Kristy works.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E20 - All You Can Eat
13.plot: The BAU is called to investigate a series of deaths in Virginia suspected by the Center for Disease Control to be caused by bio-terrorism; Garcia visits her stepbrother to take care of a family issue.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E21 - Mixed Signals
13.plot: The BAU is called to Taos, N.M. to investigate an UnSub who is targeting his victims' temporal lobes.

13.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S13E22 - Believer
13.plot: When Reid discovers former FBI Special Agent Owen Quinn locked inside a storage unit, the BAU questions the credibility of Quinn's bizarre accounts of searching for an UnSub that he named "The Strangler".

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E01 - 300
14.plot: When Reid and Garcia are abducted by Benjamin Merva, it's up to the rest of the team to find them. The BAU finds surprising clues in their own history to solve why the two heroes have been targeted by a mass murderer. It's a race to save them before a Believer's prophecy is fulfilled.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E02 - Starter Home
14.plot: When the mummified remains of numerous victims are found in the walls of an elderly couple's remote South Carolina home, Rossi, JJ and Simmons are dispatched to track down a trail of clues that date back over 20 years. The hunt becomes urgent after BAU learns the killer has a specific ritual of when to strike, and like clockwork another person goes missing. Rossi reconnects with his ex-wife.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E03 - Rule 34
14.plot: The BAU must determine what connects six people that each received a mysterious package in order to identify the Unsub. Simmons and his wife deal with their son's suspension from school.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E04 - Innocence
14.plot: The BAU steps in to help local law enforcement isolate a prime suspect for a ritualistic murder in Tallahassee, Fla., and soon after a second person who is related to the first victim is killed under similar circumstances. Prentiss is concerned about Garcia’s behavior in the aftermath of her abduction and has an idea of how to help with the healing process.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E05 - The Tall Man
14.plot: The BAU investigates a spooky local ghost story of the 'Tall Man' and the clues it provides when two people go missing in the woods of East Allegheny’s Dead Man’s Conservatory, and a third mysteriously surfaces the following day with limited details as to what happened to her friends. To assist with the case, JJ reluctantly returns to her hometown, triggering emotional flashbacks to age 11 and her older sister’s tragic death.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E06 - Luke
14.plot: The BAU heads to Bethesda, Md., to investigate four murders in the span of three days along the eastern seaboard. The crimes become personal for Alvez, when the team discovers there are ties to his time spent five years ago working alongside the DEA and the Mexican police force in pursuit of the most notorious hitman in Mexico. Alvez and his girlfriend decide to move in together.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E07 - Twenty Seven
14.plot: The BAU races to capture the vigilantes behind a series of attacks taking place every 27 minutes in the nation’s capital. Prentiss and Unit Chief Andrew Mendoza lead the effort to identify the Unsubs and what’s motivating them.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E08 - Ashley
14.plot: The BAU investigates a double homicide and kidnapping in New Hampshire. Rossi's plans to elevate his relationship with Krystall don't go as planned.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E09 - Broken Wing
14.plot: A professor from Lewis’ past tips off the BAU to an alarming number of overdose deaths of patients who just completed rehab.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E10 - Flesh and Blood
14.plot: Prentiss faces her past when the BAU is sent to investigate the murders of prominent businessmen, all of whom are missing their hearts. Also, Prentiss plans a romantic first date with Mendoza, but the evening is cut short by an urgent call from Rossi.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E11 - Night Lights
14.plot: The BAU team heads to Portland, Ore., to investigate a chilling abduction that may be linked to a local couple killed in their home a week earlier.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E12 - Hamelin
14.plot: Prentiss and the team fly to Iowa to investigate the disappearance of three 10-year-old children who appear to have been abducted from their homes in the middle of the night, with surveillance video from a neighborhood park as their only lead to finding the children’s whereabouts.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E13 - Chameleon
14.plot: Rossi questions his actions in the aftermath of a near-death struggle with a serial killer who appears to have outsmarted the BAU.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E14 - Sick and Evil
14.plot: The BAU investigates a string of murders taking place in supposedly haunted houses in Lewiston, Maine.

14.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S14E15 - Truth or Dare
14.plot: Wedding bells are ringing as Rossi prepares to marry Krystall. But first, the BAU team travels to Los Angeles to investigate a series of fatal shootings in broad daylight following car accidents.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E01 - Under the Skin
15.plot: The BAU team investigates an UnSub with striking similarities to Rossi’s latest obsession, “The Chameleon,” a.k.a. Everett Lynch, who nearly killed him and then disappeared.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E02 - Awakenings
15.plot: With a member of the BAU in the hospital, the team searches for Everett Lynch, and his daughter, Grace. Also, Spencer has a meaningful visit with his mother, Diana Reid, while she’s experiencing a period of lucidity.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E03 - Spectator Slowing
15.plot: The BAU team investigates a series of seemingly random fatal explosions throughout Kentucky and Tennessee.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E04 - Saturday
15.plot: The members of the BAU enjoy a Saturday off in vastly different ways. While Rossi and Prentiss help Simmons assemble a new crib, Garcia leads a hacking competition, and Dr. Reid strikes up a conversation with a woman named Maxine.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E05 - Ghost
15.plot: Following a series of fatal shootings, the BAU team travels to Des Plaines, Ill. to investigate what appears to be a copycat serial killer. Their efforts are thrown off track when members of the BAU are targeted.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E06 - Date Night
15.plot: After a father and daughter get kidnapped, a former foe of the BAU returns with very specific demands for Dr. Reid that give a whole new meaning to the phrase “wheels up".

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E07 - Rusty
15.plot: When the BAU team travels to Denver to investigate several murders, Prentiss is forced to evaluate her relationship with Special Agent Andrew Mendoza.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E08 - Family Tree
15.plot: Prentiss and J.J. are faced with important decisions to make about their futures as the BAU travels to Beaumont, Texas to investigate a series of murdered businessmen.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E09 - Face Off (1)
15.plot: It has been a year since Rossi nearly died at the hands of Everett Lynch, a.k.a. “The Chameleon,” and he has developed some new theories, with inspiration from his former partner, Jason Gideon. The BAU team sets out on an epic hunt to capture Lynch.

15.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S15E10 - And In the End (2)
15.plot: Following an explosive face-to-face encounter with Everett Lynch, a.k.a. “The Chameleon,” Dr. Reid suffers from a brain injury and, while experiencing hallucinations, is visited by ghosts from his past. Also, the BAU makes a shocking discovery about Lynch that affects Rossi personally, and the entire BAU team comes together to celebrate Rossi’s retirement.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E01 - Just Getting Started
16.plot: When a family annihilator abducts a teen girl, the Behavioral Analysis Unit works the case on either side of the country to save her. But an unlikely connection to a mysterious kit leads to a bigger investigation and at the center of it is Penelope Garcia.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E02 - Sicarius
16.plot: As the team hunts an UnSub who severs spinal cords, they uncover a clue from their last case that points to a serial killing network. To figure out how big this network is, Rossi has to convince a reluctant Garcia to do the one thing she doesn’t want: come back to the BAU.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E03 - Moose
16.plot: At the heart of the serial killing network is Elias Voit. Dangerous psychopath. Manipulative narcissist. Loving father and husband. In order to find him, the team must find all of his kill kits. But one is missing, and the path leads to a bomb in the middle of Washington, D.C.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E04 - Pay-Per-View
16.plot: The BAU hunts for the next connection to the serial killer network when they pursue a home invasion team. Alvez and Garcia convince Tyler Green to submit a cognitive interview to unlock his memories of Sicarius.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E05 - Oedipus Wrecks
16.plot: A surprising connection forces Deputy Director Bailey to ask the BAU to take a case involving young D.C. socialites who are bitten by a sadistic UnSub. But when the case turns political, the BAU finds themselves in the crosshairs from a high-powered senator. The team is led to a second shipping container that’s rigged to blow.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E06 - True Conviction
16.plot: The explosion looks to have exposed the true mastermind behind Sicarius, but all is not what it seems. Is someone taking the fall for these deadly actions? The BAU is determined to seek the truth.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E07 - What Doesn’t Kill Us
16.plot: With the fate of the Sicarius investigation hanging in the balance, the BAU takes a case in West Virginia, where an UnSub practices his own twisted form of Old Testament vengeance.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E08 - Forget Me Knots
16.plot: Voit’s internal struggles with himself lead him to a desperate kidnapping. But Rossi’s obsession brings the BAU closer to the truth than they’ve ever been.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E09 - Memento Mori
16.plot: Rossi will go to any lengths to prove that Elias Voit is Sicarius. But Voit turns Rossi into his own worst enemy, putting his future at the BAU in jeopardy.

16.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S16E10 - Dead End
16.plot: With Rossi in Voit’s clutches, he grapples with the limits of his technical know-how and mental strength. As the BAU tightens their grip on Voit, he reveals just how far he’s willing to take his deadly crusade.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E01 - Gold Star
17.plot: Prentiss uncovers a series of brutal killings linked by a specific calling card. Despite being haunted by Elias Voit, the BAU is forced to team up with him to track the Gold Star killer. Rossi and Prentiss devise a plan to gain leverage over Voit.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E02 - Contagion
17.plot: The BAU investigates a series of killings with the same brutal M.O. they saw with the strike team deaths. The team tries to link the victims to determine if they are dealing with the same killer. Rebecca joins Lewis and Tyler Green on a stakeout.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E03 - Homesick
17.plot: The BAU investigates the "Moving Day Murders" and track a ritualistic killer with a twisted method of subduing his victims. Tyler goes rogue to track down the latest Gold Star lead. Prentiss is targeted by conspiracy theorists.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E04 - Kingdom of the Blind
17.plot: The BAU is faced with more Gold Star killing with the same gruesome M.O. Elias Voit says goodbye to his family. Prentiss wrestles with the fallout of her run-in with Brian Garrity. Garcia hacks the cloned phone brought in by Tyler Green.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E05 - Conspiracy vs. Theory
17.plot: The BAU enlists Voit to help capture Jade and Damien, the UnSubs behind the Gold Star killings. Damien and Jade get the upper hand and the BAU must watch as Voit tries to negotiate with them in order to avoid a mass casualty event.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E06 - Message in a Bottle
17.plot: Alvez and Garcia profile who might be targeting Tyler's ex-girlfriend. JJ helps Prentiss work through an existential hangover. When Rossi's Voit delusions reach a breaking point, Rossi confronts Voit and unpack what has been truly haunting him.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E07 - Piranha
17.plot: The BAU zeroes in on a sadistic UnSub in D.C. with a twisted M.O. Prentiss and Rossi dive into the BAU's history to find connections to Gold Star. Prentiss reaches out to someone from Rossi's past. Voit utilizes his lawyer to reach out to Damien.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E08 - North Star
17.plot: The BAU tries to get ahead of Jade and Damien who are on a killing spree. Rossi must confront an old flame to unpack the secrets behind the Gold Star program. Tyler and Rebecca attempt to gain leverage over Elias Voit's lawyer.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E09 - Stars & Stripes
17.plot: With Jade on the run, the BAU continues to assemble the pieces connecting Gold Star victims to Aida Limited. Jade and Dana follow Voit’s breadcrumbs to the heart of the “conspiracy.” A search warrant execution by the BAU has deadly consequences.

17.title: FR - Esprits criminels - S17E10 - Save the Children
17.plot: When the identity of the last Gold Star member is revealed, the pieces of the puzzle click together. Prentiss, now in mortal danger, must confront Jade and her accomplice to expose the truth behind the “conspiracy” before time runs out for the BAU.

meta.plot: After a brutal virus wipes out most of the population, two young siblings embark on a perilous search for safety. A Scandinavian thriller series.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E01 - Stay Inside
1.plot: A deadly virus spread by rainfall forces siblings Simone and Rasmus to seek refuge in an underground bunker, parting ways with their scientist father.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E02 - Stay Together
1.plot: After six years of isolation, Simone and Rasmus encounter other survivors. To stay alive, Simone must prove herself useful to the group.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E03 - Avoid the City
1.plot: Simone and the others set out for Apollon headquarters in Sweden, but their trek through Copenhagen is fraught with peril.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E04 - Trust No One
1.plot: Jealousy flares in Martin and Beatrice. Simone and Rasmus meet a doctor with a connection to their father. A memory haunts Jean.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E05 - Have Faith
1.plot: Lost in the woods, the group stumbles upon a mansion. The residents invite them to stay the night, and Lea bonds with one of the women.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E06 - Keep Your Friends Close
1.plot: Rasmus and Beatrice grow closer as they spend time alone together. The others discover a new bunker -- and a disturbing secret that lies within.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E07 - Don't Talk to Strangers
1.plot: A band of armed strangers tries to extract information from Patrick. Rasmus begins to unravel in the wake of a grim discovery.

1.title: FR - The Rain - S01E08 - Trust Your Instincts
1.plot: The group arrives at Apollon headquarters, where Simone learns startling truths about the virus, her father and Rasmus.

2.title: FR - The Rain - S02E01 - Avoid Contact
2.plot: On the run from Apollon soldiers, the group follows a set of coordinates to a base where rebel scientists are working on a vaccine for the virus.

2.title: FR - The Rain - S02E02 - The Truth Hurts
2.plot: Martin accompanies Simone on a journey to retrieve her father's computer. At the base, Patrick stumbles upon a hidden room filled with strange devices.

2.title: FR - The Rain - S02E03 - Stay in Control
2.plot: As Apollon surrounds the base, Simone scrambles to find a cure. Rasmus's secret draws Sarah to him -- but threatens to tear the group apart.

2.title: FR - The Rain - S02E04 - Save Yourself
2.plot: Simone, Martin and Fie pursue Rasmus and Sarah, whose bond deepens while they're on the run. Patrick makes another discovery. Jean tries to console Lea.

2.title: FR - The Rain - S02E05 - Keep It Together
2.plot: Plagued by frightening visions, Rasmus takes his fate into his own hands. Sarah's health worsens. Jean and Lea share a tender moment.

2.title: FR - The Rain - S02E06 - Survival of the Fittest
2.plot: In the wake of their grim encounter, Martin and Patrick race back to the base. Meanwhile, a grief-stricken survivor plots revenge.

3.title: FR - The Rain - S03E01 - Don't Give Up
3.plot: Haunted by nightmares and afraid of his newfound powers, Rasmus voluntarily confines himself at Apollon. Meanwhile, Simone ventures beyond the wall.

3.title: FR - The Rain - S03E02 - Never Let Go
3.plot: Simone meets a brother and sister living off the grid. Back at Apollon, Patrick and Fie weigh their options, and Rasmus makes a horrifying discovery.

3.title: FR - The Rain - S03E03 - Stay Strong
3.plot: Simone refuses to leave unless Daniel gives her the flower extract. Sten wants to test Fie's theory and threatens Rasmus to ensure his cooperation.

3.title: FR - The Rain - S03E04 - Be the Change You Want in the World
3.plot: Simone's group approaches a camp of young survivors. Rasmus's thirst for power spirals out of control, and Martin leaves Apollon to search for Simone.

3.title: FR - The Rain - S03E05 - Love Yourself
3.plot: As Rasmus grows weaker, a worried Sarah asks Fie for help. Reunited, Martin and Simone begin the long trek back to Apollon.

3.title: FR - The Rain - S03E06 - And This Too Shall Pass
3.plot: A surprising revelation sparks new hope — but Simone and the others must ready themselves for a dangerous confrontation as Rasmus closes in.

meta.plot: What starts out as a simple, reckless mid-life affair between a genetic scientist named Yvonne and a Westminster paper pusher takes an intriguing turn when she realizes he’s a spook – then suddenly gets very dark indeed. A provocative study of obsession, longing and just how far down a criminal path desire can take you.

1.title: FR - Sous influence - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Dr Yvonne Carmichael seems to have it all - a respected career, a beautiful home and family. However, nothing is ever as it appears, and when she receives an unexpected proposition from an enigmatic stranger, Yvonne is shocked by the passion he awakens in her. But gradually she begins to realise that there is much more to her lover than meets the eye, and she could be playing a very dangerous game indeed.

1.title: FR - Sous influence - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: In the aftermath of what has happened, a devastated Yvonne shuts down. She feels unable to talk to the police or her husband, but as a campaign of terror is mounted against her, she is pushed to her limits and turns to her former lover, Costley, for advice. They meet for one last time and share a passionate afternoon together, before Costley takes control of the situation and Yvonne is plunged from one nightmare into another.

1.title: FR - Sous influence - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Psychological thriller. Yvonne's life is turned upside down yet again.

1.title: FR - Sous influence - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The murder trial continues, with Costley's lawyer Bonnard basing her defence on evidence that Costley suffers from a personality disorder which would have impeded his ability to react normally during an altercation with Selway. The prosecution attack this claim. When Yvonne finally takes to the stand, she sticks firmly to her story and confidently holds her own.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E01 - Fists In Blood
1.plot: In the summer of 1955, the Cold War heats up in Helsinki. Both the Soviet Union that the United States accelerate intelligence activities,  as both are afraid Finland sliding into enemy's side in the face of presidential elections. The CIA supports Fagerholm, KGB supports Kekkonen, but who would take Finland's side?

Both the Soviet Union that the United States accelerate intelligence activities,  as both are afraid Finland sliding into enemy's side in the face of presidential elections. The CIA supports Fagerholm, KGB supports Kekkonen, but who would take Finland's side?

1.plot: Big money is always involved whenever there is top secret information for sale. What is going on at the Porkkala military base leased to the Soviet troops, which is only twenty kilometers away from Helsinki?

1.plot: Big money is always involved whenever there is top secret information for sale. What is going on at the Porkkala military base leased to the Soviet troops, which is only twenty kilometers away from Helsinki?

1.plot: While the U.S. embassy investigates the strange death of its CIA agent and receives surprising assistance from Washington, Nyrkki decides to strike directly at the Porkkala military base, closely guarded by the Red Army.

1.plot: While the U.S. embassy investigates the strange death of its CIA agent and receives surprising assistance from Washington, Nyrkki decides to strike directly at the Porkkala military base, closely guarded by the Red Army.

1.plot: The CIA and the KGB are furiously investigating the agent's death and Porkkala's security breach. As a member of the team, Helena follows the wife of KGB agent Sergejev and faces against Hertta Kuusinen.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E04 - Woman's instinct
1.plot: The CIA and the KGB are furiously investigating the agent's death and Porkkala's security breach. As a member of the team, Helena follows the wife of KGB agent Sergejev and faces against Hertta Kuusinen.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E06 - Allies
1.plot: Kekkonen is the center of attention at Tabe Slioor's party. Of course, Nyrkki is also there and has to witness Paasikivi's outburst.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E06 - Allies
1.plot: Kekkonen is the center of attention at Tabe Slioor's party. Of course, Nyrkki is also there and has to witness Paasikivi's outburst.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E07 - The Price of Freedom
1.plot: Fagerholm's election campaign gets a sizeable remittance from the U.S, that Nyrkki gets a lead on. The struggle between the members of the CIA agents is getting harder and mistrust is growing inside Nyrkki too.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E07 - The Price of Freedom
1.plot: Fagerholm's election campaign gets a sizeable remittance from the U.S, that Nyrkki gets a lead on. The struggle between the members of the CIA agents is getting harder and mistrust is growing inside Nyrkki too.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E08 - The Last Mission
1.plot: Julius is beaten and trapped, but Helena reconciles her sins with Sergejev’s gifts. Operation Baba Yaga kicks off at Christmas when Yrjö surprises Helena and Julius with his Christmas present.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E08 - The Last Mission
1.plot: Julius is beaten and trapped, but Helena reconciles her sins with Sergejev’s gifts. Operation Baba Yaga kicks off at Christmas when Yrjö surprises Helena and Julius with his Christmas present.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E09 - Return to Porkkala
1.plot: The return of Porkkala and the presidential election getting closer. Will CIA agent Lisa succeed in makingJulius an ally? Helena organizes the defect of Sergejev and her children to the west.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E09 - Return to Porkkala
1.plot: The return of Porkkala and the presidential election getting closer. Will CIA agent Lisa succeed in makingJulius an ally? Helena organizes the defect of Sergejev and her children to the west.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E10 - Kekkonen, Kekkonen, Kekkonen
1.plot: On the eve of the presidential election, Helena and Julius confide in each other. CIA agent Lisa has decided not to leave Fagerholm's victory to a chance, but Nyrkki will stand their ground.

1.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S01E10 - Kekkonen, Kekkonen, Kekkonen
1.plot: On the eve of the presidential election, Helena and Julius confide in each other. CIA agent Lisa has decided not to leave Fagerholm's victory to a chance, but Nyrkki will stand their ground.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E01 - On the Edge of the Grave
2.plot: Kekkonen takes office and the Nyrkki buries one of its members. Helena is still searching for answers about her past.  A routine gig turns into a war zone when a new enemy appears on the scene.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E02 - Strikebreakers
2.plot: Helena discovers a shocking secret about her mother. Helena and Olavi are tasked with finding out who is behind the general strike while Aune and Yrjö search for their enemy.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E03 - Old And New
2.plot: The strike ends and Kekkonen rewards Yrjö by sending him on leave. Helena and Olavi have a fun evening together while Tabe meets a new acquaintance. Aune visits an old friend.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E04 - With Two Cards
2.plot: Nyrkki finds out that the government is about to attend a top secret meeting, and fears for the worst. Helena and Olavi resort to old tricks and Tabe saves the day.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E05 - Betrayers And The Betrayed
2.plot: Nyrkki is on the verge of falling apart and is questioning who it can trust. Helena takes a huge risk to save Finland and find the truth about her mother. Olavi pays a high price for his loyalty.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E06 - Life Or Death
2.plot: While Helena fights with her past and Yrjö for his life, Olavi makes a hard decicion. Aune enjoys the power she has gained and Tabe decides to turn over a new page in her life.

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E07 - The Devil's Deal
2.plot: Helena meets her father and Tabe meets an old friend. Helena makes a deal with the devil. Olavi is on his way to hell. Nyrkki must save Finland, but is it too late?

2.title: FR - Shadow Lines - S02E08 - Fist Punch
2.plot: As they fight for their country, the members of the Nyrkki learn that they must join forces once more to save themselves.

meta.plot: During the 1950s, Helsinki was the focal point of the Cold War, as global powers and their intelligence agencies coalesced in the small neutral country that stood between the East and the West. Shadow Lines is an international spy thriller that follows a secret intelligence team whose mission is to defend the independence of Finland no matter the cost.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: 17-year-old Gita reluctantly moves back to a small town in Poland after a stint in Wales and enrolls in school despite her family's objections.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Faced with her new friends' prejudice, Gita makes up an alternative life story. Tagar flees relentless scrutiny after an incident with his dog.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Learning the truth behind her parents' plan, Gita visits her ousted sister and realizes the consequences of going against the family.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With her friends from Wales visiting, Gita basks in their acclaim as she solidifies her double life. Viola gets advice to tackle the debt.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Gita finds that her newfound freedom is short-lived as Marko brings her along on a business trip where Janko awaits.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As tragedy strikes twice, Gita learns the truth about Tagar. Eliza questions her actions when confronted by the priest.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A brutal attack sends shock waves through Biała Góra. Gita grieves by cementing a legacy while Eliza fears retribution from Mikołaj.

1.title: FR - Infamia - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Family or infamy? An act of defiance causes a ruckus within the family, leading to merciless repercussions.

meta.plot: Caught between her Roma roots and pressure from her friends, a 17-year-old girl aspires to become a hip-hop musician despite her parents' strict rules.

When her husband, Lee, is murdered, Sarah Manning comes to realize that she knows nothing about his past. Sarah begins to question who Lee actually was and what he did in his work for a powerful global organization. And why did Lee, a salesman, need to carry a gun?

1.title: FR - Enquête à haut risque - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The wife of a man traveling on business for a large drug company learns that her husband has died while on a business trip.

1.title: FR - Enquête à haut risque - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: An international conspiracy seems to be behind the death of Sarah's husband.

1.title: FR - Enquête à haut risque - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Sarah makes an unexpected discovery.

1.title: FR - Enquête à haut risque - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Sarah tries to blackmail Gumbiner-Fischer.

1.title: FR - Enquête à haut risque - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Sarah buries her husband and attends the funeral of the drug company's security head, where she confronts Dr. Hoffman, whom she believes is behind the string of deaths.

1.title: FR - Enquête à haut risque - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As the investigation into the international conspiracy is shut down, Sarah and DS Byrne continue to dig into the cause of the many deaths connected to the drug company, which seem to be connected to a plot of land owned by the company. Season finale.

meta.plot: Murderers think they have committed the perfect crime. But the investigators will do everything to find the flaw in the Machiavellian plan devised by each killer.
