Barry encourages Vickie to share her secret with her family, which makes Nora realize she needs to come clean with her parents about Thawne.

5.title: FR - Flash - S05E18 - Godspeed
5.plot: After discovering that Nora is working with Thawne, Barry and Iris disagree about how to handle their daughter in the wake of this shocking news. Team Flash isn't sure they can trust Nora, so they go through her journal to find out exactly how she came to work alongside their greatest nemesis.

5.title: FR - Flash - S05E19 - Snow Pack
5.plot: When Icicle returns to enact the next phase of his devious plan, Caitlin and her mother, Dr. Carla Tannhauser, must resolve their long-combative relationship to defeat the icy monster. After Barry makes a big decision about their family without consulting her, Iris decides to take matters into her own hands.

5.title: FR - Flash - S05E20 - Gone Rogue
5.plot: Barry continues to struggle with how he feels about Nora's betrayal. Brie Larvan, Joss Jackam and Peter Merkel return to Central City. Meanwhile, Cisco makes a bold decision.

5.title: FR - Flash - S05E21 - The Girl With The Red Lightning
5.plot: Team Flash is on high alert after Cicada II threatens to unleash a dangerous virus that would put all meta-humans at risk.

5.title: FR - Flash - S05E22 - Legacy
5.plot: Barry faces off with his oldest, and most formidable nemesis, Reverse Flash.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E01 - Into The Void
6.plot: While Barry and Iris deal with the heartbreaking loss of their daughter, Nora, the team faces their greatest threat yet — one that threatens to destroy all of Central City. Meanwhile, Killer Frost has a brush with death that results in an unexpected new dynamic that will change her relationship with Caitlin forever.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E02 - A Flash of the Lightning
6.plot: Faced with the news of his impending death, Barry's resiliency suffers as he struggles to fight fate. Meanwhile, Cecile's career as a D.A. conflicts with her identity when she crosses paths with a villainous meta-human.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E03 - Dead Man Running
6.plot: Knowing that Crisis is only weeks away, Barry prepares a member of Team Flash for life without him while hunting a terrifying meta-human with an unquenchable thirst. Meanwhile, Ralph uncovers a family secret.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E04 - There Will Be Blood
6.plot: Barry's efforts to prepare Cisco for Crisis are derailed when Cisco schemes to save Barry's life instead. Meanwhile, Ramsey Rosso uses his deadly new abilities to save his own life, while sacrificing his humanity in the process.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E05 - Kiss Kiss Breach Breach
6.plot: Cisco's faith in his ability to fill Barry's shoes as Team Leader is upended when he learns of a shocking murder. Meanwhile, Killer Frost trusts no one except herself to hunt down the dangerous Ramsey Rosso.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E06 - License to Elongate
6.plot: Barry turns his attention to prepping Elongated Man for life after Crisis and without The Flash, but Ralph ultimately teaches Barry a lesson. Meanwhile, Cecile faces her own moment of self-discovery while helping a recuperated Chester P. Runk reclaim his identity.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E07 - The Last Temptation of Barry Allen (1)
6.plot: As Barry Allen stands on the threshold of his impending death in Crisis, his convictions are tested when the monstrous Dr. Ramsey Rosso infects The Flash with a mysterious, hallucinogenic contagion. Meanwhile, reporter Iris West-Allen uncovers a vast conspiracy.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E08 - The Last Temptation of Barry Allen (2)
6.plot: With The Flash freshly infected by the monstrous Bloodwork, Iris and Cisco battle to help Barry take control of himself before he’s lost forever to Ramsey’s influence. Meanwhile, the rest of Team Flash fight to reclaim control of Central City from Bloodwork’s growing army.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E09 - Crisis on Infinite Earths: Part Three (III)
6.plot:
Pariah enlists Black Lightning to help stop the Anti-Monitor after Flash-90 shares what he learned from his battle in ‘Elseworlds.’ With the help of Black Lightning, Barry, Cisco and Killer Frost come up with a plan that could save them all. Meanwhile, Iris has a heart-to-heart with Ryan Choi, while Oliver and Diggle return to an old familiar stomping ground.

The crossover starts on Supergirl S05E09 and Batwoman S01E09. It continues on Arrow S08E08 and Legends of Tomorrow S05E01.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E10 - Marathon
6.plot: After "The Citizen" prints an explosive story, Iris' life is threatened; refusing to hide from her attackers, Iris sets out to expose a dangerous organization; Barry must face the consequences of the Crisis and fulfill Oliver Queen's wish for him.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E11 - Love Is a Battlefield
6.plot: Barry and Iris plan a romantic dinner for Valentine's Day but their evening is interrupted by an old foe - Amunet; Frost gets into the holiday spirit and attempts to help Allegra reconnect with an old love.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E12 - A Girl Named Sue
6.plot: After months of searching for Sue Dearbon, Ralph gets a lead on her whereabouts and finally comes face to face with his missing client. However, Sue refuses to return home to her family, and instead, takes Ralph on a daring adventure. Iris faces a new challenge while Barry considers a potentially dangerous request from a trusted source.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E13 - Grodd Friended Me
6.plot: Feeling overwhelmed with all the changes since Crisis, Barry conducts an experiment that goes awry and puts him directly in Gorilla Grodd’s path. Expecting the worst, Barry is surprised when Grodd asks for his help. Unfortunately for both The Flash and Grodd, things get worse when another villain appears – Solovar. Meanwhile, Iris works with Eva to escape the Mirrorverse.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E14 - Death of the Speed Force
6.plot: Kid Flash returns to Central City with a Zen attitude and new tricks up his sleeve. While thrilled to see his family again, Wally confides to Barry that he returned because he thinks there is something wrong with the speed force. Meanwhile, Cisco returns from his fact-finding mission across Earth-Prime.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E15 - The Exorcism of Nash Wells
6.plot: The Flash takes on a dangerous new meta named Sunshine. Cisco sets out to help Nash.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E16 - So Long and Goodnight
6.plot: After Black Hole hires Rag Doll to kill Joe, Singh suggests he go into Witness Protection but Joe refuses to stop investigating Carver.  While investigating Carver with Cisco, Ralph runs into Sue. Iris becomes suspicious of Eva.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E17 - Liberation
6.plot: After recent events, Barry takes a closer look at his life with Iris. Eva makes a bold move.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E18 - Pay the Piper
6.plot: When Godspeed returns, Barry turns to Hartley Rathaway for help. However, things get tense quickly after Barry realizes one of the changes from Crisis is that The Flash and Pied Piper are now enemies. Meanwhile, Iris tries to escape the Mirrorverse.

6.title: FR - Flash - S06E19 - Success Is Assured
6.plot: Barry considers a risky plan to save Iris from the Mirrorverse. Ralph attempts to stop Sue from making a grave mistake that could destroy her life.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E01 - All's Wells That Ends Wells
7.plot: When an experiment to save Barry's speed backfires, Nash Wells searches for a way to save The Flash and comes up with a dangerous plan. Meanwhile, Iris makes a startling realization inside the Mirrorverse and Cecile faces off with Rosa Dillon.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E02 - The Speed of Thought
7.plot: When Barry suddenly gains the power of speed thinking, he attempts to use his new gift to save Iris. While Barry is thrilled with his new power, Cisco is hesitant to trust it. Meanwhile, Eva must face a shattering truth.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E03 - Mother
7.plot: As Eva becomes more powerful, Barry and team must find a way to stop her. They are shocked when an old friend - Sue Dearbon risks her life to help.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E04 - Central City Strong
7.plot: The Flash must deal with Abra Kadabra's sudden return to Central City. The villain is back with a vengeance and a score to settle. Meanwhile, Allegra deals with a tricky situation and Caitlin suspects something is off with Frost. Iris is forced to look at a dark moment in her past.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E05 - Fear Me
7.plot: When a powerful new villain, Psych, channels and amplifies everyone's fears in order to wreak havoc on Central City, Barry realizes, with Cecile's help, that he must face his own worst fear in order to beat this new threat. Meanwhile, Joe is surprised when Kristen Kramer from the Governor's Municipal Logistics Commission drops into CCPD for a visit. Iris warns her father to dig deeper on why Kristen is actually there. Caitlin and Frost argue about how to live their lives.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E06 - The One With The Nineties
7.plot: Cisco and Chester travel back in time and get stuck in 1998, repeating the same day over and over again. The key to returning home is at Chester's childhood home but he refuses to visit.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E07 - Growing Pains
7.plot: When a mysterious ice powered enemy frames Frost for a brutal crime, she must find a way to clear her name; Barry and Iris have a surprise houseguest, and Joe continues to deal with Kristen Kramer.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E08 - The People v. Killer Frost
7.plot: With Frost facing an unjust punishment for her past crimes, Caitlin goes to great lengths to save her sister. Meanwhile, Barry's efforts to protect Speed Force Nora lead to a shocking discovery.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E09 - Timeless
7.plot: After a devastating betrayal, Barry turns to Timeless Wells for help. Meanwhile, Iris leads Team Citizen down a dangerous road in search of answers, and Cisco confides his biggest fear to Kamilla.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E10 - Family Matters (1)
7.plot: Iris is pushed to the limit as she seeks to uncover the mysterious truth about Psych; Barry initiates a new training system, that could potentially backfire, with devastating consequences; Joe and Cisco make life-altering decisions.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E11 - Family Matters (2)
7.plot: Barry and Iris come together to try and stop a dangerous force from destroying Central City.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E12 - Good-Bye Vibrations
7.plot: Cisco and Kamilla tell the team they are leaving Central City. However, Barry, Iris and Caitlin don't have much time to digest the news because a new version of Rainbow Raider strikes and OG Team Flash must join together one final time to save the city.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E13 - Masquerade
7.plot: Cecile is forced to confront her past in order to break free from a psychic prison. Meanwhile, Chester takes over for Cisco but makes a mistake that puts Barry in serious danger. Joe investigates Kristen Kramer's old military ties and discovers an unsettling truth.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E14 - Rayo De Luz
7.plot: When Ultraviolet returns to Central City, Allegra is determined to find her cousin and change her heart. Meanwhile, Joe finds evidence that Kristen Kramer may not be the good cop she appears to be.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E15 - Enemy at the Gates
7.plot: When an army of Godspeeds attack Central City, Barry and Iris must put their family plans on hold and focus on the latest threat to their home. Meanwhile, Chillblaine is released from prison and claims to be reformed but Frost has her doubts.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E16 - P.O.W.
7.plot: John Diggle arrives in Central City with a weapon to help Barry stop the Godspeed War. Meanwhile, Allegra and Ultraviolet's new bond is put to the ultimate test, while Joe and Kristen Kramer are hunted by a former colleague of hers.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E17 - Heart of the Matter (1)
7.plot: Barry and Iris greet their future children, XS and Bart, only for a shocking secret to threaten their new familial harmony. Meanwhile, the Godspeed war intensifies and threatens to destroy Central City.

7.title: FR - Flash - S07E18 - Heart of the Matter (2)
7.plot: The Flash enlists a host of speedster allies, including Iris and his children from the future - Bart and Nora West-Allen - to end the speedster war and defeat a deadly new adversary: the villainous Godspeed.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E01 - Armageddon (1)
8.plot: When a powerful alien threat arrives on Earth under mysterious circumstances, Barry, Iris and the rest of Team Flash are pushed to their limits in a desperate battle to save the world. But with time running out and the fate of humanity at stake, Flash and his companions will also need to enlist the help of some old friends if the forces of good are to prevail.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E02 - Armageddon (2)
8.plot: Despero warns The Flash that great tragedies will befall the speedster and cause him to lose his mind. Once that happens, Armageddon will begin. Determined to prove Despero wrong, Barry doubles down on proving his innocence but a devastating revelation from Iris pushes him to the edge and sends him to seek counsel from Black Lightning.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E03 - Armageddon (3)
8.plot: Barry meets Black Lightning at the Hall of Justice after things take a dire turn with Despero. Iris suspects something is off with Despero's vision of the future so she seeks help from a powerful ally.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E03 - Armageddon (3)
8.plot: Barry meets Black Lightning at the Hall of Justice after things take a dire turn with Despero. Iris suspects something is off with Despero's vision of the future so she seeks help from a powerful ally.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E04 - Armageddon (4)
8.plot: Barry is shocked when Eobard Thawne returns in the most unexpected way, and with a tie to a loved one. Damien Darhk offers advice to Barry but there is a catch. An epic battle begins with Reverse Flash pitted against The Flash, Team Flash, Batwoman, Sentinel and Ryan Choi.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E05 - Armageddon (5)
8.plot: An opportunity presents itself for The Flash to end his lifelong battle with Reverse Flash for good, but the payoff could be too much for Barry and team to handle. Meanwhile, Mia Queen drops in from the future looking to save a lost loved one, and she won't let anything stand in her way.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E06 - Impulsive Excessive Disorder
8.plot: After returning home from a visit for their parent's vow renewal, Bart and Nora quickly realize that things are not exactly as they left them. The duo race to repair any fissures in the timeline and restore everything back to the way it is supposed to be.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E07 - Lockdown
8.plot: When a criminal invades the CCPD, Barry and Kramer must trust and rely on each other if they are going to make it out safely. Meanwhile, Caitlin learns a valuable lesson while out with Snow and Mark.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E08 - The Fire Next Time
8.plot: Barry trusts his instincts during a murder investigation, believing the suspect, despite the overwhelming evidence against him, meanwhile Iris gives Allegra an opportunity to be a mentor.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E09 - Phantoms
8.plot: Barry and Team Flash get closer to figuring out the Fire Meta but no closer to finding him meanwhile Iris, needing a distraction, follows a story to Coast City.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E11 - Resurrection
8.plot: Barry and Chester may have found a way to stop the "Black Flame" from hurting anyone else meanwhile Caitlin decides to handle a situation on her own, possibly putting more innocent lives in danger.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E12 - Death Rises
8.plot: With a new Meta terrorizing the city, Joe lends a hand to the local authorities, meanwhile Barry gets an assist from Cecille who helps to track the mass murderer.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E13 - Death Falls
8.plot: Team Flash is under attack, and each must fight to save not only themselves but each other.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E14 - Funeral for a Friend
8.plot: Team Flash uses the distraction of a bank robbing Meta to detract from the grief of losing someone they love.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E15 - Into the Still Force
8.plot: The Flash gets an assist from XS. Meanwhile, CCPD enlists Chester for help when a mysterious device is found at a crime scene.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E17 - Keep It Dark
8.plot: The Flash goes off the grid to look for answers about a new Meta in town. Meanwhile, Allegra pulls out all of the stops at CC Citizen Media, to protect a source and a friend.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E17 - Keep It Dark
8.plot: The Flash goes off the grid to look for answers about a new Meta in town. Meanwhile, Allegra pulls out all of the stops at CC Citizen Media, to protect a source and a friend.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E18 - The Man in the Yellow Tie
8.plot: With a new speedster in town, The Flash gets much more than he bargained for, meanwhile Cecile's powers experience a growth spurt allowing her to aid Team Flash on an entirely different level.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E19 - Negative (1)
8.plot: The Flash and team are in for the fight of their lives, meanwhile, Iris discovers the cause of her time sickness.

8.title: FR - Flash - S08E20 - Negative (2)
8.plot: With The Flash still reeling from everything that just happened, the rest of the team rallies to support him when he needs it the most.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E01 - Wednesday Ever After
9.plot: Barry creates a map book to guide him and Iris throughout their future in order to keep her safe, but the results are not what he expected, and instead, they relive the same day over and over again. Joe has a heart-to-heart with Cecile. A new big bad is introduced to Team Flash and friends and foes, old and new, begin to descend upon Central City.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E02 - Hear No Evil
9.plot: Barry feels guilty for what happened to Caitlin, and Mark comes up with a plan that makes everyone skeptical. Meanwhile, Red Death looms in Central City and commands that failure is not an option. Joe asks Cecile to make a choice that leads Cecile to think about the greater good. Allegra and Chester take a step in a new direction. Lastly, old friends pay an unexpected visit to S.T.A.R. Labs.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E03 - Rogues of War
9.plot: Barry and Iris start to put together the pieces of what's happening in Central City and believe they know what the Rogues are after. Team Flash works together and recruits some unlikely allies to help, and the plan does not go as Team Flash expects. Meanwhile, Allegra does her best to avoid having a conversation with Chester.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E04 - Mask of the Red Death (1)
9.plot: The Flash is forced to make an impossible choice. With the power out in the city, Team Flash calls upon the Rogue Squad to help as Iris is visited by an old friend. Joe and Cecile work on finding a balance.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E05 - Mask of the Red Death (2)
9.plot: As the Red Death wreaks havoc on Central City, Barry and Iris come up with a plan and turn to Cecile for help. Barry is faced with what he thinks was his greatest mistake and the Red Death's greatest success. Khione wants to help Team Flash, but Barry can't risk losing her. Joe gives Barry a much-needed pep talk.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E06 - The Good, the Bad and the Lucky
9.plot: As Barry and Iris prepare for their new life, luck changes for those in Central City. Cecile takes on a case with Allegra's help, involving a string of unfortunate – and highly unexpected – events. Meanwhile, Chester and the team work with Khione to figure out her abilities.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E07 - Wildest Dreams
9.plot: Iris is visited by Nia Nal, as she needs Iris' help. When Iris and Nia fall into a fever dream and explore different possibilities for their lives, Barry, Chester, Allegra, and Cecile desperately try to help them. Meanwhile, Mark entertains Khione, but they have different ideas of what is fun, leaving Khione to feel that Mark is trying to make her something she is not.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E08 - Partners in Time
9.plot: A seemingly simple mold inspection at S.T.A.R. Labs leads to unexpected time anomalies. Barry and Iris try to make sense of the confusion - and figure out how to get back to their reality. Chester admits a secret to Allegra, which makes things awkward between the two, and Allegra relies on Cecile to act as a buffer. Meanwhile, Khione meets with an old friend of Team Flash.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E09 - It's My Party and I'll Die If I Want To
9.plot: Team Flash throws a surprise birthday party for Barry, but things go terribly awry when Ramsey Rosso crashes the festivities.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E10 - A New World (1)
9.plot: As Iris receives word of a career milestone, Barry is suddenly nowhere to be found. In trying to get back home, Barry runs across many familiar faces. Khione continues to figure out her powers, and Chester works on a suit for Allegra.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E11 - A New World (2)
9.plot: Iris is alarmed by Barry's disappearance and Cecile assures her everything will be ok, but does she know that for certain? Team Flash is affected by a mysterious substance and Khione develops a better understanding of what she can and cannot control.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E12 - A New World (3)
9.plot: Team Flash works together to figure out how to protect Barry, all while being very careful who they trust. Cecile is skeptical of the plan after an unsuccessful attempt. Khione's confidence in Chester enables him to convince Cecile to try one more time.

9.title: FR - Flash - S09E13 - A New World (4)
9.plot: The Flash, the fastest man alive, is tasked with his greatest challenge yet, to save the timeline and save existence. Friends old and new gather for an epic battle to save Central City, one last time.

meta.plot: Jeune expert de la police scientifique de Central City, Barry Allen se retrouve doté d'une vitesse extraordinaire après avoir été frappé par la foudre. Sous le costume de Flash, il utilise ses nouveaux pouvoirs pour combattre le crime.
Follows the lives of the Murrays as they struggle to keep their beloved ranch afloat.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E01 - Legend of the Fall
1.plot: Following a tragic event, a renowned rodeo family must pick up the pieces to save their Colorado ranch.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E02 - Rodeo and Juliet
1.plot: Cash’s ride at Boulder Rocky Mountain Rodeo puts the McMurrays back in business. Meanwhile, Tuff and Valeria are forced to work on their friendship as they work to save the ranch.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E03 - The McMurray Curse
1.plot: The McMurrays gear up to host the annual Bull Riders League Gala. Isabel must spiff up the barn and Cash to impress judges. Missy is anxious about returning to trick riding.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E04 - Estella
1.plot: Missy and Gus get closer when she agrees to give his niece a tour of the ranch, and Valeria works her way into the ranch hand boys club via their traditional Poker game.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E05 - When it Rains...
1.plot: Missy brings Cash as her plus-one to the Frontier BBQ, but Cash feels out of place when his biggest competition, Hudson Cooper, shows up too.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E06 - Your Cheatin’ Heart
1.plot: Isabel and Hank decide to woo Gus’s dad, Daniel Booker, to invest in their new business venture. Missy tries to meet with the strange woman from the Frontier BBQ.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E07 - Ride or Die
1.plot: Missy heads to Denver to judge a pageant. Isabel and Hank realize selling the town on the stadium deal will prove harder than expected.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E08 - Speak Now or Forever Hold Your Peace
1.plot: Romance is in the air when the McMurrays prepare to host a Booker family wedding at the ranch! Everyone has a role to play in preparing for the big day.

1.title: FR - Ride - S01E09 - Truths Laid Bare
1.plot: Valeria finally reveals the secrets of her past, and the full truth of Austin's secrets come to light, causing Cash to spiral into a dark and dangerous place.

meta.plot: A love triangle between Dan Sommerdahl, his wife Marianne Sommerdahl and their best friend Flemming Torp occurs as they try to solves killings in Helsingør.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S01E01 - Till death do us part (1)
1.plot: Police investigators Dan and Marianne Sommerdahl's 25th wedding anniversary is interrupted when a Slavic woman is found dead. The woman has given birth recently, and now every minute counts in the mission of finding the baby.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S01E02 - Till death do us part (2)
1.plot: Dan and Flemming find out that a local woman had adopted the Slavic woman's baby and pretended to her husband that it was their own. But when the biological mother demanded her baby back, things got completely out of control.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S01E03 - First Contact (1)
1.plot: When a mother is found dead on the local food market, Dan and Flemming find out that the woman, who is a lottery winner, has been a victim of a marriage swindler. They manage to capture the swindler's accomplice and male lover.

1.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S01E04 - First Contact (2)
1.plot: Dan and Flemming create a false identity for Marianne, who will pretend to be another lottery winner in order to get the marriage swindler out from hiding and hopefully caught. But the man has an alibi. Who is really the killer?

2.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Dan Sommerdaul is determined to do anything it takes to convince his wife Marianne to come back to him. But before he gets to that, he must uncover the perpetrator behind the murder of a world-famous guitarist.

2.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: A piece of information from an unexpected source complicates the murder case even more, as it leads Dan and his team to several women in the town who had been in unresolved romantic relationships with the deceased rock star.

2.title: FR - Les enquêtes de Dan Sommerdahl - S02E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: The fascinating life of Miguel Bosé: an artist whose passion and unique personality were destined to break the mold in a Spain on the verge of change.

1.title: FR - Bosé - S01E01 - LINDA
1.plot: A young Miguel is in a love relationship with Bárbara Nascimbene. On the verge of starting a family, an accident changes it all.

1.title: FR - Bosé - S01E02 - TE AMARÉ
1.plot: Miguel records "Te amaré" and publishes his fourth album, "Miguel". Before the launch, he goes to NY to study dance, where he shares his days with a great love of his life.

1.title: FR - Bosé - S01E03 - BRAVI RAGAZZI
1.plot: Miguel faces a personal crisis. His creative paralysis translates into a greatest hits album. Miguel searches for inspiration at one of his friend's house.

1.title: FR - Bosé - S01E04 - SALAMANDRA
1.plot: Miguel changes his look and it's a revolution. It is the end of the teen idol and the birth of a mature artist.

1.title: FR - Bosé - S01E05 - LOS CHICOS NO LLORAN
1.plot: Miguel and his partner have a crisis. The media spread lies about him, and he decides to disregard the false accusations.

1.title: FR - Bosé - S01E06 - SI TÚ NO VUELVES
1.plot: Miguel's father dies in 1996. Going over his life with his father, he understands that he is more like him than anyone could have imagined.

meta.plot: Kim Min Gyu has wealth and success, but lives an isolated life due to his allergy of people. He then meets and falls in love with a girl who is pretending to be a robot for her ex-boyfriend, a genius robots professor.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E01 - I’m Fine Being Alone
1.plot: Kim Mingyu gets an allergic reaction when in contact with humans, but he says he isn't lonely.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E02 - Aji 3
1.plot: Mingyu orders Aji 3 for trial. But that night, the research team accidentally spills beer on it.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E03 - I Can Do Many Things for You
1.plot: Jo Jia goes to Mingyu's house. She makes her first mistake, but she must keep pretending she's a robot.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E04 - Welcome to My Home
1.plot: Mingyu decides to keep Jia. Meanwhile, Jia discovers Mingyu is the head of KM Financial.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E05 - I Am Glad You Are a Robot
1.plot: Mingyu believes Jia is a robot and agrees to train her for a month, making Jia face many obstacles.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E06 - You Brought back the Sunlight
1.plot: Jia discovers Mingyu is her brother's boss. Meanwhile, Hwang Yoocheol hears about Santa Maria and Aji 3.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E07 - Painful Memories
1.plot: The cause of Mingyu's allergy is told. Also, Jia saves Mingyu's life when he gets an allergic reaction.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E08 - Beautiful Memories
1.plot: Hong Baekgyeon wonders if it's okay for Jia to stay with Mingyu and realizes he still likes her.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E09 - I’m Cured
1.plot: Mingyu becomes hopeful of curing his allergy. But Baekgyeon is mad that Mingyu and Jia are getting closer.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E10 - I’ll Protect You My Own Way
1.plot: Baekgyeon punches Mingyu, brings Jia home, and tells her she doesn't need to see Mingyu anymore.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E11 - I Want to Kiss
1.plot: When it is time for Jia to leave, Mingyu shows Baekgyeon his allergic reaction to keep Jia by his side.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E12 - This Is When You Must Kiss
1.plot: Mingyu learns how to kiss and tries to kiss Ye Riel on a date. Baekgyeon follows them in secret.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E13 - A First Kiss Tastes of Apples
1.plot: Jia kisses Mingyu first, which makes him feel confused and makes him keep a distance from her.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E14 - You Are Concerned for Jo Ji A
1.plot: When Baekgyeon sees Mingyu ordering Aji 3 to do household chores, he volunteers to do them himself.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E15 - I Am Not a Robot
1.plot: Baekgyeon says Aji 3 will be ready in three days. Mingyu goes on a date with Riel and meets her dad.

1.title: FR - I Am Not a Robot - S01E16 - One Person is Enough
1.plot: Baekgyeon realizes why Jia broke up with him. Meanwhile, Yoocheol shows up at the start-up competition.

meta.plot: After a nervous breakdown derailed Jocelyn's last tour, she’s determined to claim her rightful status as the greatest and sexiest pop star in America. Her passions are reignited by Tedros, a nightclub impresario with a sordid past. Will her romantic awakening take her to glorious new heights or the deepest and darkest depths of her soul?

1.title: FR - The Idol - S01E01 - Pop Tarts & Rat Tales
1.plot: As Jocelyn preps for her triumphant return, a leaked photo sends her team into crisis mode – just as a journalist arrives to do an in-depth profile on her. Later, Jocelyn has a chance encounter with nightclub owner Tedros.

1.title: FR - The Idol - S01E02 - Double Fantasy
1.plot: After clashing with her team over her album's first single, Jocelyn pushes herself to the limit on the set of her new music video, while Nikki sees potential in backup dancer Dyanne. Later, Tedros introduces Jocelyn and Leia to Izaak and Chloe from his inner circle.

1.title: FR - The Idol - S01E03 - Daybreak
1.plot: As Tedros inserts himself into Jocelyn's life by offering input on her wardrobe and collaborators, Leia brings her growing concerns to Chaim and Destiny. But when her team suddenly begins to soften toward Tedros, Jocelyn becomes even more emotionally tethered to him.

1.title: FR - The Idol - S01E04 - Stars Belong to the World
1.plot: While fighting for the upper hand in her relationship with Tedros, Jocelyn becomes determined to introduce her new persona to the world. Later, Jocelyn’s team discusses her increasing involvement with Tedros and his inner circle.

1.title: FR - The Idol - S01E05 - Jocelyn Forever
1.plot: While planning a showcase for her upcoming tour, Jocelyn begins to take control of the relationships around her – much to Tedros’s dismay. Later, a meeting with Jocelyn disrupts Nikki’s plans for Dyanne, as disturbing news about Jocelyn’s ex emerges.

1.title: FR - The King - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - The King - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - The King - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - The King - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - The King - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - The King - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - The King - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - The King - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Le directeur d'une prison exerce son pouvoir en passant par dessus la loi. Lorsque son royaume menace de s'effondrer, il va devoir mener une guerre des plus difficiles.

The story of Gabe, an ordinary man who works as an emergency call handler for the Scottish Ambulance Service in Glasgow. His world is turned upside down when he receives a desperate life-and-death call from a woman who appears to know him. With Gabe under pressure to work out who she is, he makes a decision that threatens to have devastating consequences.

1.title: FR - The Control Room - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Call handler Gabe receives a desperate call from a woman who appears to know him. Under pressure to work out who she is, he makes a decision that may have devastating consequences.

1.title: FR - The Control Room - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Gabe is blackmailed into further criminal behaviour by Anthony. In order to escape the nightmare of the present, Gabe has to confront his past.

1.title: FR - The Control Room - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Gabe has to think fast as the police and the criminals close in. He fights for his life as events take an unexpected turn.

1.title: FR - Sort Of - S01E01 - Sort Of Gone
1.plot: After a horrible date and being fired on the same day, Sabi contemplates an opportunity that would change their life, until an unexpected accident puts their new plans in jeopardy.e

1.title: FR - Sort Of - S01E03 - Sort Of Mary Poppins
1.plot: After a run-in with a choking hazard, Raffo ends up admitted to the same hospital as Bessy. Worlds collide and Raffo finds out Sabi has been hiding the nanny part of their life for the past 3 years.

1.title: FR - Sort Of - S01E04 - Sort Of Stable
1.plot: Sabi and the family try their best to fall into the new rhythm. Paul pretends to be Bessy, texting with a mysterious person named Penny. Lewis’s grand gestures fail to win Sabi back.

1.title: FR - Sort Of - S01E05 - Sort Of A Party
1.plot: Sabi encourages Violet to work through her complex emotions as the family tries to find the best way to celebrate Violet’s birthday.

1.title: FR - Sort Of - S01E06 - Sort Of Ellen
1.plot: Tensions between Sabi and Paul rise when Paul disappears and Sabi has to bail on a fun night to look after the kids.

2.title: FR - Sort Of - S02E01 - Sort of Future
2.plot: As Sabi braces for their fathers return, Deenzie drops world-shaking news.

2.title: FR - Sort Of - S02E02 - Sort of 2gethr
2.plot: Bessy struggles to make sense of her life. Sabi has an awkward first day on the job with Imran, before going to a club with 7ven and Arrow, and wonders if Olympia will stand them up.

2.title: FR - Sort Of - S02E03 - Sort of Broke
2.plot: Sabi needs to get paid. Paul is blindsided when Bessy makes a big decision without telling anyone.

2.title: FR - Sort Of - S02E04 - Sort of Who She Is
2.plot: Imran finds it hard to deal with Raffo’s independence when she joins a weekly dance class.

2.title: FR - Sort Of - S02E05 - Sort of Amsterdam
2.plot: 7ven hosts a cottage weekend for Sabi, Wolf, and Arrow, which is gate-crashed by her mum.

2.title: FR - Sort Of - S02E06 - Sort of I Love You
2.plot: Imran makes a surprise drop-in on Sabi; Bessy and Paul discover Henry is skipping school; 7ven and Wolf try to make a deal with Gaia to invest in the new club-gallery.

meta.plot: Fluid millennial Sabi Mehboob straddles various identities from bartender at an LGBTQ bookstore/bar, to the youngest child in a Pakistani family, to the de facto parent of a downtown hipster family. Sabi feels like they’re in transition in every aspect of their life, from gender to love to sexuality to family to career.

1.title: FR - De grandes espérances - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Pip, an orphan who yearns for a greater lot in life, has a chance encounter with escaped convict Magwitch that sets him on an unexpected path and into the clutches of the mysterious and eccentric Miss Havisham, who shows him a dark world of possibilities.

1.title: FR - De grandes espérances - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While Pip continues his education with Miss Havisham, he grows increasingly attached to her daughter Estella. In the city of London, the corrupt and powerful lawyer Mr. Jaggers gets a letter that will change Pip’s life forever.

1.title: FR - De grandes espérances - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Having left his life in Gravesend, Pip has a brutal introduction to London, working for Mr. Jaggers. Meanwhile Estella discovers a plan of Miss Havisham’s.

1.title: FR - De grandes espérances - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As London life begins to take its toll, Pip’s immoral work with Jaggers brings Estella back into this life.

1.title: FR - De grandes espérances - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Pip’s past comes back to haunt him as he wonders if he will ever take control of his own destiny.

1.title: FR - De grandes espérances - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As Pip and Jaggers’ plans come to a head, Miss Havisham finally comes face to face with her demons and Estella at last tries to break free after a family revelation.

meta.plot: The coming-of-age story of Pip, an orphan who yearns for a greater lot in life, until a twist of fate and the evil machinations of the mysterious and eccentric Miss Havisham shows him a dark world of possibilities. Under the great expectations placed upon him, Pip will have to work out the true cost of this new world and whether it will truly make him the man he wishes to be.
Two best friends Marion and Marit are about to finish high school and in a world where status is everything, they learn that an innocent little joke can go viral and change their lives forever.

1.title: FR - Delete Me - S01E01 - The End
1.plot: Their goal is Miami, but first, it's time for graduation parties! This is the beginning and end of Marion and Marit's relationship - two best friends and synchronised swimming partners.

1.title: FR - Delete Me - S01E02 - Hope Is Lost
1.plot: Hacker Fanny is trying to figure out who leaked the sex tape. Meanwhile, the girls learn that a scout from Miami will be watching. Unfortunately, they are only worth something as a team.

1.title: FR - Delete Me - S01E03 - The Betrayal
1.plot: The only friend Marion has left, Marit, faces a dilemma. Fanny continues using unethical methods to find out who leaked of the sex tape.

1.title: FR - Delete Me - S01E05 - Gone Viral
1.plot: When Marit defends Marion after being insulted by Christian, she is thrown off the party bus and left alone in the woods. Meanwhile, Fanny reveals a secret about herself.

1.title: FR - Delete Me - S01E06 - Rising to Fame
1.plot: Marit gets stood up at swimming practice while Marion is at the party hooking up with her crush, Christian. The night continues, and the sex tape is made.

1.title: FR - Delete Me - S01E07 - The Beginning
1.plot: Marion and Marit - best friends with hopeful dreams. Marion desperately wants to be a part of the party crowd, while Marit only cares about Miami. What happened by the pool is finally revealed.

2.title: FR - Delete Me - S02E01 - Reverse the Irreversible
2.plot: Sanna is trying to grow as a social media influencer. But underneath, Sanna hides a dark secret.

2.title: FR - Delete Me - S02E02 - Capitalize Yourself
2.plot: While Sanna continues to grow her social media, Fanny is researching her, as assigned by Mona.

2.title: FR - Delete Me - S02E03 - Revenge and Regret
2.plot: It’s the day after Sanna was supposedly raped, and she blackmails the wife for 100.000 kr.

2.title: FR - Delete Me - S02E04 - Sugar Dates
2.plot: Sanna and Lucas go on their first date. We learn what actually happened at the night of the rape.

2.title: FR - Delete Me - S02E05 - Strike a Pose
2.plot: Sanna creates her Hornyfans account, and the anonymous artist Gina reaches out to paint her.

2.title: FR - Delete Me - S02E06 - New Beginnings
2.plot: Sanna starts her own online video channel. How it all started is revealed as well as how it ends.

meta.plot: Christian lives in a "city-palace" where he earns his living doing dirty work for LINO, the criminal boss of neighborhood. When stigmata appear on his hands, Christian finds physically impossible to carry out his work, but also discovers he has gained mysterious healing powers to fight against Lino. But MATTEO, a mysterious Vatican postulator in search of signs and confirmations, is tracking him down bringing too close to a truth that could upset his life and that of the whole world.

1.title: FR - Christian - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Petty Roman criminal Christian discovers he can perform extraordinary feats when strange wounds appear on his hands. Season premiere.

1.title: FR - Christian - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Christian breaks a city-palace rule in order to get his job done as Matteo, the Vatican postulator, begins to investigate him.

1.title: FR - Christian - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Christian further explores his powers with help from Rachele, while Matteo pushes forward with his investigation.

1.title: FR - Christian - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Anna's miracle turns Christian's life upside down in an unexpected way, while Matteo receives some crucial information.

1.title: FR - Christian - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: As Christian is forced to choose between loyalty to Lino and his new role as a 'saint', Matteo meets the mysterious Father Klaus.

1.title: FR - Christian - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As Christian and Lino clash, the city-palace sides with its new leader. Matteo makes a shocking discovery and must make a difficult choice.

2.title: FR - Christian - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Lino's death puts Città Palazzo in chaos; Christian attempts to assert himself as a new leader; Matteo gets to know a new mysterious character.

2.title: FR - Christian - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: The Blond Man encourages Christian to create his kingdom in Città Palazzo; the Dark Woman leans on Matteo.

2.title: FR - Christian - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Matteo appoints himself as the preacher of Città Palazzo; Christian, Davide and Rachele set out on an unexpected journey.

2.title: FR - Christian - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Città Palazzo becomes an utopian kingdom and Christian is its undisputed leader, but the peace is not destined to last.

2.title: FR - Christian - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: The situation in Città Palazzo is out of control; the Friends of Christian scour the streets and lock up wrongdoers; Rachele struggles with a new-found power.

2.title: FR - Christian - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: When Christian's reign is seemingly coming to an end, Matteo makes a difficult choice that changes the game forever.

meta.plot: Shocked to discover that her bland and unremarkable computer consultant husband is a skilled international spy, an unfulfilled suburban housewife is propelled into a life of danger and adventure when she's recruited to work alongside him to save the world as they try to revitalize their passionless marriage.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Helen, a language professor bored with her daily routine, who makes the shocking discovery that her seemingly ordinary husband is leading an extraordinary double life.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E02 - Public Secrets
1.plot: Helen gets her first official Omega Sector assignment – going undercover with Harry and the team at an academic conference in Madrid to stop a bioweapon terrorist attack. During the mission, Harry does his best to keep his history with Ximena, a sexy cryptographer they must work with to complete the mission, away from his wife.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E03 - Separate Pairs
1.plot: Henry and Helen go undercover as billionaires when the Omega Sector team gets an opportunity to bring down a weapons dealer. Helen struggles to separate her home and new work life.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E04 - Rival Companions
1.plot: When an international catastrophe occurs on live TV, the Omega Sector team must seek out help from The Wolf, a merciless contract assassin.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E05 - Unrelated Parents
1.plot: The Omega Sector team must track down a dangerous hacker with missile codes that could cause war to break out in the middle east if they fall into the wrong hands. When the hacker turns out to be a moody teenager, Harry and Helen attempt to use their parenting techniques from home to get him to cooperate, which proves to be more challenging than handling the miscreants they usually deal with.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E06 - Working Vacation
1.plot: The entire Tasker family takes a trip to Mexico for Harry’s annual computer sales family retreat, which Helen learns has been an ongoing cover for his real job as a spy. The simple mission goes awry when a notorious spy hunter threatens to take out the entire computer sales retreat to capture Omega Sector spies while Dana and Jake are missing.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E07 - Independent Dependents
1.plot: Despite Gib’s passionate arguments, Omega Sector requires the team to work with his estranged father, Al, when the weapons manufacturing plant he built gets taken over by a domestic terrorist organization with employees trapped inside. Harry and Helen must learn to work in sync like never before to neutralize the threat, rescue the hostages and survive the bickering between Gib and Al.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E08 - Honest Manipulations
1.plot: Omega Sector has a new mission to manipulate the girlfriend of a hedge fund CEO in an attempt to collect sensitive data about the company to determine if they have been responsible for major catastrophes and loss of human life.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E09 - Bitter Sweethearts
1.plot: The Omega Sector team partners with Arnie and Sharon, two retired Omega operatives, to locate a mystery assassin who murdered members of their former team. During the mission, Arnie and Sharon give Harry and Helen a frightening glimpse at what a career at Omega can do to a romantic relationship.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E10 - Friendly Enemies
1.plot: Harry and Helen go undercover as American diplomats to befriend and recruit the Pérezes, a couple with connections that can help Omega Sector take down a rogue general who has gained missile-launching capabilities. The mission takes a turn when they realize the Pérezes have a secret of their own.

1.title: FR - True lies : Pour le meilleur et pour le pire - S01E11 - Unfamiliar Partnerships
1.plot: When an ex-Omega Sector operative asks the team to help stop the sale of weaponized uranium, Harry finds himself struggling to reconcile his loyalty between his current team and his former comrade, who continually demonstrates some questionable, yet effective, tactics.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E01 - Leveling Up
1.plot: Wayward father Gaz becomes a partner in crime when his daughter Destiny finds herself in trouble.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E02 - Supply Chain Economics
1.plot: Dave takes a troubled kid under his wing to fill a hole in his own life.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E03 - La Vie en Rose
1.plot: Hospital porter Gaz oversteps his remit when he helps a psychiatric patient rekindle his creativity.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E04 - Homing
1.plot: Desperate to earn the respect of his husband, Lomper risks everything the couple has to prove he is a success.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E05 - Re-Homing
1.plot: An unexpected friend opens Darren’s heart and mind to new possibilities.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E06 - Welcome to the Job of Your Dreams
1.plot: When all hope is lost, Horse takes a stand.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E07 - No Man Left Behind
1.plot: Lost in the woods with ex-best friend Hetty, Jean faces up to her problems and makes big decisions.

1.title: FR - The Full Monty : la série - S01E08 - It's Not the Waking, It's the Rising
1.plot: The Monty gang pulls together, breaking the law to honor a friend.

meta.plot: Taking place 25 years after the original British smash hit, the same band of brothers navigate the post-industrial city of Sheffield and society's crumbling healthcare, education, and employment sectors.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E01 - I Just Want to Be Free
1.plot: Influencer Paz has the town of Água-Marinha in a frenzy. Her arrival, however, doesn't go over well with local activists. After an argument goes viral, Paz faces backlash for using offensive language. A century earlier, in 1922, Cecília is facing difficulties in Água-Marinha, as her godparents are forcing her to marry their son. Both women seek a change of destinies… and the universe listens.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E02 - How Did this Happen to Me?
1.plot: Cecília enjoys the benefits of living in 2022, particularly the freedom to date whomever she wants. Additionally, she finds herself attracted to Maria, the woman who Paz offended the previous day. Meanwhile, Paz's mother and husband work to "uncancel" the influencer. In 1922, a desperate Paz struggles to navigate the world she finds herself in and searches for clues as to how she got there.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E03 - Me In this World
1.plot: In 2022, Cecília realizes the harm that the "House of Paz" will do to Água-Marinha and to Maria's business, leading her to make drastic changes. Maria, meanwhile, begins to see Cecília in a different light. In 1922, although she has become more aware of the limitations of the time, Paz uses her "influencing" abilities and Cecília’s best friend in an attempt to win the priest's support.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E04 - Give Me Back My Life
1.plot: In 2022, Cecília confesses to Luíza who she really is as Luíza blocks Cecília's creative decisions. Cecília decides to come out as a lesbian, and while the move backfires on social media, she is finally able to connect with Maria. In 1922, Paz learns about a mysterious mother and daughter, and the dangerous man who keeps them locked away. Paz discovers how she swapped bodies with Cecília.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E05 - Who Knows, Maybe I'll See You in the Future
1.plot: In 2022, the House of Paz's request for a foreclosure on the property goes to court. After Cecília testifies, Luíza and Gui move to block her from accessing Paz's bank accounts, as they believe she's turned against the family business. In 1922, Paz learns the truth about Bertha — she also comes from the future. Before escaping, Bertha leaves a box with Anika and warns Paz about Maurício.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E06 - Worse than Fake News
1.plot: In 2022, Cecília seeks to help Maria's business even though Luíza has cut her off from Paz's bank accounts. A fundraiser doesn't go as planned, leading to a break between Cecília and Maria. In 1922, enraged by Bertha's escape, Maurício threatens to have his sister Otávia marry Raul, provoking Paz, who he blames for Bertha's departure. Paz discovers the truth about the murder of Cecília's parents.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E07 - It's Going to take Century
1.plot: In 2022, Cecília seeks to retake control of her/Paz's life, but she loses her cool after learning that Luíza schemed to restart the House of Paz project. Luíza and Gui have Cecília placed in a wellness center to recover from her "identity crisis." In 1922, Paz plans to expose Maurício's crimes to the townspeople. But while the effort lead to Maurício's arrest, it also has an unexpected outcome.

1.title: FR - Double temps - S01E08 - End of Times
1.plot: In 2022, Cecília resumes writing in her old diary that has entries by Paz written a hundred years ago. Upon discovering that there is a day for the swap, she sets a new course for the House of Paz and redefines Paz's social media accounts. In 1922, Otávia organizes a women's march to free Paz. Amid the confusion, Maurício escapes from jail in a desperate attempt to exact revenge against Paz.

meta.plot: Paz is a self-centered influencer who arrives in the town of Água-Marinha, where she clashes with a local activist and is “canceled” for offensive insults. One hundred years earlier, in 1922, Cecília is facing a forced marriage — a life she doesn't want — in Água-Marinha after her parents’ death. Mysteriously, the universe gives the two women an exit as they are swapped into each other’s bodies.

At the Silver Creek boarding school for girls in the Australian outback, students are largely left to their own devices in their spare time. This series tells the gripping and unsparing story of how the desire to belong sets in motion a cruel dynamic.

1.title: FR - Bad Behaviour - S01E01 - Moth to a Flame
1.plot: While Jo is a struggling writer with a casual job, Alice has achieved her childhood dream as a world-renowned cellist. Struck by Alice’s coolness towards her, Jo is compelled to revisit the past, recalling their arrival at Silver Creek.

1.title: FR - Bad Behaviour - S01E02 - The Worst
1.plot: Riding high on adrenaline from Portia’s approval, Jo lands herself in trouble with a furious Miss Lacey. Alice clings to whatever crumbs of friendship Jo offers her.

1.title: FR - Bad Behaviour - S01E03 - Exeat
1.plot: Red House is reunited in the present day at the funeral of their peer Emma, one of the few girls they all remember warmly despite their different memories of Silver Creek. Jo attempts to forge a healthier path for herself.

1.title: FR - Bad Behaviour - S01E04 - Wilderness
1.plot: Fifteen-year-old Jo tries to rally the girls into standing up to Portia. Presently, Jo and Portia share a rare and honest conversation about their time at Silver Creek. Jo decides to face her past head-on.

meta.plot: Set in three distinct points in time, follow a class of FBI agents who grapple with immense changes as the U.S. criminal justice system is altered by artificial intelligence.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E01 - Part of Something
1.plot: The Class of '09 meets for the first time at Quantico. In the present, Agent Poet concludes her most challenging undercover operation only to be plunged into another. In the future, with the Bureau radically changed, Poet's career reaches a crisis point.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E02 - The Fitness Test
1.plot: At Quantico, the Class of '09 must pass a physical fitness test or face expulsion. The trainee most at risk is Tayo, and as we see him struggle in the past, in the present, he faces one of the most dangerous threats the Bureau has ever experienced. In the future, we see how these shocking events were behind the radical changes he's made to the Bureau.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E03 - Thank You for Not Driving
1.plot: At Quantico, Poet faces a challenging driving course. In the present, Poet's undercover operation brings the FBI to a critical juncture, while Tayo hunts down a domestic terrorist cell. In the future, Poet investigates the scope of Tayo's power.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E04 - Not Your Girlfriend
1.plot: At Quantico, the Class of '09 faces the meaning of taking a life. In the present, the Agents must thwart a terrorist attack and to save lives, they must take a life. In the future, we come face to face with their trauma.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E05 - The Problem Is People
1.plot: In the past, as the Class of ’09 grapple with the complex history of the Bureau, Tayo meets the love of his life. In the present, we see how his dreams of making amends for the Bureau's history are threatening that love story. In the future, the Class of ’09 finally confront each other.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E06 - Hogan's Alley
1.plot: At Quantico, the Class of ’09 must complete the impossible challenges of Hogan's Alley. In the present, Poet, pursuing a deadly serial killer, is helped by an old friend. In the future, tragedy strikes and the justice system is no longer under human control.

1.title: FR - FBI Promotion 2009 - S01E07 - Orders Night
1.plot: At Quantico, the final tests before graduation are accompanied by a reveal of where the trainees will be posted. In the present, Tayo's extraordinary rise to power is propelled by artificial intelligence. In the future, Tayo falls from grace.

meta.plot: An eccentric private investigator with a criminal past recruits a disgraced ex-cop to help solve the disappearance of a Korean tech pioneer in the wilds of Far North Queensland.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Amanda Pharrell, an eccentric private investigator with a disturbing criminal past, recruits disgraced ex-cop Ted Conkaffey, to help solve the disappearance of a Korean tech pioneer.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Ted and Amanda's hard work leads to Jong Min's remains being found in the river. Amanda is convinced there's a link between this death, and that of her friend Lars.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A shocking revelation of an affair leads Amanda and Ted to focus their attention on Yoon Sun and Olivia as prime suspects, while Ted is confronted to discover his past is still very much in the present.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: More of Jong Min's remains are recovered, leading Ted and Amanda's investigation down a darker path, just as Ted receives bombshell news from home.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Amanda is shocked to discover the attack on Ted, and is determined to find the culprit.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A major breakthrough in the investigation is threatened when Amanda's past erupts into the present.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Amanda takes a huge risk playing Twist and Bryce off against each other, and uncovers the truth about Lars' death.

1.title: FR - Troppo - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Uncovering the truth about Park's death brings little comfort for Ted and Amanda; but Ted's digging into Amanda's past finally pays off, and she is able to confront her demons.

meta.plot: In this all-encompassing competition series, amateur climbers are put through a rigorous series of mental and physical challenges, utilizing the most intimidating ascents in the world to crown the world’s best amateur climber.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E01 - Deep Water Solo
1.plot: Kicking off their journey in Majorca, Spain, Chris Sharma and Megan Martin put the skills of ten aspiring rock climbers to the ultimate test in an intimidating deep water solo challenge.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E02 - The Precipice
1.plot: After analyzing their performances in Majorca, the climbers tackle an iconic ascent where technical precision is the key to success.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E03 - High Ball
1.plot: In a true test of mental and physical strength, the climbers tackle the difficult discipline of bouldering in Albarracín, Spain.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E04 - The Cave
1.plot: After Chris welcomes the contestants to his home, they prepare for a steep 70-foot-long route that threatens to test even the most established climbers.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E05 - First Ascent
1.plot: As the contestants grow acclimated to the beautiful sights of Wadi Rum Valley in Jordan, Megan and Chris present them with the monumental opportunity to send and name a first ascent.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E06 - The Crack
1.plot: With guidance from Megan and Chris, the remaining climbers tackle traditional climbing in a nail-biting challenge that tests skill, focus, and confidence.

1.title: FR - The Climb - S01E07 - The Spire
1.plot: The final four contestants partner up to surmount a 400-foot multi-pitch climb in a nerve-racking semi-final ascent.

meta.plot: After a traumatic year, all an Indian-American teen wants is to go from pariah to popular -- but friends, family and feeling won't make it easy on her.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After recent trauma, Devi starts her first day as a high school sophomore determined to shake off old labels and finally become cool.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E02 - ... had sex with Paxton Hall-Yoshida
1.plot: Devi hesitates to tell her friends the truth about her awkward interactions with Paxton. The prospect of an arranged marriage puts Kamala under pressure.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E03 - ... gotten drunk with the popular kids
1.plot: Devi hopes to win cool points with Paxton at a party, until a surprising turn of events. Hidden emotions emerge for Fabiola. Kamala makes a choice.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E04 - ... felt super Indian
1.plot: At Ganesh Puja celebrations, Devi questions how much she identifies with Indian culture, Nalini dodges acerbic aunties and Kamala frets over her future.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E05 - ... started a nuclear war
1.plot: Devi allows rumors about her and Paxton to swirl during an overnight school trip. Fabiola opens up to Eleanor, who gets upsetting news about her mother.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E06 - ... been the loneliest boy in the world
1.plot: With absentee parents, a shallow girlfriend and no one to hang out with, Ben Gross is lonelier than ever, until an unlikely invitation offers some hope.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E07 - ... been a big, fat liar
1.plot: Devi oversteps several boundaries in an attempt to be a better friend. Eleanor’s reunion with her mother leads to multiple revelations and confessions.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E08 - ... pissed off everyone I know
1.plot: After another fallout with her friends, Devi grapples with unresolved trauma. A party at Ben’s turns out to be equal parts awkward, awful and amazing.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E09 - ... had to be on my best behavior
1.plot: Flashbacks unearth painful memories and resentment for Devi. Meanwhile, Kamala is forced to get honest as the family welcomes her suitor at home.

1.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S01E10 - ... said I'm sorry
1.plot: After unwelcome news sparks a fight with her mother, Devi seeks an escape. Mohan’s birthday brings an opportunity for closure — and for new beginnings.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E01 - … been a playa
2.plot: Ahead of their impending move to India, Devi faces her first-ever love triangle, while Nalini tries to sell her patient roster to a flashy competitor.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E02 - ... thrown a rager
2.plot: Devi plans to throw the ultimate party, but her knotty dating life may turn it into a different kind of blowout. Nalini has an eye-opening trip to India.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E03 - ... opened a textbook
2.plot: Making good grades has never been a priority for Paxton — until a mishap urges him to prove he’s more than a campus heartthrob and star swimmer.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E04 - ... had an Indian frenemy
2.plot: Devi instantly resents the new Indian girl at school, but is taken by surprise as they get acquainted. Kamala struggles to be respected at her lab.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E05 - ... ruined someone's life
2.plot: At a 24-hour school relay, Devi’s impulsive words spark an insensitive rumor. Fabiola hesitates to introduce her overenthusiastic mother to Eve.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E06 - ... betrayed a friend
2.plot: While attempting to cover her trail for fueling gossip about Aneesa, Devi's guilt grows. Nalini warms up to a nemesis. Kamala gets a rude shock.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E07 - ... begged for forgiveness
2.plot: Devi must learn the art of a genuine apology before it’s too late. Kamala considers standing up for herself. Nalini takes some parenting advice.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E08 - ... been Daisy Buchanan
2.plot: Watching an ex with someone new tests Devi’s resolve to be more mature. Fabiola struggles to stay true to herself, and grows concerned for Eleanor.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E09 - ... stalked my own mother
2.plot: A disastrous snooping incident compels Devi and Nalini to do some introspection. Paxton steps out of his comfort zone. Eleanor has a breakthrough.

2.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S02E10 - ... been a perfect girl
2.plot: As Paxton's mixed messages have Devi questioning herself, the upcoming winter dance offers a chance to determine where she stands — and what she needs.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E01 - ...been slut-shamed
3.plot: At last, Devi is dating her dream guy, but some catty gossip has her worried about taking things slow. Nalini urges Kamala to rethink a decision.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E02 - ...had my own troll
3.plot: Anonymous messages about Paxton have Devi playing detective. Aneesa feels neglected by Ben. Pati hosts a mixer to find Kamala a "suitable" partner.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E03 - …had a valentine
3.plot: On Valentine's Day, a compatibility test's results spark more drama than romance among the Sherman Oaks couples. Meanwhile, Nalini makes a new friend.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E04 - ...made someone jealous
3.plot: Kamala invites Manish over for Navratri, to Pati's annoyance. Devi isn't thrilled about taking Rhyah's son to a house party, but she's in for a surprise.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E05 - ...been ghosted
3.plot: A charity event gives Devi the chance to polish her rusty flirting skills. As awkward vibes between Fabiola and Aneesa lingers, Paxton offers advice.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E06 - ...had a breakdown
3.plot: Chasing Ivy League dreams and his dad's approval, Ben ignores warning signs of burnout until the stress of his jam-packed workload builds up — literally.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E07 - ...cheated
3.plot: Up against Des' team at a debate tournament, Devi takes her competitiveness too far. An opportunity arises for Eleanor. Pati explains herself to Kamala.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E08 - ...hooked up with my boyfriend
3.plot: A game night gives Devi and Fab a chance for alone time with Des and Aneesa, but other guests throw the evening off course. An art tutor surprises Ben.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E09 - …had an Indian boyfriend
3.plot: Watching Devi struggle with a painful memory, a nervous Rhyah orders Des to keep his distance. Paxton enlists Eleanor's help to break some news to Trent.

3.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S03E10 - ...lived the dream
3.plot: The end of the school year has the Sherman Oaks crew all up in their feels. Devi is torn between planning the future and enjoying the present.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E01 - ...lost my virginity
4.plot: An awkward end to an intimate moment has Devi fuming all summer. As senior year begins, the crew has college — and complicated feelings — on the brain.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E02 - ...gotten sweet revenge
4.plot: Bent on exposing who vandalized her car, Devi makes a bold accusation. Fabiola shakes up the robotics club's culture. Pati hides a secret from the family.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E03 - ...liked a bad boy
4.plot: As senior year continues to spiral, Devi's resolve to avoid Ethan weakens. Paxton returns to a comforting place. Nalini tackles termite issues.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E04 - ...wrecked my future
4.plot: At a college fair, Devi juggles her love life with her academic ambitions, Fabiola ponders a tricky decision and an unlikely ally comes to Ben's rescue.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E05 - ...been to New Jersey
4.plot: On a school trip to New York, Devi discovers that college may be scarier than she thought, Eleanor faces disappointment and Fabiola remains tight-lipped.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E06 - ...had my dream stolen
4.plot: With early college admissions rolling in, Devi's in for more than one surprise. Kamala warns a smitten Pati about Len. Ben overhears a hurtful comment.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E07 - ...had an identity crisis
4.plot: As Paxton struggles to let go of his past as the king of high school, he seizes a chance to thrive as a swim coach and finds closure with an old flame.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E08 - ...set my mom up
4.plot: Unsure about her own love life, Devi focuses on Nalini's — but it will mean befriending an enemy. Pati's birthday ends on a high note no one sees coming.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E09 - ...gone to prom
4.plot: After a major setback, Devi feels the burden of telling a lie and must dig deep for a second chance. On prom night, the friends share their truths.

4.title: FR - Mes premières fois - S04E10 - ...said goodbye
4.plot: The last weekend of summer coincides with a festive occasion — and on the brink of their new lives, Devi, her family and friends have lots to celebrate.

1.title: FR - Besoin d’amour - S01E01 -
FR - Besoin d’amour - S01E02 -
FR - Besoin d’amour - S01E03 -
FR - Besoin d’amour - S01E04 -

meta.plot: Marco Delgado, Marc Guttman de son vrai nom, a fait carrière dans le porno. Une modeste carrière, besogneuse, qui touche à sa fin. Depuis quelques temps, Marco est pris d’étranges malaises, il s'effondre pour un oui ou pour un non, tombe inanimé, comme foudroyé. Après avoir étudié son cerveau, on lui diagnostique un bien étrange et rare mal... Marco a besoin d’amour. S’il ne trouve pas cet amour, si on ne l’aime pas, un jour il s’effondrera et ne se relèvera pas.

1.title: FR - El Silencio - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Six years after murdering his parents, Sergio gets released from juvenile detention and becomes the subject of Ana's secret investigation.

1.title: FR - El Silencio - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Marta puts her relationship with Eneko at risk by getting closer to Sergio, who opens up about life before the death of his parents.

1.title: FR - El Silencio - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Sergio returns to the detention center and has an unexpected encounter there. Thanks to Marta, Ana discovers information that may turn the case around.

1.title: FR - El Silencio - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When the investigation wavers, Ana discovers that she and Sergio share more in common than she thought. A determined Sergio tries to find his sister Noa.

1.title: FR - El Silencio - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Pressure from Cabrera forces both Sergio and Greta to make desperate moves. Eneko tries to reconcile with Marta. The case threatens Ana's personal life.

1.title: FR - El Silencio - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Ana turns up at Sergio's house, and he insists on meeting Noa. The police try to close the case for good while a leak exposes Cabrera's methods.

meta.plot: Sergio hasn't spoken since the day he murdered his parents. Six years later, a teen girl may be the key to revealing the whole story.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E01 - Take a deep breath
1.plot: A complaint of sexual abuse in a wealthy area of Santiago, shakes everyone. While the student girls protest, Blanca Ibarra, their leader, goes missing. The police look for leads and Blanca’s sister gets involved in a dangerous online game to help them. Out of the blue, a video of the missing girl is leaked on the network: the police fear it’s too late for her.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E02 - We're gonna hunt you
1.plot: Olivia and Elisa dangerously get closer to “the wolf’s” jaws thanks to Celeste’s help in the shadows; but this is not for free and puts even the detectives in danger. The police discover an organization that marks and attacks specific women, just like it happened with Blanca. The murderers are closer than they think.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E03 - People with money, people with power
1.plot: In the midst of the investigation and the anguish to find her daughter, Bruno reveals to his wife and Fernández a hidden truth about missing Blanca. A new investigative plot arises in the case and would involve Belmar. Other packs join the wolf’s game, bringing Olivia closer to the dangerous game; perhaps too close.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E04 - Leave my mark
1.plot: Ossandón’s destiny casts serious doubts in the police to find Blanca’s whereabouts; her parents, behind the investigation, offer a reward in exchange of information. Murillo and Fernández understand they’re behind an imaginary man that hides behind his different packs to make his psychological profile invisible. A new lead of Blanca is leaked on the network.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E05 - Wolves against lionesses
1.plot: “The Wolf” has no scruples and, just like in wild life, is more effective and lethal when in pack. Olivia and her investigation staff are marked by the dark online game, showing that they are willing to do everything in order to accomplish their mission. Celeste manages to go into the jaws of this insatiable beast, but her courage puts her in a position from which she will hardly come out alive.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E06 - The games's not over
1.plot: A cornered hunting animal to become a bite is erratic and unpredictable. Tailed closely by the police, “the wolf” uses his last resources to wriggle out alive. Olivia’s past is back and she confronts her son Gonzalo with an awkward truth, but the detective has bigger problems: death is about to give its verdict on the case, although not everything is lost.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E07 - Sometimes it's good to just let it burn
1.plot: The three women detectives are about to find the alpha wolf behind the packs, but to do so, they’ll have to become a pack of women willing to show their teeth: just as new packs are born, the weak ones begin to die, although a fundamental lead may disappear with them. “The wolf” keeps claiming victims, although his insatiable hunt is about to reach an end.

1.title: FR - La meute - S01E08 - I never said his name
1.plot: The alpha in the pack is a wolf in sheep’s clothing and Olivia Fernández has just nailed him. In a race against time to rescue her mate, who now lies in the jaws of an insatiable beast, will her own life at risk. The pack is about to lose their alpha, but is he the leader of the pack?

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E01 - The Oasis
2.plot: A teenager appears dead from an overdose on the beaches of Ritoque, and Commissioner Olivia Fernandez is summoned to investigate. Meanwhile, the young men of The Pack are soon to regain their freedom. Faced with the news, 1616 - the group of activists led by Z -take action without expecting that one of its members will end up in the hands of the police.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E02 - Love Bombs
2.plot: After being arrested, Sofia is taken to a secret detention facility. She suffers abuse from the police who want to get to her leader. In turn, in the Ritoque investigation, Olivia meets the father of one of the girls who disappeared on the beach, who tries to run a parallel investigation. Finding one of the missing girls alive in Ritoque brings some light.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E03 - The Alchemist
2.plot: Following the investigation trail, Olivia and Sandra reveal that there was a second party on a yacht. They discover that the boat was rented by the owner of a company linked to computer analysis. Meanwhile, Olivia feels that her bond with her son Gonzalo is breaking day by day. Sofia discovers that behind the secret operation, there’s an old family friend.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E04 - Welcome to the Club
2.plot: Despite Olivia's opposition, Javi infiltrates the world of illegal drugs on the trail of a mysterious dealer. Blanca, Celeste and the 1616 group arrive at the secret detention facility to file a report, but they discover that it has been cleaned up. A deadly attack occurs at a university party where several young female leaders are meeting.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E05 - The Dragonfly
2.plot: Olivia begins to investigate what happened at the university and realizes that it’s similar to what happened in Ritoque. Gonzalo infiltrates The Pack’s shock group. In turn, Javi manages to make an appointment with The Alchemist, the creator of the complex drug. As Olivia goes through Elena's stuff, she finds a drawing that looks familiar to her.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E06 - The Hunt
2.plot: Valenzuela and Francisca organize a meeting with the main leaders of the extreme right. Gonzalo remains in communication with Cero to carry out a kidnapping plan. Meanwhile, Olivia meets with Pardo to tell him about an important discovery regarding his daughter.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E07 - Bad Mother
2.plot: Olivia and Elisa take Gonzalo and Celeste to a safe house. Elena and Koch meet and have a conversation in which a hidden truth comes to light. Jorquera finds faces a dilemma whether to turn in Olivia. While the parapolice officers arrive at the safe house, Valenzuela receives a call from Z, who offers him a deal he can’t refuse.

2.title: FR - La meute - S02E08 - Eye for an Eye
2.plot: Javi meets with Franco Duval's brother and something unexpected happens. The 1616 group meets up with Valenzuela. A tense confrontation ensues. At the same time, the trial against Valenzuela and his people takes place. However, Francisca continues to keep the party's flame alive. The Pack promises to return stronger than ever to seize power.

meta.plot: Blanca, student leader of the feminist movement in an occupied school, goes missing: hours later, a video of a group raping the girl goes viral. In their aim to find her, a police squad formed by three women puts their lives and that of their families at risk. As they look for Blanca and investigate, they will find out that behind this gender crime there is much more than just one offender.

1.title: FR - Le Griffon - S01E01 - A Remedy for Bad Times
1.plot: On his 16th birthday Mark's brother Thomas introduces him to the dark family secret and hands him the Chronicle of the Black Tower. A different world ruled by an eerie creature - the Gryphon. But how is the chronicle related to their father's death?

1.title: FR - Le Griffon - S01E02 - None of my Business
1.plot: With Memo's help Mark reluctantly sets out to find his brother Thomas, who has disappeared in the world of the Black Tower. Meanwhile, Becky researches Mark's past and discovers a terrible secret.

1.title: FR - Le Griffon - S01E03 - F***ing Superhero
1.plot: Against his mother's will Mark tries to find a way back to the world of the Black Tower in order to save Memo. Meanwhile, Becky tries to find out if the contents of the chronicle really exist or if Mark is suffering from hallucinations.

1.title: FR - Le Griffon - S01E04 - Easy Peasy
