1.plot: Mark and Memo hatch out a plan to free Thomas. Becky doesn't suspect a thing. She is convinced that Mark is imagining everything. So is his mother, who wants him committed to a psychiatric ward. Will Mark manage to escape?

1.title: FR - Le Griffon - S01E05 - He's Ready
1.plot: While Mark and Memo prepare for the arrival of the horned ones, Becky tries to convince Mark's mother that he is not suffering from delusions. But then fate takes a gruesome turn.

1.title: FR - Le Griffon - S01E06 - Feel your Hatred!
1.plot: Mark's mother receives a shocking tip from Bräker about her husband's death. Mark and Memo face the ultimate horror in the tower world.

meta.plot: The Gryphon, a dark power from another world, is a threat to Mark and all he loves. Mark must accept his heavy family legacy and go into battle to save our world from the Gryphon’s clutches.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E01 - Flesh and Bone
1.plot: Camila is swept off her feet by handsome Fernando. After a dreamy night out, they end up at his hotel suite… unaware they’re being watched.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E02 - Panic in Paradise
1.plot: A misunderstanding allows for Camila and David to move into Riviera Esmeralda. Pedro tests Miguel. Camila is hell-bent on uncovering the truth.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E03 - Even If It Hurts
1.plot: Camila is furious after finding out what’s making the rounds online. David questions her desire to stay. A question from Lucas catches her off guard.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E04 - Breathless
1.plot: Ángela extracts a promise from Lucas, but what he asks in return startles her. Pedro tells Tina that Miguel has taken the bait. Camila acts dismissively.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E05 - Dangerous Images
1.plot: The incident at Camila’s home triggers vivid flashbacks for her. Lucas warns Ángela about what the police might find. Pedro calls a meeting.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E06 - Red Velvet's Secret
1.plot: Ángela makes a decision about her marriage. Visions of Inti haunt Adrián. One of Miguel’s past lovers shares intimate details of their relationship.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E08 - Temptation in the Dark
1.plot: Ángela becomes increasingly cynical. Camila receives a word of caution from an unlikely character. Cris spices things up with Adrián.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E09 - Night of the Executioners
1.plot: Camila refuses to assist with an event, and is promptly reminded of what’s at stake if she doesn’t. What Pedro discovers provokes a hellish response.

1.title: FR - Faux profil - S01E10 - Don't Say Anything
1.plot: An accident leaves the community mourning. Something unthinkable comes to light as a visit to Ángela culminates in a calamitous scene.

meta.plot: Camila meets her Prince Charming through a dating app. After an idyllic romance, she plans to surprise him — only to end up trapped in a false paradise.

1.title: FR - Cecilia - S01E01 - Masamadre
1.plot: Cecilia is now sure of the sale of the family bakery during her daughter's 15th birthday. The stress and the emotions make an explosive combination that brings awful consequences.

1.title: FR - Cecilia - S01E02 - Confessional
1.plot: Cecilia is sent to the hospital because of her stroke and she needs a risky surgery. In her absence, her family brings old conflicts to the table.

1.title: FR - Cecilia - S01E05 - Uninhibited
1.plot: Cecilia makes an unexpected visit to Dr. Jiménez at the hospital. He acknowledges that her new uninhibited behavior might be because of a deep brain lesion.

1.title: FR - Cecilia - S01E06 - Mamma Said
1.plot: Cecilia, prior to undergoing surgery, invites her family over for breakfast to celebrate Mother's Day. Unexpectedly, everyone ignores her. Apparently, they are busy dealing with their own issues.

1.title: FR - Cecilia - S01E07 - Botanical Garden
1.plot: Cecilia has to have an emergency operation. Jiménez has feelings for her, so he asks a colleague to perform the surgery even when he disagrees with the type of procedure he suggests.

1.title: FR - Cecilia - S01E08 - Cecilia's Call
1.plot: After her surgical procedure, Cecilia decides she will stay with Jiménez while she recovers, going against her family's wishes. Her relatives start fighting over who she should stay with.

meta.plot: The story of a woman whose world seemingly crumbles when she suffers a stroke. What at first seems like a tragedy ends up being an opportunity to reunite her family and rebuild her life.

The gorgeous and charismatic Bo is a supernatural being called a succubus who feeds on the energy of humans, sometimes with fatal results. Refusing to embrace her supernatural clan and its rigid hierarchy, Bo is a renegade who takes up the fight for the underdog while searching for the truth about her own mysterious origins.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E01 - It's a Fae, Fae, Fae, Fae World
1.plot: Bo has been living on the run from her strange appetites and what havoc they wreak. After leaving someone she kills out in the open, she is contacted by a group called The Fae. She discovers who and what she is, and is told to join one of two tribes.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E02 - Where There's a Will, There's a Fae
1.plot: Fresh from the realization that she is a member of the Fae, Bo is approached by a strange client, Will, a real life Will O' the Wisp. The storehouse of jewels he's collected over the centuries has been stolen... by a human! While this line of work is foreign to Bo, Will offers her an irresistible payment - information about where she might have come from. As Bo gets involved in the recovery of Will's gems, she finds the shocking truth about the thief... and the weird and deadly forces that seem to also be on the trail of the jewels.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E03 - Oh Kappa, My Kappa
1.plot: Bo and Kenzi open a private investigation office. Their first job is to find a missing student at a local college. Kenzi goes undercover in the college, Bo joins campus security to uncover what happened. Bo and Dyson's relationship goes on the rocks and another species of Fae is revealed.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E04 - Faetal Attraction
1.plot: When a Fury with an unfaithful spouse tries to hire Bo to kill her husband's mistress, Bo instead takes the side of the unsuspecting human woman and puts her under protection.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E05 - Dead Lucky
1.plot: Bo is hired by a Dark Fae named Mayer to find out how a human managed to win a bet with him. The reward for finding out is having an Oracle reveal something of Bo's past to her. Bo solves the mystery by finding out that a Fae that can jump between human corpses, called a Hsien, managed the deed. In the end, the answers Bo seeks are not given, but she does learn one thing. Her mother is alive, and coming for Bo.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E06 - Food for Thought
1.plot: While tagging after Lauren and Bo in the Fae world, Kenzi becomes deathly ill (and incredibly grossed-out) when she inadvertently eats some toxic human soup at the home of an Aswang.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E07 - ArachnoFaebia
1.plot: A murder-suicide leads a human household to hiring Kenzi as a Shaman. Accidentally cleansing their house, a psychosis-inducing venomous Fae spider tags along when she returns home.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E08 - Vexed
1.plot: Bo's freelance work earns her a lead on someone who might know something about her mother... but the trail ends at Lou Ann, a death row inmate who claims not to know anything at all. Desperate to prove otherwise, and increasingly convinced Lou Ann is innocent, Bo uses all her Fae connections to try and bust her out of jail. When she has to admit defeat, Bo's goal switches to one of personal vengeance: to find Vex, the Fae that framed Lou Ann, and make him pay.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E09 - Fae Day
1.plot: A fun-filled Fae "high holiday" turns potentially deadly when a Banshee wail predicts the death of someone in Trick's bar to occur within the next 12 hours. After a scramble that puts Bo and Dyson on the Banshee's trail, the two learn the name of the Light Fae (Sean) who's marked for death – and his last wish is for them to help him reconcile with his Dark Fae brother. Bo has to heal the rift between the two brothers at great risk to herself, while trying to unravel and prevent the mysterious death omen hanging over Sean.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E10 - The Mourning After
1.plot: While investigating a baffling sex-related murder case, Bo comes into contact with Saskia, a carefree Succubus who has much to teach her. But as they work together to find the serial killer Saskia reveals her true Dark Fae colours, which tests the limits of this newfound friendship -- and of Bo's own inner bad girl. Now feeling like a third wheel, Kenzi joins forces with Trick in a race against time to help him keep an old promise and save The Dal Riata.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E11 - Faetal Justice
1.plot: When Dyson wakes up bloody and without the last eight hours of memory, he finds himself accused of murdering Ba'al, a close associate of The Morrigan's pet psychopath, Vex, and takes refuge in Trick's bar, invoking sanctuary.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E12 - (Dis)Members Only
1.plot:
Bo and Dyson go undercover as a married power couple at a swank country club to help an old friend from Kenzi's criminal past. At first they enjoy their taste of the good life – and the chance to play house. But soon the emotional pressure of the charade, and the increasing body count, push Dyson and Bo to a new level in their relationship... and prompts Dyson to give Trick an ultimatum.

It’s time for them to tell Bo all they know about her origins once and for all. But before Dyson has a chance to come clean to Bo, an unexpected arrival drops by and tries to silence him for good.

1.title: FR - Lost girl - S01E13 - Blood Lines
1.plot: Bo finally learns the identity of her mother – and that those closest to her have been keeping secrets. No longer sure who to trust, Bo decides to track down “Mommy Dearest” alone, in order to extract the truth about her own origins once and for all. While everyone frantically searches for Bo, Dyson visits an ancient Norn, a wish-granting, tree-dwelling crone, where – in order to protect the woman he loves -- he makes a sacrifice that may change his relationship with Bo forever, as she prepares for a final face off with her deadly mother.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E01 - Something Wicked This Fae Comes
2.plot: A nomadic Fae sideshow comes to town looking to take advantage of the chaos that the bombing of the Light Fae headquarters has wrought. Unbeknownst to the general Light Fae populace, The Ash is in a coma, and his bond with the land is weakening, which makes this the perfect time for the travelling circus freaks to steal the most precious thing the Light Fae possess.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E02 - I Fought the Fae (And the Fae Won)
2.plot: The hunt for the new Ash is on. Literally. A traditional Stag Hunt is held, whereby the candidate who successfully tracks and kills the Stag becomes the next Ash. Bo barely takes a passing interest in this ceremony until a surprise visitor with a vested interest in the hunt appears in her front room.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E03 - Scream a Little Dream
2.plot: As Bo struggles to accept the new terms of her and Dyson's relationship, she investigates an apartment building full of residents who appear to have lost their minds.Kenzi's choice to employ a Brownie to help around the house threatens to backfire on her.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E04 - Mirror, Mirror
2.plot: In a move of sisterly solidarity, Kenzi drunkenly invokes the Russian hag Baba Yaga to curse Dyson for his behavior towards Bo. In the sober light of day, however, Kenzi and Bo seek to remove the curse.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E05 - BrotherFae of the Wolves
2.plot: Bo and Dyson team up to track down a stolen Mongolian Death Worm on behalf of Dyson's old wolf pack mate. When things get complicated, Dyson finds himself reliving his medieval days – tormented by the hard choices he once had to make, and fighting in the present not to repeat past mistakes.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E06 - It's Better to Burn Out Than Fae Away
2.plot: The Morrigan enlists Bo's help to find a tortured graffiti artist under her employ. The young painter has killed a Dark Fae, and his urban murals are exposing Fae secrets all over town – with The Morrigan on the hook for his actions. In exchange for her help with the case, The Morrigan offers Bo information on breaking The Ash's hold on Lauren.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E07 - Fae Gone Wild
2.plot:
Bo is happy for the distraction provided by an assembly of strippers that helps break an accused cop-killer out of the police station. While Bo goes undercover at a strip joint to follow the trail of one of the apparent accomplices, Dyson and Hale simultaneously track the murderer. Both investigations meet in the middle at The Hand of Glory – a disembodied hand with remarkable powers.

Coming off The Morrigan's shocking revelation about Lauren, Bo and the doctor have a difficult conversation.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E08 - Death Didn't Become Him
2.plot: Trick’s dear friend seeks his assistance when his ballet dancer husband goes missing – or rather, his ballet dancer husband’s corpse. Bo and Dyson track the dead ballet dancer to a bizarre figure, enlisting Lauren for her scientific expertise along the way.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E09 - Original Skin
2.plot: A night out at the Dal goes awry when an insane trickster spikes the beer with a substance that transfers Bo out of her body – resulting in a ripple effect that finds our regulars inhabiting the skin of their friends, lovers and rivals. Suppressed – and not so suppressed – feelings bubble to the surface, and the brief stays in one another’s bodies gives each surprising insights into the other.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E10 - Raging Fae
2.plot: Bo joins the brutal world of underground fighting to help a human competitor juiced up on Fae "steroids" that are sending him on blackout rages – and putting his son in harm's way. Meanwhile, the sister of the first boy she ever killed shows up and confronts Bo over her deadly past.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E11 - Can't See the Fae-Rest
2.plot: When rich young humans start turning up dead, Bo agrees to go undercover to help Dyson find the Fae responsible. As she makes her way through the "Gossip Girl" world, Bo learns a deadly kind of class warfare is afoot.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E12 - Masks
2.plot: Bo enlists Dyson’s help to find an artifact she believes will release Nadia from her coma -- even though it might mean having to say goodbye to Lauren.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E13 - Barometz. Trick. Pressure
2.plot: When Trick takes matters into his own hands to foresee the future, he runs the risk of revealing too much to the wrong Fae. Meanwhile, a furious Bo confronts The Ash about a betrayal… and is stunned by his response.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E14 - Midnight Lamp
2.plot: While Bo continues to ponder The Ash’s shocking proposal, she agrees to his interim request – to kidnap a Genie. The assignment becomes complicated and dangerous, and Bo finds herself involved with the most unlikely partner.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E15 - Table For Fae
2.plot: What Bo uncovers while investigating the mysterious disappearance of human backpackers threatens her own fine physique. Meanwhile, the new man in Bo’s life sets events in motion that force Kenzi to make a desperate choice.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E16 - School's Out
2.plot: Bo goes undercover as a high school teacher to investigate a mysterious case and Kenzi soon regrets agreeing to help her. Lauren makes a much anticipated return home from vacation.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E17 - The Girl Who Fae'd With Fire
2.plot: Things heat up when Bo tangles with Fae politics in an attempt to save some very important people. Meanwhile, Kenzi risks more than she intended when she does a favour for Hale.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E18 - Fae-nted Love
2.plot: Kenzi and Trick must race to save Bo from the fallout of a steamy night gone awry before it binds the Succubus for a millennium. In its wake, Bo poses very uncomfortable questions to Trick about her origins.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E19 - Truth and Consequences
2.plot: Bo confronts a very powerful Fae, uncertain whether she can trust The Ash’s counsel. The coming War takes its first casualties – literally and figuratively – which challenges Bo’s and Kenzi’s commitments to the cause and the ones they love.

2.title: FR - Lost girl - S02E20 - Lachlan's Gambit
2.plot: The Ash takes drastic action against the threat bearing down on him, which in turn convinces Bo to make a potentially life-threatening decision. When those close to her suffer devastating injuries, Bo can no longer ignore her destiny.

meta.plot: Pernille Kurzmann Larsen, a fresh-faced nurse at a hospital, begins to question the attention-seeking tendencies of her colleague, Christina Aistrup Hansen. As Pernille delves deeper into her suspicions, she starts to believe that Christina's behavior may be linked to a series of patient deaths.

meta.plot: When Belgian-Moroccan police officer Samira Laroussa is returning luggage to victims and next-of kin in the aftermath of the Zaventem airport attacks, she's taking on the biggest task of her career. She encounters prejudice, pride and grief, but Samira perseveres in her mission to help everyone. Her blind tenacity leads her to forget one thing: herself. Lost Luggage is a bittersweet story about how people can still find solidarity, love and hope in the darkest moments.

1.title: FR - L'Art d'être riche - S01E02 - Financial Hot Water
1.plot: Twelve credit cards between two people, a potential $1.3 million lost to interest and fees — these money missteps give Ramit lots to work with.

1.plot: Ramit debates the merits of home ownership. Then, he helps a couple work better together and evaluates one family's conscious spending habits.

1.plot: To give a couple a taste of the rich life, Ramit takes them on a fantasy getaway. Then, he meets with a reality star who needs help with his spending.

1.plot: A recently engaged drag performer living paycheck to paycheck needs to get his finances in order. A couple with a good portfolio makes risky investments.

1.plot: One couple learns to speak the same financial language, another makes a plan to pay off personal debt and a third achieves their financial dream.

meta.plot: Money holds power over us — but it doesn't have to. Finance expert Ramit Sethi works with people across the US to help them achieve their richest lives.

meta.plot: The story of the famous 1989 trial of Chantale Daigle vs Jean-Guy Tremblay. Pregnant at the time of their breakup, Chantale decides to have an abortion. Jean-Guy wants to stop her. This battle goes all the way to the Supreme Court of Canada.

2.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S02E06 - Doppelbanger
2.plot: Bela seizes an opportunity when a late-night comic visits campus. Kimberly attempts to prove she hasn't been “med-zoned” by Jackson. Whitney fights to contribute to a group assignment. Leighton pursues a junior… who reminds her of herself.

2.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S02E07 - The Essex College Food Workers Strike
2.plot: Leighton grapples with "dating up" for the first time. Kimberly appeals to an unlikely source for help with the food workers' strike. Whitney sets out to crush her final lab. Bela's faces blowback from a misstep.

2.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S02E08 - Pre-Frosh Weekend
2.plot: For Pre-Frosh Weekend, Bela hosts her nerdy childhood friend Priya, who's had a surprise glow-up. Leighton prepares to come out to her dad. Kimberly seeks commonalities with Jackson, while Whitney finds chemistry with her lab partner.

2.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S02E09 - Sex & Basketball
2.plot: Whitney and Andrew attempt to bring their chemistry into the real world. Bela over-curates The Foxy’s big spotlight. Kimberly accompanies Canaan to the Econ department’s awards banquet. Leighton visits the women’s center – and Alicia.

2.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S02E10 - The Rooming Lottery
2.plot: When Leighton is elected Kappa’s campus social chair, the roommates must figure out what sophomore year will look like.

3.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S03E01 - Welcome Back to Essex
3.plot: As their sophomore year begins, Kimberly is determined to mend her friendship with Whitney. Meanwhile, Bela attempts to change her ways with a new opportunity, and Alicia drops a bomb on Leighton.

3.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S03E02 - Lila by Lila
3.plot: Kimberly tries to upgrade her dorm, Whitney has a specific gripe with a hot classmate, Bella struggles as a FAF and Leighton thinks on her future.

3.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S03E03 - Four to a Suite
3.plot: The girls meet their new roommate, Kacey. Bela weighs whether a nice guy is hot or not, Kimberly visits her first sex shop, and Whitney's increasingly busy schedule leads to some complications with a professor.

3.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S03E04 - Franklin the Fox
3.plot: Bela hooks up with the mascot, Kacey puts herself out there, Whitney struggles to find balance in her life, and Kimberly goes to her first rave.

3.title: FR - The Sex Lives of College Girls - S03E05 - Parents Weekend 2
3.plot: It's Parents Weekend at Essex once again! The girls do everything they can to keep their visiting families out of their dating lives, all while conducting an important science experiment for Bela and learning more about their new roommate Kacey.

meta.plot: Follow four college roommates as they arrive at New England’s prestigious Essex College. A bundle of contradictions and hormones, these girls are equal parts lovable and infuriating as they live out their new, free lives on campus.

1.title: FR - Les bonnes mères - S01E01 - Nella Bocca Del Lupo
1.plot: Anna Colace prepares a revolutionary strategy to challenge the ‘Ndrangheta. Lea Garofalo and her daughter Denise reconnect with their husband and father, Carlo Cosco, hoping to reconcile and put an end to their years of living on the run.

1.title: FR - Les bonnes mères - S01E02 - Famiglia E Lealta
1.plot: Denise is catapulted into an unknown world after a devastating tragedy. Meanwhile, Anna initiates a surveillance operation on the women of the ‘Ndrangheta, focusing on Giuseppina Pesce and Maria Concetta Cacciola.

1.title: FR - Les bonnes mères - S01E03 - Un'altra Vita
1.plot: When migrants whom the Ndrangheta have exploited spill out into the streets to protest their working conditions, Anna makes a risky phone call to accelerate a new phase of her operation. The search for Lea makes significant progress in the meantime.

1.title: FR - Les bonnes mères - S01E04 - Tradimento
1.plot: As the Pesce clan falters after Giuseppina’s arrest, Anna turns her attention to another potential witness: Maria Concetta Cacciola. In the meantime, Denise leaves Reggio Calabria to meet an old acquaintance.

1.title: FR - Les bonnes mères - S01E05 - Madri e figli
1.plot: Giuseppina’s decision to collaborate enables Anna to attack members of the ‘Ndrangheta clans. Her tactics clash with those in the media. Maria Concetta takes matters into her own hands, Giuseppina faces a new challenge and Denise learns a shocking secret.

1.title: FR - Les bonnes mères - S01E06 - Coraggio
1.plot: Anna Colace suffers a setback with Giuseppina. Maria Concetta fights against her new life in isolation and Denise returns to Dalia Masi in order to honour her mother’s memory.

meta.plot: The true story of three courageous women inside the notorious Calabrian ‘Ndrangheta mafia, working with newly-minted female prosecutor, Alessandra Cerreti, to bring down down the criminal empire.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E01 - To Bell or Not To Bell?
1.plot: When a dead body is found on his property, Bell suspects it is connected to an unsolved murder.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E02 - One Billboard Outside Boggsville, Florida
1.plot: Cammie and Bell search for clues to Vida's final days; Cammie receives a surprise visit.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E03 - A Fistful of Sand Dollars
1.plot: Bell is visited by one of Vida's family members; Cammie checks out the Perez's beach home.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E04 - Sex, Lies and Ponce de Leon
1.plot: Cammie finds evidence that could implicate Bell; Bell ventures off the property.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E05 - One Flew Over the Peacock's Nest
1.plot: Bell and Cammie learn another person has been killed; Cammie is pressured to turn over evidence.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E06 - Fear and Loathing in El Calvero
1.plot: Cammie takes Bell on a road trip; Millicent is left alone for the first time in years.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E07 - Machetes Out
1.plot: Bell and Cammie attempt to steal highly confidential files; Bell calls a family dinner.

1.title: FR - Florida murders - S01E08 - Cammie Get Your Gun
1.plot: Bell struggles with his lack of closure; Cammie faces a tense mediation.

meta.plot: Since personal tragedy struck five years ago, loquacious, eccentric Bell Prescott hasn't left the rambling property on the Apalachicola River that he shares with his mother.

Luca, 17 ans, tire accidentellement, avec l’arme de service de sa mère gendarme, Manue, sur sa petite amie, Nour. Alors qu’il part chercher des secours, la jeune fille disparaît. Manue et Johanna, toutes deux gendarmes du pays et mères des enfants impliqués dans le drame, mènent l’enquête dans une communauté de paysans en pleine mutation. Et alors qu’elles déterrent des conflits d’intérêts et des secrets de famille, les enjeux de l’enquête viennent peu à peu percuter leurs propres familles.

1.title: FR - L'Éclipse - S01E01 -
FR - L'Éclipse - S01E02 -
FR - L'Éclipse - S01E03 -
FR - L'Éclipse - S01E04 -
FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Edward is nervous for his family’s move to LA. Lacey's marriage is strained. Dee Dee and Zoe celebrate. Edward's flight departs for Los Angeles.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E02 - Food
1.plot: Lacey struggles to do anything right for Edward. Later, she meets more people affected by the crash at the first Grief Group therapy session.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E03 - Stuff
1.plot: Shay and Edward look for clues about the mystery girl. Adriana decides to run for her grandmother's seat. Dee Dee goes to LA to search for answers.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E05 - Haunted
1.plot: Edward heads to the city in search of the mystery girl. John visits the crash site. Sam opens up to Lacey. Amanda is haunted by her fight with Brent.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E06 - Truth
1.plot: Shay and Edward go on an adventure to find Mahira. Lacey bonds with Linda. Kojo prepares for his move back to Ghana. Dee Dee confides in Zoe.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E07 - Folklore
1.plot: Shay’s father comes back into her life, leading to tension with Edward. Adriana and Kojo take Becks to the mountains. Lacey and John hit an impasse.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E08 - Music
1.plot: Edward starts acting out. Adriana seeks advice from Eric. Sam gets candid with Vernon. Dee Dee struggles with change.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E09 - Paper Covers Rock
1.plot: A discovery rattles Edward. Adriana prepares to say goodbye to Kojo. Amanda and Steve get closer.

1.title: FR - N’oublie pas de vivre - S01E10 - Shelter
1.plot: Lacey and John search for Edward. Dee Dee throws a party. Election Day comes for Adriana. Edward revisits his past.

meta.plot: A 12-year-old boy becomes the lone survivor of a plane crash. As he and others affected by the tragedy try to make sense of what happened, unexpected friendships, romances, and communities are formed.

In 1977, Daisy Jones & The Six were on top of the world. Fronted by two charismatic lead singers — Daisy Jones and Billy Dunne — the band had risen from obscurity to fame. And then, after a sold-out show at Chicago's Soldier Field, they called it quits. Now, decades later, the band members finally agree to reveal the truth.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E01 - Track 1: Come and Get It
1.plot: Daisy Jones is a disaffected teenager who finds meaning in the Sunset Strip rock scene. In suburban Pennsylvania, Billy Dunne, his brother Graham, and their best friends Eddie and Warren form a band, desperate to escape their surroundings. When Billy and Daisy meet, her talent and his ambition will combine to change all of their lives, for better and worse. This is the story of what happened.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E02 - Track 2: I'll Take You There
1.plot: Having found her voice, Daisy navigates the LA music scene–with the guidance of her close friend Simone and legendary producer Teddy Price. Now in LA and with keyboardist Karen Sirko, the Dunne Brothers band experience their own challenges trying to make it. After a chance encounter with Teddy offers hope, the band is heartbroken to find Billy’s demons threatening to overpower his potential.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E03 - Track 3: Someone Saved My Life Tonight
1.plot: A newly-sober Billy tries to balance his artistic calling with his familial responsibility as the rest of the band pick up the pieces in the wake of a disastrous tour. Meanwhile Daisy finds it far more difficult to write music when there are expectations. When Billy writes a new song, Teddy realizes that a collaboration between the two songwriters might just be the answer to all of their problems.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E04 - Track 4: I Saw the Light
1.plot: The Six get a taste of the life they’ve been working towards when their collaboration with Daisy becomes a hit. Rather than defuse the friction between co-songwriters, this only exacerbates it — until Camila negotiates peace. Meanwhile, Graham wrestles with whether to profess his feelings for Karen at a house party in the Canyon, knowing that a wrong move could threaten the survival of the band.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E05 - Track 5: Fire
1.plot: Fresh off their newly-acquired fame and success, Daisy Jones & The Six gear up to record their first album together. However, when Billy and Daisy prove unwilling to collaborate on each other’s material, they have no choice but to try and write something from the ground up together. This proves more challenging than either expected. Meanwhile, Karen sees a new side of Graham during a beach trip.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E06 - Track 6: Whatever Gets You Thru the Night
1.plot: The band records their seminal album “Aurora,” the heart of which is the always complicated but typically fruitful collaboration between Billy and Daisy. As their working relationship intensifies, their personal relationship threatens to completely implode, causing Daisy to make an impulsive decision. Meanwhile, Camila harbors a secret of her own.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E07 - Track 7: She's Gone
1.plot: As her relationship with Bernie deepens, Simone struggles to come to terms with her identity while finding her voice in the nascent disco scene of New York City. A telegram from Daisy suggests she’s in trouble and Simone drops everything to rescue her. What she finds isn’t exactly what she expected.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E08 - Track 8: Looks Like We Made It
1.plot: As the Aurora tour begins, the band — now reunited with Daisy Jones — must come to terms with their meteoric rise to superstardom. With tension between Billy and Daisy at an all-time high, Billy’s frustration simmers to a boil while Daisy’s self-destructive habits turn tragic. Meanwhile Karen and Graham’s secret is revealed.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E09 - Track 9: Feels Like the First Time
1.plot: Her spirit broken, Daisy struggles to perform during their appearance on SNL, finding comfort in the last person she expects. After a triumphant return to their hometown Pittsburgh, the band is given a heroes’ welcome. But antipathy among the members clouds their performance and threatens their future. Meanwhile, Graham and Karen’s romance is threatened when Karen must make a difficult decision.

1.title: FR - Daisy Jones And the Six - S01E10 - Track 10: Rock ‘n’ Roll Suicide
1.plot: In what will become their final performance, Daisy Jones & The Six perform to a sold-out crowd at Soldier Field in Chicago, Illinois. This is the story of that fateful day — and how their lives were forever changed as a result.

meta.plot: Elena Santos, a young woman with a complicated past, maneuvers her way into working as a live-in nanny for an affluent family in Manhattan. She quickly learns that everyone in the mysterious building has deadly secrets and ulterior motives. What they don't know, however, is that Elena has some shocking secrets of her own.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E01 - Hen in the Fox House
1.plot: A young woman is thrust into the world of old money and deadly secrets after accepting a nanny job from a handsome widower.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E02 - Hide and Seek
1.plot: While bonding with the other nannies, Elena learns that the Wards' previous nanny vanished without warning. Elena continues her search of The Greybourne and discovers a shocking truth.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E03 - The Nanny Who Knew Too Much
1.plot: Elena snoops around Tory’s apartment while helping Darcy and Bennett, which leads to an unexpected discovery in the secret room. Elena is rattled by a surprise call from her past.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E04 - The Nanny Vanishes
1.plot: Elena becomes paranoid that she’s constantly being watched. Ginny and Elena bond while cleaning out Allie’s closet. Elena confronts her past.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E05 - Stairway to Eleven
1.plot: On Allie’s birthday, Tory, Matthew, and Jasper try to find the best way to confront their grief and honor her memory. Elena discovers someone she trusts is lying to her.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E06 - Save New York
1.plot: Elena sneaks into a masquerade ball hosted by the Greybournes. Roman searches Mrs. Ivey’s apartment. Ginny confronts Elena about her identity.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E07 - Out Like a Light
1.plot: A blackout at The Greybourne traps Elena, Roman, Bennet, Ginny and Kim in the attic. Tory and Matthew grow closer. Alex makes a disturbing connection.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E08 - Spellbound
1.plot: Elena makes a big decision about her future, and a shocking revelation about Jocelyn’s history at The Greybourne is revealed.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E09 - The Serpent's Tooth
1.plot: Elena’s cover is threatened when someone from her past unexpectedly shows up at The Greybourne.

1.title: FR - The Nanny - S01E10 - Hale Fellow Well Met
1.plot: In the season finale, alliances are tested, and new ones are formed. The Greybourne will never be the same after a tidal wave of truth finally comes out.

1.title: FR - Furtive - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After her husband, Max, is released from jail but doesn't arrive home, Zenzi Mwale struggles to find him — and gets pulled into a deadly criminal web.

1.title: FR - Furtive - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Zenzi encounters one dead end after another in her search for Max. Enrico threatens to leave her homeless, while Raymond proposes a risky job.

1.title: FR - Furtive - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The police begin to question Zenzi when another suspicious death occurs. Lufuno attempts to learn more about Zenzi's life for his book.

1.title: FR - Furtive - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Zenzi has a harrowing night. Later, the truth of Max's crime and Esulu's death begins to emerge. Fearing for Zenzi's safety, Lufuno calls Naledi.

1.title: FR - Furtive - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After fleeing town, Zenzi encounters new revelations and perilous obstacles. The police investigation widens, while Joseph's silence worries Raymond.

1.title: FR - Furtive - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In her furious search for the truth, Zenzi confronts the shooter who tore her family apart. A showdown at Blessing's club may push Zenzi to the brink.

2.title: FR - Furtive - S02E01 - Wallflower
2.plot: Zenzi’s new reality brings with it enemies and alliances, as prison life proves to be harsher than she expected. Detective Lyners begins to dig deeper.

2.title: FR - Furtive - S02E02 - What You Won't Do For Love
2.plot: In the wake of murder, Detective Morkel’s rage sends him on a vengeance-filled mission and Zenzi shows up injured on her sister’s front doorstep.

2.title: FR - Furtive - S02E03 - Homecoming
2.plot: Zenzi’s clean escape is deterred when TK’s threats move to the safety of her sister, but will her protection be enough when the past comes knocking?

2.title: FR - Furtive - S02E04 - Reckoning
2.plot: Detective Morkel goes against orders looking for the truth. Zenzi is now caught between hell and incarceration as law enforcement catches up with her.

2.title: FR - Furtive - S02E05 - Wolves
2.plot: Naledi and her sister part ways, but when Zenzi reaches Lufuno, his fate has already been sealed. Meanwhile, an unlikely partnership is formed.

2.title: FR - Furtive - S02E06 - Collision
2.plot: The tapestry weaves together as police, outlaws and felons all find themselves at Andrew Harting’s trust event. Will Zenzi finally find her vengeance?

meta.plot: A house cleaner desperately searches for her husband as a dreaded criminal syndicate dredges up past tragedies and ultimately drives her to violence.
When a health crisis forces Liv to rethink her “live fast, die young” attitude, she jumps into a wellness journey to get better — even if it kills her.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E01 - Carpe That Diem
1.plot: A series of unfortunate events threaten to upend a career-making opportunity when food writer Liv leaves New York City for a weekend away in Australia.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E02 - The Cleanse
1.plot: A desperate Liv cooks up a winning pitch and dives headfirst into health and wellness. Amy throws Archie a party. Lorraine flags a problem at work.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E03 - Get Your Duck On
1.plot: While training with Gaz, Liv gets closer to a crush-worthy workout partner. But she's also on assignment, covering a chef known as NYC's "King of Meat."

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E04 - The Real Camille
1.plot: Liv bares all for an exclusive interview with a sexual self-help guru. Amy tries to get Doug's attention. Gaz and Dalbert explore the art of compromise.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E05 - Hall of Mirrors
1.plot: With a critical deadline looming, Liv consults a psychic — and takes a long, strange trip. Amy and Doug get caught in the act. Gaz meets up with an ex.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E06 - Life and Death
1.plot: Liv hitches a ride to Canberra with a death doula. A flashback to the day Liv's father died reveals how she and Amy first became friends.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E07 - The Big A
1.plot: Liv stages the perfect wedding day for Gaz, complete with a heartfelt sister-of-the-groom speech at the reception. But things don't go according to plan.

1.title: FR - Wellmania - S01E08 - Count to 10
1.plot: It's launch day for "Banquet Royale," and Liv's professional dreams are finally coming true. So why does it feel like she's drowning?

meta.plot: Empathetic, meticulous and relentless - the only thing to escape Larvik detective William Wisting in his hunt for Norway's most notorious criminals is a happy family life. And when two mysterious deaths interrupt Wisting's Christmas, it is the beginning of a showdown with the deadliest killer of them all.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With the help of FBI agents Maggie and John, Wisting tracks serial killer Robert Godwin to a remote farm, but do they keep the mission secret from the press before Godwin runs?

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Wisting and the FBI suspect that Godwin may be behind twelve cases of missing persons in Norway. Vidar Haglund is released from prison, and Line questions the circumstances surrounding Viggo's death.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Line's obsession with Viggo's death leads to a quarrel with her father. Wisting and the FBI find more of Godwin's victims, and the FBI agent John makes a mistake that has serious consequences.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Lines and Wistings investigations are linked, and the search for the serial killer becomes increasingly intense. At the same time, Wisting's worst nightmare becomes reality.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Just as Wisting is hailed as a hero, he faces accusations of evidence tampering in a previous murder case, leading to Vidar Haglund's potentially wrongful conviction. Line tries to keep her father out of the headlines, by chasing a news story on a recent murder.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: An internal investigation of Wisting begins after his suspension. Torunn leads the investigation about a missing woman. Line runs into an ex when she works on her Ravneberg article.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Wisting tries to save his reputation by conducting his own secret investigation into the Cecilia case. Torunn believes that Linnea is behind her own disappearance, but her parents are convinced that she is in danger.

1.title: FR - Wisting - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Wisting takes desperate methods to show his innocence, while the internal investigation looks more closely at his entire department. Benjamin examines who can lie behind Linnea's disappearance.

2.title: FR - Wisting - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: William Wisting and his team are hit hard when a crime scene inspection with serial killer Tom Kerr goes horribly wrong. Wisting's daughter Line now has to deal with the consequences of her documentary causing it all.

2.title: FR - Wisting - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Wisting tries to gather the team after the tragedy that has befallen them.  He is forced to cooperate with Kripos investigator Stiller in the hunt for the mysterious helper.

2.title: FR - Wisting - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: A new disappearance makes Wisting and Stiller fear that the killers are about to flee the country.  But has the new victim really been kidnapped?  A new clue causes the police to arrest a suspect.

2.title: FR - Wisting - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Line's shocking findings overturn the police's theory of "The Other".  The perpetrator gets rid of loose threads and time is running out.  Wisting discovers the secret that his daughter has kept hidden from him.

3.title: FR - Wisting - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Wisting and his team are warned about a cruel crime scene in Larvik. The severed head of a young asylum seeker is found on a stake in the middle of the square. FBI agent Maggie Griffin returns to assist in the case.

3.title: FR - Wisting - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: When a corpse appears in the net of a local poacher, the two killings are linked. Line suspects that Wisting has had a relationship with the manager at the care center.

3.title: FR - Wisting - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Maggie is forced to share information, which she has previously kept secret from Wisting. The investigation takes a whole new turn, and leads Wisting and Maggie on a new hunt across the border into Sweden.

3.title: FR - Wisting - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: In Sweden, Wisting and Maggie find a former victim. Together with the Swedish police, they are drawn into a fierce police action, and the final settlement is both intense and surprising.

meta.plot: A young woman's obsession with a pop star takes a dark turn.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E01 - Stung
1.plot: Dre plans a birthday surprise for her sister.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E02 - Honey
1.plot: Dre starts a new job in Tennessee.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E03 - Taste
1.plot: Dre takes a road trip.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E04 - Running Scared
1.plot: Dre befriends some white girls.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E05 - Girl, Bye
1.plot: Dre tries to get her phone fixed.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E06 - Fallin' Through The Cracks
1.plot: This is a true crime story.

1.title: FR - Swarm - S01E07 - God Only Makes Happy Endings
1.plot: Dre lays roots in Atlanta.

meta.plot: Separated across continents, petro-chemist Andy Yeats and his family must survive the deadly effects of a sudden global oil crisis and find the mastermind behind it all.

1.title: FR - Last Light - S01E01 - The Dawning
1.plot: Andy Yeats is stuck in the Middle East, separated from his family; as a global oil crisis unfolds and the world descends into chaos, his wife and young son are in Paris and his teenage daughter is home alone in London.

1.title: FR - Last Light - S01E02 - Twilight
1.plot: Andy and Mika are hunted while they search for the cause of the global crisis. Elena and Sam try to flee France to reunite with Laura. Laura and her friend Owen grow closer, unaware that a mysterious man tracks their every step.

1.title: FR - Last Light - S01E03 - Darkness Falls
1.plot: Andy and Mika try to get home and find answers to the chaos descending upon the world. Elena braves police and looters in Calais to get Sam his eye medication. Laura and Owen must evade the threat that seems to appear at every turn.

1.title: FR - Last Light - S01E04 - Dead of Night
1.plot: Andy begins working to help solve the global crisis and reveals his personal connection to its cause. Elena and Sam illegally cross from France to England, but they are captured, detained and separated. Laura and Owen face the man following them.

1.title: FR - Last Light - S01E05 - Illumination
1.plot: Faced with the choices of his past, Andy takes on the mastermind behind the crisis to save his family and modern civilization. Elena pieces the clues together and discovers the location of the culprits.

1.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: DI Ray Lennox and his partner are investigating the disappearance of schoolgirl.

1.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Lennox wrestles with his sobriety, the investigation continues.

1.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Lennox must use all his guile and cunning to expose those with something to hide.

1.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Another young girl has gone missing, but Lennox thinks he can lure the perpetrator in.

1.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Lennox interrogates the suspect about the girl. Will he be able to save her in time?

1.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Lennox must face his demons to help him uncover the truth about the case.

2.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: DI Ray Lennox is back - determined to prove he can put the Confectioner case behind him and be a normal cop. When an ex-colleague is assaulted, Lennox gets stuck into a new case.

2.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: There’s a development in the case when a body turns up with similar injuries to the victim of the rumoured hotel attack. The victim has an obscure message carved into his body.

2.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: The attacker floods the internet with their manifesto and declares there will be a third victim. The race is on for Lennox and his team to prevent another death.

2.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: The case continues to evade Lennox; he has a connection between the victims but can’t find a motive. As he struggles to find answers, Lennox’s past trauma comes back hard.

2.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: As Lennox wrestles with the consequences of his actions, the hunt to catch the killer ramps up when one of his own team is targeted. Lennox and Drummond look back at a 1992 case.

2.title: FR - Irvine Welsh's Crime - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: As the series hurtles to a climax, Lennox makes a shocking discovery that turns the case on its head; all is not as it seems and the truth behind these murders lies closer to home.

meta.plot: Detective Inspector Ray Lennox investigates the disappearance of a schoolgirl while battling cocaine addiction and a mental breakdown.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E01 - The Living and the Dead
1.plot: Sole starts collaborating with her late husband's gang of smash-and-grab thieves, who've recently welcomed mysterious Fernan. But her past comes calling.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E02 - New Friendships, Old Enemies
1.plot: A big heist shakes up Sole's relationship with her father, who reveals an eye-opening secret from the past. Rosa unveils her objectives.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E03 - Settling Old Scores
1.plot: An old friend returns from the past with a lucrative but risky proposal. Rosa spies on Mercedes by getting closer to her daughter, Marta.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E04 - Trojan Horse
1.plot: Sole's trust in Fernan is challenged in Paris when a massive heist is put on the table. Rogelio tries to figure out who Duque's mole is.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E05 - Stirring Up a Hornet's Nest
1.plot: While Sole deals with the consequences of Poli's robbery, Mercedes suffers an unpleasant surprise that threatens her life, as well as Rosa's and Marta's.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E06 - Parents and Children
1.plot: Tensions increase between Sole and Mercedes after their latest discoveries. Marta is determined to find her father. Fernan's mission takes a risky turn.

1.title: FR - Hasta el cielo : La série - S01E07 - In the Lion's Den
1.plot: The truth about Estrella's death comes finally to light, and Sole plans her ultimate revenge in Nigeria. Rogelio gives a warning about Fernan.

meta.plot: To remain independent of her father, who is a stolen goods trafficker, a newly widowed single mom joins her late husband’s gang of smash-and-grab thieves.
The 1978 kidnapping and assassination of former Italian Prime Minister Aldo Moro by Red Brigades terrorists.

1.title: FR - Esterno notte - S01E01 - Aldo Moro
1.plot: The days and events before the kidnapping of Aldo Moro - President of Italian political party Christian Democracy - by the Red Brigades on March 15th, 1978.

1.title: FR - Esterno notte - S01E02 - The Minister of Home Affairs
1.plot: The kidnapping of Aldo Moro and the period of his captivity from the point of view of Italy's Minister of the Interior, Francesco Cossiga.

1.title: FR - Esterno notte - S01E03 - The Pope
1.plot: The kidnapping of Aldo Moro and the period of his captivity from the point of view of Pope Paul VI.

1.title: FR - Esterno notte - S01E04 - The Terrorists
1.plot: The days before the kidnapping of Aldo Moro and the period of his captivity from the point of view of the executors of the kidnapping, a central group of the Red Brigades.

1.title: FR - Esterno notte - S01E05 - Eleonora
1.plot: The kidnapping of Aldo Moro and the period of his captivity from the point of view of Aldo Moro's wife, Eleonora.

1.title: FR - Esterno notte - S01E06 - The End
1.plot: All the characters converge on the last moments of life of Aldo Moro, murdered by the Red Brigades on May 9th, 1978.

meta.plot: The single mother Caterina Schöllack takes over the management of the Galant dance school on Kurfürstendamm ("Ku'damm") in Berlin after the end of the Second World War. The father of their three daughters did not return to the family after the war, he is officially missing.

FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Heirs of the Dragon
1.plot: Viserys hosts a tournament to celebrate the birth of his second child. Rhaenyra welcomes her uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Rogue Prince
1.plot: Princess Rhaenyra dives deep into the prophecies about House Targaryen while confronting a realm that resists the idea of a woman on the Iron Throne, and Prince Daemon, embittered over being passed over as the heir to Westeros, prepares to go to war.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Second of His Name
1.plot: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder. The realm celebrates Aegon's second nameday. Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - King of the Narrow Sea
1.plot: Daemon returns to court after the successful completion of the battle. Princess Rhaenyra must deal with potential suitors in order to keep her line of succession.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - We Light the Way
1.plot: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale. Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Valeryons. Alicent seeks the truth about the princess.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - The Princess and the Queen
1.plot: Ten years later. Rhaenyra navigates Alicent's continued speculation about her children, while Daemon and Laena weigh an offer in Pentos.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Driftmark
1.plot: As the families gather on Driftmark for a funeral, Viserys calls for an end to infighting and Alicent demands justice.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - The Lord of the Tides
1.plot: Six years later. With the Driftmark succession suddenly critical, Rhaenyra attempts to strike a bargain with Rhaenys.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - The Green Council
1.plot: While Alicent enlists Cole and Aemond to track down Aegon, Otto gathers the great houses of Westeros to affirm their allegiance.

1.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - The Black Queen
1.plot: Mourning a tragic death, Rhaenyra tries to hold the kingdom together and Daemon prepares for war.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E01 - A Son for a Son
2.plot: While Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her son's murder, in King's Landing, Alicent grows concerned that Aegon's Small Council may lead them to an all-out war. Larys suggests Aegon needs a new Hand, and Rhaenyra arrives at a fateful decision.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E02 - Rhaenyra the Cruel
2.plot: As Otto schemes to turn the public against her, Rhaenyra questions Daemon's loyalty. Meanwhile, Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E03 - The Burning Mill
2.plot: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme. Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E04 - The Red Dragon and the Gold
2.plot: In Rhaenyra's absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In King's Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegon's fragile hold on authority.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E05 - Regent
2.plot: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegon's Council, Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal, and Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E06 - Smallfolk
2.plot: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyze the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemon's unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E07 - The Red Sowing
2.plot: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon pressures a young liege lord to raise up his bannermen.

2.title: FR - House of the Dragon [VOSTFR] - S02E08 - The Queen Who Ever Was
2.plot: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape, and Alicent grows more concerned about Helaena's safety. Flush with new power, Rhaenyra looks to press her advantage.

meta.plot: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins when King Viserys breaks with a century of tradition by naming his daughter Rhaenyra heir to the Iron Throne. But when Viserys later fathers a son, the court is shocked when Rhaenyra retains her status as his heir, and seeds of division sow friction across the realm.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E01 - Empty Rooms
1.plot: As friends prepare for Rodri's birthday party, Emiliano awaits a call that promises big business, unaware that it will unexpectedly bring great sorrow.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E02 - What Could Go Wrong?
1.plot: While David and Emiliano ask Moncho for something extraordinary, Lupe pressures Charro to take action. The search for Paula continues.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E03 - Everyone Is a Suspect
1.plot: Chaos erupts at the police station as they search for the guilty party. Devastated, Yola vows to make Emiliano pay for her suffering.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E04 - The Storm After the Storm
1.plot: Emiliano comes clean to Daniela. Brenda's confession to Javier only brings her closer to Mauricio — and they won't be the only pair playing with fire.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E05 - Confrontation
1.plot: Charro has his eyes set on a new target — but must tend to family matters first. David's lies escalate, dragging Carla along with him.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E06 - Mea Culpa
1.plot: As the truth comes out, the couples are compelled to take sides. While Charro's ruthlessness intensifies, Emiliano seeks the weight of the law.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E07 - Collateral Damage
1.plot: The couples' relationships continue to unravel. A chase ensues, leaving Lucía with no choice. Alex is forced to make a crucial decision.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E08 - The Search
1.plot: Charro vows to get back at Emiliano as Ulises tries to convince Yola to testify against Emiliano. David continues to deny everything.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E09 - Penance
1.plot: Lucía's future remains uncertain. Yola threatens Carla. When Charro tries to reach Peyote, it's Daniela who answers his call.

1.title: FR - Accidente - S01E10 - The Verdict
1.plot: Carla's exposé impacts the men's business dealings. Charro is determined to bring down those who crossed him. A verdict is reached at trial.

2.title: FR - Accidente - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Accidente - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Accidente - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - Accidente - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - Accidente - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Accidente - S02E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: When a birthday party takes a tragic turn, its ripples shatter a close-knit community — tearing families, friendships and hearts apart.
One tranquil summer, a mysterious woman checks into a vacation rental — triggering events that disrupt the lives of the owner and those around him.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E01 - Do You Know What They Call People Like Us?
1.plot: Jeon Yeong-ha leisurely runs a peaceful vacation rental after his wife's death — until one day, unexpected guests find a way to his accommodation.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E02 - Who Will Come Knocking on the Door of My Destiny?
1.plot: Yeong-ha begins to feel uneasy about his former guest. Koo Sang-jun faces his guilt after the grisly consequences of leaving his motel unattended.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E03 - As Though You Couldn't Get Me Off Your Mind
1.plot: The mysterious woman returns unannounced, forcing Yeong-ha to confront her. As Sang-jun's family life spirals, he contemplates speaking out publicly.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E04 - I Think She Killed a Child
1.plot: After helping Sang-jun with his case, Yoon Bo-min naturally gravitates towards violent crimes. Yeong-ha becomes troubled by the woman's erratic behavior.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E05 - I'm Just "It" in This Game of Tag
1.plot: What began as a truth-seeking journey turns into a turf war for Yeong-ha and the woman — growing more intense each round, with no end in sight.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E06 - Dad Will Come Get You
1.plot: Yeong-ha researches the crumbling motel to figure out his next move, encountering Koo Gi-ho, who can't seem to let go of the past.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E07 - We'll See the End Together
1.plot: After a confrontation at her art exhibit, Yoo Seong-a's actions become increasingly brutal — even involving Yeong-ha's daughter in her game.

1.title: FR - Les Silences de la forêt - S01E08 - We'll Have a Lot to Talk About
1.plot: When Bo-min gets a hunch about Seong-a's misdeeds, she sets out to find evidence. But Yeong-ha resolves to stop her himself before it's too late.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In school, Oh Jisoo maintains a low-key existence. Outside of it, he masterminds a risky side hustle that no one can ever know about.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Jisoo panics when the phone he uses to run the business falls into the hands of an unknown blackmailer. Seo Minhee tries to get back to work.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Jisoo searches for his father while pushing away Bae Gyuri, who wants in on the operation and offers a solution to his new financial problems.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The business is running again, but Jisoo no longer has a safe place to keep his incoming cash. Meanwhile, the school bully finds his latest target.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: An incident at school puts Gyuri in a tense exchange with her mother. Kwak Kitae's reaction to his birthday present frustrates Minhee.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After Minhee attracts the interest of an observant police officer, she's dismissed from her job. Upset, she asks Jisoo to accompany her somewhere.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Stuck in a dicey encounter, Jisoo calls Gyuri, hoping she can help get him out — but balks when she takes things in an unthinkable direction.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Gyuri prepares to meet Ryu Daeyeol, who's got shocking news for Jisoo. Mr. Lee makes a narrow escape from the police at the hospital.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: When Gyuri is kidnapped, Jisoo is told to come alone if he wants to save her. Mr. Lee and Kitae each set out for Daeyeol's blood.

1.title: FR  - Extracurricular - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Gyuri tells Jisoo she's not done with the business, despite everything that's happened. The case's remaining questions bother Lee Haegyoung.

meta.plot: Determined to escape a dead-end life, a gifted high school student turns to a world of serious crime to ensure he can pay for college.

Seeking redemption and a shortened prison sentence, young convict Bode Donovan joins a firefighting program that returns him to his small Northern California hometown, where he and other inmates work alongside elite firefighters to extinguish massive blazes across the region.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Five years ago, Bode burned down everything in his life, leaving town with a big secret. Now he's back, with the rap sheet of a criminal and the audacity to believe in a chance for redemption with Cal Fire.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Fresh Prince of Edgewater
1.plot: After Bode requests to be transferred to a different city, his future in Edgewater hangs in the balance. Meanwhile, the crew joins forces to protect the town from a treacherous storm.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Where There's Smoke...
1.plot: When the crew responds to a call in a remote forest, they come under fire by an outlaw protecting illegal marijuana crops.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Work, Don't Worry
1.plot: The crew engages in a search and rescue mission after a building collapses and Division Chief Sharon is forced to make a gut-wrenching decision.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Get Some, Be Safe
1.plot: A vegetation fire gets complicated for the crew when a panicked horse refuses to evacuate a burning barn. Meanwhile, Vince's brother Luke, the Cal Fire communications director, makes a surprise visit in town.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Like Old Times
1.plot: After a hiker falls from a steep cliff, Bode and Jake put aside their differences to make a daring rescue. Also, Sharon reveals devastating news to Bode.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Happy to Help
1.plot: Bode's crew is accused of stealing a designer watch from a fire mop up, and the crew responds to a high-stakes call about an extremely dangerous gas leak.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Bad Guy
1.plot: Vince's judgment is compromised when a harrowing rescue of two siblings triggers emotional memories of the night his daughter died in a car accident.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - No Good Deed
1.plot: An internal investigation is launched after a difficult rescue went awry and a life was lost.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Get Your Hopes Up
1.plot: A box truck crashes into the station, causing a power outage and triggering a dangerous fire. Meanwhile, Sharon and Bode's ex-girlfriend, Cara, face multiple medical emergencies.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Mama Bear
1.plot: A former inmate firefighter harboring a grudge against Sharon returns to carry out his revenge.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Two Pink Lines
1.plot: Bode and his fellow prison inmate firefighters band together with the civilian station 42 crew to battle a monstrous fire that erupts after a plane crash. Meanwhile, the crews welcome a new member to the family.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - You Know Your Dragon Best
1.plot: The crews work to contain a dangerous forest fire and save a group of environmentalists protesting a housing development.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - A Fair to Remember
1.plot: The crews respond to mass chaos and injuries when a ride malfunctions at the annual Edgewater town fair. Meanwhile, Sharon receives life-changing news.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - False Promises
1.plot: A massive tree falls during a reforestation assignment, threatening Eve’s life and forcing Bode to step up and lead the rescue efforts.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - My Kinda Leader
1.plot: When a massive and unpredictable wildfire breaks out in neighboring Drake Country, the station 42 and third rock crews are called to help aid in the rescue efforts.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E17 - A Cry for Help
1.plot: An internal investigator suspects Jake of being the serial arsonist setting recent fires, so Bode and the crew take it upon themselves to investigate.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E18 - Off the Rails
1.plot: The crews respond to the scene of a train crash where the rescue has the potential to spiral out of control when they discover the train is full of illicit cargo, and Robin, an enigmatic modern-day train hopper, helps injured patients.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E19 - Watch Your Step
1.plot: The station 42 crew responds to an out-of-control blaze at a wellness retreat, and the third rock crew tries to protect one of their own from a dangerous overdose.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E20 - At the End of My Rope
1.plot: The station 42 and third rock crews respond to a deadly explosion at an abandoned mine. Meanwhile, Bode faces a difficult decision that could have serious consequences

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E21 - Backfire
1.plot: The station 42 and Three Rock crews are called to a backfire started by a private firefighting company to protect a high-end winery but instead threatens to grow out of control.

1.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S01E22 - I Know It Feels Impossible
1.plot: The station 42 and Three Rock crews face a daring rescue when a massive mudslide tears through Edgewater. Meanwhile, Bode's freedom is on the line at his parole hearing.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E01 - Something's Coming
2.plot: Bode is back in prison where he receives some shocking news. Meanwhile, the station 42 crew responds to a massive earthquake that rocks Edgewater to its core.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E02 - Like Breathing Again
2.plot: While breaking up a bonfire party, the station 42 crew is called to complete a dangerous and highly complex cave rescue.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E03 - See You Next Apocalypse
2.plot: When a family refuses to evacuate their property during a massive wildfire that is escalating quickly, Jake is faced with a heartbreaking decision.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E04 - Too Many Unknowns
2.plot: The station 42 and third rock crews respond to a chemical plant after a dangerous toxic spill goes up in flames.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E05 - This Storm Will Pass
2.plot: The station 42 crew must protect Edgewater and take cover when an extremely rare and dangerous fire tornado leaves lives in peril.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E06 - Alert the Sheriff
2.plot: After a fire camp inmate escapes from Three Rock, the deputy sheriff with a surprising connection to the Leones, Mickey, is called to investigate.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E07 - A Hail Mary
2.plot: The future of Three Rock is in jeopardy as public opinion of the camp grows increasingly negative.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E08 - It's Not Over
2.plot: With the future of Three Rock in jeopardy, Station 42 and Three Rock host Edgewater's 22nd Annual Firefighters' Ball in an effort to impress the governor and save the camp. Meanwhile, Gabriela's mom, Roberta, makes a surprise appearance at the event.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E09 - No Future, No Consequences
2.plot: Station 42 and Three Rock battle a dangerous campaign fire where our heroes struggle with difficult decisions.

2.title: FR - Fire Country [VOSTFR] - S02E10 - I Do
2.plot: Gabriela prepares to walk down the aisle on her wedding day as Bode receives some surprising news.

meta.plot: Four stylish and ambitious best girlfriends in Harlem, New York City: a rising star professor struggling to make space for her love life; a savvy tech entrepreneur always dating someone new; a no-filter singer; and a hopeless romantic fashion designer. Together, they level up into the next phase of their careers, relationships, and big city dreams.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Just as Camille thinks she's in total control of her life, her ex shows up on her block making her question her choices. Tye receives an acquisition offer on her app. Angie questions what her next career step will be. Quinn has a rough night on Long Island.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E02 - Saturn Returns
1.plot: Tye is invited to do a Forbes interview, and decides to end things with Shayla. Angie is offered a role in a musical. Quinn struggles to make ends meet as the rent increases for her store. Camille’s boss tells her some bad news and she crosses paths with Ian at a friend’s engagement party.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E03 - Rainbow Sprinkles
1.plot: The girls try to cheer up Camille after the news of Ian's engagement. Tye has an awkward connection to her Forbes interviewer. Angie hits it off with her Uber driver. Quinn meets a new prospect on a dating app.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E04 - Winter Solstice
1.plot: Dr. Pruitt invites Camille to speak on a panel. A male stripper catches Quinn's eye. Tye struggles with a hair crisis. And Angie tells a lie to get a nanny job.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E05 - Boundaries
1.plot: Camille goes to Ian’s parents' going away party. Tye and Anna give things a try. Quinn attempts to keep things casual with Sean.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E06 - Cuffing Season
1.plot: Angie tries to track down a man to keep her warm for the winter. Jameson and Camille talk about what's next for them before a text sends her spiraling. Quinn takes Sean as her date to an event for Isabelle. Tye faces a health scare.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E07 - The Strong Black Woman
1.plot: Tye tries to get her health in order before an important conference. Camille questions how to respond to a strange text from Ian. Angie struggles with an ignorant cast member. Quinn navigates her mother's expectations.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E09 - Secrets
1.plot: Camille secretly helps Ian out with a project. The women go to see Angie in the dress rehearsal of Get Out: The Musical. Quinn tries to win over Sean’s son.

1.title: FR - Harlem - S01E10 - Once Upon a Time in Harlem
1.plot: Dr. Pruitt's choice for Camille's dream job causes Camille to question her life choices. Tye fights to finalize her divorce. Angie gets offered a bigger role in the musical. Quinn confronts her feelings for Isabella.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E01 - Takesie Backsies
2.plot: Picking up where season one left off, Camille and Ian find themselves at a Crossroads, Quinn prepares for her first same-sex date, Angie tries to end her bad luck streak, and Tye tries to make a real connection.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E02 - If You Can't Say Anything Nice...
2.plot: Camille faces Jameson, Tye finds out she’s on a cautionary dating website, Angie finds luck in real estate, and Quinn explores her relationship with Isabela.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E03 - As Assist from the Sidelines
2.plot: Camille and Ian spend the day getting out of their heads with the help of too many edibles, Angie finds comfort with her extended family at home, Quinn drops big news at the golf course with her parents, and Tye studies the ideal relationship.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E04 - Baby and the Bath Water
2.plot: Camille and Ian have a scare, Tye is forced to start making decisions regarding her health, Quinn prepares for the biggest interview of her career, and Angie meets a new guy.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E05 - Pride
2.plot: Camille is summoned by Dr. Pruitt, Tye is Quinn’s reluctant tour guide for her first PRIDE as a member of the community, and Angie waits for an important call.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E06 - Out of the Deadpan and into the Fire
2.plot: Camille finds herself caught between Ian and Jameson yet again, Tye faces the reality of a big life decision, Quinn struggles with her recent losses, and Angie gets another big break.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E07 - Fall Back to Rumspringa Forward
2.plot: Camille, Quinn, Tye and Angie embark on a much-needed Girls Trip.

2.title: FR - Harlem - S02E08 - Joy, Joy, Joy, Joy
2.plot: Camille brings her vision to life, Tye finds love in an unexpected place, Quinn and Angie make amends, and the ladies get a surprise.

FR - The Silence - S01E05 - Domination
FR - The Silence - S01E06 - Colonization

meta.plot: A couple having high ambitions to get rich in any way possible. Denying all social norms, they take a challenge from an old couple for not talking for a year.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E01 - The Boyfriend Experience
1.plot: Former detective Alexa Crowe is lured into the world of murder and mystery when her friend and colleague asks her to look into the death of a woman who fell from the balcony of a male escort.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E02 - The Locked Room
1.plot: A man is found shot dead in a motel room. The door has been chain-locked from the inside. Someone killed him and escaped when the door was locked from the inside.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E03 - Lividity in Lycra
1.plot: Cycling groups are the ultimate opportunity for networking and power broking. But when the CFO of a hospitality empire dies on his morning ride, Alexa must infiltrate the world of lycra and butt pads.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E04 - Can't Stand the Heat
1.plot: Alexa is thrown into the world of culinary excellence while investigating the death of a cooking school student. Alexa must hone her chops to uncover a tangled web of lies, rivalry and secrets.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E05 - Feet of Clay
1.plot: Alexa investigates the hit and run death of a young woman. Although the drunk driver involved turned herself in, Alexa believes the accident may be the work of an opportunistic killer.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E06 - Another Bloody Podcast
1.plot: Alexa investigates a case that runs the gamut of birth, marriage and murder when a young man is found dead in an alley after a fight at his brothers wedding.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E07 - Old School
1.plot: Alexa's past catches up to her as she returns to her exclusive, private high school to investigate the mysterious death of her much beloved former teacher.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E08 - Remains to Be Seen
1.plot: After a near-death experience, Alexa is confronted by her own mortality as she explores the „Big Death” industry to unravel the secrets of a murdered man whose body was found in someone elses grave.

1.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S01E09 - Fake Empire
1.plot: When a clairvoyant contacts the police about a murder, offering details that have never been released to the public, Alexa jumps at the opportunity to prove that clairvoyants are frauds.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E01 - Call of the Wild
2.plot: When a woman shoots a stranger at point blank range by Auckland Harbour, it looks like an open-and-shut case. But investigator Alexa Crowe discovers not everything is as it seems.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E02 - Oceans Apart
2.plot: Alexa's investigation into the death of a surfing champion takes her back to an old childhood haunt. But what is the victim's influencer girlfriend trying to hide? And why is Alexa so reluctant to spend time at one of the world's best beaches?

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E03 - All That Glitters
2.plot: Alexa's personal and professional lives collide when she investigates the death of a drag queen whose career was on the rise.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E04 - Look Don't Touch
2.plot: Alexa is confronted by her own history when she investigates the death of a museum curator.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E05 - Crushed Dreams
2.plot: Alexa will need all five senses to solve the mysterious death of an ambitious young winemaker.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E06 - Sleep No More
2.plot: A frosty reception awaits Alexa when she investigates how the chef at a resort died in his own walk-in freezer.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E07 - All The Better To See You
2.plot: All the worlds a stage when Alexa investigates a murder of an actor in the middle of a live performance.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E08 - Hidden Gems
2.plot: Alexa must sort fact from fiction when a compulsive liar confesses to a murder at a high-end jeweler.
