2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E09 - Wild Life
2.plot: Harry asks Alexa to look into the case of his friend accused of murdering a survival expert.

2.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S02E10 - Pleasure and Pain
2.plot: Alexa investigates the death of a self-help guru and ends up in a cat-and-mouse game with the victim's mysterious wife.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E01 - It Takes Two
3.plot: When Alexa investigates the death of a young teacher at a tango club, it's not clear who is leading whom in a dangerous dance to discover the truth.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E02 - Nothing Concrete
3.plot: Truth is stranger than fiction when a crime novelist is found dead, encased in a public sculpture. Alexa uncovers a plot more deadly than any of the victim's novels.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E03 - Bloodlines
3.plot: Alexa is determined to prove the innocence of a champion thoroughbred blamed for the death of his handler at a successful horse breeding stud, where secrets lurk and blood is thicker than water.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E04 - The Village
3.plot: Alexa investigates a death at an upscale retirement village where a quiet life is the last thing residents want, and where her brother's involvement with the victims feels too close to home.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E05 - Silent Lights
3.plot: When Christmas lights aficionado Paddy falls from his roof, Alexa finds herself untangling a mystery as tangled as Paddy's beloved lights.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E06 - Bride To Bee
3.plot: When a bride dies from an allergic reaction to a bee sting on her wedding day, Alexa must discover whether this is just a tragic accident... or a case where revenge is as sweet as honey.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E07 - Breaking Bread
3.plot: Feuding celebrity bakers put Alexa through her paces when a man is found drowned with a rare flour in his lungs.

3.title: FR - My Life Is Murder - S03E08 - Gaslight Sonata
3.plot: Alexa and Madison's investigation into the death of a music producer is complicated by the arrival of a young girl at Alexa's door with some very big news.

meta.plot: Investigator Alexa Crowe, cannot help fighting the good fight – whether it is solving murders or combatting the small frustrations of everyday life. Fearless and unapologetic, Alexa's unique skills and insights into the darker quirks of human nature, allows her to provoke, comfort and push the right buttons as she unravels the truth behind the most baffling of crimes.
Twenty years after City of God, Buscapé recounts how conflicts between police, traffickers, and militias impacted the community.

1.title: FR - La Cité de Dieu : La Lutte Continue - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 2000, Wilson returns to Ciudad de Dios to support Barbantinho's campaign, but ends up in the middle of a violent conflict.

1.title: FR - La Cité de Dieu : La Lutte Continue - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As tensions rise, Wilson meets Lígia, a reporter from Spain looking to investigate corruption in the City of God. Later, Leka questions whether her father’s photographs are exploitative, Barbantinho tries to set up a face-to-face with Curió and Bradock, and Berenice fights to keep her boyfriend Clayton, aka “PQD,” away from crime.

1.title: FR - La Cité de Dieu : La Lutte Continue - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Amid the territory war, Leka and her rap group court a record producer – but get stranded when violence erupts in the favela. Meanwhile, Lígia and Wilson investigate the actions of militias in the West Zone, PQD leverages his military background to support Curió, and Jerusa orchestrates an ambush.

1.title: FR - La Cité de Dieu : La Lutte Continue - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After seizing control, Bradock looks to build trust in the community despite his increasingly erratic behavior. Meanwhile, Wilson and Lígia uncover a possible connection between Secretary of Security Reginaldo Cavani, local militias, and a mole in Bradock’s inner circle.

1.title: FR - La Cité de Dieu : La Lutte Continue - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - La Cité de Dieu : La Lutte Continue - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Blood River - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Blood River - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Blood River - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Blood River - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: 1837, South Africa: A small community of French-born Huguenots is drawn to the hinterland. Catherine and her children Marthe and Joseph are also part of Pastor Malan's devout community. After months of traveling, they discover that their new surroundings are not uninhabited and that the indigenous Zulu people are prepared to defend their land.

1.title: FR - The Exchange - S01E01 - Bank of Tomorrow
1.plot: As the ink dries on her divorce papers, Farida contends with her new reality. A charity auction reignites a friendly rivalry between her and Munira.

1.title: FR - The Exchange - S01E02 - It’s a Man’s World
1.plot: On their first days at work and school, Farida seeks an alliance and Jude keeps a low profile. Feeling unheard, Munira takes matters into her own hands.

1.title: FR - The Exchange - S01E03 - Thicker than Milk
1.plot: As the family meticulously plans for its matriarch's 80th, Munira finds tactical inspiration in an unlikely place. Farida pursues more independence.

1.title: FR - The Exchange - S01E04 - Short and Distort
1.plot: The duo’s success lands them in the limelight, but the bank’s secret plan finds them between a rock and a hard place — and snubbed by their loved ones.

1.title: FR - The Exchange - S01E05 - The Silent Partner
1.plot: After realizing that their presence in an important meeting is merely for show, Farida and Munira forge their own path — despite external distractions.

1.title: FR - The Exchange - S01E06 - What Goes Up
1.plot: As the 1987 market crash looms, the Exchange braces for a critical all-nighter. Putting their personal lives on hold, Farida and Munira join the storm.

meta.plot: Set in Kuwait in 1988, two women making their way in the boys club of the Kuwait Stock Exchange, on the eve of Saddam Hussein's invasion of the country.
The series follows a group of kids at an adventure camp who discover a strange artefact, while also drawn to the fate of four children who mysteriously disappeared twenty years ago.

1.title: FR - La nuit où Laurier Gaudreault s'est réveillé - S01E01 - La nuit où Madeleine est morte
FR - La nuit où Laurier Gaudreault s'est réveillé - S01E02 - La nuit où Mireille était reparue
FR - La nuit où Laurier Gaudreault s'est réveillé - S01E03 - La nuit où Chantal avait compris
FR - La nuit où Laurier Gaudreault s'est réveillé - S01E04 - La nuit où Julien avait pris peur
FR - La nuit où Laurier Gaudreault s'est réveillé - S01E05 - La nuit où Laurier Gaudreault s'est réveillé

meta.plot: On a cold October night in 1991, an unspeakable event rocks a small town in Quebec, forever haunting a family who tries to hide their dark secret. Thirty years later these secrets buried deep in the past resurface, sending the family on an unstoppable pursuit of reconciliation.
In 1953 at the hamlet of Grantchester, Sidney Chambers—a charismatic, charming clergyman—turns investigative vicar when one of his parishioners dies in suspicious circumstances.

1.title: FR - Grantchester - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In the village of Grantchester, the funeral of a parishioner leads vicar Sidney Chambers to become involved in a murder investigation - and a confrontation with the local police.

1.title: FR - Grantchester - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: When Amanda's engagement ring is stolen on the night a murder is committed, Sidney and Geordie investigate whether there is a connection between the two crimes.

1.title: FR - Grantchester - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Sidney gives up alcohol and tries to renew his focus on clerical duties, but is dragged into another case when there are mysterious deaths in the village.

1.title: FR - Grantchester - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A fire in the village leads Sidney to another investigation. Meanwhile, a family crisis causes Geordie to become distracted and detached from his job.

1.title: FR - Grantchester - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Sidney and Geordie go for a night out at Johnny Johnson's London jazz club, but soon discover that policemen and clergymen can never truly be off duty.

1.title: FR - Grantchester - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: With Amanda and Guy's wedding fast approaching, Sidney is thrown into crisis - is he truly cut out for life as the vicar of Grantchester?

2.title: FR - Grantchester - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: When Grantchester vicar Sidney Chambers is accused of a terrible crime, unmasking the real culprit sends shockwaves through the community.

2.title: FR - Grantchester - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Sidney and Geordie investigate a Cambridge lecturer's fatal fall from the college spires.

2.title: FR - Grantchester - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: A young man confesses to Sidney and Geordie that he attacked and killed his landlord.

2.title: FR - Grantchester - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Sidney is summoned to perform an exorcism at a stable owner's home.

2.title: FR - Grantchester - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Will Gary go to the gallows? Will Geordie go to prison? Are Sidney and Geordie’s crime fighting days over? The case of a suspicious death takes a surprising turn.

2.title: FR - Grantchester - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: With Sam missing, Sidney and Geordie are forced to investigate a crime together.

3.title: FR - Grantchester - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: When Sidney Chambers begins receiving sinister anonymous phone calls, he realises he is connected to a series of murders targeting respected figures in the community. Leonard bonds with Hilary as she cares for her dying father, while Geordie's investigation of the killings leads him to a mysterious home for people with disabilities.

3.title: FR - Grantchester - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: When several villagers become ill at the local cricket match, Geordie and Sidney must determine if it was an accident, or something more sinister.

3.title: FR - Grantchester - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Sidney and Geordie struggle to determine the connection between a murder and a number of post office robberies.

3.title: FR - Grantchester - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: When a young woman’s death is covered up, Sidney and Geordie try to hold those responsible accountable for their actions.

3.title: FR - Grantchester - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: Sidney arrives at a Romany camp, but when someone is killed, he is prime suspect.

3.title: FR - Grantchester - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: When a little boy is abducted, personal pressures on Sidney and Geordie come to a head.

4.title: FR - Grantchester - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: Sidney and Geordie investigate when a man is stabbed during a talk by a Civil Rights activist, sparking racial tensions.

4.title: FR - Grantchester - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: Sidney discovers he was the last person to see a woman alive during a drunken night while Geordie becomes increasingly alarmed at his friend's behaviour.

4.title: FR - Grantchester - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: Geordie is called to investigate an apparent break-in at a computer laboratory. When the head of the lab keels over and dies from mercury poisoning, Geordie suspects foul play.

4.title: FR - Grantchester - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: As Will is preparing to be installed as the new vicar Geordie persuades him to involve himself in a case involving a young uncommunicative boy with blood on his hands.

4.title: FR - Grantchester - S04E05 - Episode 5
4.plot: An unexpected phone call summons Will back home, and he asks Geordie for his help: Will’s father has got himself into some trouble. When one vicious beating leads to a grisly murder at a sprawling ancestral home, scandal threatens to engulf the Davenport Family, and life will never be the same for Will again.

4.title: FR - Grantchester - S04E06 - Episode 6
4.plot: Will, reeling from his family tragedy and daunted by the choice he now faces, seeks distraction in Geordie’s world. A curious new case unfolds: the murder of a Teddy Boy at a dance hall, which Geordie concludes is proof that the country’s truly gone to the dogs.

5.title: FR - Grantchester - S05E01 - Episode 1
5.plot: When a student from a prestigious all-female college is found dead, Will and Geordie must infiltrate the murky world of campus politics and university societies.

5.title: FR - Grantchester - S05E02 - Episode 2
5.plot: Will and Leonard witness a deadly and deliberate hit-and-run in Grantchester. Geordie traces the car to a pair of decidedly dysfunctional brothers whose house lies far off the beaten path. The victim's wife, his employee and the two brothers are all damaged characters caught in a web of lies and betrayals, and it’s not just secrets that are hiding within the brothers' grounds.

5.title: FR - Grantchester - S05E03 - Episode 3
5.plot: After a bumpy start to their relationship, Will and journalist Ellie go on their first date with a trip to the ‘flicks’. But a scream from the projection booth cuts the romance short as they discover a brutal murder has taken place within the cinema.

5.title: FR - Grantchester - S05E04 - Episode 4
5.plot: A streaker is found dead, sparking an unusual case for Will and Geordie that draws them into the world of experimental psychotherapy and hallucinogens.

5.title: FR - Grantchester - S05E05 - Episode 5
5.plot: When two boys are found near death, locked up together in the boxing ring, Will must face up to his own part in the tragedy in his greatest test of faith yet.

5.title: FR - Grantchester - S05E06 - Episode 6
5.plot: When a woman is found dead, laid out in the shape of a crucifix on Jesus Green, Will and Geordie discover the ring on her finger proves she was married to God.

6.title: FR - Grantchester - S06E01 - Episode 1
6.plot: A much-needed summer break at a vacation resort takes an unexpected turn for Will and Geordie when the camp owner is found dead in suspicious circumstances.

6.title: FR - Grantchester - S06E02 - Episode 2
6.plot: Will and Geordie negotiate a complex family dispute that may be connected to the murder of the head of a local adoption agency. Meanwhile, a sinister letter arrives for Leonard.

6.title: FR - Grantchester - S06E03 - Episode 3
6.plot: Will and Geordie are drawn into local politics when the death of a councilor prompts a parish election. An allegation against Leonard rocks life at the vicarage to its core.

6.title: FR - Grantchester - S06E04 - Episode 4
6.plot: When an American airman dies in the police station, a quiet late shift turns into a challenging night for Will and Geordie. Leonard and Daniel reassess their relationship.

6.title: FR - Grantchester - S06E05 - Episode 5
6.plot: Will and Geordie investigate an audacious bank robbery, which sees Geordie unexpectedly cross paths with an old friend from his army days.

6.title: FR - Grantchester - S06E06 - Episode 6
6.plot: When the leader of a student group falls to her death during a protest, Will and Geordie are drawn into campus politics. The Bishop introduces a new face at the vicarage.

7.title: FR - Grantchester - S07E01 - Episode 1
7.plot: Will and Geordie investigate the apparent murder of Lord Edmund Fitzgerald.

7.title: FR - Grantchester - S07E02 - Episode 2
7.plot: Will and Geordie investigate when a man is found dead with an unusual neck wound.

7.title: FR - Grantchester - S07E03 - Episode 3
7.plot: A vagrant is found dead in the doorway of Leonard's cafe.

7.title: FR - Grantchester - S07E04 - Episode 4
7.plot: A member of Will's congregation is found murdered just before a church fundraising event.

7.title: FR - Grantchester - S07E05 - Episode 5
7.plot: There's a murder at a local old folks' home and two of its elderly residents go missing.

7.title: FR - Grantchester - S07E06 - Episode 6
7.plot: Geordie and Will realise that they may have sent the wrong man to prison for murder.

1.title: FR - Departure - S01E01 - Vanished
1.plot: When TransOcean Flight 716 vanishes over the Atlantic Ocean with 256 people on board, crash investigator Kendra Malley is called in.

1.title: FR - Departure - S01E02 - Survivor
1.plot: The hunt for wreckage continues as the TSIB team learn more about Donovan. Kendra wonders if the plane's lone survivor is hiding something.

1.title: FR - Departure - S01E03 - Prime Suspect
1.plot: Madelyn’s memories of the crash provide the team with a lead, and a new witness comes forward with disturbing information about Donovan.

1.title: FR - Departure - S01E04 - Sabotage
1.plot: Kendra tries to make sense of conflicting evidence and is stunned by the betrayal of someone close to her, while AJ puts his life in danger.

1.title: FR - Departure - S01E05 - Grounded
1.plot: An unlikely source has proof of a conspiracy to cover up the truth about the crash, and the team scramble to recover the black boxes.

1.title: FR - Departure - S01E06 - Endgame
1.plot: Kendra comes up with a plan to confront the Flight 716 conspirators and expose the cover up.

2.title: FR - Departure - S02E01 - Runaway
2.plot: Kendra Malley is called to the U.S. to investigate a high-speed train crash in rural Michigan.

2.title: FR - Departure - S02E02 - Fugitive
2.plot: Kendra learns about a mysterious passenger on the run after escaping from U.S. Marshals' custody.

2.title: FR - Departure - S02E03 - Walk the Line
2.plot: Kendra shares information with her FBI counterpart; Kendra gets a big break in the case.

2.title: FR - Departure - S02E04 - Wrecking Ball
2.plot: Kendra looks for connections between the victims; Max and Kendra hatch a plan with the FBI.

2.title: FR - Departure - S02E05 - Don't Tread on Me
2.plot: Kendra and Agent Hunter find proof of a larger conspiracy; a confrontation leaves Kendra shaken.

2.title: FR - Departure - S02E06 - Witness
2.plot: As the case winds down, Kendra feels there's still a missing piece of the puzzle.

3.title: FR - Departure - S03E01 - The Tempest
3.plot: A night ferry crossing suddenly goes horribly wrong. Kendra Malley and her team are called in to investigate the sinking.

3.title: FR - Departure - S03E02 - Dead in the Water
3.plot: Having found signs of life on board the sunken vessel, the race for recovery continues along with gathering of evidence. Survivors start experiencing flashbacks.

3.title: FR - Departure - S03E03 - Stowaway
3.plot: Kendra Malley and her team continue to investigate the ferry sinking. The Captain's story comes into question, when a recovered video shows a different turn of events below deck, than was first told by survivors.

3.title: FR - Departure - S03E04 - Devil and the Deep Blue Sea
3.plot: There is unexpected betrayal within the ranks, a possibly innocent man is arrested, and then a dead diver surfaces from the wreck.

3.title: FR - Departure - S03E05 - Shot Across The Bow
3.plot: A diver's mysterious identity proves to be the key to Kendra's discovery that an ally has been sabotaging her investigation from the start.

3.title: FR - Departure - S03E06 - What Lies Beneath
3.plot: Kendra and her team decides to go rogue in their quest to discover the true cause of the ferry's sinking.

meta.plot: Follow the mystery of Flight 716 - a passenger plane that vanishes over the Atlantic Ocean. Following the mysterious crash, recently widowed, brilliant aviation investigator Kendra Malley is called in to investigate by her former boss and mentor Howard Lawson.

1.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Small-time hustlers Shaïnez and Liana land in hot water with a tough Brussels drug dealer after stealing from one of his men. Anissa asks Mehdi for help.

1.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Mehdi and his men search for the missing drugs. Chris sends the Djeblis a warning. Impressed by Mehdi's skills, Saber blackmails him into taking a job.

1.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As they gear up for a risky heist, Mehdi and Liana's gangs join forces. Hassan confronts Saber. Coralie reveals a terrible family secret to Sofia.

1.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A furious Chris prepares to wage war on the Djeblis — and everyone else involved in the heist. Hassan sends Danique to cover Saber's tracks.

1.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Mehdi tries to protect Anissa and Shaïnez. Fueled by revenge, Sofia underestimates what Chris is capable of. Liana acts carelessly.

1.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As the war with Chris reaches a boiling point, Mehdi and Tony seek vengeance while the Djeblis plan their next move against the Antwerp enemy.

2.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: After one last heist, Mehdi arranges his affairs and prepares for Canada. The Djeblis play hardball during negotiations with new collaborators.

2.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: As Saber seeks revenge, the Los Soles cartel comes for Nahel. Commissioner Herman blackmails a captive Tony into helping her locate Mehdi.

2.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Mehdi and Saber set the terms of their new partnership. Almeida resorts to bold measures to get intel on Mehdi when the commissioner won’t budge.

2.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Faced with fresh threats after Saber goes rogue, the gang risks everything to salvage the situation. Bad news prompts Almeida to reassess his loyalty.

2.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: After Rayane's betrayal, Mehdi, Tony and Saber pursue the stolen cocaine. Liana narrowly evades danger when the cartel traces Kelly to the workshop.

2.title: FR - Braqueurs : La série - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: As the cartel war escalates, shocking losses send Liana and Mehdi reeling. Saber forges an unlikely alliance; Almeida’s game of chess comes to an end.

meta.plot: Mehdi, a qualified robber, and Liana, an apprentice thief, get involved in a turf war between drug dealers, and have to collaborate in order to save their loved ones.

1.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S01E01 - Mosul
1.plot: An elite French commando group is tasked with rescuing the daughter of a jihadist.

1.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S01E02 - Hisba
1.plot: Commando team 45 attempt to find Fares. Adele asks Kurdish intelligence for assistance.

1.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S01E03 - Piege
1.plot: The team are told there is pressure to move Zaid to Paris, so they have to act quickly.

1.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S01E04 - Tarek
1.plot: The team follow two leads in their attempt to find Salwa and Yanis.

1.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S01E05 - High Value Target
1.plot: The commando team finally locate Salwa but are forced into a fight with Isis soldiers.

1.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S01E06 - Rescue
1.plot: A rescue mission is launched to find the captured soldier Sab.

2.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: After Sab’s capture, Group 45 brings in two new special forces operatives and Pierre, an agent from the DGSE. Negotiations with Zaïd are making progress when an attack on the French consulate by one of his lieutenants triggers an operation by the 45.

2.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: In order to retrieve Sab, the 45 must protect Zaïd by eliminating a survivor from Qalb Aswad who wants to report him to ISIS.

2.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Zaïd disappears from the radar while Moktar grows increasingly suspicious. Meanwhile, the 45 bypass the DGSE and recruit Soraya as a source, in search of any trace of Sab.

2.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Moktar becomes uncontrollable, and the DGSE begins to question its ties with him.

2.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: A joint operation between the DGSE and the 45 is devised to take down Moktar and rescue Sab.

2.title: FR - Cœurs Noirs - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: While the DGSE sets a plan in motion to divert Moktar’s attention, the 45 launch their assault to extract Sab...

meta.plot: The French Special Forces are deployed in Iraq, on the eve of the battle of Mosul, in October 2016. The members of this commando have the mission of finding and exfiltrating the daughter and the grandson of an important French Emir of Daesh who captured and who will cooperate with them only on this condition.
The docuseries follows people deeply involved in the group NXIVM — which is faced with various charges, including sex trafficking and racketeering conspiracy — over the course of several years.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E01 - The Science of Joy
1.plot: Mark Vicente and Sarah Edmondson, high-ranking former NXIVM leaders, describe the dream and mission of NXIVM to build a better world. Bonnie Piesse, Mark's wife, tells him she's worried about the organization and Keith Raniere, NXIVM's leader and Mark's mentor. Mark wonders how could tools to make a better, more ethical world be misused?

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E02 - Viscera
1.plot: After seven years, Bonnie leaves NXIVM for Los Angeles and tries desperately to get through to Mark, who reassures her all is well. Mark remains loyal to Keith and NXIVM, but a series of phone calls begin to sow doubt within him.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E03 - At Cause
1.plot: Sarah confides to Mark about DOS, a secret group involving "masters" and "slaves," and struggles in her relationships with NXIVM, her husband and her best friend. Sarah and Mark lament how many members they've recruited and question what to do next.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E04 - Building Character
1.plot: Mark, Bonnie, Sarah and Nippy strategize with Catherine Oxenberg about how to get her daughter, India, out of DOS, even though she wants to stay. "Jane," India's close friend, describes the appeal of the organization and why she left it all behind.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E05 - Class 1 Data
1.plot: Catherine believes her daughter is in danger and wants her to come home. When she and the former members are unable to get the attention of the authorities, they approach the New York Times. Meanwhile, Mark reflects on his time at NXIVM.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E06 - Honesty & Disclosure
1.plot: Sarah, Mark and Nippy contact additional news outlets to provoke outrage and pressure law enforcement to pay attention. Barbara Bouchey, a former board member and early defector, reflects on her time in Keith's inner circle.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E07 - Blame & Responsibility
1.plot: After learning that the New York Attorney General's chief investigator is interested in building a criminal case against Keith, Catherine travels to Buffalo to meet with Frank Parlato, creator of the anti-NXIVM blog "The Frank Report," to build a dossier of evidence. Meanwhile, we're introduced to Toni Natalie, one of Keith's former girlfriends, who takes us back to the '90s to share her experiences and the challenges she faced with Keith during the days of his first company, Consumers' Buyline.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E08 - The Wound
1.plot: As the group gathers evidence for their FBI testimonies, they express their beliefs about how the curriculums of SOP and JNESS, men's and women's groups within NXIVM, reshaped their ideas on gender roles in society and may have laid the foundation for DOS.

1.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S01E09 - The Fall
1.plot: Keith hasn't been seen in Clifton Park for weeks, and the team gets a tip on where he might be. Catherine meets with India, who maintains her position. Mark and Bonnie return to Clifton Park for the first time since leaving NXIVM and confront their memories of Keith and the curriculum. Sarah, Bonnie, Mark, Nippy, and Catherine face a shocking development in the case.

2.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S02E01 - Tests of Loyalty
2.plot: Prosecutor Moira Penza and defense attorney Marc Agnifilo prepare for trial after the arrest of Keith Raniere, Nancy Salzman, Clare Bronfman, Allison Mack and Lauren Salzman. DOS members Nicki Clyne and Michele Hatchette offer a different perspective into NXIVM, DOS, and Raniere, while Nancy Salzman, under house arrest, sits down to speak with the filmmakers.

2.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S02E02 - Rapport
2.plot: Nancy Salzman looks back at her professional and personal relationship with Keith Raniere and defends her intentions with the company: to help people achieve lasting, personal growth through Executive Success Programs. The first witnesses in the trial are called to the stand, including defector Mark Vicente and Raniere victim Sylvie.

2.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S02E03 - Stimulus and Response
2.plot: Marc Agnifilo presents his case attesting to the good work of NXIVM; Marc Elliot remains loyal to Keith Raniere after he claims the symptoms of his Tourette’s syndrome were successfully reduced by Nancy Salzman. First-line DOS member and NXIVM leader, Lauren Salzman takes the stand… for the prosecution!

2.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S02E04 - The Breach
2.plot: Lauren Salzman testifies to decades of manipulation at the hands of Keith Raniere, a man she loved. Her loyalty and devotion eventually turned her into both a victim and victimizer of other women. NXIVM supporters are unconvinced by the evidence presented in court. Nancy Salzman grapples with learning the extent of Raniere’s sexual pursuit of both of her daughters.

2.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S02E05 - The Room
2.plot: A witness for the prosecution gives heart-wrenching testimony about how Keith Raniere groomed her from a very young age and describes the coercive abuse she suffered at his hands, including being isolated in a room for two years. We learn the witness’s younger sister was preyed upon by Raniere; this shocking and overwhelming evidence finally convinced Nancy Salzman to plead guilty and disavow Raniere. The trial concludes and all await the verdict.

2.title: FR - NXIVM : le voeu - S02E06 - Crime and Punishment
2.plot: Keith Raniere is found guilty on all charges, including racketeering, sex trafficking, forced labor conspiracy, identity theft and production and possession of child pornography. Many survivors of his abuse come forward to deliver powerful victim impact statements and he is sentenced to 120 years. His supporters work to exonerate him, and he plans to appeal. Nancy Salzman comes to a painful reckoning; she is sentenced to 42 months in federal prison.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E01 - The Ultimate Tofu Store Drift
1.plot: High school kid Takumi works at a gas station with his buddy Itsuki. When the guys join their co-worker Iketani for a night of street racing action on Mt. Akina, Takumi’s life will never be the same.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E02 - Revenge! The Rumbling Turbo
1.plot: When his boss reveals that the Eight-Six driver from Mt. Akina owns a tofu shop, Iketani begins to wonder if the legendary racer might have an intimate connection to Takumi.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E03 - Downhill Specialist Arrives
1.plot: Iketani’s out of commission for the race against the RedSuns, so he tries to convince Bunta to take his place. Takumi’s working on a deal of his own - he need’s his dad’s car for a date with Natsuki.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E04 - The Battle Begins
1.plot: The match between the SpeedStars and the RedSuns is set to begin. Just as Iketani makes the desperate decision to put Kenji up against Keisuke, the Eight-Six appears - with Takumi behind the wheel.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E05 - Dogfight!
1.plot: When Takumi stuns everyone with his skills in the Eight-Six, Iketani and Itsuki start plotting a way to get the new hotshot to join the SpeedStars.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E06 - A New Challenger
1.plot: Driving his new Three-Two, Takeshi goes head-to-head against Ryosuke on Mt. Akina. Meanwhile, Takumi offers Iketani a first-hand look at the thrill of riding in the Eight-Six.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E07 - Pride of a Racer
1.plot: Takeshi is ready to take on the Eight-Six and he has every reason to believe that the car’s driver is game. When Takumi catches wind of the situation, he’s got to decide if the challenge is worth accepting.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E08 - Time's Almost Up!
1.plot: There’s a crowd waiting for a race to start on Mt. Akina, but the Eight-Six is nowhere to be seen. Itsuki’s in a tough spot - and Takumi’s the only one who can get him out of it.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E09 - Battle To the Limit
1.plot: The race is underway with Takumi behind the wheel of the Eight-Six. His competition, Takeshi, drives the Three-Two with undeniable skill - but he can’t seem to pull away from Takumi!

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E10 - The Five Consecutive Hairpins
1.plot: Takeshi and Takumi speed toward the finish line! Victory is at hand for the driver who can conquer the final challenges of the course - five treacherous hairpin curves.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E11 - Shingo Arrives
1.plot: Iketani’s putting his S-13 to the test now that it’s out of the shop, but a simple practice session turns into a dangerous situation when a reckless member of the NightKids - Shingo - arrives in a red EG-6.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E12 - The FR Killer
1.plot: Shingo arrives with the NightKids and he’s calling Takumi and the gang out. His demands: A Duct Tape Death Match against the Eight-Six.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E13 - First Date
1.plot: Shingo’s itching to take on the Eight-Six in a dangerous race, but with nobody stepping up to accept the challenge, he takes drastic measures to get his way.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E14 - Evolving Drift
1.plot: Takumi’s had enough of Shingo’s intimidation tactics. He agrees to take on the pushy NightKid in the most treacherous of races: A Duct Tape Death Match.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E15 - Takumi's Fury
1.plot: Takumi and Iketani are having very different days: Takumi’s hand is taped to the Eight-Six’s steering wheel as Shingo bumps into him at high speeds. Iketani’s hanging out with a pretty girl.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E16 - The Angel of Usui
1.plot: When Iketani takes Mako out for a good time, his friends decide to tail the duo and figure out what she’s all about. They soon discover her greatest talent: outdriving them all on Mt. Usui!

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E17 - Sudden-Death Death Match
1.plot: Takumi’s upcoming race at Usui is creating friction among his friends. One reason for the tension: he’s never driven the course. A bigger reason: his opponent is Mako.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E18 - Hot Winds and Furious Driving
1.plot: Mako and Sayuki are having their way with Takumi and the Eight-Six on Mt. Usui. As Takumi himself questions his ability to pull out a win, the racers approach the course’s toughest curve.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E19 - Super Drift!
1.plot: The finish line is in sight on Mt. Usui! Mako and Sayuki know the course like the back of their hands; Takumi might need a miracle if he is to claim victory against the girls.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E20 - The End of Summer
1.plot: When the gang heads out to a water park, Iketani sees signs that it could actually work out with Mako - until he finds photographic proof that her heart might belong to another guy.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E21 - Challenge From the Superstar
1.plot: Takumi’s growing rep has attracted the attention of Ryosuke, who’s ready to face the Eight-Six on Mt. Akina. Takumi better get his head on straight - this will be his greatest challenge yet.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E22 - Fierce Uphill Battle!
1.plot: At Itsuki’s behest, Takumi heads out to watch an uphill race between two of his former foes - Takeshi of the NightKids and the RedSuns’ Keisuke.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E23 - The Rainy Downhill
1.plot: Kenta, a member of the RedSuns, challenges Takumi to a downhill race in the pouring rain. With the increasingly wet course conditions, neither driver is guaranteed victory.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E24 - Akagi's White Comet
1.plot: Ryosuke may already be a local legend, but he still drives like a man with something to prove. He’s determined to beat the very best racers Mt. Akina has to offer - and Takumi’s next on his list.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E25 - Last Great Battle
1.plot: Veteran racer Ryosuke’s a mastermind behind the wheel, and he’ll be pulling no punches in the match against rising rookie Takumi. The drivers are ready and only one can be the best.

1.title: FR - Initial D - S01E26 - The New Downhill Legend
1.plot: The drivers fly toward the finish line, with only one curve to go. Ryosuke and Takumi have earned their reputations - but the winner of this race will go down in history.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E01 - A New Threat
2.plot: Emperor, a team of Lan Evos from the Tochigi prefecture has arrived with the goal to crush every team in Gunma. Soon they realize the fastest car in Gunma isn’t just Akagi’s White Comet, but also a new downhill legend known as Akina’s Eight-Six.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E02 - Team Emperor on Akina
2.plot: What would happen if the Eight-Six gets a new upgrade? That’s exactly what Iketani and Itsuki has been thinking about to increase the performance of Takumi’s vehicle. But would Bunta allow it? Elsewhere, team Emperor’s winning streak isn’t slowing down as they continue to sweep across Gunma, defeating every race team with ease. Their next target, Akina’s Eight-Six.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E03 - The Feeling of Defeat
2.plot: Kyoiichi senses an uncanny fighting spirit within the Eight-Six’s driver, as he gives Seiji strict rules against the race. Seiji however decides to ignore these rules and launches his Evo IV into full power. Takumi is outclassed in almost every category as the Evo IV’s power is truly amazing. The battle risk escalates when the race reaches it’s second half point of the coarse.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E04 - Hollow Victory
2.plot: In his heart, Takumi couldn’t accept his victory over the Evo IV and decides to make a vow. To add to his already uneasy thoughts … anonymous messages are being sent to Takumi concerning his relationship with Natsuki.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E05 - Countdown to Destruction
2.plot: Takumi soon discovers Natsuki’s secret that leads him to vent his anger in an egotistic battle against Kyoiichi at Akagi, thinking little of the huge disadvantage he has.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E06 - Goodbye Eight-Six
2.plot: Kyoiichi is realizing just how incredible Akina’s downhill is, yet he has full confidence in his rally tuned Evo III. Takumi soon realizes the difference between the Eight-Six and the loud banging horsepower of the Evo III. It seems that Bunta instinctively knows of the race taking place as a major turning point is about to happen in the series.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E07 - Battle at Akagi
2.plot: With the Eight-Six out of the picture, the RedSuns has become the main representatives of Gunma, as every local racer within the prefecture are in favor of Emperor’s defeat. Ryosuke has returned on the street to defeat the revenge-seeking Kyoiichi, who plans to use his theories of motorsports against the White Comet. Also, Iketani and Kenji spot another racer from a neighbouring prefecture.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E08 - Dangerous Car
2.plot: Mt. Akagi’s battle continues, as Ryosuke has his own theories about streetracing…and he plans to demonstrate it’s difference on Kyoiichi’s Evo III. Back in Akina, Takumi’s routine way of life is gone with the absence of the Eight-Six and the discovery of Natsuki’s secret.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E09 - The New Eight-Six
2.plot: The Eight-Six has returned undergoing a major change. Takumi soon test-drives the new performance much to his mixed satisfactions and disappointments, but what he doesn’t understand is what Bunta knows what’s within that car. Also, the relationship between Takumi and Natsuki is falling apart, but Itsuki’s heart is shaken with the appearance of Kazumi.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E10 - The Eight-Six Turbo!
2.plot: After Wataru issues a short-lived battle against Keisuke, his sister Kazumi introduces him to Itsuki leading to a chance meeting with another Eight-Six driver. At first everything seems right with the meeting, but because of Takumi’s naïve reaction to his car’s new downhill weapon, Wataru rubs it the wrong way as his bad side emerges.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E11 - The Seal Has Been Broken
2.plot: Fujiwara takes up the challenge and decides where the battle would take place. But before he can accept Wataru’s challenge, he’ll have to learn the most basic essentials of what it means to be a streetracer. Also, Itsuki’s relationship with Kazumi is teaching him the value of having a girlfriend.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E12 - Eight-Six vs. Eight-Six
2.plot: Fujiwara is about to experience a completely different type of racer within Wataru’s own Eight-Six, in a treacherous mountain pass consisted of mixed elevations, rusting guardrails, unexpected traps and aging rough pavements. As Takumi presses down the accelerator, the true nature of the Eight-Six’s new hidden weapon emerges in it’s monstrous raw performance.

2.title: FR - Initial D - S02E13 - Changing Seasons
2.plot: The battle between the two Eight-Sixes have met Wataru’s satisfaction much higher than he expected, but he plans to decide the outcome of this battle with the judgement of the human body’s limitations. Takumi soon realizes he is losing grip of his pace. After the battle, a series of revelations take place among all the characters in preparation to what’s coming next.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E01 - Project D
3.plot: Project D's reputation is growing with every race. The team's next match pits Takumi against a downhill racer with technique very similar to his own.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E02 - Full Speed! Downhill Battle
3.plot: Tohru's promised to quit racing forever if he loses his next match. The course is dangerous, and with Project D's downhill specialist on his tail, one wrong move could spell disaster.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E03 - The Most Powerful Man of the Toudou School
3.plot: The guys of Project D are great at keeping their cool, but the pressure can't be denied as they prepare to face their next opponents - the students of the Toudou Racing School.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E04 - Two Pieces of Advice
3.plot: The Toudou School's driver could be the toughest Takumi's ever faced. If Project D is to claim victory, Takumi would be wise to listen to Ryosuke's advice.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E05 - The Starting Line to Victory
3.plot: The Toudou School brings in a professional driver to face Project D in a rematch. With reputations on the line, Ryosuke must decide who will represent the team.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E06 - Blind Attack
3.plot: The Toudou School's driver knows all about exploiting a challenger's blind spot. If Takumi hopes to win, he'll have to find a way to leave his opponent in the dark.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E07 - The 85's Raging Turbo
3.plot: A New nightmarish opponent arrives on Mt. Akina challenging Takumi in a downhill battle. Also, Itsuki gets a new upgrade for his Eight-Five as it is demonstrated on the downhill.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E08 - Fateful Battle of FDs
3.plot: Keisuke meets a girl named Kyoko, who happens to be a fellow FD driver. Their first encounter is pleasant and leaves her weak in the knees. Their second encounter is a race on her turf.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E09 - Kyoko's Confession
3.plot: Hoping to keep up with Takumi's growth as a racer, Keisuke's spending most of his spare time driving. He's not interested in distractions - and that could spell heartbreak for Kyoko.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E10 - The Saitama Area's Ultimate Weapon
3.plot: Project D might be in trouble. The leader of the Northern Saitama Alliance has recruited a bold new driver to face Takumi. Ryosuke knows victory isn't a sure thing, and as the race begins, so does a heavy rain.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E11 - Rainy Downhill Battle
3.plot: Takumi struggles to keep up with the Northern Saitama Alliance's Cappuccino. As the rain soaks the course, both teams find their confidence wavering - it seems the race could go either way.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E12 - Straightaway of Struggles
3.plot: Takumi is locked in the toughest race of his career! With Ryosuke's odd advice echoing in his mind, and the Cappuccino still leading, his decision in the last straightaway will be the difference in victory or defeat.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E13 - Motivation
3.plot: Keisuke and Wataru's grueling race continues in the pouring rain. Meanwhile, the Cappuccino driver picks Takumi's brain, trying to better understand his amazing abilities behind the wheel.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E14 - Sad Lonely Driver
3.plot: After driving the Impreza, Takumi begins to question his abilities behind the wheel of the Eight-Six. Itsuki's got his own emotional turmoil after a date with Kasumi takes an unexpected turn.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E15 - 4WD Complex
3.plot: Takumi continues wrestling with the differences in his Eight-Six and the Impreza. Later, when Keisuke falls prey to a trap set by Project D's next opponents, the upcoming race could be over before it begins.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E16 - Hillclimb of Fury
3.plot: The damage to Keisuke's car might prevent him from driving in the uphill race. Just as it looks like he's out of options, Kyoko arrives on the scene in her FD.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E17 - The Saitama Area's Final Battle
3.plot: The Lan EVO drivers have proven to be Project D's shadiest opponents yet. They've already shown their willingness to cheat - and now they've threatened Takumi's team with physical violence.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E18 - Last Drive
3.plot: Kyoko is delighted to spend a day with Keisuke while his car's in the shop. She likes him more than ever, but with his skills growing, Keisuke's never been more focused on driving.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E19 - God Foot and God Arm
3.plot: Project D's next match is against a pair of legendary racers. The veteran drivers of Purple Shadow may be a lot older than Takumi's crew, but they aren't rusty. In fact, their skills are as sharp as polished blades.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E20 - The Unmatched GT-R!
3.plot: Keisuke climbs behind the wheel of his newly modified FD to take on the legendary God Foot's GT-R! The race will be tougher - and longer - than normal. Luckily, Ryosuke's got a plan.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E21 - Dogfight
3.plot: The battle between the FD and GT-R continues, however the real battle has just begun. Now, Hoshino demonstrates his unique driving skills that people call the impossible earning him the name Godfoot. This makes Keisuke’s true racing abilities appear when it’s pushed beyond his limits as both drivers begin to drive recklessly forcing the battle to be settled in more than just one battle.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E22 - The Sorcerer of the Single-Handed Steer
3.plot: God Arm's unexpected moves and legendary steering skills have Project D's downhill ace feeling the pressure - and it doesn't help that Takumi's mind keeps drifting back to the Impreza.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E23 - Endless Battle
3.plot: Takumi's greatest strength is his greatest weakness in the match with God Arm. The race has become an endurance test, and both drivers are wearing thin. Something's got to give - and soon.

3.title: FR - Initial D - S03E24 - The Never-Ending Challenge
3.plot: Takumi and God Arm speed toward the finish line. After the race ends, the rising star looks to the legend for a lesson in technique - and Project D looks into the future where new challengers wait for their shot.

4.title: FR - Initial D - S04E01 - Encounter of Destiny
4.plot: Following their narrow victory against Purple Shadow, Project D's reputation is at stake after a pair of imposters parade around Saitama. Initially Takumi seems oblivious to the incident, but takes notice after he is mistakenly blamed for taking advantage of a girl. Meanwhile, the final stage of Project D's expeditions is upon them, and is to be the hardest yet.

4.title: FR - Initial D - S04E02 - A New Battlefield
4.plot: The first stage of Project D's Kanagawa expeditions is against Team 246: Satoshi Omiya and Kobayakawa. Although racing for their own pride, 246 are actually part of a grand plan initiated by Team Sidewinder's Go Hojo and Eiji Kubo. As the uphill race begins, Kobayakawa is about to be shown the true ability of Keisuke Takahashi.

4.title: FR - Initial D - S04E03 - Dead Line
4.plot: As the first battle winds down, the downhill between Takumi’s Eight-Six and Omiya’s NB8C Roadster begins. As both cars reach their limits, the control of the drivers will determine the outcome. Against Omiya’s miraculous car control, will Takumi be able to win? Another factor will come into play.

meta.plot: Takumi’s job as a tofu delivery boy has turned him into one of the most formidable drivers around. Behind the wheel of his Eight-Six, he’s one with the road—and his life shifts into high gear when the underground street racing world takes notice. Drivers from across the region are lining up for a shot at the new guy. Takumi’s not just focused on winning—he’s out to prove he’s the best.

1.title: FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Un jour après l'autre - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Explore the healing journey of five strangers, each dealing with the loss of a loved one, whose lives intersect in a group therapy session.

1.title: FR - Circeo - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Circeo - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Circeo - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Circeo - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Circeo - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Circeo - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Based on Circeo massacre that took place in 1970s Italy, when two teenage girls were found in the trunk of a car in Rome, naked, wrapped in blankets and drenched in blood.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E01 - Bad Things
1.plot: May 6th begins like any other day in Midwich. But as dusk falls, the lives of its residents are profoundly altered forever. As family members fight to save their loved ones from an unknown fate, a community is forged in a way nobody thought possible.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E02 - In This Together
1.plot: Midwich is recovering from the blackout when a shocking discovery is made: every woman of child-bearing age inside the zone on May 6th has fallen pregnant. But of graver concern to Dr Susannah Zellaby is the unnerving responses of the pregnant women.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E03 - The Hive
1.plot: Three years after the blackout. The children are entering the second phase of their development. Susannah notices changes in their behaviour and makes a terrifying discovery. Her worst fears are realised when a forgotten mother emerges.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E04 - Hide and Seek
1.plot: Whilst investigating Amrita's disappearance, Paul's own attachment to Nathan is challenged. Susannah tries to understand the cause of the children's violent instincts. The children now see Susannah as a threat and use their powers to neutralise her.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E05 - Why Are You Lying?
1.plot: With Susannah ostracised, the children's hold on Midwich strengthens. When Paul awakens to the children's true nature, he pleads with Susannah to try to forge a truce with them. Meanwhile Zoe and Sam are galvanised into action by another miracle.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E06 - Not an Ice Cream
1.plot: Two years later. The children go behind Susannah's back to express their desire to leave Midwich and Susannah suspects ulterior motives at work. Meanwhile, tragedy strikes one of the families. Paul and Susannah work together to uncover the truth.

1.title: FR - Le Village des damnés - S01E07 - Departure
1.plot: After more bloodshed, the children plan to leave. Susannah volunteers to go with them and strives to get Cassie to safety. It is evident now that they must be stopped. And there's no easy way out.

meta.plot: A small fictional village in England is completely subdued by an alien presence for an entire day. Upon waking, it is discovered that numerous women in the town are pregnant.

1.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S01E01 - The Last Seance
1.plot: Junior doctor Max Liebermann asks to observe a criminal case for his studies. Inspector Oskar Rheinhardt reluctantly offers him full access to the case of a murdered woman.

1.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S01E02 - Queen of the Night
1.plot: Oskar is called away from Max and Clara’s engagement party with news of a murder in a Spittelberg brothel. Oskar is quick to make an arrest, but Max is not convinced that they have the right man.

1.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S01E03 - The Lost Child
1.plot: Max's nephew suffers a breakdown after the drowning of a fellow cadet at a military academy. The police department refute suspicions but Max shows Oskar a pattern of violence and believes that they're looking at a murder investigation.

2.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S02E02 - The Devil's Kiss
2.plot: A beggar-girl finds a mutilated corpse in Vienna's slum quarter. The secret services warn Oskar that the investigation is not the concern of the Leopoldstadt police. However, when Oskar receives anonymous messages relating to the murder, he can't resist delving further.

2.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S02E03 - Darkness Rising
2.plot: A monk has been found brutally murdered in his monastery. Suspicion falls on a religious Jew who had reprimanded the monk for spreading anti-Semitic rhetoric. To untangle a web of deceit Max and Oskar will have to understand the power of belief.

3.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S03E01 - Deadly Communion
3.plot: A young seamstress is murdered in a luxury fashion house. Oscar and Max are initially perplexed, but further clues are revealed when Max receives a letter at his new practice.

3.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S03E02 - The God of Shadows
3.plot: Max applies his neurological expertise to the case of a retired soldier, Captain Steiner, who is convinced that he is cursed and tortured by vengeful spirits.

3.title: FR - Les Carnets de Max Liebermann - S03E03 - Death Is Now a Welcome Guest
3.plot: When a famous film star dies during the premiere of her new film, Max and Oskar’s investigation gets them embroiled in the dark underbelly of stardom and far-right politics.

meta.plot: Max Liebermann, a student of Sigmund Freud, helps Detective Rheinhardt in the investigation of a series of disturbing murders around the grand cafes and opera houses of 1900s Vienna.
Nick and Vanessa Lachey host this social experiment where single men and women look for love and get engaged, all before meeting in person.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E01 - Is Love Blind?
1.plot: This season's singles enter the dating pods and talk romance, religion and sexuality. Who will feel a spark ... and who will find a soulmate?

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E02 - Will You Marry Me?
1.plot: As one couple celebrates their engagement, others follow close behind. Barnett continues to charm the ladies. Jessica grapples with indecision.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E03 - First Night Together
1.plot: The twists and turns keep coming. Giannina redefines the rules, Barnett makes a surprising decision, and the engaged couples depart for paradise.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E04 - Couples Retreat
1.plot: One couple's rough night leads to an explosive conversation. Others learn they aren't alone in Mexico. What will happen when old flames reunite?

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E05 - Last Night in Paradise
1.plot: As the couples get ready to return to the real world, Jessica and Mark continue to struggle, and Giannina digs into Damian's deepest fears.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E06 - Moving in Together
1.plot: Vanessa and Nick share a surprise with the group. Kelly and Kenny deal with distance, Jessica meets Mark's roommates, and Amber throws a party.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E07 - Meet the Parents
1.plot: Tensions mount between Giannina and Damian; Amber takes Barnett to her childhood home; Cameron braces for a charged meeting with Lauren's father.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E08 - Countdown to I Do's
1.plot: With only two weeks left until the weddings, the couples get fitted for suits and gowns. But will lingering doubts lead to drama or new beginnings?

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E09 - Bachelor & Bachelorette Parties
1.plot: Emotions run high as the couples plan for their futures and party like there's no tomorrow. Soon after, the first wedding day arrives.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E10 - The Weddings
1.plot: Loved ones gather while the remaining couples prepare to become husbands and wives; some will say "I do," while others will leave the experiment alone.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E11 - The Reunion
1.plot: Nick and Vanessa reunite with this season’s past and present couples and revisit their highs and lows. Plus, get an update on where they are now.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E12 - After the Altar: Two Years Later
1.plot: After two years, the Pod Squad gets ready to reunite, sharing personal updates - and dissecting shocking drama - along the way.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E13 - After the Altar: Married, Single, and It's Complicated
1.plot: Party prep continues: Damian unpacks his feelings with a familiar "friend," Amber opens up to Barnett's mom, and Jessica grapples with gift etiquette.

1.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S01E14 - After the Altar: Celebrations and Confrontations
1.plot: Tensions mount between Giannina and Damian, Jessica faces a backlash, Diamond deals with a disastrous date, and Barnett and Cameron get sentimental.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E01 - The Pods Are Open!
2.plot: The Lacheys kick things off as the singles move into the pods, playfully connect and plan for the future. Meanwhile, a love triangle takes shape.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E02 - Love Triangles
2.plot: A whirlwind proposal leads to a moment of truth, a pivotal ask comes with unclear intentions, and a body image conversation forges a strong connection.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E03 - Love in Paradise
2.plot: After an unexpected admission, Shayne proposes — but to whom? Later, Mallory makes a heart-wrenching decision, and the engaged couples exit the pods.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E04 - Meet the Other Couples
2.plot: In Mexico, the couples continue taking steps toward the altar... and deal with some not-so-sexy symptoms. At cocktail hour, former flings reconnect.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E05 - Leaving Paradise
2.plot: Time winds down in Mexico, but not before a tense post-party discussion, a playful group beach day, and a series of intimate revelations.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E06 - Back to Reality
2.plot: The couples bid farewell to paradise, head back to reality, reconnect with family and reexamine a host of hot topics with fresh eyes.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E07 - A Family Affair
2.plot: Shaina’s comments spark a conversation between Shayne and Natalie. Later, the couples connect with more sweet — and skeptical — friends and family.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E08 - Final Adjustments
2.plot: Mallory and Sal face fresh drama, Shake and Deeps dissect their chemistry, and later, special guests help the couples find wedding dresses and tuxes.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E09 - Bachelor & Bachelorette Parties
2.plot: Emotions run high as the first wedding takes place — but not before final date nights, intimate conversations and bachelor and bachelorette parties.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E10 - The Weddings
2.plot: Happily ever afters or heartbreaking goodbyes? The couples decide as the experiment comes to a close in the company of friends and family.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E11 - The Reunion
2.plot: This season’s singles and married couples gather round and get real with Nick and Vanessa, dissecting everything from I do’s to I don’ts.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E12 - After the Altar: Friends Who Adventure Together, Stay Together
2.plot: As one couple faces some challenges, others explore new romance. Danielle and Nick plan a group getaway for Natalie's 30th birthday.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E13 - After the Altar: It’s My Party and I’ll Gossip if I Want to
2.plot: An over-the-top, '80s-themed party creates an uncomfortable situation for Mallory and Sal. Things heat up when Shaina arrives with big news.

2.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S02E14 - After the Altar: The Future Looks Bright
2.plot: Iyanna and Jarrette meet with family for advice, while Sal turns to his own. Kyle and Deepti decide if they're ready for the next step.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E01 - Welcome to Love Is Blind!
3.plot: Things move quickly as a new group makes intense connections in the pods. One couple trades three little words, and then four: "Will you marry me?"

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E02 - Love Triangles and Love Triumphs
3.plot: For one woman, the third shot at love might be the charm. Bartise and Nancy both feel torn between two different people. Two more couples get engaged.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E03 - The First Night Together
3.plot: Nancy weighs two proposals and finds clarity. The second phase of the experiment begins as five engaged couples leave the pods and head to Malibu.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E04 - Meet Your Exes
3.plot: The couples settle into real-life time together in Malibu and finally meet each other at a cocktail night, where old feelings cause a few new bumps.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E05 - Trouble in Paradise
3.plot: Romantic dates and a pool party cement bonds for some couples but raise doubts for others. Cole is surprisingly honest, ruffling a few feathers.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E06 - Return to Reality
3.plot: Transitioning back into their everyday lives in Dallas, the couples navigate frank conversations around finances and meet each others' families.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E07 - Impress the Parents
3.plot: More meetings with family and friends lead to soul-searching. At a bar night, a particular conversation at the pool party makes waves all over again.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E08 - The Perfect Fit
3.plot: One couple works through setbacks and another pair resets while others get to know their partners' friends. The brides and grooms go shopping.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E09 - The Last Supper
3.plot: With a few days left before the weddings, the couples enjoy romantic final dates. Colleen expresses doubts. Can one couple resolve their conflicts?

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E10 - Approaching the Altar
3.plot: The ladies hit the strip club for their bachelorette party, while the guys get their hands dirty at the rodeo. Wedding day dawns for two couples.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E11 - The Wedding Day
3.plot: As more couples head to the altar, some finish the day heartbroken while others — despite their doubts — take the plunge and say, "I do."

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E12 - The Reunion
3.plot: This season's current and former couples sit down with Nick and Vanessa for an emotional conversation to clear the air and look back at their wild ride.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E13 - After the Altar: Soulmates and Blank Slates
3.plot: While one married couple enjoys wedded bliss, another negotiates big questions. One-time exes reconnect. The women and men meet up separately to debrief.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E14 - After the Altar: The Party is Just Getting Started
3.plot: Preparing for Alexa's birthday bash, Nancy has an emotional conversation with her family and Zanab gets glam. Drama swirls around Cole at the party.

3.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S03E15 - After the Altar: A Second Shot at Love?
3.plot: Colleen and Matt navigate challenges as they look to the future. One man, hoping for a second chance at marriage, plans a grand gesture.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E01 - Welcome to the Pods!
4.plot: As single Seattleites begin a new round of voice-only dating, intersecting love triangles take shape that may lead to heartache down the line.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E02 - Birthday Wishes
4.plot: In a situation where romantic rivals are also roommates, hard choices lead to some hard feelings. Two couples take the plunge and get engaged.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E03 - Is Love Really Blind?
4.plot: More proposals lead to eye-opening and emotional first meetings. One man wrestles with a painful decision between two very different women.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E04 - Playing With Fire
4.plot: Five newly minted pairs of fiancés arrive at a luxurious resort in Mexico, where things go swimmingly for some while others struggle to stay afloat.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E05 - Paradise Lost
4.plot: An intense pool party conversation has a lasting ripple effect during the next day's dates. One couple's doubts lead to a drastic decision.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E06 - I Made A Mistake
4.plot: As the couples get settled back in Seattle, one suitor hopes his change of heart hasn't come too late. A confession causes tension between friends.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E07 - Second Time's the Charm?
4.plot: Family meetings stir up anxiety and excitement. Two couples negotiate their potential living situations, and a date leads to a life-changing question.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E08 - Pick Me
4.plot: As one couple commits to moving forward, another navigates heartbreaking realizations. An unexpected guest at a birthday event causes friction.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E09 - Romeo and Juliet Didn't Work Out
4.plot: Introductions to friends and family continue. With just a week until weddings, the soon-to-be spouses go shopping--but one person shockingly opts out.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E10 - Thank You, Next
4.plot: One woman's decision devastates her fiancé. After stripping down on a date, Kwame opens up about doubts. Tiffany feels the pressure of wedding planning.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E11 - You Are Overpriced
4.plot: The future brides and grooms work through pre-wedding jitters at separate parties. The first couple to make their final decisions arrives at the altar.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E12 - Eternal Bliss?
4.plot: The remaining couples weigh doubts and dreams as they decide whether to commit to their futures together — or walk away alone.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E13 - The Live Reunion
4.plot: In this reunion special, the Season 4 cast dishes on love, life and lessons learned after saying “I do” — or “don’t.”

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E14 - After the Altar: The One Year Anniversary
4.plot: Three committed couples reunite in Seattle to celebrate a year of marriage. Elsewhere, Micah wrestles with mixed emotions as Paul tries to move forward.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E15 - After the Altar: Moving On and Moving In
4.plot: Marshall introduces someone special to Tiffany and Brett. Chelsea and Kwame's families gather for a joyous occasion. Jackie and Josh make a big move.

4.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S04E16 - After the Altar: Settling Scores
4.plot: The contestants face off in a flag football game that offers chaos and catharsis, while a party prompts apologies — and incendiary new accusations.

5.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S05E01 - So, You’re a Recent Cheater?
5.plot: Optimistic singles from Houston settle into the pods, where some quickly bond over shared interests — while others rub their dates the wrong way.

5.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S05E02 - Can I Talk to You for Real?
5.plot: One participant feels the pain of an unrequited crush; another makes a heartfelt apology. Intensity builds between two people weighing other options.

5.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S05E03 - Blindsided
5.plot: A real-life reveal follows the first proposal in the pods. Torn between a sizzling connection and a safer choice, one woman questions her instincts.

5.title: FR - Love Is Blind - S05E04 - She's Gone…?
5.plot: The fallout from an explosive revelation about a past relationship rocks two romances and a friendship, while another pair leaves the pods as fiancés.

meta.plot: England, 1954. On a train to London, Fitzwilliam meets Miss Pinkerton, who tells him that a killer is on the loose in the sleepy English village of Wychwood under Ashe. The villagers believe the deaths are accidents, but Miss Pinkerton knows otherwise — and when she’s later found dead on her way to Scotland Yard, Fitzwilliam feels he must find the killer before they can strike again.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre est-il facile ? - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A stranger's death leads Luke Fitzwilliam to the quiet village of Wychwood, where he is determined to prove that a series of tragic 'accidents' is in fact the work of a killer.

1.title: FR - Un meurtre est-il facile ? - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the village is shaken by another death, the discovery of a crucial piece of evidence blows the investigation wide open and leaves Luke Fitzwilliam questioning who he can trust.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E01 - My Love Life Started the Day It Ended
1.plot: At the start of her sophomore year, Ichica's elite girls' school merges with a boys' school. Principal Ikushima announces a strict "No Romance" rule.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E02 - Rabbit Hunting
1.plot: While Ichica struggles to make ends meet, an anonymous tip leads to a cruel expulsion. The school intensifies its surveillance with "Rabbit Hunters."

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E03 - School Choir Crush
1.plot: When a compromising photo of two choir students is leaked on the school app, Ichica receives a cry for help. Ms. Shinoda is visited by a guilty student.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E04 - Three Reasons Not to Fall in Love
1.plot: Maki grows closer to Ichica and opens up. Under Principal Ikushima's directive, the Rabbit Hunters intensify their crusade during the school trip.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E05 - Why Doesn't Gay Romance Count?
1.plot: Kanda intervenes to save Ichica from a suspicious Sawa. Ichica discovers a photo of a gay couple. Maki's interactions with Ayami cause a misunderstanding.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E06 - Romance at the School Festival
1.plot: At the school festival, the Love Keepers try to hide Koharu's relationship from the Rabbit Hunters. Maki and Ichica sort out their complicated feelings.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E07 - Is It a Crime to Fall in Love?
1.plot: After a photo of her secret makeout session with Maki is leaked online, Ichica undergoes a harsh interrogation. Later, she makes a bold declaration.

1.title: FR - Chastity High - S01E08 - My Life, My Rules.
1.plot: The trial between Ichica and Asuran Academy begins, and her friends rally around her. Will Ichica be able to find justice for herself and her schoolmates?

meta.plot: When an ultra-elite high school enforces a strict "No Romance" rule that expels anyone caught dating, a student secretly helps her classmates for cash.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E01 - Model 101
1.plot: In 1997, a haunted scientist brushes his family aside for an all-consuming project. In 2022, a renegade fighter battles a powerful robot for vital data.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E02 - Model 102
1.plot: Eiko and the Terminator arrive in 1997 with identical missions: find Dr. Malcolm Lee. Meanwhile, Lee's three children sneak out of their apartment.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E03 - Model 103
1.plot: Malcolm confides in Kokoro about his recurring nightmare. The three children continue their underground trek, unaware of looming danger.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E04 - Model 104
1.plot: As a desperate Eiko attempts to elude the police, Misaki's mysterious past comes into focus. Malcolm wrestles with the nature of fate.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E05 - Model 105
1.plot: Malcolm brings Kokoro online. The boys disagree about Misaki's motivations. Eiko realizes she's entering unknown territory.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E06 - Model 106
1.plot: The Prophet debates the paradox of time travel with Eiko. Malcolm shares a painful memory with Kokoro as the children hope to reunite at Cat Town.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E07 - Model 107
1.plot: Malcolm recalls past efforts to thwart the machines — and his desire to build a god. With Kenta captured, the Terminator prepares for the endgame.

1.title: FR - Terminator Zero - S01E08 - Model 108
1.plot: Kenta wrestles with a brutal choice and the Terminator reveals a shocking truth as the future of humankind hangs in the balance.

meta.plot: A warrior from a post-apocalyptic future travels to 1997 to protect an AI scientist being hunted by an unfeeling — and indestructible — cyborg.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: On the holy day of Olympia, Zeus questions his omnipotence. Down on Earth, Riddy — a mere mortal — is more concerned with matters of the heart.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Dionysus has an idea to help Orpheus reach his lost wife. Zeus, annoyed by the mortals' lack of respect for him, shares his own plan with Prometheus.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Zeus demands revenge on the Trojans for desecrating his monument. Ariadne begs her father for the one thing she wants for her birthday — redemption.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The search for Zeus' missing watch turns deadly. Trouble is brewing in the Underworld, as an old friend of Prometheus' meets his destiny.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The Furies offer Ariadne a glimpse into her family's past, while an increasingly paranoid Zeus overhears a secret from his wife in the present.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Orpheus draws closer to Riddy — but she's already become close to somebody else. Hades feels the full force of Zeus' wrath at a gathering of the gods.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: On Olympus, Zeus hosts a barbecue for the gods to watch a prophecy being defied. Down in the Underworld, Riddy prepares for her own to be fulfilled.

1.title: FR - KAOS - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Hera calls a family meeting to protect Zeus from himself. But after a climactic meeting with the Fates, Kaos might be coming for the king of the gods.

meta.plot: As discord reigns on Mount Olympus and almighty Zeus spirals into paranoia, three mortals are destined to reshape the future of humankind.
A British woman and her husband seek a fresh start in Australia after infidelity in their marriage. The couple hire a young nanny, but she isn't the innocent stranger she pretends to be.

1.title: FR - Lie with Me - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Seeking a fresh start for their marriage, Briton Anna and her Australian husband Jake move to Melbourne with their two small children. With Anna resuming her career, they hire a young live-in nanny to help - but local girl Becky is anything but the innocent stranger she pretends to be.

1.title: FR - Lie with Me - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Lulled into a false sense of security, Anna recommits to Jake. She continues to confide in Becky, unaware that Becky is under Jake's spell and plotting together with him against her. Later, a shocking turn of events leads Anna to discover the truth of what is going on, and she decides she is not going to be a victim any more.

1.title: FR - Lie with Me - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Becky is conflicted when Anna tells her that Jake is physically abusive, showing her a bruise on her shoulder and claiming that Jake hit her. When Jake lures Becky back, Anna realises she has to take drastic measures to protect her children and comes up with a deadly plan.

1.title: FR - Lie with Me - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Becky helps Anna set up an apartment where she is safe from Jake, and on the day Anna is due to move out and take the kids, she asks Becky to stay at home with Jake.

meta.plot: The story of the determined Scotland Yard Officers who worked to prove who was responsible for the death of Alexander Litvinenko, in one of the most complex and dangerous investigations in the history of the Metropolitan Police.

1.title: FR - Meurtre au Polonium - L'affaire Litvinenko - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Detective Inspector Brent Hyatt and Detective Sergeant Chris Hoar are summoned to University College Hospital in London to interview a patient with an extraordinary story to tell.

1.title: FR - Meurtre au Polonium - L'affaire Litvinenko - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Radiation teams swarm across London in a rush to secure potentially contaminated sites visited by the Russian spy.

1.title: FR - Meurtre au Polonium - L'affaire Litvinenko - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A team of detectives led by Timmons’ ‘best man’ Brian Tarpey arrive in Moscow hoping to interview Lugovoy and Kovtun, now the prime suspects behind Litvinenko’s murder.

1.title: FR - Meurtre au Polonium - L'affaire Litvinenko - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With their investigation complete, Timmons’ team submit their file to the Crown Prosecution Service, who bring charges for Litvinenko’s murder.

meta.plot: Inside the halls of power, Boris Johnson  grapples with Covid-19, Brexit, and a controversial personal and political life during his tumultuous first months as Prime Minister.

1.title: FR - This England - Les années Boris Johnson - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Boris Johnson grapples with COVID-19, Brexit and a controversial personal and political life.

1.title: FR - This England - Les années Boris Johnson - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the situation worsens in Italy, Boris attends a tense COBRA meeting and prepares for the pandemic to reach the UK's shores.

1.title: FR - This England - Les années Boris Johnson - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Carrie and Boris host a baby shower at Chequers as COVID-19 cases rise, care homes call for guidance and the Department of Health tackles testing.

1.title: FR - This England - Les années Boris Johnson - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Lockdown kicks off in the UK, Dom decides to take his family to Durham to isolate and Boris tests positive...

1.title: FR - This England - Les années Boris Johnson - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The Government discusses contingency plans as Boris' health deteriorates.  Dom Cummings is spotted in Durham.

1.title: FR - This England - Les années Boris Johnson - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Boris returns to Downing Street as Carrie gives birth and the Cummings Durham story breaks.

1.title: FR - Champions à tout prix - S01E01 - We're Out
