1.plot: Lucho hits rock bottom, both emotionally and economically, after his home country of Argentina is disqualified from the World Cup. As Lucho wallows in despair after having already made arrangements to go to the prestigious tournament with his son, a brilliant idea presents itself.

1.title: FR - Champions à tout prix - S01E02 - Dream Team
1.plot: Lucho and Wally recruit a group of beautiful losers to take part in the robbery. But putting together a gang and a master plan isn't as simple as they imagined.

1.title: FR - Champions à tout prix - S01E03 - The Robbery
1.plot: Lucho and his gang put into motion their plan to steal the World Cup Trophy. But absolutely nothing goes as planned on the big day.

1.title: FR - Champions à tout prix - S01E04 - Salvador Bilardo
1.plot: The gang goes viral with their ultimatum, but when the authorities don't budge, they're left to wonder what to do with the trophy and the stress it brought them.

1.title: FR - Champions à tout prix - S01E05 - Gollum
1.plot: The group debates over what to do with the trophy, while each member is beset by the worst misfortunes imaginable. Should they smelt the trophy? Sell it? Hide it? Manila's pressure campaign begins to close in on the gang, forcing a rupture.

1.title: FR - Champions à tout prix - S01E06 - Today You Become a Hero
1.plot: The city devolves into chaos as news of the trophy sends throngs of people into the streets to find it. Lucho pursues Fafa, while the authorities begin to close in around the gang.

meta.plot: Après avoir dépensé jusqu'au dernier sou pour emmener son fils à la Coupe du Monde, Lucho est dévasté car son pays accro au football, l'Argentine, est disqualifié par punition. Pour permettre à son fils d'apprendre à rêver à nouveau et pour réintégrer l'Argentine au tournoi, Lucho monte le plan le plus fou de l'histoire du football : voler le trophée de la Coupe du Monde.

1.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Spring 1941. Frustrated with military command’s handling of war, Stirling and Lewes formulate a plan to parachute men into the desert, attacking enemy forces from deep in the desert.

1.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While recovering in hospital, Stirling ruminates on Lewes’s idea to attack the enemy from behind and hatches a plan to get approval for their unit from General Auchinleck at GHQ.

1.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The newly recruited members of the SAS carry out a disastrous and devastating first mission. Determined to prove their strategy will work, they prepare to try again.

1.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As the SAS's reputation spreads among the Axis Italian and German forces, another daring mission results in a shocking and devastating loss to the team.

1.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Paddy initiates the Free French soldiers into some unorthodox training methods, and Stirling leads a raid on Benghazi accompanied by the prime minister’s son, Randolph Churchill.

1.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A meeting with Winston Churchill sees the SAS embark on their most daring operation to date. While success sees them achieve official status, Stirling receives some terrible news.

2.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: With a new mission and the threat of disbandment facing the SAS, an ally is found with a familiar name.

2.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: While the SAS find both friends and enemies in Sicily, at Gavi prisoner of war camp, David Stirling receives an unexpected visitor.

2.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: As the SAS advance through Italy, with some assistance from partisans, a commando order issued by Hitler threatens the fate of one of them.

2.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: As Reg Seekings struggles to cope, he strikes up a friendship with a young Italian boy which ends in yet more horror.

2.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: As John Tonkin tries to return to the unit, the men of the SAS receive a visit from General Montgomery who can smell drink – and heroism.

2.title: FR - SAS: Rogue Heroes - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: The SAS return to Britain and are given some time to decompress from the events in Italy. Bill is shocked to hear about the intended role for the SAS in the invasion of France.

meta.plot: The dramatised account of how the world’s greatest Special Forces unit, the SAS, was formed under extraordinary circumstances in the darkest days of World War Two.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E01 - Whiteout (1)
1.plot: Gamache earns the displeasure of General Director Francoeur when he ignores his superior’s orders and begins investigating the disappearance of Blue Two-Rivers. As a punishment, he’s dispatched to the remote village of Three Pines to investigate the murder of a wealthy socialite named CC de Poitiers, where he soon discovers everything is not as it seems and he has no shortage of suspects.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E02 - Whiteout (2)
1.plot: Gamache realises that the key to solving CC’s murder lies in her enigmatic past. Discovering that one of the villagers has withheld from him a key piece of information, he is able to crack the case. Meanwhile, Gamache’s delight at making a breakthrough in Blue’s disappearance is short-lived as the Two-Rivers family rejects his evidence and the anguished Missy is driven into a desperate act.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E04 - The Cruellest Month (2)
1.plot: The villagers confront the truth of their past and exorcise their collective demons as Gamache makes a breakthrough in the murder case and realises Marc’s killer had a very personal motive. Meanwhile, Lacoste makes a discovery relating to Blue’s disappearance that seems to identify a key suspect.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E05 - The Murder Stone (1)
1.plot: The Gamache’s anniversary celebrations at the exclusive Manoir Belleforet hotel are cut short by the discovery of a body. Gamache pulls in his team and together they investigate the case, which focuses on the hotel’s owners – the dysfunctional Morrow family – who are driven by bitterness and jealousy. Meanwhile, Lacoste receives a surprise call which blows the Blue Two-Rivers case wide open.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E06 - The Murder Stone (2)
1.plot: Gamache and his team get to the heart of the case, excavating decades-old resentments and deeply buried secrets in the Morrow family as they do so, and make the key discovery that enables them to identify the killer. Meanwhile, Lacoste’s elation at making a breakthrough in the Two-Rivers case proves short-lived and a tragedy leaves her shell-shocked.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E07 - The Hangman (1)
1.plot: When a man bent on vengeance is discovered in the woods near Three Pines, seemingly the victim of a group lynching, Gamache finds himself wondering whether all the villagers are capable of murder. Meanwhile, Gamache’s investigation into Blue’s disappearance leads to a terrible discovery that turns Gamache’s world upside down.

1.title: FR - Three Pines - S01E08 - The Hangman (2)
1.plot: Gamache and his team unearth a tragic story that provides the key to the victim’s desire for vengeance, and by doing so leads the team to his murderers. Meanwhile, it falls to Gamache to apprehend the individual responsible for Blue Two-Rivers’ disappearance, putting himself in grave danger as he does so.

meta.plot: Chief Inspector Armand Gamache and his team investigate a series of perplexing murders, in the seemingly idyllic village of Three Pines and uncover the buried secrets of its eccentric residents. In the process, Gamache is forced to confront buried secrets of his own. Based on the novels by Louise Penny.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E01 - Dom Pérignon and a Shot of Soju
1.plot: Pyo Ji-eun faces her old flame Ji Woo-min at a fashion show. Later, Ji-eun is sent on a mission and Ye Seon-ho confronts her aloof boyfriend.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E02 - Grandmother’s Scarf and the Cheongdam Fashion Circle
1.plot: A celebrity photoshoot with singer JD forces Ji-eun to work with a demanding Hong Ji-seon. When Ji-eun’s grandmother causes alarm, Woo-min steps in.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E03 - The VIP and The Regular
1.plot: An unexpected customer visits Joseph Jean Se-pyeong. While trying to keep Audrey afloat, Ji-eun lands a crucial presentation with an ex’s company.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E04 - The Pop-up Shop and the Tailor Shop
1.plot: When a famed eccentric designer lands in Korea for a secret visit, Ji-eun is asked to accompany him. Woo-min’s feelings for Ji-eun grow stronger.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E05 - Followers and Following
1.plot: Tensions swirl between Ji-eun and Woo-min at a party. Ji-seon endures JD’s difficult behavior, while Ji-eun tries to keep up with client demands.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E06 - The Photo Wall and the Exhibition
1.plot: Seon-ho considers a career beyond modeling. Ji-eun’s agency organizes celebrity photos for an exhibit, while Woo-min is inspired by an old hangout.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E07 - Vintage and Sustainability
1.plot: Joseph gets a major job opportunity. Woo-min and Ji-eun reminisce on a camping trip, and chaos ensues when a one-of-a-kind bag goes missing from a shoot.

1.title: FR - The Fabulous - S01E08 - Fashion and Passion
1.plot: Anxieties run high as the glamorous launch of Earlain J approaches. Joseph struggles to finish his collection and Woo-min makes a bold decision.

meta.plot: Four best friends chase their dreams in the competitive world of fashion while juggling demanding jobs, romantic dilemmas and wild nights on the town.

1.title: FR - L'Île prisonnière - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - L'Île prisonnière - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - L'Île prisonnière - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - L'Île prisonnière - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - L'Île prisonnière - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - L'Île prisonnière - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Une île sans histoire jusqu’au jour où une vingtaine d’activistes armés débarquent et confinent tous les habitants dans l’école du village. Alpha, leur chef, a tout prévu, excepté que la navette qui relie Penhic au continent leur échappe et permette à cinq de ses passagers de se cacher sur l’île. Qui sont ces activistes ? Pourquoi retiennent-ils prisonniers les habitants de Penhic ? Qui parmi eux deviendra héros, lâche ou traître ? Qui est l’inconnu de la navette qui revient après dix ans d’absence ?

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E01 - Dead Weight
1.plot: Reginald Andres lives a life of dreams deferred until he’s turned into a vampire and begins an undead life he never dreamed of.

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E02 - The Hunger
1.plot: Reginald learns how to feed and it doesn’t go well. But he discovers an unexpected and secret power along the way.

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E03 - Hypnos
1.plot: Reginald and Sarah go on their first date. Mayhem ensues!

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E04 - All the Time in the World
1.plot: The time is 1972, the place is Oakland, California. This is when Angela met Maurice and that changed everything.

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E05 - Fools in Love
1.plot: Angela hires an infamous vampire assassin and aims her at Reginald. Reginald will not see her coming.

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E06 - Halfway to a Threeway
1.plot: Tonight is the night that Reginald and Sarah make all of their dreams come true. Unless one or both of them dies before the morning.

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E07 - The Last Day of Our Acquaintance
1.plot: Reginald finds himself in the middle of a love triangle and he navigates it to the best of his abilities. He’s Swaggy Reg!

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E08 - The Odyssey
1.plot: Reginald leaves home to find a legendary vampire named Abraham who has a legendary power: he can turn a vampire back to human.

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E09 - No One Dies for Failing the SATs
1.plot: The Assessment is twenty-four hours away and Reginald must use his big brain to figure out a way to survive various tests. Will he find a solution in time?

1.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S01E10 - Reginald Andres Beyond Thunderdome
1.plot: The Assessment, much anticipated, is here. The only open question is whether or not Reginald will survive it.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E01 - The Pompatus of Love
2.plot: Reginald goes big or goes home, Maurice is the new Deacon, Nikki is a Killer Diller!

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E02 - 30 Days
2.plot: Maurice's first council meeting, Claire's dubious father, and a vengeful exterminating Archangel!

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E03 - The Truth About the Truth
2.plot: Sarah's new bestie is an Angel in disguise, Reginald game plans the coming vampire apocalypse!

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E04 - Watch The Sunrise
2.plot: The worst possible thing happens and Claire's life will never ever be the same again.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E05 - Undead Bedfellows
2.plot: The crew discuss whether reaching out to a deranged vampire witch is the best way to kill an angel.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E06 - Blood, Sweat, and Glitter
2.plot: Reginald, Sarah, Maurice travel to Spokane; an End of the World Vampire party hosted by Abraham.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E07 - Terminal Eternity
2.plot: Sarah's bestie and also Angel turns out to be a little more murderous than anyone figured.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E08 - We Can Be Heroes (Just for One Day)
2.plot: As the vampire apocalypse approaches, our favourite vamps are magically trapped in the Slushy Shack.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E09 - The Final Countdown
2.plot: So this is definitely the end of every vampire on the planet unless Reginald saves the day.

2.title: FR - Reginald the Vampire - S02E10 - Just Like Heaven
2.plot: Reginald will do anything for love and the unexpected consequences are going to blow your mind.

meta.plot: Imagine a world populated by beautiful, fit and vain vampires. Reginald Andres tumbles headlong into it as an unlikely hero who will have to navigate every kind of obstacle – the girl he loves but can’t be with, a bully manager at work and the vampire chieftain who wants him dead. Fortunately, Reginald discovers he has a few unrecognized powers of his own.

1.title: FR - Cardinal - S01E01 - John Cardinal
1.plot: When the body of a missing girl is found, detectives John Cardinal and Lise Delorme set out to uncover the mystery.

1.title: FR - Cardinal - S01E02 - Delorme
1.plot: Delorme risks the whole investigation as he tries to catch Cardinal red-handed. The killer gets closer to his next victim.

1.title: FR - Cardinal - S01E03 - Edie and Eric
1.plot: Eric urges Edie to torture Keith, Delorme worries that Cardinal has sidelined her and Cardinal gets a break in the Curry case.

1.title: FR - Cardinal - S01E04 - Woody
1.plot: A criminal breaks into Eric and Edie's basement and finds Keith. Issues between Cardinal and Delorme threaten their partnership. Cardinal takes risks in the investigation.

1.title: FR - Cardinal - S01E05 - Keith
1.plot: Cardinal and Delorme know who killed Woody Baldwin, but now they must find him. Cardinal's daughter visits her mom.

1.title: FR - Cardinal - S01E06 - Catherine
1.plot: Cardinal realizes he wasn't working alone and may be too late to save his daughter. Delorme has a decision to make when she finds answers.

2.title: FR - Cardinal - S02E01 - Red
2.plot: Detective Jerry Commanda finds a confused, red-haired woman alone at a roadside bar with a bullet in her head. Red has no memory of who she is, how she got there, or who shot her. Even after the bullet is removed, she can’t remember anything. Commanda turns the case over to Detectives John Cardinal and Lise Delorme, who must protect Red while trying to uncover her identity and shooter.

2.title: FR - Cardinal - S02E02 - Kevin
2.plot: Detectives John Cardinal and Lise Delorme identify the latest body as a local gun thief, their only suspect. Tracking the victim’s final days leads them to the local Northern Raiders biker gang, so they enlist the help of an expert, Staff Sergeant Alan Clegg from the Ontario Police Department (OPD).

2.title: FR - Cardinal - S02E03 - Terri
2.plot: Detective Cardinal and Delorme retrieve security footage of Red that helps identify her as Terri Tait, a student from Vancouver, BC.

2.title: FR - Cardinal - S02E04 - Toof
2.plot: Having tracked down Terri, Cardinal gains her trust. Terri’s recovered memories give the team new information to work with and they make progress tracking Terri’s shooter.

2.title: FR - Cardinal - S02E05 - Northwind
2.plot: John and Lisa connect evidence from a new crime to a ritualistic murder and Terri's memories help make a connection to a possible suspect.

2.title: FR - Cardinal - S02E06 - El Brujo
2.plot: John and Lisa race to find Ray before he kills Terri and her brother. A betrayal threatens Cardinal and Delorme's case and their lives.

3.title: FR - Cardinal - S03E01 - Sam
3.plot: As Cardinal struggles in the wake of his wife’s suicide, Delorme becomes lead detective on both a double-murder and a string of muggings.

3.title: FR - Cardinal - S03E02 - Roman & Irena
3.plot: Cardinal and Delorme struggle to identify the victims, unaware that there is a witness to the crime, who is being stalked by the murderer.

3.title: FR - Cardinal - S03E03 - Jack
3.plot: As Sharlene and her family hold Lloyd Kreeger captive, Cardinal and Delorme flush out an unexpected ally in their search for the killers.

3.title: FR - Cardinal - S03E04 - Lemur
3.plot: Armed with new evidence, Cardinal and Delorme make a break in the case that could explain the motive behind the murders.

3.title: FR - Cardinal - S03E05 - Mama
3.plot: Cardinal and Delorme uncover the identity of the Island Road killer and link the double homicide to the ATM robberies.

3.title: FR - Cardinal - S03E06 - Helen
3.plot: Cardinal finds evidence that may prove Catherine was murdered, but he’s sidetracked by a development in the Island Road case.

4.title: FR - Cardinal - S04E01 - Robert
4.plot: After a prominent Algonquin Bay politician reports her husband missing, Cardinal and Delorme suspect abduction.

4.title: FR - Cardinal - S04E02 - Adele
4.plot: A shocking death and second abduction cause Cardinal and Delorme to believe their suspect is a professional killer for hire.

4.title: FR - Cardinal - S04E03 - Barry
4.plot: As Cardinal and Delorme work to find a connection between the victims, they realize that not everyone’s telling the truth.

4.title: FR - Cardinal - S04E04 - Neil
4.plot: Another abduction hits close to home as Cardinal and Delorme are caught in a race against time to save the next victim before it’s too late.

4.title: FR - Cardinal - S04E05 - Scott
4.plot: Cardinal and Delorme close in on a secret from the past as they close in on the killer’s motives—and his identity.

4.title: FR - Cardinal - S04E06 - John & Lise
4.plot: Detectives John Cardinal and Lise Delorme make an unexpected arrest and follow a hunch to their killer's location, but he's one step ahead and stopping him will be incredibly risky.

seasonsMeta.name: By the Time You Read This

meta.plot: Detective John Cardinal attempts to uncover the mystery of what happened to the missing 13-year-old girl whose body is discovered in the shaft-head of an abandoned mine. At the same time, he comes under investigation by his new partner, Lise Delorme, a tough investigator in her own right.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E01 - The Code
1.plot: When a pro hockey prospect goes down on the ice surrounded by suspicious circumstances, Shade and Angie must join forces to solve the mystery and save a life.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E02 - Mise En Place
1.plot: Shade and Angie investigate high-profile murder in a popular Toronto restaurant.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E03 - The Money Shot
1.plot: Shade and Angie search for a prized racehorse. Shade considers cheating on his P.I. exam.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E04 - The Devil's Playground
1.plot: Shade and Angie search for an arsonist and killer in the Toronto Islands. Shade's ego grows with his newly-minted P.I. license.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E05 - The Six
1.plot: A 14-year-old witness to a shooting must be protected. Shade tries to figure out who Angie spent the night with while trying to keep a promise to his daughter.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E06 - Partners in Crime
1.plot: Shade and Angie go undercover to try to expose a con artist. Angie, Jules and Don give Shade romantic advice.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E07 - Karaoke Confidential
1.plot: A hipster hires Shade and Angie to protect him from danger.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E08 - I Do, I Do
1.plot: When a lifestyle company’s CEO is threatened, Shade and Angie need to find the source, despite her insistence that everything is going according to her very complicated plan.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E09 - Disappearing Act
1.plot: Shade and Angie track a magician who escaped police custody. Shade receives a tantalizing offer.

1.title: FR - Private Eyes - S01E10 - Family Jewels
1.plot: Shade and Angie go undercover as an engaged couple when a family heirloom is stolen.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E01 - The Extra Mile
2.plot: The owner of a car racing team hires Shade and Angie. Angie and Shade adapt to their new roles.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E02 - Boardwalk Empire
2.plot: Zoe Chow hires Shade and Angie to find out who broke into her apartment.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E03 - The Frame Job
2.plot: A teacher is accused of an inappropriate relationship and Shade and Angie investigate.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E04 - Crimes of Fashion
2.plot: Fashion designer Carla Costa hires Shade and Angie to guard her new collection.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E05 - Now You See Her...
2.plot: A brilliant orchestra conductor hires Shade and Angie to find his missing fiancée. But there’s a catch – she died 3 years ago.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E06 - The PI Code
2.plot: A lawyer hires Shade and Angie to investigate jury tampering.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E07 - Between a Doc and a Hard Place
2.plot: Angie and Shade are hired to find out who's targeting a pro-bono medical clinic.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E08 - Six Feet Blunder
2.plot: Shade and Angie are hired to find a missing body, but wind up uncovering a scheme to bury millions of dollars.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E09 - The Good Soldier
2.plot: Shade and Angie investigate the case of a missing Army Cadet.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E10 - Kissing the Canvas
2.plot: After being hired by a boxer to prove a fight was fixed, Shade is sucker-punched when he meets the boxer's manager.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E11 - Long Live the King
2.plot: The King From Medieval Times hires Angie and Shade after believing he has been poisoned.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E12 - Getaway With Murder
2.plot: Shade and Angie are hired by the owner of a luxurious rustic lodge to investigate an infidelity case.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E13 - A Fare to Remember
2.plot: During a routine sting operation, Shade and Angie pick up an unexpected fare with Maz and Nolan hot on their trail.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E14 - Finding Leroy
2.plot: Maz's sister comes to Angie for help recovering an aquatic creature that's gone missing from Ripley's Aquarium.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E15 - The Hills Have Eyes
2.plot: Shade and Angie go undercover when a young boy believes that his neighbour was murdered.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E16 - Look Who's Stalking
2.plot: Becca is worried that a past stalker is back and hires Shade and Angie to investigate the world of media, fame and celebrity obsession.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E17 - Brew the Right Thing
2.plot: A couple of brewing brothers hire Shade and Angie to find out who's trying to sabotage their award-winning beer.

2.title: FR - Private Eyes - S02E18 - Shadow of a Doubt
2.plot: A computer programmer hires Shade and Angie to recover a hard drive, which is locked in a secure lab.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E01 - Catch Me If You Can
3.plot: Behind bars, Angie meets an intimidating inmate.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E02 - Full Court Press
3.plot: A basketball player asks Angie and Shade to investigate when his wife is caught on film apparently having an affair. Maz and Zoe decide to break up.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E03 - Cut and Run
3.plot: Nora is back with a beau who hires Shade and Everett after his clinic's database is hacked.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E04 - The Life of Riley
3.plot: A motorcycle shop owned by one of Angie's acquaintances is vandalized.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E05 - The Grape Deception
3.plot: Angie's college roommate calls for help when a bottle of wine is stolen.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E06 - Hog Day Afternoon
3.plot: Shade ends up in the middle of a hostage situation in a high-rise office, while Maz attempts to control the situation on the ground.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E07 - Dance Dance Retribution
3.plot: When Becca calls on Shade and Angie to investigate a series of potentially supernatural accidents that threaten to derail her new TV special, the PI's find themselves tap dancing their way through the cut throat world of reality television.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E08 - The Conroy Curse
3.plot: Deputy Conroy needs help with a murder case.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E09 - It Happened One Fight
3.plot: Angie and Shade investigate the mysterious collapse of Zoe's Cousin.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E10 - Tex Therapy
3.plot: Shade and Angie investigate Tex, a charming man with amnesia who may be linked to an expensive art heist.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E11 - Aye, Aye, Tonya
3.plot: Shade and Angie think they're uncovering a simple case of infidelity when they're swept onto the high seas aboard a pirate-themed cruise ship where costumes, treasure, and eye patches are just a cover for a more insidious scheme.

3.title: FR - Private Eyes - S03E12 - Glazed and Confused
3.plot: Angie's long-time nemesis Norm Glinski fakes his own death, and hires her and Shade to investigate.

meta.plot: Ex-pro hockey player Matt Shade irrevocably changes his life when he teams up with fierce P.I. Angie Everett to form an unlikely investigative powerhouse.
A woman suspects her husband of having an affair. After following several lines of enquiries far more unravels including a streak of violence below the surface.

1.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Brilliant, vivacious GP Gemma Foster has her life torn apart when she investigates whether her husband is harbouring a dark secret. The truth will shock her to the core.

1.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Reeling from the secrets she has uncovered, Gemma has a decision to make - but a visit from a surprise patient means she also faces an acute professional dilemma.

1.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: In public Gemma plays the perfect wife, while secretly concocting a plan to ensure she comes out on top - only to make new discoveries about the full extent of the secrets that those around her are holding on to.

1.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Gemma decides on a new start with Simon, but her medical career begins to fall apart.

1.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Gemma is determined to expose Simon at last. But how far will she go to achieve her goal?

2.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Two years after Doctor Gemma Foster dramatically exposed her husband Simon's betrayals, forcing him to leave town, her life is destabilised once again when he returns.

2.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Reeling from the repercussions of Simon's return, Gemma scrambles to uncover his secrets and find out what's going on with Tom.

2.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Gemma feels Tom should come first, even though she and Simon are at each other's throats. But can they put their own feelings aside for their son's sake?

2.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Simon feels confident that he and Kate can finally live securely, free from Gemma's shadow. But can Kate really trust him?

2.title: FR - Doctor Foster - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Gemma goes to extreme lengths in order to come out on top and win back her old life. But this time has she gone too far?

meta.plot: La division internationale du FBI, menée par Jack Garrett et constituée de profilers, parcourt le monde avec pour mission de sauver des citoyens américains portés disparus à l'étranger. Jack Garrett et ses agents, Jarvis, Simmons, Seger et Montgomery allient des compétences en informatique, médecine, sociologie et intervention sur le terrain. Leur qualité d’analyse des situations et leur rapidité d'exécution sont primordiales pour mener à bien leurs actions et chaque enquête devient vite une course contre la montre pour éviter le pire…

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E01 - The Harmful One
1.plot: Garrett and his unit travel to Thailand when three American volunteers go missing during a trek to Bangkok. Once there, former colleague Clara Seger, a cultural anthropologist, helps them rush to gather evidence leading to the UnSub before a storm threatens to wash it away,

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E02 - Harvested
1.plot: When an American man attending a festival in Mumbai wakes up missing a kidney and his friend gone, the International Response Team’s investigation leads them to suspect the UnSub is more than just trading organs on the Black Market.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E03 - Denial
1.plot: The International Response Team heads to Cairo when an Egyptian-American former U.S. serviceman is killed in a gas attack there and his friend goes missing.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E04 - Whispering Death
1.plot: The team travels to Japan to assist local law enforcement in investigating homicides made to look like suicides. Meanwhile, Mae encourages Clara to get out and enjoy herself.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E05 - The Lonely Heart
1.plot: The International Response Team heads to Paris to search for an UnSub targeting Americans who live there.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E06 - Love Interrupted
1.plot: The International Response Team heads to Belize to search for a couple who disappears while on their honeymoon in what appears to be a targeted abduction.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E07 - Citizens of the World
1.plot: The International Response Team travels to Morocco when a retired couple from Idaho is kidnapped while visiting the country on a cruise.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E08 - De Los Inocentes
1.plot: When a woman vacationing in Mexico with her family is the victim of foul play, the International Response Team investigates her husband as the prime suspect when he flees.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E09 - The Matchmaker
1.plot: When an American girl leaves home to meet her boyfriend in Turkey, the International Response Team suspects she’s in trouble after being tricked by someone posing as her boyfriend.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E10 - Iqiniso
1.plot: When an American college student working in Johannesburg is killed and his brother goes missing, the International Response Team suspects a gang could be behind both. Jack works the case with Lieutenant Ananda Doshi, a profiler he’s worked with before who has an unorthodox style of investigation.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E11 - The Ballad of Nick and Nat
1.plot: When American victims are found in different locations throughout Cuba, the International Response Team heads to the island nation to search for possible spree killers.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E12 - El Toro Bravo
1.plot: The IRT heads to Pamplona, Spain, for the running of the bulls, where the ears of a missing American tourist are found.

1.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S01E13 - Paper Orphans
1.plot: When the daughter of an American family visiting Haiti to adopt a child is kidnapped, the International Response Team travels to the island nation to try to find her. Also, Jack and his wife, Karen, prepare to send their daughter to college.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E01 - Lost Souls
2.plot: Unit Chief Jack Garrett and his international response team are called to Tanzania when a 23-member church group disappears.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E02 - Il Mostro
2.plot: When two casualties resemble the M.O. of the most notorious killer in Italian history, the International Response Team is called to investigate.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E03 - The Devil's Breath
2.plot: The International Response Team investigates the apparent suicide of an American in Colombia who emptied his bank account prior to his death.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E04 - Pretty Like Me
2.plot: The International Response Team head to South Korea when an American college student is found disfigured. Also, Simmons fulfills his mother’s last dying wish to find his grandmother.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E05 - Made In...
2.plot: The International Response Team investigates when two American entrepreneurs disappear while conducting business in Bangladesh.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E06 - Cinderella and the Dragon
2.plot: When two American flight attendants go missing while in Singapore, the International Response Team is called in to investigate.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E07 - La Huesuda
2.plot: When a night of partying ends tragically for an American 18-year-old in Tijuana, the International Response Team is called to investigate.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E08 - Pankration
2.plot: When an American visiting Greece to get more involved in his family's business is found beaten in a rough part of Athens, the International Response Team is called to investigate.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E09 - Blowback
2.plot: The International Response Team is investigated by the FBI after a mission in Kurjikistan results in the death of a suspect.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E10 - Type A
2.plot: The International Response Team is called to Taipei when it appears an American committed a crime that is similar to an unsolved case in New York.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E11 - Obey
2.plot: When the body of an American singer is found on a rural road in the blue mountains of Jamaica, the International Response Team is called to investigate.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E12 - Abominable
2.plot: The IRT must find the murderer of a woman in Nepal who was at a yoga camp. Monty is on the field for the first time.

2.title: FR - Esprits Criminels : Unité Sans Frontières - S02E13 - The Ripper of Riga
2.plot: The International Response Team travels to Russia when an American ballerina is kidnapped, and Jack tangles with an ex-KBG agent who escaped from prison.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After a tragic event, Russian exile Alex Godman is drawn into the murky world of global crime as he tries to protect his family from their dark past.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Semiyon convinces Alex into a venture designed to harm Vadim's business in Prague. Meanwhile, a young girl is taken on a very different journey.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: With the help of Semiyon’s investment, Benes has grown his operation, leaving Vadim concerned and confused. Deciding to take matters into his own hands, Vadim arrives in Prague determined to get answers - by whatever means necessary.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Alex unlocks a way to attack Benny Chopra and Vadim in Mumbai. He and Rebecca announce their engagement, but she starts to think he is hiding something.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Semiyon awakes to an awful accusation. Alex is convinced he's innocent and sets out to try to expose his accusers. Meanwhile Katya unravels a shocking secret.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Alex fears his family are under threat when Vadim learns the truth about him. His fears appear to be founded when he discovers evidence of a surveillance operation against him – but his paranoid reaction drives a wedge between him and Rebecca, while an unexpected betrayal has devastating consequences. Masha receives an ultimatum, and Joseph seeks an ally in his bid to help Lyudmilla.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Vadim is convinced to broker peace in Istanbul. Alex learns the dreadful price of his actions, and Dmitri makes a decision that endangers them all.

1.title: FR - McMafia - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Alex arrives in Moscow ready to do business, but he's unaware of the devastation that Dmitri's actions have caused - and the danger that he faces. Alex must play the only card he has left to try and save himself, before facing a final showdown with Vadim.

meta.plot: Alex Godman, the English-raised son of Russian mafia exiles, has spent his life trying to escape the shadow of their past, building his own legitimate business and forging a life with his girlfriend Rebecca. But when a murder forces his family's past to return to threaten them, Alex is drawn into the criminal underworld and must confront his values to protect those he loves.

Dr. Mary Harris, a single mother and emergency doctor by day, also moonlights as an underground angel of death - helping terminally ill patients who want to die and slip away on their own terms. So far Mary has managed to stay under the radar; but business is booming, and her double life is getting complicated. When her world starts to unravel, Mary realizes she's going to have to fight dirty if she's going to stay in the killing game.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S01E01 - Bloody Mary
1.plot: When Dr. Mary Harris becomes romantically involved with an attractive patient, it sets off a chain of events that could destroy her life, her family, and her career - not to mention her illegal side gig, helping terminal clients end their lives.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S01E02 - The River Styx
1.plot: After being intimate with Joel, Mary has second thoughts about ending his life. A client's son pulls a gun on Des. Kevin's relationship with a new woman gets intense.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S01E03 - Wave the White Flag
1.plot: Mary confronts Ben. Grady blackmails Mary into helping him break a patient out of the hospital. Ben and Frank get a new lead.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S01E04 - Raised By Wolves
1.plot: Ben follows Mary to her childhood home where he learns about her past. Grady approaches Mary with an offer. Des becomes a victim of police misconduct.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S01E05 - The Judas Cradle
1.plot: Mary seriously considers giving up her operations for good.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S01E06 - Morning Glory
1.plot: Mary must make a deal with the devil in order to save her family and career.

2.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S02E01 - The Means
2.plot: Des is happy to reteam with Mary following his stint in prison - but when a routine case leads to a devastating outcome, Mary questions whether she was better off fighting the good fight without him in control and unchallenged.

2.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S02E02 - The Connection
2.plot: When Olivia attempts to blackmail Mary, she is drawn deeper into a deadly game of cat and mouse that has a surprising connection to Ben.

2.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S02E03 - Twin Flames
2.plot: Mary and Ben decide to join forces and hide Travis at Ben's secluded trailer. But when Travis reveals a crucial detail about Ben's investigation, Mary is forced to reconsider their alliance.

2.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S02E04 - Ride or Die
2.plot: Following the disappearance of Travis, Des worries that he and Mary may have crossed a moral line from which they can never return. After jeopardizing Ben's investigation of Olivia, Mary tries to make amends, which has repercussions for a patient in dire need.

2.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S02E05 - Come to Jesus
2.plot: All seems well for Mary, Ben has forgiven her, and she and Des have decided to move forward with the death retreat. The only nagging concern for Mary: her daughter Jess hates her and doesn't believe a word out of her mouth.

2.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S02E06 - Fatal Flaw
2.plot: Mary decides to wear a wire in order to help Ben take down Olivia, but when their plan takes an unexpected turn, Mary must reconsider her allegiance. As Des and Nicole prepare for Brendan's death, Des faces crippling self-doubt about his dream.

3.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S03E01 - The Key to Faith
3.plot: Mary secretly takes in patients, but one death doesn't go as planned.

3.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S03E02 - Girl Problems
3.plot: Mary promises Des that she'll never put the hospice at risk again. Mary and Frances meet an elderly cancer patient. Jess realizes that something's wrong with Naomi.

3.title: FR - Mary Kills People - S03E03 - No Happy Ending Here
FR - Mary Kills People - S03E04 - Switzerland Has Trees
FR - Mary Kills People - S03E05 - Wolf, Meet Henhouse
FR - Mary Kills People - S03E06 - A Goddamned Saint

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The series premiere of the drama about six talented young lawyers who work on opposite sides of the law and handle the most high-profile and high-stakes federal cases in the country.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E02 - Rahowa
1.plot: The six young lawyers are determined to bring home wins during their second round of cases; Jay must set aside his personal feelings as he defends a client with controversial beliefs; Sandra's idealism leads to an important lesson from Ms. Krissman.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E03 - 18 Miles Outside of Roanoke
1.plot: Sandra and Kate go head-to-head on a high-profile case involving a young woman accused of leaking classified information, but they learn to find common ground in their fight for justice and pursuit of the common good. Allison struggles to make a case for her client as the courts look to new technology to avoid bias, and Leonard seeks professional legitimacy at the cost of a personal relationship.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E04 - The Library Fountain
1.plot: After Seth learns that the people of his hometown and former elementary school in Lincoln, Nebraska, have become seriously ill due to groundwater contamination, he becomes invested in seeking justice, potentially jeopardizing the future of his career. Sandra, Jay and Allison assist Jill with a potential murder case, but as they grow skeptical of their client, Jill only grows more passionate.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E05 - World's Greatest Judge
1.plot: Judge Byrne finds himself at a crossroads in his career when he presides over a case that requires a disproportionate mandatory minimum sentence. Allison represents a charming defendant in a fraud case while on duty for the first time, and Leonard struggles to decide whether or not to bring charges against a political figure.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E06 - Everybody's a Superhero
1.plot: Allison defends a man accused of stealing supplies intended for victims of a devastating island hurricane and goes up against Celia Chavez, a tough Assistant U.S. Attorney for whom losing is not an option. Sandra defends a peculiar client accused of assault, but with an altered view of reality and on the other side, Kate is being sought after by an ATF agent in need of legal advice for an unlikely suspect.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E07 - Have You Met Leonard Knox?
1.plot: Leonard is forced to confront some longstanding insecurities when his new high-stakes case leads him to question what is right and what is wrong. Sandra goes head-to-head with Seth who files charges against a daring comedian accused of threatening a U.S. president’s life; and Jay defends a tennis player accused of intentionally throwing a match to help his coach win a bet he placed against him.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E08 - Flippity-Flop
1.plot: Jill and Roger’s complicated friendship is tested when they finally square off over a DEA raid that left an inmate clinging to life. Meanwhile, Kate is assigned to an animal smuggling case involving the death of an endangered panda; and Jay’s emotions are thrust into a case when he learns his trusting father was a victim in a pyramid scheme.

1.title: FR - For The People - S01E09 - Extraordinary Circumstances
FR - For The People - S01E10 - This Is What I Wanted to Say
1.plot: Sandra defends a hydrologist accused of spying for the Chinese government, but the similarities between this and a former case she lost has her confidence shaken. Meanwhile, Jay faces his fears and goes up against Kate in a case involving a PTA president accused of selling drugs to students; and Allison receives a tempting proposition from her wine-forger client and Leonard reaches out to Kate for advice that culminates with a surprising confession.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E01 - First Inning
2.plot: Sandra, with the help of new investigator Ted, must defend a teenage gamer whose online argument leads to a police raid that ends with the death of a United States senator. A personal connection to the “swatting” case makes Roger determined to charge the teenager to the fullest extent of the law and pushes Kate to her limits in the process. Meanwhile, Jay is tasked with defending New York’s most spoiled millennial from going to jail for her petty crimes.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E02 - This Is America
2.plot: Tina faces legal consequences as she defiantly insists on protecting a young boy after his father, a witness in Leonard’s case, has a run-in with ICE agents that could lead to his deportation. Elsewhere, Kate is determined to establish her worth to Roger and takes on a significant murder case involving a prominent New York criminal defense attorney.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E03 - Minimum Continuing Legal Education
2.plot: Seth becomes committed to taking an immune international diplomat to trial so he can get out of general crime and onto a more senior unit. Sandra works on a kidnapping case and is convinced the kidnapping was an accident. Meanwhile, Jay is certain that taking a different route to work will determine how successful he will be in the courtroom.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E04 - The Vast, Immovable Object
2.plot: The team in the public defender’s office takes on the case of a young man accused of strangling a woman to death and are determined to prove him innocent. Meanwhile, Tina and Sandra go head-to-head after a man is arrested while transporting a body part through the airport. Elsewhere, Seth and Leonard grow closer after they are tasked with speaking to a conference of an unusually young group of future lawyers.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E05 - One Big Happy Family
2.plot: Sandra urges Kate to take on a case against a very powerful and well-respected judge who is accused of wrongfully sentencing young children for profit. When Judge Bryne is asked to testify in the case, he questions his role in the rigid justice system and must make a very difficult decision. Elsewhere, Seth temporarily moves in with Jay until a leak in his apartment is fixed.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E06 - You Belong Here
2.plot: Leonard takes on one of the country’s best and most prolific litigators in a case that leads him to grapple with his personal feelings related to race and privilege in America. Back at the public defender’s office, Jay takes on his first drug case, but things heat up when he has to work with a rather unconventional lawyer. Elsewhere, Sandra tries to prove she’s not a workaholic and bonds with Ted over boxing to let off some much-needed steam.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E07 - The Boxer
2.plot: Sandra is tasked with negotiating a plea agreement for a homeless man accused of trespassing a national wildlife refuge. However, she later suspects that he might have been involved in a more serious offense and enlists Ted to help her investigate. Meanwhile, Roger and Jill’s relationship is tested when the prosecution is forced to subpoena Sandra after learning she may have further knowledge of the crime. Elsewhere, Seth starts spiraling out of control after accidentally stealing evidence in a drug case.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E08 - Moral Suasion
2.plot: Allison defends a man arrested for selling illegal cigarettes and is determined to get him released without bail. Elsewhere, Judge Byrne is called to jury duty where his excitement for a chance at experiencing the criminal justice system from another perspective is quickly tempered by the harsh realities of the process. Meanwhile, Sandra is still emotionally recovering after sending her client to prison for murder.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E09 - Who Are We Now?
2.plot: Sandra and Kate’s relationship is put to the test when they go head-to-head over a high-profile bank robbery case. On the defense side, Alison helps Jay as he decides to take an unconventional approach defending their war veteran client. Meanwhile, Tina gives Roger advice about his relationship with Jill, a relationship beginning to show its cracks.

2.title: FR - For The People - S02E10 - A Choice Between Two Things
2.plot: On Election Day, Jay turns to Kate and the team for help after his parents and other voters are illegally intimidated at their polling place. Meanwhile, Roger and Jill’s relationship is at an impasse when Sandra learns that they are romantically involved and challenges Jill’s judgement. Elsewhere, Seth gets assigned to the case of a lifetime, but his anxiety increases when he is appointed a bodyguard to help protect him, all while Sandra and Ted take their relationship up a notch.

meta.plot: Brand new lawyers work for both the defense and the prosecution as they handle the most high profile and high stakes cases in the country – all as their personal lives intersect.

The world's leading deception researcher, Dr. Cal Lightman, studies facial expression, body language and tone of voice to determine when a person is lying and why, which helps law enforcement and government agencies uncover the truth. But his skills also make it easier for him to deceive others.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The son of a family of devout Jehovah's Witnesses is accused of killing his teacher after being caught fleeing the scene of her murder. Meanwhile, the team is hired by the Democratic National Committee to investigate a second case in which the Chairman of the House Ethics Committee is accused of paying for sex.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E02 - Moral Waiver
1.plot: When a female soldier charges a commanding officer with sexual assault, Lightman is brought to Fort Meade to find out if there's any truth to the accusation. Meanwhile, the Lightman Group is hired to determine whether the young star of a college basketball team accepted a bribe to play for the university.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E03 - A Perfect Score
1.plot: The murder of a teenage girl – who is the daughter of a powerful federal judge – leads The Lightman Group to a highly competitive college-prep school where getting to the head of the class means everything. The team also investigates a NASA test pilot accused of intentionally crashing a $250 million aircraft

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E04 - Love Always
1.plot: At a state wedding, Lightman and his team work to prevent the assassination of a South Korean ambassador. But when someone else is shot, Lightman exposes long-held family secrets and lies to identify the assassin.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E05 - Unchained
1.plot: Lightman and Torres interrogate an imprisoned gang leader who claims to be rehabilitated. If the gang leader is freed, he might help fight inner-city violence or return to his life of crime. Foster and Loker investigate the death of a firefighter who was killed in the line of duty.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E06 - Do No Harm
1.plot: Lightman and Foster investigate the disappearance of an 11-year-old girl who may have been murdered. Meanwhile, Loker and Torres must determine whether a famous peace activist is who she claims to be and if her bestselling memoir is true, but Loker's attraction to the socially conscious woman may be clouding his assessment of her.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E07 - The Best Policy
1.plot: When Lightman is hired to find a corporate spy at a pharmaceutical company, he discovers a high-level conspiracy surrounding a new drug that could put thousands of lives at risk. The team is also hired by the State Department to assist with negotiations for the release of two Americans imprisoned in Yemen.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E08 - Depraved Heart
1.plot: Lightman becomes obsessed with his investigation of two young women who committed suicide. Meanwhile, the team tries to recover billions of dollars for investors who were bilked by a Ponzi scheme.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E09 - Life Is Priceless
1.plot: In the wake of a building collapse in a small town outside Washington, Lightman is brought in to determine who is at fault, and he discovers a massive cover-up. Meanwhile, the team is hired by a "dot-com" billionaire to determine if his girlfriend loves him for the right reasons.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E10 - Better Half
1.plot: When Assistant U.S. Attorney Zoe Landau, Lightman's ex-wife and Emily's mother, enlists Lightman to help investigate an arson case in which the only eyewitness is a 5-year-old boy, it quickly becomes clear that she and Lightman still have feelings for each other. Meanwhile, Foster and Torres question a rapper who is suspected of murder.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E11 - Undercover
1.plot: The Lightman Group gets embroiled in the controversial case of a policeman who shot a potentially innocent teenager. Meanwhile, investors who were bilked by a Ponzi scheme are suing The Lightman Group for botching the recovery of their money,

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E12 - Blinded
1.plot: Ben Reynolds, an FBI agent who's been pursuing a serial rapist terrorizing the Washington area, partners with The Lightman Group for its toughest case yet. Lightman infiltrates a prison to befriend Andrew Jenkins, a convicted criminal and a pathological liar who the serial rapist may be copy-catting. Meanwhile, Torres and Loker search Jenkins' fan mail, and Foster questions one of the rapist's recent victims.

1.title: FR - Lie to Me - S01E13 - Sacrifice
1.plot: After a terrorist bombing outside of Washington, DC, FBI Agent Ben Reynolds calls on The Lightman Group to help identify those responsible and prevent more attacks. The case takes a personal turn for one member of the team and begs the question of whether honesty is indeed the best policy. Zoe helps Lightman with the investigation and both are concerned about their daughter's safety.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E01 - The Core of It
2.plot: A young woman approaches Lightman at his book signing, believing she has seen a murder. Lightman finds that the woman has multiple personalities, and he believes that one of her personalities witnessed the murder. Lightman passes off helping Agent Reynolds vet a potential Supreme Court nominee, instead choosing to pursue the case of the multiple-personality woman. The case is passed on to Torres, whom the nominee does not treat with respect due to her age. Torres puts her preconceived judgments about the man aside when she analyzes the facts. Lightman unlocks the woman's original personality, who helps Lightman find the original murderer. Zoe informs Lightman that she is taking their daughter, Emily, and moving to Chicago to open a law firm. Lightman buys out her stake in The Lightman Group so that she can start her own practice in town.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E02 - Truth or Consequences
2.plot: Zoe enlists Lightman to help with her client -- a 22 year-old black star college football player who has been accused of statutory rape with a white 16 year-old girl. The case hits home for Lightman, who learns that his daughter Emily was friends with the group of girls who attend these college fraternity parties. Through the course of their investigation, Lightman and Torres determine that Zoe's client was set-up by the girl, whose friends leaked the video of the hookup. Lightman figures that the man did not know the girl was underage, noting that his face showed that he knew he shouldn't find underage girls attractive. Meanwhile, Foster and Loker travel to a religious compound to determine whether its claim of IRS exemption is valid. They believe the head of the compound is holding the women against their will. Foster facilitates the escape of one woman and her children, and faces the wrath of both Loker and the government. At the end, the girl's father believes the system is protecting the football player, and decides that someone has to pay. He shoots the prosecutor that dropped the charges against the football player, with whose death the episode ends.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E03 - Control Factor
2.plot: While on vacation in Mexico with Emily, Lightman becomes involved in the case of a missing American woman, who is a single mother on vacation with her daughter. Upon investigation, Lightman learns that the mother got herself involved with an illegal fertility broker and he manages to find her just in time. Back home, Foster investigates D.C.-area hospitals with Lightman's rival, Jack Rader. They try to uncover the reason that five people have grown gravely ill after receiving blood transfusions.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E04 - Honey
2.plot: Eric Matheson (Garret Dillahunt) is determined to prove that he didn't murder his wife. Torres is assigned to investigate the murder, and goes to the house of the victim's sister. Matheson finds Torre's car and gets into it after she forgot to lock the door. When Torres returns, Matheson holds her at gunpoint, instructing her to drive to the Lightman Group offices. Cal makes a deal with Mattheson, asking him to let all the employees go as long as he helps prove Mattheson's innocence. Mattheson complies, and Foster, Loker, Reynolds and Torres attempt to solve the case, while Loker has second thoughts about not calling the authorities. Cal and the team find out that Mattheson was actually innocent, and that his wife was actually killed by a creditor. Mattheson demands that he sees the creditor, saying he will either take his life or Cal's. Cal pleads for Mattheson to kill him, but Foster, Loker and Reynolds trick Mattheson into letting his guard down after a disguised Loker pretends to recount the last moments of Mattheson's wife's life. As Mattheson is in a moment of rage before killing Loker, Reynolds draws his gun and shoots Mattheson, disarming him. The episode ends with Lightman at Foster's home, asking if he could sleep in her spare room for the night.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E05 - Grievous Bodily Harm
2.plot: When Cal's old pal, Terry Marsh, comes to town, he brings plenty of trouble with him. Meanwhile, the rest of the team meets with some students from a prep school to determine if any of them are responsible for a threatening tape that was sent to the headmaster.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E06 - Lack of Candor
2.plot: After a federal witness is killed, the US attorney arrives at the Lightman Group to take the next witness in line, Reynolds, into protected custody. Cal feels that the US Marshals Service cannot protect Reynolds, so he takes him "hostage" and demands that he be able to run the investigation into the witness's death. During his investigation, he finds out that while undercover Reynolds did drugs and killed a man and wants to keep it a secret to avoid prosecution after he finds out that his handler (Alicia Coppola) did not properly report the event. Through his own undercover operation, Cal records the handler admitting that she led Reynolds to believe that everything was all set legally, and the US attorney subsequently takes her into custody. Meanwhile Loker and Torres discover that the original witness was killed after the cell phone that his mistress provided was tracked to his safe house's location.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E07 - Black Friday
2.plot: The Lightman Group helps a teenager who believes he was abducted as a baby, while Loker and Torres try to figure out what caused a deadly stampede at an electronics store.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E08 - Secret Santa
2.plot: Cal spends the holidays in Afghanistan, where he relies solely on an American expatriate to help a mission to find a pair of missing Marines.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E09 - Fold Equity
2.plot: Lightman, Foster and Reynolds travel to Las Vegas to help locate a missing finalist in the World Series of Poker. Lightman uses his skills to read the other competitors' faces to figure out which one knows about the disappearance. Meanwhile, Loker and Torres analyze Loker's new relationship, and as a result, get closer to each other.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E10 - Tractor Man
2.plot: A protesting farmer parks his explosives-packed tractor near the US Treasury building. Meanwhile, Loker plays babysitter to third-graders stuck in the Lightman Group office, actress Felicia Day guest stars as their teacher. Miguel Ferrer guest stars as FBI ASAC Steele, Ben Reynolds' boss.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E11 - Beat The Devil
2.plot: Lightman investigates one of his mentor's graduate students, whom he is convinced is a psychopath, while Loker and Torres look into a UFO sighting.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E12 - Sweet Sixteen
2.plot: An Irish terrorist comes to Dr. Lightman to find out who killed his wife and daughter seven years ago, which reveals secrets about Lightman's relationship with Dr. Foster and his past job working counter-terrorism for the government.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E13 - The Whole Truth
2.plot: Lightman is an expert witness at the trial of a woman charged with murdering her high-powered, and much older, husband.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E14 - React to Contact
2.plot: Lightman is confronted with unsettling truths about his past while trying to save an Iraq war veteran.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E15 - Teacher and Pupils
2.plot: After a grisly shooting in a federal housing project, Lightman is hired to read the face of the paralyzed victim.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E16 - Delinquent
2.plot: When a pregnant girl is found murdered, Cal and the LMG team help Torres try to clear her juvenile-delinquent sister of charges, and protect her from the real killer.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E17 - Bullet Bump
2.plot: The Lightman Group investigates when a young woman is killed at a political rally in Virginia.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E18 - Headlock
2.plot: A fighter in an underground club is found dead; Foster discovers a troubling secret.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E19 - Pied Piper
2.plot: Lightman and his ex-wife, Zoe witness the execution of a murderer they prosecuted 17 years ago and face the possibility that they sent the wrong man to his death.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E20 - Exposed
2.plot: After Foster's boyfriend, Dave Burns (guest star Martini), gets abducted Lightman tries to track him down with the help of Burns' mysterious ex partner.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E21 - Darkness and Light
2.plot: A missing woman leads the Lightman group to discover criminal activity in the adult film industry.

2.title: FR - Lie to Me - S02E22 - Black and White
2.plot: The Lightman Group investigates the murder of a journalist and friend of Lightman’s who was killed while exposing a corrupt politician

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E01 - In the Red
3.plot: Lightman tries to stop a man intent on revenge from robbing a bank.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E02 - The Royal We
3.plot: While defending a wrongly accused man, Lightman uncovers a dark secret that helps a damaged woman and her daughter.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E03 - Dirty Loyal
3.plot: The Lightman Group gets hired by Internal Affairs to investigate an incident that involves Det. Wallowski and her partner Det. Farr.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E04 - Double Blind
3.plot: Lightman becomes involved in a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse when he meets a beautiful woman at an art gallery. Meanwhile, Torres is still reeling after her fatal mistake.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E05 - The Canary's Song
3.plot: When Lightman investigates an explosion that killed six coal miners, he suspects foul play may be involved and goes below the surface to find the truth; the FBI seeks the Lightman Group's help with another case.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E06 - Beyond Belief
3.plot: Lightman goes head-to-head with the leader of a self-help empire to free a wealthy woman who may be under the control of the cult-like leader. When Lightman begins to investigate, things get personal as he suspects the group of threatening him and his daughter, Emily.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E07 - Veronica
3.plot: Lightman tries to help a woman with early-onset Alzheimer's piece together her fragmented memories, but it uncovers a deadly secret.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E08 - Smoked
3.plot: Lightman is hired by a terminally ill restaurant owner to find his daughter's killer as his dying wish.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E09 - Funhouse
3.plot: Cal Lightman questions his own sanity while he tries to get a patient released from a mental hospital.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E10 - Rebound
3.plot: A wealthy woman asks Lightman to look into her new boyfriend's background.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E11 - Saved
3.plot: Lightman investigates three high school students responsible for a deadly traffic accident.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E12 - Gone
3.plot: A baby goes missing, and her mother accuses an unknown person of the kidnapping. When Lightman sees she’s hiding something, he digs deeper and discovers a family in need of repair.

3.title: FR - Lie to Me - S03E13 - Killer App
3.plot: Foster’s former patient, one of the founders of a social-networking app, comes to the Lightman Group when she thinks she’s being squeezed out by her partner. When she turns up dead a short time later, Lightman fights against the prevailing evidence to expose the truth behind the murder.

1.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S01E01 - Going Under
1.plot: Charles Falco manages to infiltrate the notorious Vagos biker gang. But just as he's learning the ropes, a surprise invitation puts the nervous new hang-around squarely in the line of fire.

1.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S01E02 - A Tough Prospect
1.plot: A knockout punch gives Falco his road name, and while a new motorbike provides him with added street cred, he's now got a major debt to pay.

1.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S01E03 - Patched In
1.plot: Now a full-patch Vago, Falco is secretly enjoying his new role as an outlaw biker. When an early-morning police raid goes bust, however, he faces serious allegations on two fronts. Chapter president Schizo is on the hunt for a snitch, and during the gang’s annual Reno run, Darko, the chapter’s sergeant-at-arms, and Stash go rogue forcing Falco to join them on an ill-fated payback operation.

1.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S01E04 - Dangerous Game
1.plot: When Stash murders a drug dealer, the D.A.'s determination to convict him threatens to blow Falco's cover. Meanwhile, Falco proves he's a critical asset to both the Vagos and the cops. But when he later throws the first punch in a bar brawl, Falco, Schizo, and Stash all find themselves behind bars on charges of attempted murder.

1.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S01E05 - Solitary
1.plot: Facing a month behind bars, Falco quickly moves up the ranks of the Aryan brotherhood; Back at home, uncomfortable questions reemerge and the gang's leadership is thrown by a secret power play at gunpoint.

1.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S01E06 - Endgame
1.plot: With Falco's mission almost over, Agent Koz wants Falco to lay low until the bust goes down; Darko and Stash push him to defect and start cooking drugs for their rival chapter, while, Suzanna walks out on him for good.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E01 - Nowhere Man
2.plot: Falco receives an unexpected job offer while struggling to put the past behind him in the witness-protection program.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E02 - The Devil You Know
2.plot: Falco agrees to go back undercover and is assigned to work with an uptight and single-minded ATF agent, and the two are soon summoned to meet The Devil.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E03 - Mongol Nation
2.plot: Falco and Bullet head to California, where Falco hopes to earn his patch, but his past may come back to haunt him.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E04 - Black Rain
2.plot: Operation Black Rain comes to a premature conclusion, and Falco's role as an undercover agent puts him in jeopardy.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E05 - Club Adios
2.plot: Falco is requested to partner with his old nemesis Darko, which leaves him to contemplate quitting the mission; and the Devil and posse arrive to inspect the new clubhouse, and the night takes a hellacious turn.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E06 - In-laws and Outlaws
2.plot: A chance run-in with the Devil exposes Falco and girlfriend Sarah Jane, putting them in a dangerous situation.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E07 - End of the Road
2.plot: Falco's chapter is ordered to off a rival biker, but Meredith gets wind of the plan and threatens to end the operation. Meanwhile, Bullet has other ideas, and a scheme unfolds to fool the Devil.

2.title: FR - Gangland Undercover - S02E08 - The Devils Patch
2.plot: A missing cell phone that contains candid video recordings threatens to derail Falco's operation and leaves him facing a pivotal moment of truth.

meta.plot: This drama series is a fictionalized retelling of the story of meth dealer-turned-ATF informant Charles Falco, who spent three years inside one of America's most dangerous motorcycle gangs, the Vagos. Although Falco originally took on the assignment to avoid spending 20 years in prison on drug charges, it eventually evolved into a quest for justice for him. “Gangland Undercover” documents the lives of outlaw bikers, who live in a world in which respect is earned through fear. The series is based on Falco's memoir, “Vagos, Mongols, and Outlaws,” and documented historical research of gang rivalries.

Teenagers, the internationally-recognized characters of the series, will be the heroes of adventures in which they will play an active role. They will be a force for change, faced with situations and problems they need to resolve. The series will be based on facts, yet still primarily entertainment. Through their actions, they directly affect their planet and the resources that must be used responsibly and are not inexhaustible. The series will also help younger audiences to understand that pollution, hunger and water shortages are realities with specific causes – rather than inevitable evils to be dreaded, they are battles to be won with solutions to be found.
