FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E01 - The Planet Cell
1.plot: The world of cells is incredible! Activating enzymes, stopping viruses, and managing the body’s police force: it’s all in a day’s work for Teacher.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E02 - Birth
1.plot: After the first cell is fertilized, division and diversification take place to create the 60 trillion cells of the human body.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E03 - The Body Sentinels
1.plot: The body’s police force is taught to neutralize its enemies (microbes and viruses), which reproduce at an alarming rate! It’s a very complex task.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E04 - The Bone Marrow
1.plot: Red blood cells, the body’s police force, are created in the bone marrow but sometimes, the factory breaks down and wayward policemen come out. Uh oh!

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E05 - The Blood
1.plot: The steadfast red blood cells have come down with the flu! Pedrito and Psi get some help from the Teacher’s antibodies to beat the enemy.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E06 - The Tiny Platelets
1.plot: Pedrito cuts his finger with a dirty knife. While the platelets try to cure the wound, the white blood cells fight off the filthy invaders.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E07 - The Heart
1.plot: Globus takes Hemo and Globina on a tour through the human body’s cathedral: the heart and circulatory system. It’s an impressive adventure.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E08 - Breathing
1.plot: Air bubbles travel from the nose to the lungs. In the swampy, mucus-filled areas, they meet the red blood cells that transport them around the body.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E09 - The Brain
1.plot: Teacher introduces Hemo and Globina to the most mysterious organ: the brain. They learn about behavior, the senses, and much more.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E10 - The Neurones
1.plot: The body’s messengers run around sending and receiving information about feelings like hunger and cold. They work day and night and never take breaks.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E11 - The Eye
1.plot: Eyes are magical! They break down and transmit images to the brain. What happens if a speck of dust gets into one? It’s tear enzymes to the rescue.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E12 - The Ear
1.plot: The ear is composed of cells that sense vibrations and transmit them to the brain. Then, the brain transforms them into words and sounds.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E13 - The Skin
1.plot: Skin is the first barrier against external aggression and helps eliminate waste. From cuts and scrapes to bug bites, it stays pretty busy.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E14 - The Mouth and the Teeth
1.plot: Yum! Candy! But sugar strengthens the bacteria around the gums and attacks the tooth enamel, which can cause cavities.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E15 - The Digestion
1.plot: After a tasty meal the food starts its journey to the stomach where it will be broken down depending on what properties it has. But don’t overdo it!

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E16 - The Liver Factory
1.plot: The liver is fundamental. It doesn’t weigh a lot but it uses almost as much oxygen as the heart! It makes proteins, corpuscles, and helps heal cuts.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E17 - The Kidneys
1.plot: Toxic elements head to the kidneys where they are categorized. The good ones are salvaged but the bad ones are sent to the bladder. Have a good trip!

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E18 - The Lymphatic System
1.plot: The huge lymph network transports everything to the body’s factories. Infectious intruders beware! This place is well protected.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E19 - The Bones and the Skeleton
1.plot: The architecture that protects the body’s organs is magnificent! However, even the slightest fracture can cause significant damage.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E20 - The Muscles and the Fat
1.plot: Muscles account for almost half the weight of the human body. They also need a ton of energy to do their jobs correctly.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E21 - Toxin Wars
1.plot: Combat teams act as preventative barriers and are prepared to defend the cell’s nucleus against toxic gases and contaminants.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E22 - The Vaccination
1.plot: Vaccines bring us so many benefits! People who don’t get vaccinated run the risk of contracting a disease that is stronger than our natural defenses.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E23 - The Hormones
1.plot: At the heart of the hypothalamus, Teacher shows us how this region sends out orders to satisfy all the body’s needs.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E24 - The Chain Of Life
1.plot: A walk in the forest is the perfect way to learn about the extraordinary food chain that exists between the sun, vegetation, animals, and man.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E25 - Repairs and Changes
1.plot: Pedrito is 8 years old and is tired after a long day. When he goes to bed, Teacher and his helpers observe the activity that continues during sleep.

1.title: FR - Once Upon a Time... Life - S01E26 - And life goes on...
1.plot: Pedrito wants to know why his grandpa can’t play ball anymore, so he tells Pedrito an old story about a sphinx.

meta.plot: Attention please! Are you ready for an adventurous tour through the human body? With a lot of humour, our physical appearance is being introduced from head to toe along cells and organs in an educational way. The heart, blood, nerves and kidneys, each single one is a miracle which renders life possible.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E01 - Enter the Nose Picker
1.plot: Mavis accidentally lures an unwelcome guest into the hotel.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E02 - Hide & Shriek
1.plot: Mavis finds her childhood toy, Demented Debbie, in the attic.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E03 - Bad Friday
1.plot: The monsters celebrate Bad Friday by trying to win the Screamie for the best scare.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E04 - Hoop Screams
1.plot: Mavis gives Hank the gift of basketball.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E05 - Buggin' Out
1.plot: While doing her chores around the hotel, Mavis mistakes truth bugs for bed bugs.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E06 - How Do You Solve a Problem Like Medusa
1.plot: Mavis invites Lydia's high school rival to the hotel.

1.title: FR - Hotel Transylvania: The Series - S01E07 - Adventures in Vampiresitting
1.plot: The kids get trapped in a human house.

meta.plot: Mavis navigates life without her dad, Dracula, around and discovers one of the few common human and monster truths: being a teenager bites.

The forest ranger's house is the only area of human civilization in the middle of untamed wilderness in a vast natural reserve in Canada. When the ranger is away, a bear named Grizzy feels that the ranger's house is his territory, given that bears sit at the top of the food chain. After making his way inside the home, Grizzy takes advantage of all the modern conveniences there, including a comfortable sofa, air conditioning and fully equipped kitchen. He's not alone, though, because a group of small creatures called lemmings also populate the ranger's house when he is away. Because Grizzy and the lemmings are not civilized enough to live together in peace, it becomes an atmosphere of madness when the two sides try to outdo each other with tricks.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E01 - Cellular Bear
1.plot: Grizzy's nap is interrupted by an annoying vibrating. He sees the forest ranger's cell phone. It has various functions, including a game to which he instantly becomes addicted.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E02 - Jurassic Bear
1.plot: Freed by the thawing ice, a mysterious giant egg slides up to the front door of the log cabin. The Lemmings watch the hatching of large baby dinosaur that immediately mistakes them for his mummies. How can Grizzy and the lemmings armed with the T rex?

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E03 - Extreme Fitness
1.plot: In order to seduce the she-bear he's infatuated with, Grizzy decides to take things in hand and slim down with the ranger's bodybuilding equipment. But before starting his exercise routine, he will first have to settle the problem of the Lemmings.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E04 - Bear Under Control
1.plot: Grizzy wants to take a nap and under all circumstances prevent the lemmings go to the chocolate cream. For this reason, he turns his refrigerator into a vault. The lemmings try in vain to break the refrigerator until they see the bear sleep and open the refrigerator. Just as he did, he woke up surprisingly.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E05 - Popcorn Party
1.plot: The Lemmings have invented a new popcorn game which consists of throwing popcorn and catching it with their mouths.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E06 - Dancing with the Bears
1.plot: Grizzy wants to learn to dance the mambo to please his lovely she-bear. He finds a learning kit at the ranger's home which has a dance carpet with footprints.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E07 - Domestic Robots
1.plot: By chance, Grizzy discovers that the ranger's new robot vacuum cleaner also gives very pleasant back massages. But the Lemmings see the new gadget more as a competition bumper car.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E08 - Mass Control
1.plot: Grizzy discovers a gadget that controls functions in the cabin. One button creates light an other surveys the house. Will Grizzy be able to rid himself to the lemmings without leaving the couch?

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E09 - Lemming Tonic
1.plot: A tired Grizzly goes to fetch a pillow but the Lemmings have different plans for the couch.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E10 - Bear Itch
1.plot: Grizzy discovers that the frenzied "break dance" the Lemmings are doing is actually due to the fleas they are infested with.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E11 - Thirst Quencher
1.plot: Another heat wave: even the riverbed is dried up. One very thirsty Grizzy discovers that the Lemmings have used the last remaining bottles of water to fill their inflatable pool.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E12 - Spider Lemmings
1.plot: The Lemmings have caught a little spider. Her sticky threads are perfect for bungee jumping. Grizzy, who has no intention of getting caught in the web, decides to crush the insec

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E13 - Random Bear
1.plot: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over chocolate-spread jar lids, which they use as chips to win goodies. But more importantly, there's s grand prize: a giant jar of Yummy.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E14 - High Voltage Bear Attack
1.plot: The Lemmings are having a rave party. When Grizzy throws their stereo into the river, he sparks a general power outage and is unable to watch his favourite shows.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E15 - Bear Luck
1.plot: This is not Grizzy's day: after making a fool of himself in front of the she-bear, he is ousted from the cabin by the Lemmings. But his luck is about to change.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E16 - Bear Scents
1.plot: When he realises that his beloved she-bear adores the smell of flowers, Grizzy decides to offer her the geraniums that decorate the window ledges of the ranger's cabin.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E17 - Bear's Best Friend
1.plot: Grizzy discovers a baby raccoon not far from the log cabin. When he sees its big moist eyes, Grizzy melts and adopts the creature.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E18 - Super Grizzy Bros
1.plot: Grizzy starts playing video game on the console. The Lemmings want to try their hand at the joystick but Grizzy refuses to interrupt his kart racing game. The Lemmings brought another joystick and starts playing with Grizzy. Both of them think they will win.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E19 - Polar Bear
1.plot: Nutty Hill is suffering from a stifling heat wave. Searching in vain for a bit of cool air, Grizzy suddenly has a brilliant idea. He'll get into the fridge, where the temperature will be more bearable.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E20 - Bear Spread
1.plot: Grizzy is frustrated: just as he was about to coat a nice big fresh salmon with chocolate spread and snuggle up in front of the Tv, he discovers that the pantry is empty!

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E21 - Role Change
1.plot: After receiving a terrible blow over the head, Grizzy is no longer the same: he thinks he's a rodent! He tries to get the gang to adopt him.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E22 - Lemming Interference
1.plot: Grizzy has prepared himself a TV dinner to eat in front of his favourite series. But his moment of pleasure is abruptly interrupted by unexplained static.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E23 - Magnetic Bear
1.plot: Grizzy sees objects moving all by themselves when the Lemmings play around with a powerful magnet.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E24 - Bear Charm
1.plot: Grizzy is persuaded that the she-bear he's in love with has been turned into a frog. Whilst he looks through the ranger's books of fairytales, the Lemmings try to recover the frog.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E25 - Fake Brother
1.plot: Grizzy builds a look-alike robot to keep the Lemmings away.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E26 - Mind in a Whirl
1.plot: After being hit over the head, the she-bear Grizzy's in love with thinks she's a Lemming.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E27 - A Sizeable Problem
1.plot: A small meteorite falls down by the table it contains jelly beans. But Grizzy uses a red beans and blue beans to chase the lemmings while riding a large birds but the end the bird got very large to chase them.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E28 - Teleportation's the Way to Go!
1.plot: Grizzy finds communicating vessels. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them. This should satisfy Grizzy's natural lazy streak.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E29 - In the Service of His Majesty
1.plot: When he brandishes an Indian scepter that the Lemmings brought home, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E30 - Bear Art
1.plot: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art to transform it into a slide.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E31 - Happy Birthday Lemming
1.plot: The Lemmings throw a Birthday party when Happy Birthday rings out it wakes Grizzy who is sleeping after a hearty meal. Grizzy must stop the dim but for the lemmings. the party must go on.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E32 - Flower Power
1.plot: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzy's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzy sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E33 - Lemming Airlines
1.plot: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E34 - Relax Bear
1.plot: Grizzy discovers that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E35 - Treasure Bear
1.plot: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E36 - Bear Countdown
1.plot: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets you wind back the minute that has just passed by and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E37 - Bear Gliding
1.plot: The Lemmings play kite-surf with a homemade kite. Grizzy notices that the she-bear he's in love with watches the kite perform arabesques in the sky with admiration.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E38 - The Sound of a Lemming
1.plot: Grizzy snatches the last jar of chocolate spread out from under the noses of the Lemmings.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E39 - Bear in the Wind
1.plot: The Lemmings play a new game, floating like flags in the breeze from the fan set at maximum.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E40 - Construction Bear
1.plot: The Lemmings have fun tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzy finds that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the construction.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E41 - Kung Fu Lemmings
1.plot: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E42 - A Midsummer Bear's Dream
1.plot: Grizzy dreams that he's a valiant knight who has delivered his beloved. As he is about to take her in his arms, he is woken by the Lemmings who have chosen this day to blast music.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E43 - Manufacturing Secret
1.plot: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realizes that the Lemmings are making some themselves!

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E44 - Bling Bling Bear
1.plot: Inspired by a magazine with a jewelry ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzy imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E45 - Intellectual Bear
1.plot: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E46 - Voodoo Blanket
1.plot: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming!

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E47 - Bear Prints
1.plot: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera which is connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to immortalize and frame himself...

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E48 - Inspector Grizzy
1.plot: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E49 - No Entrance!
1.plot: As usual, Grizzy picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter!

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E50 - Lemmings Indigestion
1.plot: The Lemmings have got their hands on a pack of white beans which have very strange properties: when mixed with soda, anyone who eats them turns into a stupid bouncing ball.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E51 - Sonata in Bear Major
1.plot: Grizzy wants to get rid of the old piano at any cost. But when he notices that the she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of "Für Elise," he decides to learn the piece.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E52 - Bear Fractions
1.plot: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy. Inside, a case emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturized versions of themselves.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E53 - The Bear That Laid Golden Eggs
1.plot: A machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of and there is also a flowers which made like a necklace the Grizzy dream of for she-bear.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E54 - Crash Training Course
1.plot: Grizzy finds a high-tech gadget that enables him to learn anything within seconds, meaning that he can become the perfect bear. Lemmings also wants this gadget from Grizzy.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E55 - As Far as Bear Can Remember
1.plot: Grizzy and Lemmings find themselves in their new home for the first time and Grizzy and Lemmings meet with the food of their lives and the contest begins.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E56 - Chemical Lemmings
1.plot: The Lemmings starts playing chemistry novices with a fun experiment box at the cabin's garage which disturbs Grizzy.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E57 - Remote Control
1.plot: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects in his nest perched high up in a tree; Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E58 - The Bear and the Butterfly
1.plot: Grizzy has got it into his head to offer a butterfly to the she bear but the Lemmings fight with him over the rare specimens he is spotted.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E59 - Get Off My Tennis Shoes
1.plot: The Lemmings have discovered an addictive new game based on the astonishing bouncing properties of the running shoes. Grizzy also liked the shoes and snatch from them.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E60 - Babysitting
1.plot: She-bear asked Grizzy to babysit her she-bear kid for some time. There is no question of Grizzy tripping up, as he has no intention of taking any risks, but he hasn't reckoned on the Lemmings.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E61 - Bear Under Lock and Key
1.plot: Unwilling to share the food both he and the Lemmings are wild about, Grizzy locks it up inside the ranger's brand new and apparently burglar-proof safe.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E62 - Lemming Blues
1.plot: Grizzy is impressed by the TV show of a magician who transforms a partridge into a bouquet of flowers. To get rid of the Lemmings once and for all, Grizzy tries the magic trick on them.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E63 - Snow Lemmings
1.plot: An ice-cream getting fight between Grizzy and the Lemmings.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E64 - Augmented Bear
1.plot: Grizzy brought a tablet that had a game of catching fishes in it.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E65 - Lemmings Under Pressure
1.plot: Grizzy wants to melt the ice in which has a salmon in it using the blow dryer. However, the Lemmings are already using the dryer for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E66 - Lemmings in Space
1.plot: Due to crackers, the forest ranger cabin accidentally comes to space with Grizzy and the Lemmings. Grizzy wants to come back to earth but lemmings does not.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E67 - Sniffer Raccoon
1.plot: After lemmings snatched the Yummy XL from Grizzy, he starts finding them with the help of a Raccoon.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E68 - Transformational Bear
1.plot: Grizzy has a pain in his body. He brought a toy, which can transform itself into a car or a robot, from lemmings.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E69 - Shaken-up Bear
1.plot: Lemmings discovers a new game of shaking. The vibrations created by Grizzy's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzy changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations, which disturbs Grizzy to sleep.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E70 - Piñata Party
1.plot: Grizzy finds a birthday piñata in the ranger's living room. He wants to destroy it for toffees. The Lemmings, who prefer to use it as a toy to swing from, are determined to stop Grizzy from destroying the piñata.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E71 - Bear Game
1.plot: As usual, during a fight to get Yummy XL, the jar of chocolate falls into a magical object. Both of them would play a game to gett the jar.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E72 - Ranger Lemming
1.plot: Grizzy is bothered by an object stuck in between the sofa cushions. It's a big fur lemming puppet glove and the Lemmings believe that the puppet is a Super Lemming who's stronger than Grizzy and start to obey it.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E73 - Halloween Bear
1.plot: It is Halloween and Grizzy sees that the Ranger's house is full of pumpkin, fake spiders, webs etc. Lemmings started fun in cabin. After seeing the marshmallows they both start fighting to get them.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E74 - Clean Bear
1.plot: Grizzy wants to clean himself and give a ring to she bear but for clean his body, he should have a soap on which lemmings are skating.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E75 - Wandering Spirits
1.plot: Grizzy founds a magical object that changes his spirit from moose. When lemmings see this magic, they tried to change their spirits from partridge so that they can fly in the sky.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E76 - Mirror, Mirror on the Wall
1.plot: In the forest during fishing in the river, instead of fish, Grizzy found a box in which a magical mirror is placed which has a power that when someone saw into the mirror, his dream become true in mirror.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E77 - Grizzy the Wizard
1.plot: From the fallen by a vehicle, lemmings found a magical stick which has a power to make a non-living thing into living.

1.title: FR - Grizzy & the Lemmings - S01E78 - Moonwalk Bear
1.plot: Both Grizzy and the Lemmings accidentally travel to the moon by crackers. Grizzy wants to come back on earth while the lemmings start having fun.

meta.plot: Batman, Superman et Wonder Woman mènent les super-héros de la Terre dans leur lutte contre les ennemis de l'univers...

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E01 - Classic Rock (1)
1.plot:
In a fight with Black Adam on the Rock of Eternity several Djinns get released and the Justice League has to stop them.

Part one of a four part episode also known as Shazam Slam.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E02 - Power Outage (2)
1.plot:
A lava based Djinn absorbes the powers of Parasite giving Wonder Woman and Superman a hard time beating a creature that drains them of their own powers.

Part two of a four part episode also known as Shazam Slam.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E03 - Night of the Bat (3)
1.plot:
Batman is possessed by a djinn who overloads and power core from the Hall of Justice.

Part three of a four part episode also known as Shazam Slam.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E04 - Abate and Switch (4)
1.plot:
The last three djinn are proving formidable foes when Black Adam shows up again with a vengeance. With the help of John Constantine, Plastic Man, Swamp Thing and Shazam the League puts in a team effort to stop Black Adam and the djinn. At the site of the battle the watchtower is built as a replacement HQ.

Part four of a four part episode also known as Shazam Slam.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E05 - Follow That Space Cab!
1.plot: Superman and Hawkman receive the help of an honorable space cab driver as they try to protect Mr. Mind from being captured by Lobo.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E06 - Nuclear Family Values
1.plot: Firestorm's family values. The heat is on when the Justice League enlist the help of Firestorm. Taking a trip to where it all began, Firestorm encounters a not so all American family.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E07 - Zombie King
1.plot: Batman teams up with John Constantine, Zatanna, and Swamp Thing when Solomon Grundy tries to raise a zombie army

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E08 - Galaxy Jest
1.plot: Wonder Woman and Superman have to rescue Joker from Mongul, whilst Batman and Flash try to stop a massive laughing gas bomb hidden away in Gotham.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E09 - Time Share
1.plot: Batman and Blue Beetle are thrown back in time where they must stop Chronos from destroying Batman on his first night in Gotham where he faces off against Carmine Falcone and his men.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E10 - Under a Red Sun
1.plot: After a brief team up with Batman and Big Barda in their battle against the Parademons, Superman is transported to a planet orbiting a red sun by Steppenwolf. This is part of Steppenwolf's plan to kill Superman and become a legend. Now with his powers slowly depleting, Superman must defeat Steppenwolf and get back to Earth. As this is happening, Batman and Big Barda head to Darkseid's fortress on Apokolips in order to find information on where Superman is transported to.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E11 - Play Date
1.plot: When the Justice League Watchtower is invaded by Toyman and his army oftoys, Cyborg, Wonder Woman, Superman, and Batman are turned into players in a twisted version of a fighting game, and now Cyborg will need all of his gaming skills to get out of this one.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E12 - Repulse!
1.plot: Superman has been infected by the "Repulse", who was revealed as Lex Luthor, and has now become the new Repulse. As Wonder Woman and Hawkman try to find a way to save him, Superman must remove those nanobots from his body by sending them into a black hole before he gets pulled into it as well.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E13 - Trick or Threat
1.plot: Cain the Caretaker tells the audience a Halloween story about the House of Mystery, where Batman, Zatanna, Constantine, and Doctor Fate are turned into 10-year-olds by Klarion the Witch Boy. Now, the 10-year-old Justice League must find a way to defeat Klarion, turn them back to normal, and escape the House of Mystery before it disappears by midnight.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E14 - Speed Demon
1.plot: After defeating Harley Quinn, Batman and Zatanna encounter Brother Night who used his dark magic to control the Batmobile and kidnapping Zatanna. With the help of Etrigan the Demon, Batman must save her, stop the Batmobile, and defeat Brother Night.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E15 - Hat Trick
1.plot: Felix Faust steals Zatanna's hat in order to free a massive demon and get his youth back. While Batman and Etrigan face off against the demon, Zatanna uses every trick in her arsenal to get her hat back from Felix Faust.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E16 - Luthor in Paradise
1.plot: Lex Luthor and Circe invade Themyscira, home of the Amazons, to obtain a staff that leads to the Fallen Realm and an artifact of the Greek Gods. With help from Superman and Batman, Wonder Woman must find a way to stop those villains before it's too late.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E17 - Plastic Man Saves the World
1.plot: While Superman, Batman, Cyborg, and Vixen try to stop Brainiac, Plastic Man sneaks into Brainiac's spaceship to destroy the shrink ray and save the world in order to prove that he is a worthy superhero.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E18 - Field Trip
1.plot: As Superman gives Blue Beetle, Firestorm, and Stargirl a tour of the Fortress of Solitude, they run afoul with General Zod, Faora, and an unidentified Kryptonian villain who are accidentally freed from the Phantom Zone. Now with Superman trapped inside, the three teen heroes must work together to stop the Kryptonian villains.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E19 - Rage of the Red Lanterns
1.plot: Lobo stole the rings from the Red Lanterns and pits Atrocitus, Zilius Zox and the rest of the Red Lanterns against Batman, Superman, and Wonder Woman in order to get a score. After Lobo unlocked the Spider Gauntlet's power, the Justice League and the Red Lanterns must team up to defeat him.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E20 - Freezer Burn
1.plot: Mr. Freeze flies on his aircraft to freeze the entire Gotham City using Killer Frost as his power source. While Batman deals with Mr. Freeze, Firestorm will have to save Killer Frost and develops a crush on her at the same time.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E21 - Inside Job
1.plot: In a Fantastic Voyage-like adventure, Atom shrinks Batman and Wonder Woman, so they can enter Superman's bloodstream and destroy a lethal nanite virus.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E22 - The Trouble with Truth
1.plot: The JLA find themselves in danger of losing Wonder Woman when the goddess Athena comes to Earth with an offer Diana can't refuse -- filling the position of the Goddess of Truth on Mt. Olympus.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E23 - Double Cross
1.plot: In order for Batman to lure Deadshot into a trap, he has Plastic Man pose as Two-Face. Things go well at first until the real Two-Face escapes from Firestorm's custody.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E24 - Battle for the Bottled City
1.plot: The Atom shrinks Superman down to microscopic size so that he can enter the Bottled City of Kandor but when Brainiac breaks into the Fortress of Solitude, defeats Cyborg, and reclaims the bottle, Atom must try to stop Brainiac on his own.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E25 - Garden of Evil
1.plot: When Swamp Thing has a blind date with Poison Ivy which leads to her controlling him in her plot to overrun Gotham City with plants, Batman works on an antidote to free Swamp Thing from Poison Ivy's control. Meanwhile, Poison Ivy is collaborating with Harley Quinn to help her keep Swamp Thing in check. So Superman, Firestorm, and Vixen work to fight Poison Ivy and Harley Quinn on their home turf.

1.title: FR - La Ligue des justiciers : Action - S01E26 - All Aboard the Space Train
1.plot: In a strange turn of events, the JLA enlist the help of Space Cabbie and Jonah Hex to stop the hijacking of an intergalactic space train.

meta.plot: Le fils de Simba, Kion, crée un groupe d'animal pour protéger la Terre des Lions connu sous le nom de "La Garde du Roi Lion"

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E01 - Never Judge a Hyena By Its Spots
1.plot: When Kion gets separated from the rest of the Lion Guard, he finds himself lost in the Outlands where he meets Jasiri, a friendly female hyena, who rescues him and helps face off against Janja and the other hyenas.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E02 - The Rise of Makuu
1.plot: When a crocodile named Makuu takes over as leader of the crocodiles and his aggressive antics send the Pride Lands into chaos, Kion questions whether to intervene or respect animal traditions.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E03 - Bunga the Wise
1.plot: After floodwaters threaten the Pride Lands and Bunga comes up with a quick fix, Kion and the other members of the Lion Guard learn that the quick and easy solution to a problem is not always the best.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E04 - Can't Wait to Be Queen
1.plot: When Simba leaves Kiara in charge of Pride Rock for the first time, Kion reluctantly agrees to obey her which proves difficult when Janja tries to take advantage of Kiara’s inexperience and hatches a plot to take over the Pride Lands.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E05 - Eye of the Beholder
1.plot: Ono temporarily loses vision in one eye and questions his value to the Lion Guard as the "keenest of sight."

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E06 - The Kupatana Celebration
1.plot: Kion inadvertently leads a pack of jackals into the Pride Lands, where they wreak havoc during a highly regarded Pride Lands ceremony. Ana Gasteyer (ABC’s “The Goldbergs”) guest stars as Rairai, the clever and scheming matriarch to a family of jackals.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E07 - Fuli's New Family
1.plot: The Guard thinks that Fuli is lonely since she spends so much time on her own; they try to include her in their family time.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E08 - The Search for Utamu
1.plot: Fuli learns a lesson in teamwork when she takes on a mission alone and overexerts herself, leaving her defenseless against attacking vultures.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E09 - Follow That Hippo!
1.plot: Beshte rescues a young elephant that idolizes him after he wanders into danger.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E10 - The Call of the Drongo
1.plot: The Lion Guard steps in when they encounter a deceptive drongo bird named Tamaa who mimics predators to scare off smaller animals.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E11 - Paintings and Predictions
1.plot: Believing that Rafiki's paintings predict the future, Bunga enlists the rest of the Lion Guard to save Kion from danger.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E12 - The Mbali Fields Migration
1.plot: Kion and the Guard must lead a large herd through the Outlands to find a less crowded grazing ground.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E13 - Bunga and the King
1.plot: When Bunga and Simba are trapped underground, they discover a shared family background – they were both raised by Timon and Pumbaa.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E14 - The Imaginary Okapi
1.plot: When Beshte befriends a shy okapi, the Lion Guard thinks Beshte has an imaginary friend

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E15 - Too Many Termites
1.plot: The Lion Guard mistakenly chase off aardwolves instead of hyenas and the Pride Lands become overrun with termites.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E16 - The Trouble with Galagos
1.plot: The Lion Guard helps a leopard named Badili stand up to a bully who is challenging his territory.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E17 - Janja's New Crew
1.plot: Janja replaces Chungu and Cheezi with two new hyenas in an attempt to sideline the Lion Guard.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E18 - Baboons!
1.plot: The Lion Guard rescues a baby baboon and Fuli returns the baboon to its mother.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E19 - Beware the Zimwi
1.plot: When tales of a mysterious creature plague the Pride Lands, the Guard must conquer their fears and track down the elusive beast.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E20 - Lions of the Outlands
1.plot: The Lion Guard must choose whether to side with the hyenas or the lions when Jasiri, the good hyena, asks for help.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E21 - Never Roar Again
1.plot: Fearing he has lost control of his roar, Kion vows to never use it again.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E22 - The Lost Gorillas
1.plot: The Guard helps two buffoonish Gorilla princes return to their home in the snowy Rwenzori Mountains.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E23 - The Trail to Udugu
1.plot: While Nala takes Kion and Kiara on a trip to teach them the importance of working together, Simba is left in charge of the Lion Guard.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E24 - Ono's Idol
1.plot: Ono meets his idol, legendary eagle Hadithi, and learns that his hero isn't what he expected.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E25 - Beshte and the Hippo Lanes
1.plot: Beshte's dad is injured while creating "Hippo Lanes," so Beshte must step in and take over the job.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E26 - Ono the Tickbird
1.plot: While Ono fills in as a Rhino's seeing-eye bird, the rest of the Lion Guard helps by getting the rhino and tick-bird to resolve their differences.

1.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S01E27 -

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E01 - Babysitter Bunga
2.plot: The rest of the Lion Guard is stunned when Bunga becomes the go-to babysitter for all the Pride Lands' parents.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E02 - The Savannah Summit
2.plot: While Simba gathers the animal leaders for a Savannah Summit, the Lion Guard learns of a plot against Twiga the giraffe.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E03 - The Traveling Baboon Show
2.plot: The Lion Guard chase away a baboon comedy troupe that has been distracting the other animals with their antics and stealing their food.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E04 - Ono and the Egg
2.plot: Ono begrudgingly becomes the protector of a cuckoo bird's egg left in his nest and chases off an African harrier hawk who has come to the Pride Lands to hunt for tasty new treats.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E05 - The Rise of Scar
2.plot: The Guard meets Rafiki's new apprentice Monkiki. Meanwhile, Ushari and the hyenas team up to seek the help of the Pride Lands' greatest villain, Scar.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E06 - Let Sleeping Crocs Lie
2.plot: After the Lion Guard accidentally wakes the aestivating crocodiles, the crocs are furious they have to suffer through the dry season!

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E07 - Swept Away
2.plot: When Beshte ends up alone in the Outlands, Scar uses the opportunity to attack the Lion Guard's strongest member.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E08 - Rafiki's New Neighbors
2.plot: When a noisy bachelor herd moves in next door to Rafiki's tree, the Lion Guard try to help the animals find new homes.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E09 - Rescue in the Outlands
2.plot: When Jasiri and two hyena cubs are in danger in the Outlands, the Guard enlists the help of Thurston the Zebra to repel a tsetse fly infestation slowing down their rescue efforts.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E10 - The Ukumbusho Tradition
2.plot: Makini and the Guard are excited to attend their first Ukumbusho but bees threaten to ruin the important celebration!

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E11 - The Bite of Kenge
2.plot: To help the hyenas steal melons, a Monitor Lizard bites Kion, Fuli and Beshte which temporarily paralyzes them!

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E12 - Timon and Pumbaa's Christmas
2.plot: Bunga and the Lion Guard enlist the help of other animals to perform "The Twelve Ways of Christmas" so Timon and Pumbaa can have a "real" Christmas.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E13 - The Morning Report
2.plot: When Scar has the hyenas trap and interrogate Zazu, the Guard must rescue him.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E14 - The Golden Zebra
2.plot: Facing a water shortage in the Pride Lands, the Lion Guard must appease zebra leader, Dhahabu, to gain access to a new watering hole.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E15 - The Little Guy
2.plot: Beshte makes friends with a little gecko named Hodari who wants to be a crocodile more than anything else in the world!

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E16 - Divide and Conquer
2.plot: When the guard is up against two attacks at once, Kion enlists the help of Tamaa the Drongo to help them be in two places at once.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E17 - The Scorpion's Sting
2.plot: After a scorpion sent by Scar stings Simba, the Guard needs to face every villain in the Outlands to get a cure for the king!

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E18 - The Wisdom of Kongwe
2.plot: Fuli and Makini are tasked with escorting one of the Pride Lands' wisest animals, a tortoise named Kongwe, back to Pride Rock to meet with the King.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E19 - The Kilio Valley Fire
2.plot: After Scar's minions set fire to the Kilio Valley, the misplaced elephants are forced to the Pride Lands and create chaos amongst the other herds.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E20 - Undercover Kinyonga
2.plot: A color-changing chameleon named Kinyonga helps the Guard by spying on Scar in the Outlands.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E21 - Cave of Secrets
2.plot: After discovering a mysterious cave that may hold the key to defeating Scar, the Guard must face dangerous hazards to uncover its secrets.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E22 - The Zebra Mastermind
2.plot: After hearing Thurston boast that he's the brains behind the Lion Guard, the villains of the Outlands capture him to find a way to defeat the Guard.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E23 - The Hyena Resistance
2.plot: Jasiri offers to help the Guard battle Scar by forming a Hyena Resistance in the Outlands.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E24 - The Underground Adventure
2.plot: Kion, Kiara, Bunga, Tiifu and Zuri must journey underground through aardvark tunnels to escape a fire.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E25 - Beshte and the Beast
2.plot: A gorilla warrior named Shujaa comes to help the Lion Guard in the battle against Scar.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E26 - Pride Landers Unite!
2.plot: Kion, is tasked with gathering the Pride Landers to prepare them for their fight against Scar.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E27 - The Queen's Visit
2.plot: After being threatened by Scar's attacks, Queen Dhahabu asks Fuli, Tiifu and Zuri to become her permanent personal guards.

2.title: FR - La Garde du Roi Lion : Un Nouveau Cri - S02E28 - The Fall of Mizimu Grove
2.plot: Scar makes an appearance when Timon and Pumbaa decide to put on a show in Mizimu Grove.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E01 - Esteban, Child of the Sun
1.plot: Father Rodriguez, who has looked after Esteban since he was a baby, tells him a great secret on his deathbed: somewhere his father may still be alive. So Esteban decides to begin his search in the New World. With the help of Mendoza, a mysterious man who claims to have rescued him as a baby, Esteban hides as a stowaway, aboard the Esperanza. As they are about to set sail, he meets a young Inca girl: Zia.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E02 - Crossing the Atlantic
1.plot: The two children, Esteban and Zia, find out that they both wear the same strange medallion. The Esperanza crosses the Atlantic and nears the entrance of the Straits of Magellan, where wild seas and strong winds create terrible storms. Mendoza, the navigator, prepares to spend four days and nights at the wheel.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E03 - Heroes Again
1.plot: Buffeted by a fierce wind and a wild sea, the Esperanza manages to sail through the Straits of Magellan, under Mendoza's guidance. But now, the ship faces another trial of strength: it is in the grip of a hurricane.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E04 - Adrift on the Endless Sea
1.plot: Esteban and his friends barely cross through the terrible Straits of Magellan before their ship, the Esperanza, sinks in a storm. Tossed around on a small raft and attacked by sharks, they're left in the middle of the ocean, with no provisions. But a seagull overhead guides them towards the closest shores, and they finally reach a small island.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E05 - The Abduction of Zia
1.plot: After a dangerous journey, Esteban and his friends are washed up on a mysterious island. That night, a shadowy figure comes creeping towards them. Silently, the figure steals a chart and a pistol, then snatches up Zia. Esteban gives chase. He discovers a curious house in a tree, where Zia is a prisoner. To Esteban's surprise, the mysterious shadow turns out to be a friendly boy of his own age, called Tao.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E06 - The Ship Solaris
1.plot: On a small island among the Galapagos, Esteban and Zia find a young boy living all alone: Tao. His ancestors left a magnificent ship, the Solaris, which contains their ancient secret knowledge, hidden in a temple on the island. Esteban and Zia want to use the ship to reach the mainland.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E07 - Secret of the Solaris
1.plot: Gomez' Spanish galleon overtakes and attacks the Solaris, the sun-powered ship on which the children are travelling. They manage to outrun the Spanish ship when Tao discovers a wonderful secret solar power boost, just in time. At last, they reach the new continent.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E08 - The New Continent
1.plot: After many adventures, Esteban and his friends finally set foot on the new continent. But there, they meet the soldiers of Governor Pizarro, men who think only of gold. They capture Zia and try to make her tell them the way to the Cities of Gold, but Tao and Esteban help her to escape.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E09 - The End of the Solaris
1.plot: Esteban and his companions escape from Pizarro, but their fabulous ship, the Solaris, is taken by Gaspard and Gomez. They offer to exchange the ship for Zia, and her secret. Trying to save Zia, and the friendly Inca people in the village, Tao blows up Gomez's ship, but sadly the Solaris is also destroyed.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E10 - Secret of the Temple
1.plot: Esteban and his friends are on their way to Zia's village, when they are surrounded by Spanish soldiers. The children manage to escape, and take refuge in an underground temple, where they meet the old priest, Pasha. To help them escape, the priest melts the pillar of ice that supports the temple roof, and it crashes down on top of him. The others just manage to get away.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E11 - Messengers of the Region
1.plot: Gomez captures the children and forces Zia to reveal the secret of the Golden Quipu. It is an Inca message which reveals that the Cities of Gold lie beyond the High Mountain Peak. In the night, Esteban and the children escape. They find a secret underground passage and set off for the High Peak.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E12 - Secret of the Medallions
1.plot: The Spanish army follow Esteban and his friends to the Fort of the Black Eagle. Under cover of darkness, the Spaniards attack the fort, but Tao devises a rocket flare that repels the attackers, saving the fort. The three children leave the fort and at last reach the City of the High Peak, whose chief, Kraka, tells them that the medallions Esteban and Zia wear can open the doors of Sela, one of the Cities of Gold.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E13 - Mystery of the Parents
1.plot: When Esteban arrives at the place called the High Peak, he meets an old man, Mayuka, who seems to know something about his parents.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E14 - Esteban's Medallions
1.plot: Mendoza steals the Spanish army's cannon in order to win the trust of the Indians, but his plan fails. As the three Spaniards are about to be executed, Esteban comes to save them. But he demands that Mendoza give him back the sun section of his gold medallion.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E15 - The Subterranean Secret
1.plot: Gomez and his soldiers attack the Fort of the Black Eagle to try to recapture the cannon Mendoza had stolen. Mendoza uses the cannon to fight back, but cannot stop the Spanish army who storm the fort and drive the Incas out. Esteban, Tao and Zia run away towards the High Peak, following secret underground passages constructed by the Incas.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E16 - The Urubus
1.plot: Searching for the Cities of Gold, Esteban and his friends cross a high plateau up in the Andes. Near Lake Titicaca, they are attacked by the Urubus, a tribe of giants. Tao invents a submarine, and they capture Karuga, chief of the tribe, and hold him prisoner. Karuga tells them that there's a City of Gold on a mountain, guarded by the earth goddess, Pachamama.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E17 - The Great Condor
1.plot: The setting sunlight leads Esteban and his friends to the statue of the earth goddess, Pachamama. The legend goes that when Pachamama takes the sun in her arms, the Gates to the Cities of Gold will open. Estaban and Zia place their medallions in the statue and the mountain opens up to reveal the first City of Gold. Inside they discover a great bird, made of solid gold.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E18 - Maiden Flight of the Condor
1.plot: Inside the first City of Gold, Esteban finds a great Golden Condor. When the volcano on which the Cities are built begins to erupt, the Cities are destroyed. Sheltering inside the body of the Condor, they try to make its mechanism work, using the Medallion of the Sun. Suddenly, the giant bird spreads its wings and takes flight.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E19 - The Nasca Plateau
1.plot: The great Golden Condor, carrying Esteban and his friends away from Pachamama and the erupting volcano, lands in the desert at Nazca. But when Pizarro and his soldiers arrive, Esteban makes sure everyone escapes.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E20 - The Spaniards' Cannon
1.plot: The Golden Condor carries Esteban and his companions to the High Peak, where they encounter the Spanish forces, armed with their cannon. With the help of the Golden Condor, they stop Gomez and Gaspard. And when they had saved their friends, they leave the High Peak, in search of the land of the Mayas.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E21 - The Amazons
1.plot: The group head for the land of the Mayas, on board the Golden Condor, when they are forced to land in the jungle. They are captured by Amazon warriors and taken to their temple, to be sacrificed to the Rain God. But Esteban uses his special powers, and the sun comes out. The Queen is so impressed by his power to command the sun, that she orders their release.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E22 - The Mirror of the Moon
1.plot: Esteban and his friends on board the Golden Condor have to make a forced landing in the jungle, where they're captured by Amazon warriors who want to sacrifice them to their Rain God. After some difficulties, they manage to escape from this dangerous situation. And in the end, the Queen of the Amazons allows them to leave for the land of the Mayas.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E23 - The Jade Mask
1.plot: In the jungle, Esteban and his friends discover some ruins, deserted temples and pyramids. In one of the temples, Pedro and Sancho try to remove a jade mask from the wall when the mask begins to glow. Suddenly the stone beams shoot out of the walls, ceiling and floor and trip them up.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E24 - The Manuscript
1.plot: After solving the secret of the green jade mask, Esteban and his friends find a manuscript which seems to hold the key to the whereabouts of the Cities of Gold. But almost immediately, they are captured by Doctor Fernando Laguerra and his friend, Marinche, who are also searching for the Cities of Gold. However, Kokapetl manages to rescue them all.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E25 - The Lake of Gold
1.plot: Esteban and his friends are captured by Indians who wanted to sacrifice them to purify their sacred lake of gold. Marinche and Doctor Laguerra try to poison the lake so they could get at all the treasure on the bottom. Mendoza foils their plan by breaking through the dam, flooding the village and allowing the children to escape.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E26 - The Swamps
1.plot: The Serpent God of the Mayas was said to have crossed the mountains to build a new city in the east, among the swamps of the Rain God. Setting out to find this second city, Esteban and his friends are tricked by Marinche, and find themselves fighting the alligators in the marshes. After a savage battle, they escape to the other side of the swamp.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E27 - The Doors of Night
1.plot: Esteban and his friends find the second City of Gold, but they are captured by Marinche and the Doctor. The Doctor finds a new manuscript, but is caught in a trap set into the floor of the temple. The children get the manuscript which tells of a third city, to be found near a forest of statues.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E28 - The Forest of Statues
1.plot: After much travelling and many adventures, Esteban and his friends finally discover the third temple built deep inside an enormous cave. A golden statue is holding a third manuscript which mentions a mountain known as "The Burning Shield".

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E29 - The Burning Shield
1.plot: Having found the Burning Shield, Esteban and his friends fall into the hands of the mysterious Olmecs, who possess very advanced technology. They escape from them, but are captured again. So what will happen to them now?

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E30 - The Escape
1.plot: Using their advanced technology, the Olmecs are able to collect energy from the heat of the sun, and from deep inside the Earth. They capture Esteban, Tao and Zia, intent on transplanting their cells to regenerate their elders, so they can become young again. With Mendoza's help, the children manage to escape.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E31 - The Village of the New Sun
1.plot: Esteban and his friends are guests at the Village of the New Sun. But the Olmecs have found the Golden Condor, and prepare to attack the village, with the help of the Doctor and Marinche, who mean to steal the great golden bird for themselves. Meanwhile, Myena discovers that Papacamayo, the old chief, is really Zia's father.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E32 - Attack of the Olmecs
1.plot: With the help of Gomez and Gaspard, Esteban and his friends succeed in getting the Golden Condor to fly. But the Olmecs find the Indian Village of the New Sun, and mount a fierce attack. With the help of the Golden Condor, they are defeated. But Zia's father, Papacamayo, has been seriously wounded.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E33 - The Reunion
1.plot: In the Indian Village of the New Sun, Zia at last finds her father, Papacamayo. But her happiness is short-lived, when he dies from his wounds, after defending the village against an attack by the Olmecs. All the Mayan tribes unite to fight against the Olmecs.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E34 - Revolt of the Mayas
1.plot: The Mayan people arm themselves and attack the Olmecs, who have been tyrannising them for years. A fierce battle takes place near the entrance to the Olmec base. From the Golden Condor, Esteban and the other children bombard the Olmecs with stones, turning the tide of the battle in favour of the Mayas.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E35 - The Olmec Machine
1.plot: Esteban and his friends manage to find their way into the Olmec base. But Kalmec discovers them, and takes Zia prisoner. Suddenly, a gigantic war machine rushes up from deep inside the Olmec underground temple.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E36 - Aerial Pursuit
1.plot: Esteban flies the Golden Condor against the terrible Olmec war machine, to try to rescue Zia. Tao and Esteban manage to leap onto the machine in mid-air, and Zia is saved. But Tao is left behind, a prisoner.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E37 - The City of Gold
1.plot: With Tao as a hostage, the Olmecs force Esteban and Zia to use their medallions to open the doors to the City of Gold.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E38 - The Great Legacy
1.plot: After wounding the High Priest of the Cities of Gold, Kalmec steals the Great Treasure, a concentrated source of the sun's power also called the Sun Power Unit. However, the security systems of the City are activated and destroy the Olmecs' flying machine. Kalmec and Menator make their way back to their base, taking the Great Treasure with them.

1.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S01E39 - End of the City of Gold
1.plot: The Olmecs place the Sun Power Unit at the bottom of their sunlight collecting crystal and activate it. However, the unit does not behave as expected and the Sun Power Unit begins to overheat. The High Priest of the Cities of Gold, who turns out to be Esteban's father, tries to shut it down using Tao's jar which is actually a control unit. But he could be too late.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E01 - Back in Barcelona (1)
2.plot: Six months after their adventures in South America, Esteban, Zia and all the team are back in Barcelona. There, the mysterious Zarès put in jail Mendoza, Sancho and Pedro. But Esteban, Zia and Tao will succeed to help them to escape.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E02 - Back in Barcelona (2)
2.plot: Esteban has disappeared the morning after Mendoza told him the truth about his father. Thanks to Pichu, his friends follow his traces to find him.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E03 - The Secret of the Drum
2.plot: After a long journey, our heroes arrive in the south of China and settle in the region of Guilin. Here, they make the acquaintance of a young Chinese boy called Zhi and his Panda, Yang-Yang who welcome them to their village during the ceremony of the Dragon.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E04 - In the Hands of Pirates
2.plot: Our heroes try to escape the pirates but Esteban and Tao are captured and taken to the pirate camp.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E05 - The Alchemist
2.plot: Will our heroes be able to escape the jaws of Pang-Li's alligator?

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E06 - All Aboard!
2.plot: The pirates attack Ambrosius' ship that transforms itself into an incredible flying Nave!

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E07 - Shaolin
2.plot: On the way to Peking, our heroes find refuge in a Shaolin temple. Mendoza, hurt during a fight, is taken care of by the Great Master. At nightfall, someone sneaks in to leave a venomous snake.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E08 - Treason
2.plot: Our heroes discover that the monk, Tian Li, is able to decipher ancient Chinese similar to that on Ambrosius' book. Tao and Esteban set off to go get the precious text in The Condor.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E09 - The Prophecy
2.plot: After thwarting the attack of The Red Scarves and discovering the treachery of Bao Xing-Ji, our heroes take off for Peking. They must find Ambrosius and get on to the trail of The Yellow Dragon.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E10 - The Black Pearl
2.plot: Learning where the yellow dragon can be found, Mendoza and Ambrosius go off in search of a temple. Meanwhile, the children meet with Mei Li, a young Chinese girl who shows them around Peking.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E11 - In Search of the Yellow Dragon
2.plot: Thanks to Yu Chunhe, the high priest of the Taoist temple, our heroes find the famous Yellow Dragon. Unfortunately, a man who has been spying on them since their arrival, steals the precious Dragon.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E12 - In the Forbidden City
2.plot: While pursuing the man who stole the Yellow Dragon, Esteban finds himself stuck inside the Forbidden City and must pass himself off as the Imperial Prince!

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E13 - Like a Prince
2.plot: Hiding in the Imperial Palace, Esteban finally manages to recover the Yellow Dragon. Tao and Ambrosius concoct a Plan B to help him escape from the Forbidden City.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E14 - The Escape
2.plot: Esteban flees the Forbidden City with the Yellow Dragon thanks to the help of his friends aboard the ship of Ambrosius.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E15 - The Stomach of Buddha
2.plot: While in search of Li Shuang, a friend of Esteban's father, our heroes are separated in a violent sandstorm: Zia is taken away by a young Mongol, Esteban and Tao are imprisoned by Chinese guards.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E16 - The Labyrinth
2.plot: Li Shuang leads our heroes into a secret passage to the Stomach of Buddha. Thanks to their medallions, Esteban and Zia discover an incredible metal labyrinth, whose walls are closing in on them.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E17 - The Sleeping Garden
2.plot: Inside the Stomach of Buddha our young heroes discover an extraordinary lab in which the Yellow Dragon has been charged with energy. While rescuing Tao from a crater, Esteban gets stung by a scorpion.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E18 - The Son of the Sun
2.plot: Stuck inside the Stomach of Buddha, Zia has saved Esteban who was stung by a scorpion. Meanwhile, the grown ups, guided by Ambrosius' compass, explode a hole into the ground to help them escape.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E19 - The Oasis
2.plot: The Pyramid of Mu has put our heroes on to the trail of a fresco depicting The Eyes That See All, near an oasis in the desert. But Zares is there too, and attempts to do away with Mendoza.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E20 - The Fresco of the Evil Eyes
2.plot: While searching for The Eyes That See All in the ruins of a cursed temple, our heroes are attacked by Zares who lashes out on Mendoza, Sancho, and Pedro.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E21 - The Separation
2.plot: After Ambrosius set them free, our heroes learn that the fresco is a copy of The Eyes That See All located in Tibet.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E22 - The Fire of the Dragon
2.plot: At the location of The Eyes That See All, the Yellow Dragon ignited a path of fire to the top of a Himalayan mountain. Back on the ship, Ambrosius and the children notice somebody has come onboard.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E23 - The Expedition
2.plot: In the Himalayas, our heroes discover a frozen Olmec holding a strange map. They meet Lian Li again, who has come to forewarn them of a great danger.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E24 - The Nest of the Condor
2.plot: Our young heroes and Ambrosius have managed to enter the second City of Gold. Esteban and Zia receive a message delivered by holograms of The Sages of Mu and Atlantis.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E25 - The Revelation
2.plot: Our heroes have escaped The City as it was closing in upon itself. So has Ambrosius, who has stolen a matrix of olishark from the City of Gold.

2.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S02E26 - Face To Face
2.plot: Back in the village, the children happily reunite with Ambrosius. Mendoza reveals to Esteban that his father is alive and waiting for him. Esteban meets with his father, but their reunion is cut short.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E01 - Kagoshima
3.plot: After leaving China under the threat of Zares, our heroes finally arrive in Japan. They must absolutely find there the third City of Gold against which the infamous Zarès promises to release Athanaos, the father of Esteban.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E02 - The Daimyo Shimadzu
3.plot: The one who attacks Esteban, Tao and Zia is Yoshi, an old man who keeps fiercely the impressive Orichalcum sphere. Yoshi reveals to the children that it is a utsuro bune, a sacred object, rejected by the sea thousands of years ago and revered since as a gift of the gods.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E03 - The Golden Bird
3.plot: Using his gift to make the sun reappear, Esteban allows Zia to take off the Condor. Under the astonished eyes of Yoshi, the immense golden bird finally emerges from the waves. Mendoza, Sancho and Pedro manage to escape from the castle.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E04 - The Anger Of Nao No Kami
3.plot: Near the temple of Izumo, the children succeed in extracting Esteban from the water, but attract the attention of one of the guards who go after them. Within the walls of the temple, our heroes finally see the mirror shield out for the parade, but an earthquake creates panic!

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E05 - The Mirror-Shield
3.plot: Inside the temple, the shield-mirror leaves the children perplexed: according to the silhouette in the utsuro bune, it is the path and the key to the next golden city. They realize then that the ornaments of the mirror represent a volcano, off Kagoshima. Will the city be underneath?

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E06 - The Return Of Zares
3.plot: At night, as Ichiro goes to take his guard duty at the castle, Esteban follows him and tries to convince him to help him to escape Mendoza and his men. Ichiro refuses, reminding Esteban how his presence and those of his friends already endangers his whole family.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E07 - The Sword of the Samurai
3.plot: Mendoza and his men takes control of the nave and makes the prisoners Gaspard and Ambrosius. They spot the Condor and rediscover the children who introduce Yoshi and his family.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E08 - Unmasked
3.plot: Mendoza narrowly escapes the attack of Ambrosius. The latter claims that it was Mendoza who assaulted him, but he loses his compass, which Esteban picks up and tends to him by reflex.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E09 - The Thallios
3.plot: In the center of the cave, at the top of a pyramid, our heroes discover a sphere of orichalque floating on a lake. Attacked by thousands of giant crabs, they manage to take refuge inside.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E10 - Sundagatt
3.plot: In the treasure chamber of the Golden City, the crowns found by our heroes allow the wearer to control the orichalc cubes by thought. As he goes to look for Tao in the Thallios to show him their discovery, Estéban passes by the statue: he seizes the crystal pearl.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E11 - The Shadows of the Jungle
3.plot: Zarès managed to escape with the crown and the crystal pearl. Aboard the Condor, Esteban explains his plan to his friends. He arranged for Zarès to take the crystal pearl that had guided the Thallios to the golden city.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E12 - The Memorial Temple
3.plot: The mysterious pursuers turn out to be children whose parents were abducted by the men of Ambrosius to work forcibly at the Fort of Pattala. When they learn that our heroes are not friends of Ambrosius and that Esteban's father is also a prisoner, they decide to unite their strength to deliver them all.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E13 - Laguerra
3.plot: At the fort of Pattala, Esteban was spotted by Ambrosius. When escaping, he sees his father in a cell but must flee because he is persecuted by Laguerra, the right arm of Ambrosius, and the guards of the palace.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E14 - The Order of the Hourglass
3.plot: Tao is now in the hands of Ambrosius. The latter tries to return to his good graces, but Tao sees him as a traitor and refuses to give him his confidence. However, Tao discovers the laboratory of Ambrosius and is impressed by all that it reveals to him.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E15 - Ambrosius' Secret
3.plot: According to the plans of Ambrosius, Laguerra and the soldiers find only a deserted village. Laguerra spotted the children hidden in the trees. She hesitates, but does not denounce them and leaves without saying anything with her men in direction of the fort.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E16 - The Black Suns
3.plot: While in the village, the children try to repair the Condor, Pichu sent by Tao finds them and deliver them a message from Atanaos. He reveals that the Rajah was drugged by Ambrosius.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E17 - Free!
3.plot: The fort is taken by assault from all sides: the villagers, Tao and Atanaos are freed. Esteban manages to inject the antidote to the Raja who regains his spirits and realizes the betrayal of Ambrosius. To escape the soldiers of the Rajah, Ambrosius uses the black suns that trigger a fire in the fort.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E18 - Hormuz
3.plot: Esteban spends his own time with his father Athanaos finally found. This one reveals to him well to know Ambrosius, to have been his friend when they were young. For their part, Zia and Tao discover in the Memory Temple a key clue in the search for the fourth golden city.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E19 - A New Beginning
3.plot: Our heroes are surrounded by a troop of Bedouins. Their intrigued chief observed the medallion and then returned it to Zia apologizing for the young thief: a Bedouin never flies. When the children leave, he asks the young boy to follow them to find out what they are doing in Ormuz.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E20 - The Mountain of the Moon
3.plot: On board the condor, Esteban is worried about what happened to Mendoza and his men, but his friends remind him that Mendoza is resourceful and their priority is to prevent Ambrosius from appropriating the muen knowledge and make it Weapons of war like the black suns.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E21 - Up Is The Way Down
3.plot: The children finally managed to penetrate inside the ziggurat. They start their descent in search of the sacred sails of Princess Rana'Ori in the bowels of the pyramid, where, according to the inscription discovered in India, they should be found.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E22 - The Lord of the Desert
3.plot: Zarès aided by Laguerra captures the children and pushes them towards the exit, revealing to them that he possesses, anyway, another track towards the fourth city of gold. They just need them and their medallions to open it.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E23 - The Veils Of Rana'Ori
3.plot: In the desert, the suspected noises heard are produced by none other than Sancho and Pedro lost in the dunes. They finally found their friend Mendoza. In Manfuha, the children try to leave the oasis to reach the Condor, but the compass they steal from Zarès detects something.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E24 - The Chaldean Desert
3.plot: The children reach Condor thanks to Laguerra who confronts the soldiers alone at the risk of his life. Despite the reluctance of Tao, our heroes return to collect it and make it climb aboard. Under the fire of the defensive guns of the fort, they managed with the Condor to recover the box containing the sails.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E25 - The Serpent and the Lion
3.plot: The Bedouin chief presents to the children the second veil they were looking for, transmitted from generation to generation by the Chaldis tribe. They try to read a plan to the city of gold, but the sails do not reveal anything.

3.title: FR - Les Mystérieuses Cités d'or - S03E26 - Kumlar
3.plot: On board the nave, Laguerra prevented Gaspard from killing Mendoza, arguing that Mendoza would be more useful to their living plan than dead. The children enter the city in search of the tomb of Princess Rana'Ori, but the sumptuous city seems deserted.

meta.plot: Le XVIe siècle. Des quatre coins de l'Europe, de gigantesques voiliers partent à la conquête du Nouveau Monde. À bord de ces navires, des hommes avides de rêves, d'aventure et d'espace, à la recherche de fortune. Qui n'a jamais rêvé de ces mondes souterrains, de ces mers lointaines peuplées de légendes ou d'une richesse soudaine qui se conquérait au détour d'un chemin de la Cordillère des Andes ? Qui n'a jamais souhaité voir le soleil souverain guider ses pas, au cœur du pays Inca, vers la richesse et l'histoire des mystérieuses cités d'or ?

Les Baby Looney Tunes sont adorables et vivent tous ensemble dans une grande maison victorienne sous l'oeil bienveillant de Mémé. Baby Bugs prend son rôle de chef de bande très à coeur. Il veille sur ses amis Baby Titi et Baby Grosminet, dont la tendresse laisse cependant présager d'un avenir des plus agités.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E01 - Taz in Toyland
1.plot: When Taz keeps breaking most of his toys, Granny gives him a new one. When he thinks he broke it Granny says thats the toys job.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E02 - A Secret Tweet
1.plot: Granny plans a surprised birthday party for Tweety. Tweety thinks everybody doesn't like him then he searches for the answer.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E03 - Comfort Level
1.plot: Sylvester looses his blanket and the gang helps him look for it.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E04 - Like a Duck to Water
1.plot: Granny gives the babies a swimmimg lesson. Daffy is afraid to swim because the pool is to big.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E05 - School Daze
1.plot: The babies want to go to school but granny doesn't let them. So then they decide to play school at home and they practice things such as: going on the bus, crossing the street, fire drills, and other things.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E06 - Things That Go Bugs in the Night
1.plot: The babies are startled when they hear noises in the nite and learn that hings are not always as the appear or sound.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E07 - The Creature from the Chocolate Chip
1.plot: Sylvester eats all of Grannys cookies and when he realizes what he did he asks the babies for help to make up a cookie eating monster to blame.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E08 - Card Bored Box
1.plot: When it rains, the babies make use out of a box to play with.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E09 - Time and Time Again
1.plot: Granny gives the babies lesons on how to tell time. Daffy thinks he doesn't need a lesson and skips it.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E10 - May the Best Taz Win
1.plot: Bugs & Daffy fight over who gets Lola on there team to play tennis. Lola chooses Bugs team and Daffy is stuck with Taz on his team.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E11 - Mine!
1.plot: Daffy learns a lesson when he finds a purse filled with money.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E12 - Sylvester the Pester
1.plot: An attention starved Sylvester wont let Granny have any time to herself.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E13 - Cat-Taz-Trophy
1.plot: The babies play race cars to win a cookie trophy prize. Taz & Sylvester win the race.
