1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E14 - Duck! Monster! Duck!
1.plot: Daffy tells the babies a scary story. When they go to bed he starts scaring all of them.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E15 - The Brave Little Tweety
1.plot: The babies make Tweety brave so he won't be so scared at things.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E16 - The Puddle Olympics
1.plot: The babies take turns jumping over a puddle, but it turns out Sylvester is afraid of water.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E17 - A Lot Like Lola
1.plot: Lola wants everyone to be like her. But when they act like her, she gets mad.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E18 - Mother's Day Madness
1.plot: The babies compete to see who can make the best mothers day card.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E19 - Takers Keepers
1.plot: Daffy steals Taz's favorite toy. But he soon learns a lesson that he can't take everything he wants

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E20 - To Tell the Tooth
1.plot: When Bugs looses a tooth, Daffy tries to figure out a way to scam the Tooth Fairy.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E21 - Spinout
1.plot: Taz loses his ability to spin and the babies help him learn again.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E22 - Snow Day
1.plot: The babies experience their first snowfall.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E23 - Shadow of a Doubt
1.plot: Tweety sheds some light on what a shadow is.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E24 - Christmas in July
1.plot: The babies pretend its Christmas so Lola will get the stethoscope she wants.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E25 - Bruce Bunny
1.plot: When Daffy makes up hurtful rhymes, Bugs changes his name to Bruce.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E26 - Leader of the Pack
1.plot: Daffy starts a secret password club for everyone except Bugs.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E27 - Flower Power
1.plot: The babies all want to pick the best flowers for Granny, but end up destroying her garden.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E28 - Lightning Bugs Sylvester
1.plot: Sylvester learns to overcome his fear of lightning.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E29 - Flush Hour
1.plot: The babies are afraid of the toilet, and don't know what it's for until they flood it and soon find out that it's an alternative to diapers.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E30 - I Strain
1.plot: Petunia can't stop watching TV.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E31 - The Sandman Is Coming
1.plot: Granny tells the babies about the Sandman coming and putting the sand in their eyes while sleeping. Daffy gets scared and stays up all night.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E32 - Some Assembly Required
1.plot: Bugs orders a toy but he has to put it together and he can't. So the babies help him.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E33 - All Washed Up
1.plot: When Granny asks the babies to take a bath, Taz doesn't want to. So the babies try to make Taz take a bath so they can have play time.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E34 - Did Not! Did Too!
1.plot: Frustrated that more of the Baby Looney Tunes regard Baby Bugs as the leader than her, Baby Lola challenges Baby Bugs to a winner-take-all match. At stake is leadership of the group!  Two strong personalities end up working together rather than in conflict.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E35 - Tea & Basketball
1.plot: Sylvester wants to play Tea Party and Lola wants to play Basketball with the boys but neither of them can't because Tea parties are for girls and Basketball is for boys. So Sylvester fakes an injury for him to play tea party and Lola to play basketball.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E36 - Taz You Like It
1.plot: When no one wants to play with Taz, he starts faking accidents like falling down to make the babies like him and spend time with him.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E37 - Band Together
1.plot: The babies hear Granny play her favourite music so they form a symphony.

1.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S01E38 - War of the Weirds
1.plot: Marvin the Martian pays a visit to the babies, but no one likes him so Taz befriends Marvin to make him feel welcome. Then everyone else feels the same.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E01 - These Little Piggies Went to Market
2.plot: The babies are going with Floyd to help with the shopping at the supermarket. They go crazy over their favourite foods and mess up the place, even Bugs.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E02 - Now Museum, Now You Don't
2.plot: The babies are going with Floyd to the art museum. Everyone save Daffy is fascinated by the artworks a lot more than Floyd expected and Daffy picks up his own interest

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E03 - Take Us Out to the Ballgame
2.plot: Floyd takes the babies to the stadium to watch the baseball game, supporting the Roosters Team. The tables turn for the Roosters when Wingouski does a home run.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E04 - Clues Encounters of the Tweety Kind
2.plot: Floyd takes the babies to the museum for a scavenger hunt, Sylvester's team competing against Daffy team and Tweety as a neutral friend wins the hunt.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E05 - A Bully for Bugs
2.plot: Bugs is taken advantage of by Elmer Fudd and is too afraid to tell. The babies resort to befriending instead of payback.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E06 - The Wheel Deal
2.plot: The babies go out bike riding while Tweety rides with Floyd not amused from the lack of fun until the others customise a bike for him.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E07 - Oh Brother, Warehouse Art Thou?
2.plot: After Daffy accidentally breaks Granny's chair, Floyd takes everyone to buy a new one, while Sylvester protests the idea of replacing it until the others show him how to stick with what's coming.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E08 - Flu the Coop
2.plot: Granny takes the babies to the hospital for their flu shots, but Bugs and Daffy manage to elude their turn for a shot. In getting ill, Bugs and Daffy miss all the fun the others have.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E09 - Blast Off Bugs
2.plot: Floyd takes the babies to the museum, whilst Bugs dream on flying to the moon is shattered until, Taz gets them all tangled in the space experience zone.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E10 - Baby Brouhaha
2.plot: Bugs thinks Granny is having a baby and the others are convinced by Daffy's make-believe theory on where babies come from and a guidebook on baby care. As everyone prepares by practicing on Tweety, the baby turns out to be a hamster.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E11 - Log Cabin Fever
2.plot: With the babies squabbling over gadgets, Granny decides to take them to a 17th Century farm, where everything is done manually. However Bugs and Daffy are sneakily playing a game pod until they break it.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E12 - A Mid-Autumn Night's Scream
2.plot: The babies dress up for Halloween, while Lola, Melissa and Petunia end up with ridiculous costumes. Three Martian Birds accompany them on their trick or treating while Sylvester braves Hilltop Manor. The three girls win in the costume contest for originality.

2.title: FR - Les Bébés Looney Tunes - S02E13 - Are We There Yet
2.plot: Floyd takes the babies on a long journey to the Acme Garlic Festival. All the while they try to pass the time giving Floyd a tiresome time. Floyd's car breaks down and they miss the festival but they get some garlic souvenirs.

1.title: FR - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Black Panther: Trouble in Wakanda - S01E01 -
FR - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Black Panther: Trouble in Wakanda - S01E02 -
FR - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Black Panther: Trouble in Wakanda - S01E03 -
FR - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Black Panther: Trouble in Wakanda - S01E04 -
FR - LEGO Marvel Super Heroes - Black Panther: Trouble in Wakanda - S01E05 -
FR - LEGO: Jurassic World - Legend of Isla Nublar - S01E01 - Mission: Critical!
1.plot: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerialtram… and a salivating T-Rex!

1.title: FR - LEGO: Jurassic World - Legend of Isla Nublar - S01E02 - Stampede!
1.plot: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

meta.plot: Set in 2012, three years before the Jurassic World movie, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing team up on Isla Nublar to deal with everything the Jurassic World park throws their way, including a mysterious saboteur who wants to destroy the park forever!

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E01 - Road to Knowhere
1.plot: The newly-christened Guardians of the Galaxy come into possession of a dangerous artifact that has Thanos’ new lieutenant, Korath, after them.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E02 - Knowhere to Run
1.plot: The Guardians struggle to subdue the suddenly-sprung-to-life Celestial head that is the Knowhere space colony, as well as storm Korath’s ship to rescue Quill, Gamora and the mysterious CryptoCube that holds the Cosmic Seed.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E03 - One in a Million You
1.plot: Feeling underappreciated, Rocket accepts an offer to work for The Collector, only to realize his “job” is working as another prisoner in The Collector’s collection.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E04 - Take the Milano and Run
1.plot: The Guardians crash land on a space station run by the Grandmaster, who schemes to get Drax back in the gladiatorial arena to battle his ultimate opponent: Gamora.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E05 - Can't Fight This Seedling
1.plot: When Groot is infected by a parasitic fungus, the Guardians must embark on a perilous journey in order to save him.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E06 - Undercover Angle
1.plot: Caught red-handed by Titus, the Guardians are coerced into infiltrating a notorious gang of weapons dealers known as the Black Order.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E07 - The Backstabbers
1.plot: Quill gets mixed up in a game of deceit when Gamora tries to pit her siblings, Nebula and Korath, against each other.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E08 - Hitchin' a Ride
1.plot: Peter Quill is Star-Lord, the brash adventurer who, to save the universe from its greatest threats, joins forces with a quartet of disparate misfits â€” fan-favorite Rocket Raccoon, a tree-like humanoid named Groot, the enigmatic, expert fighter Gamora and the rough edged warrior Drax the Destroyer.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E09 - We Are Family
1.plot: Rocket is abducted and taken back to his home planet, Half World.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E10 - Bad Moon Rising
1.plot: The Guardians encounter a living planet that's fallen under the control of a revived Ronan.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E11 - Space Cowboys
1.plot: The Guardians get caught up in a rivalry between The Collector and The Grandmaster.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E12 - Crystal Blue Persuasion
1.plot: The Guardians must help save the City of Attilan from Ronan.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E13 - Stuck in the Metal with You
1.plot: The Guardians find the Asgardian Destroyer Armor that leads to an epic battle pitting the Detroyer Armor against Drax the Destroyer.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E14 - Don't Stop Believin'
1.plot: Quill goes missing while following the Cryptocube's readings.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E15 - Accidents Will Happen
1.plot: The Guardians must stop Ronan's plan to blow up the Kree Supreme Intelligence.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E16 - We Are the World Tree
1.plot: In search of the Cosmic Seed, the Guardians unexpectedly find themselves in Asgard where they must outwit Thor and Angela in order to discover the seed's origins.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E17 - Come and Gut Your Love
1.plot: Following a falling out with his father, Star-Lord finds a ship containing the A.I. Rora as he takes it off of Spartax with the Drax the Destroyer and Groot providing a diversion for the Spartax Royal Guards. Afterwards, the Guardians of the Galaxy have to deal with Lucy and Supergiant who are jilted that Star-Lord is the Prince of Sparta.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E18 - Asgard War (1): Lightnin' Strikes
1.plot: When Asgard attacks Spartax, Quill and the Guardians become caught in the middle trying to expose the deception behind the conflict.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E19 - Asgard War (2): Rescue Me
1.plot: The Guardians and Asgardians team up to rescue Quill from Thanos.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E20 - Fox on the Run
1.plot: Gamora attempts to make amends for her past misdeeds only to find herself in a deadly trap set by Nebula, Ronan and the Grandmaster.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E21 - Inhuman Touch
1.plot: The Guardians pay the Inhumans a visit to learn more about the Cosmic Seed.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E22 - Welcome Back
1.plot: The Guardians discover that the Cosmic Seed is back on Earth. In the company of Cosmo, Star-Lord returns to his hometown where he runs into his childhood bully Michael Coogan who is now the sheriff. Now Star-Lord and the Guardians of the Galaxy must find the Cosmic Seed before Korath the Pursuer does.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E23 - I've Been Searching So Long
1.plot: When the Guardians of the Galaxy's search for the Cosmic Seed continues on Earth, Star-Lord contacts Gorgon where he gets the location of the former site of Attilan. While checking out the area, Rocket Raccoon, Groot, and Drax the Destroyer have visions of the Cosmic Seed energy helping them out like Rocket Raccoon's family being re-evolved, Groot being able to restore the Flora colossi, and Drax the Destroyer being able to see his family again. Even after fighting their way past the Cosmic Seed-enhanced worms and spiders, the Guardians of the Galaxy must keep Ronan the Accuser and Nebula from getting the box containing the Cosmic Seed.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E24 - I Feel the Earth Move
1.plot: Now that Thanos has the Cosmic Seed, he takes control of the Earth and molds it into his personal planetary weapon of mass destruction. The Guardians of the Galaxy must work to reclaim the Cosmic Seed from Thanos even when Ronan the Accuser and Nebula plan to dispose of Thanos with plans of having the Earth be destroyed alongside him.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E25 - Won't Get Fooled Again
1.plot: The Guardians discover that Yondu has been impersonating them in order to con unsuspecting victims.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S01E26 - Jingle Bell Rock
1.plot: The team stages a Christmas Carol inspired con-job in order to frighten a despot out of his ill-gotten riches and free his enslaved people.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E01 - Stayin' Alive
2.plot: While trying to dispose of Thanos' asteroid, the Guardians discover it has been taken to a secure facility that belongs to the Avengers.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E02 - Evolution Rock
2.plot: The Guardians and the Avengers team up to find out what powerful secrets lie inside Thanos' asteroid.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E03 - Lyin' Eyes
2.plot: When Rocket and Drax wake up with absolutely no memory of the night before, the Guardians must piece together their adventures.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E04 - Free Bird
2.plot: While the Guardians search for the missing sarcophagus, Groot finds a mysterious egg and does everything in his power to protect it.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E05 - Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
2.plot: When the Guardians are charged with escorting the young and rebellious Rigellian Princess Tana back home, Drax's hardened heart melts as he is reminded of his own daughter.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E06 - Black Helmet Woman
2.plot: After being infused with incredible power from a Nova Helmet, Gamora leads the Guardians and her sister Nebula on a mission to infiltrate the Believer flagship.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E07 - Right Place, Wrong Time
2.plot: Quill and Gamora battle the High Evolutionary, his minion hybrids and a teleport-hijacking Nebula.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E08 - Me and You and a Dog Named Cosmo
2.plot: Cosmo goes undercover on the Believer Flagship but loses his powers when his cover is blown.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E09 - Can't Get It Out Of My Head
2.plot: When the Believer Flagship embeds itself in Knowhere's brain, it causes a planetoid-wide telekinetic zombie outbreak.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E10 - Rock Your Baby
2.plot: When the cocoon opens and reveals a baby warlock inside, the Guardians have to step in to be a positive guiding force to keep his powers in check.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E11 - Symbiote War (1): Wild World
2.plot: The Guardians discover Groot's homeworld, Planet X, has been overrun by Symbiotes who will stop at nothing to get Groot's restarted World Pod for themselves to conquer the galaxy.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E12 - Symbiote War (2): I Will Survive
2.plot: As a comet covered in Symbiotes hurls toward Spartax, the Guardians must team up with Quill's sister to save the planet.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E13 - Symbiote War (3): Thunder Road
2.plot: When the Symbiotes escape to Asgard and venomize Thor, Odin and the other Asgardians, it is up to the Guardians to save them, the World Tree and all of existence.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E14 - Back in Black
2.plot: The Guardians meet Sam Alexander, an Earth teen experimenting with his father’s Nova helmet, but the Guardians aren’t the only ones who know of the helmet’s power.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E15 - Knights in Black Helmets
2.plot: The Guardians chase after J’son and Mantis as they try to manipulate Sam to do their bidding by promising him clues to the location of his missing father.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E16 - Nova Me, Nova You
2.plot: When the Nova Corps catch up with the Guardians and Sam, the fight reaches Sam’s hometown.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E17 - Mr. Roboto
2.plot: Searching for a weapon strong enough to match J’son, the Guardians seek out master boom-maker Ja Kyee.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E18 - Destroyer
2.plot: When the guardians travel to Drax's home planet in hopes of summoning Warlock, they discover Xeron seeks to destroy Adam and Drax's homecoming, which becomes a fight to protect his friends.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E19 - You Can't Always Get What You Want
2.plot: Rocket and Warlock travel to Halfworld to try and re-evolve Rocket's family.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E20 - I've Seen All Good People
2.plot: Gamora trains Warlock to be a strong and powerful warrior like herself. But when Gamora’s lessons become too intense, Warlock clams up and gets kidnapped by the Collector.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E21 - Another One Bites the Dust
2.plot: When Quill and Warlock are hunted by J'son and the Black Order, Quill teaches Warlock the importance of never letting himself slip into the path of evil.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E22 - It's Tricky
2.plot: During the Xandrian Feast of the Three Grinning Moons, the Guardians must pull a reverse heist by planting a dangerous weapon inside a Nova Corps vault.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E23 - You're No Good
2.plot: Warlock has gone dark! By absorbing J’son into his gem, Warlock has become Dark Warlock (Magus) with his sights set on conquering the galaxy, starting with Spartax.

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E24 - Behind Gold Eyes
2.plot: The Guardians and Nova battle Dark Warlock (Magus) and J’son on Planet Y. Can our heroes save their friend Warlock and the universe before it’s too late?

2.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S02E25 - Unfortunate Son
2.plot: In order to save the Guardians from the ruthless asteroid Korvac, Quill must bust J'Son out of prison on Spartax and in the process he sees a new side of his father.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E01 - Mission: Breakout
3.plot: The Guardians must work together to escape the elaborate prisons created for them by The Collector.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E02 - Back in the New York Groove
3.plot: The Guardians meet up with Spider-Man in New York City to defeat Thanos’ super-powered symbiote.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E03 - Drive My Carnage
3.plot: The Guardians team up with Spider-Man to battle Thanos, who has harnessed the power of the Carnage Symbiote to become the ultimate weapon.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E04 - I Fought the Law
3.plot: The Guardians have captured Thanos, but it's no easy task transporting the most wanted criminal in the galaxy.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E05 - Titan Up
3.plot: The Guardians chase Thanos and Sam Alexander (Nova) to Thanos’ home planet of Titan, where they discover a gladiatorial arena featuring Jesse Alexander - Nova’s father!

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E06 - Money Changes Everything
3.plot: The Guardians now have everything they ever dreamed of, but money can’t solve their problems.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E07 - Sisters Are Doin' It for Themselves
3.plot: Gamora decides to use her new riches to repay all of the people she has wronged throughout the years. When Nebula shows up, Gamora tries to teach her the value of doing good.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E08 - We Are the Champions
3.plot: Drax decides he no longer wants to be a Destroyer and looks into new occupations.

3.title: FR - Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy - S03E09 - Fame
3.plot: Quill starts his own talk show after beating Thanos! But to his dismay, everyone seems to hate it, especially the Grandmaster who is rigging the segments to destroy Quill.

meta.plot: Peter Quill is Star-Lord, the brash adventurer who, to save the universe from its greatest threats, joins forces with a quartet of disparate misfits — fan-favorite Rocket Raccoon, a tree-like humanoid named Groot, the enigmatic, expert fighter Gamora and the rough edged warrior Drax the Destroyer.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E01 - East Meets West (1)
1.plot: Vowing to stop Dragon Lord, Shredder's evil successor, wise Master Chung tells his daughter that she must join the Ninja Turtles to save humankind.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E02 - East Meets West (2)
1.plot: Venus De Milo arrives in New York and introduces herself to the Turtles. Then she reveals that she too was dropped into the toxic sludge at birth.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E03 - East Meets West (3)
1.plot: Venus leads the Turtles in meditation to help Splinter escape from his dream state, after which they practice martial arts to enter the Dream Realm.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E04 - East Meets West (4)
1.plot: The Turtles barely escaped the last time they were confronted by Dragon Lord. Now their nemesis has stolen the coveted Serum of Invincibility!

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E05 - East Meets West (5)
1.plot: Donatello and Venus have very different ideas regarding how to neutralize the Serum of Invincibility.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E06 - The Staff of Bu-Ki
1.plot: Dragon Lord reaches through the time warp to steal the Staff of Bu-Ki, an ancient relic with the power to destroy any and all shinobi spell-casters.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E07 - Silver and Gold
1.plot: When a series of high-profile bank robberies ravage New York City, the Turtles choose not to get involved right away.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E08 - Meet Dr. Quease
1.plot: One of Donatello's biggest idols in the world of science, Dr. Quease, is kidnapped by the dragons.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E09 - All in the Family
1.plot: While on an early-morning sewer jog, the Turtles discover a rare baby Turtle in the underground storage house of crazy poacher Simon Bonesteel.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E10 - Trusting Dr. Quease
1.plot: When Dragon Lord and Dr. Quease have an argument, Quease propositions Donatello, because he thinks they should work together.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E11 - Windfall
1.plot: When Michaelangelo finds a winning lottery ticket, he thinks his sewer days are over. But the others have already dreamt of ways to spend the money!

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E12 - Turtles' Night Out
1.plot: After an encounter with Bonesteel, Mikey comes up with an idea -- an all-night rave for animal rights where everybody dresses as their favorite beast.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E13 - Mutant Reflections
1.plot: Our heroes have a hard time sorting out who's who when their evil counterparts start popping up everywhere -- and they all look like the Turtles.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E14 - Truce or Consequences
1.plot: The dragons are tired of Dragon Lord's oppressive regime, and want to help the Turtles send him back into the mirror. Are they for real?

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E15 - Sewer Crash
1.plot: As Donatello is scanning the Web for information, someone breaks into his computer and sends him a coded message -- one that reprograms Donny's brain!

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E16 - Going Ape
1.plot: Raphael is enjoying one of his favorite pastimes -- harassing crazed poacher Simon Bonesteel -- when a platoon of Rank warriors join in the game.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E17 - Enemy of my Enemy
1.plot: When the Turtles stumble upon a man being attacked by dragons in Central Park, they are shocked to learn they've rescued someone from their past!

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E18 - King Wick
1.plot: When an alchemy accident gives Wick telekinetic powers, he not only uses it over the Dragon Lord, but he puts the Ninja Turtles to the test too!

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E19 - The Good Dragon
1.plot: When Venus's life is saved by one of the Dragon Lord's Rank warriors, the Turtles are forced to re-examine their views on dragons.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E20 - The Guest
1.plot: When his apartment burns down, Splinter's chess opponent moves in with the Turtles for a few days.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E21 - Like Brothers
1.plot: The continuing conflict between Raphael and Donatello comes to a head... again. This time, however, Mike and Leonardo get dragged into it.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E22 - Unchain My Heart (1)
1.plot: While the Turtles are busy evading Bonesteel, an old enemy of Chung I's arrives in New York to destroy Chung I's former student: Venus.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E23 - Unchain My Heart (2)
1.plot: Raphael and the Turtles go against the wishes of Venus and Splinter and return Vam Mi's heart. Yet the vampires are determined to destroy Venus.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E24 - Unchain My Heart (3)
1.plot: Bonesteel is sick and tired of the immortal bloodsuckers getting in the way of his efforts to capture the Turtles.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E25 - Unchain My Heart (4)
1.plot: With the Turtles being held hostage by Bonesteel, it's up to Splinter and Venus to defeat the vampires once and for all.

1.title: FR - Tortues ninja, La nouvelle génération - S01E26 - Who Needs Her
1.plot: When Venus accidentally traps someone in a forcefield, they begin to question her value to the team, recounting her numerous mistakes in the past.

meta.plot: Quatre petites tortues exposées à des produits radioactifs dans les égoûts de New York ont muté et deviennent des créatures intelligentes. Entraînées aux art-martiaux par leur maître Splinter, les Tortues Ninjas sortent la nuit, pour faire regner la justice. Une nouvelle menace nommée Dragon Lord arrive et les oblige à intervenir.
Emma Banville, a human rights lawyer known for defending lost causes, sets out to prove the innocence of Kevin Russell, who was convicted for the murder of a school girl 14 years earlier.

1.title: FR - Fearless - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Emma Banville, a human rights lawyer known for defending lost causes, sets out to prove the innocence of Kevin Russell, who was convicted for the murder of a school girl 14 years earlier.

1.title: FR - Fearless - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Kevin faces abuse from the public as Emma takes drastic measures to get the case back on track. Miriam makes a call that has devastating consequences for Emma.

1.title: FR - Fearless - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Kevin's retrial begins, Emma has a breakthrough with new evidence, but powers outside of her control seem set to crush her attempts to prove Kevin's innocence.

1.title: FR - Fearless - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Kevin's trial continues, the forensics seem to be proving his innocence and leading to an acquittal after 14 years. However, when the prosecution delivers a counter argument, Emma's hopes of a ‘Not Guilty' verdict are dashed. With Heather and Sir Alastair keen to bring the case to a close, will Kevin accept a plea of manslaughter to secure his freedom? Meanwhile, Yusef sends word that he is in the UK and wants to meet with Emma. She travels to Birmingham to see him, tracked by Olivia Greenwood who is determined to uncover Yusef's whereabouts. With Greenwood withholding vital information that Emma needs about Tony Pullings' whereabouts and Emma refusing to disclose Yusef's hiding place, the pair are at a stalemate.

1.title: FR - Fearless - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Locked up in America by the US air force, Emma makes the breakthrough she desperately needs, and with help from an unexpected source, she edges closer to finding out the truth.

1.title: FR - Fearless - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Detective Lieutenant Everett Backstrom is a man with no filter. After a five-year exile to the traffic division for offensive behavior, he has returned from disgrace to lead Portland's newly minted S.C.U. Tasked with navigating the city's most sensitive and serious cases, he must solve each crime as he tries, and fails, to change his own self-destructive behavior. Based on renowned Swedish criminologist and novelist Leif G.W. Persson’s hit series of books of the same name.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E01 - Dragon Slayer
1.plot: The supposed suicide of a senator's son ends up being a homicide.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E02 - Bella
1.plot: The team help to investigate an serial arsonist.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E03 - Takes One to Know One
1.plot: Backstrom and his team are called in after a youth pastor is discovered murdered at a church.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E04 - I Am a Bird Now
1.plot: Backstrom and his team are called in when a member of Portland's LGBT community is killed.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E05 - Bogeyman
1.plot: Backstrom and his team are called in when a teenage girl are abducted by an online predator.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E06 - Ancient, Chinese, Secret
1.plot: A murder leads Backstrom and his team to an illegal gambling ring.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E07 - Enemy of My Enemies
1.plot: Backstrom and his team must work with his estranged father in order to catch a suspected eco-terrorist.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E08 - Give 'Til It Hurts
1.plot: Backstrom and the S.C.U. investigate a hit-and-run that leaves a wealthy woman dead.

1.title: FR - Backstrom - S01E09 - The Inescapable Truth
1.plot: A key witness in a drug investigation is found dead after escaping from his court-mandated rehab program, and Backstrom must figure out how he escaped and who killed him. However, when the S.C.U. learns that the victim is member of a band and all his bandmates dislike him, they start to believe that the killer may be someone closer than they expected. Meanwhile, Backstrom has reason to believe that Valentine may be more than just his tenant.

meta.plot: Pic Pic porte une chemise bleue, il n'est pas très intelligent mais a bon cœur. Afin de devenir magique, Pic Pic doit effectuer une danse qui consiste à faire des tours puis de se secouer les épaules. Il peut ensuite s'envoler accompagné de son trident magique. Pour redevenir "normal" Pic pic doit taper avec son poing dans la paume de son autre main.  André est le cheval de Coboy le cow-boy. Son passe temps favori est de jouer des mauvais tours et boire de la bière. Par colère, Coboy tue toujours André, puis pris de remords il va pleurer sur sa tombe. André finit toujours par ressusciter et l'histoire se répète

1.title: FR - PicPic et André - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - PicPic et André - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - PicPic et André - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - PicPic et André - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - PicPic et André - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - PicPic et André - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - PicPic et André - S01E07 - Episode 7

meta.plot: Une vague d'ombres a deferlé sur la Terre, transformant d'innocentes créatures en de terribles monstres. Seul un champion se dresse, prêt à combattre les ténèbres et à renvoyer le monde à la lumière : Niko. Armé de son épée magique et guidé par une princesse déterminée, Niko se rend au Volcan de la Malédiction pour faire face au maléfique Nar Est et libérer son peuple de sa prison magique.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E01 - From the Temple of Champions to the Bridge of Doom
1.plot: Mandok accidentally releases Niko from a magical chrysalis. Instead of a fully-grown Champion of Carondolet, ghostly princess Lyra finds a ten year old boy. Lyra must lead NIko across the Bridge of Doom, but when the horrible Xerxes returns and attacks, Lyra has no choice but to put her faith in untested Niko.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E02 - From the Sky Maze of Anguish to the Swamp of Sorrow
1.plot: Lyra must guide Niko, Mandok and Flicker through a deadly sky maze, past the fearsome Arachtaur, as a vicious three-headed monster stalks the team. When the quest almost fails, Lyra makes a tremendous sacrifice.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E03 - From the Swamp to Sorrow to the Hills of Humiliation
1.plot: Niko's team reaches Carapace, the perfect hiding spot, only to discover the voracious Mugwhump In its place. Chompsky, Carapace's last citizen, helps Niko and Lyra face this bloated menace, and discover a better goal than hiding.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E04 - From the Phantom Woods to the Mountains of Misery
1.plot: The Hill Giants send Niko and Lyra into the Shoodakooda Wood, where their greatest regrets become real. With the help of Niko and his Sword, Lyra puts her past behind her. Meanwhile, Mandok is captured by an enemy.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E05 - From the Sea of Suffering to the Faraway Shore
1.plot: Niko and Lyra are received by the Shrimp King, only to learn the Shrimpfolk are about to engage in a futile battle with the ferocious Mantigore to finally free the captured Dolphin Queen. Mandok forms an uneasy alliance.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E06 - From the Tumbledowns to the Gap of Gloom
1.plot: Niko, Lyra and Mandok help the Tumblebees fend off the terrible Prickletwister that has been terrorizing the town, and join forces with a mysterious traveler.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E07 - From the Endless Expanse to the Thorns of Tribulation
1.plot: Niko's new sidekick leads the team through the Endless Expanse, as Nar Est's agent tries to stop them at every turn. When the enemy reveals himself, Niko must defeat a threat from within, without his Sword.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E08 - From the Cliffs of Catastrophe to the Pools of Destiny
1.plot: Coming close to the Pools of Destiny, Niko and Lyra find another human - Aura, a champion who was left behind. But it's Niko who's left behind when Lyra and Aura set off to finish the quest without him.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E09 - From the Shattering Springs to the Clouds of Chaos
1.plot: Niko, Lyra and Mandok land on a Cloud Clipper belonging to the notorious Captain Nimbeard of the Sky Pirates. They're about to be thrown overboard, but when Nar Est sends a deadly sky monster after them, it's all hands on deck.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E10 - From the Peaks of Peril to the Mounds of Mania
1.plot: While descending the Peaks of Peril, a protocol gaffe turns the normally proper Umlauti against our heroes. To earn his freedom, Niko must compete against Jackal in a challenging, gladiatorial-style race.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E11 - From the Tunnels of Terror to the Den of Doom
1.plot: When a swarm of Exuber-Ants chase the team and Lyra is bitten. Niko and Mandok must retrieve a powerful suit of armor hidden deep underground from the ferocious Diggantus.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E12 - From the Cursed Volcano to the End of Hope
1.plot: Niko and Lyra face Nar Est on his home turf, but Niko's final showdown doesn't go as smoothly as planned.

1.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S01E13 - From the Depths of Despair...
1.plot: Niko leads the Army of the Light in a freewheeling final battle and discovers the true power behind Nar Est.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E01 - A Day in Carondolet
2.plot: As Queen Lyra's birthday celebration begins, Niko suspects that a strange bug might be an agent of darkness.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E02 - A Night in Carondolet
2.plot: A message from The Darkness prompts Niko and his friends on a new journey to find an ancient relic.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E03 - The Forest of Fangs
2.plot: Niko and his friends search for an ancient lorekeeper to learn more about the Amulet of Power.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E04 - Sky Whale City
2.plot: Our heroes search for an ancient map piece in a wondrous city perched atop a flying whale.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E05 - The Thorn of Contention
2.plot: Following a rough storm, our heroes find themselves between two races locked in a fight for a mysterious tower.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E06 - The Caterpillar Train
2.plot: To evade a powerful new foe, our heroes hop aboard the Caterpillar Train, a bizarre mode of public transportation.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E07 - The Vast Sea
2.plot: Our heroes’ journey takes them to an undersea cavern where they encounter a colorful annual festival.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E08 - The Automatron
2.plot: The team searches inside a living machine for the final item in their quest.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E09 - The Forgotten Fortress
2.plot: Inside an ancient enchanted fortress, Niko and his friends race to find the Amulet of Power before Nar Est.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E10 - The Balance of Power
2.plot: In a final battle against the ultimate enemy, Niko goes on a journey to discover his true purpose.

2.title: FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E11 -
FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E12 -
FR - Niko et L'épee de Lumière - S02E13 -

meta.plot: A pie-maker, with the power to bring dead people back to life, solves murder mysteries with his alive-again childhood sweetheart, a cynical private investigator, and a lovesick waitress.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E01 - Pie-lette
1.plot: Ned works in a pie store and seems to lead a perfectly normal life. This, however, is far from the truth. Ned can, through the touch of his hand, wake people from the dead. He decides to use this ability of his to solve crimes, but this appears to be much more difficult than it sounds, when he gives life to his childhood crush, and decides to let keep living.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E02 - Dummy
1.plot: Ned, Emerson and Chuck visit the morgue to inspect the body of a victim of a car accident, a 45 year old man who specialized in automobile safety. The police is offering a reward to anyone who can find the killer and Emerson wants answers to be able to get the reward.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E03 - The Fun in Funeral
1.plot: Chuck holds true to the threat she made in the pilot by baking anti-depressants into her aunt's food, in the form of Ned's pies. Olive delivers one to them and stumbles onto Chuck's secret. Now that she has dirt on Chuck - that her aunts think she's dead - will Olive use it against her to get Ned?

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E04 - Pigeon
1.plot: Emerson, Ned and Chuck are hired to prove that a pilot was murdered, rather than committing suicide, but soon become involved in a case of stolen jewelry and an escaped prisoner.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E05 - Girth
1.plot: In this Halloween episode, Emerson and Olive track down "the ghost" who's been killing the jockeys at the old race arena where Olive used to race as a former jockey herself. With help from Ned and Chuck, they try to solve the big mystery.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E06 - Bitches
1.plot: Ned, Chuck, Emerson and Olive tackle a murder mystery involving a man who was murdered over a dog and claims to have been killed by his wife. Problem is, he's a polygamist with four wives.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E07 - Smell of Success
1.plot: Ned, Emerson, and Chuck's next case involves an olfactory assistant who was killed when her scratch-'n'-sniff book combusted.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E08 - Bitter Sweets
1.plot: Emerson, Ned and Chuck investigate the death of Tony DiNapoli, who appears to have been strangled by a woman. Meanwhile, business at the Pie Hole plummets when a new candy store opens in town.  Alfredo Aldarisio returns and continues to pursue an oblivious Olive who, herself, still pines for affection from the Pie Maker.

1.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S01E09 - Corpsicle
1.plot: Chuck learns the most shocking secret of her life and refuses to forgive Ned. In order to take the Pie Maker's mind off of Chuck, Emerson gets him to solve the mystery of a man killing life insurance agents and hiding them in snow banks. Oscar Vibenius returns to investigate why Chuck has an unique smell. Meanwhile, the aunts' antidepressant-laced pies begin to show some hallucinogenic effects.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E01 - Bzzzzzzzzz!
2.plot: Emerson is hired by Dusty Fitz, whose wife Kentucky died in a tragic bee-related incident. She was involved with another man who Dusty claims she was preparing to leave, and Dusty suspects murder. Meanwhile, Lily helps Olive move to a nunnery.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E02 - Circus, Circus
2.plot: Georgeann Heaps hires Emerson to find her missing daughter, and the trail leads to a circus. Meanwhile Ned and Chuck try to deal with the change in their relationship, and Olive considers staying longer at the nunnery.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E03 - Bad Habits
2.plot: Olive calls on the Pie Maker and Emerson to solve a suspicious suicide of a fellow nun that she believes is murder. Meanwhile, Chuck considers what to do in the present with her new lease on life.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E04 - Frescorts
2.plot: A sexy new client hires Emerson to solve the murder of her best friend Joe. Emerson and the gang discover that Joe had a lot of best friends... and they all had a reason to kill Joe.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E05 - Dim Sum Lose Some
2.plot: The wife of a murdered chef, Bao Di, hires Emerson to investigate the death of her husband. They soon discover that Bao was heavily in debt, and wagered his daughter Mei's hand in marriage to cover his markers.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E06 - Oh Oh Oh... It's Magic
2.plot: Ned agrees to help a famed magician whose animal assistants are being killed off; Dwight Dixon tries to cozy up to Lily and Vivian, but Lily is suspicious of his motives.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E07 - Robbing Hood
2.plot: A lawyer for the late Gustav Hoffer suspects his client's death was not part of a robbery gone wrong as was reported, but rather murder.  He hires Emerson Cod and Ned to find out who killed Hoffer.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E08 - Comfort Food
2.plot: Ned brings back to life Colonel Likken, who was mysteriously deep fried to death.  His world-famous original recipe has gone missing and Likken asks Ned, Emerson, and Chuck to find who stole it.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E09 - The Legend of Merle McQuoddy
2.plot: Chuck and Ned deal with the shocking return of someone from their past; Emerson and Olive investigate the death of a lighthouse keeper.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E10 - The Norwegians
2.plot: After Emerson turns down Vivian's request to look into Dwight Dixon's sudden disappearance, she turns to another P.I. team led by Magnus Olsdatter, Emerson's bitter rival.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E11 - Window Dressed to Kill
2.plot: Erin Embry, window dresser extraordinaire for Dicker’s department store, is killed and Chuck manages to get the Pie Hole gang on the case. Erin’s fans think it was her window-dressing partner, Coco Juniper, who did the deed. Apparently the two artistic minds did not always meet. Meanwhile, Ned loses his zapping ability which causes him a small crisis of identity. How can he assist in solving cases if he can’t undead and redead? How does it change his relationship with Chuck? And why are Ned and Olive posing as a couple?

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E12 - Water & Power
2.plot: Lila Robinson, a beautiful grifter from Emerson’s past resurfaces, revealing a painful secret that Emerson has kept hidden all these years. Now on the lam for murder, Lila promises Emerson a quid pro quo if he clears her name.

2.title: FR - Pushing Daisies - S02E13 - Kerplunk
2.plot: The past becomes the present when one half of the Darling Mermaid Darlings’ arch rivals, the Aquadolls, is killed. In order to find the murderer, the Darling Mermaid Darlings must come out of retirement with Ned as their manager and Olive as their stylist. Chuck, of course, cannot participate. Olive gets close to Sid, with whom she shares her experiences in gender discrimination, what with him being a male synchronized swimmer and her attending Vassar on a jockey scholarship. But was Sid jealous enough of the headliners to commit murder?

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E01 - Outcasts
1.plot: It's a full moon and the three mermaids Nixie, Lyla and Sirena are tasked to guard Mako and the moon pool. While Zac and Cam go camping on Mako island. When Zac falls into the moon pool they don't know what to do and leave him on the beach. The next day Zac finds out what he is and what he can do so he tells Cam. Because the girls let the "land boy" as they call him in the moon pool they are being cast out by their pod. So they decide to fix the problem.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E02 - Getting Legs
1.plot: Sirena, Lyla and Nixie must turn Zac back into a land boy. Using Sirena's Moon Ring, they give themselves legs and walk on land to begin their task.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E03 - Meeting Rita
1.plot: In trying to get the Moon Ring back, the mermaids uncover Rita's secret.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E04 - Lyla Alone
1.plot: Nixie and Sirena won't help Lyla try to "zap" Zac's powers, so Lyla decides to do it alone. This misfires when a waitress spills a drink on Lyla and Lyla rushes to hide in the refrigeration room before she transforms into a mermaid! When she can't dry her tail, Nixie and Sirena must save her before she is discovered!

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E05 - Blizzard
1.plot: Lyla and Sirena attempt to use the Moon Ring to stop the rain, but instead make it snow indoors.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E06 - Dolphin Tale
1.plot: Joe, David's brother has bought a new boat and decides to take it out for a spin. His fish finder locates a dolphin, but that dolphin is actually Nixie.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E07 - Zac's Pool Party
1.plot: Zac's struggle with his merman secret intensifies when his girlfriend, Evie decides to throw him a pool party.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E08 - Zac's Return to Mako
1.plot: It's a full moon and the mermaids think that if they keep Zac out of the moonlight, he will lose his powers and return to his land-dwelling self. They stay with him in his garage on the full moon and attempt to keep him indoors.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E09 - The Siren
1.plot: While listening to Sirena sing, Lyla has an idea. If Sirena sings The Enchantment Song to Zac, he will fall under her spell. Everything goes south when David hears the song and falls in love with Nixie.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E10 - Zac Returns to Mako
1.plot: Against Nixie and Sirena's advice, Lyla goes with Zac to Mako Island. She steals Rita's Moon Ring to open the land entrance on Mako. But when the entrance suddenly closes, Zac and Lyla are trapped inside.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E11 - I Don't Believe in Mermaids
1.plot: The girls fear their pod will never return. A despondent Nixie gives "advice" to a young boy named Ben. Zac researches tridents online and Cam snoops. Rita tells Lyla and Sirena about the trident and a pod of mermen that rose up eons ago.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E12 - Close Call
1.plot: Zac continues to try to find the trident. Lyla focuses on keeping him from it. Rita won't keep giving the girls money so Sirena makes bracelets for the Café to sell. While Sirena gathers shell for them, Zac catches a glimpse of her tail.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E13 - Betrayal
1.plot: Rita and the girls worry about the upcoming full moon's effect on Zac.  Nixie thinks they should let Zac find the trident so they can take it  from him and hide it. Lyla thinks they should come clean with him so  he'll in hopes that he'll understand and stay away from it. While Lyla  warns Zac to keep away from Mako Island during the full moon, Evie sees  them holding hands and breaks up with him. Cam discovers that the girls  know Zac's secret but feels uneasy about them helping him. Under the  light of the full moon, Zac goes after the trident with the girls close  behind.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E14 - Battlelines
1.plot: Zac starts to wonder why their principle, Rita, is helping Lyla, Nixie, and Sirena.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E15 - Sirena's Secret
1.plot: David and Sirena's relationship continues to grow, while Nixie and Lyla are worried she won't want to return to the sea.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E16 - Truce
1.plot: Cam gets a new phone and films Zac swimming.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E17 - Moon Ring 2
1.plot: After finding a Moon Ring on the sea floor, Zac gives it to Evie. Now, the mermaids must get it back.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E18 - The Trident Job
1.plot: Zac is being watched by the mermaids, but with Cam's help he evades them.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E19 - Where's the On Button
1.plot: After acquiring the Trident, Zac doesn't know how to turn it on.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E20 - Nowhere to Hide
1.plot: Zac must find a place to hide the Trident from the Mermaids.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E21 - Aquata Returns
1.plot: Aquata returns saying Sirena can come back to the pod, but Lyla and Nixie can't.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E22 - Evie Times Two
1.plot: Rita's cat is turned into a human after walking through a bunch of mermaid powders.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E23 - Zac's Choice
1.plot: Zac leads Lyla to the Trident; they fight for control of it and Lyla is knocked unconscious.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E24 - Trust
1.plot: Lyla teaches Zac about mer history and the ocean but Nixie doesn't trust him.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E25 - Betrayed
1.plot: Nixie agrees to help Cam unlock the Trident, but Evie wants to come along.

1.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S01E26 - Decision Time
1.plot: Cam betrays Nixie after planning to become a merman and rule Mako.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E01 - The Seventh Cycle
2.plot: When the pod decides Zac is a threat and must give up his merman powers, two new mermaids, Mimmi and Ondina, are sent to make sure he obeys.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E02 - Sticky Situation
2.plot: With Evie now a mermaid, Mimmi and Ondina try a dangerous spell to change her back to a human form, but the results are less than ideal.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E03 - Discovery
2.plot: When Zac has a powerful vision about his connection to Mako Island, he and the mermaids visit the island to investigate.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E04 - A New Tail
2.plot: Erik's curiosity about the girls and Mako Island becomes a problem when he decides to investigate further.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E05 - Bad For Business
2.plot: When Evie's dad decides to take tourists on dive charters to Mako Island, the gang must find a way to change his mind.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E06 - Stormy Seas
2.plot: Sirena gives Evie mermaid lessons, which rubs Ondina the wrong way, while Erik tries to get to the bottom of Zac and Cam's falling out.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E07 - Awakening
2.plot: With the full moon approaching, Zac's plan to avoid Mako Island is dealt a blow when his father insists they go on their annual camping trip.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E08 - Land School
2.plot: When Mimmi goes to the first day of the new school year, things get out of hand fast when she runs afoul of the science teacher.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E09 - Stowaway
2.plot: When a young mermaid follows Ondina back to Mako Island after a mermaid council meeting, it could spell trouble with the pod.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E10 - Keeping The Secret
2.plot: When David sees Evie in the water as a mermaid, it puts Zac and the girls' secret at risk unless they can convince David he's wrong.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E11 - Only As Young As You Feel
2.plot: Ondina adds too much jellyfish extract to Mimmi's body lotion, and the results put Principal Santos in dangerous waters at the marine park.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E12 - Supersized
2.plot: When Mimmi loses her moon ring in the Ocean Café's cooler room, it creates havoc for David and his brother's business.

2.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S02E13 - Reunion
2.plot: On the night of the full moon, Zac and Erik swim to Mako Island and unlock the merman chamber, revealing a startling secret.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E01 - A Visit from the East
3.plot: Ondina is tasked with teaching the younger mermaids. A mermaid from China joins the pod. During a full moon ceremony, a terrifying beast emerges.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E02 - Seeing Is Believing
3.plot: When marine park workers are sent to investigate the reported sea monster, the mermaids must create a credible explanation to stop further inquiries.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E03 - Recipe for Success
3.plot: Weilan casts a knowledge transference spell on Zac to help him pass a biology test. But more than just science facts transfer from her body to his!

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E04 - Mopping Up
3.plot: When Evie tries using her new moon ring to magically finish her chores, things quickly get out of control. Joe makes an upsetting announcement.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E05 - The Puzzle Box
3.plot: Weilan comes up with the idea of using a Chinese puzzle box to trap the sea dragon. Cam panics when Carly suggests they take dance lessons.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E06 - New Beginnings
3.plot: Evie's moon ring lesson with Ondina takes an unexpected turn. At the marine park, Mimmi discovers the reason for a rescued dolphin's distress.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E07 - Turning the Tide
3.plot: Zac begs Weilan to teach him an Eastern spell few have mastered, which he hopes to use against the dragon. Joe encounters a water ball.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E08 - The Way of the Dragon
3.plot: On the eve of the full moon, Ondina and Mimmi defy Veridia's orders. Evie becomes suspicious when she spots Zac and Weilan meeting in secret again.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E09 - Reversal of Fortune
3.plot: After overhearing Ondina blaming her for Evie's loss, Weilan runs off. Meanwhile, Mimmi and Ondina combine their powers to try to restore Evie.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E10 - Wishful Thinking
3.plot: Zac realizes a shell he found has magical powers, and he accidentally sends the mermaids back in time five years, where they meet his younger self.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E11 - Lost and Found
3.plot: While Ondina teaches the little mermaids to walk on land, her fastest-learning student wanders off and soon runs into Chris and Karl on the beach.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E12 - Trust Issues
3.plot: When Mimmi and Chris go on a date at the beach, Ondina goes to great lengths to protect her. Cam tries to lure more upscale customers to the cafe.

3.title: FR - Les sirènes de Mako - S03E13 - Letting Go
3.plot: Mimmi and Zac are startled by a mysterious yet strangely familiar vision. Cam's dual role as Carly's boss and boyfriend becomes difficult to manage.
