meta.plot: Zac, 16 ans, décide de camper avec son ami, Cam, sur la mystérieuse île de Mako. Il trouve une ouverture dans la roche et tombe. Chargées de défendre cette roche volcanique, trois sirènes le sauvent. Le lendemain, Zac découvre qu'il est devenu triton doté de pouvoir surnaturels. Bannies par les leurs, les trois jeunes femmes doivent tout faire pour récupérer les nouveaux pouvoirs de Zac et décident de vivre sur Terre afin d'accomplir leur mission.

Crown Prince Yi Gak finds that he has been transported from the Chosun Dynasty to modern-day Seoul. He meets Hong Se Na, who bears a striking resemblance to his dead wife, and is determined to solve the 300-year-old mystery of her death. With his own resemblance to the CEO’s grandson at the company where Se Na works, Gak assumes the identity of the young man to stay close to her. Can the Crown Prince navigate a modern corporation to find clues to his own time period?

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Crown prince Lee Gak is furious after discovering crown princess was drowned. Lee Gak believes that crown princess was murdered, and determines to find out the real criminal. But his other subjects allege that this is not a case of homicide, but rather it’s caused by crown princess lost her footing and fell into water. In order to find out the truth, crown prince Lee Gak gathers Song Man Bo, Do Chi San and Woo Yong Sul. After finding out that there was eye-witness on the day the crown princess died, Lee Gak and his three entourages rush to the home of the man, but are chased by assassins to the cliff. On the other hand, Park Ha meets crown prince and his three entourages at the rooftop room.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Park Ha leaves after sending Lee Gak and the trio to the door of Changdeokgung Palace. Lee Gak and the trio try to enter Changdeokgung Palace, but are chased away by Seoul police. Crown prince who is hungry goes into a convenience store, asking the staff for noodle to allay the hunger, but what’s grossly exaggerated is that the staff calls 112 to report to police. In the end, Lee Gak and the trio are trapped in the police station. When asked by police the contact of the guardian, Lee Gak tells the police the truck number of Park Ha. As the result, Park Ha is called to police station.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: President Yeo who found the crown prince mistakenly thought that she has finally found that Tae Yong who gone missing in the United States, and is very happy. But Lee Gak refuses the president. In order to find Park Ha, Tae Moo begins to secretly inquire about whereabout of her. Crown prince and Park Ha go to Chungcheongnam-do to pick strawberries in order to purchase strawberries at half price. Looking at crown prince who does not budge and does not pick strawberries, the furious Park Ha shouts loudly that once they return to Seoul, and she wants him to gets out immediately from the rooftop apartment.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Park Ha lost the check of 40 million South Korean won withdrew from the bank, causing the contract for the lease to lapse, and she is also facing the crisis of having to clear out from the store. Se Na tells Park Ha that she can helps to raise the money, but wants her to return to United States after settling the matter. Meanwhile, Song Man Bo, Woo Yong Sul and Do Chi San who learned that Park In is under crisis, and with the help of Becky, they begin to take up part time jobs.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Crown prince returns to the home of president Yeo, and requests president Yeo to buy over the rooftop apartment of Park where he used to stay. But president Yeo wants Lee Gak to cut short his hair as the condition to buy the rooftop apartment. Although his three confidants have been repeatedly trying to dissuade him, the crown prince still determine to cut the hair. However, Park Ha decides to return to United States, and is clearing up the rooftop apartment. On the other hand, Yong Tae Moo convinces that the newly emerged Yong Tae Yong is not the real Yong Tae Yong, and he summons family members to gather.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Park Ha is giving the training lesson on the necessary basic social life education to Lee Gak and the trio who are about to start working at Home & Shopping. In order to understand the ecosystem of the company, Lee Gak is arranged to station aside Se Na, and spend some time with her. On the one hand, Park Ha saw the mother of Se Na been hit by Tae Moo’s car, and Se Na who escapes fearing that her lie been exposed, and Park Ha gets furious when she recalled the memory that Se Na pretended to have no knowledge of her been ferried away by truck.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Tae Mu tells Man Ok that she could tell him anytime if she needs anything as a response for causing hurt to her due to his negligence. As the result, Man Ok asks to allow Park Ha to work in Home & Shopping. Park Ha and crown prince Lee Gak located the photography studio which her family took their family group photo (which is the one her mother’s face was torn off) 25 years ago. On the other hand, President Jang asks Tae Mu to look for her long lost daughter.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Visiting the family gathering of President Yeo, Park Ha discovers that Crown Prince Lee Gak is not Yong Tae Yong. The father of Tae Mu, Yong Dong Man, forces Tae Mu to go for a blind date. President Yeo tells Se Na that she offers full support if she is together with Tae Yong (Lee Gak). On the other hand, Park Ha also prepares to go on blind date, and goes to shopping with Crown Prince and the trio.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Crown Prince Lee Gak passed the butterfly handkerchief Park Ha for cleaning, but Park Ha mistakenly lost the handkerchief. The furious Lee Gak shouts at Park Ha. In order to recover the butterfly handkerchief, Park Ha even rushes to a clothing recycling warehouse late at night to search for it. On the other hand, the confidant trio is making preparation for the birthday of Park Ha.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Se Na lied that Park Ha couldn’t keep an appointment, and she confesses to Lee Gak that she loves him. Park Ha saw the scene that Lee Gak and Se Na hugging, and leaves sadly. Park Ha hits a punch on Lee Gak through a basketball game. Lee Gak gets angry and doesn’t take out the birthday gift prepared to give to Park Ha. Man Bo and others buy the gift for the families after getting the wages, and tells Park Ha about their families in Joseon Dynasty. Park Ha learned from Man Bo that the purpose of their trip is to see the Se Na who is the reincarnation of the Crown Princess, Park Ha is shocked. Park Ha accidentally sent the SMS text message that contains her inner heart to Lee Gak. The regretful Park Ha tries in every possible way to disrupt Lee Gak from seeing the message.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Crown Prince Lee Gak receives the mobile phone of Yong Tae Yong once again. He brings the phone to service center to inquire for the PIN code. Chi San suddenly has stomachache and lost his consciousness, Man Bo and Yong Sul are panic-stricken till don’t know what to do. With the help of Se Na who came to help on the BBQ party, Chi San is admitted to hospital. After the incidents, the trio starts to miss the homeland.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: President Yeo is upset with Lee Gak who ran out in the middle of signing purchase agreement after receiving the call from Park Ha. She finally comes to the rooftop apartment, and orders Park Ha to leave. Although the purchase contract failed to be signed, Tae Mu asks President Yeo to give Lee Gak a second chance. On the other hand, Se Na and Lee Gak go to select gown for the engagement ceremony, and she admits to Lee Gak she’s very much disturbed by Park Ha.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: The henchmen trio experiences the phenomenon of passing through the mug. After knowing the heart of Lee Gak, Park Ha hopes that he doesn’t return to Joseon Dynasty. Meanwhile, the mask planned Lee Gak and the trio achieves very good sales after broadcasted on TV shopping channel, hitting the jackpot.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: After Se Na was caught lying, she goes to appeal tearfully to President Yeo about her emotional pain. After Crown Prince is suspicious of Se Na, he tails after her from behind. Man Bo, Yong Sul and Chi San who found out that the marriage of Se Na and Crown Prince is in crisis, are feeling depressed because of unable to go back to Joseon Dynasty. On the other hand, Tae Mu continues to grab the heart of Se Na.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: Crown Prince Lee Gak and Park Ha are dating by watching fireworks at riverside levee of Han River, but they’re discovered by Young Sul, Chi San and Man Bo. Se Na and Tae Mu begins to act to convince President Jang to believe that Se Na is her real daughter. Meanwhile, Lee Gak begins to unravel the incredible mystery.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: Crown prince Lee Gak saw the sight of his reincarnation Yong Tae Yong fell into state of coma, and fells hurt in the heart. He decides to redress the injustice he suffered. Park Ha thought that the quartet has suddenly disappeared to return to Joseon Dynasty, and is shedding tears of sadness. On the other hand, President Jang meets with Man Ok, and receives the permission to bring the daughter to Hong Kong.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E17 - Episode 17
1.plot: In order to rescue Park Ha, eventually crown prince Lee Gak rushes to Tae Mu, and surrenders the mobile phone of Tae Yong to Tae Mu. Tae Mu destroys the phone once again. President Jang calls on Se Na and tells Se Na that she is looking for her daughter. On the other hand, Lee Gak is pondering over the fact that crown princess and Bu Yong are biological sisters in Joseon Dynasty, and speculates that Park Ha and Se Na are possibly biological sisters.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E18 - Episode 18
1.plot: Crown Prince Lee Gak saw his own body slowly disappeared and then returned back to normal. Lee Gak realizes that the reason for him to time travel to Seoul is to meet Park Ha. On the other hand, Lee Gak and the trio convince that one of the criminal causing the death of grandmother is associated with Yong Tae Mu, and are searching for evidence in full force.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E19 - Episode 19
1.plot: Crown Prince sends the injured Park Ha to the hospital, but because her liver suffered serious impact when she was hit, Park Ha falls into the danger of requiring liver transplantation immediately. Lee Gak tries to persuade Se Na, as apart from her, no one else could save Park Ha. On the other hand, Tae Moo tells Se Na to leave and go abroad to live a good life for them.

1.title: FR - Rooftop Prince - S01E20 - Episode 20
1.plot: Crown Prince Lee Gak and the trio meet safely in Joseon Dynasty, and once again return to the imperial palace. In order to ascertain the homicide case of Crown Princess, Crown Prince Lee Gak sets up a special investigation headquarter at Uigeumbu, and summons the family of Crown Princess.

meta.plot: Ryusuke Tsukumo is a quirky, yet brilliant neuroscientist working for the National Research Institute of Police Science. Wielding a unique perspective and psychology, Tsukumo tackles the nation's most baffling crimes and scandals, going head-to-head with the most brilliant and twisted criminal minds. But his eccentricities and poor social timing can also aggravate people and circumstances, further complicating matters.

1.title: FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E01 - An Unprecedented Neuroscientific Mystery Activates!! Eccentric Neuroscientist vs. Serial Demonic Terrorist!! Teleportation by Brain Usage!?
FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E02 - Eccentric Neuroscientist vs. Beautiful Revived Ghost!! People Can Be Resurrected via Brain Training!?
FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E03 - Invisible Man Setting Up Serial Murders!! Brain Training Exposes The Transparent Riddle
1.plot:
Ryu was at the hosiptal doing his check up and was told that he fainted due to lack of sugar and sleep deprivation. At the same time, his PET brain scan showed huge exhaustion espec section relying on intuition. The doctor informed Ryu's brain may continue to display unpredicatable abnormal changes subsequently.

As Ryu was leaving the hospital with his assistant, Ryu suddenly stopped and told her to return first. He turned and appeared to chase after the senior doctor that passed him. Along the way, he bumped into a young doctor along the stairways and before he knew it, Ryu was locked down in a restricted section.

1.title: FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E04 - Eccentric Neuroscientist vs. Prodigal Pianist!! A Skeletal Corpse Can Be Resurrected via Playing Cards!?
FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E05 - Eccentric Neuroscientist vs. Beautiful Woman With A Split Personality!! The Conclusion is an Epiphany!?
FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E06 - Eccentric Neuroscientist vs. The Tragic Multiple Personality Trick!! Brain Training is a Lie Detector!?
FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E07 - Last Chapter ~ Eccentric Neuroscientist vs. Strongest Left-Brained Man!! A Time Bomb Within the Brain
FR - MR.BRAIN - S01E08 - Conclusion ~ Farewell To Our Favorite Eccentric Neuroscientist!! The Final Brain Training is the Method of a Smile
FR - SKY Castle - S01E01 - The Wives Celebrate
1.plot: When Yeong-jae gets accepted into a top medical school, his mom becomes the envy of the other mothers, who all want to know just how she managed it.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E02 - Yeong-jae’s Tablet
1.plot: While everyone’s still reeling from the shock of what happened, a new family whose background and values seem very different moves into Sky Castle.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E03 - Winds Of Change In Sky Castle
1.plot: Han Seo-jin confronts the entrance exam coordinator. Lee Su-im joins the Sky Castle reading group, but it’s nothing like what she expected it to be.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E04 - Seo-jin’s Crumbling Pride
1.plot: Sky Castle is abuzz about the pending vote but Cha Min-hyeok is confident. Seo-jin will do anything for Ye-seo – and stoop as low as deemed necessary.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E05 - At Any Cost
1.plot: Seo-jin runs into Yeong-jae and tries to talk to him. Su-im ponders what to do about Ye-bin. No Seung-hye and Min-hyeok scramble to formulate a plan B.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E06 - Meritocracy
1.plot: Seung-hye challenges Min-hyeok head on. Seo-jin thinks that she’s fixed things but doesn’t count on Kang Jun-sang. Ye-bin finds an unlikely confidante.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E07 - Never-ending Rivalry
1.plot: Su-im and Ye-bin are stunned by what they uncover. Seung-hye and Su-im speculate about Yeong-jae and his family. Kim Ju-yeong puts Ye-seo in her place.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E08 - At Gunpoint
1.plot: Running mates Kim Hye-na and Hwang U-ju are the favorites in the school election, but Seo-jin colludes with Min-hyeok to ensure that their kids win.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E09 - A Celebration Party
1.plot: Kang Jun-sang delights in Seo-jin’s plan to host a dinner as an occasion to gloat over the other couples, but things get heated over Su-im’s new book.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E10 - Kwak Mi-hyang’s Reveal
1.plot: Seo-jin incenses Kim Ju-yeong with her reply, and leads the charge against Su-im, but pays a heavy price for her shortsightedness in more ways than one.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E11 - Hye-na’s Arrival
1.plot: Seo-jin relents and has Hye-na move in as Ye-bin’s tutor, but makes a startling discovery. Su-im meets Yeong-jae’s father to get his side of the story.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E12 - Another Daughter
1.plot: Su-im hears a strange fact about Kim Ju-yeong. Seo-jin’s fury boils over. Min-hyeok basks in his daughter’s stories, but Seung-hye spots something odd.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E13 - Coach Kim’s Past
1.plot: Crushed by the truth about Se-ri’s life in Cambridge, Seung-hye fears the repercussions of Min-hyeok finding out. Su-im gets a request from Yeong-jae.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E14 - Ye-seo In Coach Kim’s Grasp
1.plot: Seo-jin lambastes Kim Ju-yeong but realizes she’s no match for her own daughter’s insolence. Seung-hye reflects on her choices and takes a stand.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E15 - Hye-na’s Death
1.plot: Hye-na is rushed to the hospital, but Jun-sang orders Hwang Chi-yeong to operate on another patient. Seo-jin asks Ye-seo what she did at the party.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E16 - U-ju’s Arrest
1.plot: Not caring if U-ju is sacrificed, Seo-jin begs Kim Ju-yeong to save her daughter, but Ye-seo insists he’s innocent. Su-im infers a sinister motive.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E17 - Devastated Jun-sang
1.plot: Jun-sang reproaches Seo-jin and his mother about Hye-na. Seo-jin has harsh words for Kim Ju-yeong but has only one thing on her mind: Ye-seo’s future.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E18 - No Option
1.plot: Jun-sang wants to go to the police and exonerate U-ju, but Seo-jin won’t let him. Seung-hye doesn’t want to live with Min-hyeok – and the kids concur.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E19 - Seo-jin’s Confession
1.plot: Su-im pleads with Seo-jin, who remains determined. Ye-bin tells her mother what she thinks of her. U-ju wants to know why he should forgive Seo-jin.

1.title: FR - SKY Castle - S01E20 - Goodbye, Sky Castle
1.plot: U-ju announces he’s taking a break from school. Jun-sang resigns and Seo-jin readies to leave Sky Castle. Seung-hye prevails and Su-im’s book comes out.

meta.plot: For the families living at Sky Castle, an exclusive residential community that's home to Korea's elite, their children’s success means everything.

1.title: FR - L'Écuyer du Roi - S01E01 - Storm Clouds Gather
1.plot: Pressured by his father and mocked by his peers, 15-year-old Tiuri competes to become a Knight of Dagonaut - just as the kingdom faces a dark threat.

1.title: FR - L'Écuyer du Roi - S01E02 - Isn't She a Sweetheart?
1.plot: With the Red Riders and Novices hot on his trail, Tiuri makes his way to Mistrinaut, where the mayor's daughter takes a keen interest in his mission.

1.title: FR - L'Écuyer du Roi - S01E03 - At the End of the World
1.plot: The Red Riders drive their captives high into the snowy mountains. Caught in a storm, Tiuri and Lavinia take shelter inside an ominous monastery.

1.title: FR - L'Écuyer du Roi - S01E04 - Danger Knights
1.plot: On a ship headed toward Unauwen, Tiuri and Lavinia meet a mysterious passenger who seems to know the secret of Tiuri's past - and his destiny.

1.title: FR - L'Écuyer du Roi - S01E05 - Spiral
1.plot: Ardanwen guides the group to an eerily empty town. Lavinia helps Tiuri practice controlling his powers. A startling discovery divides the Novices.

1.title: FR - L'Écuyer du Roi - S01E06 - When the Blood Moon Rises
1.plot: As the Blood Moon nears and Viridian prepares for his homecoming, Tiuri and friends wrestle with doubt, betrayal and a daunting final test.

meta.plot: Entre anciennes prophéties, pouvoirs magiques et compagnons capricieux, un jeune apprenti chevalier se lance dans une aventure épique pour sauver son royaume.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E01 - #BlackPeopleDontGoToTherapy
1.plot: After Sasha moves in with Brian, a mortifying misunderstanding with a therapist forces them to confront their issues with each other.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E02 - #Godastamaste
1.plot: When Sasha reveals she doesn't believe in God, the family takes her to a church service led by an extravagant reverend. Later, she confides in Stacy.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E03 - #YeezysAndShrimp
1.plot: Waiting in line to cop exclusive kicks, Sasha struggles to keep it low-key when Brian shows up with a tent, grill and karaoke machine.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E04 - #NipplesOrNuts
1.plot: Brian tracks Sasha on his phone and catches her in a lie. When he sees Brodie with other girls, he takes matters into his own hands.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E05 - #TheMotherPucker
1.plot: Sasha's social media video goes viral when a new BAY Cosmetics product causes an adverse reaction — and Brian becomes an Internet sensation himself.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E06 - #ThrillaOnTheGrilla
1.plot: At the family’s annual Juneteenth cookout, Pops faces off against his siblings for a BBQ showdown. Sasha sneaks off to a block party with Brian's truck.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E07 - #RichDadWokeDad
1.plot: Inspired by Floyd Mayweather's book, Brian switches up his parenting style. But when Sasha acts strangely, Brian looks to a drug test for answers.

1.title: FR - Arrête Papa, tu me fais honte ! - S01E08 - #MaybeItsBAYBelline
1.plot: Brian receives an unexpected business offer. Pops tries online dating. After being racially profiled, Sasha and her friends are harassed by police.

meta.plot: Un père célibataire, propriétaire d'une marque de cosmétiques, découvre la paternité sur le tas lorsque sa fille adolescente au caractère bien trempé emménage avec lui.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Drew, a recently divorced father, discovers he needs a kidney and finds his donor in the last person he ever would've imagined.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E02 - Die Alysis
1.plot: When Drew's condition worsens, he needs to make sure Gina is still serious about donating her kidney and winds up making her an offer she can't refuse.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E03 - Foreign Bodies
1.plot: As Gina makes herself at home in Drew's house, Drew begins to question whether he made the right decision.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E04 - Joint Pain
1.plot: After Drew goes through a rough divorce mediation with Julia, Gina gives him a surprise to boost his spirits.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E05 - High Risk Factor
1.plot: Drew downloads a tracking app to keep an eye on Gina after he begins getting concerned about her reckless behavior.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E06 - Open Heart Surgery
1.plot: Gina needs to keep herself together to pass a psych evaluation while dealing with the news of an ex's engagement.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E07 - Phantom Limb
1.plot: After missing Maddies soccer game due to dialysis, a depressed Drew begins to question if all his sacrifices are worth it.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E08 - Integration Therapy
1.plot: Drew realizes he lost all of his friends after his divorce, which prompts Gina to throw a party for his dialysis group.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E09 - B Negative (1)
1.plot: Drew and Gina start thinking about their futures after Jerry gets a surprise call that he's receiving a new kidney.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E10 - B Negative (2)
1.plot: Drew falls into a deep depression after a friend's failed kidney surgery, and it's up to Gina to help him out of it.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E11 - Recessive Gina
1.plot: Gina takes Drew and Norma on a road trip to track down her father's medical records.

1.title: FR - B Positive - S01E12 - Canine Extraction
1.plot: Gina has three days to teach Cannoli the dog new tricks before his owner returns from overseas. Also, Drew must deal with Maddie growing up, at a new time.

meta.plot: Faced with finding a kidney donor, newly divorced dad Drew is at the end of his rope when he runs into Gina, a rough-around-the edges woman from his past who volunteers her own. Together they form an unlikely bond and begin a journey that will change both of their lives.

The entire region knows the Berthet family. When people talk about them, they call them ‘gypsies’. Larissa Berthet houses her entire tribe in her home, including Yvan, a local orphan whom she took in and raised as her son. When Yvan finds out that he is to become a father, he decides to become a ‘normal’ man. However, a local bipolar dealer, a jealous cop, an unstable ex and a Machiavellian stepmother have other plans. Luckily, his family is there to support him. But when you’re a Berthet some things just aren’t as simple as they seem.

meta.plot: Set in an alternate America where witches ended their persecution over 300 years ago by cutting a deal with the government to fight for their country, the series follows three young women from basic training in combat magic into early deployment.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E01 - Say the Words
1.plot: Set in an alternate America where witches ended their persecution over 300 years ago by cutting a deal with the burgeoning government to fight for their country, the series follows three young women from basic training in combat magic into early deployment. In this world, the traditional roles of gender and power are flipped, with the more dominant women on the front lines fighting looming terrorist threats that are familiar to our world, but with supernatural tactics and weapons.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E02 - My Witches
1.plot: The unit travels to Salem Town for an annual witch celebration, but an unexpected disturbance throws the proceedings into chaos. Tally wonders if she made the right choice to embark on a military career when witch-hate and her own mother stand in her way. Smarting from Alder’s denial of her request to switch units, Abigail attempts to bury the hatchet with Raelle. Raelle grows closer to Scylla, while the unit impresses Anacostia in Windstrike training.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E03 - A Biddy's Life
1.plot: Fort Salem excitedly greets male visitors on the eve of Beltane, but Raelle and Scylla’s budding romance is interrupted by the arrival of a mysterious man from Scylla’s past. One of the male witches catches Tally’s eye, but she is unsure of how to proceed. Meanwhile, Alder attempts to convince the Hague, an international military council of witches, to follow her strategy against the Spree and is startled by the news of an escalating humanitarian crisis in the Tarim Basin.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E04 - Hail Beltane
1.plot: The base reels from a traumatic event, while Raelle tries to come to terms with her role in the tragedy. Scylla attempts to evade Raelle’s increasingly pointed questions. Abigail works to impress her formidable rival, Libba. And Tally’s connection with Gerit grows during Beltane, a sacred holiday honoring fertility traditions.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E05 - Bellweather Season
1.plot: The unit travels off base for the high society wedding of Abigail’s cousin. Raelle throws herself into her relationship with Scylla, who, unbeknownst to Raelle, faces an impossible choice. Abigail becomes disillusioned with her privilege while amongst the notable Bellweather line. And Tally gets hit with two life-altering revelations that change the very fabric of the unit.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E06 - Up Is Down
1.plot: Abigail has to come to terms with her vulnerability in the aftermath of a horrific event. Tally struggles with being supportive while also keeping a secret from her unit. Raelle takes extreme measures to connect with Scylla.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E07 - Mother Mycelium
1.plot: Abigail forges a connection with Adil, a new visitor to base camp, and pushes a devastated Raelle to help him save a life. Tally uses Gerit as a distraction from her increasingly burdensome secrets. Anacostia probes into Scylla’s past.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E08 - Citydrop
1.plot: The witches’ training culminates at City Drop, their final training exercise. Devastating secrets come to light, splintering the unit and forcing Tally to question her blind trust. A looming Spree threat changes the course of the cadets’ lives.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E09 - Coup
1.plot: In the aftermath of Citydrop, the unit comes closer together, while their distrust of Alder grows. Abigail is faced with eulogizing a fallen soldier, while Tally learns something new about Gerit. Anacostia grants one last favor to Scylla.

1.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S01E10 - Witchbomb
1.plot: Raelle, Abigail, and Tally graduate from Basic Training making Abigail more desperate than ever to prove her unit belongs in War College. Alder eyes the unit for a rescue mission while Anacostia and Scylla find common ground. Season finale.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E01 - Of the Blood
2.plot: Despite the threat of the Camarilla, the discovery of new witches gives Alder hope; Tally struggles with her role as a Biddy; Raelle and Abigail return to Fort Salem with their mysterious new abilities.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E02 - Abomination
2.plot: The Unit begins War College, introducing them to their Coven and new challenges; Anacostia and Scylla find themselves unlikely partners in a dangerous mission; Tally mentors a new recruit.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E03 - A Tiffany
2.plot: Raelle prepares to show her ability to the top brass, while Abigail struggles with her new role. Tally begins to question her unsettling dreams. Anacostia and Scylla form a plan to infiltrate the enemy further.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E04 - Not Our Daughters
2.plot: Anti-witch sentiment boils over as the Unit defends the first witch testing center at its grand opening. Anacostia and Scylla go undercover to follow the Camarilla.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E05 - Brianna's Favorite Pencil
2.plot: The Unit competes for a chance to commune with the dead during Samhain. Scylla and Anacostia search for Camarilla leadership by attending a Halloween gala and make a horrifying discovery.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E06 - My 3 Dads
2.plot: Raelle brings Tally home to the Cession, where they struggle with the past. Abigail is confronted with pressure from her family when Adil accompanies her home.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E07 - Irrevocable
2.plot: Raelle fights for her life, just as the Army and Spree converge on a secret Camarilla stronghold. Abigail and Adil’s mission for vengeance escalates.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E08 - Delusional
2.plot: Tally leads the unit on a mind-bending mission to find Nicte Batan – but is the unit strong enough to withstand Nicte’s defenses?

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E09 - Mother of All, Mother of None
2.plot: Distrust in Alder grows as Tally and Abigail pressure those in power for changes. Raelle gains a deeper understanding of the Mycelium and its purpose for her.

2.title: FR - Motherland: Fort Salem - S02E10 - Revolution (1)
2.plot: The Camarilla brings the fight to Fort Salem. Raelle, Abigail, Tally and their allies are forced to make impossible, world-changing choices.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: A young woman discovers she has the ability to hear the innermost thoughts of people around her as songs and musical numbers.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E02 - Zoey's Extraordinary Best Friend
1.plot: Zoey tries to figure out how to control her new abilities while navigating her best friends’ romantic feelings for her. A new medical victory for Mitch gives the family hope.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E03 - Zoey's Extraordinary Boss
1.plot: Zoey must decide whether or not to get involved in her boss Joan's troubled marriage after she hears Joan sing a heart song. Also, Zoey creates a new program for the family to communicate with Mitch, but his first word is not what they expected.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E04 - Zoey's Extraordinary Neighbor
1.plot: Zoey is forced to address her own faith and why she was given these powers as she attempts to help Mo feel comfortable expressing his true self. David creates a “big moment” for Mitch.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E05 - Zoey's Extraordinary Failure
1.plot: After hearing her first duet, Zoey gets a little too involved in her brother's marriage. Leif receives negative feedback at work. Maggie is offered an enticing work opportunity.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E06 - Zoey's Extraordinary Night Out
1.plot: Things get complicated for Zoey at Simon's engagement party. Maggie has a night out alone, but it doesn't go as planned.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E07 - Zoey's Extraordinary Confession
1.plot: Zoey is forced to admit some hard truths to Max. Tobin worries his friendship with Leif is on the rocks. Mo struggles to communicate with the new man in his life.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E08 - Zoey's Extraordinary Glitch
1.plot: After receiving heartbreaking news, Zoey suffers a mysterious “glitch” in her powers.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E09 - Zoey's Extraordinary Silence
1.plot: Zoey tries to help Mitch’s caregiver, Howie, reconnect with his estranged daughter. Max must make a decision about his future at SPRQ Point.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E10 - Zoey's Extraordinary Outburst
1.plot: Zoey surprisingly finds herself getting into major conflict with Simon, Max, Mo and even Howie. Tensions arise at SPRQ Point when the fourth and sixth floors compete over an important piece of code. Mitch and Maggie try to celebrate their anniversary.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E11 - Zoey's Extraordinary Mother
1.plot: Zoey has to figure out a clever way to help her mother with an impossible decision. Max unexpectedly bonds with Leif. Mo hits a rough-patch with Eddie.

1.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S01E12 - Zoey's Extraordinary Dad
1.plot: After hearing an ominous song, Zoey does everything in her power to stop something bad from happening.

2.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S02E01 - Zoey's Extraordinary Return
2.plot: Zoey returns to the world after an extended time away and discovers that a lot has changed at work and in her personal life in her absence.

2.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S02E02 - Zoey's Extraordinary Distraction
2.plot: Zoey's attempts to spend private time with Max are continually thwarted by both Mo and work problems. The Clarke family gets a new guest when Emily's sister, Jenna, comes to "help" with the baby.

2.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S02E03 - Zoey's Extraordinary Dreams
2.plot: Zoey is haunted by bad dreams that start to affect her personal life. Jenna helps Maggie find her creative spark again.

2.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S02E04 - Zoey's Extraordinary Employee
2.plot: Zoey tries to "choose happiness" but finds it is easier said than done. David re-evaluates his priorities. Mo and Max face their first real challenge as business partners.

2.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S02E05 - Zoey's Extraordinary Trip
2.plot: Zoey decides to explore her rebellious side with her neighbor from growing up, Aiden. Max's dad comes to visit.

2.title: FR - Zoey et son incroyable playlist - S02E06 - Zoey's Extraordinary Reckoning
2.plot: Simon wrestles with his future at SPRQ Point after calling out racial bias at the company. Mo and Max pitch a new investor for their business venture.

meta.plot: Zoey, dont le père Mitch est atteint d'une maladie neurologique, passe un IRM, craignant de développer elle-même des symptômes. Un tremblement de terre survient pendant l'examen. Zoey se met alors à "entendre" les pensées des gens sous forme de chansons. Cette nouvelle aptitude lui permet d'approcher Simon, un collègue de travail dont elle est amoureuse et de communiquer avec son père. Mais elle découvre également que Max, son meilleur ami, est secrètement amoureux d'elle. Elle gagne la course à la promotion organisée par sa patronne, Joan, en trouvant l'origine du bug qui empêchait la sortie de la nouvelle appli de son entreprise.
When five young outsiders on Community Service get caught in a strange storm, they discover that they have developed superpowers.

1.title: FR - Misfits - S01E01 - Episode One
1.plot: A group of misfits with nothing in common must perform community service, but get caught in a freak storm that gives them superpowers.

1.title: FR - Misfits - S01E02 - Episode Two
1.plot: Nathan is desperate to move back home, and when the group makes a discovery, he soon realizes he might have found his opportunity.

1.title: FR - Misfits - S01E03 - Episode Three
1.plot: Alisha is having fun using and abusing her powers but she can't seem to get the one man she really wants: Curtis.

1.title: FR - Misfits - S01E04 - Episode Four
1.plot: Curtis regrets the night of his arrest and uses his new power to travel back in time to change history, but it's not as easy as he thought.

1.title: FR - Misfits - S01E05 - Episode Five
1.plot: Determined to prove that the gang was involved in Tony's disappearance, Sally focuses her investigation on Simon.

1.title: FR - Misfits - S01E06 - Episode Six
1.plot: The gang realizes that there's something weird going on in town and it looks like the mysterious, straightlaced "Virtue" organization is behind it.

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E01 - Episode One
2.plot: A new probation officer assigns the group to an art class for the mentally ill. A mysterious hooded figure follows the Misfits for unknown reasons.

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E02 - Episode Two
2.plot: Nathan is shocked when Jamie, a long-lost brother he never knew he had, turns up at the community center.

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E03 - Episode Three
2.plot: The masked man saves Alisha from a mugging on the estate. It appears he is able to touch her without being affected by her powers.

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E04 - Episode Four
2.plot: Ollie, an environmental protester who has the power to teleport, starts his community service. But is he really destined to become part of the gang?

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E05 - Episode Five
2.plot: Nathan is violently killed again, and he suspects that Jessica, a charity worker from the community center, is to blame.

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E06 - Episode Six
2.plot: After their superpowers are exposed to the world at large, the gang becomes celebrity superheroes, known as the ASBO Five.

2.title: FR - Misfits - S02E07 - Episode Seven
2.plot: Just before Christmas, the gang meets Seth, a drug dealer who was also struck in the storm and now has the ability to deal powers.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E01 - Episode One
3.plot: New boy Rudy gets a rude awakening in his first few days of community service.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E02 - Episode Two
3.plot: Curtis decides to use his new gender-swap power so that he can return to athletics.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E03 - Episode Three
3.plot: Simon saves Peter, a geeky comic book nerd, from being mugged.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E04 - Episode Four
3.plot: An old Jewish man plans to use Curtis's power to go back in time and kill Hitler.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E05 - Episode Five
3.plot: Kelly gets trapped in the body of Jen, a coma victim, and the gang has to save her.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E06 - Episode Six
3.plot: Rudy discovers that he has contracted a strange superpower infection.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E07 - Episode Seven
3.plot: The gang battles an army of zombie cheerleaders when Seth resurrects his dead girlfriend.

3.title: FR - Misfits - S03E08 - Episode Eight
3.plot: A fake medium brings some dangerous deceased faces from the past back to life.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E01 - Episode One
4.plot: New members Finn and Jess are zipping up for their first day of community service, but things get strange when a man stumbles in with a briefcase.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E02 - Episode Two
4.plot: Finn isn't quite as innocent as he looks when a dark secret he's been hiding at home is revealed.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E03 - Episode Three
4.plot: Rudy and his downbeat doppelganger are forced to unite as they have to confront a long-forgotten face from their shared past.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E04 - Episode Four
4.plot: Curtis learns his girlfriend is not the person she claimed to be. As he investigates further, he's forced to use his powers to revive a dead person.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E05 - Episode Five
4.plot: Finn tracks down his real dad and learns the man is dying. Finn's half-sister may know more about their father's illness than she's letting on.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E06 - Episode Six
4.plot: The gang goes to a party where they are stalked by a mysterious killer rabbit. While tracking it down, Rudy falls head over heels for the first time.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E07 - Episode Seven
4.plot: Alex sets off on a mission to try to recover what's missing in his life, but Jess is worried about the extreme lengths he might go to.

4.title: FR - Misfits - S04E08 - Episode Eight
4.plot: Rudy's passion for Nadine is put to the test when he tries to persuade her that they have a future together.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E01 - Episode One
5.plot: The gang discovers a superpower support group and a group of Devil-worshipping scouts.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E02 - Episode Two
5.plot: Rudy sees his father with another woman. Jess helps Rudy investigate his dad and uncovers an even deeper secret.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E03 - Episode Three
5.plot: Sam, the mysterious flying boy from the future jumper, saves Dark Rudy from a mugger.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E04 - Episode Four
5.plot: The gang encounter Helen, an electrician who has a power that may explain the predictions of the mysterious knitted jumper.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E05 - Episode Five
5.plot: To help him get over Jess, Rudy takes Finn to the superpower support group, where a girl becomes infatuated with him.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E06 - Episode Six
5.plot: The gang realizes a terminally ill patient seems intent on cheating death, while Dark Rudy gets closer to finding the remaining hero on the jumper.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E07 - Episode Seven
5.plot: As the first anniversary of the storm approaches, the gang tries to celebrate. Alex discovers an unexpected side effect of his power.

5.title: FR - Misfits - S05E08 - Episode Eight
5.plot: The gang's community service is over and they are forced to face the future, while Dark Rudy finds that his new group isn't quite what he expected.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E01 - A Bunch of Smart Orphans
1.plot: A good-hearted, unusually gifted orphan named Reynie Muldoon enters a competition to win a scholarship to the prestigious Boatwright Academy. While undergoing a grueling series of tests, Reynie joins forces with two other uniquely gifted orphans, Sticky Washington and Kate Wetherall, and the three of them work together to tackle the challenges in their path. The children are introduced to a fourth gifted orphan, Constance Contraire, and finally to the enigmatic Mr. Benedict.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E02 - Carrying a Bird
1.plot: Mr. Benedict lays out the world-changing stakes of his top-secret mission to Reynie, Sticky, Kate, and Constance: The Emergency is out of control, and the only way to stop it is to infiltrate the mysterious L.I.V.E. Institute on Harbor Island. Our young heroes embark on an undercover operation as transfer students at the school, and learn to navigate unfriendly fellow students, bizarre, nonsensical classes, and a shockingly familiar Headmaster.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E03 - Depends on the Wagon
1.plot: The kids of the Mysterious Benedict Society come to a grim realization about Dr. Curtain’s methods of keeping secrets. They also learn the dire consequences to the mission if they were to slip to the bottom of their classes: they would be kicked out. After receiving a message from the children, Mr. Benedict and his crew investigate his possible connection to Dr. Curtain. The children resolve to learn more about the elite Messenger program at the school.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E04 - A Whisper, Not a Shout
1.plot: The children make a risky play to search for clues right under Dr. Curtain’s nose. Mr. Benedict and Milligan head out into rugged terrain to do some recon of their own. Rhonda and Number Two butt heads about their unique approaches to fighting The Emergency. Sticky gets caught trying to help Kate cheat, and finds out the next phase of Dr. Curtain’s insidious plot. Kate suffers a blow to her academic standing but finds a saving grace in Martina Crowe and her tetherball team.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E05 - The Art of Conveyance and Round-Trippery
1.plot: Reynie and Sticky investigate secret transmissions. Constance and Kate explore the island.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E07 - The Dance of the Celestial Orb
1.plot: Kate embarks on a rogue mission into Dr. Curtain’s secret lab which ends in disaster. Mr. Benedict, Number Two, and Rhonda decide to take matters into their own hands. Reynie accuses Sticky of being taken in by Dr. Curtain’s charismatic ways, while Kate’s deception makes Martina a target. Reynie is called into Dr. Curtain’s office for interrogation. Constance’s unique sensitivity to the Whisperer comes to a head, and the team realizes that their time is running out.

1.title: FR - Le Mystérieux Cercle Benedict - S01E08 - Big Day Today
1.plot: Mr. Benedict, Rhonda, and Number Two arrive at The Institute, ready to take down Dr. Curtain and his minions. The kids form an elaborate plan to destroy the Whisperer once and for all. Milligan’s shocking connection to Dr. Curtain is revealed. Dr. Curtain prepares to take an aggressive step forward in The Improvement. The kids, Benedict’s team, and Dr. Curtain face off in a climactic final showdown, the fate of society itself hanging in the balance.

meta.plot: Un groupe d’orphelins infiltré dans un internat s’efforce de contrecarrer un projet machiavélique d’ampleur planétaire et se découvre par la même occasion une nouvelle famille...

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Before Sam and Dean, there were their parents, John and Mary. This is the untold love story of how they met and put it all on the line to save the entire world.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E02 - Teach Your Children Well
1.plot: John and Millie are on different pages about his new interest in hunting and Ada tries to bridge the gap. Mary follows a trail from her father that points to the disappearance of a teenage boy in Topeka. Meanwhile, Carlos has a heart to heart with Mary as Latika dives into her books to identify the monster.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E03 - You're Lost Little Girl
1.plot: When Mary's next-door neighbor mysteriously goes missing, she and John start digging into the disappearance. During their investigation, John unexpectedly reunites with someone from his past. Carlos and Ada bond as they stakeout a potential lead for the demon's partner. Meanwhile, Latika taps into old folklore passed down from her family in hopes it helps Mary and John.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E04 - Masters of War
1.plot: After the details of a veteran's death don't add up, Carlos brings everyone in to investigate and he shares a detail about his past that makes John see him in a new light. Mary finds an unexpected ally who has been hot on the trail of this monster and Latika tries to help Mary heal and find closure with someone she lost. Meanwhile, John's habit of running headfirst into danger leaves Millie worried for her son.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E06 - Art of Dying
1.plot: Mary gets a call from an old family friend who's looking for some help but when the team arrives, they learn that some crucial details were left out.  While Latika struggles with being a Hunter and questions her future with it, John's eagerness, and commitment to the Hunt worries Mary. Carlos finds himself in a situation he's never experienced before and doesn't know what to do with himself.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E07 - Reflections
1.plot: The Hunt heats up and Mary and John find trails that lead back to their fathers. Carlos helps Mary investigate where the Akrida might be hiding but they discover more than they bargained for. Meanwhile, Millie steps in to help Latika, Ada, and John to decipher notes left behind and they stumble upon a way to get some answers.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E08 - Hang On to Your Life
1.plot: With some intense emotions still lingering after their high stakes recovery mission, Mary and John stay close to home to watch over a newly returned Samuel Campbell. When Latika and Carlos split off to investigate the death of a musician, Carlos is forced to face a part of his past he has been avoiding. Millie spends time helping Samuel recover from his injuries and learns a little more about the Men of Letters.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E09 - Cast Your Fate to the Wind
1.plot: When Vampires make their way into Lawrence, Carlos corrals the gang to find out why. Latika's weeks of sorting through the Men of Letters clubhouse provides vital information when John gets a scary glimpse into the future and enlists Millie's help with his plan. Meanwhile, Mary struggles with the tedious balance between feelings and action when it comes to John.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E10 - Suspicious Minds
1.plot: While Carlos talks through a problem in his personal life, it gives Latika a new idea about how to find the Akrida Queen. Millie's new security system for the Clubhouse proves helpful when Mary and John find an unexpected guest inside. Meanwhile, Latika's idea brings her and Carlos face to face with an unexpected ally.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E11 - You've Got a Friend
1.plot: In the aftermath of the fight with Golem, Carlos, Mary and Latika are cleaning the clubhouse when they hear a noise from outside. They creep out to investigate and spot a figure but can't quite make it out until it turns, and they are shocked to see John standing before them, covered in blood.  Meanwhile, Carlos and Latika set out in search of something important.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E12 - The Tears of a Clown
1.plot: Mary and John's tense discussion is interrupted when Carlos and Latika arrive to discuss a mystery involving a creepy clown. Meanwhile, Ada makes an interesting discovery.

1.title: FR - The Winchesters - S01E13 - Hey, That's No Way to Say Goodbye
1.plot: John receives a message from a mysterious stranger. Meanwhile, Carlos, Latika and Ada work together to find answers, but time is running out. Lastly, Mary and John have a warm but awkward reunion. There is a lot to unpack, but they realize this isn't the time or place.

meta.plot: Before Sam and Dean, there was John and Mary. Told from the perspective of narrator Dean Winchester, this is the epic, untold love story of how John met Mary, and how they put it all on the line to not only save their love, but the entire world.

1.title: FR - How to Die Alone - S01E01 - Stop Living
1.plot: When Mel's best friend deserts her on her birthday, she tries to salvage the day with a gift that knocks her out and wakes her up.

1.title: FR - How to Die Alone - S01E02 - Lie and Deny
1.plot: Still in pain from her accident, Mel and Rory go on a prescription drug hunt in the airport's underbelly.

1.title: FR - How to Die Alone - S01E03 - Burn Bridges
1.plot: A professional development classroom exercise reveals to Mel why and who has been holding her back.

1.title: FR - How to Die Alone - S01E04 - Settle
1.plot: When Mel finds herself stuck between Alex's past, present and future, it drives her into the arms of a coworker.

meta.plot: Mel is a broke, fat, Black JFK airport employee who's never been in love and forgotten how to dream, until an accidental brush with death catapults her on a journey to finally take flight and start living by any means necessary.

1.title: FR - Marco Lachance - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Marco Lachance's very existence is turned upside down the day his children discover his hidden past as a would-be rock star.

1.title: FR - Marco Lachance - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Philippe, Marco's friend and manager, signs him up for a karaoke contest. Marco has to choose between his choir and his career.

1.title: FR - Marco Lachance - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: During his first show at a school, Marco has a panic attack on stage. Clovis wants to play Juliet in Romeo and Juliet.

1.title: FR - Marco Lachance - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Marco must find his baptismal certificate to sing in a religious program. Clovis' room gets remodelled because of a complaint.

1.title: FR - Marco Lachance - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: Marco Lachance was destined to become a music star, but instead his life turned monotonous. His positive nature demands that he take control of his destiny. As he reconnects with his passion, will he be able to overcome the obstacles life throws in his path?

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E01 - The Journey
1.plot: While researching for an article on the Pera Palace, Esra stumbles into the year 1919, meets a doppelgänger and finds herself amid political intrigue.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E02 - Roots
1.plot: Stepping into Peride's shoes, Esra sets out with Ahmet to correct the course of history, but gets on Halit and George's radar.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E03 - Secret
1.plot: As the political stakes rise, Ahmet finds a notebook in the room occupied by Fahrettin, who informs Esra of George's sinister plan for Istanbul.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E04 - Awol
1.plot: Halit confronts Esra about her plans with Fahrettin. Esra slips a note to Mustafa Kemal, but her ruse puts others in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E05 - What Goes Around Comes Around
1.plot: Dimitri warns Ahmet about the perils of meddling with the past. As Leyla's fate hangs by a thread, Esra discovers Halit's true motives.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E06 - Life or Death
1.plot: With Ahmet's fate hinging on Halit's recovery, Esra uses Dimitri's key to travel in time and keeps encountering Halit under unexpected circumstances.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E07 - Confrontation
1.plot: A ring found near Peride's body sheds new light on the identity of her real killer. George makes a treacherous deal with Sonya and closes in on Halit.

1.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S01E08 - Hairspring
1.plot: Sonya finds a key to changing the past. After confronting Reşat, Esra devises a plan to expose George's scheme and foil a wider conspiracy.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: An unwelcome visitor arrives at present-day Pera Palace and Ahmet takes matters into his own hands. Esra begins her search for her biological mother.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Emotions run high as Esra is unexpectedly reunited with Halit in 1941, but suspicions arise as he reveals what he is truly capable of.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Ahmet and Esra both find themselves taking on new jobs to open a few doors, while an old acquaintance of Halit jeopardizes the time passage.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: An unlikely friendship forms between Esra and a new colleague. Now they must put their journalistic skills to work to uncover some shocking truths.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Trust between Esra and Halit continues to split at the seams when she discovers an incriminating letter in his coat pocket.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: The search for Halime's baby takes Esra to another time, but this path leads her right into harm's way. Will she be able to dance her way out of it?

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Esra returns to 1941 to find that she has been gone far longer than expected. Ahmet's mind spirals into a deteriorated state.

2.title: FR - Minuit au Pera Palace - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: After Esra discovers an important connection among the captured women, she devises a plot to take down Mümtaz's diabolical schemes once and for all.

meta.plot: En visitant un hôtel historique d'Istanbul, une journaliste est renvoyée dans le passé et doit empêcher un complot qui pourrait changer le destin de la Turquie moderne.

1.title: FR - Playgame - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Playgame - S01E02 -
FR - Rematch - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Rematch - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Rematch - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Garry buys a dozen chess computers to study their playing style and that of Deep Blue.

1.title: FR - Rematch - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The chairs in front of the chessboard remain empty, there is no information. Will the rematch be canceled?

1.title: FR - Rematch - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Garry plays unusual moves that push his "opponent" to his technical limits.

1.title: FR - Rematch - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Behind the scenes, pressure on Helen from the company's top management is growing...

meta.plot: Les derniers mots énigmatiques d'un mourant envoient le fils du vicaire, Bobby Jones, et son amie mondaine, Lady Frankie Derwent, dans une aventure de résolution de crime.

1.title: FR - Pourquoi pas Evans ? - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Along the rugged Welsh coastline, Bobby Jones finds a dying man at the bottom of the cliffs. As Bobby tries to ease his final moments, the dying man utters a mysterious question.

1.title: FR - Pourquoi pas Evans ? - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Following a shocking death thought to be suicide, Bobby and Frankie are convinced it was murder. Together, they hatch a plan to infiltrate Frankie into the home of their prime suspect.

1.title: FR - Pourquoi pas Evans ? - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Frankie and Bobby dig deeper, they begin to uncover a dark conspiracy. Will they finally find the meaning behind that fateful question?

1.title: FR - Pourquoi pas Evans ? - S01E04 -

meta.plot: Lorsque le don naturel d'un écolier pour le golf est découvert accidentellement par une joueuse professionnelle, le garçon se met en tête de devenir le meilleur golfeur du monde.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E01 - Encountering a Dream
1.plot: Pro golfer Kiria crosses paths with the mischievous Gawain — who possesses an astonishing talent for golf even though he's never played the sport.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E02 - The Importance of Each Stroke
1.plot: Lost in Tokyo, Gawain has a fateful meeting with a sullen young golfer, who shows him the way to Kiria's home — and a new aspect of golf.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E03 - Twin Peaks of Talent
1.plot: Gawain learns that making the ball fly isn't enough to become the world's best golfer. He asks Kiria to give him a crash course on putting and iron shots.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E04 - First Tournament
1.plot: With his new skills, Gawain breezes through the first half of his inaugural tournament. But how will he fare when faced with bad weather conditions?

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E05 - Camelot Academy
1.plot: At Camelot Academy, Gawain meets his new classmates, gifted junior golfers from around the world. Riser, unimpressed by Gawain's size, challenges him.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E06 - Uncrowned Prince
1.plot: To debut on the golf course, Gawain must win a game against Liebel on the D-level training course. But Liebel behaves strangely during the match play.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E07 - An Explosive Situation
1.plot: With the Camelot Cup coming up, tensions rise with only seven spots open. Some older schoolmates take aggressive measures to cut the competition.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E08 - The Tryouts Begin
1.plot: On the day of the tryouts, Gawain is up against Li and Todoin in a spiral course where his usual straight drive won't help. Can he master the slice?

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E09 - Stubbornness and Pride
1.plot: Yumiko struggles with a bunker shot, while Kuromine's gift for seeing snake-like putting lines gets her ahead. Lancelot's unexpected visit causes a stir.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E10 - Playoffs
1.plot: The final playoff will decide who takes the last spot. But first, Riser and Gawain need to conquer a challenging course — and Kanazono's dirty tricks.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E11 - A Venerable Visitor
1.plot: Gawain stumbles upon an unassuming salaryman wandering around the school grounds who turns out to be their new coach: Hitomi Katase, a former pro golfer.

1.title: FR - Rising Impact - S01E12 - To the Battlefield!
1.plot: Kuromine challenges transfer student Lancelot, staking her pride as a putter and a spot on the team. The Japan team heads to England for the Camelot Cup.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E01 - Worthy New Opponents
2.plot: Gawain's encounter with Quester from the U.S. team leaves him in shock. Lancelot joins some of his American counterparts for a training session.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E02 - The Door to One's Soul
2.plot: Still rattled from his previous match with Quester, Gawain keeps duffing his shots. While he deals with his mental block, Platalissa confides in him.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E03 - Camelot Cup Competition!
2.plot: A surprise change to the U.K. team's order of play disrupts Ms. Aria's strategy for the Japan team, but Gawain and Lancelot rise to the challenge.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E04 - An Awakened Power
2.plot: As the pairs take on increasingly tricky courses, Gawain struggles with his control and strength — until he begins to see the sparks of a new power.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E05 - The Brits Go Into Overdrive
2.plot: Quester begins to lose confidence after witnessing Gawain's incredible growth. After coasting in the first half, Sfida and Ice turn the heat up.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E06 - The Way to Victory
2.plot: Faced with the final two holes, the U.K. and U.S. teams go all out. Will Gawain and Lancelot be able to clinch victory for the Japan team?

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E07 - The Dark Nobleman
2.plot: While Liebel and Todoin brood over their poor performance against Tristan, the other players gear up for the Camelot Cup's main event: individual matches.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E08 - Monsters
2.plot: The Brits display their monstrous talent: Percival's impressive backswing and Tristan's incredible power and precision fire up Gawain and Lancelot.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E09 - An Approaching Destiny
2.plot: As the competition grows more heated and the young golfers battle it out on the fairways, Gawain's Gift attracts a mysterious man's attention.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E10 - Heart of Glass
2.plot: Wanglian's mastery over turbulent winds stuns everyone. Meanwhile, Lancelot's confidence starts to shatter as he loses control of his strokes.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E11 - Awaken!
2.plot: Gawain enters an injury-induced trance after being hit by Percival's ball, and a profound power emerges from him. Lancelot continues to falter.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E12 - A Contest of Gift
2.plot: Thanks to Gawain's words, Lancelot gets back his confidence — and his Gift. Gawain's uncanny performance continues and catches Tristan's attention.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E13 - To the Top
2.plot: Finding himself shaken by Lancelot and Gawain's skills, Tristan reevaluates his motivations. Gawain refuses to back down despite his worsening injury.

2.title: FR - Rising Impact - S02E14 - See You Again!
2.plot: The Camelot Cup draws to a close, and the young golfers reflect on their results. At the hospital, Gawain gets an intriguing invite from Arthur.

meta.plot: Six apprentis journalistes sont parachutés dans la salle des nouvelles de Radio-Canada le temps d’un stage aussi exigeant qu’exaltant. Formés par des professionnels de l’info et accompagnés tout au long de leur parcours par Marie-Maude Denis, les stagiaires sont confrontés chaque semaine à la réalité terrain du journalisme et doivent démontrer qu’ils ont leur place dans le monde de l’information .

1.title: FR - Les Stagiaires - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Stagiaires - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Crevée - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Crevée - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Crevée - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Crevée - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Carpe Diem - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Carpe Diem - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Carpe Diem - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Carpe Diem - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E01 - The Rise of Voltron
1.plot: Overwhelmed but ready for action, five aspiring space explorers learn they have the power to create Voltron, the most powerful robot in the universe.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E02 - Some Assembly Required
1.plot: Princess Allura puts the Paladins through training when they start to lose their focus. They'll need to cooperate to learn how to form Voltron.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E03 - Return of the Gladiator
1.plot: Shiro must draw on painful memories from his past when a massive evil robot threatens the peace on Arus, forcing the lions into action.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E04 - Fall of the Castle of Lions
1.plot: As one Paladin threatens to leave the team, invaders storm the castle and destroy its power crystal in an attempt to steal Voltron.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E05 - Tears of the Balmera
1.plot: Hunk and Coran try to retrieve a new crystal from the Balmera while the rest of the team work to prevent Sendak from leaving the castle with Voltron.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E06 - Taking Flight
1.plot: On the way to the Balmera, the team stops to help two rebels on the run from the Galra. Lance is trusting, but Hunk is skeptical of their intentions.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E07 - Return to the Balmera
1.plot: Allura, Coran and the Paladins return to the Balmera to free the natives, but the arrival of a Galra ship could force Voltron into action.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E08 - Rebirth
1.plot: As the Paladins scramble to ward off a Galra monster, Allura hopes that her ancient powers can heal the Balmera and save its people.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E09 - Crystal Venom
1.plot: Allura considers making a heartbreaking sacrifice to save the team when the castle mysteriously turns on them and sends them hurtling toward doom.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E10 - Collection and Extraction
1.plot: The team stops at an isolated and seemingly insignificant Galra space station and discovers how the empire is gathering its energy from the universe.

1.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S01E11 - The Black Paladin
1.plot: Zarkon lures Voltron into a battle on his ship, and when one of the lions is captured the team must get creative to defeat the Galra and return home.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E01 - Across the Universe
2.plot: The lions get separated when a trip through a wormhole goes awry, while Coran and Allura scramble to break free of a seemingly endless time loop.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E02 - The Depths
2.plot: Hunk and Lance crash-land underwater and follow a mermaid to a civilization whose queen promises to keep them safe and help find the others.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E03 - Shiro's Escape
2.plot: After being saved from a dangerous situation by an unexpected ally, Shiro urges the rest of the team to trust his rescuer.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E04 - Greening the Cube
2.plot: While making repairs to the castle, the Paladins encounter unusual spongy spores that lead them to a planet of brilliant engineers.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E05 - Eye of the Storm
2.plot: Exhausted after a battle, the crew must spring back into action when Zarkon's forces track them down. Coran gets infected by a slippery virus.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E06 - The Ark of Taujeer
2.plot: Four of the Paladins head to a ravaged planet called Taujeer to help the citizens escape, while Allura and Keith go off on a separate mission.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E07 - Space Mall
2.plot: Shiro attempts to create a deeper bond with the Black Lion, while Coran takes the others to a swap meet, where they have some strange adventures.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E08 - The Blade of Marmora
2.plot: Keith and Shiro travel to a hard-to-find base in an effort to align with the Blade of Marmora. Keith must fight to unlock the truth about his past.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E09 - The Belly of the Weblum
2.plot: The Paladins split up to gather resources for a showdown with Zarkon. Hunk and Keith travel into the belly of a planet-devouring creature.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E10 - Escape from Beta Traz
2.plot: Lance, Pidge and Shiro infiltrate a facility to free a prisoner of the Galra, but Lance and Shiro each think they've found the right inmate.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E11 - Stayin' Alive
2.plot: Allura travels to the Balmera to acquire a powerful crystal, but a visit from an evil beast prompts her to call on the Paladins for help.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E12 - Best Laid Plans
2.plot: After acquiring the teludav from the Olkari, the team prepares to launch the operation to defeat Zarkon and bring peace to the universe.

2.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S02E13 - Blackout
2.plot: The Paladins fight an epic battle against the most powerful enemy they've ever faced, with the fate of the universe at stake.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E01 - Changing of the Guard
3.plot: As the Paladins work to build a coalition of rebels, Allura makes a suggestion that rattles the team. A new face aims to gain power with the Galra.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E02 - Red Paladin
3.plot: Lotor's forces move to retake the planet Puig and lure the Paladins out for a fight. Keith and Lance struggle to adjust to big changes.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E03 - The Hunted
3.plot: Keith's reckless choice leads the team into a dangerous situation, and Allura needs to channel one of the Paladins to get out of trouble.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E04 - Hole in the Sky
3.plot: The castle receives a distress signal that leads Allura and Coran to believe that they may not be the only surviving Alteans.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E05 - The Journey
3.plot: A pair of skeptical rebel fighters make things difficult for a Paladin in need of assistance. Haggar steps up her monitoring of Lotor.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E06 - Tailing a Comet
3.plot: As the Paladins pursue the comet, they become confused by Lotor's actions. Keith doubts his leadership skills, while Lance ponders his future.

3.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S03E07 - The Legend Begins
3.plot: As the team tries to decipher Lotor's plan for the comet, Coran gives the Paladins a history lesson about the origins of Voltron and the ongoing war.

4.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S04E01 - Code of Honor
4.plot: Keith's divided attentions cause tension within the team at a time when unity is crucial. The Blades investigate a Galra supply route.

4.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S04E02 - Reunion
4.plot: Pidge gets information that prompts her to embark on an important solo mission to the far reaches of the universe.

4.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S04E03 - Black Site
4.plot: An internal struggle for power erupts within the Galra. Pidge returns to the castle with some precious cargo. The team gets a cow.

4.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S04E04 - The Voltron Show!
4.plot: Coran gets carried away with turning the Paladins into intergalactic stars when he designs an elaborate, effects-filled live tour of the universe.

4.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S04E05 - Begin the Blitz
4.plot: Team Voltron devises a plan to continue the coalition's momentum and take control of more Galra territory. Lotor makes a big move.

4.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S04E06 - A New Defender
4.plot: Forces of good and evil converge on the planet Naxzela, where Voltron faces unforeseen danger only one Paladin can help them escape.

5.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S05E01 - The Prisoner
5.plot: After a daring mission at a key Galra outpost, the team considers a risky alliance. One Paladin leads a journey to retrieve an important prisoner.

5.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S05E02 - Blood Duel
5.plot: Faced with a painful decision, the Paladins reluctantly come to an agreement with Zarkon. Haggar comes to grips with memories from the past.

5.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S05E03 - Postmortem
5.plot: A power struggle erupts within the Galra. As the Paladins argue over their next move, an attack forces them to save themselves and the Olkari.

5.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S05E04 - Kral Zera
5.plot: Shiro acts against the wishes of the other Paladins. Powerful Galra from around the empire convene for the Kral Zera ceremony.

5.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S05E05 - Bloodlines
5.plot: Keith is sent to find a fellow Blade named Krolia and locate a powerful weapon. Lance, Hunk and Pidge reprogram a robot to have fun.

5.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S05E06 - White Lion
5.plot: The team searches for a portal to a mysterious, fabled Altean land called Oriande. Shiro starts to feel like there’s something wrong with him.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E01 - Omega Shield
6.plot: An attack by Sendak prompts the Paladins to scramble to a planet's defense. Lotor calls on Allura for help in assembling a powerful ship.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E02 - Razor's Edge
6.plot: Keith's journey to an abyss to search for a quintessence source unlocks memories about his past. Lance wallows in unrequited love.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E03 - Monsters & Mana
6.plot: When the team takes a break to play a magical role-playing game, their fantasy world sparks useful ideas to help them solve real-world problems.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E04 - The Colony
6.plot: After Lotor and Allura head off in the new ship, the remaining Paladins get a dire warning that could change everything.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E05 - The Black Paladins
6.plot: As one Paladin takes on a dangerous mission through a wormhole, the others contend with failing controls on the castle.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E06 - All Good Things
6.plot: A metaphysical encounter shines light on a Paladin's fate. Lance and Allura console each other about their past judgments. Lotor makes a plea.

6.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S06E07 - Defender of All Universes
6.plot: An epic battle leaves the universe in a state of chaos, threatening to destroy all life unless a sacrifice is made.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E01 - A Little Adventure
7.plot: Part of the group gets stuck on a planet where they're inadvertently miniaturized. Flashbacks reveal the beginnings of Keith and Shiro's relationship.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E02 - The Road Home
7.plot: The Paladins stop at a base that belongs to the Blades, only to find it's been abandoned. But they come under attack before they can investigate.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E03 - The Way Forward
7.plot: Stuck in a perilous situation far from home and needing help to get free, the Paladins realize their fate is in Coran's hands.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E04 - The Feud!
7.plot: The Paladins inexplicably become contestants on the crazy game show "Garfle Warfle Snick." But they're playing for much more than cash and prizes.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E05 - The Ruins
7.plot: When Pidge intercepts a distress signal that the Paladins believe they recognize, the team ends up on a ruined planet that was ravaged by war.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E06 - The Journey Within
7.plot: As the Paladins hurtle through space, they enter a seemingly endless void that tests their sanity -- and their loyalty to one another.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E07 - The Last Stand (1)
7.plot: The Paladins receive a distress signal that's explained through a flashback to Pidge's father Sam's return to Earth four years earlier.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E08 - The Last Stand (2)
7.plot: Sam and the others at the Garrison attempt to hold off the Galra attacks in hopes that a desperate plea for help will reach Voltron.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E09 - Know Your Enemy
7.plot: The Paladins drop off the Lions and head to Earth, believing that information Sam acquired years earlier could help them battle Sendak.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E10 - Heart of the Lion
7.plot: The Paladins work with the Garrison pilots on a mission that could provide more clues about how to take down Sendak's operation.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E11 - Trial by Fire
7.plot: Sanda's revelation shakes the Paladins, who are separated from the Lions. On Earth, Shiro, Sam and Coran attempt to get the Atlas powered up.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E12 - Lions' Pride (1)
7.plot: As a massive battle rages on, Shiro goes solo on a dangerous mission to bring down Sendak and save his friends -- and his home.

7.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S07E13 - Lions' Pride (2)
7.plot: With the future of Earth hanging in the balance, Voltron and the others come together to face a mysterious enemy unlike any they've ever seen.
