8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E01 - Launch Date
8.plot: The Paladins spend one last night on Earth in preparation for the launch of the Atlas. Lance works up the courage to ask Allura an important question.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E02 - Shadows
8.plot: Flashbacks shine a light on Honerva's past with Lotor and Zarkon, revealing the motivation for her recent actions.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E03 - The Prisoner's Dilemma
8.plot: After taking control of a Galra base on a dark planet, the Paladins follow a distress signal from a missing fleet and make an unsettling discovery.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E04 - Battle Scars
8.plot: While floating through the universe searching for signs of a Robeast, the Paladins head toward Olkarion and realize they aren't alone on their journey.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E05 - The Grudge
8.plot: The Paladins make plans to meet with the Atlas, but the reunion is interrupted when the Lions are ambushed by a mysterious adversary.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E06 - Genesis
8.plot: Voltron heads to Oriande to confront Honerva after the team discovers she's using wormholes to harvest massive amounts of Quintessence.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E07 - Day Forty-Seven
8.plot: Pilots Kinkade and Rizavi provide a documentary-style look at both the lighthearted and stressful moments of day-to-day life on the Atlas.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E08 - Clear Day
8.plot: The crew heads to the planet Drazan to participate in the festivities of Clear Day, but Allura is plagued by nightmares when she stays behind to rest.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E09 - Knights of Light (1)
8.plot: The Paladins travel into an expansive void accessed through Allura's mind, where they encounter frightening spirits and cursed souls.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E10 - Knights of Light (2)
8.plot: Traveling further into an abyss of memories, the Paladins make shocking discoveries that could alter their reality forever.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E11 - Uncharted Regions
8.plot: As Honerva gets closer to creating a catastrophic rift in reality, the Atlas crew races against time to figure out how to locate and stop her.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E12 - The Zenith
8.plot: Confronted by a dark energy like nothing they've faced before, the Paladins must draw on their everlasting bond -- and a few Balmera -- to forge ahead.

8.title: FR - Voltron: Legendary Defender [MULTI-SUB/AUDIO] - S08E13 - The End is the Beginning
8.plot: Voltron and Honerva come together at the source of all realities in the ultimate battle between good and evil for the survival of the universe.

meta.plot: Five unlikely teenage heroes and their flying robot lions unite to form the megapowerful Voltron and defend the universe from evil.

Mickey Grosman, a former special forces demolitions expert took a group of amateur adventurers on a nearly impossible journey across South America. Positioned as a charity trek for cancer awareness, participants were to be part of a 5,000-mile expedition across the continent through the deepest parts of the Amazon jungle. Only one claims to have made it to the end… Mickey Grosman.

1.title: FR - Expedition from Hell: The Lost Tapes - S01E01 - It Just Keeps Getting Worse
1.plot: Self-styled survivalist and demolition expert Mickey Grosman leads a team of amateur explorers deep into the Amazon on a chaotic, death-defying quest to cross the South American continent - it'll be a miracle if anyone makes it out alive.

1.title: FR - Expedition from Hell: The Lost Tapes - S01E02 - It's Not Life or Death -- Yet
1.plot: Mickey dismisses a veteran teammate, then hires a local escort for a hazardous desert trek. Running out of water after getting disoriented, the group descends into chaos, risking one member's life.

1.title: FR - Expedition from Hell: The Lost Tapes - S01E03 - I'm Gonna Die on This Mountain
1.plot: Ickey's film crew embarks on a treacherous journey through the Eastern Andes. A risky bridge crossing precedes their venture deeper into the mountains, where one team member mysteriously vanishes after being sent back.

1.title: FR - Expedition from Hell: The Lost Tapes - S01E04 - Take Me to Jail
1.plot: Mickey loses control of the expedition when an indigenous tribe kidnaps them. He replaces Delfin with an inexperienced woman who accuses him of having a God complex. The team stumbles onto a bizarre subculture, eager to prove her correct.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E01 - Seekest Thou the Road
1.plot: In small town Westview, Detective Agnes' murder case sends her down a road that changes everything.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E02 - Circle Sewn with Fate / Unlock Thy Hidden Gate
1.plot: With old foes in hot pursuit, Agatha and Teen gather a desperate coven to walk The Witches' Road.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E03 - Through Many Miles / Of Tricks and Trials
1.plot: The coven faces their first perilous trial on The Witches' Road.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E04 - If I Can't Reach You / Let My Song Teach You
1.plot: The coven faces their second trial on The Witches' Road.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E05 - Darkest Hour / Wake Thy Power
1.plot: With enemies closing in, the coven flees under the light of a blood moon to the next ghastly trial.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E06 - Familiar by Thy Side
1.plot: Familiar Teen is much more than he seems, and his connections to the rest of the coven are revealed.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E07 - Death's Hand in Mine
1.plot: Those remaining suffer the hand they are dealt in the next trial.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E08 - Follow Me My Friend / To Glory at the End
1.plot: The end of The Road.

1.title: FR - Agatha All Along - S01E09 - Maiden Mother Crone
1.plot: The truth of Agatha Harkness and The Witches’ Road.

meta.plot: Agatha Harkness gathers a coven of witches and sets off down, down, down The Witches' Road.

1.title: FR - Du talent à revendre - S01E01 - Auditions 1
1.plot: A talent search from the producers of “American Idol” gets under way. Regis Philbin hosts as a variety of acts of all ages, including singers, dancers, comedians, acrobats, jugglers and more, compete for fame and a million-dollar grand prize. David Hasselhoff, Brandy and Piers Morgan make up the panel of judges.

1.title: FR - Du talent à revendre - S01E02 - Auditions 2
FR - Du talent à revendre - S01E03 - Auditions 3
1.plot: The audition process continues, with David Hasselhoff, Brandy and Piers Morgan judging. Regis Philbin hosts.

1.title: FR - Du talent à revendre - S01E04 - Auditions 4
1.plot: The last round of tryouts. David Hasselhoff, Brandy and Piers Morgan serve as judges. Regis Philbin hosts.

1.title: FR - Du talent à revendre - S01E05 - Semi-Final 1
1.plot: The first of four semifinal rounds is featured. Two acts will move on to the finals---one chosen by celebrity judges David Hasselhoff, Brandy and Piers Morgan; the other by viewers. Regis Philbin hosts.

meta.plot: Un concours de talents hebdomadaire où un éventail d'artistes - des chanteurs et danseurs, aux comédiens et aux numéros de nouveauté - se disputent un prix en espèces d'un million de dollars.

1.title: FR - Influence mortelle : réseaux assassins - S01E01 - Sin City Clickbait
1.plot: Ash, a self-styled Instagram "sex and fitness guru", began his career as a male escort and built a life in the glitz, glamour and excess of the Las Vegas party scene. But the envious lifestyle he presented to his countless followers took a deadly turn when his break-up with another high-profile influencer catapulted him into a twisted, drug-infused downward spiral that culminated in a violent, senseless act.

1.title: FR - Influence mortelle : réseaux assassins - S01E02 - TikTok Terror
1.plot: As a 28-year-old, Sania battles through divorce, her passionate and searingly honest Tik Toks attract tens of thousands of followers. But she soon discovers that members of her community want to silence her - and will stop at nothing to do it.

1.title: FR - Influence mortelle : réseaux assassins - S01E03 - RIP Bianca
1.plot: Anime-obsessed teenager Bianca becomes an inspiring mental health advocate online and changes lives. But on forums and social media accounts, she discovers a horrifying and violent side: young men primed to threaten, harm, and attack.

meta.plot: Les influenceurs renvoient une image de succès, de marques florissantes et de bénéfices records. Mais dans leur vie, la réalité est bien plus sombre.

1.title: FR - LEGO Star Wars : Reconstruire la Galaxie - S01E01 - Part One
1.plot: Two brothers have their lives changed when they accidentally remove The Cornerstone of the Galaxy.

1.title: FR - LEGO Star Wars : Reconstruire la Galaxie - S01E02 - Part Two
1.plot: On the run, Sig meets Jedi Bob and must learn from him about the secrets of The Cornerstone.

1.title: FR - LEGO Star Wars : Reconstruire la Galaxie - S01E03 - Part Three
1.plot: In an effort to set things right in the galaxy, Sig makes some new, unexpected allies.

1.title: FR - LEGO Star Wars : Reconstruire la Galaxie - S01E04 - Part Four
1.plot: With the fate of the galaxy on the line, Sig and his friends battle Darth Devastator one last time.

meta.plot: La galaxie entière est bouleversée lorsqu'un berger ordinaire du nom de Sig Greebling déterre un artefact puissant provenant d'un temple Jedi caché. Il se retrouve plongé au cœur de l'aventure dans une nouvelle version de la galaxie où les personnages incontournables de l'univers ne sont plus ceux qu'il connaît. Le sort de la galaxie dépend de Sig et de sa capacité à devenir le héros qui remettra les pièces en ordre.

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E01 - EP1
1.plot: Son Hae-yeong, a woman who is calculating by nature and hates to suffer losses. Kim Ji-uk, a civilian officer, neighborhood angel, perfect convenience store part-timer who hates causing trouble to people. After breaking up with her boyfriend to avoid losses, Hae-yeong makes a surprising offer to Ji-uk to win the in-house contest. What offer could she have made?

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E02 - EP2
1.plot: Strange behavior follows after the proposal. Ji-uk rejects Hae-yeong’s offer to be her fake husband without hesitation. Woo-jae shamelessly gaslights Hae-yeong after stealing her idea. Provoked by Woo-jae, Hae-yeong becomes increasingly desperate for a fake marriage and starts searching for a husband on a secondhand app. Will she find a fake husband?

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E03 - EP3
1.plot: This marriage is a failure! Shocked by Ji-uk’s true looks, Hae-yeong vents her frustrations and becomes suspicious of him for knowing so much about her. Rumors about her handsome husband spark her coworkers' curiosity about her proposal story. Hae-yeong asks Ji-uk to propose to her, only to be treated like a weirdo again. Hae-yeong’s wedding plan to erase all memories of her husband begins!

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E04 - EP4
1.plot: What are the odds of staying at the same hotel as your ex on your wedding day? Thanks to Woo-jae and Yi-lin, Hae-yeong and Ji-uk spend the night together. She teases him about his inexperience, and he mentions their kiss. They spend the night discussing gains and losses. Hae-yeong goes on the honeymoon alone while Ji-uk disappears without a word. Hae-yeong spots Ji-uk at an unexpected place!

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E05 - EP5
1.plot: The husband who had been missing and out of contact shows. And as a new recruit, no less. Hae-yeong is shocked to see Ji-uk as a new recruit at Kkulbee. Though he is apologetic, he is unable to share why he had to join the company. Meanwhile, fearing that their fake marriage will be exposed, Hae-yeong devises a plan to get rid of Ji-uk. However, this unexpectedly puts her in a tough spot.

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E06 - EP6
1.plot: Due to Ji-uk’s unpredicted disclosure of his identity, he and Hae-yeong become the talk of the company. Hae-yeong is mistaken for pulling strings to get Ji-uk employed, while Ji-uk is upset that Hae-yeong speculates him to be the one who reported her for workplace harassment. Meanwhile, the mastermind behind Ji-uk’s employment slowly becomes known. Will the true nepo baby’s identity be revealed?

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E07 - EP7
1.plot: Waking up in the same bed as your ex-boyfriend and husband? Hae-yeong and Ji-uk wake up with no memory of the previous night after getting drunk. Woo-jae is upset at Yi-lin over a sudden personnel transfer, while Hae-yeong regrets getting married, prompting Ji-uk to offer a divorce. Meanwhile, Ja-yeon, worried about Gyu-hyun, visits the orphanage and almost runs into Ha-jun.

1.title: FR - Pas de profit, pas d'amour - S01E08 - EP8
1.plot: Hae-yeong and Ji-uk’s long-awaited first kiss leads to a fight. What's the meaning behind Hae-yeong's kiss and Ji-uk's kiss? Ji-uk thinks of different ways to reconcile with the angry Hae-yeong. Who will emerge victorious in their first marital fight? Meanwhile, Hae-yeong visits the orphanage with the new business idea proposed by Ji-uk and faces the risk of Woo-jae discovering her secret.

meta.plot: Une romance zéro perte entre une femme qui déteste perdre et un homme qui se marie pour éviter de déranger.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E01 - 17 Seconds
1.plot: Before its Paris Fashion Week show, the revered Maison LEDU falls into scandal. Young designers Paloma and Ye-Ji seize the moment.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E02 - Nepo Baby
1.plot: Vincent and Perle face off to decide the future of Maison LEDU. Paloma and Ye-Ji come to a creative and personal crossroads.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E03 - The Family Photograph
1.plot: As the media storm dies down, the time comes for tough decisions. Paloma struggles to find her place in a family torn apart by selfish alliances.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E04 - The Divorcée
1.plot: Paloma prepares her first fashion show at LEDU. Under immense pressure, she must figure out who she can count on.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E05 - Like Father, Like Daughter
1.plot: Victor grapples with an uncertain future. Paloma faces the realities of life in the spotlight—and the price of her position.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E06 - Message in a Bottle
1.plot: The entire Ledu family gathers for Christmas, but the festive joy is short-lived as the celebration takes a turn.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E07 - La Vie en Rose
1.plot: Paloma stays in Brittany to spend more time with Vincent, which enrages Ye-Ji and her team back in the studio.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E08 - Sea Change
1.plot: A few days before the show, Paloma is still without a creative plan. Caroline is ready to make her move.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E09 - Ledu or Not Ledu
1.plot: As a final act of defiance, a united Maison LEDU makes a last-ditch effort. Victor feels trapped.

1.title: FR - La Maison - S01E10 - The Isle of the Dead
1.plot: The Ledu family and the Rovel family battle for control as Paloma takes a big risk.

meta.plot: High fashion meets high drama in this behind-the-curtain look at an iconic French haute couture house. When the family dynasty behind the house falls into scandal, they must find a way to reinvent themselves—or be destroyed by their rivals.
After a tragic accident, a powerful fixer uses her skills to transform a civil rights lawyer into the next mayor — and take down her former employer.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Hwang Do-hee attempts to quell Oh Kyung-sook's persistent protest against Eunsung Group. Baek Jae-min confides in Do-hee regarding a potential crisis.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Do-hee grapples with the guilt of having caused a tragedy in the name of her job. Jae-min proposes a scheme to jumpstart his career ambitions.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After refusing Son Young-sim’s orders, Do-hee risks losing everything she has worked towards. Later, she approaches Kyung-sook with a huge proposal.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A violent incident cements Kyung-sook's decision to run for mayor. Later, Do-hee helps Kyung-sook prepare for her first television debate.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Kyung-sook pushes Seo Min-jung to an uncomfortable position during their debate. Do-hee throws a wrench into Eunsung Group's development plans.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After a tip from an unlikely figure, Min-jung goes all in to take down Kyung-sook. In an attempt to rattle Do-hee, Carl Yoon does the unthinkable.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Kyung-sook begins to question the election as it begins to affect her loved ones — forcing Do-hee to reconsider whether the race is really worth it.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Jae-min is attacked on the campaign trail — but Kyung-sook remains skeptical. Do-hee attempts to regain the upper hand on her opponent.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Carl goes after Kyung-sook's family — forcing her camp to seek out the truth. Running out of options, Do-hee teams up an unlikely partner.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Shocking news about Jae-min creates a problem for his campaign. As the final debate nears, Do-hee reveals her silver bullet to Kyung-sook.

1.title: FR - Queenmaker - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: As election day looms, Do-hee becomes entangled in a dangerous endgame. She later makes a surprising final move — shocking Kyung-sook.

meta.plot: À Madrid en 1936, le destin d'un médecin idéaliste bascule à jamais lorsqu'il décide d'abriter un espion blessé et de participer à la longue lutte contre le fascisme.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E01 - Guillermo
1.plot: After doctor Guillermo García Medina does a favor for his neighbor Amparo, an attraction begins to bloom despite their differences.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E02 - Manuel
1.plot: The history of Guillermo's mysterious patient reveals what brought him to Madrid and how he ended up in the crosshairs of a dangerous political faction.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E03 - Adrian
1.plot: Nationalist soldier Adrián Gallardo reluctantly agrees to fight in a boxing match. Romero continues to pursue Manuel. Amparo shares news.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E04 - Breakup
1.plot: Joy quickly gives way to sorrow as the end of the Spanish Civil War looms. With help from friends, Guillermo adjusts to a harsh new reality in Madrid.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E05 - Secrecy
1.plot: Guillermo, Adrián and Manuel each encounter a familiar face from their past. While Guillermo takes on a new project, Clara plans for the future.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E06 - United
1.plot: Setting a dangerous undercover operation in motion, Manuel and Margaret search for an identity to borrow. Guillermo turns to Geni and Amparo for help.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E07 - Immersion
1.plot: Margaret's doubts divide her and Manuel as he prepares to leave for Buenos Aires. Guillermo treats a patient and proposes a risky new business venture.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E08 - The price
1.plot: An unexpected visitor creates a painful dilemma for Guillermo, while new romance offers some comfort. Manuel entrusts key intelligence to Margaret.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E09 - Rebirth
1.plot: One wrong move could mean death when Manuel and Guillermo's operation is compromised. Guillermo embraces a second chance at happiness.

1.title: FR - Les patients du Docteur Garcia - S01E10 - Meeting again
1.plot: In 1968, the aftermath of a student protest rattles Guillermo's comfortable family life. Seven years later, Manuel faces a life-changing decision.

meta.plot: After years of estrangement, Khanyi Adesina returns home to fight for her family's business empire as it threatens to collapse under corruption.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E01 - The Call
1.plot: When her estranged father asks her to come home, journalist Khanyi learns he is planning to make her CEO of Spear Industries, the family business.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E02 - The Pruning
1.plot: Khanyi weighs her father's offer after a confrontation with her brother Mandla, but a death in the family changes everything.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E03 - The Wake
1.plot: The Ndlovu siblings mourn their loss while trying to hide the details of what happened from family members, friends and the authorities.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E04 - The Will
1.plot: As the family gathers for the funeral, Khanyi learns who she's up against. Her mother Madlamini is left with a difficult choice.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E05 - Descent
1.plot: A violent attack on the company forces Khanyi to hold her own against a powerful gang. Gabisile grooms Siya to take over as CEO.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E06 - The Choice
1.plot: Thuli is on a mission to buy a house. Khanyi makes a bet with Mandla to resolve the drivers' strike and get sugarcane deliveries back on track.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E07 - The Coronation
1.plot: Khanyi's first day as CEO of Spear is immediately undermined by Mandla. At her boarding school, Amahle sees Nido's true colors.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E08 - Filthy Rich
1.plot: Feeling left behind, Akin considers an offer to dig into the Ndlovu family. Mandla hatches a plan to bring down Khanyi — and Spear along with her.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E09 - The Anniversary
1.plot: Following an act of sabotage, Khanyi reaches out to Zakhele for help with Spear's 25th anniversary celebrations. Siya is torn between love and duty.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E10 - All that Glitters
1.plot: Tensions rise at the anniversary party as the Ndlovu siblings continue to snipe at each other. Amahle catches Nido in a compromising position.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E11 - The Lion's Den
1.plot: Khanyi is swept up in the public backlash against Nido. Mandla attempts to strike a deal with the A6, but soon finds himself out of his depth.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E12 - A Deal with the Devil
1.plot: Tired of being sidelined, Lungelo breaks things off with Siya. Amahle publicly tells the truth of what she witnessed. Akin's editor pressures him.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E13 - Fight or Flight
1.plot: With Spear mired in scandal and debt, Khanyi organizes an asset sale that leaves Siya in a tough spot. Amahle's return to school is met with derision.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E14 - Crossroads
1.plot: As the sugarcane fields burn, Khanyi is left in the hot seat. Siya sends Nido abroad. The A6 ropes Mandla into a political assassination.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E15 - Coup d'état
1.plot: Thuli learns the truth of her mother's suicide. Akin confronts Khanyi about her suspected infidelity. Gabisile issues Siya an ultimatum.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E16 - Revelations
1.plot: With Dumi's help, Khanyi gets one step closer to finding her father's killer. Mandla is forced to take the blame for the assassination attempt.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E17 - The Time for Truth
1.plot: In the hope that Nido will come forward with the truth, Siya reveals his own. Zakhele scolds Mandla over his reckless behavior.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E18 - Judas
1.plot: Retracing her father's last steps, Khanyi finally discovers who was responsible for his death. Gabisile drives a wedge between Siya and Nido.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E19 - House of Cards
1.plot: With the police and the A6 closing in, Mandla tries to make amends. Khanyi leaks incriminating documents to the press, which has deadly consequences.

1.title: FR - Blood Legacy - S01E20 - The Harvest
1.plot: With the future of Spear and the Ndlovu family hanging in the balance, Khanyi corners her father's killer — who has one card left to play.

meta.plot: Inspiré de faits réels, ce drame captivant retrace la vie des frères Menendez, condamnés pour le meurtre de leurs parents à Beverly Hills en 1989.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E01 - Blame It on the Rain
1.plot: Plagued by dark thoughts after the murders, Erik opens up to his therapist and shares disturbing details that put the doctor in a difficult position.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E02 - Spree
1.plot: After throwing suspicion elsewhere during police questioning, Lyle and Erik go on a wild spending spree while waiting for Jose's will to be read.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E03 - Brother, Can You Spare a Dime?
1.plot: The brothers navigate life behind bars after police receive a tip-off about the tapes. A new defense attorney prompts Erik to talk about the past.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E04 - Kill or Be Killed
1.plot: Lyle shares painful memories of trying to live up to his father's expectations, detailing the timeline and impact of Jose's abuse and its effect on Erik.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E05 - The Hurt Man
1.plot: During an emotional conversation with Leslie, Erik gives a harrowing account of the sexual abuse and torture he experienced throughout his childhood.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E06 - Don't Dream It's Over
1.plot: The trajectory of Jose and Kitty's relationship — from their courtship through their fracturing marriage — plays out against family therapy sessions.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E07 - Showtime
1.plot: Lyle and Erik struggle to shape their defense before the trial. Then Menendez mania hits — from cheering crowds to fan mail and courtroom TV cameras.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E08 - Seismic Shifts
1.plot: A captivating witness alters courtroom dynamics, and Erik's testimony causes a sibling rift. The Menendez pop-culture moment begins to fade.

1.title: FR - Monstres : L'histoire de Lyle et Erik Menendez - S01E09 - Hang Men
1.plot: At a second trial, the prosecution aims to prove that Erik and Lyle are cold-blooded killers. After the verdict, the brothers face a new reality.

seasonsMeta.name: The Lyle and Erik Menendez Story

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After a tragic accident, Mickey Bolitar finds himself living with his aunt in Kasselton, New Jersey—a town with a lot of buried secrets. When a classmate disappears without a trace, Mickey’s drawn into a conspiracy so shocking that it makes high school drama seem like a luxury…and leaves Mickey questioning everything about the life he thought he knew.

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E02 - Catch Me If U Can
1.plot: The investigation into Ashley’s disappearance leads the gang to a dangerous man. As Mickey reunites with his mom, Shira bumps into an old friend. And in a town filled with secrets that people would kill to keep buried, what is Mrs. Friedman—Mickey’s history teacher—hiding?

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E03 - The Dirt Locker
1.plot: Mickey learns more about the mysterious Bat Lady’s past. Shira spends time with an old friend, while Ema makes a new one. At Ellen and Alan Bolitar’s 49th wedding anniversary party, the family struggles to come to grips with Brad’s absence.

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E04 - Phantom Threads
1.plot: Mickey has a breakthrough in the search for Ashley. Chief Taylor has a tense confrontation with Bat Lady. Ema and Spoon make beautiful music together.

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E05 - See Me Feel Me Touch Me Heal Me
1.plot: Mickey and Spoon discover Ema’s big secret. To find Ashley, Rachel needs a gigantic favor from Troy. Mickey and Rachel trail a suspect to a surprising location. Mickey finds a shocking photo.

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E06 - Candy's Room
1.plot: Mickey makes an outlandish request. Shira finds herself in an awkward position. Ema reacts with rage to a betrayal. A major mystery is solved, but Mickey finds himself in over his head.

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E07 - Sweet Dreams Are Made of This
1.plot: Spoon, Ema, and Rachel take a road trip, while Mickey runs into someone he recently met.

1.title: FR - À découvert - S01E08 - Found
1.plot: Everything is revealed.

meta.plot: Basé sur la série de livres à succès d'Harlan Coben, "À découvert" raconte l'histoire de Mickey Bolitar après la mort de son père qui le mène à commencer une nouvelle vie dans le New Jersey. Lorsqu'un nouvel élève disparaît, Mickey se retrouve mêlé à des secrets. Avec l'aide de ses amis, Spoon et Ema, il découvre un souterrain sombre qui pourrait contenir les réponses à des années de disparition.
