meta.plot: Sept femmes, passionnées par leur métier de chauffeur poids-lourds, partagent leur quotidien au cœur des routes de France et d'Europe. Elles parcourent des centaines de kilomètres au volant de leurs camions XXL : des 44 tonnes, les plus gros gabarits de la route. Chaque jour, elles doivent accomplir une nouvelle mission : charger d'énormes cargaisons et les livrer dans les temps. Cette course contre la montre se joue parfois dans des conditions extrêmes : neige, brouillard, problèmes mécaniques… Mais rien n'arrête nos reines de la route ! Sans jamais renoncer à leur féminité et à leur vie sentimentale et familiale, elles brisent les codes pour vivre leur amour du camion ! Plus qu'une passion, ce métier de routière est une vocation.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E01 - Mazu Takes A Chance
1.plot: Mazu must do the impossible to protect a helpless dragonfly from raptors!

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E02 - The Lost Egg
1.plot: Rocky suppresses his “tough dino” side and learns to be gentle with an egg he’s found.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E03 - Saving Ayati
1.plot: When Ayati loses her balance and falls over, Mazu must come up with a big idea to help.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E04 - The Crevice
1.plot: A large crevice rips through the ground and traps the four little dinos in Giganto's path.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E05 - The Island
1.plot: Timid Bill and brave Rocky end up stranded on an island, however Rocky suddenly becomes the scared one!

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E06 - Don't Cave In
1.plot: Trey warns the little dinos about a cave monster named “Shriekasaurus”.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E07 - Because Triceratops!
1.plot: Tiny performs a triceratops rite of passage!

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E08 - Rock Out
1.plot: Rocky sets out to prove that he's the ultimate tough guy, like Giganto, but discovers that everyone needs help sometimes.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E09 - Air Archie
1.plot: Mazu makes Archie a pair of wings to help him fly.

1.title: FR - Gigantosaurus - S01E10 - The Imitator
1.plot: Marsh copies Rocky's every move while Rocky copies Giganto.

meta.plot: Four curious young dinosaur friends explore the mystery of Gigantosaurus, the largest, fiercest dinosaur of all, facing their individual fears and working together to solve problems during their many adventures.
Set in a ruined medieval city called Dreamland, Disenchantment follows the grubby adventures of a hard-drinking princess, her feisty elf companion and her personal demon.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E01 - A Princess, an Elf, and a Demon Walk Into a Bar
1.plot: Princess Bean already has the wedding day blues when a mysterious figure arrives, claiming he's her personal demon. Elfo hates his happy homeland.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E02 - For Whom the Pig Oinks
1.plot: How to get rid of an unwanted fiancé? Bean's plan involves a party barge and mermaids. King Zøg tries to make Elfo's blood into an immortality potion.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E03 - The Princess of Darkness
1.plot: Sorcerio declares that demonic possession is behind Bean's drunken exploits -- and things look dicey for Luci when the king hires an eerie exorcist.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E04 - Castle Party Massacre
1.plot: With the king away, Bean throws a wild party while Odval and Sorcerio gather their secret society for a ritual. But the night takes a surprising turn.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E05 - Faster, Princess! Kill! Kill!
1.plot: Banished from the castle by Zøg, Bean tries to work but has trouble keeping a job. Elfo encounters a bizarre pair of siblings living in a candy house.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E06 - Swamp and Circumstance
1.plot: Bean tries her hand at diplomacy after Zøg makes her ambassador to Dankmire, Oona's kingdom and an important ally for Dreamland.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E07 - Love's Tender Rampage
1.plot: Elfo lies to hide his feelings for Bean, but things get complicated when she tries to help him by sending the knights on a quest.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E08 - The Limits of Immortality
1.plot: Elfo's been kidnapped! Bean, Luci, Sorcerio and the knights search for him, along with a magical pendant needed to complete the immortality potion.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E09 - To Thine Own Elf Be True
1.plot: After he learns a surprising secret about himself, Elfo heads home to Elfwood in search of the truth.

1.title: FR - Disenchantment - S01E10 - Dreamland Falls
1.plot: As Dreamland celebrates an unexpected arrival while saying goodbye to a friend, everyday life is thrown into disarray.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E01 - Becoming: Part 1
1.plot: As a new day dawns in Arcadia, two trolls are locked in an epic battle with major consequences for the human world -- and one human boy in particular.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E02 - Becoming: Part 2
1.plot: Still reeling from the discovery of the amulet's power, a stunned Jim meets his new mentors and learns he's been tasked with a sacred responsibility.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E03 - Wherefore Art Thou, Trollhunter?
1.plot: Jim and Toby tour Heartstone Trollmarket, where Jim begins his training and the presence of the first human Trollhunter stirs up bitter resentment.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E04 - Gnome Your Enemy
1.plot: While Jim gets a crash course in troll history, big problems -- and a bully -- await him in the human world. What better time for his first mission?

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E05 - Waka Chaka!
1.plot: Jim tries to get closer to Claire on a school field trip to the museum, only to learn that the museum's curator, Ms. Nomura, has an unsettling secret.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E06 - Win Lose or Draal
1.plot: Jim preps for a high-stakes rematch against Draal, the amulet's seemingly rightful heir. But their animosity gives way to a surprising partnership.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E07 - To Catch a Changeling
1.plot: Armed with an ancient troll-hunting tool, Jim and Toby set out to unmask the Changelings living among them. Claire makes Jim a tempting offer.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E08 - Adventures in Trollsitting
1.plot: While Draal settles into his new digs, Jim volunteers to babysit so he can find out whether Claire's little brother, Enrique, is a Changeling.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E09 - Bittersweet Sixteen
1.plot: Jim's 16th birthday is full of surprises, including the arrival of a terrifying new species of troll that's immune to the effects of sunlight.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E10 - Young Atlas
1.plot: Draal gives Jim a troll-made totem to help curb his anxiety about Claire. But Jim's newfound overconfidence leads him to a startling realization.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E11 - Recipe for Disaster
1.plot: As Claire grows increasingly suspicious, Jim's mom invites Strickler over for dinner, where the tension is so thick, you could cut it with a knife.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E12 - Claire and Present Danger
1.plot: The Killahead Bridge is complete, but the door to the Darklands still won't open. Jim is forced to tell Claire the truth when she becomes a target.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E13 - The Battle of Two Bridges
1.plot: Two fateful battles unfold when Bular and Strickler order Jim to unlock the portal and free Gunmar and his Gumm-Gumm Army from the Darklands.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E14 - Return of the Trollhunter
1.plot: Claire gets her first look at Heartstone Trollmarket, and Jim receives a ghostly summons. Elsewhere, Strickler awakens an ancient assassin.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E15 - Mudslinging
1.plot: Jim searches for a way to kill Gunmar so Claire can bring her brother back home. A power-hungry Strickler returns to Arcadia with Angor Rot.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E16 - Roaming Fees May Apply
1.plot: The heroes launch a dangerous quest to find the first Triumbric Stone. Angor Rot concocts a charm that links Strickler and Barbara's fates.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E17 - Blinky's Day Out
1.plot: A barely recognizable Blinky experiences the highs and lows of being human. Angor Rot marks Jim for a fate that's worse than death.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E18 - The Shattered King
1.plot: The heroes' search for the second Triumbric Stone takes them deep into unfamiliar marshlands. Claire asks Jim to be her dance partner.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E19 - Airheads
1.plot: Toby and Claire take on a Trollhunter task so Jim can win a Spring King challenge. In the process, they learn to master new weapons.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E20 - Where Is My Mind?
1.plot: A horde of pixies descends on Arcadia Oaks High, sending the student body into a tailspin. Angor Rot comes to Jim with a surprising proposal.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E21 - Party Monster
1.plot: The Changeling posing as Claire's little brother throws a house party for the trolls of Arcadia. Jim and Toby look for a way to take Strickler's ring.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E22 - It's About Time
1.plot: Every second counts when Jim turns to a time-stopping Kairosect to snatch Strickler's ring, save his mother and find the second Triumbric Stone.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E23 - Wingmen
1.plot: A troll queen arrives from afar to take AAARRRGGHH!!! back to his homeland, revealing his devastating secret. Strickler asks Jim for protection.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E24 - Angor Management
1.plot: A reluctant Jim joins forces with Strickler to keep Barbara alive. Gnome Chompsky returns from the Darklands with important news about Enrique.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E25 - A Night to Remember
1.plot: With Barbara's life hanging in the balance, Jim races to break the spell that bonds her to Strickler. Angor Rot attacks Toby and Claire.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S01E26 - Something Rotten This Way Comes
1.plot: The heroes brace for Angor Rot's inevitable invasion and prepare for the fight of their lives. Jim locates the last Triumbric Stone.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E01 - Escape from the Darklands
2.plot: With Jim still trapped in the Darklands searching for Enrique, his friends rally to bring him back. But the Troll Tribunal has other ideas.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E02 - Skullcrusher
2.plot: Claire recruits NotEnrique for a secret mission, while bully Steve stirs up trouble at school. In the Darklands, Jim meets "The Skullcrusher".

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E03 - Grand Theft Otto
2.plot: A familiar foe comes to Jim's aid in the Darklands. Back in Arcadia, Toby's distracting new headgear picks up an important clue.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E04 - KanjigAAARRRGGHH!!!
2.plot: As Gunmar readies to destroy Jim in the Darklands, Blinky and the gang strike a deal with the Janus Order in their quest to revive an old friend.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E05 - Homecoming
2.plot: Hope springs from an unlikely source when Gunmar learns that Jim's friends are in the Darklands on a mission to bring him home.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E06 - Hiss Hiss, Bang Bang
2.plot: Now out of the Darklands and readjusting to life in Arcadia, Jim and the team must face the consequences of their risky actions.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E07 - Hero with a Thousand Faces
2.plot: Multiple problems plague a frazzled Jim when his amulet goes on the fritz and Claire invites him to meet her parents at a family barbecue.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E08 - Just Add Water
2.plot: When an oozy creature shows up in Arcadia, Jim and the gang set out to find it -- while playing parents to two sacks of flour for a school assignment.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E09 - Creepslayerz
2.plot: In a revealing flashback episode, Otto and Dictatious vie for Gunmar's ear while an increasingly paranoid Steve finds an unlikely ally.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E10 - The Reckless Club
2.plot: Señor Uhl sentences Jim and his friends to detention while Queen Usurna gathers evidence of a conspiracy. Draal comes face to face with Gunmar.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E11 - Unbecoming
2.plot: Facing serious accusations from the Tribunal, Jim gets the chance to see what his life would be like if he'd never found the amulet.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E12 - Mistrial and Error
2.plot: Jim stands trial for unleashing Gunmar while his friends race to clear his name. If convicted, he'll be sent to "The Deep", a dark realm of no return.

2.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S02E13 - In the Hall of the Gumm-Gumm King
2.plot: A monumental loss carries a warning from beyond the grave as Gunmar marches for Heartstone Trollmarket. Can the team pull together to save the day?

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E01 - A Night Patroll
3.plot: With the trolls hiding out in Arcadia, AAARRRGGHH!!! goes undercover to see what Gunmar is up to. A potential rival brings out Jim's jealous side.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E02 - Arcadia's Most Wanted
3.plot: Toby gets caught in the crosshairs when a troll goes missing and the city cracks down on crime. An ancient voice refuses to be silenced.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E03 - Bad Coffee
3.plot: Something strange is brewing at school, where the teachers are more agitated than usual. Claire's illness shows disturbing side effects.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E04 - So I'm Dating a Sorceress
3.plot: Toby and Darci ask Jim and Claire on a double date. Gunmar returns from his travels, now armed with the knowledge to bring forth the Eternal Night.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E05 - The Exorcism of Claire Nunez
3.plot: While Gunmar searches for the Staff of Avalon, Jim and Toby head into the Shadow Realm to rescue Claire's spirit and return it to her body.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E06 - Parental Guidance
3.plot: When Barbara's art obsession leads to an "aha!" moment, she demands Jim tell her the truth. Dictatious reveals Gunmar's plans to resurrect Angor Rot.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E07 - The Oath
3.plot: With the future of two worlds at stake, the team races to find Merlin's Tomb -- and the Staff of Avalon -- before Gunmar can get his hands on it.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E08 - For the Glory of Merlin
3.plot: A long-dormant ally shows Jim and his friends what really happened at the Battle of Killahead. Gunmar awakens Morgana, and Angor Rot plots his revenge.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E09 - In Good Hands
3.plot: Señor Uhl interrupts an important mission with an awkward ultimatum for Jim: help two new students fit in ... or face a repeat of sophomore year.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E10 - A House Divided
3.plot: Merlin has a plan to go to war, but it's Jim's choice to make. Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!! search for allies. Gunmar uses Barbara to get what he wants.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E11 - Jimhunters
3.plot: A greatly changed Jim renews his Trollhunter training but struggles to accept his new reality. Gunmar and Morgana rally the troops for an attack.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E12 - The Eternal Knight Pt. 1
3.plot: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow, leading to a long-awaited showdown between Gunmar and the newly transformed Trollhunter.

3.title: FR - Chasseurs de Trolls : Les Contes d'Arcadia - S03E13 - The Eternal Knight Pt. 2
3.plot: An epic battle comes to a head in the darkness as Jim and his friends push back against Morgana. But without Merlin, how will they stop her?

meta.plot: Dans cette série créée par Guillermo del Toro, un ado sans histoire se pose en véritable sauveur de l'humanité après avoir mis la main sur une mystérieuse amulette.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E01 - Blaze of Glory
1.plot: Blaze steps up when a cheating truck uses dirty tricks to try and win the championship race

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E02 - Blaze of Glory - Part 2
1.plot: Blaze steps up when a cheating truck uses dirty tricks to try and win the championship race.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E03 - The Driving Force
1.plot: When Starla loses one of her pistons, Blaze and AJ try to get it back before Crusher can take it.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E04 - Tool Duel
1.plot: Crusher steals all of Gabby's tools, and Blaze must help her retrieve them so she can repair the Monster Machines.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E05 - Bouncy Tires
1.plot: Zeg the dinosaur truck accidentally dons a set of super bouncy tires, causing him to bounce out of control.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E06 - Stuntmania!
1.plot: The Monster Machines are eager to see Darington's stunt track, but Crusher tricks Darington, sending him far away.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E07 - Epic Sail
1.plot: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and the others to a sailboat race, but Crusher's attempt at cheating shipwrecks both teams.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E08 - The Team Truck Challenge
1.plot: On the day of the Team Truck Challenge, Crusher chooses someone other than Pickle as his partner, which disappoints Pickle.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E09 - The Jungle Horn
1.plot: When Crusher steals Stripes' jungle horn, Blaze and Stripes speed after him in a chase to get it back.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E10 - Truckball Team-Up
1.plot: When Crusher challenges Blaze to a game of truckball, Blaze must scour Axle City to put together a team before the big game.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E11 - Cake-tastrophe!
1.plot: When Crusher accidentally turns the baker truck's baker bots to messy mode, they sprout wheels and drive away.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E12 - The Mystery Bandit
1.plot: When a mysterious bandit makes off with Blaze's metallic trophy, he must track down the culprit.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E13 - Gasquatch
1.plot: Blaze and AJ discover a mud-loving monster truck in the woods and set out on an adventure to bring their new friend to Mud Fest.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E14 - Truck Rangers
1.plot: Blaze and his friends join the Truck Rangers, a scouting club where trucks earn badges for their accomplishments.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E15 - Trouble at the Truck Wash
1.plot: Blaze and AJ must track down the missing pieces of Gabby's Truck Wash and rebuild it so their friends can get clean.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E16 - Zeg and the Egg
1.plot: Zeg, Blaze and AJ find a tiny dinosaur egg and try to return it to its mother.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E17 - Runaway Rocket
1.plot: When Crusher tries to cheat at a carnival game, he accidentally strands himself and Pickle on a giant rocket.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E18 - Cattle Drive
1.plot: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering in the desert, they embark on a wild west adventure to bring the cows back to Starla's barn.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E19 - Dragon Island Duel
1.plot: When Crusher cheats during a tropical island race with Blaze, AJ manages to rescue his best friend while overcoming obstacles.

1.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S01E20 - Sneezing Cold
1.plot: Blaze's friends each have the sneezles (except for Pickle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby) , so Gabby, Blaze, and AJ must bring them medicine oil to help them feel better.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E01 - Fired Up!
2.plot: In the second-season opener, Blaze smells smoke and gets his pals to safety, prompting a fire chief to encourage Blaze to become a firefighter.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E02 - Dino Dash
2.plot: Zeg lands in a mud pit located far away, so Blaze and AJ try to rescue him by using a new engineering design inspired by their dinosaur-truck pals.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E03 - Truck or Treat!
2.plot: It's Halloween in Axle City, and Blaze, AJ, and all of their friends are excited to "Truck or Treat." But when Crusher tries to steal all of their candy, his plan goes awry, and he sends their treats far away from Axle City.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E04 - Race to the Top of the World, part 1
2.plot: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history. They meet pirates and the Sphinx on a whirlwind world-tour. But when Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and pals must persevere to make it to the finish line.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E05 - Race to the Top of the World, part 2
2.plot: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history. They meet pirates and the Sphinx on a whirlwind world-tour. But when Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and pals must persevere to make it to the finish line.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E06 - Monster Machine Christmas
2.plot: It's Christmas Eve, and Blaze and AJ are helping Santa load his magic bag of presents to deliver all over the world. But Crusher accidently knocks over the bag and sends the presents flying.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E07 - Knight Riders
2.plot: A light thief is on the loose, leaving all of Axle City in the dark! Gabby outfits Blaze with special lights to help him track down the light thief and restore the missing lights.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E08 - Darington to the Moon!
2.plot: Today Darington will attempt his biggest stunt yet: rocketing to the moon! But there's just one problem. His battery-powered rocket is out of energy. To get to the moon Blaze must help Darington recharge his battery.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E09 - Piggy 500
2.plot: It's the day of the Piggy 500, and Starla is teaming up with her prize pig, Zippy, to race. But when her competitor Crusher and his rude pig, Slop, cheat and send Zippy far away, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Starla to find him and get back to the race in time.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E10 - Spark Bug
2.plot: Blaze, Stripes, and AJ are racing through the jungle when Stripes discovers a lost little fire beetle named Sparky. Blaze and his friends set off across the jungle to help Sparky get back home to the top of a red hot volcano.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E11 - Five Alarm Blaze
2.plot: There's a fire on the bridge, and it's too much for the Fire Chief and his team to handle. They need Firefighting Blaze to help. With time running out, Blaze hurries across town. But can he get to the bridge in time?

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E12 - Axle City Grand Prix
2.plot: Axle City Grand Prix: Gabby has the perfect tool to get Blaze ready to race: a special remote that can control any machine. But when Crusher takes her remote, he activates machines all over town to slow Blaze down.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E13 - Treasure Track
2.plot: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby join Pegwheel the Pirate-Truck for an island treasure hunt! Following their treasure map, the friends search jungle beaches and mountains to find where X marks the spot.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E14 - Rocket Ski Rescue
2.plot: Crusher's Grammy is in town to watch Crusher and Blaze race at the Monster Dome. But when Crusher tries to cheat using rocket skis, his plan backfires, blasting him off the racetrack and across Axle City. Now Blaze must team up with Grammy to rescue Crusher.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E15 - Dinosaur Parade
2.plot: Blaze, AJ, and lots of spectators have gathered to watch herds of dinosaurs march through Axle City! But when Crusher pushes his way into the parade, he scatters dinos everywhere, and it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Zeg to find and rescue them.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E16 - Race Car Superstar
2.plot: While visiting another town, a snooty car traps all of the racers, and Blaze must become a racecar to free his new friends.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E17 - Race to Eagle Rock
2.plot: Blaze brings all of his monster truck pals to VelocityVille for a wild race to the top of Eagle Rock. But Crusher will stop at nothing to beat race car Blaze and friends, setting traps to slow them down.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E18 - Sky Track
2.plot: Swoops the helicopter loses his rotor, and without it he can't fly! It's time for Blaze and AJ to retrieve the runaway rotor, adventuring up onto The Sky Track, an amazing course that weaves through the clouds.

2.title: FR - Blaze and the Monster Machines - S02E19 - The Wishing Wheel
2.plot: Blaze, AJ, and Stripes are searching for the Wishing Wheel: a magical treasure that will grant a wish for one lucky race car. But with chomping, stomping, and slithering dangers at every turn, can Blaze and his friends stay on track?

meta.plot: AJ is an 8-year-old techie who drives monster-truck Blaze, the top racer in Axle City. The two go on adventures that have them taking on problems involving science and math. Many predicaments they face are caused by Blaze's rival, Crusher, a tractor-trailer that will do anything to beat other vehicles to the finish line. The animated series is billed as the first TV show for preschoolers to comprehensively cover areas of science, technology, engineering and math. Each episode introduces different STEM concepts, including buoyancy and trajectory.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E01 - Breakout (1)
1.plot: A mass breakout occurs at each of the four supervillain prisons.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E02 - Breakout (2)
1.plot: Ant-Man/Giant-Man, Hulk, Iron Man, Thor and Wasp band together to battle Graviton after he escapes from the Raft and targets Nick Fury.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E03 - Iron Man Is Born
1.plot: After defeating HYDRA's attack on the United Nations, Iron Man learns that S.H.I.E.L.D. is taking control of his technology.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E04 - Thor the Mighty
1.plot: After stopping a robbery attempt by the Wrecking Crew, Thor returns to Asgard in order to defeat Loki and the Frost Giants.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E05 - Hulk Versus the World
1.plot: The Hulk is hunted by General Ross and the Absorbing Man while Hawkeye discover a conspiracy within SHIELD.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E06 - Meet Captain America
1.plot: Kang the Conqueror observers, while Captain America and the Red Skull battle during World War II.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E07 - The Man in the Ant Hill
1.plot: Ant-Man and the Wasp work together to stop Whirlwind. Meanwhile T'Challa's father fights the Man-Ape for control of Wakanda.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E08 - Some Assembly Required
1.plot: The Enchantress uses her magic to manipulate the Hulk into distrusting the rest of the Avengers and attacking Thor.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E09 - Living Legend
1.plot: The Avengers discover the frozen body of Captain America and revive him, leading Baron Zemo to attack, seeking revenge against Cap for infecting him with Virus X.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E10 - Everything Is Wonderful
1.plot: Furious at Tony Stark for buying up his company, Simon Williams seeks revenge by undergoing a dangerous AIM procedure, overseen by MODOC and the Grim Reaper, Williams' brother, which turns him into a being of pure ion energy.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E11 - Panther's Quest
1.plot: The Black Panther seeks the Avengers' aid in freeing his African nation of Wakanda from usurper king Man-Ape, and stopping Hydra agents Ulysses Klaw and the Grim Reaper from stealing Wakanda's supply of vibranium.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E12 - Gamma World (1)
1.plot: When the Leader creates a bubble of gamma radiation emanating from the Cube that mutates any human it touches, the Avengers team up with Doc Sampson to stop him. Meanwhile, Hawkeye infiltrates a Hydra base in order to capture Black Widow.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E13 - Gamma World (2)
1.plot: It's up to Hawkeye, the Hulk, and Thor to save the day when the Leader's gamma radiation ray mutates the rest of the Avengers and threatens to do the same to every human on earth.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E14 - Masters of Evil
1.plot: It's Hawkeye, Black Panther, and Ant Man to the rescue when Baron Zemo and his Masters of Evil defeat the rest of the team and take over the Avengers Mansion.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E15 - 459
1.plot: The Avengers join forces with Captain Mar-vell in order to prevent a Kree sentry drone from destroying the Earth.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E16 - Widow's Sting
1.plot: Defying the orders of both SHIELD and Iron Man, Hawkeye and Mockingbird allow themselves to be captured by Hydra in an attempt to bring down Black Widow.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E17 - The Man Who Stole Tomorrow
1.plot: Kang arrives from the future, claiming he must kill Captain America and conquer the Earth in order to save it from destruction.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E18 - Come the Conqueror
1.plot: Kang launches a full-scale invasion of Earth using an army of robots, and in order to save New York, the Avengers are forced to unleash the Ultrons who serve as guards for the Negative Zone Prison.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E19 - The Kang Dynasty
1.plot: The Avengers board Kang's command ship in order to put an end to his invasion of Earth.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E20 - The Casket of Ancient Winters
1.plot: Dark elf Malekith the Accursed locates an Asgardian artifact that plunges the Earth into eternal winter.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E21 - Hail Hydra!
1.plot: Black Widow turns to the Avengers for help when Hydra and AIM battle over control of the Cosmic Cube.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E22 - Ultron-5
1.plot: When Ultron-5 goes out of control and kidnaps Wasp, things go crazy when the droid kills Thor with his lasers.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E23 - The Ultron Imperative
1.plot: Despite Thor going missing and Captain America ending up in the hospital, the Avengers must stop Ultron from eliminating the world's most flawed creatures-humanity.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E24 - This Hostage Earth
1.plot: The Masters of Evil take over Earth and Loki double crosses Baron Zemo.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E25 - The Fall of Asgard
1.plot: Separated across the mythological realms, the Avengers face new threats and make allies for the fight against Loki.

1.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S01E26 - A Day Unlike Any Other
1.plot: Eight of the nine realms of Asgard have fallen, only the Earth remains. The Avengers are all that stands between Loki and total conquest.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E01 - The Private War of Doctor Doom
2.plot: While playing host to the Fantastic Four at Avengers Mansion, the Avengers find themselves under attack by Doctor Doom's forces.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E02 - Alone Against A.I.M.
2.plot: Seeking revenge against Tony Stark, the leader of AIM seizes control of Stark Enterprises' corporate tower.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E03 - Acts of Vengeance
2.plot: The Enchantress is on a vindictive hunt for Baron von Zemo and he appeals to the Avengers for help against her.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E04 - Welcome to the Kree Empire
2.plot: Ronan the Accuser of the Kree Empire arrives at Earth with Captain Mar-Vel in tow to pass judgment on whether the planet should be annexed or destroyed.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E05 - To Steal an Ant-Man
2.plot: When Henry Pym discovers that his Ant-Man equipment has been stolen and being used by a criminal, he hires Heroes for Hire to recover it.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E06 - Michael Korvac
2.plot: The Avengers receive a man who appears to have been experimented on by aliens, and now hunted by another extraterrestrial group.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E07 - Who Do You Trust?
2.plot: Iron Man learns from Nick Fury that the Avengers has been infiltrated by a Skrull impostor and the team turns against each other.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E08 - The Ballad of Beta Ray Bill
2.plot: Thor meets an alien trespasser whose hostility and monstrous appearance belie his unexpected worthiness to wield his hammer, Mjolnir.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E09 - Nightmare in Red
2.plot: SHIELD is apparently attacked by the Hulk, but Banner is accounted for elsewhere at the same time while this Hulk is red in color.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E10 - Prisoner of War
2.plot: The real Captain America and his fellow prisoners attempt to escape their Skrull prison.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E11 - Infiltration
2.plot: A Skrull team posing as The Avengers invades Wakanda with only Ms. Marvel able to help the Black Panther.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E12 - Secret Invasion
2.plot: The Skrull Empire initiates their seizure of Earth and the Avengers are hard pressed to thwart it.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E13 - Along Came a Spider…
2.plot: With Captain America's reputation now in tatters, the superhero and the similarly maligned Spider-Man find themselves trying to thwart a prisoner transport interception.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E14 - Behold… The Vision
2.plot: Captain America and friends travel to Wakanda to repair his shield, unaware that a powerful android is hunting them to capture it among other objectives.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E15 - Powerless
2.plot: The Enchantress offers Loki a chance to exact his revenge on Thor and the Avengers for thwarting his conquest of the Nine Realms, and uses a spell to strip Thor, Captain America, and Iron Man of their powers. Now, the helpless heroes must defeat Loki - his soul now in command of a powerful Asgardian weapon known as the Destroyer - without their abilities.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E16 - Assault on 42
2.plot: When an Avenger group visits SHIELD's special prison in the Negative Zone, they soon find themselves under siege by a mysterious enemy.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E17 - Ultron Unlimited
2.plot: Ultron orders the Vision to lead his android impersonators of the Avengers in capturing the originals.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E18 - Yellowjacket
2.plot: When Henry Pym is apparently killed, a new vigilante using equipment broadly similar to the scientist's is discovered attacking criminals.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E19 - Emperor Stark
2.plot: After a month of being dormant for repairs, The Vision finds the world under the control of Tony Stark.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E20 - Code Red
2.plot: When there is a sudden exposure of a malignant virus around the Avengers mansion, the Secretary of Defense blames the team and lays siege of the headquarters.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E21 - Winter Soldier
2.plot: While dealing with the Red Skull's escape with his Sleeper robots, Captain America also investigates the villain's former henchman who seems disturbingly familiar.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E22 - The Deadliest Man Alive
2.plot: With the Hulk apparently rampaging wild, the Red Hulk comes to the Avengers to request to join.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E23 - New Avengers
2.plot: When the Avengers are apparently killed by Kang the Conqueror, an automatic function created by Tony Stark calls up several allies up as replacements.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E24 - Operation Galactic Storm
2.plot: As warned, the Kree Empire arrive to threaten Earth.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E25 - Live Kree or Die
2.plot: The battle against the Kree Empire continues, with Captain Mar-Vell facing an agonizing moral decision in the conflict.

2.title: FR - Avengers : l'équipe des super héros - S02E26 - Avengers Assemble
2.plot: The Avengers and his allies face the ultimate test when Galactus, the Devourer of Planets comes to consume Earth.

meta.plot:
Les 74 plus dangereux "super-vilains" s'échappent en même temps des prisons les mieux gardées du monde. Pour leur faire face, cinq des plus puissants super-héros de la Terre s'allient et forment une alliance afin de combattre le mal. Ils sont les "Avengers" !

À leur tête, on retrouve l'ingénieur Tony Stark, accompagné de l'Homme-fourmi, le dieu Thor, Hulk et Janet Van Dyne. Ils seront vite rejoints par le Capitaine America, Œil-de-Faucon et la mystérieuse Panthère noire.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E01 - The Boy in the Iceberg
1.plot: Two teenage siblings (Sokka and Katara) living in the South Pole discover a very strange boy (Aang), along with his pet flying bison Appa, in an iceberg. But can they trust him when he accidentally draws the war to their village's doorstep?

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E02 - The Avatar Returns
1.plot: Katara and Sokka discover that Aang is the long-lost Avatar and must rescue him when a Firebending prince named Zuko kidnaps him.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E03 - The Southern Air Temple
1.plot: Aang is excited about going home for the first time in one hundred years, but he is shocked to find out that the temple is deserted. Aang tells Sokka and Katara about his childhood as they explore the temple, but they soon discover something that Aang never expected. Meanwhile, Zuko must make repairs to his ship and the only way he can do it is to dock his ship at his rival's naval base.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E04 - The Warriors of Kyoshi
1.plot: The gang arrives at Kyoshi Island and are captured by some Kyoshi warriors. When Aang reveals that he is the avatar, news quickly spreads out, eventually reaching Zuko, who then goes to Kyoshi Island to capture him.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E05 - The King of Omashu
1.plot: Aang's abilities as an airbender are challenged by a king.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E06 - Imprisoned
1.plot: In a nearby Earth Village, the gang meets a teenage earthbender named Haru. This village lives in fear of the Fire Nation, for soldiers there capture any earthbenders they can find.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E07 - The Spirit World: Winter Solstice (1)
1.plot: Aang and friends visit a village being terrorized by an angry spirit. Iroh is captured by Earth Kingdom soldiers.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E08 - Avatar Roku: Winter Solstice (2)
1.plot: To contact the spirit of the previous Avatar, Aang must reach a temple in the Fire Nation before the sun sets on the following day. There he will learn what he must do to restore balance to the world. Zuko must defy his banishment to follow Aang.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E09 - The Waterbending Scroll
1.plot: After Katara attempts to teach Aang waterbending, but realizes that he is learning it much faster than she is, she is desperate to improve her abilities.  When Katara inadvertently stumbles across a waterbending scroll that can help improve her abilities at a pirate’s store, she decides to steal it, realizing that she couldn’t hope to afford it.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E10 - Jet
1.plot: While traveling towards the North Pole, the group almost gets captured by the Fire Nation.  However, when a charismatic young man and his band of rebels attack the Fire Nation camp and rescue them, they learn that they are trying to resist the Fire Nation’s motives to expand their territory.  Katara and Aang really enjoy their time with the band of rebels, but Sokka soon discovers that they aren’t as noble as meets the eye.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E11 - The Great Divide
1.plot: While on their way to the North Pole, Aang and his friends arrive at a giant canyon where two groups of refugees are bickering over who should get to go across.  Aang decides to walk across with the two groups to ensure they don’t fight one another.  However, he soon learns that the two tribes have been feuding for one hundred years and they both believe their actions are justified.  But when the predators inside the canyon start to come out, Aang is stuck trying to defend both tribes from each other and the vicious wildlife.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E12 - The Storm
1.plot: Aang, Katara and Sokka have run out of money.  Katara suggests Sokka get a job, and coincidentally, they meet a fisherman who is looking for someone to help him out with his fishing. But when the fisherman recognizes Aang as the Avatar, he blames Aang's absence for all of the troubles of the last 100 years, and Aang runs away on his glider. Katara follows on Appa, and when she finds him, Aang begins to reveal his life before he was frozen in the iceberg. Meanwhile, Zuko and Lieutenant Jee get into a fight, but Iroh breaks it up. Soon thereafter, the Lieutenant and the rest of the crew gain a newfound respect for their leader after learning of his past.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E13 - The Blue Spirit
1.plot: While Aang, Katara and Sokka are traveling, Sokka gets a fever. Katara and Aang try to help Sokka, when Katara also catches the fever. It's up to Aang to go up on his own to save his two friends. But before he can get the medicine he is captured by the newly promoted Admiral Zhao and put in Zhao's fortress.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E14 - The Fortuneteller
1.plot: When the group tries to help a man who is being attacked by a platypus-bear, they discover that the local town has a fortuneteller named Aunt Wu in it, who has been forecasting the town's fate for years. But when Sokka and Aang discover one of the fortuneteller's most vital predictions is dead wrong, they have to develop a plan to convince the stubborn townspeople that their beloved Aunt Wu was wrong.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E15 - Bato of the Water Tribe
1.plot: Aang feels neglected as Katara and Sokka reunite with Bato, an old friend of their father’s from the South Pole. They begin to reminisce on their times in the past while they wait for a message to arrive from their father. Aang believes Katara and Sokka will abandon him and go out to find their father should the message arrive. However, when the messenger gives Aang the message to give to Bato, Aang betrays his friends in a way Katara or Sokka could never imagine. However, when Zuko recruits a bounty hunter named June to track Aang down, his friendship is put to the test as he must deal with the fact that he betrayed his friends while defending himself from yet another fight.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E16 - The Deserter
1.plot: Aang and his friends go to a Fire Nation town so that Aang can witness some firebending, but their plan soon goes awry when it’s discovered that he is the Avatar. Fortunately, he's rescued by an individual who serves a firebending master named Jeong Jeong who has abandoned the Fire Nation, so Aang decides to use this time to attempt to learn firebending. The firebending master, however, seems reluctant to teach Aang.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E17 - The Northern Air Temple
1.plot: When Aang and his friends hear rumors about surviving airbenders, they decide to stop by the Northern Air Temple on their way to the North Pole to see for themselves. What they find is a bunch of people who are not airbenders, but have mastered the art of gliding; though this upsets Aang because they have been defacing the temple. However, there was one part of the temple where nobody has been able to enter, and what Aang and his friends discover inside spells oncoming conflict.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E18 - The Waterbending Master
1.plot: When Aang tries to find the north pole, he is found by the north pole instead. As they are taken there, Aang and Katara are eager to find a waterbending master, only to discover that girls are not allowed to learn waterbending.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E19 - The Siege of the North (1)
1.plot: Zhao begins to launch his attack against the Northern Water Tribe. As the walls of the prestiged city begin to fall, the Avatar taps into the spirit world and seeks the help of one of the oldest spirits, in hopes of saving one of the most prominent areas of the world.

1.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S01E20 - The Siege of the North (2)
1.plot: Aang returns from the spirit world to a big surprise. Meanwhile, Zhao and his forces continue to press deeper into the Northern Water Tribe. Iroh makes a powerful stand and Zuko struggles to keep his plan intact.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E01 - The Avatar State
2.plot: Plagued with nightmares featuring the devastating power of his Avatar State, Aang and the gang meet an Earth Kingdom general who has big plans for defeating the Fire Nation. Meanwhile, Zuko and Iroh, having survived the failed attack on the North Water Tribe, have a surprise visit from Zuko's sister with seemingly good news.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E02 - The Cave of Two Lovers
2.plot: On their way to Omashu, Aang, Katara, and Sokka meet a group of nomads who show them a shortcut through the "Cave of Two Lovers". But when the group becomes trapped in the cave, it's up to Aang and Katara to save the group by trusting in love, possibly questioning their relationship. Meanwhile, Iroh gets a lethal rash so Zuko and Iroh head to a small Earth Kingdom town for help, hoping their real identities will not be discovered.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E03 - Return to Omashu
2.plot: Despite the shocking news the gang have just discovered, Aang insists on trying to find King Bumi within Omashu's borders, even with the dangers that will await him and his friends if his real identity is discovered.  Meanwhile Azula goes in search of old friends to help her with her mission.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E04 - The Swamp
2.plot: A mysterious tornado pulls the kids into a supernatural swamp where Katara, Sokka and Aang have mysterious visions. Meanwhile, Momo and Appa are chased by rogue swamp dwellers and only Aang and the gang can save them.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E05 - Avatar Day
2.plot: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates something called "Avatar Day." But when they get there and learn the festival is of "anti-Avatar" sentiment and Aang is put on trial for a crime a past incarnation allegedly committed. Looking to clear the Avatar's good name, Katara and Sokka venture back to a familiar  place to gather evidence and discover the truth.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E06 - The Blind Bandit
2.plot: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament called Earth Rumble 6, where they encounter Toph, a blind but powerful Earthbending girl. After seeing her unique style of Earthbending, Aang wants Toph to become his teacher, but there are complications with Toph's family.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E07 - Zuko Alone
2.plot: Zuko travels by himself to an Earth Kingdom town were he meets a local boy. The two almost become friends, while Zuko suffers from flashbacks of his past.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E08 - The Chase
2.plot: Tired from trying to escape a machine that shows up every time they try to sleep, Aang and the gang have to escape Azula and her team, but their exhaustion leads to a tight situation. Meanwhile, Zuko must deal with something personal, and Iroh bonds with an unlikely individual.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E09 - Bitter Work
2.plot: Toph's instructing abilities come into question when Aang cannot seem to overcome a block that keeps him from earthbending. Sokka gets himself in a jam, while befriending what was, moments before, his next meal, and Iroh and Zuko begin training utilizing new philosophies and methods that originate from the other elements.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E10 - The Library
2.plot: When Aang and his friends find a professor who knows of a library that contains information about the world, Sokka decides to go there to hopefully find some information to use against the Fire Nation. The library is guarded by the knowledge spirit, Wan Shi Tong, who doesn't welcome humans into his library, because he believes they only seek information for evil purposes. When Wan Shi Tong discovers Sokka wasn't being truthful with him, he begins to sink the library, bringing the kids down with it.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E11 - The Desert
2.plot: Aang searches for Appa while Katara struggles to keep everyone together to survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Iroh and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E12 - The Serpent's Pass
2.plot: When Aang and the gang meet up with a group of refugees, they tell the gang where they can get on a ferry to Ba Sing Se. But after a series of events they have to take a deadly route called the serpent's pass with the help of an old friend, Suki. Meanwhile Zuko and Iroh meet up with a boy named Jet and his freedom fighters.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E13 - The Drill
2.plot: Having made it to the outer wall of Ba Sing Se, the kids confront a Fire Nation army that is driving a massive Fire Nation drill, which poses an imminent threat to the last Earth Kingdom stronghold. Meanwhile, Zuko and Iroh make crucial mistakes which begin to attract Jet's suspicions.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E14 - City of Walls and Secrets
2.plot: Having finally made it into Ba Sing Se, the kids are given a house in the upper ring. The kids are anxious to tell the Earth King their plan but there are complications. Meanwhile, still convinced that Iroh and Zuko may be Fire Nation, Jet decides to take matters into his own hands and do whatever it takes to get the refugees to reveal their true nature.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E15 - The Tales of Ba Sing Se
2.plot: A series of short stories, highlighting different characters and their individual adventures in the city. Tales of Katara and Toph, Iroh, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E16 - Appa's Lost Days
2.plot: Appa's journey from being abducted in the desert to the present is explored.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E17 - Lake Laogai
2.plot: Aang and his friends continue to search for Appa and, unbeknownst to them, they aren't the only ones looking for him. During their search, the kids meet up with Jet, whom they are understandably reluctant to trust. The kids soon realize that the Dai Li are doing their best to thwart the kids' efforts to find Appa. Meanwhile, Iroh is offered his own tea shop in the upper ring, and Zuko discovers the avatar is in the city.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E18 - The Earth King
2.plot: The kids battle Long Feng and the Dai Li when they attempt to show the Earth King the vast conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has feverish dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E19 - The Guru
2.plot: Aang travels to the Eastern Air temple to receive guidance from Guru Pathik while Sokka is reunited with his long-lost father. Meanwhile, Azula has something diabolical in store for her enemies in the Earth Kingdom, including Zuko and Iroh.

2.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S02E20 - The Crossroads of Destiny
2.plot: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister plan. Zuko finds companionship in an unlikely source. Aang's destiny hangs in the balance—and so does Zuko's, as Iroh tells him it's time to make a choice.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E01 - The Awakening
3.plot: Aang awakens to find himself aboard a captured Fire Nation ship with a full head of hair and sustaining serious injuries from the previous battle for Ba Sing Se. At his side are Katara, Sokka, and their father Hakoda who recount the events that led the four to the ship and contemplate their next move. Aang struggles to fight his own desire to face the Fire Lord before he is ready. Meanwhile, Zuko deals with his own issues as he makes his long-awaited journey home, with the fear of his father's rejection hanging over his head.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E02 - The Headband
3.plot: To better blend in as Fire Nation citizens, Aang enrolls in a Fire Nation school, giving himself an opportunity to learn more about the Nation and to enjoy life as a normal kid for the first time since he discovered he was the Avatar. Meanwhile Zuko, growing more and more paranoid about the Avatar's false demise, brings himself to confront the imprisoned Iroh.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E03 - The Painted Lady
3.plot: When the gang arrives at a suffering fishing village, a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E04 - Sokka's Master
3.plot: Feeling as though he isn't contributing enough to the group, Sokka seeks out an elusive swordsmaster from whom he can learn the ways of the blade.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E05 - The Beach
3.plot: Zuko, Azula, Mai and Ty Lee take a vacation to Ember Island. In the process, they come to learn more about themselves and each other as well as their desires for the future. Elsewhere, Aang and the others face off against a new adversary.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E06 - The Avatar and the Firelord
3.plot: The tale of Avatar Roku and Fire Lord Sozin is revealed to Aang and Zuko by different sources.  Both learn about themselves and are shown the origins of the war.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E07 - The Runaway
3.plot: When Katara expresses her disapproval of Toph's new way to make quick cash, the group finds her too motherly and tension grows between Katara and Toph. When Katara finally decides to participate in this scam to disprove Toph's accusations, they are left vulnerable and are forced to face the dire consequences.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E08 - The Puppetmaster
3.plot: The gang investigates the bizarre disappearances taking place within an eerie town.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E09 - Nightmares and Daydreams
3.plot: Four days prior the invasion, Aang becomes nervous over his soon-to-come confrontation with the Fire Lord. His anxiety gets the better of him as he begins to suffer from outrageous nightmares and hallucinations. Meanwhile, Zuko becomes upset to learn that he was not informed about a war meeting.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E10 - The Day of Black Sun: The Invasion (1)
3.plot: The day of the eclipse has arrived, and the invasion force gathers together to make last preparations. They infiltrate the island and the battle begins. Meanwhile, Aang searches for the Fire Lord.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E11 - The Day of Black Sun: The Eclipse (2)
3.plot: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Fire Lord in time for the eclipse. Zuko confronts his father with shocking news.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E12 - The Western Air Temple
3.plot: Aang and the group arrive at the Western Air Temple, with Zuko in pursuit. Zuko wishes to help the Avatar end the war by teaching him firebending.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E13 - The Firebending Masters
3.plot: While teaching Aang firebending, Zuko realizes that he has lost all his firebending skills. To regain his powers, Zuko and Aang must seek the original source of firebending within the ruins of a lost civilization.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E14 - The Boiling Rock (1)
3.plot: Sokka wants to break his father out of jail and asks Zuko for information on Fire Nation prisons. Sokka and Zuko head for the Boiling Rock, a prison located in the middle of a volcano, to rescue Sokka's father.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E15 - The Boiling Rock (2)
3.plot: Zuko and Sokka make new plans to break out of the prison with Suki, Sokka's father and some others while a shocking twist leaves Azula none too happy with her two closest friends.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E16 - The Southern Raiders
3.plot: Katara decides to confront the Fire Nation soldier responsible for her mother's death. Aang tries to talk her out of it, but she doesn't listen.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E17 - The Ember Island Players
3.plot: A play recounting the gang's adventures does not sit well with Aang and his friends, except for Toph who enjoys it very much. Meanwhile, Aang confesses his love to Katara, but the response is ambiguous.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E18 - Sozin's Comet: The Phoenix King (1)
3.plot: Aang struggles to decide whether or not he has to kill the Fire Lord and, during the night, is drawn toward an island which disappears before morning. Zuko leads the rest of the group to the Earth Kingdom to meet a tracker whom they hope can find Aang. The Fire Lord crowns himself Phoenix King and Aang awakens on the island not knowing where he is.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E19 - Sozin's Comet: The Old Masters (2)
3.plot: While on the island, Aang seeks guidance from his past lives, but is not pleased with what he is told. The island, in fact, turns out to be a lion turtle from which Aang is given the guidance he had been seeking. After the tracker is unable to track Aang, the rest of the group decide they must find Iroh. Meanwhile, while tracking down Iroh, the group meets up with The Order of the White Lotus, a group that transcends the division of the four nations.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E20 - Sozin's Comet: Into the Inferno (3)
3.plot: Sokka, Suki, and Toph try to stop the Fire Nation's air fleet. Meanwhile, Zuko and Azula duel in an Agni Kai and Aang confronts the Fire Lord. On the verge of losing, Aang gets hit in the back of his scar which sends him into the Avatar State.

3.title: FR - Avatar : Le dernier maître de l'air - S03E21 - Sozin's Comet: Avatar Aang (4)
3.plot: Aang defeats the Fire Lord by bending the elements within the Fire Lord and removing his firebending abilities. After Zuko is taken down protecting Katara from Azula, Katara joins the fight and manages to restrain Azula. Afterwards, Zuko is crowned Fire Lord and promises a better future for the world, while Aang takes his place as the next Avatar. Katara finally shows her love for Aang as they kiss under the setting sun.

meta.plot: Ang est un jeune Maître de l'Air, mais c'est surtout l'Avatar, un être unique qui maîtrise tous les éléments - Feu, Air, Eau et Terre. Lors d'un terrible orage, il sombre dans la mer et hiberne grâce à ses pouvoirs d'Avatar, pour se réveiller un siècle plus tard dans un monde tyrannisé par la puissante Nation du Feu et où il est le dernier représentant de son peuple. Aidé de ses deux amis de la Tribu de l'Eau, Ang va devoir réveiller l'Avatar en lui, apprendre à contrôler tous les éléments et se battre contre la menace que les Maîtres du Feu font peser sur le monde.

The gripping story of three different families living in the same house in the 1960’s, 1980’s and present day. The families are linked by the spirit of a young girl – the 1960’s family’s daughter who died in mysterious circumstances.

1.title: FR - Marchlands - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 1968, Ruth is haunted by the memory of the death of her young daughter Alice. In 1987, parents Helen and Eddie are increasingly worried about their daughter Amy, who claims to have an imaginary friend called Alice. In 2010, Mark and his pregnant girlfriend Nisha move in. While stripping wallpaper, Nisha finds a photograph of a young girl - just before she falls off a ladder and breaks her ankle.

1.title: FR - Marchlands - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: In 1968, Ruth is determined to find out the truth about Alice's death, while in 1987 Helen and Eddie take Amy to see a psychiatrist. In 2010, Mark arranges for a local woman to help out around the house for an increasingly unnerved Nisha.

1.title: FR - Marchlands - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: In 1968, Ruth and Paul fight after discovering they are unlikely to have any more children, while in 1987 Eddie unearths intriguing details about Alice and an increasingly isolated Scott has a seizure. In 2010 Ruth is shocked when she hears Nisha intends to name her baby Alice.

1.title: FR - Marchlands - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: In 1968, Robert attempts to convince an upset Paul to leave the village and make a fresh start with Ruth. In 1987, Eddie and Helen are still arguing and then Amy disappears. In 2010, a worn out Nisha is becoming increasingly unsettled by strange goings on at the house.

1.title: FR - Marchlands - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: In 1968, Paul wants an upset Ruth to leave Marchlands with him. Things end up coming to a head between Robert and Evelyn. In 1987, Eddie and Helen are still arguing. Eddie takes Amy to visit Alice's grave. Scott suffers with another seizure. In 2010, Nisha is shocked after she finds out that Mark has lied to her about the history of Marchlands. Ruth finds out the truth about what really happened to her daughter.

meta.plot: Dans cette série d'anthologie de science-fiction, la curiosité mène parfois à la catastrophe. Des étudiants sont les témoins de phénomènes étranges.

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E01 - Test Subject 13
1.plot: Jacob is desperate to make the school track team and his height is holding him back. Can a medical research lab help him grow faster?

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E02 - Copycat
1.plot: Aspiring dancer Jesse can’t balance his priorities, so a friend builds his robotic duplicate. But things take a turn when Jesse loses control of his double.

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E03 - Picture Perfect
1.plot: After her parents’ divorce, Emily uses a memory therapy device to relive happier times—until an error threatens to erase the past forever.

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E04 - Entangled
1.plot: Carefree student Seth and his strict principal mistakenly swap bodies when a school presentation goes wrong.

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E05 - Permanent Detention
1.plot: When time seemingly freezes, a mismatched group of students get trapped in detention and must work together to find a way out.

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E06 - Parental Controls
1.plot: Siblings Jack and Cassady buy a new remote for their media room and discover it can control their overbearing parents—for better and worse.

1.title: FR - Drôle de science - S01E07 - No Place Like Home
1.plot: In a self-sustaining home on Mars, Cricket and her family prepare to host visitors, but a storm jeopardizes their plans and safety.

meta.plot: Darius, vif, passionné, un brin magouilleur est le boss des « Invisibles », une brigade à la marge qui gère des enquêtes sur les corps sans identité, sans histoire, sans passé…

1.title: FR - Les Invisibles - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Invisibles - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Invisibles - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les Invisibles - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Les Invisibles - S01E05 - Episode 5

2.title: FR - Les Invisibles - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Invisibles - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Invisibles - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les Invisibles - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - Les Invisibles - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Les Invisibles - S02E06 - Episode 6

3.title: FR - Les Invisibles - S03E01 -
FR - Les Invisibles - S03E02 -
FR - Les Invisibles - S03E03 -
