meta.plot: California, une jeune fille de treize ans, et ses trois parents adoptifs entreprennent un voyage de Mexico à Zacatecas afin de retrouver sa mère, dont elle est sans nouvelles depuis neuf ans. Ce qu'ils ne savent pas, c'est qu'ils sont suivis par deux drôles de voyous aux intentions suspectes.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E01 - The Gift
1.plot: California receives a gift and an invitation to go after her mother's trail with her tree parents

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E02 - The Rescue
1.plot: The van breaks down. While they fix it, California rescues Pigorberta, a stray pig they want to cook, but gives her back to her mother. They meet Neto, a magician who wants to go on a trip with them.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E03 - The Secret
1.plot: While travelling through Guadalajara, Diego and the whole family are forced to return to his parents' house. California discovers some revealing secrets, and not everything in her life is as she thought.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E04 - Guilt
1.plot: With no money and no petrol, the family stays in an inhospitable town where they have to work to get the means to continue their journey. California feels guilty for frustrating his parents' musical dream.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E05 - The Return
1.plot: Once in Zacatecas, Miguel must make a decision and must choose between his family or Paulina. The musical band returns to perform for the first time in eight years, while Itzel is closer than they think.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E06 - The Search
1.plot: In Zacatecas, California goes to an environmental meeting of Pablo Sandoval in search of her mother, while Itzel tries to trick the malandras and devises a new plan to meet her daughter without being in danger.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E07 - The Change
1.plot: Full of anticipation, the gang continues their journey after the new Itzel trail to a new meeting point: Baja California. During the journey, something unexpected happens to California.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E08 - The Arrival
1.plot: In Mazatlán, Itzel manages to trick the villains. The parents know there is little to finish the journey and they do not want to say goodbye to their daughter, so they try to delay boarding the ferry at all costs.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E09 - The Enemy
1.plot: Finally, the meeting between California and her mother arises in Mazatlan. The parting between the girl and her three parents is inevitable. The family learns the reason for Itzel's disappearance over the past nine years.

1.title: FR - Papas à la Demande - S01E10 - The Destination
1.plot: California, Miguel, and Diego are trapped, but all is not lost: they can still be rescued.

meta.plot: Alain Chabat revient à la télévision pour animer du lundi au vendredi à 23 heures sur TF1, un late show à la française.  (diffusion du 21 Novembre au 2 Décembre 2022)

1.title: FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Le Late avec Alain Chabat - S01E07 - Episode 7

meta.plot: L'éditrice de livres Susan Ryeland reçoit un manuscrit inachevé de l'écrivain mystère à succès Alan Conway mettant en vedette le personnage principal de longue date de Conway, le détective Atticus Pünd. Lorsqu'elle tente d'atteindre les derniers chapitres de Conway, elle se retrouve au milieu d'un cas mystérieux et choquant qui va changer sa vie d'une manière à laquelle elle ne s'attendait pas.

1.title: FR - Comptine mortelle - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Editor Susan Ryeland is eagerly awaiting the manuscript from Clover Books' number one best-selling author Alan Conway, whose hero Atticus Pünd regularly solves murder mysteries in the fictional village of Saxby on Avon. Susan is drawn into her own mystery when she and her boss realise that the final chapter is missing and Conway is found dead in his shrubbery.

1.title: FR - Comptine mortelle - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Staying with her sister Katie while searching for the missing last chapter, Susan visits Abbey Grange, the grand home of Alan Conway, where she discovers that his notes are also missing. Meanwhile, Atticus Pünd and his faithful assistant Fraser are in Saxby on Avon investigating the murder of Sir Magnus Pye.

1.title: FR - Comptine mortelle - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Susan finds herself under pressure to make decisions as CityWorld need to know if she wants to be CEO, but Andreas wants to go back to Crete. She is still determined to find the missing last chapter of Alan Conway's book, and her suspicions are further aroused about his untimely end.

1.title: FR - Comptine mortelle - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Susan and Charles attend the funeral of Alan Conway, his creation Atticus Pünd and his faithful secretary Fraser are also attending the funeral of Sir Magnus Pye. Much to Susan's horror, she realises that her world and Conway's fiction have more in common than mere coincidence.

1.title: FR - Comptine mortelle - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Susan confronts Andreas about the incriminating photograph that has been e-mailed to her. In Saxby on Avon, Atticus Pünd assists Inspector Chubb in the investigation of the murders of Mary Blakiston and Magnus Pye by suggesting that police divers search the lake.

1.title: FR - Comptine mortelle - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Susan is put under more pressure by Charles, who tells her that he has approached someone else for the CEO job at Clover Books, but she is seemingly no closer to finding the missing chapter. Atticus Pünd is confident that he has at last discovered the identity of the Saxby on Avon murderer.

meta.plot: Stella is a young, cute, libertine, tough, confident, intelligent, cunning Icelandic lawyer with a flexible moral compass who takes on mysterious and often dangerous cases and only loves rules when she's breaking them.

1.title: FR - Stella Blómkvist - S01E01 - Murder at the Ministry - Part 1
1.plot: Stella begins to look into the murder of a Cabinet member and is determined to find out what actually happened. It doesn't take long before powerful people begin to interfere.

1.title: FR - Stella Blómkvist - S01E02 - Murder at the Ministry - Part 2
1.plot: Stella continues her investigation despite numerous warnings. She soon discovers that the victim was blackmailing politicians based on compromising videos.

1.title: FR - Stella Blómkvist - S01E03 - Murder at Swan Lake - Part 1
1.plot: A powerful investor is murdered in her family home. Her niece comes under suspicion and her family contacts Stella, desperate to clear her name. As Stella looks further into the matter, she finds out that not everything is as it seems.

1.title: FR - Stella Blómkvist - S01E04 - Murder at Swan Lake - Part 2
1.plot: While continuing to investigate the murder and who would want to blame her client, Stella learns that Orunn and her friends have carried out numerous previous attacks.

1.title: FR - Stella Blómkvist - S01E05 - Murder at Harpa - Part 1
1.plot: The Chinese government's ambassador is trying to discern sensitive information that Stella has in her hands. She needs to save herself from the execution team in China's blackout.

1.title: FR - Stella Blómkvist - S01E06 - Murder at Harpa - Part 2
1.plot: With Stella now the main suspect in the murder of a powerful employee of the Chinese embassy, she must use every resource to try and find out who the real culprit is and how to bring them to justice before it's too late.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E01 - The Violet Behind the Ultra
1.plot: An overshadowed 13-year-old girl finally gets to shine when a magical luchador mask bestows her with superpowers akin to those of the city’s resident superhero, Black Scorpion.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E02 - You Like Me! You Really Like Me!
1.plot: Worried her Ultra Violet social media account isn't getting enough likes, Violet grows impatient with Cruz's training techniques and plans her own crime-fighting mission.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E03 - Lucha Royale
1.plot: Violet struggles to find the balance between family and her superhero life when she invites her Uncle Cruz to a lucha libre to celebrate Nina’s promotion.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E04 - Sleepover Showdown
1.plot: At the girls' first sleepover, Violet tries to fit in with Maya and her new friends with a little help from her mask.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E05 - The Legend of the Twelve Masks
1.plot: When Violet discovers that there are 12 super-lucha masks, she begins to suspect that the secret to Tiago’s success is that he has a mask of his own.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E06 - ¡Chisme! ¡Chisme! Read all about it!
1.plot: When an anonymous gossip blogger at school starts spilling embarrassing secrets, Violet resorts to questionable measures to stop them.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E07 - Ultra Matchmaker
1.plot: When Violet discovers that Cruz ended his last relationship because of his superlucha mask, she becomes determined to set him up with the perfect date.

1.title: FR - Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion - S01E08 - Ultra Violet Unmasked
1.plot: After Luis Leon snaps a photo of Ultra Violet unmasking herself, she enlists the help of Maya to stop him from revealing her true identity.

meta.plot: Violet Rodriguez, une adolescente mexicaine américaine de tous les jours, est choisie par un masque magique de luchador qui la transforme en Ultra Violet, un super-héros combattant le crime aux côtés de son oncle luchador, Cruz, également connu sous le nom de Black Scorpion.

1.title: FR - Les Impatientes - S01E01 -
FR - Les Impatientes - S01E02 -
FR - Les Impatientes - S01E03 -
FR - The Lawyer - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Siblings Sara and Frank (now a police officer and a lawyer) as children watched their parents die in a car explosion. Sara is still pursuing leads to find out who killed their parents, and Frank reluctantly joins her investigations.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Frank gets a case at the law firm representing Thomas Waldman. He is given a week to win and for the first time is forced to play the game in order to get closer to the truth about his parents' death.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: To win Waldman's confidence, Frank defends one of his henchmen. But things become complicated when the prosecutor turns out to be Patricia Staaf, with whom Frank had an affair and still has feelings.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Brian reveals to Frank that he has evidence that links the drugs business directly to Waldman, and Patricia agrees to give Brian witness protection. Sara is in danger of losing Liam's confidence by trying to help Frank.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Frank wants to avenge Patricia's shooting so decides against Sara's will to try to get Waldman's greatest enemy, Daniella Ayala, out of prison to create a drugs war. As a result, a gulf opens up between the two siblings.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Frank secretly helps his former colleague Fredrika to prepare for Daniella Ayala's review. Waldman becomes increasingly nervous and orders an attack against Ayala.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Sara is finally close to raiding the workshop in hope of finding drugs and putting away Bogdan. But when her team moves in there are no drugs to be found.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Sara gets fired from the police after her relapse and becomes increasingly indiscreet in her addiction. Frank tries to protect his sister whilst exploring every option to set Terese free.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Sara chooses to believe Blanka and decides to let go of revenge. Meanwhile, Frank is fighting in court to free an increasingly fragile Therese.

1.title: FR - The Lawyer - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Sara's identity is revealed, and when Frank is ordered by Waldman to accompany him on a business trip to Lithuania, the siblings realize that they are running out of time.

meta.plot: Frank Nordling is a young and exceptionally promising defense lawyer. When Frank learns the truth behind his parents' death, his whole world unravels. As children, Frank and his sister Sara witnessed their parents die in an explosion caused by a car bomb. As Frank finds out, they were murdered by one of the leaders in Copenhagen's criminal underworld, Thomas Waldman. In order to avenge his parents Frank must infiltrate Waldman's organization and become his personal lawyer and trusted confidant. To avoid putting those close to him in danger, Frank has to keep up appearances and play the game. But can he handle it? Is it worth the price? And who's really tricking whom?

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The Halcyon's owner Lord Hamilton holds a secret meeting that attracts the interest of American guest Joe O'Hara, while manager Richard Garland must deal with the arrival of Lady Hamilton a day earlier than expected.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Lady Hamilton wants to make changes and Garland is in her sights. The hotel manager insists he's not worried and that he just needs to show how indispensable he is, but Peggy and Feldman aren't so sure. Charity meets Joe and reveals her plans for revenge, but he refuses to help her. Emma and Betsey hit the town.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: In the wake of the fall of France to the Germans, guests flood into the hotel, including one who catches Lady Hamilton's eye - the Comte de St Claire. Peggy worries about Billy's enthusiasm to sign up as soon as he turns 18, but knows there is little she can do to protect him. When Max faces hostility from the staff, Emma goes out on a limb to defend him - and immediately regrets it.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Joe is offered the opportunity of a lifetime, but finds himself unexpectedly torn as the moral responsibility of staying in England to tell the story of the war weighs heavily on his shoulders. Betsey's mother comes for a surprise stay, leaving Sonny unsettled and wary of the reaction she incites from Betsey, while Lucian and Lady Hamilton continue their flirtation and Emma anxiously awaits news of Freddie when she hears that a plane from Squadron 392 has gone down.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Emma is in charge of the hotel and is put to the test hosting a society wedding for Lady Hamilton's friends the Ashworths. Celina Radimsky comes to the hotel to meet Freddie, who tries to offer consolation after her husband's death. Garland goes to the East End to help Peggy with some housekeeping, but has an encounter with a figure from his past while waiting outside a shop.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Life at the hotel continues as the Blitz rages. Emma finds Joe waiting for her at the staff entrance, remarkably curious about her work for the WVS, while Toby is worried sick after hearing a bomb fell on a shelter in Adil's neighbourhood of Paddington and killed everyone inside. Billy visits the kitchens and tells Dora that he has a job for her, while Lucian offers Lady Hamilton emotional support and Betsey and Sonny have a major altercation.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Garland asks Emma to take over running the celebrations for the 50th anniversary of the hotel, and Betsey catches the eye of a handsome man in the bar. Meanwhile MI5 officers arrive with a warrant to search the premises.

1.title: FR - The Halcyon - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The Halcyon celebrates its 50th anniversary. Lucian struggles to keep things in order as the pressure mounts. Garland and Lady Hamilton find a cause together.

meta.plot: The story of a bustling and glamorous five star hotel at the centre of London society and a world at war.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When his career is ruined by scandal, superstar magician Cameron Black has only one place to turn to practice his art of deception, influence and illusion — the FBI. Using every trick in the book and inventing new ones, he will help the government catch the world’s most elusive criminals while staging the biggest illusions of his career.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E02 - Forced Perspective
FR - Deception - S01E03 - Escapology
1.plot: When an art museum docent is held hostage, Kay enlists Cameron and his team to help rescue her using the art of escapology.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E04 - Divination
1.plot: When a psychic is murdered, Kay and Cam investigate only to learn she had a partner who’s now on the run. Enlisting her help, Cameron and the team take down an international arms dealer.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E05 - Masking
1.plot: When a church's stained glass window is stolen while a famous street artist is painting a mural nearby, Cam and the team's investigation leads them to the criminal.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E06 - Black Art
1.plot: When Cameron’s ex-girlfriend is robbed during Fashion Week, he insists on helping Kay with the investigation and the team finds themselves in the middle of a high-speed, dangerous chase.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E07 - Sacrifice 99 to Fool One
1.plot: When the Mystery Woman kidnaps Cameron, the FBI calls on Jonathan Black to help find him – and stop the Mystery Woman from committing her next crime.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E08 - Multiple Outs
1.plot: The FBI works with the Deception group to help stop the Mystery Woman from successfully committing one of the largest jewel heists in history. And, for the first time this season, viewers will have their perspective reversed and see how Cameron Black performs his greatest deception yet.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E09 - Getting Away Clean
1.plot: The Deception team gets an unexpected partner, while Gunter makes a discovery that will change the team's lives forever.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E10 - The Unseen Hand
1.plot: Cameron and Kay investigate a secret society where they learn that one of them has a close family connection.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E11 - Loading Up
1.plot: The team is called on to help stop a spy from stealing top-secret military information. Cameron is frustrated when someone from Kay's past comes back into the picture.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E12 - Code Act
1.plot: The Deception team goes up against the Mystery Woman in a battle of dueling deceptions.

1.title: FR - Deception - S01E13 - Transposition
1.plot: Just when Cameron thinks he finally has the Mystery Woman, she unleashes her most game-changing twist yet.

meta.plot: Cameron Black is the world's greatest illusionist. At least, that's what people used to call him—before his greatest secret was exposed and his career destroyed. Even worse, Cameron has good reason to believe this was no accident.
When a boatload of cannabis belonging to Moroccan drug lord El Feo is hijacked, the robbery has repercussions stretching across three countries.

1.title: FR - Cannabis - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When a boatload of cannabis belonging to Moroccan drug lord El Feo is hijacked, the robbery has repercussions stretching across three countries.

1.title: FR - Cannabis - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As El Feo faces a health crisis, Shams finds himself in a dangerous position, Anna confronts a loss, and Zohra works to clean up La Roseraie.

1.title: FR - Cannabis - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Zohra learns troubling information about the previous administration. El Feo discovers a revenge plot against him. Yassine and Shams track Comandante.

1.title: FR - Cannabis - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Morphée's intimidation tactics roil the neighborhood. Anna and Nadja form a partnership. Shams carries out an audacious plan for retribution.

1.title: FR - Cannabis - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Anna receives a shock when she travels to Morocco to meet El Feo's supplier. After Big Ben runs afoul of Morphée, Shams's situation grows more dire.

1.title: FR - Cannabis - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Facing scrutiny from the law, El Feo approaches Anna with a proposition. Yassine undertakes a risky mission. Shams takes steps to neutralize Morphée.

meta.plot: Los Angeles, 1821. Illégitime à son poste d'alcade, Don Diego doit trouver une solution à ses problèmes et à ceux de la ville. Poussé par Bernardo, il ressort le masque de Zorro. Le retour du justicier est un succès immédiat... au grand dam de Diego.

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: 1821. Don Diego succeeds his father as the leader of Los Angeles, a town of 1,200 souls. He plans to bring water to the city, but faces the harsh reality of a town deeply in debt to Don Emmanuel. The situation is desperate, and Diego must find a solution…

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After the kiss shared between Gabriella and Zorro, Diego decides to get rid of his alter ego’s costume. Unmasked and with the support of the law, he is determined to put an end to Don Emmanuel's slave-trading practices!

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After the casino’s opening, chips have become the only currency in town. Worse, while the people refuse to pay the tax to rebuild the water tower, they don’t hesitate to give their money to erect a golden statue of Zorro!

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Zorro is drunk with joy after the night spent with Gabriella… and Diego, drunk with pain. If only they weren’t the same man! Dazed by his jealousy, Zorro asks Gabriella for the impossible: to choose between Diego and him.

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Having abandoned his home, Diego lets Zorro settle at the de la Vega hacienda. But the hero of the night isn’t used to the demands of the day...

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: With Zorro gone, Diego hopes to win back Gabriella's heart, but she refuses to believe in the hero's death. Diego insists, he was found, and a procession is being prepared! Under Bernardo’s reproachful gaze, Diego will have to face his lie.

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Diego, more confident than ever, begins constructing a royal palace to enhance the prestige of Los Angeles. Little does he know that Gabriella is furious, hurt by the revelation of her husband's manipulation...

1.title: FR - Zorro - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Diego must arrest the impostor dressed as Zorro who’s challenging his authority. He enacts arbitrary laws to imprison anyone who even remotely resembles the masked vigilante.

meta.plot: Witness the The Penguin's rise to power in Gotham's criminal underworld in the aftermath of the Riddler killings.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E01 - After Hours
1.plot: In the wake of Carmine Falcone's death, Oz attempts to legitimize himself among Gotham's criminal underworld.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E02 - Inside Man
1.plot: Sofia works to secure her family's strength, while Oz attempts to play both the Falcone and Maroni families to his advantage.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E03 - Bliss
1.plot: Hoping to control the future of Gotham's drug trade, Oz and Sofia must first address the skeletons in their closet. Meanwhile, Victor is torn between his new life and what remains of his old.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E04 - Cent'anni
1.plot: Confronting the events that turned her into "The Hangman" – and led to a decade-long fight to survive in Arkham State Hospital – Sofia makes plans for a more hopeful future.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E05 - Homecoming
1.plot: With his nascent operation at stake, Oz makes a desperate move to turn the tables. Meanwhile, Sofia strives to build a new legacy for herself.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E06 - Gold Summit
1.plot: Despite his enemies' attempts to smoke him out, Oz seeks to expand his reach in the city. Meanwhile, Victor crosses paths with a former adversary.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E07 - Top Hat
1.plot: Oz fights to preserve his family and his enterprise, while Sofia makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - The Penguin - S01E08 - A Great or Little Thing
1.plot: Truths are laid bare as Oz Cobb nears the end of his journey and his power struggle with Sofia comes to a head.

meta.plot: The complex world of our bravest military heroes who make personal sacrifices while executing the most challenging and dangerous missions behind enemy lines.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The complex world of our bravest military heroes who make personal sacrifices while executing the most challenging and dangerous missions behind enemy lines

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E02 - Moscow Rules
1.plot: The team heads to Russia when C.I.A. Officer Cassie Archer is attacked by rebels in the area. Patricia and her team work to learn why Archer is so important for the rebels to take out and Noah reveals an unexpected connection to the case.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E03 - The Greater Good
1.plot: After receiving intel that a serious player in dealing international arms, Ranier Boothe, will be visiting Caborca, Mexico, Patricia makes a controversial decision that could lead to a big break through. With Dalton's team on the ground, they must find a weak link in Boothe's men in order to carry out the mission. Meanwhile, Noah learns about Hannah's complicated past in the field.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E04 - Break Out
1.plot: An American traitor who turned to terrorism becomes integral in preventing the next attack on U.S. soil. When the only interrogator who can do the job is brought in to stop the attack, there is an unexpected breach in the prison where Dalton is stationed.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E05 - Enhanced Protection
1.plot: When the Ambassador Charles Webb is in danger while stationed in Nigeria, Dalton's team heads to the region to find a situation different than they expected. Jaz makes a connection with a little girl she meets during the mission and Patricia receives some personal news.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E06 - The Seville Defection
1.plot: When the team is on the ground in Spain, McG makes a connection that leads the group to discover a potential threat stateside. Meanwhile, Noah and Hannah venture out of the office to get some intel of their own.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E07 - It's All Personal
1.plot: As the team heads to Paris on a mission connected to Amir's undercover past, things get more personal than they would like. With stakes as high as ever, the unit learns more about their newest member and what might have brought him to them.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E08 - Stealth
1.plot: When an undocumented drone crashes on the border of Mongolia, the team is forced to investigate the old school way. Meanwhile, a stunning realization takes place in the D.I.A.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E09 - Desperate Times
1.plot: After embarking on mission after mission to keep the world safe, the team is confronted with a task that hits close to home. When things go sideways, the only option is to risk one of their own for their final shot to settle the personal score.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E10 - Desperate Measures
1.plot: Dalton and what remains of his team try to escape with their lives as they process a devastating loss; Patricia will stop at nothing to make things right, even if it means putting her career at risk.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E12 - Close to Home (1)
1.plot: When an unlikely suspect is involved in hacking a U.S. submarine, Dalton and his team stumble upon a piece of Patricia's past. With national security and lives at stake, Patricia heads to Turkey to confront one of her most epic demons.

1.title: FR - The Brave - S01E13 - Close to Home (2)
1.plot: With just four short weeks before Dalton and his team finish their deployment, they continue to race the clock on a high-stakes mission. As they learn more about Hoffman, Patricia and the group attempt to use his intel to save innocent lives, but the information comes at a cost.

meta.plot: Adventurer James Keziah Delaney returns to London from Africa in 1814 along with fourteen stolen diamonds to seek vengeance after the death of his father.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: James Delaney returns to 1814 London after 10 years in Africa to claim a mysterious legacy left to him by his father.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As James Delaney assembles his league of the damned, an unexpected arrival threatens to disrupt his plans.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: James Delaney decides to take radical action in order to safeguard himself from those intent on his demise.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Blacklisted, James Delaney sets out to protect his business by any means necessary.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: James Delaney is blackmailed into a dangerous mission, whilst animosity between the Crown and Company escalates to a new level.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The East India Company declares war on James Delaney, whilst a family revelation drives him into dark and haunted places.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A devastating betrayal puts James Delaney’s freedom in jeopardy, handing his enemies the opportunity they've been longing for.

1.title: FR - Taboo - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: As James Delaney conspires to escape, an enraged Prince Regent unleashes one final plan to destroy him.

1.title: FR - Souviens-toi - S01E01 -
FR - Souviens-toi - S01E02 -
FR - Souviens-toi - S01E03 -
FR - Souviens-toi - S01E04 -
FR - Souviens-toi - S01E05 -
FR - Souviens-toi - S01E06 -
FR - Chicago Justice - S01E01 - Fake (III)
1.plot:
Firehouse 51 responded to a horrific warehouse fire that killed 39 people. This led the Chicago P.D. on a manhunt for the suspect. Now with someone in custody for both arson and multiple murders, it is up to Peter Stone and his team, including lead investigator Antonio Dawson to step in to bring some peace and resolution to so many families and friends of those lost - including one very close to home.

The crossover starts on Chicago Fire S05E15 Deathtrap (I) and Chicago P.D. S04E016 Emotional Proximity (II).

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E02 - Uncertainty Principle
1.plot: Stone and the State's Attorney team investigates the chain of events following the arrest and death of a young man, ultimately seeking charges against Police, Fire Department and Medical personnel, only to have a recalcitrant Grand Jury indict a single individual: Officer Kevin Atwater. Paul Robinette defends Atwater.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E03 - See Something
1.plot: When a Muslim grad student is brutally murdered, Stone and the team arrest his friend, another Muslim student, who claims he committed murder to prevent a terrorist attack. The jury must decide whether he's a killer or a hero.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E04 - Judge Not
1.plot: When a prominent judge is shot and killed while leaving a bar with Valdez, her integrity is called into question and Stone prohibits her from working the case. The team learns the judge's death is connected to a trial where he handed down a lenient sentence to a college rapist.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E05 - Friendly Fire
1.plot: When a man is found stabbed to death in his home, Nagel and Antonio discover he was an ex-Navy SEAL who was writing a book that exposed the truth about a top-secret mission. Stone becomes convinced that the SEAL was killed to suppress the real story of what actually happened on the failed mission.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E06 - Dead Meat
1.plot: 30 miles outside of Chicago, the cancer riddled body of Chicago PD Officer Tim Cody is found dead in a bathtub. When Antonio and Nagel arrive on scene they quickly determine his death was murder.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E07 - Double Helix
1.plot: When a pregnant woman is found murdered and her baby cut out of her, the State's Attorney's Investigators race to find the baby and the killer. The case is complicated when it's revealed that the killer's DNA matches that of her father: a convicted serial killer already in prison. Both killers then attempt to use the DNA evidence as their ticket to freedom.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E08 - Lily's Law
1.plot: When a female juror on Stone's case against a gangbanger winds up dead, the team believes she was murdered because of her guilty vote. They later learn that she committed suicide - driven to it by the cyber harassment of her former boyfriend. Stone goes after him for murder.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E09 - Comma
1.plot: When Abigail Chapman returns from Spain after being acquitted for murdering her boyfriend while studying abroad, she finds herself the prime suspect in another murder case involving a young college student. During the trial of the real killer, the Second Amendment is put to the test.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E10 - Drill
1.plot: After an innocent girl is killed in a gang-related shooting that was instigated on social media, Stone's obsession for justice endangers the family of a cooperating witness. To salvage his crumbling case, Stone must go head-to-head in the courtroom against both the social media providers who inadvertently fueled the gang war and a cocky young man who may have pulled the trigger.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E11 - AQD
1.plot: When an anti-environmentalist Alderman is killed during a vicious hit-and-run, Antonio and Nagel go all out to track down the driver. But instead of this being an organized hit to save the environment, it turns out the driver is a frantic mother desperate to save her kidnapped daughter. When Valdez discovers the mother was victim of a scam, the legal question becomes complicated: who is responsible for the Alderman's death? The mother trying to save her daughter? Or the perpetrators of the scam?

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E12 - Fool Me Twice
1.plot: After a man is shot multiple times and left for dead, and a kilo of diluted heroin is found in his car, Antonio discovers other similar cases where murder victims were found with the same type of adulterated drugs. Ultimately, the narcotics detectives involved in the case-one a decorated hero-appear to be the common thread. Meanwhile, Stone is hesitant to let Nagel be involved in the case, as she has a close connection to the victim.

1.title: FR - Chicago Justice - S01E13 - Tycoon
1.plot: A crane collapses at a construction site and kills the son-in-law of wealthy real estate developer, Frank Linden. Nagel and Antonio, with the help of and CFD Chief Boden discover that the collapse wasn't actually an accident. The team digs into Linden, who has made many enemies, more dangerous friends, and is accustomed to using his money to get his way.

meta.plot: The State's Attorney's dedicated team of prosecutors and investigators navigates heated city politics and controversy head-on, while fearlessly pursuing justice.

meta.plot: When a terrorist group led by the villainous Jacob Pearce attacks a high-profile event, with the French Minister of Defence as their target, protection officer Vincent Taleb finds himself working with street-smart MI6 operative Zara Taylor to save the day. But when events take a dark turn, Vincent and Zara soon realize that the plan extends beyond just one politician. When they suspect that one of their colleagues in the security services is feeding information to Jacob, Vincent and Zara find themselves needing to rely only on each other. Increasingly isolated and with Jacob always one step ahead, can this unlikely pair stop Paris from falling to a man hell-bent on vengeance?

But when a murder forces his family's past to return to threaten them, Alex is drawn into the criminal underworld and must confront his values to protect those he loves.

meta.plot: Captain Marianne Aubrais is a detective with the Le Havre Police Department. Should she believe a child who tells her that his mother is not his mother? After all, she is busy investigating a robbery that happened months ago. Stolen goods worth hundreds of thousands of euros have not been recovered and two fugitives are still at large. But if the kid’s story is not pure fantasy, it would be truly criminal to ignore it. The little boy’s memories are fading. If he is telling the truth, will he never grow up to be the adult he should have become? Will he finally be forced to accept the unthinkable and allow himself to be raised by a woman who may have abducted him?

Jeanne Deber, known as "La Mante", the famous serial murderer who terrorized France more than 20 years ago, is forced by the police to come out of isolation to track down her copycat. She agrees to collaborate on one condition: to have only one interlocutor, Damien Carrot, her son, who became a cop because of the crimes of his mother, and who refuses all contact with her since her arrest.

1.title: FR - La Mante - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Faced with a series of grisly unsolved murders, a police commissioner turns to imprisoned serial killer Jeanne Deber and her estranged son for help.

1.title: FR - La Mante - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As a furious Damien tries to figure out what his mother is up to, a clue found on Séverin's computer leads the team to the next potential victim.

1.title: FR - La Mante - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Damien uncovers a secret that sends him racing back to his childhood home. Unable to shake her suspicions, Lucie digs into her husband's past.

1.title: FR - La Mante - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The Mantis makes her next move, Achille finds a crucial clue linking the victims, and Damien pays a visit to his mother's psychiatrist.

1.title: FR - La Mante - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: When Jeanne receives a live video stream of the next victim, the team scrambles to stop a murder. New clues to the killer's identity emerge.

1.title: FR - La Mante - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: With the clock ticking and his family in danger, Damien weighs an offer from the killer. A rescue mission takes an unexpected turn.

meta.plot: Kit "Kick" Lannigan est une rescapée d'un kidnapping particulièrement médiatisé. Elle a été sauvée par l'agent du F.B.I. Frank Booth. Déterminée à ne plus jamais être une victime, Kick s'entraîne aux arts martiaux et au maniement des armes à feu. Elle trouve sa vocation lorsque Booth la persuade de rejoindre une équipe spéciale chargée de résoudre les affaires d'enlèvements et de personnes disparues. Au cours de cette mission captivante, aux côtés de son partenaire John Bishop, ancien officier des services de renseignement de l'armée, Kick apporte à l'équipe sa connaissance unique de ce type de prédateur.
London, 1605. Robert Catesby, a 33-year old Warwickshire gentleman, devises a plot to blow up Parliament and kill the King.

1.title: FR - Gunpowder - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: It is 1603, and as England wars with Spain and the bloody persecution of Catholics intensifies, a young nobleman resolves to avenge his kin and defend his faith by any means necessary.

1.title: FR - Gunpowder - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the king's network of spies close in on them, Catesby and Wintour attempt to raise an army for their plot across mainland Europe. Returning to London with Guy Fawkes in tow, Catesby assembles his gang of plotters for the first time. They know they must act fast, and the plan is formed - they will strike next week, 5 November, at the opening of Parliament.

1.title: FR - Gunpowder - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: On the eve of the 5th of November, Catesby, Fawkes and the plotters load the tunnels below Parliament with barrels of gunpowder. Across the city, Father Garnet is under pressure to reveal Catesby's plot for the good of the Catholic faith. Will the priest be the one to betray Catesby at the eleventh hour?

meta.plot: Two detectives with opposing viewpoints are partnered together five years before the Apocalypse.

1.title: FR - Hard Sun - S01E01 - The Sun, The Moon, The Truth
1.plot: Unruly police detective DCI Charlie Hicks is deeply suspicious of his new partner DI Elaine Renko. But their first investigation exposes a secret that will connect them for life.

1.title: FR - Hard Sun - S01E02 - One Thousand, Eight Hundred Days
1.plot: Renko persuades a newspaper to publish the Hard Sun dossier. The government shuts down the story but the detectives investigate a killer for whom the 'Hard Sun hoax' is very real.

1.title: FR - Hard Sun - S01E03 - Luke 21.25
1.plot: A murderer confesses to a priest that he wants to challenge God into revealing Himself by targeting those who help others. Grace makes Hicks an offer.

1.title: FR - Hard Sun - S01E04 - Can You Hear Him Now
1.plot: London is under siege as Blackwood's reign of terror escalates, and Father Dennis becomes a public pariah. Hicks deduces where Renko has hidden the Hard Sun flashdrive.

1.title: FR - Hard Sun - S01E05 - Not The End Of The World
1.plot: The murder of a jogger has dire personal implications for Renko but she pretends it is a routine investigation. Hicks makes a startling revelation about the Alex Butler murder.

1.title: FR - Hard Sun - S01E06 - Sun Day
1.plot: An internet killer is targeting people who believe they wish to die and Mooney thinks he knows how to trap him. Renko and Hicks change tactic and bring the fight to Grace's door.

1.title: FR - Innocent - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After seven years in prison for the murder of his wife, David Collins is released due to a technicality. The police now need to reopen the case in search for the murderer.

1.title: FR - Innocent - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As DI Hudson's new investigation unearths serious flaws in the original murder investigation, those who were closest to Tara are forced to explain away credible motives for wanting to kill her. Relationships are strained to breaking and damaging accusations fly when David confronts his brother and sister-in-law over access to his children.

1.title: FR - Innocent - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Alice and Rob's relationship continues to disintegrate as evidence under questioning incriminates them further, and the children grow closer to David. Meanwhile, Tom's attempts to save his marriage are destroyed by his subsequent arrest, and forensic evidence throws new light on David's original conviction.

1.title: FR - Innocent - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: David is the subject of a sensational tabloid story, and struggles to explain things to his children. Tom is confronted by his ex-wife, who demands his help. Last in the series.

meta.plot: After seven years in prison, David Collins is acquitted of the murder of his wife. Now, he must fight to rebuild his shattered life while police search for the real murderer.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E01 - Vertical Mobility
1.plot: In a corporate-controlled future, Spiga junior exec Ben Larson keeps secrets from family and co-workers; Laura, Ben's wife, contemplates a life change; outsider Theo is offered a dangerous job.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E02 - Downsizing
1.plot: Ben scrambles to deflect suspicion after the Spiga data breach. Laura offers to help when her mother's policies evict an innocent family. Theo is forced into an important cage fight.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E03 - Human Resources
1.plot: An exec from a rival company covertly offers valuable secrets, so Ben, Elizabeth, and Julian plan a defection. Laura responds to a domestic betrayal. In the past, Aaron and Elena meet again.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E04 - Cost Containment
1.plot: The Larsons clash with Elizabeth over life choices. Theo resists an order to cripple a basketball prodigy. Roger seeks help uncovering Ben's secrets. Aaron and Theo plan a daring heist.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E05 - Profit and Loss
1.plot: Ben improvises when Roger closes in on the truth about Elena, Laura takes her therapy to the next level, Elizabeth pressures Ben to finish a vital project and Julian aids a friend in need.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E06 - Sweating the Assets
1.plot: On a mission of mercy, Laura relives the harrowing events eight years ago that forever changed her life and her bonds with Elizabeth and Julian. Ben and Theo consider their next move after a sudden event.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E07 - Executables
1.plot: Ben races to finish the Everclear device and help Spiga question an enemy agent, Laura brokers to save a girl's sight and Theo's skills are tested against a well-conditioned opponent from uptown.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E08 - Operational Realignment
1.plot: After his strategy misfires, Ben's backup plan risks his life and Elena's rescue. Laura bypasses company policy to save a cardiac patient. Julian accepts Ben's help to investigate a murder.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E09 - Burning Platform
1.plot: Ben's ongoing investigation leads to a shock. Laura's child patient reveals sobering facts about life outside the wall. Elizabeth and Julian finally enact their bold plan against Inazagi.

1.title: FR - Incorporated - S01E10 - Golden Parachute
1.plot: Ben's mission reaches a critical juncture, Laura finds the thief, Theo ventures inside the wall, Elizabeth and Laura reckon with the fate of the clinic, and Julian tracks a killer.

meta.plot: Set in a near future where corporations have unlimited power, a young executive conceals his true identity to infiltrate a dangerous corporate world to save the woman he loves.
