meta.plot: In 1906 London, 14-year-old Theodosia “Theo” Throckmorton gathers an eclectic team that includes her younger brother Henry, along with friends Will and Egyptian Princess, Safiya, to fight a powerful secret society bent on destroying the world with ancient Egyptian dark magic.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E02 - The Curse
1.plot: Fearing her father has been cursed, Theo recruits Henry, street magician Will, and Egyptian princess Safiya in her search for a cure, leading them to the home of a mysterious thief – and a newfound world of magic and danger.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E03 - The Missing Princess
1.plot: After her experiments with ancient Egyptian magic go a little too well, Theo must race against the clock to save Safiya and her father from certain doom.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E04 - An Accidental Odyssey
1.plot: Theo’s plan to make her parents’ museum safe from dark forces is thrown into chaos when Will and Henry are whisked away by an ancient portal.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E05 - The Games People Play
1.plot: Sinister forces emerge while Theo and her friends take time out for a table-tennis tournament at the Penny Arcade.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E06 - Cleaning Catastrophe
1.plot: As Theo witnesses a change in the Eye of Horus’ magic, the Throckmortons receive a visit from an important official, and Henry tinkers with an explosive new invention.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E07 - The Head of the Snake
1.plot: After a magical vision leads Theo to suspect that the Eye of Horus is under threat, she must contend with the Serpents of Chaos and their masked leader, Yaret.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E08 - The Sound of Magic
1.plot: Theo and Will work to contain a dangerous beast, while Henry and Safiya search for a way to recover the Eye of Horus from the Serpents of Chaos.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E09 - Double Trouble
1.plot: Theo, Will, and Safiya face double trouble as they attempt a risky spell to retrieve the Eye of Horus from the Serpents’ secret lair beneath Cleopatra’s Needle.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E10 - The Darkening
1.plot: As the total eclipse and the Throckmorton’s fundraising party collide, Theo and her friends must work to keep the ever-enigmatic Eye safe from the Serpents.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E11 - The Pit of Despair
1.plot: After the Eye whisks them off to Egypt, Theo and Safiya race to reach the Staff of Osiris before the Serpents of Chaos catch up. Back in London, Will and Henry make use of a magical rope.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E12 - Wild Child
1.plot: After securing the museum against the Serpents, Theo uses her heightened abilities to get an edge in botany class. Later, Henry faces off against a dangerous enemy.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E13 - The Eye of the Needle
1.plot: With the Serpents of Chaos’ magic now unleashed unto the world, Theo and her friends race to break Yaret’s spells before chaos rules forever.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E15 - The Trouble with Time
1.plot: Can Theo save Will and Safiya who are trapped inside a secret room?

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E16 - The Age of Wisdom
1.plot: Theo tries to decipher the secrets of her grandfather’s journal with disastrous results.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E17 - The Nightmare at the Museum
1.plot: Theo must race to save Will, Safiya and Henry who have been swept into a dream world.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E18 - The Amazing Will
1.plot: The pyramidion’s power turns Will’s dreams of fame into a magical nightmare.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E19 - The Magic Flute
1.plot: It’s Theo’s fifteenth birthday party but someone is after the pyramidion’s secret.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E20 - An Impossible Choice
1.plot: Can Theo prevent Aapep escaping his prison beneath the Great Pyramid of Khufu?

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E21 - What Big Teeth You Have
1.plot: Theo and Will try to discover what the Serpents of Chaos are planning.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E22 - Snake and Ladder
1.plot: Someone or something has been stealing magical power from the museum.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E23 - Mummies Alive!
1.plot: Aapep is loose in London and the museum’s mummies have developed a mind of their own.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E24 - In Her Shoes
1.plot: An accidental body-swap forces Theo and Safiya to pretend to be each other.

1.title: FR - Theodosia - S01E25 - Once Bitten
1.plot: Will returns to Aapep’s lair, while Aapep forces Nigella to seek out and destroy Theo.

1.title: FR - Notre-Dame - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Notre-Dame - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Notre-Dame - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Notre-Dame - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Notre-Dame - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: As the Paris firefighters try to stop the flames from spreading in the Cathedral, the show also follows characters being put through the wringer - they will have to fight each other, love each other, come across each other, hate each other, smile at or help each other - so that, in the end, they may have a chance to start all over again.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E01 - The End
1.plot: Grace and Frankie are stunned when their husbands inform them that they want divorces. They're even more stunned when they find out why.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E02 - The Credit Cards
1.plot: The messy realities of divorce start to sink in for Grace, Frankie, Robert, Sol and their equally frazzled adult children.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E03 - The Dinner
1.plot: Grace and Frankie decide to go back to work. Robert and Sol have an awkward dinner party for their children.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E04 - The Funeral
1.plot: Emotions run high when a funeral throws Grace, Frankie, Robert and Sol together in public for the first time since the split.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E05 - The Fall
1.plot: Grace has an eye-opening experience when she goes out for frozen yogurt with Frankie and Briana on a Saturday night.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E06 - The Earthquake
1.plot: Sol takes care of Frankie after she has an earthquake freak-out, while Grace goes on her first date. Coyote pays Mallory a surprise visit.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E07 - The Spelling Bee
1.plot: Frankie, Grace and Briana have unexpected encounters when they try new ways to deal with being single.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E08 - The Sex
1.plot: Frankie takes a new look at her Yam Man Jacob, while Grace and Guy get closer. Bud and Coyote have a brotherly talk. Sol is terrified of Briana.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E09 - The Invitation
1.plot: Briana tries Frankie's homemade organic beauty product. Robert finds out about Guy and Grace. Frankie tries to set boundaries with Sol.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E10 - The Elevator
1.plot: After they sign the divorce papers, Frankie, Grace, Sol, Robert and Bud remember a pivotal weekend from five years before.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E11 - The Secrets
1.plot: Grace tells Frankie a secret that Frankie shares with Sol, setting off multiple arguments in both houses. Briana gets closer with a co-worker.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E12 - The Bachelor Party
1.plot: Bud and Coyote ask Briana and Mallory to help them throw Sol and Robert's bachelor party. Grace offers to do ANYTHING to cheer up Frankie.

1.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S01E13 - The Vows
1.plot: As the wedding day approaches, Grace and Robert have problems expressing themselves, while Sol and Frankie finally clear out their old house.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E01 - The Wish
2.plot: Sol plans to tell Robert about his betrayal. Frankie is determined to finally separate emotionally from Sol, but events pull her back in.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E02 - The Vitamix
2.plot: Brianna, Mallory and Bud help Sol deal with wedding details. A visit to Robert and Sol's house brings up strong emotions for Grace and Frankie.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E03 - The Negotiation
2.plot: Brianna wants to produce Frankie's organic yam lube. Grace competes for her grandchildren's affection. Frankie reconnects with her Yam Man, Jacob.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E04 - The Road Trip
2.plot: Frankie tracks down Grace's former love Phil on the internet, and the two set off to find him. Tensions arise between Sol and Robert.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E05 - The Test
2.plot: Frankie has difficulty passing the test to renew her driver's license. Grace attempts to amp up her social life by reconnecting with old friends.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E06 - The Chicken
2.plot: While Grace mentors a young woman seeking a new career, Frankie has conflicted feelings for Jacob, who wants more than a business relationship.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E07 - The Boar
2.plot: Grace intervenes after Robert and Sol's big fight. Frankie opens up to Jacob. An online friend request from Phil surprises Grace.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E08 - The Anchor
2.plot: Frankie has issues with Brianna's ideas for her yam lube and makes a stand. Phil asks Grace out for lunch. Sol tries to work things out with Robert.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E09 - The Goodbyes
2.plot: Coyote shares some surprising news. Things go awry when Frankie and Sol host a family brunch. Grace must make a difficult decision about Phil.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E10 - The Loophole
2.plot: Grace and Phil get closer, but complications arise. Sol and Robert square off on opposite sides of the conflict between Frankie and Brianna.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E11 - The Bender
2.plot: Grace and Frankie nurse their emotional wounds: Frankie performs a ritual on the beach, and Grace goes out drinking. Bud and Coyote meet Jacob.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E12 - The Party
2.plot: As Frankie helps her old friend Babe plan a big bash, she's faced with a troubling decision. Grace tries to make amends to Frankie.

2.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S02E13 - The Coup
2.plot: Frankie and Grace receive surprise gifts from Babe that open new horizons for each of them. Sol reveals a long-held secret at Bud's birthday party.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E01 - The Art Show
3.plot: Grace and Frankie try to get a bank loan to help start their new business. Frankie's art show is rife with family tensions and minor dramas.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E02 - The Incubator
3.plot: Grace and Frankie pitch their business plan at a hip startup incubator. Grace fights with Jacob. Sol and Robert play hooky from work.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E03 - The Focus Group
3.plot: Grace and Frankie put together a focus group to test their vibrator prototype, but things go awry. Robert and Sol audition for a play.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E04 - The Burglary
3.plot: After they're robbed, Frankie is rattled, but Grace has a secret. With Robert in rehearsals and making new friends, Sol feels left out.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E05 - The Gun
3.plot: Furious about Grace's revelation, Frankie refuses to make up with her. In the wake of his fight with Sol, Robert decides to come out to his mother.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E06 - The Pot
3.plot: Frankie refuses to go home, and all the kids are dragged into Grace and Frankie's fight. Grace, Brianna and Mallory smoke Frankie's pot together.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E07 - The Floor
3.plot: The ladies hurt their backs and can’t get off the floor. Coyote looks for a new home. Robert frets over unresolved issues with his mom.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E08 - The Alert
3.plot: Grace and Frankie launch their business, and Bud brings gifts they're reluctant to accept. Sol is upset that Bud wants to fire a longtime employee.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E09 - The Apology
3.plot: Jacob shares something with Frankie that upsets her. Everyone rallies around Robert when his mother dies. Mallory confides in Brianna.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E10 - The Labels
3.plot: Sol and Robert pitch in when Grace and Frankie are overwhelmed with orders. Bud is thrown for a loop by his girlfriend’s interest in the Ménage à Moi.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E11 - The Other Vibrator
3.plot: Grace and Frankie send a cease and desist letter to the company that stole their idea. A homophobic church group protests Robert's play rehearsals.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E12 - The Musical
3.plot: Grace wants Frankie to go to the hospital after a medical incident, but Frankie insists on alternative healing. The protests disrupt Robert's play.

3.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S03E13 - The Sign
3.plot: Grace and Frankie face a lawsuit. Sol fights back against the homophobic play protesters. Frankie mulls over a move that would change everything.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E01 - The Lodger
4.plot: Frankie feels left out of Grace's new friendship with Sheree, her new lodger. Sol and Robert are arrested. Bud and Allison throw a gender-reveal party.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E02 - The Scavengender Hunt
4.plot: Frankie shares what she discovered about Sheree to a skeptical Grace. Bud sends everyone on a scavenger hunt. Frankie makes a big decision.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E03 - The Tappys
4.plot: Grace and Frankie try to help Sheree get her house back... using both legal and illegal methods. Robert is nominated for a Tappy acting award.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E04 - The Expiration Date
4.plot: Grace fears her relationship has reached its expiration date. Frankie faces an existential crisis when she learns she's been declared legally dead.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E05 - The Pop-Ups
4.plot: Grace and Frankie hold vibrator pop-up sales at a senior center and a college. Sol and Robert have a disagreement. Bud and Allison hit a roadblock.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E06 - The Hinge
4.plot: Frankie reconnects with someone important from her past. Despite problems with her knee, Grace refuses to slow down. Robert tries to make amends.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E07 - The Landline
4.plot: Frankie and Sol have a blast devising a plan to get Frankie declared legally alive again. Grace faces some truths at a funeral she attends with robert.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E08 - The Lockdown
4.plot: Frankie convinces Allison to have a home birth. Grace and Frankie wind up stuck with a bickering Robert and Sol when there's a neighborhood lockdown.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E09 - The Knee
4.plot: Nick helps Grace while she's recovering from surgery. Jacob gets upset with Frankie because she wants to spend all their couple time with the baby.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E10 - The Death Stick
4.plot: Robert and Sol begin therapy. Grace and Frankie get a surprise when they bring gifts to a fan of their vibrators. Brianna's nemesis makes an offer.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E11 - The Tub
4.plot: Grace hires a contractor to fix an issue at the beach house. Sol's new friendship makes Robert uncomfortable. Frankie gets lost with the baby.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E12 - The Rats
4.plot: As Grace and Frankie deal with a major disaster in their home, they each keep secrets from other family members. Everyone attends Robert's play.

4.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S04E13 - The Home
4.plot: Prompted by their children, Grace and Frankie make a change. Robert and Sol channel some fresh energy into their marriage.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E01 - The House
5.plot: Grace and Frankie visit the beach house while their worried kids try to track them down. Robert and Sol are caught in an embarrassing situation.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E02 - The Squat
5.plot: Refusing to leave the beach house, Grace and Frankie get support from their ex-husbands -- who are having their own issues with an unexpected visitor.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E03 - The Aide
5.plot: Bud convinces Frankie to hire a home health aide. Grace fumes when she learns about Brianna’s changes to Say Grace. Robert hopes to influence Peter.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E04 - The Crosswalk
5.plot: Grace and Brianna clash at work as Grace faces a tough day. With Joan-Margaret's help, Frankie fights ageism. Peter's casting decision shocks Robert.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E05 - The Pharmacy
5.plot: An unexpected encounter sparks regret in Grace. Sol acts cagey about his new dog's origins. A stranger's ambush of Coyote leads to a revelation.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E06 - The Retreat
5.plot: Frankie takes Grace on a girls trip, which isn't exactly the spa retreat Grace was expecting. Mallory goes on a date. An old friend rebuffs Frankie.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E07 - The Tremor
5.plot: While Frankie worries she's lost her authenticity, Grace frets about Frankie's health. Bud's first meeting with Allison's father goes downhill fast.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E08 - The Ceremony
5.plot: Robert feels out of place with the younger guys at rehearsals. Grace doesn't like the new man in Frankie's life. Brianna must make a difficult choice.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E09 - The Website
5.plot: When the Vybrant website goes down, Grace and Frankie must negotiate with a demanding man from Walden Villas. Sol becomes more assertive.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E10 - The Highs
5.plot: Grace takes extreme measures to keep up her hectic schedule. Sol and Frankie have a disagreement about Coyote. Frankie bonds with Robert over edibles.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E11 - The Video
5.plot: While Frankie tries to dig herself out of the business mess she created, Grace comes up with a different solution. Brianna goes to bat for Barry.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E12 - The Wedding
5.plot: Grace returns to town to find that Frankie has everything under control. Bud and Allison's wedding day arrives, but not without some family drama.

5.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S05E13 - The Alternative
5.plot: In the wake of their big fight, Grace and Frankie imagine what their lives would be like if they hadn't lived together for the last three years.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E01 - The Newlyweds
6.plot: Frankie is stunned by Grace's news, but she buries her feelings -- until everyone gathers together to send off Bud and Allison.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E02 - The Rescue
6.plot: While Frankie tries to adjust to living alone, Grace arranges a family dinner that takes an awkward turn. Robert and Sol plan a honeymoon trip.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E03 - The Trophy Wife
6.plot: Grace's insecurities flare at a lavish fundraiser, where Frankie gets swept up in a silent auction. Sol hosts a game night to distract a worried Robert.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E04 - The Funky Walnut
6.plot: Robert and Sol grapple with a health scare, while Grace's bad knee sparks a new business idea. Coyote connects with Bud's ex-girlfriend.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E05 - The Confessions
6.plot: Grace worries that Nick isn't satisfied with their sex life. Sol decides to keep his diagnosis a secret, and Coyote comes clean about Jessica.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E06 - The Bad Hearer
6.plot: Robert's fussing irritates Sol. Barry presses Brianna and Mallory to make up. Frankie's date with Jack inspires a marketing strategy for the Rise Up.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E07 - The Surprises
6.plot: Grace wants to leverage Jack's celebrity connections... and Sol and Robert realize they've met him before. Bud tries to prove he's over Jessica.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E08 - The Short Rib
6.plot: Grace and Frankie introduce Jack to Nick, hoping they can all go on vacation together. Meanwhile, Barry finally gets his short-rib double date.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E09 - The One-At-A-Timing
6.plot: Frankie's enjoying having two men in her life, but Grace warns her it won't end well. Allison and Sol encourage Bud to get a DNA test.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E10 - The Scent
6.plot: Grace's plan for a relaxing spa day backfires. Frankie tries to find Joan-Margaret a husband. Robert hosts a fundraiser to save the community theater.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E11 - The Laughing Stock
6.plot: Grace and Frankie prepare for their pitch, but their prototype is missing. Robert keeps a secret from Sol. Brianna gets an appealing offer.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E12 - The Tank
6.plot: Grace's loyalties are tested as she and Frankie face the Sharks. Robert scrambles to recoup the money he donated. Bud meets his long-lost cousin.

6.title: FR - Grace et Frankie - S06E13 - The Change
6.plot: Grace tries to make amends to Frankie, Sol gives Robert a taste of his own medicine, and Brianna and Barry reach a turning point in their relationship.

meta.plot: L'élégante Grace et l'excentrique Frankie sont amenées à se rapprocher quand leurs maris respectifs les quittent pour vivre ensemble. Série nommée aux Emmys...

1.title: FR - Ángel Di María : À l'assaut du mur - S01E01 - 26 Footballs
1.plot: On a humble soccer pitch in Rosario, Argentina, young Ángel Di María's dream of being a footballer takes off — and changes his family's destiny forever.

1.title: FR - Ángel Di María : À l'assaut du mur - S01E02 - No One Is a Prophet in Their Own Land
1.plot: As Di María finds his footing at Real Madrid, personal struggles threaten to overcome him. A move to Manchester United brings riches and friction.

1.title: FR - Ángel Di María : À l'assaut du mur - S01E03 - From Coal to Gold
1.plot: Di María's doubts put his future into question. Thirty-six years after Argentina won the FIFA World Cup, the national team is back for a shot at glory.

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire retrace la vie et la carrière du légendaire joueur de football argentin, de ses origines modestes à son titre de champion du monde.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E01 - misprint
1.plot: Nina wakes up on board the spacecraft in her newly printed body. Shortly after greeting other crew members, they are met with a devastating challenge.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E02 - hunger
1.plot: While searching for Lewis, the crew uncovers a clue that reveals an unexpected side to him. Patty struggles to come to terms with the team consensus.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E03 - contact
1.plot: Nina comes up with an alternative plan to bringing Lewis back. Oscar finds himself in deep trouble when he tries to repair part of the ship.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E04 - collusion
1.plot: Hiding away from the others, the misprinted Lewis attempts to proclaim his innocence to his reprinted self.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E05 - investigation
1.plot: The two Lewises unlock vital clues that help narrow down the traitor. Meanwhile, Patty and Mack hatch a plan to get the group out of confinement.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E06 - betrayal
1.plot: Mack returns from the Womb with a clean slate. A seemingly peaceful game of cards goes haywire when Nina suddenly acts out of character.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E07 - survival
1.plot: As Patty's true intentions quickly unravel, the crew becomes increasingly divided with everything at stake.

1.title: FR - exception - S01E08 - gravitation
1.plot: While Mack attempts to dismantle the RA bomb, the rest of the crew fight for their lives as the ship quickly disintegrates.

meta.plot: In a distant future where humans are forced to leave Earth, a spacecraft carrying a 3D-printed crew of specialists is sent to terraform a new planet.

1.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S01E01 - The future belongs to those who get up when I go to bed
1.plot: Orelsan is a figure of the French music. But 20 years ago, in Caen, he did not consider making rap his profession. Singing about the boredom of the middle class in the provinces, that doesn't exist! The only ones who believe in it are his friends Skread, Ablaye, Gringe and especially his little brother, Clément. Camera in hand, the latter films him tirelessly.

1.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S01E02 - If you want to make a movie you just need something that make movie
1.plot: 2006. Orelsan is a rapper from the provinces. To release his first album, he has to manage alone. The arrival of MySpace is a godsend. But he still had to find a record company. With his friends, always followed by the camera of his brother Clément, they launch a challenge: to make a video clip themselves, in Caen, and to make it broadcast on TV.

1.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S01E03 - What I tell in my songs are clichés, it's not the truth
1.plot: 2008. Orelsan is now writing an album. But none of his tracks are radio-compatible. There is only one solution: to go and find his public by performing on stage. Orel and his friends, always followed by the camera of Clément, his little brother, manage to set up a tour. While everything is going well, a song of Orel resurfaces and launches a huge controversy.

1.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S01E04 - We are the future
1.plot: 2010. One year after the controversy, Orelsan stopped music altogether. When Skread and Ablaye persuaded him to make a second album, the hardest thing was to find a way back. But the lost loser from the provinces metamorphoses and his second album is a triumph. Always followed by his brother's camera, Orel is ready to live his first real tour, carried by his very first popular hit.

1.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S01E05 - I'll keep bullshitting until they take me seriously
1.plot: 2011. With Le Chant des Sirènes, Orelsan has changed dimension. As a king of counterpoint, he decided not to continue his solo adventure. He revived the Casseurs Flowters, the group created with Gringe in the early 2000s. But Gringe hasn't been rapping for years... Once their universe has been rediscovered, their wacky adventure will come to life on CD, on television and even in the movies...

1.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S01E06 - I thought I'd wake up one morning and, be a man
1.plot: 2016. After the enchanted parenthesis of Casseurs Flowters, Orelsan wants to return with a new solo album. But five years have passed, rap has changed. New trends, new artists, is Orelsan still in the game? La Fête est finie is an opportunity to draw a line under the post-teen years and become an adult. The dazzling success of the album will exceed all his expectations...

2.title: FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - ORELSAN : Montre jamais ça à personne - S02E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Au début des années 2000, Aurélien Cotentin est un jeune provincial de classe moyenne à l’avenir flou. Quand il se lance avec ses amis dans le rap, il n’a absolument rien pour réussir. Mais, suivi à la trace par la caméra de son petit frère, il va surmonter épreuves et polémiques pour redéfinir les contours du rap et devenir l’un des artistes français les plus populaires de sa génération.

1.title: FR - La Jeune Fille et la Nuit - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Four friends go to a party before the Christmas holidays. But Vinca cancels and later, in distress, calls Thomas. He rushes to school but she is gone, for good. 25 years later, Thomas receives a threatening invitation to a school reunion.

1.title: FR - La Jeune Fille et la Nuit - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Thomas and Max visit Francis to tell him the police have found Clement's body. Francis says he has engaged a Russian gang to recover the evidence. Meanwhile, Manon finds 100,000 francs in an old gym locker. Thomas pretends incredulity.

1.title: FR - La Jeune Fille et la Nuit - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Francis is kidnapped. Fanny admits that Vinca asked her to take pictures to blackmail Richard. One of Max's daughters is taken by the Russians. Pianelli hears of Ahmed's death, shortly after his revelations about the walled-up body.

1.title: FR - La Jeune Fille et la Nuit - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Max breaks down and confesses to Annabelle. When Thomas looks to find traces of the other Alexis, he finds traces of a secret house, belonging to Francis and Annabelle, and more. Meanwhile, Francis is beaten and interrogated by hooded men.

1.title: FR - La Jeune Fille et la Nuit - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Thomas is in mourning, his father is dead and his half-brother is in a coma. He no longer understands anything and Annabelle tells him Fanny has all the answers. Revelations from Fanny put Thomas on the trail of the real Alexis.

1.title: FR - La Jeune Fille et la Nuit - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: We go back 25 years and finally experience the events from Vinca's point of view. Back in the present, Annabelle confronts DeVille with a gun about the attacks on Francis, Ahmed and Max.

meta.plot: 1992. Vinca s’enfuit de son campus avec son professeur de philosophie dont elle est amoureuse. On ne la reverra jamais. Vingt-cinq ans plus tard, lors d’une réunion d’anciens élèves, trois amis apprennent que le gymnase dans lequel ils avaient emmurés le corps va être détruit. Dès lors, plus rien ne s’oppose à ce que la vérité éclate.

1.title: FR - Redemption - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Detective Colette Cunningham takes a call from Dublin, where she has been named next of kin to her murdered daughter Kate, who vanished 20 years prior.

1.title: FR - Redemption - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Surprised by her latest find, Colette travels to the hospital where Stacey worked to speak with those who knew her, in the hopes of understanding her daughter.

1.title: FR - Redemption - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After a visit from organised crime, Collette is more suspicious than ever about Stacey's supposed suicide and pieces together clues that point to a culprit.

1.title: FR - Redemption - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After a tense confrontation, Colette becomes convinced that Stacey was murdered, but she still needs evidence to prove it her suspicions.

1.title: FR - Redemption - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Colette follows up on a case that leads her into contact with someone who knew Stacey, which results in a new lead - Stacey's last call.

1.title: FR - Redemption - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: With a suspect in her sights, Colette closes in on the truth; with Patrick and Siobhán's help, Colette finally discovers corroborating evidence.

meta.plot: DI Colette Cunningham's no nonsense approach to policing has earned her the respect of her Merseyside Police colleagues. She seems unflappable, until she gets a call from the Garda in Dublin after the body of a young woman is discovered.
A sheltered London professor attempts to uncover the cause of his wife’s mysterious death in Hong Kong, traveling there after discovering she died in a car accident on the mountain roads of Tai Po.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Jonah Mulray lives an ordinary life until he is told that his wife has been murdered in Hong Kong. He travels to repatriate her body, but discovers that she has been living a double life throughout their marriage as he uncovers a wider conspiracy.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After Megan's final heartbreacking phone message, Jonah tries to convince David that she was killed. But Jonah's search for proof uncovers further secrets that force him to question whether he even truly knew his wife at all.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When Jonah realises that his late wife Megan was involved with Hong Kong's most dangerous players, he starts to wonder whether those closest to her may know more than they have let on, dragging him further into a world of intrigue.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Jonah finds himself left adrift when David goes off the radar. Fuelled by suspicion and paranoia, Jonah tracks him down to the dazzling gambling island of Macau.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Jonah goes undercover to find out once and for all whether David is connected to Megan's death. Along the way he must confront a triad member and known killer.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Megan's last bequest leaves a trail of money that leads Jonah and David straight into the perilous jaws of Third Empire.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Blindsided by Lau’s abduction, David and Jonah embark on a desperate and frantic search that thrusts upon them to the devastating truth about Megan.

1.title: FR - Strangers - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The one question Jonah never thought he would answer is finally resolved: did his marriage to Megan ever amount to anything more than a lie? And is the truth enough to lay his grief to rest?

1.title: FR - Le Monde de demain - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le Monde de demain - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le Monde de demain - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le Monde de demain - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le Monde de demain - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Le Monde de demain - S01E06 - Saint-Denis sur Seine
1.plot: Didier and Bruno find themselves heading in opposite directions after signing with Epic. Issues in France cause them to bond once more.

meta.plot: Dans les années 1980, les débuts du hip-hop français racontés à travers la naissance du groupe mythique NTM et le parcours du DJ pionnier Dee Nasty et de la graffeuse Lady V. Une chronique sociale et musicale explosive aux personnages marquants, qui embrasse la révolution culturelle d'une jeunesse en quête de reconnaissance.
Un groupe de quatre braqueurs réussit un coup magistral et vole pour plusieurs millions d'euros en lingots d'or. Mais la suite ne va pas se passer comme prévu...

1.title: FR - Dreaming of a Freaking Fairy Tale - S01E01 - To Chungdam Heaven
1.plot: With her father gone, Jae-rim is left all alone, and the only things he left for her were debt and a piece of paper about an announcement on the recruitment at Chungdam Heaven. Accepting the miserable truth, she decides to give it a shot and get a job as a manager at Chungdam Heaven, so she can find her Prince Charming to start a new life.

meta.plot: Shin Jae-rim dreams of becoming a modern-day Cinderella and trading her current boring life for one of luxury and leisure. But landing her Prince Cha-min isn't easy—not only is Moon Cha-min her boss, but he's also engaged to another woman. Can Jae-rim find love with the man of her dreams…or will she discover that the true path to happiness is found within herself?
A French humorous game show taking place in a burger restaurant which is managed by the TV host.
