meta.plot: Astral is a fairy princess who lives in the secret fairy kingdom of Athenia which is full of mythical creatures. While that sounds amazing, Astral likes to fantasize about living in the human world and attending high school. Once she leaves her home to do just that, she has to try to fit in and keep her identity a secret.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E01 - What Fools These Mortals Be
1.plot: Fairy princess Astral has left her magical home in Athenia and follows her dream of becoming a high school student in the human world.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E02 - The New Kid
1.plot: A fairy princess is pretending to be a foreign exchange student at a high school for humans, and when another teenager offers to help her, the secret royal must choose between being accepted and spending time with her new friends.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E03 - Lost in Translation
1.plot: Astral helps plan a dance at school and turns to Devon for guidance in talking to Tristan.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E04 - Thanks a Latte
1.plot: A café becomes a hangout for Astral until her fairy powers sabotage her fun.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E05 - Where There's Smoke
1.plot: Some confusing advice from Morgan and a surprising visit by a friend from home shake things up for Astral.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E06 - Witch!
1.plot: Hailey tries to expose Astral's "true" identity with surprising results.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E07 - Cold Season
1.plot: Astral becomes ill and can't keep her powers in check, which leads to chaos erupting at school.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E08 - Expiration Date
1.plot: Things go awry when Astral spends time with Tristan.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E09 - Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
1.plot: Astral and Morgan plan a girls' night, but a few surprise guests spin things out of control.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E10 - I Got This
1.plot: Astral seeks help from her cousin for a love spell, but instead she winds up in over her head.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E11 - Trouncing the Council
1.plot: Astral heads to city hall with her pals to try to protect Athenia from a looming threat.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E12 - Let There Be Cake
1.plot: Loyalties are questioned when Devon unearths Astral's plan to assist Athenia.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E13 - Get a Job
1.plot: Astral searches for a job so she can earn money to purchase a dress she covets for the fall dance.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E14 - Bad, Bad Fairy
1.plot: Astral plays dodgeball and it brings out the worst in her.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E15 - Love Hurts
1.plot: Astral casts a love spell, but she takes it too far and it affects everyone at school.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E16 - You Can't Go Home Again
1.plot: Astral deals with a rival by trying to change his mind.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E17 - Cliff Anger
1.plot: An unexpected alliance is struck by Astral in order to provide assistance to Athenia.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E18 - The Campaign
1.plot: Astral, Morgan and Devon try to create a viral video to generate publicity for the plight of the woods.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E19 - The Great Escape
1.plot: Astral gets stuck in the gym with her pals during the Time of the Dimming, so they use this opportunity to hash out some problems.

1.title: FR - The Other Kingdom - S01E20 - Hidden in Plain Sight
1.plot: The fall dance looms and prep work is needed, so Astral and her pals rush to get everything ready.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E01 - De-Zanitized
1.plot: Dr. Scratchansniff uses every known technique to "de-zani-tize" the Warners, who are just too zany.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E02 - The Monkey Song
1.plot: In a parody of Harry Belafonte's "Monkey," the Warners and Dr. Scratchansniff sing about their tumultuous relationship.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E03 - Nighty-Night Toon
1.plot: In a slight parody of the children's book "Goodnight Moon," each of the Animaniacs characters is wished a good night's sleep.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E04 - Yakko's World
1.plot: Yakko sings a song to the tune of the "Mexican Hat Dance" listing the nations of the world.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E05 - Cookies for Einstein
1.plot: As scouts in Switzerland, the Warners attempt to sell cookies to Albert Einstein and accidentally help him discover the mass-energy conversion formula (mistakenly referred to as the formula for his theory of relativity).

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E06 - Win Big
1.plot: Brain competes on the trivia game show Gyp-Parody! to win enough money to buy the final part of a device that Brain is building in order to take over the world.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E07 - H.M.S. Yakko
1.plot: The Warners perform a musical tribute to Gilbert & Sullivan.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E08 - Slappy Goes Walnuts
1.plot: Slappy and Skippy Squirrel gather nuts from Doug the Dog’s yard.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E09 - Yakko's Universe
1.plot: Yakko leads a trip through the universe as he sings about the galaxies.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E10 - Hooked On a Ceiling
1.plot: The Warners help Michelangelo paint the Sistine Chapel.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E11 - Goodfeathers: The Beginning
1.plot: To become a Goodfeather, Squit must pass the initiation test: find some food.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E12 - Taming of the Screwy
1.plot: When potential foreign investors want to meet the wacky Warner siblings, the studio boss orders Dr. Scratchansniff to train the untamable trio.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E13 - Temporary Insanity
1.plot: Plotz hires the Warners after the his secretary goes home sick.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E14 - Operation: Lollipop
1.plot: Buttons tries to keep Mindy safe after her lollipop gets stuck on the side of a mail truck.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E15 - What Are We?
1.plot: The Warners are hypnotized by Dr. Scratchansniff in order to make them less zany. Dr. Scratchansniff fails and asks them what they are, leading the Warners to offer a number of suggestions.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E16 - Piano Rag
1.plot: The Warner siblings disrupt a piano concert at Carnegie Hall.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E17 - When Rita Met Runt
1.plot: A savvy cat and naive pooch join forces to escape the city pound.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E18 - The Big Candy Store
1.plot: The Warners meet the meanest candy store owner.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E19 - Bumbie's Mom
1.plot: Slappy Squirrel tries to convince Skippy that "Bumbie's Mom" didn't really die in the famous movie.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E20 - Wally Llama
1.plot: The Warners trek to Tibet seeking answers to the mysteries of life from a famous sage.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E21 - Where Rodents Dare
1.plot: Pinky and The Brain infiltrate a summit of world leaders in the Swiss Alps in an attempt to take over the world.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E22 - King Yakko
1.plot: A freak accident of lineage results in Yakko becoming "King Yakko" of Anvilania.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E23 - No Pain, No Painting
1.plot: Modern art is born when the Warners help Pablo Picasso discover his painting style.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E24 - Les Miseranimals
1.plot: In a musical parody of Victor Hugo's novel Les Miserables, Runt breaks out of Le Pound to save Rita and the Miserable Cats.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E25 - Garage Sale of the Century
1.plot: The Warners attempt to buy the seller's garage at the Garage Sale of the Century.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E26 - West Side Pigeons
1.plot: The Goodfeathers battle the Sparrows over possession of a statue of Martin Scorsese in a musical spoof of "West Side Story."

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E27 - Hello Nice Warners
1.plot: While running away from Ralph, the Warners get hired by a Jerry Lewis-based comedy director for his movie, leading to a clash of comedic styles. Soon, the Warners end up directing, giving the director the worst day of his life.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E28 - La Behemoth
1.plot: The Hip Hippos cope without their maid.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E29 - Little Old Slappy From Pasadena
1.plot: Slappy Squirrel takes her car for a drive, set to the tune of a classic rock 'n' roll song "The Little Old Lady (from Pasadena)."

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E30 - La La Law
1.plot: Dr. Scratchansniff gets a parking ticket and is represented in court by the firm Warner, Warner and Warner.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E31 - Cat on a Hot Steel Beam
1.plot: Mindy pursues a kitty into a dangerous construction site, and Buttons tries desperately to save her.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E32 - Space Probed
1.plot: The Warners are abducted by aliens and taken aboard their spaceship where their hijinks begin to annoy the aliens.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E33 - Battle for the Planet
1.plot: Brain wants to take over the world by tricking people into thinking that aliens are invading Earth and having them flee the cities in a panic.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E34 - Chalkboard Bungle
1.plot: The studio hires a new teacher named Miss Flamiel to teach the Warners. Despite her best efforts, she meets only with frustration and is unable to teach them anything.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E35 - Hurray for Slappy
1.plot: Slappy goes to a banquet held in her honor in order to receive an award while three of her old nemeses (Walter Wolf, Sid the Squid, and Beanie the Brain-Dead Bison) plot revenge for years of torment by her.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E36 - The Great Wakkorotti: The Master and His Music
1.plot: Wakko belches The Blue Danube by Johann Strauss.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E37 - Roll Over, Beethoven
1.plot: As chimney sweeps, Yakko, Wakko, and Dot annoy Ludwig van Beethoven, and accidentally give him inspiration for his Fifth Symphony.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E38 - The Cat and the Fiddle
1.plot: In 1690s Italy, a violinist named Stradivarius takes a stray cat (Rita) in so that he can make violin strings out of her "catgut."

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E39 - Pavlov's Mice
1.plot: In turn of the century Russia, Brain plans to take over the world by stealing the crown jewels of Russia, yet with one setback: he and Pinky have been conditioned by psychiatrist Ivan Pavlov.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E40 - Chicken Boo-Ryshnikov
1.plot: In New York, Chicken Boo is mistaken for a ballet dancer and dances in a performance of Tchaikovsky's Swan Lake.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E41 - Nothing But the Tooth
1.plot: Rasputin has a toothache preventing him from hypnotizing Tsar Nicholas. Unfortunately for him, the Warners are his dentists.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E42 - Meatballs or Consequences
1.plot: During a visit to Sweden, the Warners run afoul of Death, who tries to bring Wakko to the realm of the dead after he eats one too many Swedish meatballs during a contest. To save him, Yakko and Dot challenge Death to a game of checkers.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E43 - A Moving Experience
1.plot: Flavio and Marita head to New York in order to find a trendy new place to live.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E44 - The Flame
1.plot: A candleflame guides us through a special night in American history.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E45 - Four Score and Seven Migraines Ago
1.plot: On a train to Gettysburg, the Warners help Abraham Lincoln write the opening of the Gettysburg Address.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E46 - Wakko's America
1.plot: In a Jeopardy!-style game in Miss Flamiel's classroom, Wakko has to name the 50 states and their capitols, but fails to put his answer in the form of a question, instead putting it in the form of a song sung to the tune of "Turkey in the Straw."

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E47 - Davy Omelette
1.plot: Chicken Boo is mistaken for the frontiersman Davy Omelette. He helps a number of pioneers who are being attacked by a bear

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E48 - Hearts of Twilight
1.plot: A crazy film director is millions of dollars over budget, so Plotz sends the Warners out to stop him.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E49 - The Boids
1.plot: The Goodfeathers are hired as stunt birds for The Boids. They try to keep their jobs, but the movie shoot turns out to be harder than they expected.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E50 - Guardin' the Garden
1.plot: Slappy protects Adam and Eve from eating an apple in the Garden of Eden, just as a snake tries to grab it and tempt them to do so.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E51 - Plane Pals
1.plot: Onboard a plane, the Warners annoy a tightwad named Ivan Blosky who is forced to sit by them because of a computer error.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E52 - Be Careful What You Eat
1.plot: The Warners sing about the names of the ingredients in a carton of ice cream and a candy bar.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E53 - Up the Crazy River
1.plot: When Mindy chases a butterfly into a rain forest that is being cut down for wood, Buttons follows and attempts to protect her.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E54 - Ta da Dump, Ta da Dump, Ta da Dump Dump Dump
1.plot: Bobby and Squit must help Pesto when he gets his head caught in a plastic six-pack ring while the trio are rummaging through the garbage in a garbage scow.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E55 - Opportunity Knox
1.plot: Brain wants to steal all of the gold in Fort Knox as part of his latest plan to take over the world.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E56 - Wings Take Heart
1.plot: When a male moth and a female butterfly fall in love they head to the city, leading to disaster.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E57 - Hercule Yakko
1.plot: The detective Warners go in search of Marita's missing jewel on a cruise ship filled with "the unusual suspects."

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E58 - Home on De-Nile
1.plot: Rita gets adopted by Cleopatra, and Runt saves her after he finds out that Rita is about to be sacrificed.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E59 - A Midsummer Night's Dream
1.plot: The Warners perform a unique interpretation of William Shakespeare's A Midsummer Night's Dream.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E60 - Testimonials
1.plot: Several old-time movie stars talk about their encounters with the Warners and how Milton Berle hated Yakko.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E61 - Babblin' Bijou
1.plot: An old black-and-white Warner cartoon where Dot goes into the movies (literally) to find the man of her dreams.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E62 - Potty Emergency
1.plot: In the midst of watching a scary sci-fi movie, Wakko drinks too much soda and scrambles to find an available bathroom. Even after he finds a toilet in his "gag bag", his quest to relieve himself goes from bad to worse when he cannot find any privacy.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E63 - Sir Yaksalot
1.plot: The Warners are recruited by King Arthur to save Camelot from a dragon.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E64 - You Risk Your Life
1.plot: Greek playwright Aristotle tries to win cash and prizes on "You Risk Your Life," a game show hosted by Yakko.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E65 - I Got Yer Can
1.plot: A discarded soda can sparks an escalating, one-sided battle of wits between Slappy and her conceited neighbor, Candie Chipmunk.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E66 - Jockey for Position
1.plot: In order to win funds for his latest world-conquering scheme, Brain enters the Kentucky Derby as the world's smallest, lightest jockey. But Pinky's meddling alters the outcome of the race in an unexpected manner. First appearance of Phar Fignewton, a parody of Phar Lap. Tchaikovsky's "Romeo and Juliet: Love Theme" plays in this skit.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E67 - Moby Or Not Moby
1.plot: The Warners protect the legendary Moby-Dick from the wrath of Captain Ahab.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E68 - Mesozoic Mindy
1.plot: In the Stone Age, cavegirl Mindy gets in trouble and Buttons rescues her.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E69 - The Good, The Boo And The Ugly
1.plot: Chicken Boo finds himself as a sheriff in the midst of a spaghetti Western.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E70 - Hot, Bothered And Bedeviled
1.plot: Lost once again, the Warners end up in the fiery realm of Hades, where they end up giving Satan his own eternal torment.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E71 - Moon Over Minerva
1.plot: First Minerva Mink skit. A melancholic Minerva Mink avoids the come-ons of geeky Wilfred Wolf, until the full moon brings out the real wolf in both of them.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E72 - Skullhead Boneyhands
1.plot: In a parody of Tim Burton's Edward Scissorhands, Mr. Skullhead (a character brought over from Tiny Toon Adventures)) is adopted and finds acceptance in a suburban family.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E73 - Draculee, Draculaa
1.plot: In an attempt to head towards their ancestral home of Pennsylvania (since their parents are the pencils that drew them), the Warners end up at the estate of Count Dracula in Transylvania.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E74 - Phranken-Runt
1.plot: Rita and Runt end up being chased by a crazy female mad scientist who wants the idiot dog's brain for her own experiments.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E75 - O Silly Mio
1.plot: After witnessing their stained-glass window get destroyed by prima donna opera singer Madame Bruntvin, the Warners torment her in their own variations on Carmen.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E76 - Puttin' on the Blitz
1.plot: In the midst of the Nazi invasion of Poland, Rita and Runt help a little girl reunite with her father while avoiding the enemy (and Newt, a tenacious dachshund).

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E77 - The Great Wakkorotti: The Summer Concert
1.plot: Wakko belches Dance of the Hours.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E78 - Chairman of The Bored
1.plot: The Warners are tortured going through the longest, most boring one-sided conversation of their lives courtesy of a drone-voiced man, Francis "Pip" Pumphandle (Ben Stein), that they meet at a party.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E79 - Planets Song
1.plot: Yakko sings about the planets in our solar system. Wakko notifies him at the end that he forgot Uranus, leading to one of the show's elusive innuendos.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E80 - Astro-Buttons
1.plot: Buttons and Mindy are part of a space colony, and Buttons goes after Mindy when she chases after her ball.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E81 - Cartoons in Wakko's Body
1.plot: In a running gag throughout the episode, Wakko has various medical maladies caused by cartoons that are inside him.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E82 - Noah's Lark
1.plot: Noah (who looks and speaks like comedian Richard Lewis) is instructed by God to build an ark for the Great Flood and to gather animals two-by-two, including the Hip Hippos.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E84 - Hiccup
1.plot: Squit gets a case of the hiccups, forcing the other Goodfeathers to come up with different ways to get rid of them.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E85 - Clown And Out
1.plot: A clown (who looks and speaks like the Jerry Lewis-esque Mr. Director) is hired by Mr. Plotz for Wakko's birthday party, but Plotz learns from Dr. Scratchansniff that, like Mr. Plotz, Wakko has a bad fear of clowns, resulting in the clown being battered and bruised. The skit has become somewhat of an internet meme.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E86 - Bubba Bo Bob Brain
1.plot: The Brain becomes a country-western star in order to plant hypnotic suggestions for world domination. But his main problem in his rise to fame: Pinky keeps screwing up his name.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E87 - Very Special Opening
1.plot: The Warners announce that this will be a very special episode due to characters being mixed up.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E88 - In The Garden of Mindy
1.plot: Brain tries to prepare a plan for world domination, all the while watching over Mindy's mischief. This is followed by a short skit called "Pinky and the Cat", where Pinky is swallowed whole by his cagemate, Rita.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E89 - No Place Like Homeless
1.plot: Runt and Pesto find a home with a kind old woman who does not like pigeons.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E90 - Katie Ka-Boo
1.plot: In Katie Ka-Boom's first appearance, she discovers the hard way that her latest boyfriend is a giant chicken (Chicken Boo to be exact).

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E91 - Baghdad Cafe
1.plot: The Warner Brothers (and their sister Slappy in place of Dot) pay a visit to Sodarn Insane (a parody of Saddam Hussein).

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E92 - Critical Condition
1.plot: After movie critics Hiskel and Egbert (parodies of Siskel & Ebert) blast her cartoons on a review show, Slappy decides to get revenge: first by blowing their home up, then by sabotaging their latest film viewing. Note: Includes clips from the Looney Tunes shorts What's Opera, Doc?, Duck Amuck, and Porky in Wackyland. Shirley the Loon from Tiny Toon Adventures makes a non-speaking cameo.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E93 - The Three Muska-Warners
1.plot: The Warners, as the Three Musketeers, protect Louis VIII from the threat of "the Viper".

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E94 - Dough Dough Boys
1.plot: The Goodfeathers (as carrier pigeons) are forced to deliver an important message through a World War I battlefield.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E95 - Boot Camping
1.plot: The Warners head for summer camp but wind up in basic training instead, leading to chaos, confusion and an angry drill sergeant.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E96 - General Boo-Regard
1.plot: The Southern Rebels of the Civil War are led by Chicken Boo.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E97 - Spell-Bound
1.plot: Pinky and The Brain become "Spellbound" when they attempt to use Merlin's book of magic to take over the world.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E98 - Smitten With Kittens
1.plot: Rita and Runt find a litter of "puppies" that cling to the stray cat as their mother.

1.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S01E99 - Alas Poor Skullhead
1.plot: Yakko recites a monologue from William Shakespeare's "Hamlet", while Wakko plays Horatio and digs and Dot translates.

2.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S02E01 - Take My Siblings Please
2.plot: The Warners confront a troll who won't let them cross his bridge.

2.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S02E02 - The Mindy 500
2.plot: Mindy's pursuit of a brightly painted "clown car" leads her to the Indianapolis 500 Speedway.

2.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S02E03 - Morning Malaise
2.plot: The Warners upstage controversial radio talk show host Howard Tern.

2.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S02E04 - We're No Pigeons
2.plot: The Goodfeathers try to outwit a hungry young owl.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E01 - Deduces Wild
3.plot: The Warners bother Sherlock Holmes for help with their scavenger hunt.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E02 - Rest in Pieces
3.plot: Slappy is asked to attend Walter's funeral, which is really a ruse planned by Walter to blow Slappy sky-high.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E03 - U.N. Me
3.plot: The Warners sing about the United Nations to the tune of "Down by the Riverside".

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E04 - Super Strong Warner Siblings
3.plot: In a parody of Mighty Morphin Power Rangers, the Warners fight against a giant insect destroying the Warner Studio.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E05 - Nutcracker Slappy
3.plot: Slappy and Skippy resort to extreme measures in order to crack the last nut in the kitchen, accompanied by music from The Nutcracker. Guest appearance by Charlton "Baynarts" Woodchuck (from "Hollywoodchuck").

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E06 - Wakko's New Gookie
3.plot: Wakko tries to come up with a new "gookie", or bizarre facial expression.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E07 - A Quake, a Quake!
3.plot: The Warners sing a song about the 1994 Northridge earthquake.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E08 - Variety Speak
3.plot: Yakko and Dot explain to Wakko through song about how to read the headlines in Variety Magazine.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E09 - Three Tenors and You're Out
3.plot: Slappy's plans to take Skippy to a baseball game at Dodger Stadium go wrong when an opera performance by the famed Domino, Pepperoni, and Carumba is scheduled for that night instead. The singers (a parody of the Three Tenors) return at the end of the show to perform a shortened version of the Animaniacs theme. This episode also features parodies of Close Encounters of the Third Kind and Simon.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E10 - Bingo
3.plot: Dr. Scratchansniff has only one player for his weekly bingo game – Wakko.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E11 - A Hard Day's Warners
3.plot: In a parody of The Beatles in A Hard Day's Night, the Warners run from their fans as they try to reach a cartoon convention. Guest appearances by Pinky and the Brain; Elmyra Duff is among the crowd of fans.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E12 - Gimme A Break
3.plot: Slappy tries to get away from the filming of a blockbuster action movie on her vacation day.

3.title: FR - Les Animaniacs - S03E13 - Please Please Please Get a Life Foundation
3.plot: The Warners try to tell people in a TV commercial to "get a life" instead of going over every little reference in their show.

meta.plot: Yakko, Wakko et Dot sont les frères et sœur Warner, créés au début de l'âge d'or de l'animation américaine. Ces héros de cartoons loufoques s'avèrent rapidement incontrôlables, et sèment la panique dans les studios Warner Bros. Enfermés dans le château d'eau du studio, ils s'en échappent occasionnellement pour vivre bon nombre d'aventures historiques, face à des adversaires impuissants devant leurs bêtises.

1.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S01E01 - One's Place in the World
1.plot: Helene and Elisabeth travel to meet Emperor Franz, who is expected to ask for Helene’s hand. At the party, he stuns everyone with a surprise decision.

1.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S01E02 - The Arrival
1.plot: Elisabeth arrives in Vienna for her wedding. Soon enough she faces palace intrigue while Franz attempts to protect his country from going to war.

1.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S01E03 - The Wedding
1.plot: Elisabeth marries Franz, and the royal family gets a taste of her rising popularity. Sophie’s former lover attends the wedding and discovers a secret.

1.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S01E04 - The Hunt
1.plot: Sophie and the council push for military action, but Franz refuses to engage. Elisabeth upsets the czar's son, leading to severe political consequences.

1.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S01E05 - The Shoes
1.plot: Maximilian gathers support for an evil plan while Elisabeth's well-intended gesture backfires, leading her to befriend the dubious maid, Leontine.

1.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S01E06 - The God Who Us Has Freedom Sent
1.plot: Elisabeth spends her time partying with Maximilian while Franz is desperate to reconcile with her. Leontine gets herself into a precarious situation.

2.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S02E01 - An Heir to the Throne
2.plot: Pregnant with her second child, Elisabeth is under pressure to provide a male heir to the throne. An incident occurs during a state visit.

2.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S02E02 - The Dream
2.plot: Franz sends Maximilian on a diplomatic mission to make an ally of Napoleon III. Sophie schemes to sideline Elisabeth and take charge of her children.

2.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S02E03 - A Letter from the Empress
2.plot: Elisabeth embarks on a charm offensive across Lombardy-Venetia. Franz gives Maximilian an opportunity to prove his loyalty.

2.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S02E04 - The Stars During the Day
2.plot: As Leontine asks Alexander to abscond together, he makes a shocking discovery. A visit to Hungary brings tragedy to Franz and Elisabeth.

2.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S02E05 - The Forest Inside of Us
2.plot: Seeking an escape, Elisabeth retreats to her family in Bavaria. Sophie seizes the moment to procure a better match for Franz.

2.title: FR - L'Impératrice - S02E06 - All We Can Do
2.plot: As the Austrian Empire plunges into war, Elisabeth fights to keep her family together. Sophie discovers the consequences of her actions.

meta.plot: Cette mini-série va se concentrer sur la période qui a immédiatement suivi la rencontre entre les monarques Élisabeth “Sissi” von Wittelsbach et François-Joseph.

1.title: FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Bibi & Tina - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Kayla, jeune patineuse artistique talentueuse, se voit contrainte de tout abandonner quand sa famille suit Mac, son jumeau, admis dans une prestigieuse école de hockey.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E01 - Come and Take It from Me
1.plot: Mac's off to a rocky start on his quest to impress his new team. Later on, a lonely Kayla makes a connection with a mysterious skater on the ice.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E02 - Secret Skater
1.plot: While working to unmask the mystery skater, Kayla learns things about Ava and Sky that she didn't expect. Sky opens up to Mac about her past.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E03 - Sucker Punch
1.plot: Mac wants to bond with his teammates, but his arrogance keeps getting in the way. Kayla tracks down Jacob, and Ava's mom prepares a "special surprise."

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E04 - Ice Breaker
1.plot: Kayla's determined to prove that she and Jacob are the perfect pair. Mac faces off with a former enemy. Ava dons a disguise to be part of the team.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E05 - We Do Our Talking on the Ice
1.plot: Sky tries to warn Kayla that Jacob has doubts — but it's mistaken for jealousy. Ava makes a big decision. Mac uncovers Kayla's plan to ruin his game.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E06 - Head Rush
1.plot: As Mac struggles to regain his confidence, Ava pushes her dad to put her on the ice. At the hospital, Holly blames Kayla for putting Sky in danger.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E07 - Triple Threat
1.plot: Elina makes Kayla an offer, and Bear and Sam get an unexpected visitor. Mac and Kayla both need Sky's support — but who will she choose?

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E08 - Guilt Trip
1.plot: With team morale at an all-time low — and Mac's suffering at an all-time high — Ava makes a confession. Kayla begins her training with Elina.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E09 - This Is Happening
1.plot: The pressure's on as Kayla works hard to prove that Mac's not the only one who can win. Bear burdens Mac with a secret before the big game.

1.title: FR - Jamais froid aux yeux - S01E10 - Blade Star
1.plot: Elina sees Kayla's friends and family as a distraction, but Kayla needs them now more than ever. Bear has second thoughts... but is it too late?

meta.plot: Un raid de routine, mené par Emer Berry, inspectrice au Bureau Irlandais des Affaires Criminelles, met à jour qu'un petit dealer de drogue a reçu d'importantes sommes d'une source supposée intraçable. Il ne s'agit pas d'argent, mais de diamants bruts. Quand un lien apparaît entre ces diamants et une série d'attaques à la bombe en Belgique, Emer se voit forcée de travailler avec le Commissaire Christian De Jong.

1.title: FR - Association criminelle - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Det Sergeant Emer Berry of the CAB leads a raid on a criminals house in Co Clare, while there, She discovers deeds and diamonds linking the Homeowner to a terrorist attack in Antwep.

1.title: FR - Association criminelle - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Darren's killers escape, while Christian tells Emer further bombings are expected. Billionaire Richard Melnick shows the Antwerp site for his new European headquarters to his son

1.title: FR - Association criminelle - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Diamonds are found in Fionn Brannigan's offices and Emer links this to the bombings and warns him his life is in danger. Christian learns Hadi has been beaten by a fellow officer

1.title: FR - Association criminelle - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Emer heads to Antwerp to help search for Fionn Brannigan, but just as the case seems to have hit a dead end, the discovery of a body and a forensics breakthrough changes everything

1.title: FR - Association criminelle - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: While her team follows the money trail in Ireland, Emer and Christian discover the identity of the bombers. An unexpected source provides the investigation with vital information

1.title: FR - Association criminelle - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: With Bibi now in custody, Emer and Christian face a desperate race against time to stop the final bombing and uncover who was really behind the terror campaign

meta.plot: Cette série retrace le sauvetage d'une équipe de jeunes footballeurs et de leur entraîneur pris au piège dans la grotte de Tham Luang.

1.title: FR - Le Sauvetage de l'impossible - S01E01 - The Legend of Tham Luang
1.plot: The Wild Boars soccer team meet for practice with plans to explore a cave afterwards. Little do they know that their lives are about to change forever.

1.title: FR - Le Sauvetage de l'impossible - S01E02 - To Not Offend the Gods
1.plot: Coach Ek and the boys realize they're trapped inside the cave due to rising water levels. The clock is ticking as rescue efforts begin to ramp up.

1.title: FR - Le Sauvetage de l'impossible - S01E03 - The Princess' Chalice
1.plot: A hydraulic engineer warns of the drastically rising waters. Meanwhile, rescuers deliver food supplies and family letters to the hopeful boys.

1.title: FR - Le Sauvetage de l'impossible - S01E04 - Lucky Baht
1.plot: The rescue team works out the best way to safely retrieve the boys from the cave — but an unfortunate tragedy strikes during the operation.

1.title: FR - Le Sauvetage de l'impossible - S01E05 - The Parable of Kisa Gotami
1.plot: Governor Narongsak makes an effort to get consent from the boys' families to proceed with a new but contentious rescue plan.

1.title: FR - Le Sauvetage de l'impossible - S01E06 - Moo Pa
1.plot: Against all odds, the day has come for the rescue divers to finally extract the boys from the cave — and the world is watching in anticipation.

meta.plot: Fi Lawson arrives home one day to find a family of strangers moving into her house and her husband, Bram, has disappeared. As the nightmare takes grip, both Bram and Fi try to make sense of the events that led to a devastating crime and how they each are going to survive the chilling truth.

1.title: FR - Our House - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Fi Lawson is panicked when she arrives home to find strangers moving into her house.

1.title: FR - Our House - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Fi is left reeling by Bram's apparent involvement in the house sale.

1.title: FR - Our House - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Fi turns to her new partner, Toby, for support, but he has secrets of his own.

1.title: FR - Our House - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Fi finally discovers the truth behind the house sale and confronts those responsible.

meta.plot: Set in the shrine of French dance, the Garnier Opera house, L'Opera follows three characters whose dreams clash with reality, whose ambitions collide with expectations, and whose purity faces corruption.

1.title: FR - L'Opéra - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Sébastien, the new Director of Dance at the Paris Opera, threatens to fire Zoe, which shocks her to her core.

1.title: FR - L'Opéra - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Zoe receives some advice from lawyer Maître Delva; Sébastien must convince a frustrated dancer to stay at the Opera, while managing the whims of a choreographer.

1.title: FR - L'Opéra - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As the days tick down until Zoe will be forced to leave the Opera, she holds out hope that her departure is temporary.

1.title: FR - L'Opéra - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Zoe leaves the Opera and awaits the outcome of her legal battle; Sébastien begins to feel the pressure as the preparation for the ballet escapes him.

1.title: FR - L'Opéra - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Flora is searched by the police and is found to be carrying drugs; Zoe makes an unexpected sacrifice.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: A new season is beginning at the Opera. Zoe is the prima ballerina, Flora is part of the corps de ballet and the position of the dance director remains vacant. In addition, the company welcomes ballet mistress Diane Taillandier.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: The race to Varna is on. Six candidates will be selected and trained by Diane to represent the Opera de Paris in Bulgaria. Zoe works at a crazy pace imposed by Diane, but unfortunately a serious injury sends her to the hospital.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: The Varna selection is only a few days away. Flora's only goal is to be noticed by Diane. In the hospital, a distraught Zoe refuses to speak, and her doctor is very sceptical about the future of her professional career.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: In a physiotherapy centre, Zoe works hard on her comeback. Eager to return, she ignores the doctors' advice and pushes herself too hard. At the opera, Flora and the other candidates are struggling with the strenuous training.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Diane and her champions, along with dozens of candidates from around the world, have come to Varna hoping to win a medal. The opera dancers are surprised to run into their ex-director, who trains a young dancer from his company.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Zoe is back at the opera, where she continues her physiotherapy sessions under Diane's supervision. The ballet mistress plans for her protégée's great comeback, but there's a problem.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Flora and Aurore are ready for revolution. They break the law of silence and tell Nadia Menour, the opera's director, about Diane's abusive techniques. Zoe, however, steers clear as she remains loyal to Diane.

2.title: FR - L'Opéra - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: Backed by the younger generation, Flora and Aurore continue their crusade against their dance director, and write a manifesto to be signed.

meta.plot: Gwen Stacy AKA Ghost-Spider, wrongly accused of a crime she didn’t commit, seeks to clear her name and deliver justice. Unfortunately, her dad is not only Captain of the NYPD, but spearheading the manhunt! To make matters worse, other young heroes—Ms. Marvel, Squirrel Girl, Quake and Patriot—are after Ghost Spider as well. But, as the chase to uncover the truth winds down, a darker threat looms along the horizon, and very soon, these heroes will need to put aside their differences and work together as a team.

1.title: FR - Marvel Rising: Initiation - S01E01 - Mission: Ghost Hunter
1.plot: While pursuing the criminal responsible for her best friend's death, Ghost-Spider is mistakenly accused of the crime by both SHIELD and the NYPD.

1.title: FR - Marvel Rising: Initiation - S01E02 - Floor Toms Spider Webs
1.plot: As Ghost-Spider deals with the loss of her friend, she continues hunting for the culprit while also trying to keep up appearances with her friends and bandmates.

1.title: FR - Marvel Rising: Initiation - S01E03 - BFHF
1.plot: Best friends, Ms. Marvel and Squirrel Girl, join forces to apprehend an alleged super-hero-turned-vigilante: Ghost-Spider!

1.title: FR - Marvel Rising: Initiation - S01E04 - Two On One
1.plot: Finally confronting Ghost-Spider, Squirrel Girl and Ms. Marvel discover that there's more to this 'villain' than meets the eye.

1.title: FR - Marvel Rising: Initiation - S01E05 - The Stories They Tell
1.plot: Ghost-Spider finally gets the chance to tell her side of the story when she's captured by Squirrel Girl and Ms. Marvel.

1.title: FR - Marvel Rising: Initiation - S01E06 - The Secrets We Keep
1.plot: Ghost-Spider's run from the law finally ends when she's caught by SHIELD agents Patriot and Quake, but everything changes when her true identity is revealed.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E01 - Tiger Cat
1.plot: Tom and Jerry are pursuing each other in a zoo. During the chase, Tom accidentally destroys the painting of an art-loving monkey. This leads to the monkey becoming quite angry, but his temper cools after he makes Tom look like a tiger by dipping him in orange paint and adding black stripes on with his paintbrush. All the other characters in the episode, save the monkey himself, see Tom and develop the concept that he is a real tiger.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E02 - Feeding Time
1.plot: Jerry frames Tom for feeding zoo animals so Spike can fire him.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E03 - Polar Peril
1.plot: A polar bear protects Jerry from Tom and Butch.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E04 - Joy Riding Jokers
1.plot: Spike mistakes Tom and Jerry for valets.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E05 - Cat Got Your Luggage?
1.plot: Tom and Jerry trash a fancy hotel lobby.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E06 - City Dump Chumps
1.plot: Tom and Butch fight over Jerry in a junkyard.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E07 - Way-Off Broadway
1.plot: Tom and Jerry play musical instruments.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E08 - Egg Beats
1.plot: Jerry's music causes Tom's hen to lay eggs quickly.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E09 - Cry Uncle
1.plot: Jerry's uncle returns for a visit and sings.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E10 - Bats What I Like About the South
1.plot: Jerry disguises himself as a bat to scare Tom.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E11 - Fraidy Cat Scat
1.plot: Jerry pretends to be a skull by hiding inside of it and scaring Tom.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E12 - Tomb It May Concern
1.plot: Tom and Jerry find gold inside a pyramid.

1.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S01E13 - Din-O-Sores
1.plot: Tom and Jerry discover their world is full of dinosaur eggs.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E01 - More Powers to You
2.plot: Tom is the pet of a team of superheroes, the Amazing Acquaintances (a parody of Power Rangers), charged with guarding their power rings. However, when Jerry gets into the room where the rings are kept, he and Tom end up having a super-powered duel. To make matters worse, Doomdog (Spike), the Acquaintances' arch-enemy, breaks into the hideout unnoticed and wants all the rings for himself. Tom and Jerry have to work together—pooling their powers of fire and ice—to take the villain down. The heroes congratulate Tom on the capture of Doomdog, but Jerry—with the help of a growth-powered ring—reminds him not-so-gently that he didn't exactly do it alone.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E02 - Catch Me Though You Can't
2.plot: Jerry is zapped by a speed ray, making him faster-than-ever.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E03 - Power Tom
2.plot: Tom and Jerry fall into a garden hole where they find a basement headquarter.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E04 - Zent Out of Shape
2.plot: Buddhist monk Tom tries to achieve inner peace.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E05 - I Dream of Meanie
2.plot: Spike, as a genie, must grant wishes.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E06 - Which Witch!
2.plot: Tom must obtain a mouse for a witch's potion.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E07 - Don't Bring Your Pet to School Day
2.plot: Tom attends show-and-tell at school. Nancy from 1943 cartoon Baby Puss returns, as she wants to win the gold star for best pet.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E08 - Cat Show Catastrophe
2.plot: Jerry and Tuffy try to ruin Tom's chances at a cat show.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E09 - The Cat Whisperer with Casper Lombardo
2.plot: Tom's owner hires a trainer to make him behave.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E10 - Adventures in Penguin Sitting
2.plot: Jerry and an escaped penguin become friends.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E11 - Cat of Prey
2.plot: Tom, who is hungry, seeks to catch and eat Jerry, who is the star of the show at a local ocean theme park along with an eagle, but he is thwarted by the eagle, a seal and an octopus.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E12 - Jungle Love
2.plot: Jerry makes friends with a baby rhinoceros.

2.title: FR - Tom and Jerry Tales - S02E13 - Invasion of the Body Slammers
2.plot: A green shapeshifter emerges from an alien spaceship that lands near Tom and Jerry's house.

meta.plot: Tom and Jerry Tales is an American animated television series featuring the cat-and-mouse duo Tom and Jerry.
Three teens join forces to find a way home after waking up in a strange realm filled with magic portals, perplexing puzzles and vicious beasts.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E01 - Home
2.plot: After discovering the truth behind the Hollow, friends Adam, Mira and Kai awaken in their real-life world. But something's not right.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E02 - Hollow Games
2.plot: The friends team up to face their biggest fears. But they still need answers — and Mira decides to take matters into her own hands.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E03 - The Return
2.plot: Adam and Kai land in a new version of the Hollow and search for Mira in a creepy castle, where a gnome's riddle gives them a clue.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E04 - Puzzled
2.plot: In a strange world filled with shifting shapes, the friends face a puzzling villain, then test their luck on a high-stakes game show.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E05 - Alchemy
2.plot: Adam, Mira and Kai deal with a difficult loss, but their search for answers continues. At a scientist's chateau, they tangle with some old rivals.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E06 - Dead End
2.plot: On the hunt for Weirdy, the friends take a ghost train to a jazz club. But Adam and Reeve's arguing threatens their mission.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E07 - Unbalanced
2.plot: The tension between Reeve and Adam reaches a tipping point, sending them plunging into the ocean — where a hungry sea monster awaits.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E08 - Fang
2.plot: After battling the sea monster with Brynhilda, the friends arrive in a fairy-tale land, where three pixies lead them to Weirdy.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E09 - Fire
2.plot: Vanessa's confession upsets her friends. Determined to make it up to them, she sneaks off on her own to find the other team.

2.title: FR - The Hollow - S02E10 - Race
2.plot: It's a race to the finish as the friends try to outrun Team B. And when the final boss strikes, they'll have to work together to win.

meta.plot: An all-mighty goddess reincarnated as a young woman must harness her divine powers to avenge her sister's death and protect her family from destruction.

1.title: FR - The Brave Ones - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: As her sister resists their eviction, Ntsiki dreams of a better life — unaware that tragedy awaits. Ayanda seeks a magical entity to save her dying son.

1.title: FR - The Brave Ones - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Ntsiki and Nkosi demand justice while their family crumbles in mourning. Ayanda and Luthando plot their next move as Ntsiki discovers her own abilities.

1.title: FR - The Brave Ones - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Ntsiki's powers catch Nosisa's eye while Nkosi's protest brings trouble. With the bracelets in her possession, Ayanda prepares to do the unthinkable.

1.title: FR - The Brave Ones - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Ntsiki learns a terrible truth about Siya as she races to free Nkosi from captivity. Ayanda turns to an estranged family member for help.

1.title: FR - The Brave Ones - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Ntsiki’s search for guidance leads to shocking revelations. Mcebo confronts Siya over their father’s fate as Ayanda and Luthando look for Ntsiki.

1.title: FR - The Brave Ones - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As the Tree of Life faces destruction, the fate of Ilanga lies in the hands of Ntsiki — ready to embrace her true identity as the Brave One.

meta.plot: Duchesse de Valentinois, comtesse de Brézé, dame de Saint-Vallier... Diane de Poitiers, femme de tête, femme de coeur, intrigante et loyale, amie de François 1er et maîtresse du roi Henri II, dont elle était l'aînée de vingt ans. Eclipsant Catherine de Médicis, déjouant les complots et balayant les jalousies, armée de sa légendaire beauté et de sa redoutable intelligence, elle régna dans l'ombre sur le coeur du souterain et les destinées de la France

meta.plot: Super Mario Bros est une série télévisée américaine basée sur les jeux vidéos Super Mario Bros et Super Mario Bros 2. Il a été diffusé à l'origine via la syndication de première diffusion pour la plupart des stations de télévision indépendantes ou Fox du 4 septembre 1989, au 1er décembre 1989, avec des rediffusions se poursuivant jusqu'au 6 septembre 1991. Le Family Channel a ramassé la série le 23 septembre 1991, et l'a diffusée jusqu'au 26 août 1994. Le spectacle a été produit par DiC animation et a été distribué par Viacom Enterprises en association avec Nintendo. DHX Media, la société remplaçante de Cookie Jar Entertainment et DiC, est le distributeur actuel.

Après avoir été victime d’un drame, Ella, 13 ans, n’a qu’une envie : profiter de la vie. Petit à petit, elle va apprendre à savourer l’instant présent, mais aussi à surmonter ses peurs et va inciter son entourage à faire de même.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E01 - Ready or Not
1.plot: A clean bill of health means a new beginning for Ella, but going back to school tests her can-do spirit.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E02 - Today
1.plot: As Ella encourages Kai to live in the moment, she attempts to let go of her past with Ximena. Grady discovers a new passion.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E03 - Scars
1.plot: Ella searches for swimwear after being invited to a pool party. Grady makes a plan to step out of Ella’s shadow at school.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E04 - Ella B.C.
1.plot: A flashback offers a glimpse into Ella’s interests—and anxieties—before everything changed. Grady and his dad search for a new shared hobby.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E07 - Still, Life
1.plot: At her first post-treatment sleepover, Ella navigates excitement and nerves. Grady enjoys being an only child for the night.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E08 - Two Truths and a Kai
1.plot: Kai plans a series of exhilarating adventures, but Ella suspects he’s hiding his true intentions. Grady takes up a new sport to impress friends.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E09 - Prison or Palace
1.plot: The origins of Ella’s “live each moment to the fullest” attitude come to light.

1.title: FR - La vie  selon Ella - S01E10 - Thursday
1.plot: Pressure builds as Ella preps for a big day. Kai struggles to share his secret. Nurse Steve encourages Grady to face his feelings.

meta.plot: Éva et Yanis, parents d’une petite fille âgée d’un mois, emménagent dans leur nouveau pavillon de banlieue, en quête d’un nouveau départ. Mais un soir, suite à un tragique accident, leur bébé meurt subitement. Brisés, Éva et Yanis tentent de se reconstruire. Ils trouvent du réconfort auprès de leurs voisins d’en face, Lucie et Stéphane : ils partagent leurs peines, leurs joies… et bientôt davantage. Leurs destins se lient et s’entremêlent bien au-delà du raisonnable, jusqu’à un point de non-retour dont aucun de sortira indemne.

meta.plot: Samedi 28 octobre 2017, 12h10. Deux hommes débarquent, affolés, à la gendarmerie de Gray. Jonathann Daval, accompagné de son beau-frère, vient signaler la disparition de son épouse, Alexia. Celle-ci est partie faire un jogging le matin et n'est pas revenue. Que lui est-il arrivé?... Pendant 3 mois, les gendarmes vont mener une enquête implacable, exemplaire, le plus discrètement possible, pour amasser des preuves, puis faire avouer celui dont ils ont la conviction qu'il ne dit pas tout : Jonathann.

meta.plot: In 1997, a mysterious ghost saved humankind and then disappeared. The mysterious ghost appears again 24 years later and helps a serial killer escape. Kim Sae Ha, Jung Sae Byeok and Song Eo Jin pursue the ghost for different reasons.
La nouvelle série:  "Lost Car Rescue"  traverse la nature sauvage du grand Nord Canadien à la recherche d'un trésor de vielles voitures cachées.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de voitures - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: As Matt and his team chase the elusive one that got away, they risk getting in over their heads - literally - as an extraction nearly sinks their whole trip.

1.title: FR - Chasseurs de voitures - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While searching for abandoned relics along The Alaska Highway, Matt's team steps up as car hunters in their own right.

meta.plot: Eric retourne à Cap Qwert pour résoudre le mystère de la disparition de ses parents. De retour au village, il rencontre des amis et des ennemis et doit révéler les secrets du terrifiant parc d'attractions du village.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E01 - The Labyrinth
1.plot: After receiving an anonymous message, Eric returns to Cape Qwerty to solve a childhood mystery.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E02 - The Carousel
1.plot: Eric wonders what is real and what isn't. Uma relives a painful memory.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E03 - The Dalaras Mansion
1.plot: Eric and Uma stay with Carmen. The mystery of the amusement park's lights begins to unravel.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E04 - The Haunted Ship
1.plot: Eric and Pablo go to the amusement park in search of missing pages from Roberto Dalaras's journal.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E05 - The Secret Code
1.plot: Eric faces rejection from his neighbors and discovers a dark secret about his best friend.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E06 - The Worm
1.plot: A coded message from his father seems to give some answers. The creature attacks again.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E07 - The Hidden Room
1.plot: Uma shows Eric a secret place. There, they find a key clue to the disappearances.

1.title: FR - Tierra incógnita - S01E08 - The Horror
1.plot: Eric and his friends visit the caves and find key information on the creature that stalks the town.

meta.plot: Danish secret service agent Katrine Poulson and British spy Beatrice Ogilvy are thrown together in a race against time. As a terrorist plot against the British PM unfolds, Poulson and Ogilvy are tangled up in a web of lies, murder and power struggles; they can't trust anyone, and they soon realise the deadly conspiracy could be part of a far-reaching geopolitical masterplan.

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E01 - Episode One
1.plot: MI5 agent Beatrice Ogilvie is warned of an impending terrorist attack. Beatrice suspects that the Danish Secret Service agent Katrine Poulsen is involved and set a trap for her.

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E02 - Episode Two
1.plot: Beatrice is assigned to lead a security group for the Prime Minister, when he will meet a young woman. Has Beatrice been asked to enable an infidelity deal?

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E03 - Episode Three
FR - Red Election - S01E04 - Episode Four
FR - Red Election - S01E05 - Episode Five
FR - Red Election - S01E06 - Episode Six
1.plot: Beatrice's father is arrested on suspicion of being the Russian mole. Beatrice swears to prove his innocence.

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E07 - Episode Seven
1.plot: Beatrice competes against the clock to save the life of GRU resource Yelena Alekin. Torben Jensen, Katrine's missing boyfriend, is finally found.

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E08 - Episode Eights
1.plot: Beatrice now knows that Katrine is part of Redback. She confronts her, but Katrine has information that makes Beatrice astonish.

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E09 - Episode Nine
1.plot: Shock when the Prime Minister finally loses the referendum. Beatrice tells William that she knows he was behind the Skanda bomb.

1.title: FR - Red Election - S01E10 - Episode Ten
1.plot: Operation Redback ends when a nuclear meltdown allows Russia to carry out a "friendly invasion" of Scotland.

meta.plot: Toute la famille Thomas se réunie pour accueillir Hugo, de retour d’un long périple en mer. Son aventure est assombrie par un drame dont il porte la culpabilité. Mais la fête familiale n’aura pas lieu puisque l’un des leurs verra sa journée prendre une tournure pour le moins inattendue. C’est à ce moment que chacun réalisera que le temps qui reste n’est pas toujours celui qu’on croit.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E01 - What Loneliness
1.plot: CIA analyst Joe Turner finds a clue that sheds new light on a failed biological attack at a US football stadium. The evidence threatens Joe’s life along with everyone he cares about.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E02 - The Solution to All Problems
1.plot: Joe escapes Joubert and Deacon and calls Bob Partridge to bring him in. Sam Barber wrestles with his betrayal of Joe, which causes his partners to doubt his loyalty.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E03 - A Good Patriot
1.plot: News of the massacre at IEP spreads. Bob seeks an ally after learning that he must remove himself from the operation to find Joe. Reuel questions Mae's knowledge of Sam's recent behavior.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E04 - Trapped in History
1.plot: With the task force closing in, Joe is forced to flee with Kathy. Marty suspects there may be a mole on her team. Reuel grows increasingly concerned about Bob's loyalty. Joe's search for answers leads him to two important people from his past.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E05 - A Diamond with a Flaw
1.plot: Reuel and Marty hope that Caleb Woolf will be the key to Joe's capture. Bob attempts to extract information from Joubert. In Riyadh, a plan is put into motion.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E06 - No Such Thing
1.plot: Mae is tortured by lingering questions surrounding her husband's death. Caleb tells Joe about his CIA source. Joubert and Boyd cross paths at Kathy's house and make a critical discovery.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E07 - Within a Dark Wood
1.plot: Another person close to Joe is found dead. Bob shares his theory about the IEP attack with Sharla. Iris gives Mae information that puts both of their lives in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E08 - A Question of Compromise
1.plot: Joe continues piecing evidence together. Bob deploys a capture mission without Reuel's approval. Mae receives intel from Iris about Sam and Elden. Nathan confronts Gareth.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E09 - Death Is the Harvest
1.plot: Deacon's traumatic past comes into focus. Sharla pursues Joubert. Mae makes a terrifying discovery. After the location of the plot is uncovered, Bob considers his options and Joe compels Janice and Caleb to help him.

1.title: FR - Condor - S01E10 - Mistrust Blossoms
1.plot: Joe's morality is put to the ultimate test as he attempts to stop the plague from being released.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E01 - Exile Is a Dream
2.plot: Joe is travelling in Europe when he is approached by a Russian agent, who says he can identify a mole within the CIA in exchange for protection. Joe begins to realise that escaping his old life may be impossible.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E02 - If It Serves a Greater Good
2.plot: Joe makes a new discovery in the hunt for the mole. At the same time, he realizes that he is not alone in monitoring a potential lead.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E03 - A Former KGB Man
2.plot: Joe is lured back into the danger zone when he suspects that Bob's killer and mole may be the same person.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E04 - Not What He Thinks He Is
2.plot: Reuel gets a nightly visit and realizes that he ended up in the middle of an unexpected conflict. Kat defies her own judgment when helping an old friend.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E05 - Out of His Exile
2.plot: Joe is skeptical that Gordon is guilty and continues to look at alternative theories. Eva and Gordon unleash together and dig down the battle ax after a successful event.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E06 - An Offer of Enrollment
2.plot: Joe continues to follow the evidence and makes a new discovery that intensifies his attempts to find Vasili.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E07 - A Perspective, Not the Truth
2.plot: Tracy and Mae decide to disappear for a while. Joe has finally learned of Vasili's whereabouts and is aiming for a reunion.

2.title: FR - Condor - S02E08 - The Road We Take
2.plot: Kat witnesses when Volk takes the law into his own hands. Mae's discussions with Senator Thrush have unintended consequences.

meta.plot: Young CIA analyst Joe Turner has his idealism tested when he learns that the CIA has been using an algorithm he developed to spy on American citizens, leading the organization to a terrorist plot that threatens the lives of millions.  Inspired by Sydney Pollack’s 1975 political thriller Three Days of the Condor.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E01 - The Decision
1.plot: A heated argument erupts between Mexico's first lady and the president over their impending divorce.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E02 - The Getaway
1.plot: Emilia must take extreme measures to remain hidden as Mexican government forces intensify their search for her.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E03 - Debts Are Meant to Be Repaid
1.plot: The autopsy results are made public. Emilia remembers happier memories with Diego as she plans her escape from Tepito.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E04 - The Promise
1.plot: Glimpses of Emilia and Diego's past reveal a painful truth. Emilia learns about the government's involvement in La Mosca's kidnapping.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E05 - The Alternative Truth
1.plot: Emilia makes a promise to the Tepito crew. The special prosecutor starts investigating the president's death.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E06 - Cause of Death
1.plot: Emilie finally watches Diego's video and thinks she knows why he was killed. The children mourn their father.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E07 - Baptism by Fire
1.plot: President Barquet wants Tomás to stop having press conferences. Emilia looks for important documents hidden by Jaime.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E08 - Spiral Into Hell
1.plot: Canek is determined to find his kidnapped friends. Tomás comes to an agreement with Anna and Barquet.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E09 - The Oath
1.plot: Emilia and the Tepito crew go on a mission to save Canek and La Mosca, and lives are lost in the process.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E10 - Vivid Memory
1.plot: María is interviewed as part of the investigation. General Aguirre briefs the president on the secret black sites.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E11 - Declaration of Independence
1.plot: Emilia and Zyan try to get General Aguirre to confess on camera. Mexico celebrates its Independence Day.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E12 - The Rules of the Game
1.plot: Emilia makes contact with María. General Aguirre's confession is publicised, and violent consequences ensue.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E13 - The Face of the Killer
1.plot: Diego's real killer is revealed. Emilia worries about Maria's safety. Lieberman is suspicious of Anna.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E14 - Death Asks for Permission
1.plot: Emilia makes a plan to turn herself in and gets the most unlikely allies involved. Canek feels betrayed by Zyan.

1.title: FR - Ingobernable - S01E15 - For the Sake of Justice
1.plot: The military takes drastic measures. Emilia receives assistance from someone she'd least expect and suffers a deep betrayal.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E01 - Justice on Parade
2.plot: Emilia is tortured as her enemies band together to prompt a confession. Ana attempts to befriend multiple leaders within the government.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E02 - Breaking Chains
2.plot: María wakes up in a strange house and is bewildered by what she finds. Emilia's son pays her a visit. Canek connects with Ana.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E03 - The Weight of the Crown
2.plot: Gen. Almada tries to find out who the mole is that ruined his plan. Emilia's father seeks absolution. María tries to communicate with the outside world.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E04 - From the Ashes
2.plot: Ana asks questions about who she inadvertently has been working for. Unrest continues in Tepito, with Emilia at the center. Santi recruits an army.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E05 - The Light of the Past
2.plot: Emilia looks into her father's finances and meets someone from his past. Simon asks Ana to prove her loyalty to the mission.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E06 - Warriors
2.plot: Ana manipulates both of the presidential candidates. Emilia and her friends target a bank in search of more answers about her father.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E07 - Aftermath
2.plot: After new evidence of that fateful night is found, Emilia strives for peace in Mexico. But a grieving Canek has other plans.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E08 - Between Two Worlds
2.plot: Ovni assumes an undercover persona and infiltrates Los Pinos to get closer to Raúl. Emiliano receives a death threat.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E09 - Decisions
2.plot: Emilia takes drastic measures when she and Canek head to the hospital to see their wounded family members. Ana is surprised by Ofelia.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E10 - Resistance
2.plot: Emilia's demands change as the hostage situation continues. Canek is tormented by his grief, and his visions of La Mosca threaten to overwhelm him.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E11 - Metamorphosis
2.plot: Zyan is startled by who Santi has taken as his prisoners. Emilia finally comes face to face with Kelly Crawford, who has a proposal for her.

2.title: FR - Ingobernable - S02E12 - Hope
2.plot: As Emilia squares off against Kelly, she is surprised by María's reaction to the drug-trafficking queen. Ana readies herself for battle.

meta.plot: The First Lady of Mexico has big plans to improve conditions for the country. As she starts to lose faith in her husband, President Diego Nava, she finds herself at a crossroad where she will need to find a way to deal with a great challenge.

FR - Juda - S01E01 - Ye Shall Not Eat of It, Neither Shall Ye Touch It, Lest Ye Die
1.plot: Juda Ben Haim is a showy little thug, on his way to the biggest gambling in Romania with the money of a dangerous French mobster. A mysterious and beautiful woman shows up and changes all the picture.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E02 - Appoint a Teacher for Yourself and Avoid Doubt
1.plot: The French mafia is chasing Juda. He manages to escape them, but got kidnapped by a mysterious Rabbi, who explains him how to deal with his new power, while the police is chasing him.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E03 - Traineth My Hands for War, and My Fingers for Battle
1.plot: The Rabbi continues his lessons to Juda. Asher tries to get a new passports for them, and things goes mad when the french mobster finds them.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E04 - If He Come to Slay Thee, Forestall by Slaying Him
1.plot: Tania pursuing after Juda alone, while Asher got arrested by the police. After his interrogation, Mister Jacques appears to make a threat.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E05 - Who Is Powerful? One Who Overcomes His Inclinations
1.plot: Orit finds a connection between all the victims. Juda tries to break Asher out of prison by using his abilities despite the Rabbi's advice.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E06 - And Esau Said to Jacob: Pour Into Me Some of This Red, Red, for I Am Faint
1.plot: Juda gets a lesson about pride. Moti follows after Orit. Dotan convinced Avihai to look into another case to find a connection between all the recent murders.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E07 - God of Great Deeds, Find Us Forgiveness, at the Time of Ne'ila
1.plot: Shinko and his gang finds Juda and fights him. Tania and The Rabbi has to make tough choices. Asher confronts Menachem to get info about Juda, who needs to find a shelter before dawn.

1.title: FR - Juda - S01E08 - He Perceives a Matter's Outcome at Its Inception
1.plot: Asher and Menachem finds Juda, only to find out that The Rabbi has been kidnapped by Mister Jacques's crew. Juda breaks into Mister Jacques's house, who offers him to play Russian roulette for all or nothing.

To escape reality 17-year-old Leila turns to a secret virtual paradise. Her real journey begins when this digital Eden turns dark.

1.plot: When Leila finds Red Pill, a secret paradise hidden on the edges of a virtual reality game, she meets the mysterious Tess.

1.title: FR - Kiss Me First - S01E06 - You Can Never Go Home
