meta.plot: Gabriel Cauvy contends with the sudden death of his wife, Rebecca, in a suspicious car wreck. When the police blame the crash on Rebecca for drunk driving, Gabriel sets out to clear her name, but his search for the truth is more dangerous than he could have imagined.
A link in their pasts leads an honest cop to a fugitive gang boss, whose cryptic warning spurs the officer on a quest to save Mumbai from cataclysm.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E01 - Ashwathama
1.plot: A mysterious phone call from an anonymous man leads police officer Sartaj Singh on a chase around Mumbai in a dangerous cat-and-mouse game.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E02 - Halahala
1.plot: News of Ganesh Gaitonde creates a stir among Mumbai's VIPs, from politicians to film stars. Removed from the case, Sartaj begins his own investigation.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E03 - Atapi Vatapi
1.plot: The woman found in the bunker leads Sartaj to Gaitonde's thug, Bunty. In a flashback, Gaitonde recalls stealing a lucky charm from rival Suleiman Isa.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E04 - Brahmahatya
1.plot: TV starlet Nayanika visits Bunty with a hidden camera. In the mid-'80s, Gaitonde discovers a racket even more lucrative than drugs and guns: politics.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E05 - Sarama
1.plot: To save Nayanika, Sartaj intervenes during a RAW operation. In 1992, as political unrest increases, so does the bloodshed from Gaitonde and Isa's feud.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E06 - Pretakalpa
1.plot: When Sartaj's constable, Katekar, is pressured to investigate the disappearance of a young man from a Muslim slum, disastrous consequences follow.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E07 - Rudra
1.plot: Hoping to tie up the many loose ends of their case, Sartaj and Anjali reunite to figure out how the enigmatic Trivedi is linked to Gaitonde's prophecy.

1.title: FR - Sacred Games - S01E08 - Yayati
1.plot: To save Mumbai from impending doom, Sartaj races against time to find out who Gaitonde's third father is and what's planned to happen on the 25th day.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E01 - Matsya
2.plot: After making a discovery in Gaitonde's bunker, Sartaj joins a mission to foil a deadly conspiracy. In 1994, Gaitonde resurfaces in a new location.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E02 - Siduri
2.plot: With the terrorist-cell investigation underway, Sartaj visits Guruji’s ashram. In the late '90s, Gaitonde is urged to seek a spiritual anchor.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E03 - Apasmara
2.plot: Sartaj traces how Shahid Khan’s nuclear consignment was delivered to India. In the early 2000s, Gaitonde takes bold action to maintain his notoriety.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E04 - Bardo
2.plot: Sartaj’s team tries to reach Shahid Khan via an internet chatroom. In 2003, Gaitonde's growing disenchantment with his life brings him closer to Guruji.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E05 - Vikarna
2.plot: As Sartaj's team baits a trap for Shahid Khan, Majid suspects a department member. Immersed in ashram life, Gaitonde learns of Guruji’s lethal plans.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E06 - Azrael
2.plot: Batya lets Sartaj in on several secrets, leaving him reeling and conflicted. Gaitonde returns to Mumbai to set Guruji’s destructive plan in motion.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E07 - Torino
2.plot: After committing a drastic act, Gaitonde can’t silence Guruji’s voice in his mind. Parulkar reaches a shocking realization. Sartaj makes a breakthrough.

2.title: FR - Sacred Games - S02E08 - Radcliffe
2.plot: Unsettling truths, complex betrayals and unforeseen connections emerge for Sartaj, Gaitonde and Shahid Khan as doomsday descends on Mumbai.

meta.plot: The nerve-racking events of a cold winter's day, seen from two different perspectives. The odd episodes tell the story of a team of police negotiators and special forces who respond to a hostage crisis in a small bank branch. The even episodes tell exactly the same events, only through the eyes of the criminals inside and their victims.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E01 - Chapter One, Outside
1.plot: A bank robbery shocks a small Flemish town. The robbers barricade themselves inside and hold a number of bank employees and customers hostage. The police arrive on the premises and try to contain the situation. Negotiations begin.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E02 - Chapter One, Inside
1.plot: Dawn in a small Flemish town. Two robbers make their way to a bank branch, where they take staff members, one customer and two children hostage. The perpetrators then wait for the police to arrive to make clear their demands.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E03 - Chapter Two, Outside
1.plot: A shooting incident threatens to escalate the situation. Ivo wants to know what exactly is going on inside the bank; Ibrahim has a hard time negotiating; and Vos cannot stop thinking about her sick father.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E04 - Chapter Two, Inside
1.plot: The robbers press the hostages to get as much money as possible to a safe place, but not every hostage is willing to help. When the police take drastic action, it looks like things might get out of hand.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E05 - Chapter Three, Outside
1.plot: Vos is forced off the case against her will, but the affair keeps nagging at her. She is convinced something’s not quite right. Eventually, she makes a startling discovery that throws a new light on things.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E06 - Chapter Three, Inside
1.plot: One of the hostages clearly knows more about the situation, but the hostages seem to put their trust in one another. At the same time, the robbers get a surprise visit, while Susan faces a thorny dilemma.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E07 - Chapter Four, Outside
1.plot: The police secretly penetrate the bank in an effort to free the hostages, and see their suspicions confirmed. At the same time, Arne has great trouble keeping press and public in the dark about the whole operation.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E08 - Chapter Four, Inside
1.plot: The police are closing in on the robbers, who are growing increasingly nervous. They try to do a runner, but Walter and Noor fight back. At the same time, Serge faces a major confrontation.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E09 - Chapter Five, Outside
1.plot: Noor has gone missing. A search party is sent out for her. Ibrahim and his colleagues have started interviewing the released hostages, and Ibrahim is convinced one of them is lying.

1.title: FR - The Day - S01E10 - Chapter Five, Inside
1.plot: An all-out effort is made to find Noor. Meanwhile, Elias and his henchmen devise a plan for divvying up the money, but the outcome is not positive for all.

meta.plot: Little animals embark on big adventures across the U.S. in a dramatic nature series that explores their hidden worlds and epic survival stories.

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E01 - Arizona
1.plot: In Arizona, critters brave a harsh frontier, and a young kangaroo rat must be nimble to dodge a rattlesnake, a Gila monster — and a dirt bike.

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E02 - New York
1.plot: While housemates are away, a pampered golden hamster will play. Will he slow his roll when he lands on the streets of NYC and finds true adventure?

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E03 - Minnesota
1.plot: A burrowing owl evades caddies at a golf course before a ferret forces him far from the fairway. He'll have to outfox his opponents to get home.

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E04 - Texas
1.plot: In a hostile Texas landscape, a ranch offers fast food to an agile mother mouse. But she must be clever to avoid turning into a barn owl's dinner.

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E05 - Louisiana
1.plot: Keen eyesight and a playful nature lead the way when a special squirrel explores a suburban home, the least likely place to meet his surprising match.

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E06 - Florida
1.plot: Intellect meets agility in the Florida Everglades as a high-stakes game of raven vs. rat goes down in a fishing hut. Can these foes ever be friends?

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E07 - Washington
1.plot: Rescued from the trash and ready to roam, a newly hatched lucky duckling tours her new habitat: a boy's bedroom. But her sanctuary teems with danger.

1.title: FR - Tiny Creatures - S01E08 - New Hampshire
1.plot: As night falls, a shy striped skunk prowls for grub till a roving rodent opens up her world. When confronted by a hawk, will she spray or will she go?

meta.plot: A decade after their wild summer as junior counselors, the gang reunites for a weekend of bonding, hanky-panky and hair-raising adventures.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E01 - Reunion
1.plot: In August 1991, the far-flung alums of Camp Firewood make their way to Maine for a long awaited reunion.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E02 - Softball
1.plot: Beth drops a bomb shell, McKinley grows suspicious of the nanny, and Andy spars with the new cool kid at camp. Meanwhile, a sinister plan takes shape.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E03 - Tigerclaw
1.plot: While Katie and Andy head out on a mission to save the camp, Lindsay follows a hot tip, and Donna approaches Victor with a surprising request.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E04 - Lunch
1.plot: A newcomer shakes up the chemistry at camp. Mitch reaches out to an old friend for help. Susie's return to the theater creates a stir.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E05 - King of Camp
1.plot: Andy challenges Deegs to a "King of Camp" showdown, Neil helps Vic prepare for his big moment, and troubling discoveries abound for the Firewood gang.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E06 - Rain
1.plot: As a storm lashes the camp, tensions between lovers and rivals boil over, and Vic's date takes a turn for the weird.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E07 - Dance
1.plot: While Mitch's posse scrambles to thwart Reagan's plan, Coop delivers an emotional speech at the dance, and the shocking secret comes to light.

1.title: FR - Wet Hot American Summer: Ten Years Later - S01E08 - End Summer Night's Dream
1.plot: With the clock ticking and their options are running out Camp Firewood family braces for disaster. But there are more surprises in store.

1.title: FR - Strike - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Cormoran Strike, an injured war veteran turned PI, and secretary Robin Ellacott seek the truth surrounding the mysterious death of supermodel Lula Landry.

1.title: FR - Strike - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Strike makes a breakthrough. Robin is offered a permanent job in HR but is reluctant to take it.

1.title: FR - Strike - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Long-buried secrets are revealed, putting Strike and Robin in danger as they close in the killer.

2.title: FR - Strike - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: War veteran turned private investigator Cormoran Strike investigates the disappearance of a provocative author. Robin is caught between Strike and Matthew's hopes.

2.title: FR - Strike - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Delving deeper into the hidden meanings and concealed secrets of Bombyx Mori, Strike and Robin scour all corners of London's literary world to unmask the killer.

3.title: FR - Strike - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: A dismembered leg sent to Strike's office sends both his and Robin's lives into disarray, forcing them to confront spectres from their pasts.

3.title: FR - Strike - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: Strike and Robin's partnership reaches breaking point as Robin's wedding approaches, and they disagree about how to ensnare a man who abuses children.

4.title: FR - Strike - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: Cormoran Strike and Robin Ellacott are at odds following Robin’s wedding to Matthew, but there’s no time to mull over the new distance within their professional relationship, as a frightening visit from a potential client puts a new case on the table - and Robin and Strike set to work looking into reports of a strangled child.

4.title: FR - Strike - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: A startling discovery seems to confirm the story of the strangled child, but the team are forced to leave the scene before they can properly investigate. Fearing their witness is in danger, they redouble their efforts to find him.

4.title: FR - Strike - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: Robin discovers a startling truth close to home. The government minister’s blackmailer becomes the prime suspect in the case, but Robin and Strike believe there was an accomplice.

4.title: FR - Strike - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: Robin admits the truth to Strike, and a valuable clue helps them solve the case. Season finale.

5.title: FR - Strike - S05E01 - Episode 1
5.plot: Strike is approached by a woman asking for help to find her mother, Margot Bamborough, who went missing in 1974 when a psychopathic serial killer stalked the streets.

5.title: FR - Strike - S05E02 - Episode 2
5.plot: The investigation takes a dangerous turn as a disturbing piece of evidence leads Robin and Strike into London’s underworld. Robin risks her life by pursuing a vicious suspect.

5.title: FR - Strike - S05E03 - Episode 3
5.plot: Spurred on by the father of a young woman who also went missing in the 1970s, the detectives attempt to outwit an incarcerated serial killer who may hold the key to the case.

5.title: FR - Strike - S05E04 - Episode 4
5.plot: Strike realises that Margot’s killer is responsible for many other murders that have gone undetected, and lays a trap.

6.title: FR - Strike - S06E01 - Episode 1
6.plot: Edie Ledwell, the co-creator of a cult TV cartoon, The Ink Black Heart, is being harassed by an online figure, Anomie. She asks Robin to uncover Anomie's true identity.

6.title: FR - Strike - S06E02 - Episode 2
6.plot: Robin, Strike and Barclay all take risks to further the investigation now that they think Anomie probably killed Edie Ledwell. Strike receives an unexpected and unwelcome visitor.

6.title: FR - Strike - S06E03 - Episode 3
6.plot: Robin and Strike make a major breakthrough, having eliminated several suspects. Robin's cover is blown, and Strike stays the night at her new flat. Meanwhile, Anomie claims another two victims.

6.title: FR - Strike - S06E04 - Episode 4
6.plot: The agency is the target of a devastating attack. Strike figures out who killed Edie, and having secured proof, Robin puts herself in danger in order to save lives.

meta.plot: A war veteran turned private detective operates out of a tiny office in London’s Denmark Street. Although wounded both physically and psychologically, his unique insight and background as a military police investigator prove crucial in solving complex crimes that have baffled the police. Based on the bestselling novels written by J.K. Rowling under the pseudonym Robert Galbraith.
Old-school police detective Pierre Niemans and his former student Camille Delaunay tackle complex, brutal murder cases.

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E01 - The Last Hunt (1)
1.plot: A mutilated corpse is found during a forest hunting party and it seems the victim was the heir to a family fortune. As Niemans and Camille question his immediate circle, his sister is also targeted.

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E02 - The Last Hunt (2)
1.plot: Niemans and Camille are put on the track of a curse that is rumoured to be placed on the sons of the Von Geyersberg family. But are the rich clan really the victims or is there a killer among them?

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E03 - The Day of the Ashes (1)
1.plot: In a wine-growing region at harvest time, a battered corpse is discovered under rubble when a vault collapses during the renovation of a chapel, destroying a fresco. Was it an accident or foul play?

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E04 - The Day of the Ashes (2)
1.plot: When Niemans obtains X-ray images of the damaged frescos, they provide further insight into the case, but does a missing fragment from the biblical scenes portrayed hold the key to the killer?

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E05 - The Children's Crusade (1)
1.plot: When two men discover the severed hand of a child, Niemans and Camille find the local police distracted by the case of a serial killer armed with a rifle. Can they find clues at a children's home?

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E06 - The Children's Crusade (2)
1.plot: Two more people are shot dead, in the cemetery: a married couple who took in foster children. But a quotation from an ancient tale about an ill-fated group of children on a memorial provides a clue.

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E07 - Song of Darkness (1)
1.plot: Niemans witnesses the death of a monk named Brother Guillaume who utters the words 'the sword and the snake' with his dying breath and has the palm of his left hand burned to hide a mysterious tattoo

1.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S01E08 - Song of Darkness (2)
1.plot: It seems the monks believe they have discovered sinister secret messages in the ancient music they've been studying. As Camille and Niemans get closer to the truth, they encounter a satanic sect.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E01 - Innocentes (1)
2.plot: A woman is found dead in the steam room of a spa. She looks 20 years younger than she is. Investigations take Niémans and Delaunay to the next village.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E02 - Innocentes (2)
2.plot: The body of another spa client is found. What's the connection between the village, the spa director whose clients are being killed and the legends that seem to terrify everyone?

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E03 - Furta Sacra (1)
2.plot: Niémans and Delaunay explore the dark side of the human soul, along a road dotted with unexplained deaths. Their bond strengthens when Camille's son gets into a desperate situation.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E04 - Furta Sacra (2)
2.plot: Camille finds a cryptic note from the killer in her jacket. A second murder occurs while relics are stolen from a nearby town.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E05 - Kenbaltyu (1)
2.plot: The body of a black woman is discovered with a hash symbol carved into her forehead. Investigations lead the detectives to a migrant camp.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E06 - Kenbaltyu (2)
2.plot: Camille meets the Professor, an authority figure at the camp. When a second body is found, the mystery deepens. A demon myth is terrifying the migrant camp. His calling card is a carved hash symbol.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E07 - Lignee de Verre (1)
2.plot: The butler of the Monferville estate finds a 17-year-old in a pitiful condition. The teenager claims to be Herminien, a son of the family who disappeared 6 years ago. Camille is looking for her son Léo.

2.title: FR - The Crimson Rivers - S02E08 - Lignee de Verre (2)
2.plot: Camille suspects her son Léo is pretending to be the missing boy. What a shock when the grieving mother confirms that the boy is Herminien. The case takes a new turn when a DNA test reveals no match between Camille and Léo.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: With the help of Vic and Henry, Longmire investigates a backcountry murder with ties to a tribal family.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E02 - The Dark Road
1.plot: Longmire and his team investigate the death of an exotic dancer with possible Amish roots. Cady's new relationship stirs up controversy.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E03 - A Damn Shame
1.plot: Longmire uncovers long-buried family secrets when he probes the deaths of a man and his award-winning horses in a barn fire.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E04 - The Cancer
1.plot: A fisherman discovers the bodies of two murder victims, including a teen from the Cheyenne reservation.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E05 - Dog Soldier
1.plot: Walt and the team look into the disappearances of several Cheyenne foster children and an unregistered sex offender.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E06 - The Worst Kind of Hunter
1.plot: Walt suspects a bear was baited to fatally attack a released murderer. Branch's retired uncle, a former sheriff, can't resist the lure of law enforcement.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E07 - 8 Seconds
1.plot: A wealthy beer distributor is brutally assaulted for a seemingly worthless painting; Vic's husband is jealous of her relationship with Walt; Branch's father uncovers information damaging to Walt's campaign.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E08 - An Incredibly Beautiful Thing
1.plot: Henry uses his tracking abilities to locate an unstable young woman who may be involved in the murder of a gas-station owner.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E09 - Dogs, Horses and Indians
1.plot: The Tribal Council president is found dead on county land but it s clear he died elsewhere and there is soon a large suspect list. Walt deals with feelings of betrayal when he uncovers Cady and Branch s affair.

1.title: FR - Longmire - S01E10 - Unfinished Business
1.plot: In the first-season finale, a teen is murdered after being acquitted of raping a Cheyenne girl. Later, Walt is forced to finally confront his wife’s death.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E01 - Unquiet Mind
2.plot: A prison transfer goes awry and Walt urgently pursues a serial killer and his fellow escapees, who have taken hostages, up a mountain. Facing an impending storm with very limited resources, Walt’s mettle is put to the test and hypothermic hallucinations force him to face his past.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E02 - Carcasses
2.plot: When a body is found in a compost heap, the victim's history of abusive behavior leads to a varied list of suspects. Walt and the team must cross county lines to track down the killer. Branch looks into Cady's abrupt departure from Absaroka.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E03 - Death Came in Like Thunder
2.plot: Walt and the team explore Absaroka's Basque community when a shepherd and his dog are found dead. Branch walks a thin line in his alliance with Jacob Nighthorse. Meanwhile, Cady looks to Detective Fales for answers about her mother's death.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E04 - The Road to Hell
2.plot: A cattle heist sends the team on an urgent search for the missing livestock and driver as well as the thieves. Walt is concerned by Vic's fearful behavior when she receives a mysterious bouquet of flowers.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E05 - Party's Over
2.plot: When a teenage girl is found dead, Walt and the team investigate ties to the illegal sale of prescription drugs. Meanwhile Henry reconnects with an old flame and Cady returns home.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E06 - Tell It Slant
2.plot: Walt is tipped off to the murder of a supposed psychic by the Contrary Warrior, a Cheyenne who does the opposite of what people expect. While deciphering his backwards clues, Walt must also deal with a public debate against Branch.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E07 - Sound and Fury
2.plot: After Henry overhears a disgruntled husband try to order a hit on his wife, Walt and the team must use what little information they have to prevent her murder. Vic is wary when an ex-cop from Philly shows up in Durant.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E08 - The Great Spirit
2.plot: When a wild horse is found dragging a dead body, Walt discovers evidence of an illegal rodeo at a local farm. Detective Fales comes to town to talk to Henry.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E09 - Tuscan Red
2.plot: Following an explosion on the reservation and the discovery of a charred dead body, Walt is bombarded with public confrontation as the Cheyennes blame the blast on gas leaked from fracking by Newett Energy. Meanwhile, Branch reconnects with Cady and uncovers information that could help him in the election.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E10 - Election Day
2.plot: On election day, Walt and Branch aren't thinking about politics when Cady is badly injured by a hit-and-run driver. Vic and Ferg investigate, and Walt has a flashback to when Cady was a little girl.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E11 - Natural Order
2.plot: When a game warden is killed alongside an elk that was poached, Walt discovers a connection to a rare expensive supplement. Walt completes his sacrifice, and Branch closes in on the truth about Cady's accident.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E12 - A Good Death Is Hard to Find
2.plot: Longmire investigates after he receives a safe deposit box from a just-murdered inmate that contains a severed finger that is linked to both a new murder and a 20-year-old armed robbery. At the same time, Vic's paranoia peaks when she suspects she is being stalked, forcing her to confide in Walt.

2.title: FR - Longmire - S02E13 - Bad Medicine
2.plot: Walt and Branch team up when an apparent suicide is connected to Cady's accident. Meanwhile, Detective Fales returns with warrants, forcing Walt and Henry to face what happened in Denver.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E01 - The White Warrior
3.plot: Walt deals with the aftermath of Henry's arrest and Branch's shooting.The search for the shooter, however, is complicated by Branch's insistence that it was someone known to be already dead.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E02 - Of Children and Travelers
3.plot: An investigation into the murder of a Russian adoptee leads the team into a shady underworld. Henry faces trouble behind bars while Cady attempts to secure him competent legal representation.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E03 - Miss Cheyenne
3.plot: Walt splits his time working on a murder investigation and serving as a judge for a local pageant. Cady hopes an old friend can help with Henry's case.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E04 - In the Pines
3.plot: Walt and the team track missing teenage campers on a leadership trip in the wilderness. Branch continues his unauthorized search for his shooter.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E05 - Wanted Man
3.plot: Walt teams up with Lucian Connally to narrow the field of suspects in his wife's murder. Branch's behavior causes problems.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E06 - Reports of My Death
3.plot: A media frenzy erupts when a long-lost heir who went missing 30 years earlier is found dead. Henry makes a risky decision on his own.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E07 - Population 25
3.plot: Vic's vacation turns deadly after she and Sean are kidnapped following an accident. Walt is forced to make an unusual alliance to rescue the pair.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E08 - Harvest
3.plot: A life insurance policy complicates the investigation into a farmer's apparent murder. Branch and Cady check out a lead in Denver. Vic receives an ultimatum from Sean.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E09 - Counting Coup
3.plot: Walt is seriously concerned by Branch's behavior, but makes a key discovery in the David Ridges case. Henry faces a major setback in his trial. Vic makes an important decision about her future.

3.title: FR - Longmire - S03E10 - Ashes to Ashes
3.plot: Walt seeks closure in his wife's murder and Henry's case. Branch is suspended but continues to investigate Jacob Nighthorse.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E01 - Down by the River
4.plot: The team struggles with the fallout from Branch's confrontation with Barlow, and Walt's crusade to bring Nighthorse to justice spins out of control.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E02 - War Eagle
4.plot: Walt is forced to split his focus between new evidence in a personal case, and the murder of a caretaker at a former Japanese internment camp.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E03 - High Noon
4.plot: The investigation of Nighthorse heats up, but not in the way that Walt was hoping for. Cady makes a shocking discovery.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E04 - Four Arrows
4.plot: A body found in the luggage of a tour bus further complicates Walt's troubles with Nighthorse. Henry makes a bold move to help a mother and son.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E05 - Help Wanted
4.plot: When the husband of a former soldier is assaulted during an apparent robbery, Walt is drawn into an emotionally charged investigation.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E06 - The Calling Back
4.plot: A young Native American girl is raped on the reservation, which sparks new, volatile tensions between local oil rig workers and the Cheyenne people.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E07 - Highway Robbery
4.plot: A highway robbery sets off an investigation into a strange relationship, while Walt struggles to let go of the past.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E08 - Hector Lives
4.plot: When a former suspect in a rape case ends up dead in another county, Walt and Vic aren't convinced the death is an accident.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E09 - Shotgun
4.plot: Henry's attempt at justice backfires, resulting in new problems for him and a new investigation for Walt.

4.title: FR - Longmire - S04E10 - What Happens on the Rez...
4.plot: The line between justice and the law gets even blurrier for Henry and Walt as their hunt for a killer intensifies.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E01 - A Fog That Won't Lift
5.plot: A shaky Walt searches for Donna as he and Vic reconstruct what happened in the cabin. Mathias has a deal for Henry. Cady tells Walt about a job offer.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E02 - One Good Memory
5.plot: Henry renegotiates his deal with Mathias. Walt's search for Donna leads to too many suspects. A phone message sends Walt down an unexpected path.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E03 - Chrysalis
5.plot: Walt unravels the puzzling case of a girl and her missing father. Henry helps Cady find a place on the rez. Malachi and Jacob's alliance is weakening.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E04 - The Judas Wolf
5.plot: Walt and Vic investigate the bizarre kidnapping of a despised drug company CEO. Henry and Mathias deal with the ramifications of an overdose.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E05 - Pure Peckinpah
5.plot: Mathias must join forces with Walt after Henry discovers a drug dealer's body. Vic solves her housing problem. Malachi puts a bounty on Hector's head.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E06 - Objection
5.plot: Depositions for Walt's case go badly. Ferg loses confidence in himself. Henry and Vic help lead Walt toward the big boss at Manifest Destinations.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E07 - From This Day Forward
5.plot: When treasure hunters discover a body in a hollow tree, Walt finds a connection to an old case. Cady struggles to help a battered woman on the rez.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E08 - Stand Your Ground
5.plot: Walt looks deeper into the Irish mob. Henry finds the book he needs, while Cady gets legal advice. Malachi and Jacob lob accusations at each other.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E09 - Continual Soiree
5.plot: Walt's obsession with Jacob leads to more tension with Cady. Vic testifies against Gilbert. Walt's anger erupts at the Red Pony.

5.title: FR - Longmire - S05E10 - The Stuff Dreams Are Made Of
5.plot: Walt gets more bad news from the mayor. Vic does a strange favor. As Walt learns what's behind the lawsuit, Henry and Cady each face tribal rituals.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E01 - The Eagle and the Osprey
6.plot: A bank robbery ends in a shooting, giving Sawyer more leverage against Walt. When Henry goes missing, Cady tells Walt about a disturbing vision.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E02 - Fever
6.plot: While Henry recuperates, Walt investigates the murder of a man whose land is popular with treasure hunters.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E03 - Thank You, Victoria
6.plot: Chance Gilbert's plea appearance takes a dramatic turn that pulls Walt away from his own case and sets him and Vic on the path to a showdown.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E04 - A Thing I'll Never Understand
6.plot: An emotional Vic re-examines her life choices. Henry and Jacob join forces to pursue Malachi. Ferg helps Meg's mother avoid the tribal police.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E05 - Burned Up My Tears
6.plot: As the civil trial begins, things don't look good for Walt -- especially after a murder puts him and Vic under suspicion.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E06 - No Greater Character Endorsement
6.plot: The bizarre death of a drug dealer points to a violent new Hector. Cady tries to help a sick child whose parents don’t trust Western medicine.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E07 - Opiates and Antibiotics
6.plot: Walt wonders if a presumed-dead member of the Irish mob is alive. Mathias questions Cady about Catori. A mobile clinic raises Henry's suspicions.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E08 - Cowboy Bill
6.plot: While Ferg secretly works the Cowboy Bill case, Walt and Vic try to find Shane Muldoon. Cady's office is trashed.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E09 - Running Eagle Challenge
6.plot: Vic gets a surprise visit from her father. An FBI agent helps Walt pin down the mole working with Malachi. A tough race enables Vic to move forward.

6.title: FR - Longmire - S06E10 - Goodbye Is Always Implied
6.plot: Jacob's troubles escalate at the casino. Walt gets an unexpected visitor. An inevitable confrontation leads to changed lives.

meta.plot: A Wyoming sheriff rebuilds his life and career following the death of his wife. Based on the “Walt Longmire” series of mystery novels written by best-selling author Craig Johnson.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E01 - Might Need a Bigger Boat
1.plot: The NT is home to over 150,000 crocs and one man, Matt Wright, is on a quest to protect them all.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E02 - Life Insurance Ain't That Good, Baby
1.plot: A family fishing trip turns dangerous when the catch is bigger than expected; Matt reveals his unique bond with a wild crocodile; the boys are stalked during a risky night-time operation.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E03 - Sink or Swim
1.plot: Matt attempts to relocate a crocodile threatening human lives. An unexpected rookie joins the team causing frustration for Willow. An airboat mission is derailed by an emergency.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E04 - Don’t Hold Back
1.plot: Matt sets out to prove that perseverance pays off; the team races against the clock to catch an evasive croc; and a romantic fishing trip is ruined when Matt takes a dangerous detour.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E05 - Trouble in Paradise
1.plot: A sightseeing boat is stalked by an aggressive monster croc. An emergency phone call turns Matt's day upside down. Matt is tasked with apprehending an "uncatchable" crocodile.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E06 - Escape Artist
1.plot: The team chase a bait-robbing croc under the cover of darkness; a cunning escape artist forces Matt to pursue a new strategy; the boys launch a rescue mission to save a disoriented deadly predator.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E07 - Feeding Time
1.plot: The rookie Finn has his hands full at Matt's croc sanctuary. On the Tiwi Islands, a new build tests the team. A huge croc in a small waterhole sets nerves (and a boat) on edge.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E08 - Don’t Get Chewed
1.plot: With a flash flood predicted, Matt and Willow improvise a trap to tempt a hungry croc; Kaia and Banjo hone their foraging skills with a First Nations elder; Finn’s forgetfulness almost ends in disaster.

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E09 - Wright or Wrong
1.plot: Kaia must deal with an unwanted visitor at home. A animal relocation tests Matt's skills for logistics and engineering. Banjo gets his first fishing rod. But will he catch a fish?

1.title: FR - Wild Croc Territory - S01E10 - The Reckoning
1.plot: The inexperienced Finn faces his last challenge; a teammate’s accomplishment is the subject of an outrageous celebration; Matt and Kaia unveil their stunning new home on the remote Tiwi Islands.

meta.plot: Australia’s wild and rugged Northern Territory is home to more than 150,000 crocodiles and one man is on a quest to protect them all. Wild Territory takes you inside the mission as legendary croc wrangler Matt Wright catches and relocates the biggest crocodiles on Earth to keep people and crocs safe.

meta.plot: La vie de Camille bascule quand l’homme qu’elle aime disparaît du jour au lendemain après avoir vidé son compte en banque. Elle décide de le retrouver et découvre qu’il séduit d’autres femmes dans le but de les escroquer. Camille va tout faire pour ouvrir les yeux à ses victimes aveuglement amoureuses pour faire front contre lui et obtenir justice. Arriveront-elles à le faire tomber ?

1.title: FR - L'Homme de nos vies - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - L'Homme de nos vies - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - L'Homme de nos vies - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - L'Homme de nos vies - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: The world's most iconic dog is ready for his close-up. Dive into new adventures with the happy-dancing, high-flying, big-dreaming beagle, who's joined by best friend Woodstock and rest of the Peanuts gang.

1.title: FR - The Snoopy Show - S01E01 - Happiness Is a Dancing Dog
1.plot: Snoopy writes a book about his younger days, reveals the origin of his friendship with Woodstock, and gets the dancing bug.

1.title: FR - The Snoopy Show - S01E02 - Never Bug a Beagle
1.plot: Snoopy invites Woodstock to move in with him, embarks on a mission to bring Sally's sandwich to school, and tries to cool off on a hot day.

1.title: FR - The Snoopy Show - S01E03 - The Curse of a Fuzzy Face
1.plot: Snoopy goes to a scary movie with Woodstock, advises Charlie Brown on his Halloween costume, and gives tricks to kids instead of treats.

1.title: FR - The Snoopy Show - S01E04 - Happiness Is a Snow Day
1.plot: Snoopy shows Marcie how to enjoy a snow day, helps Rerun retrieve a runaway sled, and builds a snowman with Woodstock.

1.title: FR - The Snoopy Show - S01E05 - Just Your Basic Beagle
1.plot: Snoopy forgets Woodstock's birthday, uses chores as payment at Lucy's yard sale, and replaces a daisy for Charlie Brown.

1.title: FR - The Snoopy Show - S01E06 - Bugable, Hugable, Beagle
1.plot: Woodstock protects a badminton birdie, Snoopy decides to pen a prize-winning novel, and he feels guilty when Rerun is injured while they’re playing.

1.title: FR - Eat the Rich: The GameStop Saga - S01E01 - I Like The Stock
1.plot: In 2020, a few plucky upstarts on Reddit spot an opportunity to get rich quick and stick it to Wall Street — by investing in a declining retail chain.

1.title: FR - Eat the Rich: The GameStop Saga - S01E02 - To the Moon
1.plot: The Redditors get more people on board with their plan, and GameStop stock starts flying up. But economic disaster could be on the horizon.

1.title: FR - Eat the Rich: The GameStop Saga - S01E03 - The Reckoning
1.plot: After the squeeze, one Redditor and investing app Robinhood come under suspicion for their ties to the financial establishment.

meta.plot: A community of amateur traders enacts a daring plan to get rich quick and wreak havoc on the stock market. But can they beat Wall Street at its own game?

1.title: FR - FIFA Uncovered - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 2015, 14 executive members of FIFA are arrested on suspicions of corruption. An investigation ensues into how a World Cup's host country is selected.

1.title: FR - FIFA Uncovered - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Joseph Sepp Blatter wins a dubious victory as FIFA president. As South Africa is chosen to host the 2010 Cup, rumors swirl around executive Jack Warner.

1.title: FR - FIFA Uncovered - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Following Russia and Qatar's unexpected wins of the 2018 and 2022 World Cup bids, shifty transactions come to light, suggesting bribery and betrayal.

1.title: FR - FIFA Uncovered - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Chuck Blazer makes a deal to evade prison. Sepp Blatter faces a thorny reelection. As FIFA looks to restore its image, questions remain about its future.

meta.plot: Des luttes de pouvoir aux enjeux politiques mondiaux, cette série explore l'histoire tumultueuse de la FIFA et les exigences liées à l'organisation d'une Coupe du monde.
Conspiration. Fraude. Violence. Meurtre. Ce qui se passe en ligne peut vite devenir bien réel. Et les conséquences, à l'image du Web, sont planétaires.

1.title: FR - Web of Make Believe: Death, Lies and the Internet - S01E01 - Death by SWAT
1.plot: When an online gamer makes a series of fraudulent 911 calls to lure SWAT teams to innocent people's homes, his targeted trickery turns to tragedy.

1.title: FR - Web of Make Believe: Death, Lies and the Internet - S01E02 - A Murder in D.C.
1.plot: The murder of political staffer Seth Rich in 2016 spawns a myriad of unfounded conspiracy theories as the man's family - and the truth - hang in the balance.

1.title: FR - Web of Make Believe: Death, Lies and the Internet - S01E03 - I'm Not a Nazi
1.plot: A women recounts her journey to becoming a mouthpiece for white nationalist hate speech, work that culminates in high-profile violence and murder.

1.title: FR - Web of Make Believe: Death, Lies and the Internet - S01E04 - Sextortion
1.plot: Several women recall their harrowing experiences with one man's heinous attempts at virtual blackmail, aimed at obtaining sensitive sexual material.

1.title: FR - Web of Make Believe: Death, Lies and the Internet - S01E05 - The Stingray (1)
1.plot: From counterfeit Beanie Babies to very real tax fraud: Two skilled hackers revisit the cyber schemes that landed them in the sights of law enforcement.

1.title: FR - Web of Make Believe: Death, Lies and the Internet - S01E06 - The Stingray (2)
1.plot: The FBI escalates its pursuit of an elusive hacker, but he soon turns the tables by questioning the legality of a key tool in their investigation.
